Matthew1:1 Okutondoora obukomooko bwa Yesu Kristo, Omwana wa Daudi, Omwana wa Abrahamu." 
Matthew1:2 Abrahamu akazaara Isaaka, Isaaka yaazaara Yakobo, Yakobo yaazaara Yuda n'abarumuna," 
Matthew1:3 Yuda yaazaara Pereezi na Zeera ahari Tamari, Pereezi yaazaara Hezirooni, Hezirooni yaazaara Raamu," 
Matthew1:4 Raamu yaazaara Aminadabu, Aminadabu yaazaara Nahasooni, Nahasooni yaazaara Salumooni," 
Matthew1:5 Salumooni yaazaara Boazi ahari Rahabu, Boazi yaazaara Obedi ahari Ruusi, Obedi yaazaara Yese," 
Matthew1:6 Yese yaazaara Daudi omugabe. Daudi yaazaara Sulemaani ahari muka Uria," 
Matthew1:7 Sulemaani yaazaara Rehoboamu, Rehoboamau yaazaara Abiya, Abiya yaazaara Asa," 
Matthew1:8 Asa yaazaara Yehoshafaati, Yehoshafaati yaazaara Yoramu," 
Matthew1:9 Yoramu yaazaara Hezekia," 
Matthew1:10 Hezekia yaazaara Manaase, Manaase yaazaara Amoni, Amoni yaazaara Yosia," 
Matthew1:11 Yosira yaazaara Yekonia n'abarumuna omu biro by'okutwarwa Babulooni omu bukwatwa. 
Matthew1:12 Bwanyima y'okutwarwa Babulooni Yekonia akazaara Shealitieli, Shealitieli yaazaara Zerubabeeli," 
Matthew1:13 Zerubabeeli yaazaara Abiuda, Abiuda yaazaara Eliakimu, Eliakimu yaazaara Azori," 
Matthew1:14 Azori yaazaara Zadoki, Zadoki yaazaara Akimu, Akimu yaazaara Eliudi," 
Matthew1:15 Eliudi yaazaara Eleazaari, Eleazaari yaazaara Mataani, Mataani yaazaara Yakobo," 
Matthew1:16 Yakobo yaazaara Yosefu iba wa Mariamu; ogwo niwe nyina wa Yesu orikwetwa Kristo. 
Matthew1:17 Nikwo kugira ngu baishenkuru boona okwiha ahari Abrahamu okuhitsya ahari Daudi n'ikumi na bana; kandi okwiha ahari Daudi okuhitsya aha kutwarwa Babulooni n'ikumi na bana; kandi okwiha aha kutwarwa Babulooni okuhitsya ahari Kristo n'okumi na bana. 
Matthew1:18 Okuzaarwa kwa Yesu Kristo kukaba kuri kuti. Mariamu nyina wa Yesu akaba naagambwa Yosefu obugyenyi. Kwonak Yosefu ku yaabaire atakamutaahize, Mariamu yaareebwa aine enda y'Omwoyo Orikwera." 
Matthew1:19 Mbwenu Yosefu iba, ahabw'okuba omuntu ohikiriire, tiyaayenda kumuhemura, yaateekateeka kwita obugyenyi bwe bwesherekye." 
Matthew1:20 Kwonka ku yaabaire naakiteekateeka atyo, maraika wa Mukama yaamwizira omu kurooto, yaamugira ati: Iwe Yosefu mwene Daudi, otatiina kutaasya Mariamu omukazi waawe, ahakuba enda ei aine n'ey'Omwoyo Orikwera;" 
Matthew1:21 aryazaara omwana w'omwojo, kandi oryamweta Yesu, ahabw'okuba niwe arijuna abantu be omu bibi byabo." 
Matthew1:22 Ebyo byona bikabaho ahabw'okuhikiiriza ebi Mukama yaagambire naaraba omuri nabi, naagira ati:" 
Matthew1:23 Reeba, omwishiki oshugaine Aryagira enda, azaare omwana w'omwojo, Eiziina rye aryayetwa Emanueli, amakuru ngu Ruhanga ari hamwe naitwe." 
Matthew1:24 Yosefu ku yaasisiimukire omu turo, yaakora nk'oku maraika wa Mukama yaamuragiira; yaataasya omukazi we;" 
Matthew1:25 kwonka tararaire nawe okuhitsya obu yaazaire omwana; ishe akamweta Yesu. 
Matthew2:1 Yesu ku yaazaariirwe Betelehemu eya Buyudaaya omu biro by'omugabe Heroode, hakaija abanyabwengye abaarugire oburugwa-izooba, baahika Yerusaalemu nibabuuza bati:" 
Matthew2:2 Omugabe w'Abayudaaya ozairwe ari nkahi? Ahabw'okuba tukareeba enyonyoozi ye oburugwa-izooba, mbwenu twizire kumuramya." 
Matthew2:3 Omugabe Heroode, ku yaakihuriire, yaayemereza omutima ahamwe n'aba Yerusaalemu boona;" 
Matthew2:4 nikwo kuteerana abanyamurwa abakuru n'abahandiiki b'abantu boona, akabeehanuuzaho ahu Kristo yaaragwirwe kuzaarirwa." 
Matthew2:5 Baamugarukamu bati: Omuri Betelehemu eya Buyudaaya; ahabw'okuba nikwo kyahandiikirwe nabi ngu: 
Matthew2:6 Naiwe, Betelehemu ey'omu ishaza rya Buyudaaya, Tori muto okukira boona ab'omu banyiginya baaryo; Ahabw'okuba omuriiwe nimwo omutegyeki ariruga, Oririisa abantu bangye Abaisraeli." 
Matthew2:7 Bwanyima Heroode yaayeta abo banyabwengye omu mubonano, yaababuuza obunaku obu baareebeiremu enyonyoozi;" 
Matthew2:8 yaabatuma Betelehemu naabagira ati: Mwirooko mugyende, musherure gye ogwo mwana; ku muraamubone, mugarukye mungambire, naanye nze kumuramya." 
Matthew2:9 Nabo ku baaherize kuhurira ebi yaabatuma, baarabaho baagyenda; kandi enyonyoozi ei baareebire oburugwa-izooba yaabeebembera, okuhitsya obu yaayemereire ahu omwana yaabaire ari." 
Matthew2:10 Ku baareebire enyonyoozi, baayesiima munonga n'okushemererwa kwingi;" 
Matthew2:11 baataaha omu nju, baashangamu omwana na Mariamu nyina, bainama, baamuramya. Baakomoorora emitwaro yaabo, baamuha ebiconco by'ezaabu n'eby'emigaju na sumuruna." 
Matthew2:12 Kandi ku baahabwirwe Ruhanga omu kirooto, ngu barekye kugaruka owa Heroode, baimuka, baatoora ogundi muhanda, baagaruka owaabo." 
Matthew2:13 Ku baaherize kugyenda, maraika wa Mukama yaareebekyera Yosefu omu kirooto, yaamugira ati: Imuka otware omwana na nyina, ohungire Misri, ogumeyo okuhitsya obu ndikugambira; ahakuba Heroode naasherura omwana kumwita." 
Matthew2:14 Atyo yaimuka, yaahunzya omwana na nyina nyekiro, yaaza Misri," 
Matthew2:15 yaagumayo okuhitsya obu Heroode yaafiire. Ekyo kikabaho okuhikiiriza ebi Mukama yaagambire naara omuri nabi ati: Nkeeta omwana wangye kuruga Misri. 
Matthew2:16 Kandi Heroode ku yaareebire abo banyabwengye bamureebize, yaagira ekiniga kingi, yaatuma abantu kwita abaana b'aboojo boona abaabaire bari Betelehemu n'omu kyanga ekyo kyona, abaabaire bahikize emyaka ebiri, kandi n'abatakagihikize, naihirira aha bunaku obu yaamanyisiibwemu abanyabwengye." 
Matthew2:17 Mbwenu eki nabi Yeremia yaagambire kyahikiirizibwa, eki yaagizire ati:" 
Matthew2:18 Enduuru ekahurirwa omuri Raama, Okucura n'okuborooga munonga, Rakeeli naaririra abaana be; Kandi takyenda kuyaagirwa, ahakuba bahweireho." 
Matthew2:19 Bwanyima Heroode ku yaafiire, maraika wa Mukama yaayeyorekyere Yosefu omu kirooto omuri Misri," 
Matthew2:20 yaamugira ati: Imuka otware omwana na nyina, ogarukye omu nsi ya Israeli; ahabw'okuba abaabaire nibenda kwita omwana bafiire." 
Matthew2:21 Yaimuka, yaatwara omwana na nyina, yaagaruka omu nsi ya Israeli." 
Matthew2:22 Kwonka ku yaahuriire ngu Arukelao niwe ayemire Bayudaaya, ahunguriire Heroode ishe, yaatiina kugarukayo; ku yaahabwirwe Ruhanga omu kirooto, yaakuba yaaza omu ishaza rya Galilaaya." 
Matthew2:23 Nikwo kugyenda, akatuura omuri tauni erikwetwa Nazareesi, ekigambo eki baanabi baagambire kibone kuhikiirira ngu, Aryayetwa Omunazarayo." 
Matthew3:1 Omu biro ebyo Yohaana Omubatizi akaija naabuurira omu ihamba rya Buyudaaya," 
Matthew3:2 ati: Mweteise, ahakuba obukama bw'omu iguru bwiriire haihi." 
Matthew3:3 Mumanye ngu ogu niwe nabi Isaaya yaagambireho, obu yaagira ati: Eiraka ry'orikugambira omu ihamba ati: Mushemeze omuhanda gwa Mukama, Mugorore otuhanda twe." 
Matthew3:4 Kandi Yohaana akaba naajwara ekijwaro ky'ebyoya by'engamira, naayezirikisa orukoba rw'oruhu omu nda; eby'okurya bye bikaba biri enzigye n'obwoki bw'omu ishwa." 
Matthew3:5 Ahonaaho aba Yerusaalemu n'aba Buyudaaya n'ab'omu byanga ebiri haihi na Yorudani boona baija, baamushangayo;" 
Matthew3:6 yaababatiriza omu kyambu Yorudani nibaatura ebibi byabo. 
Matthew3:7 Kwonka ku yaareebire Abafarisaayo n'Abasadukaayo baingi nibaija kubatizibwa, yaababuuza ati: Imwe baana b'enjoka 'mwe, n'oha obahabwire kuhunga ekiniga ekirikwenda kwija?" 
Matthew3:8 Mbwenu nu mwane ebyana ebishemereire abeeteisize," 
Matthew3:9 muteehimbisa nimugira omu mitima yaanyu muti: Twine Abrahamu, niwe tatenkuriitwe; ahakuba nyowe nimbagambira nti: Ruhanga naabaasa amabaare aga kugaihiramu Abrahamu abaijukuru." 
Matthew3:10 Na mbwenu empango eteirwe aha kitsintsi ky'omuti; buri munti ogutarikwana byana birungi guryatemwa gunagwe omu muriro. 
Matthew3:11 Nyowe nimbabatiza n'amaizi ahabw'okweteisa, kwonka orikwija enyima yangye nankiza obushoboorozi; kandi tinshemereire na kumukwatira enkaito; We aryababatiza n'Omwoyo Orikwera n'omuriro." 
Matthew3:12 Orugari rwe ruri omu ngaro ze, ahunikye oburo omu kitara kye, kwonka ebishushunga aryabyotsya omu muriro ogutaraara." 
Matthew3:13 Omu biro ebyo Yesu akaruga Galilaaya, yaija Yorudani, yaashangayo Yohaana ngu amubatize." 
Matthew3:14 Kwonka Yohaana yaayenda kumwangira, naagira ati: Niinye ndikwenda ku ombatiza; kandi naiwe waija ahariinye?" 
Matthew3:15 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Mbwenu ikiriza tutwaze tutyo! ahakuba kitushemereire kuhikiiriza eby'okuhikiirira byona. Atyo yaamwikiriza. 
Matthew3:16 Yesu ku yaaherize kubatizibwa, yaaruga ati omu maizi, reeba, eiguru ryakinguuka, yaareeba Omwoyo wa Ruhanga naamushuumaho nk'enkombe," 
Matthew3:17 yaahurira eiraka niriruga omu iguru, nirigira riti: Ogu n'Omwana wangye ou nkunda, kandi ou nshemerererwa munonga." 
Matthew4:1 Okuruga aho Yesu yaayebemberwa Omwoyo kuza omu ihamba kwohibwa Sitaane. 
Matthew4:2 Ku yaamazire ebiro makumi ana atarikurya nyomushana na nyekiro, yaagira enjara." 
Matthew4:3 Omwohi yaija yaamugira ati: Ku oraabe ori Omwana Ruhanga, gambira amabaare aga gahindukye eby'okurya." 
Matthew4:4 Kwonka We yaamugarukamu ati: Kikahandiikwa ngu, Omuntu tatungwa by'okurya byonka, kureka n'ekigambo kyona ekiruga omu kanwa ka Ruhanga." 
Matthew4:5 Bwanyima yaamuhitsya omu rurembo orurikwera, yaamuta aha itungu rya hekalu," 
Matthew4:6 yaamugira ati: Ku oraabe ori Omwana wa Ruhanga, guruka oyetsimbe ahansi; ahakuba kikahandiikwa ngu, Aryaragiira baamaraika be, bakurinde; Nabo baryakutega emikono yaabo, Ngu orekye kuhikiza ekigyere kyawe aha ibaare." 
Matthew4:7 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: kandi omanye ku kyahandiikirwe ngu: Otaryosa Mukama Ruhanga waawe. 
Matthew4:8 Kandi Sitaane yaamuhitsya aha rushozi ruraingwa munonga, yaamworeka ensi z'abagabe boona n'ekitiinisa kyazo;" 
Matthew4:9 yaamugira ati: Ku orainame, wandamya, biriya byona niinyija kubikuha." 
Matthew4:10 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Rugaho, Sitaane, ahabw'okub akikahandiikwa ngu: Oramye Mukama Ruhanga waawe; obe niwe waaheereza wenka." 
Matthew4:11 Atyo Sitaane yaamurugaho; reeba baamaraika baija, baamuheereza." 
Matthew4:12 Kandi Yesu, ku yaahuriire ngu Yohaana abohirwe, yaakuba yaagaruka Galilaaya." 
Matthew4:13 Yaaruga Nazareesi, yaataaha Kaperenaumu ey'aha nyanja, yaaguma omu mashaza ga Zebuluuni na Nafutaali," 
Matthew4:14 ngu ekigambo eki nabi Isaaya yaagambire kihikiirire eki yaagizire ati: 
Matthew4:15 Omu ishaza rya Zebuluuni, n'erya Nafutaali, Haihi n'enyanja, seeri ya Yorudani, Galilaaya ey'Abanyamahanga," 
Matthew4:16 Abantu abaabaire bari omu mwirima Bakareeba omushana mwingi, N'abaabaire batuura omu nsi y'okufa n'omu kibunda kyakwo, Omushana gubajwereire." 
Matthew4:17 Okuruga obwo Yesu yaatandika kubuurira naagira ati: Mweteise, ahakuba obukama bw'omu iguru bwiriire haihi." 
Matthew4:18 Yesu ku yaabaire naaraba aha rubaju rw'enyanja ya Galilaaya, yaareeba enyineemwe ibiri, Simooni orikwetwa Petero, na Anderea omurumuna, nibatega obutimba omu nyanja; ahabw'okuba bakaba bari abajubi." 
Matthew4:19 Yaabagira ati: Mwije munkuratire, naanye ndyabagira abajubi b'abantu." 
Matthew4:20 Ahonaaho baatsigaho obutimba bwabo, baamukuratira." 
Matthew4:21 Ku yairiire omumaisho hakye, yaareeba abandi babiri enyineemwe, Yakobo mwene Zebedaayo, na Yohaana omurumuna, abaabaire bari omu bwato nibashumikanisa obutimba; nabo yaabeeta." 
Matthew4:22 Ahonaaho baatsigaho obwato na ishebo, baamukuratira." 
Matthew4:23 Bwanyima yaagyenda omuri Galilaaya yoona, naayegyesa omuri sinagogi zaabo, naabuurira engiri y'bukama, kandi naatamba endwara zoona n'obumuga bwona omu bantu." 
Matthew4:24 Ahabw'ebyo okurangaanwa kwe kwabuga omuri Siria yoona, abaabaire bakwatsirwe endwara ezitari zimwe, n'okuhururwa, n'abaabaire bariho baadaimoni, n'abarikugwa entsimbo, n'abazingazingirwe; kandi yaabakiza." 
Matthew4:25 Emitwe mingi y'abantu abarugire Galilaaya, Dekapooli, Yerusaalemu, Buyudaaya na seeri ya Yorudaani baamukuratira." 
Matthew5:1 Ku yaareebire emitwe y'abantu, yaatemba ekibungo. Ku yaaherize kushutama ahansi, abeegi be baija ah'ari;" 
Matthew5:2 yaatandika kugamba naabeegyesa ati: 
Matthew5:3 Baine omugisha abooro omu mutima, ahabw'okuba abo obukama bw'omu iguru n'obwabo." 
Matthew5:4 Baine omugisha abaganya; ahabw'okuba abo baryahuumuzibwa. 
Matthew5:5 Baine omugisha abacureezi; ahabw'okuba abo baryahungura ensi. 
Matthew5:6 Baine omugisha abagiria, eby'okuhikiirira enjara n'eiriho, ahabw'okuba abo baryahaaga." 
Matthew5:7 Baine omugisha abanyambabazi, ahabw'okuba abo baryagirirwa embabazi." 
Matthew5:8 Baine omugisha abashemeire omu mutima, ahabw'okuba abo baryareeba Ruhanga." 
Matthew5:9 Baine omugisha abagarukanisa abantu, ahabw'okuba abo baryayetwa abaana ba Ruhanga." 
Matthew5:10 Baine omugisha abahiigwa ahabw'okuhikiirira, ahabw'okuba obukama bw'omu iguru n'obwabo." 
Matthew5:11 Imwe mwine omugisha ku baribajuma, ku baribahiiga, ku baribabeiherera ekigambo kyona ekibi nibabantura." 
Matthew5:12 Mushemererwe, mwesiime munonga; ahabw'okuba ebihembo byanyu biryaba bingi omu iguru; kandi nikwo baahiigire batyo baanabi abaabandize imwe." 
Matthew5:13 Imwe muri omwoyo gw'ensi; beitu ku guraabe guhweirwemu ensha, muryagigaruramu muta? Niguba gutakiiine mugasho, kureka okunagwa aheeru, abantu bakaguribatiirira." 
Matthew5:14 Imwe muri omushana gw'ensi. Orurembo orwombekirwe aha rushozi tirubaasa kusherekwa. 
Matthew5:15 Kandi tihaine okongyeza etabaaza, akagijuumikira ekiibo, kureka agita aha kikondo kyayo kumurikira ab'omu nju boona." 
Matthew5:16 Omushana gwanyu gube nikwo gwajwa gutyo omu maisho g'abantu, bareebe emicwe yaanyu emirungi, babone kuhimbisa Shoimwe ori omu iguru." 
Matthew5:17 Mutateekateeka ngu nkaija kwihaho Ebiragiro n'ebya Baanabi. Tindaizire kubiihaho kureka okubihikiiriza. 
Matthew5:18 Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Eiguru n'ensi okuhitsya obu birihwaho, Ebiragiro tibirihwaho, n'obu yaakuba enyuguta emwe nari akatonyezi kamwe okuhitsya byona obu birihikiirizibwa." 
Matthew5:19 Omuntu weena orihenda ekiragiro kimwe ahari ebi, n'obu kyakuba kiri kikye okukira ebindi byona, akakyegyesa abantu atyo, aryayetwa munto omu bukama bw'omu iguru; kwonka oribikwata, akabyegyesa, ogwo aryayetwa mukuru omu bukama bw'omu iguru." 
Matthew5:20 Ahakuba nimbagambira nti: Okuhikiirira kwanyu ku kuriba kutakizire kuhikiirira kw'abahandiiki n'Abafarisaayo, timuritaaha mu bukama bw'omu iguru na kakye." 
Matthew5:21 Mukahurira ku kyaragiirwe aba ira ngu: otariita; kandi ngu: Oriita aryaba ashemereire kugiibwaho orubanja. 
Matthew5:22 Kwonka nyowe nimbagambira nti: omuntu weena origwerwa kubi mugyenzi we, aryaba ashemereire kugiibwaho orubanja; n'ogwo origambira mugyenzi we ati: Raaka! aryaba ashemereire kutwarwa omu ishengyero; kandi orumugira ati: ori ekifeera! aryaba ashemereire kunagwa omuri Gehena y'omuriro." 
Matthew5:23 N'ahabw'ekyo ku oraabe oreetsire empongano yaawe aha itambiro, waijukira aho eki oshobeize mugyenzi waawe," 
Matthew5:24 otsigye empongano yaawe omu maisho g'eitambiro, ogyende, obanze ogarukane nawe, bwanyima ogarukye oheyo empongano yaawe egyo." 
Matthew5:25 Rahuka kwikirizana n'ogwo orikukutabaariza, mukiri omu muhanda, orikukutabaariza atakaakuhayo aha muramuzi, n'omuramuzi akakuha omuserukare, naiwe okateebwa omu kihome." 
Matthew5:26 Buzimazima ninkugambira nti: Torirugamu okuhitsya obu oriihura eibanja ryona, otatsigyeyo nangwa na sente emwe." 
Matthew5:27 Mukahurira ku yaragiirwe ngu: Otarishambana. 
Matthew5:28 Kwonka nyowe nibmagambira nti: Orikureeba omukazi kamwetenga, biri aherize kumushambanaho omu mutima gwe." 
Matthew5:29 N'eriisho ryawe rya buryo ku riraabe nirikureetera kukora ekibi, oriihemu, orinagye; haakiri okufeerwa ekicweka kyawe kimwe, okukira omubiri gwawe gwona okunagwa omuri Gehena." 
Matthew5:30 Kandi omukono gwawe gwa buryo ku guraabe nigukureetera kukora ekibi, ogutemeho, ogunagye; haakiri okufeerwa ekicweka kyawe kimwe okukira omubiri gwawe gwona okunagwa omuri Gehena." 
Matthew5:31 Kandi kikagambwa ngu, omuntu weena ku araashende omukazi we, amuhe ebaruha y'okumushenda." 
Matthew5:32 Kwonka nyowe nimbagambira nti: Omuntu weena orishenda omukazi we, atamutuzire kushambana, biri aryaba amushambaniise, kandi orishwera ogwo oshenzirwe, biri aryaba ashambaine." 
Matthew5:33 Kandi mukahurira ku kyaragiirwe aba ira ngu: otarirahira ebishuba, kureka oryahikiiriza ahari Mukama ebi warahiire." 
Matthew5:34 Kwonka nyowe nimbagambira nti: otarirahira na kakye, n'obu ryakuba eiguru, ahakuba n'ekitebe kya Ruhanga," 
Matthew5:35 n'obu yaakuba ensi, ahakuba n'akatebe k'ebigyere bye, n'obu yaakuba Yerusaalemu, ahakuba n'orurembo rw'Omukama Omukuru." 
Matthew5:36 Otarirahira omutwe gwawe; ahakuba torikubaasa kweza kashokye kamwe n'obu kwakuba okukairaguza. 
Matthew5:37 Kwonka ebigambo byanyu bibe, Eego, Eego, nari Ngaaha, Ngaaha; ahakuba ebirikukira ahari ebyo biruga aha Mubi." 
Matthew5:38 Mukahuria ku kyagambirwe ngu: Eriisho riryarihwa eriisho; kandi eriino riryarihwa eriino. 
Matthew5:39 Kwonka nyowe nimbagambira nti: Otarirwana n'omuntu mubi. Omuntu weena orikuteera oruhi rw'omushaya gwa buryo, omuhindurire ogwa bumosho;" 
Matthew5:40 n'omuntu ku aryenda kukutabaariza ngu akwakye ekanzu yaawe, omuhe n'omunagiro gwawe." 
Matthew5:41 Kandi weena orikugyema kugyenda nawe mahiro emwe, ogyende nawe n'eya kabiri." 
Matthew5:42 Orikushaba, omuhe; orikweguzaho, otarimuteera amabega." 
Matthew5:43 Mukahurira ku kyagambirwe ngu: okunde mutaahi waawe, oyangye omuzigu waawe." 
Matthew5:44 Kwonka nyowe nimbagambira nti: Mukunde abazigu baanyu, kandi mushabire n'abarikubahiiga," 
Matthew5:45 mubone kuba abaana ba Shoimwe ori omu iguru; ahabw'okuba eizooba rye arijwisiza ababi n'abarungi, kandi agwisiza enjura abahikiriire n'abatahikiriire." 
Matthew5:46 Mbwenu ku muraabe nimukunda abarikubakunda, muryaheebwa bihembo ki? N'abahooza tikwo bakora batyo?" 
Matthew5:47 Kandi ku muraabe nimuramutsya beene waanyu bonka, abandi nimubakiza ki? N'abanyamahanga tikwo bakora batyo?" 
Matthew5:48 N'ahabw'ekyo mube abahikiriire nka Shoimwe ori omu iguru oku ahikiriire. 
Matthew6:1 Mwerinde, murekye kukorera eby'okuhikiirira byanyu omu maisho g'abantu ngu babareebe; mumanye ngu, ku muraabe nimukora mutyo, Shoimwe ori omu iguru taribaha bihembo." 
Matthew6:2 N'ahabw'ekyo ku origabira abooro, otaryeteerera enzamba, nk'oku endyarya zikora omuri sinagogi n'omu nguuto, ngu basiimwe abantu. Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Baherize kuheebwa ebihembo byabo." 
Matthew6:3 Kwonka ku oraabe waagabiire abooro, omukono gwawe gwa bumohso gurekye kumanya eki ogwa buryo gurikukora," 
Matthew6:4 okugaba kwawe kube omu mubonano; kandi Sho oreeba eby'omu mubonano aryakuha ebihembo. 
Matthew6:5 Ku muraabe nimushaba, murekye kuba nk'endyarya; ahabw'okuba bakunda kushaba beemereire omuri sinagogi n'omu mateeraniro g'enguuto, ngu bareebwe abantu. Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Abo baherize kuheebwa ebihembo byabo." 
Matthew6:6 Kwonka iwe ku oraaze kushaba, otaahe omu kishengye kyawe, obanze okingye orwigi, oshabe Sho ori omu mubonano; kandi Sho ogwo oreeba eby'omu mubonano, aryakuha ebihembo." 
Matthew6:7 Ku muraabe nimushaba, murekye kushaba nimugarukagaruka omu bigambo bya busha, nk'oku abanyamahanga bashaba; haza nibateekateeka ngu nibaija kuhurirwa ahabw'ebigambo byabo bingi." 
Matthew6:8 Mutariba nkabo; ahakuba Shoimwe amanya ebi mukyenire mutakamushabire. 
Matthew6:9 N'ahabw'ekyo mushabe muti: Tataitwe ow'omu iguru, Eiziina ryawe ryezibwe," 
Matthew6:10 Obukama bwawe bwije; Eby'okunda bikorwe omu nsi Nk'oku bikorwa omu iguru; 
Matthew6:11 Otuhe hati eby'okurya ebi otuha obutoohsa; 
Matthew6:12 Otusaasire amabanja gaitu, Nkaitwe oku tusaasira abu turikwihuza;" 
Matthew6:13 Otatutwara omu kwohibwa Kureka otujune Omubi. 
Matthew6:14 Ku murisaasira abantu eby'okushiisha byabo, naimwe Shoimwe ow'omu iguru aryabasaasira;" 
Matthew6:15 kwonka ku muriba mutarikusaasira bantu eby'okushiisha byabo, naimwe Shoimwe taribasaasira by'okushiisha byanyu." 
Matthew6:16 Ku muraabe nimwesiibyakwo, murekye kuba nk'endyarya, abeeyoreka baine enaku; ahakuba beeshiisha ahamaisho, ngu abantu babareebe ku beesiibizekwo. Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Abo baherize kuheebwa ebihembo byabo." 
Matthew6:17 Kwonka iwe, ku oraayesiibyekwo, ogume oyesiigye amajuta omu mutwe, onaabe ahamaisho," 
Matthew6:18 abantu barekye kukureeba ku oyesiibizekwo, kureka Sho ori omu mubonano; kandi Sho oreeba eby'omu mubonano aryakuha ebihembo." 
Matthew6:19 Mutaryebiiikira eitungo omu nsi, ahi ebiyenje n'omukyereenyo birisiisira, n'abashuma ahu barima bakariiba." 
Matthew6:20 Kwonka mwebiikire eitungo omu iguru, ahi ebiyenje n'omukyereenyo bitaririsiisira, n'abashuma ahu bataririma bakariiba;" 
Matthew6:21 ahakuba ahi eitungo ryawe riri, n'omutima gwawe niho guba." 
Matthew6:22 Etabaaza ey'omubiri niryo riisho. N'ahabw'ekyo eriisho ryawe ku riraabe riri rirungi, omubiri gwawe gwona nigwija kwijura omushana;" 
Matthew6:23 kwonka eriisho ryawe ku riraabe riri ribi, omubiri gwawe gwona nigwija kwijura omwirima. Mbwenu omushana oguri omuriiwe ku guraabe guri omwirima, omwirima ogwo ka ni mwingi!" 
Matthew6:24 Tihariho muntu orikubaasa kuheereza abakama babiri; ahakuba aryayangaho omwe, akunde ondi; nari aryagumira kyarimwe ahari omwe, agaye ondi. Timurikubaasa kuheereza Ruhanga na Mamona." 
Matthew6:25 N'ahabw'ekyo nimbagambira nti: Mutaryemereza emitima yaanyu nimuteekateeka aha by'amagara gaanyu, nimutonzya muti, Turyarya ki? Turyanwa ki? n'aha mibiri yaanyu muti, Turyajwara ki? Amagara tigarikukira eby'okurya, n'omubiri tigurikukira ebijwaro?" 
Matthew6:26 Mwetegyereze enyonyi z'omu mwanya; tizibiba, tizigyesha, n'obu kwakuba okuhunika omu bitara; kwonka Shoimwe ow'omu iguru aziriisa. Mbwenu imwe timurikuzikira?" 
Matthew6:27 N'oha omuriimwe orikubaasa kwongyera ekiro na kimwe aha rugyero rw'emyaka y'obukuru bwe ahabw'okwemereza omutima? 
Matthew6:28 Mbwenu n'enki ekibeemereresa emitima ahabw'ebijwaro? Mwetegyereze ebirabyo by'omu ishwa oku bimera; tibigira murimo, tibiruka myenda;" 
Matthew6:29 beitu nimbagambira nti: Na Sulemaani omu kitiinisa kye kyona taraizihiirwe bijwaro nka kimwe aharibyo. 
Matthew6:30 Mbwenu Ruhanga ku araabe ajweka obunyaatsi bw'omu kishaka, oburiho hati, nyencakare bukanagwa omu mahega, tarikizaho kubajweka, imwe abaine okwikiriza kukye?" 
Matthew6:31 N'ahabw'ekyo mutaryemereza emitima nimutonzya muti, Turyarya ki? nari, Turyanywa ki? nari shi, Turyajwara ki?" 
Matthew6:32 ahakuba ebyo byona Abanyamahanga nibyo basherura; kandi Shoimwe ow'omu iguru naamanya ku ebyo byona bibashemereire. 
Matthew6:33 Kwonka mubanze musherure obukama bwe n'okuhikiirira kwe; n'ebyo byona muryabyongyerwaho. 
Matthew6:34 N'ahabw'ekyo mutaryemereza emitima aha bya nyencakare; ahakuba ebya nyencakare biryayemererezibwa omutima okwabyo. Reka buri kiro kihwe n'amaganya gaakyo. 
Matthew7:1 Mutaricwa orubanja, nyentsya naimwe mutarirucwerwa." 
Matthew7:2 Ahabw'okuba orubanja oru mucwa, naimwe muryarucwerwa; kandi endengo ei murengamu, naimwe niyo murirengyerwamu." 
Matthew7:3 Ahabwenki nooreeba akatokoozi akari omu riihso rya mugyenzi waawe, haza empimbi eri omu ryawe otagyeteho?" 
Matthew7:4 Nari shi noija kugambira mugyenzi waawe oti, Ka nkutokoore, haza obwo bwona empimbi eri omu riisho ryawe?" 
Matthew7:5 Iwe ndyarya 'we, banza oyekize empimbi eri omu riisho ryawe, obone kureeba gye oku oraatokoore mungyenzi waawe." 
Matthew7:6 Mutariha embwa ekintu ekirikwera, nari okutambikira empunu eruuru zaanyu, zitakaaziribata, zikabahindukana, zikabarya." 
Matthew7:7 Mushabe, muryaheebwa; musherure, muryazoora; mwiguze, muryaigurirwaho." 
Matthew7:8 Ahakuba omuntu weena oshaba aheebwa; osherura azoora; oiguza aigurirwaho. 
Matthew7:9 Ni muntu ki omuriimwe, ou omwana we yaakushaba omugaati, akmuha eibaare?" 
Matthew7:10 Nari ku yaakushaba eky'enyanja, akaamuha enjoka?" 
Matthew7:11 Imwe ku muraabe nimumanya kuha abaana baanyu ebirungi, haza muri babi, Shoimwe ow'omu iguru tarikizaho kuha ebirungi abo abamushaba?" 
Matthew7:12 N'ahabw'ekyo byona ebi mwenda ngu abantu babagirire, naimwe mube nikwo mwabagirira; ahakuba ebyo nibyo Biragiro kandi n'ebya Baanabi." 
Matthew7:13 Mutaahire omu irembo erifunzire; ahakuba eirembo eririkutaasya omu kucwekyerera rigarami, n'omuhanda gwaryo guba muhango, kandi n'abagutooramu baba baingi;" 
Matthew7:14 kwonka eirembo eririkutaasya omu magara rifunzire, n'akahanda kaaryo kagumire, n'abakazoora baba bakye." 
Matthew7:15 Mwerinde baanabi b'ebishuba ababaizira nibeeshushanisa nk'entaama, haza omunda bari emishega esheegire." 
Matthew7:16 Muryabamanyira aha byana byabo. Hariho abaakushoroma emizaabibu aha munyinya, nari shi emitiini aha matojo?" 
Matthew7:17 N'omuti gwona omurungi gwana ebyana birungi, kandi omuti omubi gwana ebyana bibi." 
Matthew7:18 Omuti murungi tigubaasa kwana byana bibi, kandi omuti mubi tigubaasa kwana byana birungi." 
Matthew7:19 Omuti gwona ogutaana byana birungi gutemwa, gunagwa omu muriro." 
Matthew7:20 N'ahabw'ekyo muryabamanyira aha byana byabo. 
Matthew7:21 Omuntu weena orikungira ati: Mukama wangye, Mukama wangye, tiwe aritaaha mu bukama bw'omu iguru, kureka orikukora ebi Tata ow'omu iguru akunda." 
Matthew7:22 Baingi baryayetonganira aha kiro ekyo bati: Mukama waitu, Mukama waitu, torikumanya ku twaburiire omu iziina ryawe, ku twabingire baadaimoni omu iziina ryawe, kandi ku twakozire eby'okutangaaza bingi omu iziina ryawe?" 
Matthew7:23 Haza naanye ndyabagarukamu nti: Tinkabamanyaga; mundugye omumaisho, imwe abakora eby'obugomi!" 
Matthew7:24 Buri muntu weena ohurira ebigambo byangye ebi, akabyorobera, naashushanisibwa n'omuntu ow'obwengye, owaayombekire enju ye aha rukiri;" 
Matthew7:25 bwanyima enjura ekagwa, omwegyemure gukahimintika, eihunga rikahuuha, byona bikateera egyo nju, kwonka etagwe, ahabw'okuba ekaba eyombekirwe aha rukiri." 
Matthew7:26 Na buri muntu weena ohurira ebigambo byangye, atabyorobere, naashushanisibwa n'omuntu owaayombekire enju ye aha musheenyi;" 
Matthew7:27 bwanyima enjura ekagwa, omwegyemure gukahimintika, eihunga rikahuuha, bikateera egyo nju, ekagwa; n'okugwa kwayo kukaba kuhango." 
Matthew7:28 Bwanyima Yesu, ku yaaherize kugamba ebigambo ebyo, abantu baatangaarira okwegyesa kwe," 
Matthew7:29 ahabw'okuba akabeegyesa nk'oine obushoboorozi, kwonka ti nk'abahandiiki." 
Matthew8:1 Yesu ku yaashuumire naaruga omu kibungo, emitwe y'abantu baingi munonga yaamukuratira." 
Matthew8:2 Kandi reeba, haija omubembe, yaamutsimbira amaju, yaagira ati: Mukama wangye, ku oraabe nookunda, noobaasa kunshemeza." 
Matthew8:3 Yesu yaagorora omukono, yaamukoraho, yaamugira ati: Ninkunda; shemera! Ahonaaho ebibembe bye byashemezibwa." 
Matthew8:4 Yesu yaamuragiira ati: Oyerinde, otagira ou waagambira; kwonak irooko ogyende, oyeyorekye aha munyamurwa, oheyo eky'okusiima eki Musa yaaragiire, kibe eky'okuhamya omu maisho g'abantu." 
Matthew8:5 Ku yaabaire naakitaaha omuri Kaperenaumu, haija omukuru w'abaserukare, yaamweshengyereza," 
Matthew8:6 naagira ati: Mukama wangye, omuheereza wangye abyami omu nju, azingazingirwe, naahururwa munonga." 
Matthew8:7 Yaamugarukamu naagira ati: Ka nyije, mmukize." 
Matthew8:8 Omukuru w'abaserukare yaamugarukamu naagira ati: Mukama wangye, tindi muntu ou oshemereire kutaaha omu nju ye; fa okugamba ekigambo kwonka, omuheereza wangye naija kukira." 
Matthew8:9 Manya naanye ndi omuntu orikutwarwa, kandi nyine abaserukare abu ndikutegyeka. Ku ndagiira omwe nti, Gyenda, agyenda; n'ondiijo nti, Ija, aija; n'omuhuuku wangye nti, Gira oti, nawe agira kwo." 
Matthew8:10 Yesu ku yaakihuriire, yaatangaara, yaagambira abaabaire bamukuratiire, ati: Tinkareebaga kwikiriza okurikwingana kuti, n'obu haakuba omu Baisraeli." 
Matthew8:11 Kandi nimbagambira nti: Baingi baryaruga oburugwa-izooba n'oburengyerwa-izooba, bashutame na Abrahamu na Isaaka na Yakobo omu bukama bw'omu iguru," 
Matthew8:12 kwonka abaana b'obukama baryabingirwa aheeru omu mwirima; niho bariririra, bakanena enshaya." 
Matthew8:13 Yesu yaagambira omukuru w'abaserukare ati: irooko oyegyendere; nk'oku waikiriza, kikukorerwe kityo. Omuheereza we yaakira omuri ako kanya." 
Matthew8:14 Yesu ku yaataahire omu nju ya Petero, yaashanga nyinazaara abyami arwaire omushwija;" 
Matthew8:15 yaamukora aha mukono, omushwija gwamurugaho; yaimuka, yaamuheereza." 
Matthew8:16 Kandi ku bwabaire nibwira, baamureetera baingi abaabaire bariho baadaimoni, yaababingisa ekigambo kwonka, yaakiza boona abaabaire barwaire." 
Matthew8:17 Ebyo byahikiiriza ebyagambirwe nabi Isaaya ati: We wenka akatwara obweremwa bwaitu, yaayekorera endwara zaitu." 
Matthew8:18 Yesu ku yaareebire emitwe mingi emwehinguririize, yaaragiira kwamubuka seeri." 
Matthew8:19 Haija omuhandiiki, yaamugira ati: Mwegyesa, niinyija kukukuratira ahu oraaze hoona." 
Matthew8:20 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Zaamuha ziine ebiina, n'enyonyi z'omu mwanya ziine ebyashuri; kwonka Omwana w'omuntu taine na h'okuta omutwe." 
Matthew8:21 Ondi aha beegi be yaamugambira ati: Mukama wangye, reka, mbanze ngyende nziikye tata." 
Matthew8:22 Kwonka Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Nkuratira; reka abafu baziikye abafu baabo. 
Matthew8:23 Yesu ku yaagiire omu bwato, abeegi be baagyenda nawe." 
Matthew8:24 Eihunga ry'amaani ryaija omu nyanja, ebingonzi byayeshuka omu bwato; kwonka We akaba agwejegyeire." 
Matthew8:25 Baija ah'ari, baamusisiimura nibagira bati: Mukama waitu, tujune, twafa." 
Matthew8:26 Yaababuuza ati: Nimutiina ki, imwe abaine okwikiriza kukye? Ahonaaho yaimuka, yaakabukira eihunga n'enyanja, byacureera munonga." 
Matthew8:27 Abashaija abo baatangaara, nibagira bati: Ogu ni muntu ki, ou eihunga n'enyanja birikuhurira?" 
Matthew8:28 Ku yaayambukire seeri omu ishaza ry'Abagadarene, yaabuganwa abantu babiri abaabaire bariho baadaimoni, nibaruga omu bituuro, bagwire munonga eiraro, hatariho muntu owaakwehanga kuraba ogwo muhanda." 
Matthew8:29 Ku baamureebire, baayomba munonga nibagira bati: Noofa ki naitwe, Iwe Omwana wa Ruhanga? Oizire kutuburabuza, obunaku bwaitu butakahikire?" 
Matthew8:30 Aho hakaba hariho omukumbi gw'empunu nyingi hangahari nizirya. 
Matthew8:31 Baadaimoni baamweshengyereza bati: Ku oraabe ori ow'okutubinga, twohereze omu mpunu." 
Matthew8:32 Yaabagira ati: Nimwirooko! Baarugamu, baataaha omu mpunu; ahonaaho empunu ezo zoona zaarigita, nizishuuma aha ibanga, zaahwera omu nyanja." 
Matthew8:33 Abariisa baazo bairuka, baataaha omuri tauni, baabagambira byona, n'ebyaba aha bantu abaabaire bariho baadaimoni." 
Matthew8:34 Ab'omuri tauni boona baahwayo, baija kubugana Yesu; kubaamureebire, baamweshengyereza kubarugira omu nsi." 
Matthew9:1 Yaagaruka omu bwato, yaayambuka, yaataaha omuri tauni y'owaabo." 
Matthew9:2 Baamureetera omuntu ozingazingirwe, abyami omu ngozi. Yesu ku yaareebire okwikiriza kwabo, yaagambira ozingazingirwe ati: Mwana wangye, huumura; ebibi byawe byakusaasirwa." 
Matthew9:3 Abamwe aha bahandiiki baayetomboita bonka, ngu: Omuntu ogu naarogota." 
Matthew9:4 Yesu ku yaamanyire ebiteekateeko byabo, yaababuuza ati: N'enki ekirikubateekateekyesa kubi omu mitima yaanyu?" 
Matthew9:5 Ekirikurahuka nikiiha, okugira nti, Ebibi byawe byakusaasirwa, nari nti, Imuka, ogyende?" 
Matthew9:6 Kwonka mumanye ngu Omwana w'omuntu aine obushoboorozi omu nsi okusaasira ebibi, yaagambira ozingazingirwe ati: Imuka, oyekorere engozi yaawe, otaahe." 
Matthew9:7 Yaimuka, yaataaha." 
Matthew9:8 Kandi abantu boona, ku baakireebire, baatiina, baahimbisa Ruhanga owaahaire abantu obushoboorozi oburikwingana butyo." 
Matthew9:9 Yesu ku yaabaire naarugayo, yaareeba omuntu orikwetwa Matayo ashutami omu ihoorezo, yaamugambira ati: Nkuratira. Yaimuka, yaamukuratira." 
Matthew9:10 Bwanyima ku yaabaire ashutami omu nju naarya, reeba abahooza n'abasiisi baingi baija, baashutama na Yesu n'abeegi be." 
Matthew9:11 Abafarisaayo, ku baakireebire, baabuuza abeegi be bati: Ahabw'enki omwegyesa waanyu naarya, kandi naanywa n'abahooza n'abasiisi?" 
Matthew9:12 Yesu ku yaakihuriire, yaagira ati: Abahuriire tibeetenga mufumu, kureka abarwaire." 
Matthew9:13 Mbwenu mugyende mwegye amakuru g'ekigambo eki ngu, Eki ndikwenda n'embabazi, ti bitambo; ahabw'okuba tindaizire kweta bahikiriire, kureka abasiisi." 
Matthew9:14 Kandi akaizirwa abeegi ba Yohaana, baamubuuza bati: Ahabw'enki itwe n'Abafarisaayo kaingi twesiibyakwo, haza abeegi baawe bo bateesiibyakwo?" 
Matthew9:15 Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Abakwe nibabaasa bata kuganya bakiine kishwera? Obunaku buryahika, obu kishwera aribaihwaho; obwo nibwo baryesiibyakwo." 
Matthew9:16 Tihariho muntu oteera ekiremu ky'omwenda musya aha mwenda omukuru; ahabw'okuba ekyo ekyabaziirwaho kikaataagura ekijwaro, n'ekifumuka kihanguha." 
Matthew9:17 Kandi tibashuka viinyo y'omutahe omu furebe z'empu ezikuzire; ku baakukora batyo, efurebe zikaabaruka, viinyo eyatika, n'efurebe zikaabaruka, viinyo eyatika, n'efurebe zisiisikara. Kureka viinyo y'omutahe eshukwa omu furebe ensya, byona bibona kurama." 
Matthew9:18 Ku yaabaire naakibagambira ebigambo ebyo, haija omukungu, yaamukwata amaguru, yaamweshengyereza ati: Muhara wangye yaakaba; mbwenu oije, omuteho engaro, naija kuhimbuuka." 
Matthew9:19 Yesu yaimuka, yaamukuratira n'abeegi be." 
Matthew9:20 Kandi hakaba hariho omukazi, omazire emyaka ikumi n'ebiri arwaire ekyejwiso; yaija enyim aya Yesu, yaakora aha mukugiro gw'ekijwaro kye," 
Matthew9:21 ahabw'okuba akahamya omu mutima gwe ati: N'obu naakukora aha kijwaro kye kwonka, nkaakira." 
Matthew9:22 Yesu yaahinduka, yaamureeba, yaamugira ati: Mwana wangye, huumura; okwikiriza kwae nikwo kwakutambira. Ahonaaho omukazi yaakira." 
Matthew9:23 Yesu ku yaahikire aha nju y'ogwo mukungu, yaareeba abarikuteera esheegu n'abandi baingi nibacura." 
Matthew9:24 Yaabagira ati: Murugyeho! omwishiki tafiire, agwejegyeire. Baamushekyerera munonga." 
Matthew9:25 Abantu ku baaherize kushohozibwa, yaataaha omu nju, yaakwata ogwo mwihsiki omukono, yaimuka." 
Matthew9:26 Egyo nkuru yaabuga omu ishaza eryo ryona. 
Matthew9:27 Kandi Yesu ku yaabaire naarugayo, empumi ibiri zaamukuratira nizimuyombererera ziti: Iwe Omwana wa Daudi, otugirire embabazi." 
Matthew9:28 Ku yaahikire omu nju, ezo mpumi zaamwirira haihi; Yesu yaazibuuza ati: Nimwikiriza ngu ekyo ninkibaasa? Zaamugarukamu ziti: Eego, Mukama waitu." 
Matthew9:29 Atyo yaazikora aha maisho, naagira ati: kibe nk'oku mwaikiriza." 
Matthew9:30 Amaisho gaabo gaahumuuka. Yesu yaabeehanangiriza munonga, naagira ati: Mwerinde, hatagira owaakimanya." 
Matthew9:31 Kwonka bo ku baarugire aho, baamurangaana omu ishaza eryo ryona." 
Matthew9:32 Ku baabaire nibarugayo, baamureetera ekiteta kiriho daimoni." 
Matthew9:33 Yesu ku yaaherize kubinga daimoni ogwo, ekiteta kyagamba; abantu baatangaara nibagira bati: Tihariho kirikushusha nk'eki ekirareebirwe omuri Israeli." 
Matthew9:34 Kwonka Abafarisaayo baagira bati: Baadaimoni naababingisa amaani ga mukama waabo. 
Matthew9:35 Yesu yaagyendagyenda omuri tauni zoona n'omu birorero byona naayegyesa omuri sinagogi, zaabo, naagamba engiri y'obukama bw'omu iguru, kandi naakiza endwara zoona n'obumuga bwona." 
Matthew9:36 Ku yaareebire emitwe y'abantu, yaabagirira esaasi, ahakuba bakaba baburaburiirwe, bashobeirwe nk'entaama ezitaine muriisa." 
Matthew9:37 Nikwo kugira abeegi be ati: Eby'okugyesha ni bingi munonga, kwonka abagyesi ni bakye;" 
Matthew9:38 n'ahabw'ekyo mushabe Mukama w'eigyesha ayohereze abagyesi omu by'okugyesha bye. 
Matthew10:1 Yaayeta abeegi be ikumi na babiri, yaabaha obushoboorozi bw'okubinga baadaimoni, n'okukiza endwara zoona n'obumuga bwona." 
Matthew10:2 Amaziina g'abeegi ikumi na babiri nigo aga: ow'okubanza ni Simooni orikwetwa Petero, na Anderea omurumuna; na Yakobo mwene Zebedaayo, na Yohaana omurumuna;" 
Matthew10:3 Filipo na Batolomaayo; Tomasi na Matayo omuhooza; Yakobo mwene Alufaayo na Tadaayo," 
Matthew10:4 Simooni Omukananaayo na Yuda Iskaryota owaamureebize. 
Matthew10:5 Abo ikumi na babiri Yesu akabatuma, yaabaragiira ati: Mutariza omu banyamahanga n'obu kwakuba okutaaha omuri tauni yoona ey'Abasamaria;" 
Matthew10:6 kureka mugyende omu ntaama ezaabuzire ez'omu ruganda rw'Abaisraeli. 
Matthew10:7 Omu kugyenda mugyende nimugamba muti: obukama bw'omu iguru bwiriire haihi. 
Matthew10:8 Mukize abarwaire, muzoore abafiire, mushemeze ababembe, mubingye baadaimoni. Mukaheerwa busha, naimwe muheere busha." 
Matthew10:9 Mutaritwara ezaabu nari efeeza nari emiringa omu nshaho zaanyu; 
Matthew10:10 omurugyendo rwanyu mutaritwara efurebe, nari amakanzu abiri, nari enkaito, n'obu yaakuba enkoni; ahabw'okuba omukozi ashemereire kuheebwa eby'okumutunga." 
Matthew10:11 Tauni yoona nari ekirorero kyona, omu muritaaha, mubanze musherure omuntu waamwo oshemereire, mube niwe mwaraarira okuhitsya obu murirugayo." 
Matthew10:12 Ku muriba nimukitaaha omu nju egyo, mugiramutsye." 
Matthew10:13 Enju ku eribashemerera, etungye obusingye bwanyu; ku eriba etabashemereire, obusingye bwanyu bubagarukire." 
Matthew10:14 Omuntu weena ku aryanga kubakunira nari okuhurira ebigambo byanyu, ku muriba nimuruga omu nju egyo nari omu tauni egyo, mukunkumure omucuucu gw'omu bigyere byanyu." 
Matthew10:15 Nimbagambira amazima nti; Aha kiro ky'okucwa orubanja, ekifubiro ky'ensi ya Sodoma na Gomora kiryaba ekirikubaasa kwemerwa okukira ekya tauni egyo." 
Matthew10:16 Reeba, nimbatuma nk'orukutuma entaama omu mishega; n'ahabw'ekyo mugire obwengye nk'enjoka, kandi mube nk'enkombe ezitaine buryarya." 
Matthew10:17 Mwerinde abantu, ahabw'okuba baryabatwara omu mashengyero, baryabateerera omuri sinagogi," 
Matthew10:18 kandi baryabatwara omu maisho g'abategyeki n'abagabe nibabantura, ahabw'okuba baakareebi b'okumpamya omu maisho gaabo n'ag'abanyamahanga." 
Matthew10:19 Ku baribatwarayo, mutaryemereza emitima oku murigamba nari aha bi murigamba; ahakuba ebi murigamba, muryabiheebwa omu mwanya ogwo;" 
Matthew10:20 mumanye ngu tiimwe murigamba, kureka Omwoyo wa Shoimwe niwe aribagambisa." 
Matthew10:21 Mukuru w'omuntu aryahayo omurumuna kwitwa, na ishe w'omwana aryahayo omwana we; abaana baryagomera abazaire baabo babaitise;" 
Matthew10:22 kandi muryayangwa abantu boona nibabatura eiziina ryangye. Kwonka orugumisiriza okuhitsya aha muheru, niwe arijunwa." 
Matthew10:23 Ku baribahiiga omuri tauni emwe, muhungire omu ndijo; buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Timuribuga tauni za Israeli zoona, Omwana w'omuntu atakaizire." 
Matthew10:24 Omwegi takira mwegyesa we; kandi omuhuuku takira mukama we; 
Matthew10:25 ekyakubaire gye aha mwegi n'okuba nk'omwegyesa we n'omuhuuku akaba nka mukama we. Ku baraabe beetsire nyineeka Belezebuli, kaashwa ab'omu ka ye." 
Matthew10:26 N'ahabw'ekyo mutaribatiina; ahabw'okuba tihariho ekyashwekirwe ekitarishuuruurwa, n'obu kyakuba ekyasherekirwe ekitarimanywa." 
Matthew10:27 Eki mbagambirira omu mwirima, mugume mukigambire omu mushana; eki murihurira ikgambiirwe omu kutu, mukigambire aha mutwe gw'enju." 
Matthew10:28 Kandi mutaritiina abarikwita omubiri, kwonka tibarikubaasa kwita magara; kureka mutiine Orikubaasa kuhwerekyereza byombi, amagara n'omubiri, omuri Gehena." 
Matthew10:29 Ebiteera-nkumba bibiri tibigura sente emwe? Kwonka tihariho na kimwe ekigwa ahansi Shoimwe atakimanyire. 
Matthew10:30 Nangwa n'eishokye ery'aha mitwe yaanyu ribazirwe ryona. 
Matthew10:31 N'ahabw'ekyo mutaritiina; ahabw'okuba nimukira ebiteera-nkumba bingi. 
Matthew10:32 Kandi buri munta orimpamya omu maisho g'abantu, naanye ndyamuhamya omu maisho ga Tata ori omu iguru." 
Matthew10:33 Kwonka weena oriinyehakana omu maisho g'abantu, naanye ndyamwehakana omu maisho ga Tata ori omu iguru." 
Matthew10:34 Mutateekateeka ngu nkaija kureeta obusingye omu nsi; tindaizire kureeta busingye, kureka rurara." 
Matthew10:35 Ahabw'okuba nkaija kutaanisa omwojo na ishe, omwishiki na nyina, omukazi na nyinazaara;" 
Matthew10:36 abazigu b'omuntu baryaba ab'omu ka ye. 
Matthew10:37 Orikukunda ishe nari nyina okubankiza, tashemereire kuba owangye; kandi orikukunda omutabani nari muhara we okubankiza, tashemereire kuba owangye." 
Matthew10:38 Kandi oteekorera musharaba gwe, akankuratira, tashemereire kuba owangye." 
Matthew10:39 Orikukiza amagara ge, aryagabuza; kandi orikubuza amagara ge ahabwangye, aryagakiza." 
Matthew10:40 Orikubaikiriza, biri aikiriize nyowe; n'orikwikiriza nyowe, biri aikiriize Owantumire." 
Matthew10:41 Orikwikiriza nabi ahabw'okuba nabi, aryatunga ebihembo bya nabi; kandi orikwikiriza ohikiriire ahabw'okuba ohikiriire." 
Matthew10:42 Kandi orikunywaisa omwe ahari aba bato enkyeka y'amaizi agarikufuka ahabw'okuba omwegi wangye, nimbagambira amazima nti: Taribura bihembo bye." 
Matthew11:1 Bwanyima Yesu ku yaaherize kwegyesa abeegi ikumi na babiri, yaarugayo, yaaza kwegyesa n'okubuurira omuri tauni zaabo." 
Matthew11:2 Kwonka Yohaana ku yaabaire ari omu kihome, yaahurira ebi Yesu arikukora, yaamutumaho abeegi be kumubuuza," 
Matthew11:3 ati: Niiwe ogwo orikwenda kwija, nari tutegyereze ondiijo?" 
Matthew11:4 Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Mugarukyeyo mugambire Yohaana ebi mwahurira, n'ebi mwareeba;" 
Matthew11:5 empumi zihumwirwe, ebirema nibigyenda, ababembe bashemeziibwe, ebifa-matu nibihurira, abafiire bazoirwe, n'abooro bagambiirwe ebigambo birungi." 
Matthew11:6 Kandi otarikumbanganisaho aine omugisha. 
Matthew11:7 Ku baagyenzire, Yesu yaatandika kugambira emitwe y'abantu aha bya Yohaana, naagira ati: Omu ihamba mukaza kureebayo ki? Orubingo orurikutengyetsibwa omuyaga?" 
Matthew11:8 Beitu mukaza kureeba ki? Omuntu ojwaire emyenda erikuterera? Manya abajwara ebirikuterera baba omu bikaari by'abagabe. 
Matthew11:9 Beitu mukatwarwayo ki? Okureeba nabi? Eego, nimbagambira nti: Buzima naakirira kimwe nabi." 
Matthew11:10 Kandi ogwo niwe owaahandiikirweho ngu, Reeba, nintuma entumwa yangye, ekubandize; niyo erishemeza omuhanda gwawe." 
Matthew11:11 Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Omuri boona abaazairwe abakazi tihakabahoga n'omwe orikukira Yohaana Omubatizi obukuru; kwonka omuto omu bukama bw'omu iguru naamukira. 
Matthew11:12 Okuruga omu biro bya Yohaana Omubatizi okuhitya hati, obukama bwa Ruhanga nibutwaranirwa, n'abarikubutwaranira babutaahamu n'amaani." 
Matthew11:13 Ahakuba baanabi boona n'ebiragiro bikaba nibiranga okuhitsya omu biro bya Yohaana; 
Matthew11:14 kandi ku muraabe nimukunda kukiikiriza, niwe Eliya owaarangirwe ku ariija." 
Matthew11:15 Oine amatu agarikuhurira, ahurire." 
Matthew11:16 Mbwenu ab'ebiro ebi mbashushanise ki? Nibashusha nk'abaana bato abashutami omu katare, bakeeta bagyenzi baabo bati:" 
Matthew11:17 Tubateereire emikuri, timwazina; twacura timwaganya." 
Matthew11:18 Ahakuba Yohaana akaija atarikurya n'obu kwakuba okunywa, baagira ngu, Ariho daimoni." 
Matthew11:19 Omwana w'omuntu we yaija naarya kandi naanywa, baagira ngu, Reeba omunyamururu, kandi omusinzi, munywani w'abahooza n'abasiisi. Kwonka shi obwengye busiimirwa aha mirimo yabwo." 
Matthew11:20 Yaatandikira aho kuhana tauni ahu yaakoreire eby'okutangaaza ebirikukira obwingi, ahabw'okuba bakanga kweteisa." 
Matthew11:21 Ati: Iwe Koraziini, oryakareeba! Naiwe, Besesaida, oryakareeba, ahabw'okuba eby'okutangaaza ebyakoreirwe omuriimwe, kuri noogira ngu bikakorerwa Tuuro na Sidoni, bakaabaire beeteisize kare, bajwaire ebiguniya, beeshukyeire eiju rya kashenda." 
Matthew11:22 Kandi nimbagambira nti: Aha kito ky'okucwa orubanja, ekifubiro ky'okucwa orubanja, ekifubiro kya Tuuro na Sidoni kiryaba ekirikubaasa kwemerwa okukira ekyanyu." 
Matthew11:23 Naiwe Kaperenaumu, nooyeraata ngu oryakuzibwa ohikye omu iguru? Ngabusha, oryagarurwa ahansi ohikye okuzimu. Ahabw'okuba eby'okutangaaza ebyakoreirwe omuriiwe, kuri noogira ngu bikakorerwa Sodoma, ekaabaire ekiriho n'okuhitsya hati." 
Matthew11:24 Hoona nimbagambira nti: Aha kiro ky'okucwa orubanja, ekifubiro kya Sodoma kiryaba ekirikubaasa kwemerwa okukira ekyanyu." 
Matthew11:25 Omu biro ebyo Yesu akagira ati: Taata, Mukama w'eiguru n'ensi, ninkusiima ahabw'okuba okashereka ebigambo ebi abanyabwengye n'abarikwetegyereza, waabishuuruurira abaana bato." 
Matthew11:26 Eego, Taata, ahabw'okuba ekyo nikyo waasiimire." 
Matthew11:27 Ebintu byona nkabiheebwa Tata, kandi tihariho omanya Omwana wa Ruhanga kureka Ishe, kandi tihariho omanya Ishe, kureka Omwana we n'omuntu weena ou Omwana aikiriza kumushuuruurira." 
Matthew11:28 Imwe mwena abaruhire n'abaremereirwe, mwije ahariinye, mbaruhuure." 
Matthew11:29 Mwekorere omugamba gwangye, muunyegyereho; ahabw'okuba nintwaza gye, kandi ndi omucureezi omu mutima; naimwe muryatunga okuhuumura omu mitima yaanyu," 
Matthew11:30 ahakuba omugamba gwangye tigurikuremeera, n'omutwaro gwangye gwanguhi." 
Matthew12:1 Omu biro ebyo Yesu akaba naaraba omu misiri y'oburo aha izooba rya Sabato; abeegi be baagira enjara, baatandika kucwa obushiisha bw'oburo n'okubikikina." 
Matthew12:2 Abafarisaayo ku baakireebire, baamugira bati: Reeba, abeegi baawe nibakora ekirikuzira, okucwa obushiisha ahari Sabato." 
Matthew12:3 Nawe yaababuuza ati: Beitu shi timukashomaga eki Daudi yaakozire, obu yaagira enjara n'abu yaabaire aine;" 
Matthew12:4 ku yaataahire omu nju ya Ruhanga, akarya aha migaati ey'okumurikwa, ei Ebiragiro byabaire bitarikwikiriza ku aryaho, n'abu yaabaire aine, kureka abanyamurwa bonka?" 
Matthew12:5 Nari shi timukashomaga omu Biragiro abanyamurwa omuri hekalu oku baabaire bashobya Sabato, haza batagire rubanja?" 
Matthew12:6 Kwonka nyowe nimbagambira nti: Orikukira hekalu ari aha. 
Matthew12:7 Kuri nimumanya ekigambo eki ngu, Eki ndikwenda n'embabazi, ti bitambo, timwakusingisiriize bataine rubanja." 
Matthew12:8 Ahakuba Omwana w'omuntu niwe Mukama wa Sabato. 
Matthew12:9 Yaarugayo, yaataaha omuri sinagogi yaabo;" 
Matthew12:10 yaashangamu omushaija okokootsire omukono. Baamubuuza bati: Ebiragiro nibiikiriza okutambira omuntu ahari Sabato? Bakamubuuza batyo ngu babone kumutabaariza. 
Matthew12:11 Yaabagarukamu ati: N'oha omuriimwe owaakuba aine entaama ye emwe, ekagwa omu kiina aha izooba rya Sabato, atagikwate akagiihamu?" 
Matthew12:12 Mbwenu shi omuntu tarikukirira kimwe entaama? N'ahabw'ekyo Ebiragiro nibiikiriza okukora gye ahari Sabato. 
Matthew12:13 Ahonaaho yaaragiira omushaija ogwo ati: Nanuura omukono gwawe. Yaagunanuura, gwakira, gwaba nk'ogundi." 
Matthew12:14 Abafarisaayo baashohora, baaza omu naama, baahanuura oku baraamwite." 
Matthew12:15 Yesu ku yaabimanyire, yaarugayo. Abantu baingi baamukuratira, yaabakiza boona," 
Matthew12:16 yaabeehanangiriza ngu, batamurangaana." 
Matthew12:17 Ekyo kikabaho ngu ebi Isaaya yaagambire bihikiirire ebi yaagire ati: 
Matthew12:18 Reeba omuheereza wangye ou nkunda, ou naatooraine, Omutima gwangye ou gushemerererwa; Ndyamutaho Omwoyo wangye Agambire abanyamahanga eby'oburyo." 
Matthew12:19 Taritongana, tariyomba, Nangwa tihariho n'orihurira eiraka rye omu mihanda." 
Matthew12:20 Orubingo orushatukire tariruhenda, Kandi n'orumuri orurikwaka kubi tariruraaza, Okuhitsya obu arisingura ahabw'okuhikiirira kwe." 
Matthew12:21 Kandi abanyamahanga baryagira amatsiko aha iziina rye. 
Matthew12:22 Kandi baamureetera empumi eyaabaire eri ekiteta, eriho daimoni, yaagikiza; owaabaire ari ekiteta yaagamba, kandi yaahumuuka." 
Matthew12:23 Abantu boona baatangaara, baayebuuza nibagira bati: Beitu ogu takaaba Omwana wa wa Daudi?" 
Matthew12:24 Kwonka Abafarisaayo ku baakihuriire, baagira bati: omuntu ogu taine kindi ki arikubingisa baadaimoni kureka Belezebuli omukama wa baadaimoni." 
Matthew12:25 Yesu ku yaamanyire ebiteekateeko byabo, yaabagambira ati: Obugabe bwona ku bwebaganisamu, buhwerekyerezibwa; n'orurembo rwona nari enju yoona, ku byebaganisamu, tibigumaho." 
Matthew12:26 Na Sitaane ku araabe naabinga Sitaane, biri ayebaganiisemu. Obukama bwe buryagumaho buta?" 
Matthew12:27 Nyowe, ku ndaabe nimbingisa baadaimoni Belezebuli, abaana baanyu bo nibamubingisa oha? N'ahabw'ekyo abo nibo baribasingisa orubanja." 
Matthew12:28 Kwonka ky ndaabe nimbingisa baadaimoni Omwoyo wa Ruhanga, mumanye ngu obukama bwa Ruhanga bubahikireho." 
Matthew12:29 Omuntu naabaasa ata kutaaha omu nju y'ondiijo ow'aani okunyaga ebintu bye, atabandize kukoma ogwo ow'amaani? bwanyima akabona kunyaga gye eby'omu nju ye." 
Matthew12:30 Ou tutakwatansia, n'omuzigu wangye; kandi otataaruura hamwe naanye, ataataanisa." 
Matthew12:31 Nikyo ndikubagambirira nti: Abantu baryasaasirwa ekibi kyona n'okurogota kwona, kwonka okurogota aha Mwoyo Orikwera n'ekibi ekitarisaasirwa." 
Matthew12:32 Omuntu weena orirogota aha Mwana w'omuntu, aryasaasirwa; kwonka orirogota aha Mwoyo Orikwera tarisaasirwa mu busingye obu, n'obu bwakuba oburiija." 
Matthew12:33 Omuti ku muraagwete murungi, n'ebyana byagwo mubyete birungi; nari shi omuti ku muraagwete mubi, n'ebyana byagwo mubyete bibi; ahakuba omuti gumanyirwa aha byana byagwo." 
Matthew12:34 Imwe baana b'enjoka 'mwe, nimubaasa muta kugamba ebigambo birungi, haza muri babi? Ebiijwire omutima, akanwa nibyo kagamba." 
Matthew12:35 Omuntu murungi aiha ebirungi omu ibiikiro rye erirungi; n'omubi aiha ebibi omu ibiikiro rye eribi. 
Matthew12:36 Kandi nimbagambira nti: Ekigambo ekitaine buryo kyona eki abantu barigamba, baryakyetonganira aha kiro ky'okucwa orubanja." 
Matthew12:37 Ebigambo byawe ebi ogamba nibyo birikwihisaho orubanja, nari shi nibyo birikusingisa orubanja." 
Matthew12:38 Bwanyima abamwe aha bahandiiki n'Abafarisaayo baamugarukamu bati: Mwegyesa, nitwenda kureeba akamanyiso akarikuruga ahariiwe." 
Matthew12:39 Nawe yaabagarukamu ati: Abantu b'obusingye obu obubi obw'obushambani nibenda kamanyiso; kwonak tibarikaheebwa kureka akamanyiso ka nabi Yona. 
Matthew12:40 Nk'oku Yona yaamazire amazooba ashatu n'ebiro byago omu nda y'eky'enyanja ekihango, nikwo n'Omwana w'omuntu arimara ebiro bishatu nyomushana na nyekiro ari okuzimu." 
Matthew12:41 Abantu ba Nineeve baryayemerera n'ab'obusingye obu aha kiro ky'orubanja, barubasingise, ahabw'okuba ku baahuriire okubuurira kwa Yona, baayeteisa; kandi reeba, Orikukira Yona ari aha." 
Matthew12:42 Omugabekazi w'eihanga ery'obukiizi-bwa-buryo aryayemerera n'ab'ebiro ebi aha kiro ky'orubanja arubasingise, ahabw'okuba akaruga aha muheru gw'ensi, yaija kuhurira obwengye bwa Sulemaani; kandi reeba, Orikukira Sulemaani ari aha." 
Matthew12:43 Daimoni, ku aruga omu muntu, araba omu mpita ezitarimu maizi, naasherura oburuhuukiro, bumuburira." 
Matthew12:44 Agira ati: Ka ngarukey omu nju yangye omu naarugire. Ku ahikayo, ashanga harimu busha, eyeyereire, eboneziibwe." 
Matthew12:45 Atyo agyenda areeta abandi baadaimoni mushanju ababi okumukira, bataaha omwo, bagumamu; ebya bwanyima by'omuntu ogwo bikira eby'okubanza kuba bibi. Nikwo kiriba kityo n'aha b'obusingye obu obubi." 
Matthew12:46 Ku yaabaire naakigamba n'abantu, haija nyina n'abarumuna, baayemerera aheeru, nibenda kugamba nawe." 
Matthew12:47 Omuntu yaamugambira ati: Reeba, nyoko na barumuna baawe beemereire aheeru, nibenda kugamba naiwe." 
Matthew12:48 Yaagarukamu owaamugambira, naamugira ati: Maawe n'oha, na barumuna bangye nibaahi?" 
Matthew12:49 Yaagorora omukono naagworekyeza abeegi be, naagira ati: Reeba, maawe na barumuna bangye n'aba!" 
Matthew12:50 Ahabw'okuba omuntu weena, okora ebi Tata ow'omu iguru akunda, niwe murumuna wangye, niwe munyaanyazi, niwe maawe." 
Matthew13:1 Aha izooba eryo Yesu yaashohora naaruga omu nju, yaashutama aha rubaju rw'enyanja." 
Matthew13:2 Omutwe gw'abantu baingi baateeranira ah'ari; atyo yaaza omu bwato, yaabushutamamu; abantu abo boona baayemerera aha rubaju rw'enyanja." 
Matthew13:3 Yaabeegyesa bingi omu nfumu, naagira ati: Omubibi akashohora kubiba." 
Matthew13:4 Ku yaabaire naabiba, embibo ezimwe zaagwa omu muhanda, enyonyi zaija, zaazitorotoora." 
Matthew13:5 Embibo ezindi zaagwa aha rukiri, ahataine itaka ringi; ahonaaho zaamera; ahabw'eitaka kutaba ringi," 
Matthew13:6 eizooba ku ryajwire, omushana gwaziteera, zaahonga; kandi ahabw'okutagira mizi, zaayoma." 
Matthew13:7 Ezindi zaagwa omu mahwa; amahwa gaamera, gaazinyuruza." 
Matthew13:8 Ezindi zaagwa omu itaka rirungi; zaayera, ezimwe zaahitsya igana, ezindi makumi mukaaga, n'ezindi makumi ashatu." 
Matthew13:9 Oine amatu, ahurire." 
Matthew13:10 Abeegi be baija ah'ari, baamubuuza bati: Ahabw'enki noobeetyesa omu nfumu?" 
Matthew13:11 Yaabagarukamu ati: Imwe muhairwe okumanya emibonano y'obukama bw'omu iguru, kwonka bo tibahairwe." 
Matthew13:12 Ahabw'okuba oine niwe ariheebwa, kandi aryayongyerwaho, agire ebingi; kwonka otaine, aryayakwa n'ekyo eki aine." 
Matthew13:13 Eki ndikubeegyeseza omu nfumu nikyo eki: ahakuba okureeba tibareeba, kandi n'okuhurira tibahurira, n'obu kwakuba okwetegyereza." 
Matthew13:14 Ebi Isaaya yaaragwire bibahikireho, ebi yaagizire ati: Okuhurira kwo muryahurira, kwonka timurishoborokyerwa; Okureeba kwo muryareeba, kwonka timuryetegyereza;" 
Matthew13:15 Ahakuba emitima y'abantu aba ehindukire ebitsire, N'amatu gaabo nigahurira kubi, N'amaisho gaabo bagahumiize, Ngu batakaareebesa amaisho gaabo, N'okuhuriza amatu gaabo, N'okwetegyereza n'emitima yaabo, Bakahinduka, nkabakiza." 
Matthew13:16 Kwonka amaisho gaanyu gaine omugisha, ahabw'okuba nigareeba, n'amatu gaanyu, ahabw'okuba nigahurira." 
Matthew13:17 Kandi nimbagambira amazima nti: Baanabi baingi n'abantu abahikiriire baingi bakeetenga kureeba ebi murikureeba, tibaabireeba, n'okuhurira ebi murikuhurira, tibaabihurira." 
Matthew13:18 Mbwenu nu, imwe muhurire enfumu y'omubibi." 
Matthew13:19 Weena ohurira ekigambo ky'obukama, atakyetegyereze, Omubi aija, ashahura ekyabibwa omu mutima gwe; ebyo nibishoboorora amakuru g'embibo eyaagwire omu muhanda." 
Matthew13:20 Eby'embibo ezaabibirwe aha rukiri, amakuru gaabyo n'omuntu ohurira ekigambo, akarahuka kukiikiriza ashemereirwe;" 
Matthew13:21 kwonka we ahabwe ataine mizi, akeehangaana omwanya mukye; hakibaho obusaasi nari okuhiigwa naaturwa ekyo kigambo, ahonaaho bikamugwisa." 
Matthew13:22 Eby'ezaabibirwe omu mahwa, amakuru gaabyo n'omuntu ohurira ekigambo; kwonka amaganya g'ensi n'okubeihwabeihwa obugungi bwayo bikanyuruza ekigambo, kikaremwa kwera." 
Matthew13:23 Eby'ezaabibirwe omu itaka rirungi, ekigambo, akakimanya; buzima ogwo niwe ayana ebyana, omwe igana, ondiijo makumi mukaaga, n'ondiijo makumi ashatu." 
Matthew13:24 Kandi akabacwera endiijo nfumu, naabagira ati: Obukama bw'omu iguru nibushushanisibwa n'omuntu owaabibire embibo nungi omu musiri gwe;" 
Matthew13:25 kandi abantu ku baabaire bagwejegyeire, omuzigu we yaija, yaabiba enkyenzi omu buro, yaayegyendera." 
Matthew13:26 Oburo ku bwamezire, bwaba obushiisha, enkyenzi nazo zaareebeka." 
Matthew13:27 Abahuuku baija, baagambira mukama waabo bati: Mukama waitu, torabibire embibo nungi omu musiri gwawe? Mbwenu kandi enkyenzi zirugire hi?" 
Matthew13:28 Yaabagarukamu ati: Ekyo kikakorwa omuzigu. Abahuuku baamubuuza bati: Mbwenu shi, nooyenda ngu tugyende tuzikuuremu?" 
Matthew13:29 Yaabagira ati: Ngaaha! obundi mukaaba nimukuuramu enkyenzi, mukuuriranamu oburo." 
Matthew13:30 Murekye bikure byombi, bihikye omu igyesha; kandi omu igyesha ndyagambira abagyesi nti: Mubanze mutooranemu enkyenzi, muzibohe enganda zookibwe, reero oburo mubuhunikye omu bitara byangye." 
Matthew13:31 Yaagaruka yaabacwera endiijo nfumu, naagira ati: Obukama bw'omu iguru nibushusha nk'akajuma ka sinaapi, aku omushaija yaatwaire, akakabiba omu musiri gwe;" 
Matthew13:32 haza kari kakye okukira embibo zoona; kwonka ku kakuzire, kahanguha okukira ebishaka byona, kaahinduka omuti, enyonyi z'omu mwanya zaija zaayarika omu mataagi gaagwo." 
Matthew13:33 Yaabacwera endiijo nfumu ati: Obukama bw'omu iguru nibushusha nk'ekitumbisa eki omukazi yaatwaire akashereka omu ncuro z'esaano ishatu okuhitsya obu yoona yaatumbisiibwe. 
Matthew13:34 Ebigambo ebyo byona Yesu akabyegyesa abantu omu nfumu; kandi tihariho ki yaabeegyeise kyona, atakirabize mu nfumu," 
Matthew13:35 eki nabi yaagambire kihikiirire eki yaagizire ati: Ndyayashamya akanwa kangye omu nfumu, Ngambe ebigambo ebyasherekirwe okuruga aha kuhangwa kw'ensi." 
Matthew13:36 Bwanyima yaaraga emitwe y'abantu, yaataaha omu nju. Abeegi be baamwirira haihi, baamubuuza bati: Otushobororere amakuru g'enkyenzi z'omu musiri." 
Matthew13:37 Yaabagarukamu ati: Owaabibire embibo nungi n'Omwana w'omuntu; 
Matthew13:38 omusiri n'ensi; embibo enungi nibo baana b'obukama; enkyenzi n'abaana b'Omubi; 
Matthew13:39 omuzigu owaazibibire ni Sitaane; eigyesha niyo mperu y'obusingye obu; n'abagyesi ni baamaraika. 
Matthew13:40 Nk'oku enkyenzi zirundwa hamwe, zikookibwa n'omuriro, nikwo kiriba kityo aha mperu y'obusingye obu." 
Matthew13:41 Omwana w'omuntu aryatuma baamaraika be, nabo baryaiha omu bukama bwe byona ebirikuteeza abantu entsibo, n'enkozi z'ebibi," 
Matthew13:42 binagwe omu kikoomi ky'omuriro; omwo nimwo abantu bariririra, bakanena enshaya." 
Matthew13:43 Obwo abahikiriire baryayengyengyeta nk'eizooba omu bukama bwa Ishebo. Oine amatu, ahurire." 
Matthew13:44 Obukama bw'omu iguru nibushusha nk'eky'obutungi ekyasherekirwe omu musiri; bwanyima omuntu ku yaakigwireho, nawe yaakishereka, yaagyenda, yaatunda ebi yaabaire aine byona ashemereirwe, yaija, yaagura omusiri ogwo." 
Matthew13:45 Kandi obukama bw'omu iguru nibushusha nk'omushuubuzi orikusherura eruuru enungi; 
Matthew13:46 ku yaaboine eruuru emwe ey'obuguzi bwingi, yaagyenda, yaatunda ebye byona, yaagigura." 
Matthew13:47 Kandi hoona obukama bw'omu iguru nibushusha nk'akatimba aku bategire omu nyanja, kakakwata eby'enyanaja by'emiringo yoona." 
Matthew13:48 Ku kaijwire, baakakurura, baakahitsya aha nkungu, baashutama, baatooranamu ebirungi, baabita omu bintu byabo, ebibi baabinaga." 
Matthew13:49 Nikwo kiriba kityo aha mperu y'obusingye obu; baamaraika baryaija baihe ababi omu bahikiriire," 
Matthew13:50 babanagye omu kikoomi ky'omuriro; omwo nimwo bariririra, bakanena enshaya." 
Matthew13:51 Mwayetegyereza ebigambo ebyo byona? Baamugarukamu bati, Eego." 
Matthew13:52 Yaagaruka yaabagira ati: N'ahabw'ekyo omuhandiiki weena oyegyesiibwe eby'obukama bw'omu iguru naashushanisibwa na nyineeka, oiha omu ibiikiro rye ebintu ebisya n'ebya ira." 
Matthew13:53 Bwanyima Yesu, ku yaaherize kubacwera enfumu ezo, yaarugayo;" 
Matthew13:54 ku yaahikire omu nsi y'owaabo, yaatandika kubeegyeseza omuri sinagogi yaabo; n'ahabw'ekyo baatangaara nibagira bati: Obwengye obu n'eby'okutangaaza ebi ogu akabiiha hi?" 
Matthew13:55 Beitu ogu t'omwana w'omubaizi, na nyina tarikwetwa Mariamu? N'abarumuna ti Yakobo, Yosefu, Simooni na Yuda?" 
Matthew13:56 Nangwa na banyaanya boona ti bari aha naitwe? Beitu ogu mushaija ebi byona kabiiha hi? Ebye byabashobera. 
Matthew13:57 Yesu yaabagira ati: Nabi tabura kitiinisa kureka omu ihanga ryabo kandi n'omu ka ye. 
Matthew13:58 Okwo Yesu tiyaakorayo by'okutangaaza bingi ahabw'okutaikiriza kwabo. 
Matthew14:1 Omu biro ebyo Heroode ow'eishaza akahurira okurangaanwa kwa Yesu; 
Matthew14:2 yaagambira abagaragwa be ati: Ogwo ni Yohaana Omubatizi azookire omu bafu; nikyo kirikumukoresa eby'okutangaaza ebyo. 
Matthew14:3 Ahakuba ebyo bitakabaireho, Heroode akakwata Yohaana, yaamuboha, yaamuta omu kihome ahabwa Herodia, muka Filipo mwene ishe;" 
Matthew14:4 ahabw'okuba Yohaana akateisa Heroode ati: Ebiragiro tibirikukwikiriza kumugira omukazi waawe. 
Matthew14:5 Ku yaabaire naayenda kumwita, yaatiina abantu, ahabw'okuba abantu bakaba nibahamya ku Yohaana ari nabi." 
Matthew14:6 Kwonka ekiro ky'okwijuka okuzaarwa kwa Heroode ku kyahikire, muhara wa Herodia yaazinira omu maisho g'abangyenyi, yaashemeza Heroode." 
Matthew14:7 N'ahabw'ekyo yaamuraganisa, naarahira ku arikwija kumuha eki araamushabe kyona." 
Matthew14:8 Omwihsiki yaamushaba ati: Mpeera aha omutwe gwa Yohaana Omubatizi omu rucuba. 
Matthew14:9 Ekyo kyasaasa omugabe; kwonka ahabw'okushangwa yaarahiire omu maisho g'abagyenyi be, yaaragiira kugumuha." 
Matthew14:10 Yaatuma, baatemaho Yohaana omutwe omu kihome." 
Matthew14:11 Baareeta omutwe omu rucuba, baaguha omwishiki, nawe yaagutwarira nyina." 
Matthew14:12 Abeegi be baija, baatwara omutumbi gwe baaguziika, baagyenda baamubikira Yesu." 
Matthew14:13 Yesu ku yaabihuriire, yaarugayo, yaagyendera omu bwato, yaaza omu ihamba kwehereera; abantu baingi ku baakimanyire, baaruga omuri tauni, baaraba ogw'ebigyere, baamukurata." 
Matthew14:14 Ku yaayambukire, yaashangayo emitwe mingi y'abantu, yaabagirira embabazi, yaatambira abarwaire baabo." 
Matthew14:15 Ku bwaizire, abeegi be baija ah'ari, baamugira bati: Aha n'eihamba; kandi bwizire. Raga abantu bagyende omu birorero, beeshakire eby'okurya." 
Matthew14:16 Kwonka Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Tihariho kirikubatwara; mubagaburire. 
Matthew14:17 Baamugarukamu bati: Eki twine aha n'emigaati etaano n'eby'enyanja bibiri kwonka. 
Matthew14:18 Yaabagira ati: Mubindeetere. 
Matthew14:19 Yaaragiira emitwe y'abantu kushutama omu kacwamba; yaayakiira egyo migaati etaano n'eby'enyanja bibiri, yaareeba ahaiguru, yaasiima, yaabega emigaati, yaagiha abeegi be, nabo baagaburira abantu." 
Matthew14:20 Boona baarya, baahaaga. Bwanyima baatorotoora oburagarika obwatsigaraho, baijuza ebitenga ikumi na bibiri." 
Matthew14:21 Abo abaariire bakaba bari abashaija enkumi itaano, otabariiremu bakazi n'abaana." 
Matthew14:22 Ahonaaho yaagyema abeegi be ngu baze omu bwato, bamubandize seeri, We atsigare abanze aryagye emitwe egyo." 
Matthew14:23 Ku yaaherize kubaraga, yainamuka omu kibungo wenka kushaba. Obwire bwaira akiriyo wenka;" 
Matthew14:24 kwonka obwo, obwato bukaba buri ahagati y'enyanja, nibuzongibwa ebingonzi; ahabw'okuba omuyaga gukaba gubaturukire omumaisho." 
Matthew14:25 Enkoku ku zaabiare nizigamba, yaabaizira naagyendesa amaguru aha nyanja." 
Matthew14:26 Abeegi be ku baamureebire naagyendera aha nyanja, baayemereza emitima, baataka ahabw'obwoba, nibagira bati: N'omuzimu!" 
Matthew14:27 Ahonaaho Yesu yaabahuumuriza, naagira ati: muhuumure! Niinye, mutatiina." 
Matthew14:28 Petero yaamugarukamu ati: Mukama wangye, ku oraabe ori iwe, ndagiira, nyije aho ningyendera aha maizi." 
Matthew14:29 Yaamwikiriza ati: Ija. Petero yaaruga omu bwato, yaagyendera aha maizi kushanga Yesu." 
Matthew14:30 Kwonka ku yaareebire omuyaga gwaba mwingi, yaatiina; ku yaatandikire kutobera, yaataka ati: Mukama wangye, njuna." 
Matthew14:31 Ahonaaho Yesu yaagorora omukono gwe, yaamukwata, yaamugira ati: Iwe oine okwikiriza kukye, ahanki noobanganisa?" 
Matthew14:32 Ku baagiire omu bwato, omuyaga gwatuuza." 
Matthew14:33 Abaabaire bari omu bwato baamuramya nibagira bati: Buzimazima ori Omwana wa Ruhanga. 
Matthew14:34 Ku baaherize kwambuka, baahika seeri aharikwetwa Genesareeti." 
Matthew14:35 Abantu bayo, ku baamumanyire, baagaba ebirari aho hoona, baamureetera boona abaabaire barwaire;" 
Matthew14:36 baamweshengyereza ngu nangwa bakore aha mukugiro gw'ekaanzu ye kwonka; boona abaagukozireho, oku baingana, baakirira kimwe." 
Matthew15:1 Kandi Abafarisaayo n'abahandiiki bakaruga Yerusaalemu, baija ahari Yesu, baamubuuza bati:" 
Matthew15:2 Ahabw'enki abeegi baawe bashobya emigyenzo ya baishenkurubo? Ahabw'okuba tibajabika ngaro omu maizi, baaba nibaza kurya." 
Matthew15:3 Yaabagaarukamu naababuuza ati: Ahabw'enki imwe mushobya ebiragiro bya Ruhanga ahabw'emigyenzo yaanyu? 
Matthew15:4 Nimumanya ngu Ruhanga akaragiira ati: Otiine sho na nyoko; kandi ati: Orijuma ishe nari nyina, aitwe." 
Matthew15:5 Kwonka imwe nimugira muti: Omuntu orikugambira ishe nari nyina ati: Kyona eki naakukuhaire kukuhwera, nkihongyeire Ruhanga, ogwo aba atakigyemwa kutiina ishe." 
Matthew15:6 Omu buryo obwo ekigambo kya Ruhanga mukihindura busha, ngu mugumye emigyenzo yaanyu." 
Matthew15:7 Imwe ndyarya 'mwe, Isaaya akabaraguraho kurungi, obu yaagira ati:" 
Matthew15:8 Ab'eihanga eri nibampa ekitiinisa ky'aha minwa, Kwonka emitima yaabo endi hare." 
Matthew15:9 Bandamiza busha, Ahakuba okwegyesa, oku beegyesa, kuba okw'ebiragiro by'abantu." 
Matthew15:10 Yaayeta omutwe gw'abantu, yaabagambira ati: muhurire, kandi mwetegyereze." 
Matthew15:11 Ekitaaha omu kanwa tikyo kishiisha omuntu; kureka ekiruga omu kanwa, nikyo kishiisha omuntu." 
Matthew15:12 Bwanyima abeegi be baija baamugira bati: Noomanya ku Abafarisaayo baaguubwa kubi ahabw'okuhurira ebyo ebi waagamba? 
Matthew15:13 Yaabagarukamu ati: Buri muti gwona ogu Tata ow'omu iguru atarabyaire, guryakuurwa." 
Matthew15:14 Mubarekye! N'abeebembezi empumi, haza nabo bahumire. Mumanye ngu empumi ku eyebembera endiijo, zombi zigwa omu kiina." 
Matthew15:15 Petero yaamushaba ati: Tishobororere amakuru g'egyo nfumu. 
Matthew15:16 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Biri shi naimwe timukashoborokyeirwe? 
Matthew15:17 Timurikumanya ngu, ekintu ku kitaaha omu kanwa, kiza omu nda, bwanyima kishohora?" 
Matthew15:18 Kwonka ebiruga omu kanwa biba nibiruga omu mutima; ebyo nibyo bishiisha omuntu. 
Matthew15:19 Ahabw'okuba omu mutima nimwo haruga ebiteekateeko bibi, okwita, okushambana, okwiba, okubeiherera abandi, okujuma;" 
Matthew15:20 ebyo nibyo bishiisha omuntu; kwonka okuriisa engaro zitajabikire mu maizi, ekyo tikishiisha muntu." 
Matthew15:21 Kandi Yesu yaarugayo, yaataaha omu ishaza rya Tuuro n'erya Sidoni." 
Matthew15:22 Haija Omunyakanaanikazi ow'omu kyanga ekyo, yaamweshengyereza naagira ati: mukama wangye, Mwana wa Daudi, ngirira embabazi! Muhara wangye ariho daimoni, naamwita kubi munonga." 
Matthew15:23 Kwonka Yesu tiyaagira ki yaamugarukamu. Abeegi be baija, bamweshengyereza nibagira bati: Muragiire, agyende, ahabw'okuba naatuyomberera." 
Matthew15:24 We yaagarukamu ati: Tindatumirwe ha bandi kureka aha ntaama z'oruganda rwa Israeli ezaabuzire. 
Matthew15:25 Omukazi yaagaruka yaamuramya naagira ati: Mukama wangye, mpwera." 
Matthew15:26 Yaamugarukamu ati: Ti kirungi omuntu kwaka abaana eby'okurya, akabitambikira embwa." 
Matthew15:27 Omukazi yaamwikiriza ati: Eego, Mukama wangye, kwonka embwa nazo zirya oburagarika oburagara niburuga aha meeza ya mukama waazo." 
Matthew15:28 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Mukazi 'we, okwikiriza kwawe kwingi; kibe nk'oku orikwenda. Okuruga aho muhara we yaakira." 
Matthew15:29 Yesu yaarugayo, yaaraba aha rubaju rw'enyanja ya Galilaaya; yainamuka omu migongo, yaashutamayo." 
Matthew15:30 Emitwe y'abantu baingi baamushangayo, bamureeteire ebirema n'empumi n'ebitera n'ebimuga n'abandi baingi, baabata aha bigyere bye, yaabatambira;" 
Matthew15:31 n'ahabw'ekyo abantu baatangaara, ku baareebire ebiteta nibigamba, ebimuga nibikira, ebirema nibigyenda, n'empumi nizireeba; baahimbisa Ruhanga wa Israeli." 
Matthew15:32 Bwanyima Yesu yaayeta abeegi be, yaabagira ati: Ninsaasira abantu aba, ahabw'okuba bamazire aha naanye ebiro bishatu, hati tibaine ky'okurya; tinkaayenzire kuboohereza basiibirekwo, batakaagwera enshazi omu muhanda." 
Matthew15:33 Abeegi be baamubuuza bati: Omuri eri ihamba nitwiha hi emigaati erikubaasa kuhaazya abantu abarikwingana bati? 
Matthew15:34 Yesu yaababuuza ati: Mwine emigaati engahi? Banu bati: Ni mushanju n'obw'enyanja bukye. 
Matthew15:35 Yaaragiira abantu kushutama ahansi; 
Matthew15:36 yaakwata egyo migaati mushanju n'obw'enyanja; ku yaabisiimiire, yaabega emigaati, yaagiha abeegi be, nabo baagaburira abantu." 
Matthew15:37 Boona baarya, baahaaga, baatorotoora oburagarika obwatsigaireho, baijuza ebiibo mushanju." 
Matthew15:38 Boona abaariire bakaba bari enkumi ina, otabariiremu bakzi n'abaana." 
Matthew15:39 Yaabaraga, yaaza omu bwato, yaataaha omu ishaza rya Magadani." 
Matthew16:1 Abafarisaayo n'Abasadukaayo bakaija, baamushaba kubooreka akamanyiso akarikuruga omu iguru, nibamutega." 
Matthew16:2 Yaabagarukamu ati: Ku buba buri haihi kwira, mwareeba ebicu nibitukura, mugira ngu, omu kasheeshe nihaija kusiiba hakyeire." 
Matthew16:3 Kandi omu kasheeshe mugira ngu eri izooba nihaija kuba habi, ahabw'okuba ebicu nibitukura kandi nibikondakonda. Nimumanya kukyenga enshusha y'eiguru, kwonka timurikubaasa kukyenga obumanyiso bw'obunaku." 
Matthew16:4 Ab'obusingye obubi obw'obushambani nibenda akamanyiso; kwonka tibarikaheebwa kureka akamanyiso ka Yona. Yaabarugaho, yaayegyendera." 
Matthew16:5 Abeegi be ku baahikire seeri, baijuka ku beebirwe kwereetera emigaati." 
Matthew16:6 Yesu yaabahabura ati: Reeba, mwerinde ekitumbisa ky'Abafarisaayo n'Abasadukaayo." 
Matthew16:7 Baagambirana bati: Eki arikufa n'ahabw'okuba titwareeta migaati. 
Matthew16:8 Yesu ku yaabimanyire, yaababuuza ati: Imwe abaine okwikiriza kukye, nimufa ki aha by'emigaati?" 
Matthew16:9 Timukashoborokyeirwe, n'obu kwakuba okwijuka emigaati etaano aha bantu enkumi itaano, n'ebitenga oku byaingaine ebi mwaijwize?" 
Matthew16:10 Kandi n'emigaati mushanju aha nkumi ina, n'ebiibo oku byaingaine ebi mwaijwize?" 
Matthew16:11 N'enki ekibazibiire kumanya ku ntarikugamba ha by'emigaati? Mwerinde ekitumbisa ky'Abafarisaayo n'Abasadukaayo. 
Matthew16:12 Okuruga aho baamanya ku atabagambiire kwerinda ekitumbisa eky'emigaati, kureka enyegyesa y'Abafarisaayo n'Abasadukaayo." 
Matthew16:13 Yesu, ku yaahikire omu kyanga kya Kaisarea-Filipi, yaabuuza abeegi be ati: Beitu abantu nibagira ngu nyowe Omwana w'omuntu ndi oha?" 
Matthew16:14 Baamugira bati: Abamwe nibagira ngu, Ori Yohaana Omubatizi, abandi ngu, Ori Eliya, kandi abandi ngu, Ori Yeremia nari omwe ahari baanabi." 
Matthew16:15 Yaababuuza ati: Mbwenu shi imwe, mugira ngu mba oha?" 
Matthew16:16 Simooni Petero yaagarukamu ati: Ori Kristo, Omwana wa Ruhanga ohuriire." 
Matthew16:17 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Oine omugisha, Simooni mwene Yona; ahabw'okuba omubiri n'eshagama tibyo byakushuuruurira ekyo, kureka Tata ori omu iguru." 
Matthew16:18 Kandi ninkugambira nti: Ori Petero, naanye ndyayombeka ekanisa yangye aha rukiri oru, n'amarembo g'okuzimu tigarigibaasa." 
Matthew16:19 Ndyakuha ebishumuruzo by'obukama bw'omu iguru; eki oriboha omu nsi kyona, kiryabohwa n'omu iguru; eki orikomoorora omu nsi kyona, kiryakomoororwa n'omu iguru." 
Matthew16:20 Bwanyima yaayehanangiriza abeegi be kutagira ou baagambira ku ari Kristo. 
Matthew16:21 Okuruga aho Yesu yaatandika kumanyisa abeegi be oku ashemereire kuza Yerusaalemu, akabonabonesibwa omuri bingi abakuru n'abanyamurwa abakuru n'abhandiiki, akaitwa, kandi bwanyima y'ebiro bishatu akazooka." 
Matthew16:22 Petero yaamuta aha rubaju, yaatandika kumuteisa, naamugira ati: Nikikabure, Mukama wangye! ekyo tikirikwija kukubaho na kakye." 
Matthew16:23 Yesu yaahinduka, yaagira Petero ati: Garuka enyima yangye, Sitaane! Wambeera enkongi, ahabw'okuba torikuteekateeka bya Ruhanga, kureka eby'abantu." 
Matthew16:24 Yesu yaayeyongyera yaagambira abeegi be ati: Omuntu weena ku araayende kunkuratira, ayeyangise, ayekorere omusharaba gwe, ankuratire." 
Matthew16:25 Omuntu weena orikwenda kukiza amagara ge, aryagabuza; kandi weena orikubuza amagara ge ahabwangye, aryagakiza." 
Matthew16:26 Mbwenu kiryagasira ki omuntu kutunga ensi yoona, haza akafeerwa amagara ge? Nari shi, omuntu aryahayo ki kucungura amagara ge?" 
Matthew16:27 Mumanye ngu Omwana w'omuntu aryaija na baamaraika be omu kitiinisa kya Ishe; kandi obwo nibwo ariihura omuntu weena ebishemereire ebi yaakozire. 
Matthew16:28 Buzima nimbagambira nti: Omuri aba abeemereire aha, hariho bamwe abarireeba Omwana w'omuntu naija omu bukama bwe batakafiire." 
Matthew17:1 Ku haahingwireho ebiro mukaaga, Yesu yaagyenda na Petero na Yakobo na Yohaana omurumuna, yaabahitsya aha mutwe gw'orushozi ruraingwa bonka." 
Matthew17:2 Yaahindurirwa omu maisho gaabo, aha maisho ge haamurinkana nk'eizooba, n'ebijwaro bye byayera nk'omushana." 
Matthew17:3 Kandi Musa na Eliya baareebeka omu maisho gaabo, nibagaaniira nawe." 
Matthew17:4 Petero yaagambira Yesu ati: Mukama wangye, ni kirungi obu turi aha; ku oraabe nookunda, twombekye obuju bushatu, akamwe kabe akaawe, akandi kabe aka Musa, n'akandi aka Eliya." 
Matthew17:5 Ku yaabaire naakigamba, haija ekicu kirikwengyengyeta, kyabasangira, eiraka ryakyemamu nirigira riti: ogu n'Omwana wangye ou nkunda, ou nyesiimira munonga; mumuhurire." 
Matthew17:6 Abeegi ku baarihuriire, baagwa bajuumaire, batiinire munonga." 
Matthew17:7 Yesu yaija, yaabakoraho, yaabagambira ati: Mwimukye, mutatiina." 
Matthew17:8 Ku baajuumwire amaisho, tibareeba muntu weena kureka Yesu wenka." 
Matthew17:9 Bwanyima ku baabaire nibashuuma nibaruga aha rushozi, Yesu yaabeehanangiriza ati: Mutagira ou mwagambira ebi mworekirwe, okuhitsya obu Omwana w'omuntu arizooka omu bafu." 
Matthew17:10 Abeegi be baamubuuza bati: Ahabw'enki abahandiiki bagira ngu: Eliya ashemereire kubanza kwija? 
Matthew17:11 Yaabagarukamu ati: N'eky'amazima; Eliya aryaija, ashemeze byona;" 
Matthew17:12 kwonka nimbagambira ngu, Eliya akaheza kwija; kwonka tibaramumanyire, kureka bakamutwaza, nk'oku baayenzire. Kandi hoona n'Omwana w'omuntu nikwo barimubonabonesa." 
Matthew17:13 Aho niho abeegi be baihire kumanya ku arikubagambira ahari Yohaana Omubatizi. 
Matthew17:14 Ku baahikire ahu abantu baingi baabaire bari, haija omushaija, yaamutsimbira amaju, yaamugira ati:" 
Matthew17:15 Mukama wangye, saasira omwana wangye; ahabw'okuba naagwa entsimbo, kandi zimukabya munonga; kaingi agwa omu muriro, kandi obundi agwa omu maizi." 
Matthew17:16 Naamureetera abeegi baawe, baaremwa kumukiza." 
Matthew17:17 Yesu yaagarukamu ati: Imwe ab'obusingye obu obutarikwikiriza, oburikwehabagiza, ndyahitsya hi okuguma naimwe? Ndyahitsya hi okubagumisiririza? Mumundeetere!" 
Matthew17:18 Yaagambira kubi daimoni; yaamurugaho, omwana ogwo yaakirira aho omuri ako kaanya." 
Matthew17:19 Bwanyima abeegi baija ahari Yesu omu mubonano, baamubuuza bati: Ahabw'enki itwe tutabaasize kumubinga?" 
Matthew17:20 Yaabagarukamu ati: N'ahabw'okwikiriza kwanyu kukye. Kandi buzima nimbagambira nti: Ku muraabe mwine okwikiriza nk'akajuma ka sinaapi, ku murigambira orushozi oru ngu, Ruga aha, oze hariya, ruryarugaho; kandi tihariho kintu kyona ekiribarema." 
Matthew17:21 Kwonka daimoni ow'omuringo nk'ogu tarikubingwa kindi kureka okushaba n'okwesiibyakwo. 
Matthew17:22 Ku baabaire bari Galilaaya, Yesu yaabagambira ati: Omwana w'omuntu aryaheebwayo omu mikono y'abantu;" 
Matthew17:23 baryamwita, kandi aha kiro kya kashatu aryazooka. Baaganya munonga." 
Matthew17:24 Ku baataahire Kaperenaumu, abantu abarikushooza omushoro gwa hekalu baija ahari Petero, baamubuuza bati: Beitu omwegyesa waanyu tashora?" 
Matthew17:25 Yaabagarukamu ati: Naashora. Ku yaataahire omu nju, Yesu yaaba niwe yaabanza kumubuuza ati: Nooteekateeka ota, Simooni? Abagabe b'ensi ehoozi n'omushoro babiheebwa bantu ki? Abaana baabo nari abantu abandi?" 
Matthew17:26 Ku yaamugarukiremu ati, Abandi, Yesu yaamugambira ati: Mbwenu abaana baabo baine obusingye." 
Matthew17:27 Kwonka itwe tutabagwisa kubi, ogyende aha nyanja, otegyese eirobo, eky'enyanja eki oraabanze kukwata, okyashamure, omu kanwa kaakyo noija kushangamu sitateeri; obe niyo waabaha ahabwangye n'ahabwawe." 
Matthew18:1 Omu bunaku obwo abeegi bakaija ahari Yesu, baamubuuza bati: Omukuru omu bukama bw'omu iguru n'oha?" 
Matthew18:2 Yaayeta omwana muto, yaamwemereza ahagati yaabo," 
Matthew18:3 yaagira ati: Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Ku muriba mutahindukire, mukaba nk'abaana bato, timuritaaha mu bukama bw'omu iguru na kakye." 
Matthew18:4 Omuntu weena, orikwecureeza nk'omwana ogu omuto, niwe mukuru omu bukama bw'omu iguru." 
Matthew18:5 Kandi weena orikwakiira omwana muto nk'ogu omu iziina ryangye, biri niinye ayakiire;" 
Matthew18:6 klwonka weena orireetera omwe ahari aba abato abarikuunyikiriza kukora ekibi, haakiri omuntu ogwo okubohwa orubengo ruhango omu bitsya, akanagwa ahagati omu nyanja." 
Matthew18:7 Ensi eryakareeba ahabw'ebirikugwisa abantu. Ebirikugwisa tibiribura kwija; kwonka origwisa abandi, aryakareeba." 
Matthew18:8 Omukono gwawe nari shi ekigyere kyawe ku kiraakureetere kukora ekibi, okitemeho, okinagye hare; haakiri iwe okutaaha omu magara, ori ekirema nari noocumbagira, okukira okunagwa omu muriro ogutaraara oine emikono yombi nari ebigyere byombi." 
Matthew18:9 Kandi n'eriisho ryawe ku riraakureetere kukora ekibi, oriihemu orinagye hare; haakiri iwe okutaaha omu magara oine eriisho rimwe, okukira okunagwa omuri Gehena ey'omuriro oine amaisho gombi." 
Matthew18:10 Mwerinde murekye kugaya omwe ahari aba abato; ahakuba nimbagambira nti: Omu iguru baamaraika baabo bareeba obutoosha ahamaisho ga Tata ori omu iguru. 
Matthew18:11 Ahabw'okuba Omwana w'omuntu akaija kujuna ekyabaire kibuzire. 
Matthew18:12 Nimuteekateeka muta? Omuntu ku aba aine entaama igana, emwe aharizo yaarara, tatsiga ziri makumi mwenda na mwenda aha mugongo, akaza kusherura egyo erazire?" 
Matthew18:13 Kandi ku agibona, buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Agishemerererwa okukira ziri makumi mwenda na mwenda ezaaba zitarazire." 
Matthew18:14 Nikwo na Tata ori omu iguru atarikwenda omwe ahari aba bato kuhwerekyerera. 
Matthew18:15 Mwene waanyu ku araakukore kubi, gyenda omumanyise eki akushagiize muri mwembi. Ku araakworobere, biri waabona mwene sho." 
Matthew18:16 Ku araayangye kukworobera, otware ondiijo nari babiri, ngu ekigambo kyona kihamibwe baakareebi babiri nari bashatu." 
Matthew18:17 Nabo ku araayangye kuboorobera, okugambire ekanisa; kandi ku araayangye kworobera ekanisa, abe nk'omunyaihanga n'omuhooza ahariiwe." 
Matthew18:18 Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Ebi muriboha omu nsi byona, biryabohwa n'omu iguru; kandi ebi murikomoorora omu nsi byona, biryakomoororwa n'omu iguru." 
Matthew18:19 Kandi nimbagambira nti: Babiri ahariimwe ku barikwatansia omu nsi, baashaba ekintu kyona, kiryabakorerwa Tata ori omu iguru." 
Matthew18:20 Ahabw'okuba babiri nari bashatu ku bariteeranira ahamwe omu iziina ryangye, naanye ndyaba ahagati yaabo." 
Matthew18:21 Bwanyima Petero yaija, yaamubuuza ati: Mukama wangye, mugyenzi wangye ku araagume nanshaagiza, mmusaasire kangahi? Mpitsye emirundi mushanju?" 
Matthew18:22 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Tindikukugira nti, Ohitsye emirundi mushanju, kureka nti, Ohitsye emirundi makumi mushanju emirundi mushanju." 
Matthew18:23 N'ahabw'ekyo obukama bw'omu iguru nibushushanisibwa n'omugabe owaayenzire kubara n'abambari be ebintu ebi yaabaire ababiikize. 
Matthew18:24 Ku yaatandikire kubara, baamureetera omwe owaabaire aine eibanja rye ery'etalanta kakumi." 
Matthew18:25 Ku yaabuzire eky'okwihura, makama we yaaragiira ku bamutunda, we n'omukazi we n'abaana be n'ebi yaabaire aine byona, ngu abone kumara eibanja." 
Matthew18:26 Omwambari ogwo nikwo kumukwata amaguru akamweshengyereza, naagira ati: Mukama wangye, nyihuza mpora, naanye ndyakwihura byona." 
Matthew18:27 Mukama w'omwambari ogwo ahabw'embabazi ze yaamurekura, yaamusaasira eibanja eryo." 
Matthew18:28 Kwonka omwambari ogwo, ku yaashohoire, yaabugana omwambari mugyenzi we, owaabaire aine eibanja rye ery'edenaari igana; yaamukwata, yaamutq aha munigo, naagira ati: Nyihura eibanja ryangye." 
Matthew18:29 Ogwo mwambari mugyenzi we yaamukwata amaguru, yaamweshengyereza ati: Nyihuza mpora, niinyija kukwihura." 
Matthew18:30 We yaayanga, yaagyenda, yaamuta omu kihome, okuhitsya obu araaheze eibanja." 
Matthew18:31 Mbwenu abambari bagyenzi be, ku baareebire ebyabaho, baamugwerwa kubi munonga; baagyenda baabigambira mukama waabo byona." 
Matthew18:32 Mukama waabo nikwo kumutuma, akamujuukirira ati: iwe mwambari 'we omubi, nkusaasiire eibanja eryo ryona ahabw'okuunyeshengyereza;" 
Matthew18:33 naiwe toshemereire kusaasira omwambari mugyenzi waawe, nk'oku nkusaasiire?" 
Matthew18:34 Mukama we yaamugwerwa kubi, yaamuhayo omu mikono y'abarinzi, okuhitsya obu ariihura eibanja ryona." 
Matthew18:35 Nikwo Tata ow'omu iguru aribagira atyo, ku muriba mutasaasiire bagyenzi baanyu, mwihire aha mutima." 
Matthew19:1 Yesu ku yaaherize kugamba ebyo byona, yaaruga Galilaaya, yaataaha omu ishaza rya Buyudaaya seeri ya Yorudani;" 
Matthew19:2 emitwe y'abantu baingi yaamukuratira, yaabakirizayo." 
Matthew19:3 Abafarisaayo baija ah'ari, baamutega nibagira bati: Beitu Ebiragiro biikiriza omushaija kushenda omukazi we, yaaba aine eki arikumutura kyona?" 
Matthew19:4 Yaabagarukamu ati: Timukashomaga ngu, Owaabahangire bwa mbere na mbere, akahanga omushaija n'omukazi?" 
Matthew19:5 Yaagira ati: Omushaija nikyo atsigiraho ishe na nyina, akaguma n'omukazi we; nabo bombi bakahinduka omuntu omwe." 
Matthew19:6 Baba batakiri babiri kureka omwe. N'ahabw'ekyo eki Ruhanga yaateeraine hamwe, omuntu atarikitaanisa." 
Matthew19:7 Baagaruka baamubuuza bati: Ku kiraabe kiri kityo, ahabw'enki Musa akaragiira omuntu kuha ebaruha y'okutaana, ngu abone kushenda omukazi we?" 
Matthew19:8 Yaabagarukamu ati: Ahabw'obugangaazi bw'emitima yaanyu Musa nikyo yaikiririize ku mutaana n'abakazi baanyu, kwonka bwa mbere na mbere kikaba kitari kityo." 
Matthew19:9 Kandi naanye nimbagambira nti: Omuntu weena orishenda omukazi we atamutuzire bushambani, akashwera ondiijo, aryaba ashambaine; kandi n'orishwera oshenzirwe nawe aryaba ashambaine." 
Matthew19:10 Abeegi be baamugira bati: Eby'omushaija n'omukazi ku biraabe nikwo biri, ti kirungi kushwera." 
Matthew19:11 Yaabagarukamu ati: Abantu abarikubaasa kwemera ekigambo ekyo ti boona, kureka abo abakihairwe."
