Matthew19:12 Nimumanya ngu hariho abakonwa abaazairwe batyo okuruga omu nda za baanyinabo; hariho n'abakonwa abaakonirwe abantu; kandi hariho abakonwa abaayekonire ahabw'obukama bw'omu iguru. Orikubaasa kwemera ekyo, akyemere." 
Matthew19:13 Bakamureetera abaana bato ngu abateho engaro, abashabire. Abeegi be baagambira kubi abaabareeta." 
Matthew19:14 Kwonka Yesu yaabagira ati: Murekye abaana bato baije ahariinye, mutabazibira; ahabw'okuba obukama bw'omu iguru n'obw'abari nk'aba." 
Matthew19:15 Yaabataho engaro, yaarugayo." 
Matthew19:16 Kandi hakaija omuntu, yaamubuuza ati: Mwegyesa, nkaakora kirungi ki okutunga amagara agatahwaho?" 
Matthew19:17 Yaamugarukamu ati: Nombuuriza ki aha kirungi? Omurungi n'omwe. Ku oraabe nooyenda kutaaha omu magara, oyorobere ebiragiro." 
Matthew19:18 Onu yaamubuuza ati: Nibiiha? Yesu ati: Otariita, Otarishambana, Otariiba, Otaribeiherera abandi;" 
Matthew19:19 Otiine sho na nyoko; kandi Okunde mutaahi waawe, nk'oku oyekunda." 
Matthew19:20 Omutsigazi ogwo yaamugarukamu ati: Ebyo byona nkabyorobera; ekindi ekimbuzireho niki? 
Matthew19:21 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Ku oraabe nooyenda kuba ohikire, gyenda otunde ebi oine byona; ebi oraihemu, obihe abooro; naiwe oryatunga eitungo omu iguru; haza oije onkuratire." 
Matthew19:22 Omutsigazi ku yaahuriire ekigambo ekyo, yaagyenda aine enaku nyingi, ahabw'okuba akaba aine eitungo ringi." 
Matthew19:23 Yesu yaagambira abeegi be ati: Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Kigumire omutungi okutaaha omu bukama bw'omu iguru. 
Matthew19:24 Kandi nimbagambira nti: Nikirahuka engamira kuraba omu nyindo y'empitirizo, okukira omutungi kutaaha omu bukama bwa Ruhanga." 
Matthew19:25 Abeegi be, ku baakihuriire, baatangaara munonga, baamubuuza bati: Mbwenu shi hoona, n'oha orikubaasa kujunwa?" 
Matthew19:26 Yesu yaabareeba, yaabagarukamu ati: Ekyo tikirikubaasika ha bantu; kwonka ahari Ruhanga byona nibibaasika." 
Matthew19:27 Petero nikwo kumugambira ati: Reeba itwe tukatsigaho byona, twakukuratira. Mbwenu turyatunga ki?" 
Matthew19:28 Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Omu bunaku obu ebintu birihindukiramu bisya, Omwana w'omuntu ku arishutama aha kitebe ky'ekitiinisa kye, imwe abankuratiire muryashutama aha bitebe ikumi na bibiri, mucwere enganda za Israeli ekumi na ibiri emanja." 
Matthew19:29 Omuntu weena owaatsigireho amaju, beene ishe, banyaanya, ishe, nyina, abaana nari ebibanja ahabw'eiziina ryangye, aryaheebwa nk'ebyo emirundi igana, kandi ahungure amagara agatahwaho." 
Matthew19:30 Kwonka baingi ab'okubanza baryaba ab'enyima, kandi ab'enyima baryaba ab'okubanza." 
Matthew20:1 Ahakuba obukama bw'omu iguru nibushusha nk'omushaija nyineeka, owaimukire kare omu kasheeshe kugurira ab'okuhinga omu musiri gwe gw'emizaabibu." 
Matthew20:2 Ku yaaherize kuragaana nabo edenaari emwe ahabw'eizooba rimwe, yaaboohereza omu musiri gwe gw'emizaabibu." 
Matthew20:3 Aha shaaha ya kashatu yaashohora, yaareeba abandi beemereire omu katare, bataine ki barikukora;" 
Matthew20:4 yaabagambira ati: Naimwe mugyende omu musiri gw'emizaabibu, niinyija kubaha ekibashemereire. Baagyenda." 
Matthew20:5 Yaayongyera yaashohora aha shaaha ya mukaaga n'aha ya mwenda, naatwaza atyo." 
Matthew20:6 Haihi n'eshaaha ya ikumi n'emwe yaashohora, yaashanga abandi beemereire, yaababuuza ati: N'enki ekibeemereize aho eizooba ryona, mutaine ki murikukora?" 
Matthew20:7 Baamugarukamu bati: Ahabw'okuba tihaine owaatuha omurimo. Yaabagira ati: Naimwe mwirooko muze omu musiri gw'emizaabibu. 
Matthew20:8 Ku bwaizire, mukama w'omusiri gw'emizaabibu yaagira omunyampara we ati: Yeta abakozi, obahe ebihembo byabo, obandize aha ba bwanyima, okuhitsya aha baabanza." 
Matthew20:9 Abaatandikire eshaaha ya ikumi n'emwe ku baizire, baihurwa edenaari emwe buri omwe." 
Matthew20:10 Kandi abaabandize ku baizire, baagira ngu nibaija kwihurwa okukiraho; kwonka nabo baihurwa edenaari emwe buri omwe." 
Matthew20:11 Ku baagihairwe, baayetomboitera nyineeka," 
Matthew20:12 nibagira bati: Aba aba bwanyima baakora eshaaha emwe yonka, mbwenu waabainganisa naitwe abaahendeka eizooba ryona, tukaitwa omushana?" 
Matthew20:13 We yaagarukamu, naagira omwe aharibo ati: Mugyenzi wangye, tiinyine ki naakushaagiza. Torikumanya ku twaragaana edenaari emwe?" 
Matthew20:14 Twara eyaawe, ogyende; n'owa bwanyima naasiima kumuha nkaimwe." 
Matthew20:15 Hariho ekirikunzibira kutwza ebyangye nk'oku ndikwenda? Nonteera ekitsyori ahabw'obufura bwangye? 
Matthew20:16 Nikwo aba bwanyima bariba ab'okubanza, n'ab'okubanza bakaba aba bwanyima." 
Matthew20:17 Yesu ku yaabaire nainamuka Yerusaalemu, yaatwara abeegi be ikumi na babiri, yaabakiika aha rubaju; omu muhanda nibakigyenda yaabagambira ati:" 
Matthew20:18 Reeba, nitwinamuka Yerusaalemu; Omwana w'omuntu naija kuheebwayo aha banyamurwa abakuru n'abahandiiki; nabo bamucwere orubanja rw'okumwita;" 
Matthew20:19 kandi bamuheyo aha banyamahanga kumushungisa, n'okumwasha, n'okumubamba aha musharaba; kandi aha kiro kya kashatu aryazooka." 
Matthew20:20 Bwanyima nyina wa beene Zebedaayo yaija ahari Yesu n'abatabani, yaamutsimbira amaju, aine eki arikwenda kumushaba." 
Matthew20:21 Yaamubuuza ati: Nooyenda ki? Yaamugarukamu ati: Ragiira batabani bangye bombi bashutame omwe aha rubaju rwawe rwa buryo n'ondi aha rwa bumosho omu bukama bwawe. 
Matthew20:22 Kwonka Yesu yaagarukamu ati: Timurikumanya ki murikushaba. Nimubaasa kunywa aha kikopo eki ndaije kunywaho? Baamugarukamu bati: Eego, nitubaasa." 
Matthew20:23 Yaabagira ati: Ekikopo kyangye kyo muryakinywaho buzima; kwonka okunshutama aha rubaju rwa buryo, nari shi orwa bumosho, tiinye nkuha, kureka kuryaheebwa abo, abu Tata yaakucumiire." 
Matthew20:24 Kandi eikumi, ku baabihuriire, baagwerwa kubi enyineemwe ezo zombi." 
Matthew20:25 Yesu yaabeeta, yaabagira ati: Nimumanya abakuru b'abanyamahanga ku babategyekyesa eikama, n'abakuru baabo bakabaragiiza obushoboorozi;" 
Matthew20:26 kwonka omuriimwe tikwo kiriba; weena orikwenda kuba mukuru omuriimwe, ashemereire kuba omuheereza waanyu;" 
Matthew20:27 n'orikwenda kuba ow'okubanza omuriimwe ashemereire kuba omuhuuku waanyu; 
Matthew20:28 nk'Omwana w'omuntu oku ataizire kuheerezibwa, kureka okuheereza abandi, n'okuhayo amagara ge okucungura baingi." 
Matthew20:29 Ku baabaire nibashohora omuri Yeriko, omutwe muhango gw'abantu gwamukuratira." 
Matthew20:30 Kandi empumi ibiri zikaba zishutami aha rubaju rw'omuhanda. Ku zaahuriire ngu Yesu naahingura, zaayeta nizigira ziti: Mukama waitu, Mwana wa Daudi, otugirire embabazi!" 
Matthew20:31 Ab'omu mutwe baaziteisa ngu zicureere; 
Matthew20:32 kwonka zo zaagumizamu nizeeta munonga ziti: Mukama waitu, Mwana wa Daudi, otugirire embabazi!" 
Matthew20:33 Yesu nikwo kwemerera, akazeeta, akazibuuza ati: Nimwenda ngu mbakorere ki?" 
Matthew20:34 Zikamugarukamu ziti: Mukama waitu, nitwenda ngu amaisho gaitu gahumuukye." 
Matthew20:35 Yesu yaazigirira embabqazi, yaakora aha maisho gaazo; ahonaaho zaahumuuka, zaamukuratira." 
Matthew21:1 Kandi ku bairiire haihi na Yerusaalemu, baahika Besifaage omu kibungo kya Zeituuni; Yesu yaatuma abeegi be babiri," 
Matthew21:2 yaabagira ati: Mugyende omu kirorero ekibari omumaisho; ahonaaho nimwija kushangamu endogoya etsibikire n'omwana gwayo; muzitsibure, muzindeetere." 
Matthew21:3 Omuntu weena ku araababuuze, mumugarukyemu muti: Mukama waitu naazenda. Ahonnaaho mukama waazo naija kuzoohereza." 
Matthew21:4 Eki kikabaho okuhikiiriza ekyagambirwe nabi ati: 
Matthew21:5 Mugambire Saayuuni muti: Reeba, Mukama waawe naija ah'ori, Omucureezi, atembire endogoya, Endogoya nto, omwana gw'endogoya." 
Matthew21:6 Abeegi be baagyenda, baakora nk'oku Yesu yaabaragiira," 
Matthew21:7 baareeta endogoya n'omwana gwayo, baazaaraho ebijwaro byabo; yaabishutamaho." 
Matthew21:8 Abaingi baayarira ebijwaro byabo omu nguuto, abandi baatema amababi g'ebiti, baagariira omu nguuto." 
Matthew21:9 Abaamushendekyereize bamwebembeire, n'abandi bamuri enyima nibagyenda nibeeshongora n'eiraka rihango, nibagira bati: Hosana aha Mwana wa Daudi! Orikwija omu iziina rya Mukama asiimwe! Hosana ahaiguru ya byona!" 
Matthew21:10 Ku yaataahire Yerusaalemu, orurembo rwona rwajagarara, abantu baabuuzana bati: Ogu n'oha?" 
Matthew21:11 Abaizire nawe baagarukamu bati: Ni nabi Yesu owaarugire Nazareesi eya Galilaaya. 
Matthew21:12 Yesu yaataaha omuri hekalu ya Ruhanga, yaagibingamu boona abaabaire nibatunda, n'abaabaire nibagura, yaajumika emeeza z'abarikuhingisa empiiha, n'ebitebe by'abaabaire nibatunda enkombe;" 
Matthew21:13 yaabagira ati: Kikahandiikwa ngu, Enju yangye eryayetwa enju y'okushabiramu; mbwenu imwe mugihindwire nk'enyanga y'abambuzi." 
Matthew21:14 Kandi empumi n'abarikucumbagira baija baamushanga omuri hekalu, yaabakiza." 
Matthew21:15 Abanyamurwa abakuru n'abahandiiki ku baareebire eby'okutangaaza ebi yaakozire, baahurira n'abaana nibeeshongorera omuri hekalu bati: Hosana aha Mwana wa Daudi, baaguubw akubi munonga;" 
Matthew21:16 baamugira bati: Beitu ohuriire ebi aba barikugamba? Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Eego! Imwe timukashomaga ngu, Omu kanwa k'abaana bato n'abarikwonka Okatamu okuhimbisa okuhikire?" 
Matthew21:17 Yaabatsigaho, yaashohora omu rurembo, yaataaha Besania, yaaraarayo." 
Matthew21:18 Omu kasheeshe ku yaabaire naagaruka omu rurembo, yaagira enjara." 
Matthew21:19 Ku yaareebire omutiini aha rubaju rw'omuhanda, yaaguhikaho, tiyaagushangaho kantu kureka omubengyeyo gw'amababi. Yaagugira ati: Otaryana ebyana ebiro byona. Ahonaaho omutiini gwayoma." 
Matthew21:20 Abeegi ku baakireebire, baatangaara nibagira bati: Omutiini gwarahuka guta kwoma?" 
Matthew21:21 Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: KU murigira okwikiriza, mutarikubanganisa, timurikora eki ekyakorwa aha mutiini ogwo kyonka; nangwa n'obu muriragiira orushozi oru muti, Tsinduka onagwe omu nyanja, nikwo kiriba kityo." 
Matthew21:22 Byona ebi muryenda omu kashaba kwanyu, mwabishaba mwine okwikiriza, muryabiheebwa." 
Matthew21:23 Ku yaataahire omuri hekalu, abanyamurwa abakuru n'abakuru b'abantu baija ahu yaabaire naayegyeseza, baamubuuza bati: Ni bushoboorozi ki oburikukukoresa ebi, kandi n'oha owaabukuhaire?" 
Matthew21:24 Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Reka naanye mbabuuze ekigambo kimwe; ku murangarukyemu, naanye niinyija kubashobororera obushoboorozi obunkoresa ebi." 
Matthew21:25 Okubatiza kwa Yohaana kukaruga nkahi? Omu iguru nari omu bantu? Baayegarukanamu bonka, nibagira bati: Ku turaagire tuti, Kukaruga omu iguru, naatugarukamu ati, Kandi shi, n'enki ekyabazibiire kumwikiriza?" 
Matthew21:26 Kandi tukaagizire tuti, Kukaruga omu bantu, nitutiina abantu; ahabw'okuba boona nibahamya ku Yohaana yaabaire ari nabi." 
Matthew21:27 Baamugarukamu bati: Titurikuhamanya. Yesu nikwo kubagira ati: Naanye tindikubagambira bushoborozi oburikunkoresa ebi. 
Matthew21:28 Mbwenu nimuteekateeka muta ahari ebyo? Omushaija akaba aine abatabani babiri; yaaragiira ow'omujigaijo ati: Mwana wangye, irooko okore omu musiri gwangye ogw'emizaabibu eri izooba." 
Matthew21:29 Yaayanga ati: Tindikuzayo; kwonka bwanyima yaayeteisa, yaazayo." 
Matthew21:30 Yaaza aha murumuna, nawe yaamuragiira nk'ebyo; yaamwikiriza ati: Eego Taata, ka ngyende; kwonka tiyaazayo." 
Matthew21:31 Ahari abo bombi n'oha owaakozire eki ishe yaabaire naakunda? Banu bati: Ow'omujigaijo. Yesu yaabagira ati: Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Abahooza na baamaraaya nibaija kubabandiza kutaaha omu bukama bwa Ruhanga. 
Matthew21:32 Ahabw'okuba Yohaana akaija ahariimwe arabire omu muhanda gw'okuhikiirira, timwamwikiriza; kwonka abahooza na baamaraaaya bakamwikiriza; naimwe, n'obu mwabireebire mutyo, bwanyima timureefurize, mukamizikiriza." 
Matthew21:33 Muhurire endiijo nfumu. Hakaba hariho omushaija nyineeka; yaabyara omusiri gw'emizaabibu, yaaguzitirira orugo, yaarimamau einyuukiro rya viinyo, yaayombekamu eirindiro, yaagutsigamu abahingi, yaataaha omu nsi endiijo." 
Matthew21:34 Mbwenu obunaku bw'okwera ku bwahikire, yaatuma abahuuku be ahari abo bahingi, ngu bamutwekyere aha byana by'emizaabibu ye." 
Matthew21:35 Abahingi baakwata abo bahuuku be, omwe baamuteera, ondiijo baamwita, n'ondiijo baamuteera amabaare." 
Matthew21:36 Yaagaruka yaatuma abandi bahuuku baingi okukira ab'okubanza; nabo baabatwaza batyo. 
Matthew21:37 Bwanyima yaabatumaho omwana we, naagira ati: Omwana wangye baryamuha ekitiinisa." 
Matthew21:38 Kwonka abahingi ku baareebire omwana we, baagambirana bati: Ogu niwe muhunguzi; murekye tumwite, tutungye obuhunguzi bwe." 
Matthew21:39 Baamukwata, baamubinga omu musiri gw'emizaabibu, baamwita." 
Matthew21:40 Mbwenu mukama w'emizaabibu, ku ariija, aryagira ata abo bahingi?" 
Matthew21:41 Baamugarukamu bati: Abagomi abo aryabaita kubi, n'emizaabibu ye aryagitsigamu abandi bahingi, abariguma nibamutwekyera ebyana byayo omu bunaku bwabyo." 
Matthew21:42 Yesu yaababuuza ati: Timukashomaga omu Byahandiikirwe ngu, Eibaare eri abombeki baayangire Niryo ryahindukire erikuru ery'obuhamizo bw'enju; Ekyo kikaruga ahari Mukama, Kandi n'eky'okutangaaza omu maisho gaitu." 
Matthew21:43 Nikyo ndikubagirira nti: Obukama bwa Ruhanga buryabaakwa, buheebwe eihanga eririkwana ebyana byabwo." 
Matthew21:44 Omuntu weena origwa aha ibaare eryo aryacwagurika; kwonka ou ririgwera, riryamucwa obusaasingo." 
Matthew21:45 Abanyamurwa abakuru n'Abafarisaayo, ku baahuriire enfumu ze, baamanya ku nibo arikurengyeza." 
Matthew21:46 Baayenda kumukwata; kwonka baatiina abantu, ahabw'okuba abantu bakaba nibahamya ku ari nabi." 
Matthew22:1 Kandi Yesu yaagaruka yaabacwera enfumu naagira ati: 
Matthew22:2 Obukama bw'omu iguru nibushushanisibwa n'omugabe owaataahize omwana we obugyenyi bw'okushwera. 
Matthew22:3 Obugyenyi ku bwahikire, yaatuma abahuuku be kweta abeetsirwe, baayanga kwija." 
Matthew22:4 Yaagaruka yaatuma abandi bahuuku, yaabagira ati: Mwirooko mungirire abeetsirwe muti: Reeba nteekateekire eby'okugabura, enimi n'enyana z'ebishaju zangye ziitsirwe, byona byatebeekaine, mwije mutaahe obugyenyi." 
Matthew22:5 Kwonka tibaabitaho mutima, baayegyendera, omwe omu kibanja kye, ondiijo omu mirimo ye," 
Matthew22:6 n'abaatsigaireho baakwata abahuuku be, baabahemangura, baabaita." 
Matthew22:7 Omugabe yaakwatwa ekiniga, yaayohereza engabo ze, yaahwerekyereza abaitsi abo, yaayotsya orurembo rwabo." 
Matthew22:8 Bwanyima yaagira abahuuku be ati: Obugyenyi bwatebeekaine, kwonka abeetsirwe tibabushemereire." 
Matthew22:9 Mbwenu mugyende ahu emihanda y'omu rurembo erikuteeranira; abu muraareebeyo boona mubeete baije bataahe obugyenyi. 
Matthew22:10 N'abahuuku abo baaza omuri egyo mihanda, baayeta boona abu baareebire, ababi n'abarungi; enju yaijura abagyenyi." 
Matthew22:11 Omugabe ku yaizire kureeba abagyenyi, yaashangamu omushaija otajwaire kijwaro ky'obugyenyi." 
Matthew22:12 Yaamubuuza ati: Mugyenzi wangye, waija ota aha otajwaire kijwaro ky'obugyenyi. Yaabura eky'okumugarukamu." 
Matthew22:13 Omugabe nikwo kuragiira abambari be ati: Mumubohe emikono n'amaguru, mumunagye aheeru omu mwirima; okwo niyo abantu bariririra, bakanene enshaya." 
Matthew22:14 Ahakuba abeetwa ni baingi, kwonka abatooranwa ni bakye." 
Matthew22:15 Kandi Abafarisaayo bakagyenda, baahanuura ahamwe oku baraamutegye omu kugamba kwe." 
Matthew22:16 Batyo baamutumaho abeegi baabo hamwe n'aba Heroode, baamugira bati: Mwegyesa, nitumanya ku ori ow'amazima, ku oyegyesa omuhanda gwa Ruhanga omu mazima, kandi ku otagwera urbaju rw'omuntuw eena orutahikire, ahakuba totiinisibwa kitiinisa ky'omuntu." 
Matthew22:17 Mbwenu otugambire eki orikuteekateeka. Ebiragiro nibiikiriza kuha Kaisaari omushoro, nari tikwo?" 
Matthew22:18 Kwonka Yesu ku yaamanyire obugobya bwabyo, yaagira ati: Nimuntegyera ki, imwe ndyarya 'mwe?" 
Matthew22:19 Muunyorekye empiiha ei mushora. Baamureetera edenaari. 
Matthew22:20 Yaababuuza ati: Ekishushani eki n'ebihandiikirweho n'eby'oha? 
Matthew22:21 Baamugarukamu bati: N'ebya Kaisaari. Yesu yaabagira ati: Mbwenu ebya Kaisaari mubihe Kaisaari, n'ebya Ruhanga mubihe Ruhanga." 
Matthew22:22 Ku baabihuriire, baatangaara, baamurugaho, baagyenda." 
Matthew22:23 Aha izooba eryo Abasadukaayo, abahakana ku hatabaho kuzooka, baija ah'ari, baamubuuza bati:" 
Matthew22:24 Mwegyesa, Musa akagira ati: Omuntu ku arifa atakazaire, omurumuna ashemereire kuhungura omufaakazi ogwo, amumuzaarireho abaana." 
Matthew22:25 Mbwenu owaitu hakaba hariyo enyineemwe mushanju. Ow'okubanza akashwera omukazi, yaafa; ahabw'okufa atakazaire, omukazi we yaamuraga owa kabiri." 
Matthew22:26 Nikwo batyo owa kabiri n'owa kashatu, okuhika aha mushanju." 
Matthew22:27 Boona ku baahweireho, omukazi nawe yaafa." 
Matthew22:28 Mbwenu omu kuzooka aryaba muka oha ahari abo mushanju? Ahabw'okuba boona omushanju akabaho omukazi waabo. 
Matthew22:29 Yesu yaabagarukamu naabagira ati: Muhabire, ahabw'okutamanya Ebyahandiikirwe n'obu gaakuba amaani ga Ruhanga." 
Matthew22:30 Mumanye ngu omu kuzooka tibarishwera, kandi tibarishwerwa, kureka baryaba nka baamaraika b'omu iguru." 
Matthew22:31 Ebirikukwata aha by'okuzooka kw'abafu, timukashomaga eki Ruhanga yaabagambiire ati:" 
Matthew22:32 Nyowe ndi Ruhanga wa Abrahamu, Ruhanga wa Isaaka, kandi Ruhanga wa Yakobo? Ti Ruhanga w'abafu, kureka Ow'abahuriire." 
Matthew22:33 Abantu ku bakihuriire, baatangaarira okwegyesa kwe." 
Matthew22:34 Abafarisaayo ku baahuriire oku aremeise Abasadukaayo bakahunama, baateerana." 
Matthew22:35 Omwe aharibo, omwegyesa w'Ebiragiro, yaamubuuza naamutega ati:" 
Matthew22:36 Mwegyesa, ekiragiro ekikuru omu biragiro nikiiha?" 
Matthew22:37 Yaamugarukamu ati: Kunda Mukama Ruhanga waawe n'omutima gwawe gwona, n'amagara gaawe goona, n'obwengye bwawe bwona." 
Matthew22:38 Eki nikyo kiragiro kikuru kandi eky'okubanza. 
Matthew22:39 Ekya kabiri ekirikukishusha n'eki, Kunda mutaahi waawe nk'oku oyekunda." 
Matthew22:40 Omu biragiro ebi byombi Ebiragiro byona n'ebya Baanabi nimwo bikomooka. 
Matthew22:41 Abafarisaayo ku baabaire bakiteeraine hamwe, Yesu yaababuuza ati:" 
Matthew22:42 Kristo nimumuteekateekaho muta? N'Omwana w'oha? Baamugarukamu bati: N'Omwana wa Daudi. 
Matthew22:43 Yaagaruka yaababuuza ati: Kandi shi ahanki Daudi, obu yaagambisibwa Omwoyo Orikwera, akamweta Mukama we ati:" 
Matthew22:44 Mukama akagira Mukama wangye ati: Shutama aha rubaju rwangye rwa buryo, Okuhitsya obu ndita abazigu baawe ahansi y'ebigyere byawe." 
Matthew22:45 Beitu shi, Daudi ku araabe yaayetsire Kristo Mukama we, kandi Kristo ogwo naabaasa ata kuba Omwana we?" 
Matthew22:46 Kandi tihariho n'omwe owaabaasize kumugarukamu ekigambo; n'okuruga aha kiro ekyo tihaine waayehangire kumubuuza ebindi bibuuzo. 
Matthew23:1 Kandi Yesu akagaruka yaagira emitwe y'abantu n'abeegi be ati: 
Matthew23:2 Abahandiiki n'Abafarisaayo bashutama aha kitebe kya Musa. 
Matthew23:3 N'ahabw'ekyo ebi babaragiira byona, mubikore, kandi mubihitsye; kwonka mutarikora nk'oku bakora; ahabw'okuba bagamba, kwonka tibakora." 
Matthew23:4 Bakoma emitwaro erikuremeera, etarikubaasa kwekorerwa, bagyekoreza abantu aha mabega; kwonka bo tibenda kugitenzyaho n'orukumu rwabo." 
Matthew23:5 Ebi bakora byona babikora kureebwa abantu; bahangutsya fulakateeri zaabo, baraisya ebijwengye by'emyenda yaabo;" 
Matthew23:6 bakunda emyanya y'ekitiinisa omu magyenyi, n'ebitebe by'ekitiinisa omuri sinagogi," 
Matthew23:7 n'okutangirirwa omu katare, n'okwetwa abantu Rabi." 
Matthew23:8 Kwonka imwe mutaryetwa Rabi, ahabw'okuba Omwegyesa waanyu n'omwe, kandi naimwe mwena muri eishe-emwe." 
Matthew23:9 Kandi mutaryeta omuntu weena ow'omu nsi Shoimwe; ahabw'okuba mwine Shoimwe omwe ori omu iguru. 
Matthew23:10 Kandi mutaryetwa abakama, ahabw'okuba mwine Omukama omwe, niwe Kristo." 
Matthew23:11 Orikukira obukuru omuriimwe aryaba omuheereza waanyu; 
Matthew23:12 orikwetunguura aryagarurwa ahansi; kandi orikwegarura ahansi, aryatunguurwa." 
Matthew23:13 Kwonka muryakareeba, imwe Abahandiiki n'Abafarisaayo, endyarya! ahabw'okuba mukinga obukama bw'omu iguru, ngu abantu batabutaahamu; imwe mwenka timubutaahamu, kandi abarikwenda kubutaahamu, timubaikiriza." 
Matthew23:14 Muryakareeba, imwe Abahandiiki n'Abafarisaayo, endyarya; ahabw'okuba munyaga enju z'abafaakazi, kandi murandagatana omu kushaba, haza kunu nimuryarya; n'ahabw'ekyo muryacwerwa orubanja orurikukira obuhango." 
Matthew23:15 Muryakareeba, imwe Abahandiiki n'Abafarisaayo, endyarya! ahabw'okuba mwambuka enyanja, mugyendagyenda n'omu mahanga kuhindura omuntu omwe, ngu aikirize ediini yaanyu; kandi ku mumubona, mumuhindura omwana wa Gehena okukira emwe kabiri." 
Matthew23:16 Muryakareeba, imwe abeebembezi empumi, abagira ngu, Orikurahira hekalu, ti rubanja; kwonka ngu Orikurahira ezaabu y'omuri hekalu, ashemereire kuhikiiriza eki yaarahiire kukora." 
Matthew23:17 Imwe bashema 'mwe kandi empumi! ekirikukira obukuru n'enki, n'ezaabu, nari ni hkalu erikweza ezaabu?" 
Matthew23:18 Kandi nimugira ngu, Orikurahira eitambiro, ti rubanja; kureka ngu Orikurahira empongano eri aha itambiro, ashemereire kuhikiiriza eki yaarahiire kukora." 
Matthew23:19 Imwe mpumi 'mwe! ekirikukira obukuru n'enki, n'empongano, nari n'eitambiro eririkweza empongano?" 
Matthew23:20 Mumanye ngu orikurahira eitambiro, biri arirahiire n'ebiririho byona;" 
Matthew23:21 kandi orikurahira hakalu biri agirahiire n'Ogwo ogituuramu. 
Matthew23:22 N'orikurahira eiguru, biri arahiire ekitebe kya Ruhanga n'Ogwo okishutamaho." 
Matthew23:23 Muryakareeba, imwe abahandiiki n'Abafarisaayo, endyarya! ahabw'okuba muganura kimwe kya ikumi ky'esogi, na anisi, na kumino; kwonka mutsigaho ebigambo bikuru eby'omu Bragiro, okucwa emanja ez'amazima, n'embabazi, n'okwikiriza; ebyo mukaashemereire kubikora, kandi na biri okutabireka." 
Matthew23:24 Imwe abeebembezi empumi, abagyegyena omubu, mukamira engamira!" 
Matthew23:25 Muryakareeba, imwe abahandiiki n'Abafarisaayo, endyarya! ahabw'okuba enkyeka n'enyabya mubyozya aharuguru, haza omunda biijwire obunyagi n'okuteerinda." 
Matthew23:26 Iwe Omufarisaayo empumi, banza oyozye omunda y'enkyeka n'orwabya, aharuguru yaabyo habone kushemera." 
Matthew23:27 Muryakareeba, imwe abahandiiki n'Abafarisaayo, endyarya! ahabw'okuba nimushusha nk'ebituuro ebisiigire einoni; aharuguru bikareebeka nk'ebishemeire, haza omunda biijwire amagufa n'oburofa bwona." 
Matthew23:28 Nikwo naimwe omu by'aharuguru mureebeka nka'abahikiriire omu maisho g'abantu, kwonka omunda mwijwire oburyarya n'obugomi." 
Matthew23:29 Muryakareeba, imwe abahandiiki n'Abafarisaayo, endyarya! ahabw'okuba mwombeka ebituuro bya baanabi, musharura ebiijutsyo by'abahikiriire," 
Matthew23:30 nimugira ngu, Kuri twabaire turiho omu biro bya baatatenkuriitwe, titwakukwataniise nabo omu kusheesha eshagama ya baanabi." 
Matthew23:31 Okwo nikwo mweshinja ku muri abaana b'abo abaitsire baanabi. 
Matthew23:32 Mbwenu nu nimwijuze orugyero rwa baashwenkuriimwe. 
Matthew23:33 Imwe enjoka kandi abaana b'encwera, muryakira muta orubanja rwa Gehena?" 
Matthew23:34 N'ahabw'ekyo niinyija kubatumaho baanabi n'abanyabwengye n'abahandiiki; abamwe aharibo muryabaita, abandi muryababamba, n'abandi muryabateerera omuri sinagogi zaanyu; muryabahiiga, mubabingye omuri tauni zoona ezi barihungiramu," 
Matthew23:35 ngu mubone kutukurirwa eshagama y'abarikwera yoona eyaaseesirwe omu nsi, okwiha aha shagama ya Abeeli ohikiriire okuhitsya aha shagama ya Zakaria mwene Barakia, ou mwaitiire ahagati ya hekalu n'eitambiro." 
Matthew23:36 Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Ebyo byona biryahika aha bantu b'obusingye obu. 
Matthew23:37 Yerusaalemu, Yerusaalemu, oita baanabi, okateera abarikukutumwaho amabaare! Ka ni kaingi abaana baawe, nk'oku enkoko ebumbatira abaana baayo omunda y'amapapa gaayo, haza mutankundire!" 
Matthew23:38 Reeba, enju yaanyu etsigirweho n'omushaka." 
Matthew23:39 Nimbagambira nti: Timurindeeba okuruga hati okuhitsya obu murigira muti: Orikwija omu iziina rya Mukama asiimwe! 
Matthew24:1 Yesu yaashohora omuri hekalu; ku yaabaire naagyenda, abeegi be baija kumworeka ebyombeko bya hekalu." 
Matthew24:2 We yaabagarukamu, naagira ati: Timurikureeba ebi byona? Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Tihariho ibaare eriritsigara riri aha rindi eritarinagwa ahansi." 
Matthew24:3 Ku yaabaire ashutami omu kibungo kya Zeituuni, abeegi be baija aha'ari omu mubonano, baamubuuza bati: Tugambire ebi ahu biribeeraho, n'akamanyiso k'okwija kwawe oku kariba, n'ak'obunaku obu ensi egi erihweraho." 
Matthew24:4 Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Mwerinde, omuntu weena ataribahabisa;" 
Matthew24:5 ahabw'okuba baingi baryaija omu iziina ryangye, nibagira bati: Niinye Krito! kandi baryahabisa baingi." 
Matthew24:6 Kandi muryahurira engamba n'okurangaanwa kwazo; mwerinde, mutaryemereza emitima, ahakuba ebyo byona tibiribura kwija; kwonka emperu yo eryaba etakahikire." 
Matthew24:7 Eihanga riryateera erindi ihanga, n'obugabe buryateera obundi bugabe; haryabaho enjara n'emitsitsa omu myanya mingi." 
Matthew24:8 Ebyo byona niyo ntandikiro y'obusaasi. 
Matthew24:9 Obwo baryabahayo okubonabonesibwa n'okwitwa; muryayangwa amahanga goona ahabw'eiziina ryangye. 
Matthew24:10 Omu biro ebyo baingi baryagwa, bareebyane, bangane." 
Matthew24:11 Haryaimuka baanabi baingi b'ebishuba, bahabise baingi." 
Matthew24:12 Ahabw'obugomi kukanya, okukunda kw'abaingi kuryahora." 
Matthew24:13 Kwonka origumisiriza okuhitsya aha muheru, niwe arijunwa." 
Matthew24:14 Kandi engiri egi ey'obukama eryagambwa omu nsi zoona okuba eky'okuhamya aha mahanga goona; obwo nibwo emperu erihika. 
Matthew24:15 Kandi ku murireeba ekirikuzira ekirikuhwerekyereza, ekyagambirwe nabi Danieli, kyemereire omu Mwanya ogurikwera, (orikushoma ayetegyereze)" 
Matthew24:16 abo abariba bari Buyudaaya omu bunaku obwo bahungire aha nshozi; 
Matthew24:17 n'ori aha mutwe gw'enju ataritemburuka ngu agire ebi aiha omu nju ye; 
Matthew24:18 n'oriba ari omu misiri atarigarukayo kwenda ekijwaro kye. 
Matthew24:19 Abariba baine enda n'abarikwontsya omu biro ebyo bayrakareeba! 
Matthew24:20 Mushabe okuhunga kwanyu kutaribaho omu biro by'embeho nari ahari Sabato; 
Matthew24:21 ahabw'okuba omu biro ebyo haryabaho okubonabona kwingi okutakabahoga okwiha aha kuhangwa kw'ensi okuhitsya hati, kandi tikuribaho." 
Matthew24:22 Ebiro ebyo kuri bitaracwireho, tihaakurokokireho muntu n'omwe; kwonka ahabw'entoore ebiro ebyo biryacuubwaho." 
Matthew24:23 Omu biro ebyo omuntu weena ku aribagira ati: Reeba, Kristo ari aha! nari shi, ari hariya, mutarimwikiriza;" 
Matthew24:24 ahakuba haryaimukam abarikweyeta Kristo na baanabi b'ebishuba, baryakora obumanyiso bukuru n'eby'okutangaaza, babone kuhabisa n'entoore, kyaba nikibaasika." 
Matthew24:25 Reeba naabibagambira bitakahikire. 
Matthew24:26 N'ahabw'ekyo ku baribagira bati: Reeba, ari omu ihamba, mutarizayo; nari ngu, ari omu kishengye, mutarikiikiriza." 
Matthew24:27 Nk'oku omurabyo gurabiza oburugwa-izooba gukahika oburengyerwa-izooba, nikwo n'okwija kw'Omwana w'omuntu kuriba." 
Matthew24:28 Ahu omutumbi guri hoona, niho amahungu gateeranira." 
Matthew24:29 Bwanyima y'okubonabona kw'omu biro ebyo, ahonaaho eizooba ruryahinduka omwirima, n'okwezi tikuryaka, n'enyonyoozi ziryaragara niziruga omu iguru biryatengyetsibwa;" 
Matthew24:30 obwo akamanyiso k'Omwana w'omutu karyareebeka omu iguru, amahanga goona ag'ensi garyacura, kandi baryareeba Omwana w'omuntu naizira omu bicu by'omu iguru, aine obushoboorozi n'ekitiinisa kingi." 
Matthew24:31 Aryatuma baamaraika be n'eiraka rihango ry'enzamba, bateerane entoore ze nibazitaaruura omu mbaju ina okuruga aha muheru gw'eiguru okuhika aha gundi." 
Matthew24:32 N'ahabw'ekyo mwegyere aha mutiini nk'eky'okureeberaho; eitaagi ryagwo ku ryoroba, ryatooka amababi, mumanya ku omwaka guri haihi." 
Matthew24:33 Mutyo naimwe ku murireeba ebyo byona, mumanye ku ari haihi, ku yaahikire n'aha rwigi." 
Matthew24:34 Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Obusingye obu tiburihwaho, okuhitsya obu ebi byona biribaho." 
Matthew24:35 Eiguru n'ensi biryahwaho, kwonka ebigambo byangye tibirihwaho." 
Matthew24:36 Kwonka eby'ekyo kiro n'obwo bunaku tihaine orikubimanya, n'obu baakuba baamaraika b'omu iguru, n'obu yaakuba Omwana, kureka Isheboona wenka." 
Matthew24:37 Nk'ebiro bya Noa oku byabaire biri, nikwo n'okwija kw'Omwana w'omuntu kuriba." 
Matthew24:38 Ahakuba nk'oku baabaire bari omu biro ebyo ebyabandiize omwegyemure gw'amaizi, nibarya kandi nibanywa, nibashwera, nibahingira, okuhitsya aha kiro eki Noa yaataahiireho omu bwato;" 
Matthew24:39 bakaba bari aho bataine ki barikumanya, okuhitsya obu omwegyemure gw'amaizi gwaizire, gukabatwara boona; n'okwija kw'Omwana w'omuntu nikwo kuriba kutyo." 
Matthew24:40 Obwo abashaija babiri baryaba bari omu musiri, omwe aryatwarwa, ondiijo atsigweho." 
Matthew24:41 Abakazi babiri baryaba nibasa aha rubengo; omwe aryatwarwa, ondiijo atsigweho." 
Matthew24:42 N'ahabw'ekyo mugume nimureeba, ahakuba timurikumanya kiro eki Mukama waanyu ariiziraho." 
Matthew24:43 Mumanye ngu, kuri nyineeka yaamanyire obunaku nyekiro obu omushuma araiziremu, akaagumire naareeba, areka kwikiriza omushuma kurima n'okutaah omu nju ye." 
Matthew24:44 N'ahabw'ekyo naimwe mweteguure, ahabw'okuba obunaku obu mutarikuteekateeka, nibwo Omwana w'omuntu ariiziramu." 
Matthew24:45 Ni mwambari ki ow'okwesigwa kandi ow'obwengye, ou mukama we yaatsigiire ab'omu ka ye kubagaburira omu bunaku obuhikire?" 
Matthew24:46 Aine omugisha omwambari ogwo, ou mukama we arigaruka akashanga naakora atyo." 
Matthew24:47 Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Aryamukwatsa ebi atungire byona. 
Matthew24:48 Kwonka omwambari omubi, ku ariteekateeka omu mutima gwe ati: Mukama wangye atwireyo," 
Matthew24:49 akatandika kuteera abambari bagyenzi be, akarya kandi akanywa n'abasinzi," 
Matthew24:50 mukama w'omwambari ogwo aryaija aha izooba eri atamutegyerereizeho, n'obunaku obu atarikumanya," 
Matthew24:51 aryamutemamu habiri, amuhe omugabo gwe n'endyarya; okwo niyo abantu bariririra, bakanena enshaya." 
Matthew25:1 Omu biro ebyo obukama bw'omu iguru buryashusha nk'abaishiki ikumi, abaatwaire etabaaza zaabo, bakaza kubugana kishwera." 
Matthew25:2 Bataano aharibo bakaba bari abashema, n'abandi bataano bari ab'obwengye;" 
Matthew25:3 ahakuba abashema ku baatwaire etabaaza zaabo, tibaatwara gandi majuta;" 
Matthew25:4 kwonka ab'obwengye baatwara amajuta omu cupa hamwe n'etabaaza zaabo. 
Matthew25:5 Kandi kishwera ku yairiirweyo, boona baahungira, baagwejegyera." 
Matthew25:6 Bwanyima nyekiro omu itumbi haabaho orwari ngu: Reeba, kishwera yaija! mushohore tumubugane." 
Matthew25:7 Abaishiki abo baimuka, baashemeza etabaaza zaabo." 
Matthew25:8 Abashema baashaba ab'obwengye bati: Mutuhe aha majuta gaanyu, ahakuba etabaaza zaitu zaaza kuraara." 
Matthew25:9 Ab'obwengye baagarukamu bati: Nooshusha oti, tigarikutumarira twena; kureka mugyende ahu barikugatundira; mwegurire." 
Matthew25:10 Ku baabaire bagiire kugura, kishwera yaija; abaabaire beeteekateekire baataaha nawe, omu nju omu bugyenyi bw'okushwera; orwigi rwakingwa." 
Matthew25:11 Bwanyima abaishiki abo abandi nabo baija, nibagira hati: Mukama waitu, Mukama waitu, twigurireho." 
Matthew25:12 We yaabagarukamu ati: Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Tindikubamanya. 
Matthew25:13 N'ahabw'ekyo mugume nimureeba, ahabw'okuba timurikumanya kiro n'obu yaakuba eshaaha." 
Matthew25:14 Kandi nibushusha nk'eby'omuntu owaabaire naayenda kugyenda za omu nsi endiijo; ku yaabaire atakagyenzire, yaayeta abambari be, yaabatsigira ebintu bye." 
Matthew25:15 Omwe yaamuha etalanta itaano, ondi ibiri, n'ondiijo emwe, nka buri omwe oku yaabaire naabaasa; yaaheza, yaagyenda." 
Matthew25:16 Owaahairwe etalanta itaano ahonaaho yaagyenda, yaazishuubuza, yaashaazyamu ezindi itaano." 
Matthew25:17 N'owaahairwe ibiri nawe yaashaazyamu atyo ezindi ibiri. 
Matthew25:18 Kwonka owaahairwe emwe yaagyenda, yaatimba omu itaka, yaasherekamu etalanta ya mukama we." 
Matthew25:19 Ebiro bingi ku byahingwireho, mukama w'abambari abo yaagaruka, yaabara nabo ebi yaabatsigiire." 
Matthew25:20 Owaahairwe etalanta itaano, yaija yaareeta ezindi itaano, yaagira ati: Mukama wangye, okantsigira etalanta itaano; reeba nshaagizemu ezindi itaano." 
Matthew25:21 Mukama we yaamugira ati: Kazaare, iwe omwambari omurungi orikwesigwa! obaire omwesigwa omuri bikye, ndyakuha obushoboorozi kutegyeka bingi; taaha omu kushemererwa kwa mukama waawe." 
Matthew25:22 Owaahairwe etalanta ibiri nawe yaija, yaagira ati: Mukama wangye, okantsigira etalanta ibiri; reeba nshaagizemu ezindi ibiri." 
Matthew25:23 Mukama we yaagira ati: Kazaare, iwe omwambari omurungi orikwesigwa! obaire omwesigwa omuri bikye; ndyakuha obushoboorozi kutegyeka bingi; taaha omu kushemererwa kwa mukama waawe." 
Matthew25:24 Kandi n'ogwo owaahairwe etalanta emwe yaija, yaagira ati: Mukama wangye, nkamanya ku ori omuntu ogumire, ogyesha ahu otarabibire, kandi ohunika ebi otaraheheerize;" 
Matthew25:25 n'ahabw'ekyo nkatiina, naagyenda naashereka etalanta yaawe omu itaka. Reeba ngigi, ogigarukane." 
Matthew25:26 Mukama we nikwo kumugarukamu ati: Iwe omwambari omubi kandi omweremwa! okamanya ku ngyesha ahu ntarabibire, nkahunika ebi ntaraheheerize." 
Matthew25:27 N'ahabw'ekyo okaba oshemereire kuha etaanta yangye ababiiki b'empiiha, naanye ku naakwizire, nkaagigaruriirwe n'enshaagi yaayo." 
Matthew25:28 Mbwenu mugimwakye, mugihe oine etalanta ikumi." 
Matthew25:29 Ahakuba oine niwe ariheebwa, akagira bingi; kwonka otaine aryayakwa n'eki aine." 
Matthew25:30 N'omwambari ogwo otaine mugasho, mumunagye aheeru omu mwirima; okwo niyo abantu bariririra, bakanena enshaya." 
Matthew25:31 Omwana w'omuntu ku ariizira omu kitiinisa kye hamwe na baamaraika be boona, aryashutama aha kitebe kye eky'ekitiinisa," 
Matthew25:32 amahanga goona gateeranirwe omu maisho ge; kandi aryagashoroora, nk'oku omuriisa ashoroora entaama omu mbuzi." 
Matthew25:33 Entaama aryazita aha rubaju rwe rwa buryo, kwonka embuzi aryazita aha rwa bumosho." 
Matthew25:34 Obwo Mukama aryagira ab'aha rubaju rwa buryo ati: Mwije, imwe abu Tata yaahaire omugisha, muhungure obukama obwabateekateekyeirwe okuruga aha kuhangwa kw'ensi;" 
Matthew25:35 ahakuba nkaba nyine enjara, mwampa eby'okurya; nkaba nyine eiriho, mwampa eky'okunywa; nkaba ndi omugyenyi, mwankunira;" 
Matthew25:36 nkaba njwaire busha, mwanjweka; nkaba ndwaire, mwaija kundeeba; nkaba ndi omu kihome, mwantaayaayira." 
Matthew25:37 Abahikiriire baryamubuuza bati: Mukama waitu, tukakureeba ryari oine enjara, tukakuha eby'okurya, nari oine eiriho tukakuha eky'okunywa?" 
Matthew25:38 Tukakureeba ryari ori omugyenyi tukakukunira, nari ojwaire busha tukakujweka?" 
Matthew25:39 Tukakureeba ryari orwaire, nari ori omu kihome tukaija kukureeba?" 
Matthew25:40 Mukama aryabagarukamu ati: Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Nk'oku mwabikoreire omwe ahari beene Tata abo abato okukira abandi, biri niinye mwabikoreire." 
Matthew25:41 Bwanyima aryagira ab'aha rubaju rwa bumosho ati: Mundugyeho, imwe abakyeenirwe, muze omu muriro ogutaraara, ogwateekateekyeirwe Sitaane na baamaraika be;" 
Matthew25:42 ahakuba nkaba nyine enjara, timwampa by'okurya; nyine eiriho, timwampa ky'okunywa;" 
Matthew25:43 nkaba ndi omugyenyi, timwankunira; njwaire busha, timwanjweka; ndwaire kandi ndi oomu kihome, timwaija kundeeba." 
Matthew25:44 Nabo baryamugarukamu bati: Mukama waitu, tukakureeba ryari oine enjara, nari oine eiriho, nari ori omugyenyi, nari ojwaire busha, nari orwaire, nari ori omu kihome, tukabura eki twakukorera?" 
Matthew25:45 Nawe aryabagarukamu ati: Nk'oku mutarabikoreire omwe ahari abo abato okukira abandi, biri naanye timurabinkoreire." 
Matthew25:46 Abo baryaza omu kubonabonesibwa okw'ebiro n'ebiro, kwonka abahikiriire bo baryataaha omu magara agatahwaho." 
Matthew26:1 Yesu ku yaaherize kugamba ebyo byona, yaagira abeegi be ati:" 
Matthew26:2 Nimumanya ku hatsigaireho ebiro bibiri okuhika aha kiro ky'Okuhingurwaho, Omwana w'omuntu naija kuheebwayo kubambwa aha musharaba." 
Matthew26:3 Omu biro ebyo abanyamurwa abakuru n'abakuru b'eihanga eryo bakateeranira omu ka y'omunyamurwa omukuru, owaabaire naayetwa Kayaafa;" 
Matthew26:4 baahanuura ahamwe oku baraakwate Yesu omu bwengye, bakamwita." 
Matthew26:5 kwonka baagira bati: Haza tutamukwatira omu biro by'obugyenyi, hatabaho okurabanamu omu bantu." 
Matthew26:6 Yesu ku yaabaire ari Besania omwa Simooni omubembe," 
Matthew26:7 haija omukazi oine eihembe ry'amajuta ag'obuguzi bwingi munonga, yaagashuka aha mutwe gwe ashutami naarya." 
Matthew26:8 Abeegi be, ku baakireebire, baaguubwa kubi nibagira bati: Amajuta aga gaafa ki?" 
Matthew26:9 Nangwa kuru gaguzirwemu bingi, bikagabirwa abooro!" 
Matthew26:10 Kwonka Yesu, ku yaabimanyire, yaabagira ati: Nimugwisiza ki kubi omukazi ogu? Ahakuba eki yankorera ni kirungi." 
Matthew26:11 Ahabw'okuba abooro mutuura nabo obutoosha; kwonka nyowe timuriguma naanye obutoosha. 
Matthew26:12 Omu kushuka amajuta aga aha mubiri gwangye, yaakikora ahabw'okunteekateekyera okuziikwa." 
Matthew26:13 Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Ahu engiri erigambwa hoona omu nsi zoona, n'eki omukazi ogu yaakora kiryagambwayo kumwijuka." 
Matthew26:14 Bwanyima omwe ahari bari ikumi na babiri, orikweta Yuda Iskaryota, yaaza aha banyamurwa abakuru," 
Matthew26:15 yaababuuza ati: Nimwija kumpa ki, naanye nkamubaha? Baamubarira ebicweka by'efeeza makumi ashatu." 
Matthew26:16 Okuruga aho yaasherura oburyo oku araamureebye. 
Matthew26:17 Aha kiro ky'okubanza eky'Emigaati etatumbisiibwe, abeegi bakaija ahari Yesu, baamubuuza bati: Nooyenda tutebeekanise hi ei oraariire Okuhingurwaho?" 
Matthew26:18 Yaabaragiira ati: Mwirooko mugyende omu rurembo owa nanka, mumugire muti: Omwegyesa naagira ati: Obunaku bwangye nibwenda kuhika; omu nju yaawe nimwo ndaariire Okuhingurwaho hamwe n'abeebi bangye." 
Matthew26:19 Abeegi abo baakora nk'oku Yesu yaabagambira; baatebeekanisa Okuhingurwaho. 
Matthew26:20 Kandi ku bwabaire omu mwabazyo, yaashutama aha meeza n'abeegi be ikumi na babiri." 
Matthew26:21 Ku baabaire nibarya, yaabagira ati: Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Omwe ahariimwe naija kundeebya." 
Matthew26:22 Baashaasha munonga bashobeirwe, baatandika kumubuuza omwe omwe bati: Mukama wangye, niinye?" 
Matthew26:23 Yaabagarukamu ati: Owaaba naakoza naanye omu rwabya, niwe arikwija kundeebya." 
Matthew26:24 Omwana w'omuntu naagyenda, nk'oku kyamuhandiikirweho; kwonka orikumureebya aryakareeba. Kikaabaire kirungi nangwa omuntu ogwo kuri atarazairwe." 
Matthew26:25 Yuda owaamureebize yaamubuuza ati: Mwegyesa, niinye? Yaamugarukau ati: Eki waagamba nikwo kiri." 
Matthew26:26 Ku baabaire nibarya Yesu yaakwata omugaati, yaagusiimira, yaagubega, yaaguheereza abeegi be naagira ati: Mwakiire, murye; ogu nigwo mubiri gwangye." 
Matthew26:27 Yaakwata ekikopo; ku yaaherize kusiima, yaakibaha naagira ati: Munyweho mwena;" 
Matthew26:28 ahakuba egi n'eshagama yangye ey'endagaano ensya, esheesheka ahabwa baingi, ngu basaasirwe ebibi." 
Matthew26:29 Nimbagambira nti: Tindinywa hari viinyo y'ebyana by'omuzaabibu okwiha hati okuhitsya aha kiro ekyo, obu ndinywa naimwe viinyo nsya omu mbukama bwa Tata." 
Matthew26:30 Ku baaherize kweshongora zaaburi, baashohora, baaza omu kibungo kya Zeituuni." 
Matthew26:31 Kandi Yesu yaabagira ati: Imwe mwena eki kiro nimwija kumpemukaho; ahakuba kikahandiikwa ngu: Ndyateera omuriisa, entaama z'omu busyo zitaataane." 
Matthew26:32 Kwonka ku ndiheza kuzooka, ndyababandiza Galilaaya." 
Matthew26:33 Petero yaahiga naagira ati: N'obu abandi boona baraagwe bakakuhemukaho, nyowe tindikwija kuhemukaho na kakye." 
Matthew26:34 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Buzimazima ninkugambira nti: Iwe eki kiro, enkoko etakagambire, noija kuunyehakana kashatu." 
Matthew26:35 Petero yaamugarukamu ati: N'obu ndaabe ow'okwitwa naiwe, tindikwija kukwehakana. N'abandi boona baahiga batyo." 
Matthew26:36 Bwanyima Yesu yaagyenda nabo, baahika omu mwanya ogurikwetwa Gesesemaani, yaagira abeegi be ati: Mube mushutami aha, nyiririreho omumaisho, nshabe." 
Matthew26:37 Yaatwara Petero na beene Zebedaayo bombi, yaatandika kugira obusaasi bwingi n'okushoberwa munonga." 
Matthew26:38 Yaabagira ati: Omutima gwangye gwine obusaasi bwingi, nibwija kuunyita; mugume aha, nimureeba naanye." 
Matthew26:39 Yairirira kakye omumaisho, yaajuumara ahansi, yaashata ati: Ai bambe Taata, ekikopo eki kimpingure, ku kiraabe nikibaasika; kwonka kitaba nk'oku ndikwenda, kureka nkaiwe oku orikwenda." 
Matthew26:40 Yaagaruka aha beegi be, yaashanga bagwejegyeiire; yaabuuza Petero ati: Ebyo mwaremwa kwehangaana kureeba naanye nangwa n'eshaaha emwe?" 
Matthew26:41 Mureebe mushabe, murekye kugwa omu kwohibwa, Omutima gwo nigukunda, kwonka omubiri n'omweremwa." 
Matthew26:42 Yaagarukayo obwa kabiri, yaashaba ati: Ai bambe Taata, ekikopo eki ku kiraabe kitarikubaasa kundabaho ntakinyweire, eki orikwenda kibe nikyo kyakorwa." 
Matthew26:43 Yaagaruka yaija, nabwo yaashanga bagwejegyeire, ahabw'okuba amaisho gaabo gakaba nigahungira." 
Matthew26:44 Nikwo kubareka, akagarukayo kushaba obwa kashatu, akashaba ebigambo bimwe nk'eby'okubanza." 
Matthew26:45 Bwanyima yaagaruka aha beegi be, yaabaigra ati: Na hati mukigwejegyeire, mukihuumwire? Reeba, obunaku bwairira haihi, Omwa w'omuntu yaaheebwayo omu mikono y'abasiisi." 
Matthew26:46 Mwimukye, tugyende; reeba, orikundeebya ari haihi." 
Matthew26:47 Ku yaabaire naakigamba, haija Yuda, omwe ahari bari ikumi na babiri, hamwe n'omutwe gw'abantu baingi baine zaarurara n'ebikoni, nibaruga aha banyamurwa abakuru n'abkuru b'eihanga eryo." 
Matthew26:48 Kandi ogwo owaabaire naamureebya, akaba abahaire akamanyiso, naagira ati: ou ndaanywegyere, niwe ogwo; mumukwate." 
Matthew26:49 Ahonaaho yaija ahari Yesu, yaamuramutsya ati: Osingire, Mwegyesa! yaamunywegyera." 
Matthew26:50 Yesu yaamugira ati: Mugyenzi wangye, kora eki oiziriire. Ahonaaho baija baamugurukira, baamukwata." 
Matthew26:51 Kandi reeba, omwe ahari abo abaabaire bari na Yesu, yaatayo omukono, yaasyorayo rurara ye, yaatema omuhuuku w'omunyamurwa omukuru, yaamucwaho okutu." 
Matthew26:52 Yesu yaamuhana ati: Garura rurara yaawe omu kyobati kyayo; ahakuba boona abatwara rurara, baryaitwa rurara." 
Matthew26:53 Naari shi, noogira ngu, tindikubaasa kushaba Tata, akaanyoherereza ahonaaho baamaraika abarikukira legioni ikumi na ibiri?" 
Matthew26:54 Mbwenu ku kyakubaire kitabaire kityo, Ebyahandiikirwe bihikiirira ryari, haza kandi nikwo kishemereire kuba?" 
Matthew26:55 Omu shaaha egyo Yesu yaagira emitwe y'abantu ati: Mwampururira kunkwata ana zaarurara n'ebikoni, nk'oku bahururira omwambuzi? Ebiro byona nkaba ntuura omuri hekalu niinyegyesa, timurankwatsire." 
Matthew26:56 Kwonka ebi byona byabaho, ngu ebyahandiikirwe baanabi bihikiirire. Okuruga aho abeegi be boona baamuhungaho, bairuka." 
Matthew26:57 Abo abaakwatsire Yesu baamutwara owa Kayaafa omunyamurwa omukuru, ei abahandiiki n'abakuru baabaire bateeraniire." 
Matthew26:58 Kandi Petero yaamukuratira naamugyenda hare okuhika omu kibuga ky'omunyamurwa omukuru; ku yaataahiremu, yaashutama n'abambari kureeba ahu biraaherere." 
Matthew26:59 Kandi abanyamurwa abakuru n'ab'omu ishengyero boona baasherura obwamushinja bw'ebishuba kubeiherera Yesu ngu bamwite; 
Matthew26:60 tibaabubona, n'obu haraabe haizire baamushinja baingi b'ebishuba." 
Matthew26:61 Bwanyima haija babiri, nibagira bati: Ogu mushaija akagira ati: Nimbaasa kusheenya hekalu ya Ruhanga, kandi ngyombekye omu biro bishatu." 
Matthew26:62 Omunyamurwa omukuru yaayemerera, yaamubuuza ati: Toine ki orikwetonganira na kakye? Aba nibakwomesereza ki?" 
Matthew26:63 Yesu yaabeetsiza. Omunyamurwa omukuru yaamugira ati: Ninkurahiza Ruhanga. 
Matthew26:64 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Eki waagamba nikwo kiri; kandi nimbagambira nti: Bwanyima muryareeba Omwana w'omuntu ashutami aha rubaju rwa buryo orw'Obushoboorozi naizira omu bicu by'omu iguru. 
Matthew26:65 Ahonaaho omunyamurwa omukuru yaataagura ebijwaro bye, naagira ati: Yaarogota; nitukyendera ki baamushinja abandi? Naimwe mwayehuririra okurogota kwe." 
Matthew26:66 Mbwenu nimuteekateeka muta? Baagarukamu nibagira bati: Ashemereire kufa. 
Matthew26:67 Baamucwera amacwante aha maisho, baamuteera entomi; abandi baamuteera empi," 
Matthew26:68 nibagira bati: Iwe Kristo, ragura, otugambire owaakuteera." 
Matthew26:69 Kandi Petero akaba ashutami aheeru omu kibuga. Omuzaana yaija ah'ari, yaamigira ati: Naiwe obaire ori hamwe na Yesu owa Galilaaya." 
Matthew26:70 Kwonka we yaayehakanira omu maisho ga boona, ati: Tindikumanya ki orikugamba." 
Matthew26:71 Ku yaabaire naashohora, yaahika aha irembo, omuzaana ondiijo yaamureeba, yaagambira abandi abaabaire bari aho, ati: Omushaija ogu nawe abaire ari hamwe na Yesu owa Nazareesi." 
Matthew26:72 Yaagaruka yaayehakana naarahira ati: Omuntu ogwo tindikumumanya. 
Matthew26:73 Ku haahingwireho akaanya kakye, abaabaire beemereire aho baija baagambira Petero bati: Buzimazima naiwe ori omwe aharibo, ahabw'okuba emigambire yaawe neekumanyisa." 
Matthew26:74 Obwo yaatandika kukyeena n'okurahira, naagira ati: Omushaija ogwo tindikumumanya. Ahonaaho enkoko yaagamba." 
Matthew26:75 Petero yaijuka ekigambo eki Yesu amugambiire ati: Enkoko etakagambire, noija kuunyehakana kashatu. Yaashohora aheeru, yaarira munonga." 
Matthew27:1 Ku bwaseesire, abanyamurwa abakuru boona n'abakuru b'eihanga baahanuura hamwe oku baraite Yesu." 
Matthew27:2 Baamuboha, baamutwara, baamuhayo ahari Pilaato omutegyeki." 
Matthew27:3 Kandi Yuda owaamureebize, ku yaareebire orubanja rwasinga Yesu, yaayefuuza, yaagarurira abanyamurwa abakuru n'abakuru b'abantu ebyo bicweka by'efeeza makumi ashatu," 
Matthew27:4 naagira ati: Nsiisire okureebya eshagama etaine rubanja. Kwonka bo baagarukamu bati: Ebyo shi n'ebyaitu? n'orubanja rwawe. 
Matthew27:5 Yaatambika ebyo bicweka by'efeeza omuri hekalu, yaashohora, yaagyenda, yaayehanika." 
Matthew27:6 Abanyamurwa abakuru baatorotoora ebyo bicweka by'efeeza, nibagira bati: Ebiragiro tibirikwikiriza kubita omu ibiikiro, ahabw'okuba n'obuguzi bw'eshagama." 
Matthew27:7 Baahanuura, baabiguramu ekibanja ky'omubumbi kuguma nibaziikamu abahinguzi." 
Matthew27:8 N'ahabw'ekyo ekibanja ekyo kyayetwa Ekibanja, ky'eshagama okuruga obwo n'okuhitsya hati." 
Matthew27:9 Okwo nikwo ekyagambirwe nabi Yeremia kyahikiriire, eki yaagizire ati: Bakatwara ebicweka by'efeeza makumi ashatu, nibwo buguzi bwe obu abamwe aha Baisraeli baamucwereire," 
Matthew27:10 baabiguramu ekibanja ky'omubumbi, nk'oku Mukama yandagiire." 
Matthew27:11 Yesu yaayemerera omu maisho g'omutegyeki: omutegyeki yaamubuuza ati: Weeza ori Omugabe w'Abayudaaya? Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Eki waagamba nikwo kiri. 
Matthew27:12 Kwonka ku yaatabaariziibwe abanyamurwa abakuru n'abakuru b'abantu, tiyaagarukamu na kakye." 
Matthew27:13 Pilaato nikwo kumubuuza ati: Tohuriire ebi byona ebi barikukushinja ku biri bingi? 
Matthew27:14 We tiyaamugarukamu n'obu kyakuba ekigambo na kimwe; n'ahabw'ekyo omutegyeki yaatangaara munonga. 
Matthew27:15 Kandi aha bugyenyi nk'obwo omutegyeki akaba amanyiire kurekurira abantu embohe emwe, ei baabaire bamushaba." 
Matthew27:16 Omu biro ebyo bakaba baine embohe erangainwe ahabw'obubi erikwetwa Barabba. 
Matthew27:17 Boona ku baaherize kuteerana, Pilaato yaababuuza ati: Nimwenda ngu mbarekurire oha? Barabba nari Yesu orikwetwa Kristo?" 
Matthew27:18 Ahakuba akamanya ku baamuhayo ahabw'eihari. 
Matthew27:19 Ku yaashutamire aha kitebe ky'okucweraho emanja, omukazi we yaamutumaho naagira ati: Oyetantare ebigambo by'omushaija ogwo ohikiriire; ahakuba ebi mmurootsireho nyekiro binsaasize munonga." 
Matthew27:20 Kwonka abanyamurwa abakuru n'abakuru baayosya abantu ngu bashabe Barabba, baite Yesu." 
Matthew27:21 Omutegyeki yaagaruka yaababuuza ati: Ahari abo bombi nimwenda ku mbarekurira oha? Baamugarukamu bati; Barabba. 
Matthew27:22 Pilaato yaababuuza ati: Mbwenu shi, ngire nta Yesu orikwetwa Kristo? Boona baagarukamu bati: Abambwe aha musharaba." 
Matthew27:23 Yaababuuza ati: Ahanki? Ni kibi ki eki akozire? Baayeyongyera kuyomba nibagira bati: Abambwe! 
Matthew27:24 Pilaato ku yaareebire naayeruhiriza busha, kandi yaareeba ngu haza kubaho okurabanamu, yaayakiira amaizi, yaanaaba omu ngaro omu maisho g'abantu, naagira ati: Tiinyine rubanja ahabw'eshagama y'omuntu ogu ohikiriire; mubyemarire." 
Matthew27:25 Abantu boona baagarukamu nibagira bati: Eshagama ye ebe niitwe yaatukurira n'abaana baitu. 
Matthew27:26 Pilaato nikwo kubarekurira Barabba. Kandi ku yaaherize kwasha Yesu, yaamuhayo kubambwa." 
Matthew27:27 Bwanyima abaserukare b'omutegyeki baatwara Yesu omu kibuga ekirikwetwa Puratorio, omutwe gwabo gwona baagumuteeraniraho." 
Matthew27:28 Baamujuura ebijwaro bye, baamujweka omwenda gwa karari." 
Matthew27:29 Ku baaherize kuruka ekirunga ky'amahwa, baakimujweka omu mutwe, baamukwatsa ekibingo omu mukono gwe gwa buryo, baamutsimbira amaju, baamuteerera enaku nibagira bati: Singa, Mugabe w'Abayudaaya!" 
Matthew27:30 Baamucwera amacwante, baakwata ekyo kibingo, baakimuteera omu mutwe." 
Matthew27:31 Ku baaherize kumuteerera enaku, baamujuura ogwo mwenda, baagaruka baamujweka ebijwaro bye, baamutwara kubambwa aha musharaba." 
Matthew27:32 Ku baabaire nibashohora, baabugana omushaija wa Kureene orikwetwa Simooni; ogwo baamugyema kwekorera omusharaba gwa Yesu." 
Matthew27:33 Ku baahikire aharikwetwa Gologosa, amakuru gaakyo ngu Omwanya gw'empanga y'omuntu," 
Matthew27:34 baamuha viinyo ejwangiremu omubazi ogurikwetwa sumuruna; ku yaagirorizeho, yaayanga kuginywa." 
Matthew27:35 Ku baaherize kumubamba, baabagana ebijwaro bye, nibabiteerera enteenyu." 
Matthew27:36 Baashutama ahansi, baaguma nibamureeba." 
Matthew27:37 Baahanika ebigambo ebi baamutabaariza ahaigur y'omutwe gwe, ebyabaire bihandiikirwe biti: OGU NI YESU, OMUGABE W'ABAYUDAAYA." 
Matthew27:38 Kandi akabambwa hamwe n'abambuzi babiri, omwe aha rubaju rwe rwa buryo, n'ondi aha rwa bumosho." 
Matthew27:39 Kandi n'abaabaire nibahinguraho baamutsyorera, nibamuzongoreza emitwe," 
Matthew27:40 nibagira bati: Iwe orikusheenya hekalu, okagyombeka omu biro bishatu, yejune! Ku oraabe ori Omwana wa Ruhanga, hanuka orugye aha musharaba." 
Matthew27:41 Abanyamurwa abakuru n'abahandiiki n'abakuru b'abantu nabo baamutsyorera batyo nibagira bati: 
Matthew27:42 Akajuna abandi; tarikubaasa kwejuna. Ngu, N'omugabe w'Abaisraeli! Naahanukye, arugye aha musharaba hati, naitwe tumwikirize." 
Matthew27:43 Ayesiga Ruhanga, mbwenu naamujune hati, ku araabe naamukunda; ahabw'okuba yaagira ati: Ndi Omwana wa Ruhanga." 
Matthew27:44 Kandi n'abambuzi abaabaire babambirwe nawe nabo nikwo baamuteerera enaku batyo. 
Matthew27:45 Okuruga aha shaaha ya mukaaga okuhitsya aha ya mwenda omwirima gwashweka ensi yoona. 
Matthew27:46 Ku bwabaire buri haihi kuhika aha shaaha ya mwenda, Yesu yaagamba n'eiraka rihango, ati: Eli, Eli, laama sabakasaani; amakuru ngu; Ruhanga wangye, Ruhanga wangye, n'enki ekyakuntsigisaho?" 
Matthew27:47 Bamwe aha baabaire beemereire aho, ku baakihuriire, baagira bati: Omushaija ogu naayeta Eliya." 
Matthew27:48 Ahonaaho omwe aharibo yairuka, yaakwata ekyangu, yaakijabika omuri viinyo erikushaarira, yaakita aha kibingo, yaamuheereza kunwa." 
Matthew27:49 Abandi baagira bati: Reka tureebe Eliya ku araabe naija kumujuna. 
Matthew27:50 Bwanyima Yesu yaagaruka yaagamba n'eiraka rihango, yaahayo amagara ge." 
Matthew27:51 Omukingo gw'omuri hekalu gwataagukamu ebicweka bibiri okuruga aha mutwe gwagwo okuhika ahansi, ensi yaatengyeta, enkiri z'amabaare zaayatika," 
Matthew27:52 ebituuro byaiguka; emitumbi mingi y'abahikiriire abaabaire bagwejegyeire yaazoorwa; 
Matthew27:53 baaruga omu bituuro bwanyima y'okuzooka kwe, baataaha omu rurembo orurikwera, baareebwa baingi." 
Matthew27:54 Omukuru w'abaserukare n'abu yaabaire aine nibarinda Yesu, ku baareebire omutsitsa n'ebindi byabaho, baatiina munonga, nibagira bati: Buzima kwo ogu abaire ari Omwana wa Ruhanga." 
Matthew27:55 Hakaba hariho n'abakazi baingi beemereire nibareebera hangahari; abo nibo baarugire Galilaaya bamukuratiire nibamuheereza; 
Matthew27:56 omuri abo hakaba harimu Mariamu Magadaleene na Mariamu nyina wa Yakobo na Yose, kandi na nyina wa beene Zebedaayo." 
Matthew27:57 Omu mwabazyo haija omushaija omutungi owa Arimasaaya, orikwetwa Yosefu, kandi nawe akaba ari omwegi wa Yesu." 
Matthew27:58 Omushaija ogwo yaaza owa Pilaato, yaashaba omutumbi gwa Yesu. Pilaato yaaragiira kugumuha." 
Matthew27:59 Yosefu yaatwara omutumbi, yaaguzinga omu mwenda gwa kitaani ogurikwera," 
Matthew27:60 yaagurambika omu kituuro kye kisya, eki yaabaire ayetimbiire omu rukiri; yaakumbagaza eibaare rihango, yaarikingisa aha muryango gwakyo, yaagyenda." 
Matthew27:61 Kandi Mariamu Magadaleene na Mariamu ondiijo bakaba bariho, bashutami nibareeba ekyo kituuro." 
Matthew27:62 Ku bwaseesire aha izooba eryakuratiire ekiro ky'Okweteguura, abanyamurwa abakuru n'Abafarisaayo baateeranira owa Pilaato," 
Matthew27:63 baamugira bati: Mukama waitu, nitwijuka eki omubeihi ori yaagambire akiriho, ati: Ndyazooka bwanyima y'ebiro bishatu." 
Matthew27:64 Mbwenu ragiira barindire kimwe ekituuro okuhitsya aha kiro kya kashatu, abeegi be batakaija bakamwiba, haza bakagambira abantu ngu, Azookire omu bafu; kandi okuhaba okurirugamu kuryaba kubi okukira okw'okubanza." 
Matthew27:65 Pilaato yaabagarukau ati: Mwine abarinzi b'abaserukare; mugyende, mukirindire kimwe, nk'oku murikubaasa." 
Matthew27:66 Nabo baagyenda, baahamisa eryo ibaare akamanyiso, baataho n'abarinzi, ngu ekituuro kutaigurwa," 
Matthew28:1 Bwanyima y'eizooba rya Sabato, omushekye ku gwabaire nigujuguta omu kasheeshe k'ekiro ky'okubanza omuri saabiiti, Mariamu Magadaleene na Mariamu ondiijo baaza kureeba ekituuro." 
Matthew28:2 Haabaho omutsitsa gw'amaani; ahabw'okuba maraika wa Mukama akaruga omu iguru, yaija, yaakumbagaza eibaare, yaarishutamaho." 
Matthew28:3 Enshusha ye akaba naamurinkana nk'omurabyo, n'ebijwaro bye bikaba nibyera nk'orubaare." 
Matthew28:4 Abarinzi ahaw'okutiina batetema, baahinduka nk'abafiire." 
Matthew28:5 Kwonka maraika yaagambira abakazi ati: Imwe, mutatiina; ahakuba nimmanya ku murikusherura Yesu obambirwe." 
Matthew28:6 Tari aha; ahabw'okuba azookire, nk'oku yaagambire. Mwije mureebe omwanya ahu abaire abyami." 
Matthew28:7 Haza mwehuute, mugambire abeegi be ku azookire omu bafu, kandi ku arikwija kubabandiza Galilaaya; okwo niyo muraamureebere. Reeba naabagambira." 
Matthew28:8 Baaruga aha kituuro, nibeehuuta baine obwoba n'okushemererwa kwingi, bairuka kugambira abeegi be." 
Matthew28:9 Yweu yaababugana, yaabagira ati: Mushemererwe! Baamwirira haihi, baamukwata aha bigyere, baamuramya." 
Matthew28:10 Yesu nikwo kubagambira ati: Mutatiina, mugyende, mugambire bagyenzi bangye baze Galilaaya; okwo niyo barandeebere." 
Matthew28:11 Ku baabaire nibagyenda, abamwe ahari abo barinzi baija omu rurembo, baagambira abanyamurwa abakuru byona ebyabaho." 
Matthew28:12 Abanyamurwa nikwo kuteerana abakuru b'abantu, bakahanuura hamwe; ku baaherize, baaha abaserukare empiiha nyingi," 
Matthew28:13 baabagambira bati: Mugume mugire muti: Abeegi be baizire nyekiro, baamwiba itwe tugwejegyeire." 
Matthew28:14 Omutegyeki ku araabimanye, nitwija kumwikiririsa, tubaiheho orubanja." 
Matthew28:15 Abaserukare baayakiira empiiha, baakora nk'oku baahabwirwe; ekigambo ekyo kyabuga omuri Buyudaaya n'okuhitsya hati." 
Matthew28:16 Bwanyima abeegi be ikumi n'omwe baaza Galilaaya, aha rushozi oru Yesu abaragiire." 
Matthew28:17 Ku baamureebire, baamuramya; kwonka abandi baabanganisa." 
Matthew28:18 Yesu yaija, yaabagira ati: Mpairwe obushoboorozi bwona omu iguru n'omu nsi." 
Matthew28:19 N'ahabw'ekyo mugyende omu mahanga goona, muhindure abantu abeegi nimubabatiza omu iziina rya Isheboona n'ery'Omwana n'ery'Omwoyo Orikwera," 
Matthew28:20 nimubeegyesa kworobera byona ebi naabaragiire; kandi reeba, ndi hamwe naimwe ebiro byona okuhitsya obu ensi egi erihwaho." 
Mark1:1 Okutandika kw'engiri ya Yesu Kristo, Omwana wa Ruhanga:" 
Mark1:2 nk'oku kyahandiikirwe omu kitabo kya nabi Isaaya, ngu: Reeba, nintuma entumwa yangye, ekubandize; Niyo erishemeza omuhanda gwawe." 
Mark1:3 Eiraka ry'orikugambira omu ihamba, ati: Mushemeze omuhanda gwa Mukama, Mugorore otuhanda twe." 
Mark1:4 Yohaana akaija naabatiza omu ihamba, naabuurira okubatizibwa kw'okweteisa ahabw'okwihwaho ebibi." 
Mark1:5 Abantu b'omu ishaza rya Buyudaaya ryona n'aba Yerusaalemu boona baaruga owaabo, baamushangayo; yaababatiriza omu mugyera Yorudani, nibaatura ebibi byabo." 
Mark1:6 Kandi Yohaana akaba ajwara ekijwaro ky'ebyoya by'engamira, ayezirikisa orukoba omu nda, eby'okurya bye bikaba biri enzigye n'obwoki bw'omu ishwa." 
Mark1:7 Yaabagambira, naagira ati: orikwija enyima yangye nankiza obushoboorozi; tinshemereire kwinama kuyuzya enkoba z'enkaito ze." 
Mark1:8 Nyowe naababatiza n'amaizi, kwonka We aryababatiza n'Omwoyo Orikwera." 
Mark1:9 Omu buri ebyo Yesu akaruga Nazareesi ey'omuri Galilaaya, yaija, yaabatizibwa Yohaana omuri Yorudani." 
Mark1:10 Ahonaaho ku yaabaire naaruga omu maizi, yaareeba eiguru rikinguukire, n'Omwoyo naamushuumaho nk'enkombe," 
Mark1:11 n'eiraka ryayema omu iguru riti: Niiwe Mwana wangye ou nkunda, kandi ou nsehemerererwa munonga." 
Mark1:12 Ahonaaho Omwoyo yaamutwara omu ihamba; 
Mark1:13 yaamarayo ebiro makumi ana, naayohibwa Sitaane; yaaguma hamwe n'enyamaishwa, baamaraika nibamuheereza." 
Mark1:14 Bwanyima Yohaana, ku yaaherize kukwatwa, Yesu yaija Galilaaya naabuurira engiri ya Ruhanga, naagira ati:" 
Mark1:15 Obunaku buhikire; obukama bwa Ruhanga bwiriire haihi; mweteise, mwikiriza engiri." 
Mark1:16 Ku yaabaire naaraba aha rubaju rw'enyanja ya Galilaaya, yaareeba Simooni na Anderea omurumuna nibatega obutimba omu nyanja, ahakuba bakaba bari abajubi." 
Mark1:17 Yesu yaabagira ati: Mwije munkuratire, naanye ndyabahindura abajubi b'abantu." 
Mark1:18 Ahonaaho baatsigaho obutimba bwabo, baamukuratira." 
Mark1:19 Ku yairiire omumaisho hakye, yaareeba Yakobo mwene Zebedaayo na Yohaana omurumuna, abaabaire bari omu bwato, nibashumikanisa obutimba." 
Mark1:20 Ahonaaho yaabeeta; baatsiga ishebo Zebedaayo omu bwato hamwe n'abapakasi, baamukuratira." 
Mark1:21 Baataaha Kaperenaumu; ahari Sabato yaataaha omuri sinagogi, ahonaaho yaayegyesa." 
Mark1:22 Baatangaarira okwegyesa kwe, ahakuba akabeegyesa nk'oine obushoboorozi weena, kunu ti nk'abahandiiki." 
Mark1:23 Omuri egyo sinagogi hakaba harimu omuntu owaabaire ariho daimoni; ahonaaho yaaborooga naagira ati: 
Mark1:24 Noofa ki naitwe, iwe Yesu owa Nazareesi? Oizire kutucwekyereza? Ninkumanya, ori Orikwera wa Ruhanga." 
Mark1:25 Yesu yaamugambira kubi, naagira ati: Hunama! murugyeho." 
Mark1:26 Daimoni yaamuteera ahansi, yaamutetemya, yaaborooga n'eiraka rihango, yaamurugaho." 
Mark1:27 Boona baatangaara, nibabuuzana bati: Eki n'enki? Oku n'okwegyesa kusya! Naaragiira baadaimoni n'obushoboorozi, nabo bamuhurira." 
Mark1:28 Ahonaaho okurangaanwa kwe kwahika hoonahoona embaju zoona eziri haihi na Galilaaya. 
Mark1:29 Ahonaaho ku yaashohoire omuri sinagogi, yaagyenda na Yakobo na Yohaana, baataaha omu nju ya Simooni na Anderea;" 
Mark1:30 kandi nyinazaara wa Simooni akaba abyami arwaire omushwija; ahonaaho baamugambira oku ari; 
Mark1:31 yaija, yaamukwata aha mukono, yaamwimutsya, omushwija gwamurugaho, yaimuka, yaabaheereza." 
Mark1:32 Omu mwabazyo ogwo, eizooba nirirengarenga, baamureetera boona abaabaire barwaire n'abandi abaabaire bariho baadaimoni." 
Mark1:33 Abantu boona ab'omuri tauni baateeranira omu irembo. 
Mark1:34 Yaakiza baingi abaabaire barwaire endwara z'emiringo mingi; yaabinga baadaimoni baingi, kandi tiyaabaikiriza kugamba, ahakuba bakamumanya." 
Mark1:35 Aha kiro ekindi akaimuka bukiri nyekiro, yaashohora, yaaza omu mwanya ogwekiikire, yaashabirayo." 
Mark1:36 Simooni na bagyenzi be baamukurata. 
Mark1:37 Ku baamuboine, baamugira bati: Abantu boona nibakusherura." 
Mark1:38 Yaabagarukamu ati: Tugyende ahandi omuri tauni eziri haihi, nayo mbuurireyo; ahakuba nikyo naiziriire." 
Mark1:39 Yaagyenda omuri Galilaaya yoona, naabuurira omuri sinagogi zaabo, kandi naabinga baadaimoni." 
Mark1:40 Bwanyima omubembe yaija ah'ari, yaamweshengyereza, omutsimbire amaju, yaamugira ati: Ku oraabe nookunda, noobaasa kunshemeza." 
Mark1:41 Yaamusaasira, yaagorora omukono gwe, yaamukoraho, yaamugira ati: Ninkunda; shemera!" 
Mark1:42 Ahonaaho ebibembe byamurugaho, yaashemezibwa." 
Mark1:43 Yaamwohereza ahonaaho, naamwehanangiriza munonga," 
Mark1:44 yaamuragiira ati: Reeba, otagira ou waagambira; kwonka irooko ogyende, oyeyorekye aha munyamurwa, oheyo ebi Musa yaaragiire ahabw'okuba oshemeziibwe, bibe eby'okuhamya omu maisho g'abantu." 
Mark1:45 Kwonka we ku yaashohoire, yaatandika kubigamba, naabibuzya omu bantu; okuruga aho Yesu tarabaasize kugaruka omuri tauni butunu, yaaguma omu ihamba; abantu baaruga oku n'oku, baamushangayo." 
Mark2:1 Ku haahingwireho ebiro bikye, Yesu yaagaruka Kaperenaumu, kyamanywa ku ari owaabo." 
Mark2:2 Abantu baingi baateeranira omu nju, baagiijura, omwanya gwabura nangwa n'aha muryango; yaabagambira ekigambo kya Ruhanga." 
Mark2:3 Ku yaabaire naakigamba, haija abantu bana bamureeteire omuntu ozingazingirwe, bamuheekire omu ngozi." 
Mark2:4 Ku baabuzire ah'okuraba kuhika ahari Yesu ahabw'omutwe gw'abantu, baakambura aha mutwe gw'enju aharinganiire n'ahu Yesu yaabaire ari; ku baaherize kuhakambura, baashuumizaho ozingazingirwe omu ngozi, ei yaabaire arimu." 
Mark2:5 Yesu ku yaareebire okwikiriza kwabo, yaagira ozingazingirwe ati: Mwana wangye, ebibi byawe byakusaasirwa." 
Mark2:6 Kwonka aha rubaju hakaba hashutamiho abamwe aha bahandiiki, baatandika kwetomboita nibeebuuza omu mitima yaabo bati:" 
Mark2:7 Beitu shi, omuntu ogu ekirikumugambisa kityo n'enki? Naarogota! N'oha orikubaasa kusaasira ebibi kureka Ruhanga wenka?" 
Mark2:8 Ahonaaho Yesu, ku yaamanyire omu mwoyo gwe okwetomboita kw'omu mitima yaabo, yaababuuza ati: Nimwetomboitera ki mutyo omu mitima yaanyu?" 
Mark2:9 Ekirikurahuka ni kiiha, okugira ozingazingirwe nti, Ebibi byawe byakusaasirwa; nari okugira nti, Imuka oyekorere engozi yaawe, ogyende?" 
Mark2:10 Kwonka mumanye ngu Omwana w'omuntu aine obushoboorozi aha nsi okusaasira ebibi, yaahindukira ozingazingirwe yaamugira ati:" 
Mark2:11 Ninkuragiira nti: Imuka oyekorere engozi yaawe, otaahe." 
Mark2:12 Yaimuka, ahonaaho yaayekorera engozi ye, yaashohora omu maisho gaabo boona; kyabatangaaza boona, baahimbisa Ruhanga nibagira bati: Eki tikikareebwaga!" 
Mark2:13 Yaagaruka yaagyenda aha rubaju rw'enyanja; omutwe gw'abantu gwamuteeraniraho, yaabeegyesa." 
Mark2:14 Bwanyima yaagumizamu, yaareeba Leevi mwene Alifaayo, ashutami omu ihoorezo, yaamugira ati: Nkuratira! Yaimuka, yaamukuratira." 
Mark2:15 Kandi Yesu ku yaabaire ashutami omwa Leevi naarya, abahooza baingi n'abasiisi baashutama hamwe nawe n'abeegi be; ahakuba abaabaire bamukuratiire bakaba bari baingi." 
Mark2:16 Abahandiiki b'Abafarisaayo, ku baareebire naarya n'abahooza n'abasiisi, baabuuza abeegi be bati: Ahabw'enki naarya kandi naanywa n'abahooza n'abasiisi?" 
Mark2:17 Yesu ku yaabihuriire, yaabagarukamu ati: Abahuriire tibeetenga mufumu, kureka abarwaire; tindaizire kweta bahikiriire, kureka abasiisi." 
Mark2:18 Omu biro ebyo abeegi ba Yohaana n'Abafarisaayo bakaba nibeesiibyakwo; abantu baija baamubuuza bati: Ahabw'enki abeegi ba Yohaana n'ab'Abafarisaayo beesiibyakwo, haza kunu abaawe bo bateesiibyakwo?" 
Mark2:19 Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Abakwe babaasa bata kwesiibyakwo bakiine kishwera? Ku baba bakiri hamwe nawe, tibeesiibyakwo." 
Mark2:20 Kwonka obunaku buryahika, kishwera aryabaihwaho; obwo nibwo baryesiibyakwo." 
Mark2:21 Tihariho muntu oteera ekiremu ky'omwenda musya aha mwenda ogukuzire; ku yaakukora atyo, ekiremu ekisya kikaataagura omwenda omukuru, n'ekifumuka kihanguha." 
Mark2:22 Kandi tihariho muntu oshuka viinyo y'omutahe omu furebe z'empu ezikuzire; ku yaakukora atyo, viinyo ekaabarura efurebe, viinyo egyo eyatika, n'efurebe zisiisikara; kureka viinyo y'omutahe eshukwa omu furebe nsya." 
Mark2:23 Obundi akaba naaraba omu misiri y'oburo aha izooba rya Sabato; abeegi be baagyenda nibacwa obushiisha bw'oburo. 
Mark2:24 Abafarisaayo baamubuuza bati: Reeba, ahabw'enki abeegi baawe nibakora ekirikuzira, okucwa obushiisha aha izooba rya Sabato?" 
Mark2:25 Yaabagarukamu ati: Beitu shi, timukashomaga eki Daudi yaakozire, obu yaabaire ashobeirwe, aine enjara, we n'abu yaabiare aine?" 
Mark2:26 Omu biro ebi Abiasaari yaabaire ari omunyamurwa omukuru, Daudi akataaha omu nju ya Ruhanga, yaarya aha migaati ey'okumurikwa, yaagaruka yaahaho n'abu yaabaire aine, eki Ebiragiro byabaire bizibira omuntu weena kukora, kureka abanyamurwa bonka." 
Mark2:27 Yaabagambira ati: Sabato ekateebwaho ahabw'abantu; kwonka ti bantu ahabwa Sabato. 
Mark2:28 N'ahabw'ekyo Omwana w'omuntu niwe Mukama wa Sabato nayo. 
Mark3:1 Obundi akagaruka yaataaha omuri sinagogi; yaashangamu omushaija okokootsire omukono. 
Mark3:2 Baaguma bamutaireho amaisho kureeba yaaba araamukize ahari Sabato, ngu baihe aho bamuregye." 
Mark3:3 Yaaragiira omushaija owaabaire akokootsire omukono, ati: Yemerera ahagati aho." 
Mark3:4 Yaababuuza ati: N'eky'Ebiragiro okukora gye ahari Sabato, nari okukora kubi? Okukiza amagara g'omuntu, nari okugahwerekyereza? Baahunama kwonka." 
Mark3:5 Yaababunzyamu amaisho aine ekiniga, agwirwe kubi ahabw'obugangaazi bw'omu mitima yaabo, yaaragiira omushaija ogwo, ati: Nanuura omukono gwawe. Yaagunanuura, gwakira." 
Mark3:6 Ahonaaho Abafarisaayo baashohora, baahanuura na ba Heroode oku baraamwite." 
Mark3:7 Bwanyima Yesu n'abeegi be baarugayo, baaza aha nyanja; omutwe muhango gw'abantu, abaarugire Galilaaya, baamukuratira; kandi n'abandi baingi munonga ab'omuri Buyudaaya," 
Mark3:8 n'aba Yerusaalemu, n'aba Idumaaya, n'aba seeri ya Yorudani, n'abaabaire batwire haihi na Tuuro na Sidoni, ku baahuriire byona ebi yaakozire, baija ah'ari." 
Mark3:9 Yaagambira abeegi be kumureetera obwato haihi ahabw'omutwe gw'abantu, ngu barekye kumufunza;" 
Mark3:10 ahakuba akaba akirize baingi, n'ahabw'ekyo boona abaabaire baine endwara baamigana ngu bakaamukoraho, bakira." 
Mark3:11 Kandi na baadaimoni, ku baabaire bamureeba, bagwa omu maisho ge, nibaborooga, nibagira bati: Ori Omwana wa Ruhanga." 
Mark3:12 Kwonka We yaabeehanangiriza ku bareka kumubuzya omu bantu. 
Mark3:13 Kandi yaatemba ekibungo, yaayeta abu yaayenzire, baija ahu yaabaire ari." 
Mark3:14 Yaihamu ikumi na babiri kuguma nawe, ngu agume abatume kubuurira engiri," 
Mark3:15 kandi ngu abahe obushoboorozi bw'okubinga baadaimoni; 
Mark3:16 Simooni yaamweta eiziina Petero," 
Mark3:17 na Yakobo mwene Zebedaayo na Yohaana murumuna wa Yakobo, yaabeeta Boanerege, amakuru gaaryo ngu Abaana b'okuhinda;" 
Mark3:18 na Anderea, Filipo Batolomaayo na Matayo, Tomasi, Yakobo mwene Alifaayo, Tadaayo, Simooni Omukananaayo," 
Mark3:19 na Yuda Iskaryota owaamureebize. 
Mark3:20 Bwanyima yaataaha owaabo; omutwe gw'abantu gwayeyongyera kuteerana, n'ahabw'ekyo Yesu n'abeegi be tibaabaasa n'okurya." 
Mark3:21 Kandi abaabo ku baakihuriire, baashohora kumukwata, ahabw'okuba bakagira ngu, Agwire eiraro." 
Mark3:22 Kandi abahandiiki, abashuumire nibaruga Yerusaalemu, baagira bati: Ariho Belezebuli; kandi omukama wa baadaimoni niwe arikumubingisa baadaimoni." 
Mark3:23 Yaabeeta, yaabacwera enfumu, ati: Sitaane naabaasa ata kubinga Sitaane?" 
Mark3:24 Obugabe bwona, ku bwebaganisamu, obugabe obwo tibubaasa kugumaho." 
Mark3:25 N'enju yoona ku eyebaganisamu, enju egyo teebaasa kugumaho." 
Mark3:26 Kandi na Sitaane ku araabe naayerwanisa, akeebaganisamu, tarikubaasa kugumaho, kureka naahwaho." 
Mark3:27 Hoona tihariho muntu orikubaasa kutaaha omu nju y'ondi ow'amaani kunyaga ebintu bye, atabandize kuboha ogwo ow'amaani, bwanyima akabona kunyaga eby'omu nju ye." 
Mark3:28 Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Abantu baryasaasirwa ebibi byabo byona, na buri kurogota kwona;" 
Mark3:29 kwonak weena orirogota aha Mwoyo Orikwera tarisaasirwa na kakye, ahakuba aryaba akwatsirwe orubanja rw'ekibi ky'ebiro n'ebiro." 
Mark3:30 Eki yaabagambiriire atyo, n'ahabw'okuba bakagira ntu, Ariho daimoni." 
Mark3:31 Kandi hakaija nyina na beene waabo, baamutumaho kumweta, beemereire aheeru." 
Mark3:32 Omutwe gw'abantu abaabaire bashutami bamwehinguririize, baamugira bati: Reeba, nyoko na beene waanyu bari aheeru nibakweta." 
Mark3:33 Yaabagarukamu ati: Maawe na beene waitu nibaahi? 
Mark3:34 Yaabuzya amaisho omuri abo abaabaire bashutami bamwehinguririize, naagira ati: Reeba, maawe na beene waitu n'aba bari aha!" 
Mark3:35 Weena okora ebi Ruhanga akunda, niwe murumuna wangye, niwe munyaanyazi, kandi niwe maawe." 
Mark4:1 Kandi akagaruka yaatandika kwegyeseza aha rubaju rw'enyanja. Omutwe gw'abantu baingi munonga gwamuteeraniraho, n'ahabw'kyo yaaza omu bwato, yaabushutamamu omu nyana, n'abantu abo boona baashutama aha nkungu." 
Mark4:2 Yaabeegyesa bingi omu nfumu omu kwegyesa kwe, yaabagambira naagira ati:" 
Mark4:3 Mutegye amatu, muhurire!" 
Mark4:4 Omubibi akashohora kubiba. Ku yaabaire naabiba, embibo ezimwe zaagwa omu muhanda; enyonyi zaija zaazitorotoora." 
Mark4:5 Embibo ezindi zaagwa aha rukiri ahataine itaka ringi; ahonaaho zaamera, ahabw'eitaka kutaba ringi;" 
Mark4:6 eizooba ku ryajwire, omushana gwaziteera, zaahonga; kandi ahabw'okutagira mizi, zaayoma." 
Mark4:7 Embibo ezindi zaagwa omu mahwa; amahwa gaamera, gaazinyuruza, tizaayera." 
Mark4:8 Embibo ezindi zaagwa omu itaka rirungi; ku zaaherize kumera, zaakura gye, zaakanya, zaayera, ezimwe zaahitsya makumi ashatu, ezindi makumi mukaaga, n'ezindi igana." 
Mark4:9 Kandi yaagira ati: Oine amatu agarikuhurira, ahurire." 
Mark4:10 Kandi ku yaabaire ati wenka, abo abaabaire bamwehinguririize hamwe na bari ikumi na babiri baamubuuza aha nfumu egyo." 
Mark4:11 Yaabagira ati: Imwe muhairwe okumanya emibonano y'obukama bwa Ruhanga, kwonka ab'aheeru bo byona babicwerwa omu nfumu," 
Mark4:12 ngu okureeba kwo bareebe, kwonka barekye kwetegyereza, kandi okuhurira kwo bahurire, kwonka barekye kushoborokyerwa, ngu batakaahinduka bakasaasirwa." 
Mark4:13 Yaabagira ati: Timurikumanya enfumu egi? Mbwenu shi, muryamanya muta enfumu zoona?" 
Mark4:14 Omubibi abiba ekigambo. 
Mark4:15 Embibo ez'omu muhanda, ahi ekigambo kyabibirwe, abo nibo baheza kuhurira, ahonaaho Sitaane akaija, akabaihamu ekigambo ekyabibwa omuribo." 
Mark4:16 Kandi ezaabibirwe aha rukiri, abo nibo bahurira ekigambo, bakarahuka kukiikiriza n'okushemererwa;" 
Mark4:17 ahabw'okushangwa bataine mizi ehamire, beehangaana omwanya mukye; bwanyima hakibaho obusaasi n'okuhiigwa nibaturwa ekyo kigambo, ahonaaho bagwa." 
Mark4:18 N'ezo ezaagwire omu mahwa, nibo bahurira ekigambo;" 
Mark4:19 kwonka amaganya g'ensi, n'okubeihwabeihwa kw'obutungi bwayo, n'okwetenga ebindi, ku bikijwangamu, byanyuruza ekyo kigambo, kibura kwana." 
Mark4:20 Kwonka ezaabibirwe aha itaka rirungi, abo nibo bahurira ekigambo, bakakiikiriza, bakaana ebyana emirundi makumi ashatu, makumi mukaaga, na igana." 
Mark4:21 Kandi yaabagambira ati: Etabaaza ereetwa kujuumikirwa ekiibo, nari shi okugita omunda y'ekitanda? Tereetwa kuteebwa aha kikondo kyayo?" 
Mark4:22 Ahakuba tihaine kyasherekirwe ekitaribonwa, nari eky'omubonano ekitarireebwa butunu." 
Mark4:23 Oine amatu agarikuhurira, ahurire." 
Mark4:24 Kandi yaabagira ati: Mwerinde eki muhurira; endengo ei murengamu niyo murirengyerwamu, kandi muryayongyerwaho." 
Mark4:25 Ahakuba oine niwe aryongyerwa; kandi otaine aryayakwa n'ekyo eki aine. 
Mark4:26 Kandi yaagira ati: Obukama bwa Ruhanga nibushusha nk'oku omuntu abiba embibo omu itaka; 
Mark4:27 akabyama kandi akaimuka nyomushana na nyekiro; embibo zikamera, zikakura, atamanyire oku zikuzire." 
Mark4:28 Eitaka niryo rimeza ryonak; habanza akababi, hataho obushiisha, na bwanyima enjuma nkuru." 
Mark4:29 Ku biheza kwera, ahonaaho areeta omusyo, abigyesha, ahakuba eigyesha rihikire." 
Mark4:30 Kandi yaagira ati: Mbwenu obukama bwa Ruhanga tukaabugyeranisa na ki? Nari tukaabushobooroza nfumu ki? 
Mark4:31 Nibushusha nk'akajuma ka sinaapi. Ku kabibwa omu itaka, kaba kari kakye okukira embibo zoona eziri omu nsi;" 
Mark4:32 kwonka ku kaheza kubibwa, kamera, kakura, karugamu ekiti kihango okukira ebindi byona, kagira amataagi mahango, kandi n'enyonyi z'omu mwanya zaarika omu mataagi gaako." 
Mark4:33 Akaba abagambira ekigambo omu nfumu nyingi, nk'oku baabaire babaasa kushoborokyerwa;" 
Mark4:34 tarabaasize kubeegyesa atabirabize mu nfumu; kureka abeegi be nibo yaabaire ashobororera byona omu mubonano. 
Mark4:35 Aha izooba eryo ku bwabaire omu mwabazyo, yaabagira ati: Nimwije twambukye seeri." 
Mark4:36 Ku baaherize kuraga omutwe gw'abantu, baamutwara omu bwato nk'oku yaabaire ari; kandi hakaba hariho n'agandi maato." 
Mark4:37 Eihunga ringi ryaija, ebingonzi byateera obwato, amaizi gaabusheeshekamu, bwaba haihi kwijura;" 
Mark4:38 kwonka We akaba agwejegyeire, ayeeshegwire omushego enyima omu bwato. Baamusisiimura, baamugira bati: Mwegyesa, torikututaho mutima? Reeba twafa!" 
Mark4:39 Yaasisiimuka, yaakabukira eihunga, yaagambira enyanja ati: Reka, cureera! Eihunga ryacureera; haabaho obucureera bwingi." 
Mark4:40 Yaababuuza ati: N'enki ekirikubatiinisa? Timukagizire kwikiriza? 
Mark4:41 Baatiina munonga, baagambirana bati: Bantu 'mwe, ogu ni muntu ki, orikuragiira eihunga n'enyanja, bikamuhurira!" 
Mark5:1 Kandi baahika seeri y'enyanja omu nsi y'Abageraseene. 
Mark5:2 Ku yaarugire ati omu bwato, yaabuganwa omuntu owaabaire naaruga omu bituuro ariho daimoni." 
Mark5:3 Omushaija ogwo akaba atuura omu bituuro, kandi tihariho muntu owaabaire naakibaasa kumuboha, nangwa n'obu yaakuba n'emihama;" 
Mark5:4 ahakuba emirundi mingi bakaba bamubohesa emirunga n'emihama; emihama agihendagura, n'emirunga agicwa; tihaine muntu owaabaire agira amaani g'okumucureeza." 
Mark5:5 Obutwire bwona nyomushana na nyekiro akaba ayamuriza omu bituuro n'omu bibungo naayeshaza amabaare. 
Mark5:6 Ku yaareebire Yesu akiri hare, yairuka yaamuramya;" 
Mark5:7 naayamuza n'eiraka rihango, naagira ati: Noofa ki naanye, Yesu Omwana wa Ruhanga Rukira-boona? Ninkurahiza Ruhanga, otaanyita kubi!" 
Mark5:8 Ahakuba Yesu akaba yaamuragiira ati: Murugyeho, iwe daimoni!" 
Mark5:9 Yesu yaamubuuza ati: Eiziina ryawe ori oha? Yaamugarukamu ati: Eiziina ryangye niinye Legioni, ahabw'okuba turi baingi." 
Mark5:10 Yaamweshengyereza munonga, ngu atababinga omu nsi omwo." 
Mark5:11 Kandi omu rukiizi hakaba hariiriireyo omukumbi gw'empunu nyingi; 
Mark5:12 baadaimoni baamweshengyereza bati: Twohereze omu mpunu, tube nizo twataahamu." 
Mark5:13 Yaabaikiriza. Baadaimoni baamurugaho, baazitaahamu; empunu ezo zikaba ziri nk'enkumi ibiri zaashuumira aha ibanga niziiruka, zaahwera omu nyanja." 
Mark5:14 Abariisa baazo bairuka, baabigambira ab'omuri tauni n'ab'omu maka; abantu baahurura, baija kureeba ekyabaho." 
Mark5:15 Ku baahikire ahari Yesu, baashangaho owaabaire ariho baadaimoni ashutami, ajwaire gye, aine obwengye bwe; baatiina." 
Mark5:16 Abariisa abaabireebire baabashobororera ebyaba ahari ogwo owaabaire ariho baadaimoni hamwe n'eby'empunu. 
Mark5:17 Baatandika kweshengyereza Yesu kubarugira omu nsi. 
Mark5:18 Kandi ku yaabaire naagaruka omu bwato, owaabaire ariho baadaimoni yaamweshengyereza kuguma nawe." 
Mark5:19 We yaamwangira, yaamugira ati: Irooko otaahe owaanyu omuri bagyenzi baawe, obagambire ebi Mukama akukoreire ku biri bikuru, n'oku akusaasiire." 
Mark5:20 Yaagyenda, yaatandika kubuzya omuri Dekapooli ebi Yesu amukoreire, ku biri bikuru; abantu boona baatangaara." 
Mark5:21 Yesu ku yaagarukire, yaayambukira omu bwato, yaahika seeri. Omutwe gw'abantu baingi gwateeranira ah'ari; kandi akaba ari haihi n'enyanja." 
Mark5:22 Haija omwe aha bakuru ba sinagogi, eiziina rye Yairo. Ku yaareebire Yesu, yaamukwata amaguru;" 
Mark5:23 yaamweshengyereza, naagira ati: Kahara kangye naatsiga niguhiriita. Ija okateho engaro, kakire, kagire amagara." 
Mark5:24 Yaagyenda nawe. Abantu baingi baamukuratira, baagyenda bamushagatiire." 
Mark5:25 Kandi hakaba hariho omukazi owaabaire amazire emyaka ikumi n'ebiri arwaire ekyejwiso," 
Mark5:26 naafa kubi munonga naaraguza omu bafumu baingi, yaamariireyo ebintu bye byona, kwonka atarikukira, kureka okweyongyera kurwara." 
Mark5:27 Ku yaahuriire ebya Yesu, yaija enyima ye omu mutwe gw'abantu, yaakora aha kijwaro kye;" 
Mark5:28 ahakuba akahamya naagira ati: N'obu naakukora aha bijwaro bye, nkaakira." 
Mark5:29 Ahonaaho ekyejwiso kye kyayoma; yaayehurira omu mubiri gwe ku yaakirira kimwe endwara ye. 
Mark5:30 Yesu, ku yaahuriire amaani gaamurugamu, ahonaaho yaahindukira omutwe gw'abantu, yaababuuza ati: N'oha owaakora aha kijwaro kyangye?" 
Mark5:31 Abeegi be baamugira bati: Nooreeba abantu baingi nibakumigisiriza, oti, Owankoraho n'oha!" 
Mark5:32 Yaababunzyamu amaisho kureeba owaakora ekyo. 
Mark5:33 Kwonka omukazi, ahabw'okumanya eki yaakorerwa, yaija aine obwoba naatetema, yaagwa ahansi omu maisho ge, yaamugambira amazima goona." 
Mark5:34 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Mwana wangye, okwikiriza kwawe nikwo kwakukiza, yegyendere n'obusingye, okirire kimwe endwara yaawe." 
Mark5:35 KU yaabaire naakigamba, haija abaaruga omu ka y'omukuru wa sinagogi, nibagira bati: Muhara waawe yaakaba; nooruhiza ki omwegyesa?" 
Mark5:36 Kwonka Yesu tiyaata mutima aha ki baagamba, yaagambira omukuru wa sinagogi ati: Otatiina, ikiriza kwonka." 
Mark5:37 Kandi tiyaikiriza muntu weena kugyenda nawe, kureka Petero na Yakobo na Yohaana murumuna wa Yakobo." 
Mark5:38 Ku baahikire aha nju y'omukuru wa sinagogi, yaashangaho okucura, abantu nibarira nibaborooga." 
Mark5:39 Ku yaataahiremu, yaabagira ati: N'enki ekirikubateeza orwari n'okubariza? Omwishiki tafiire, agwejegyeire." 
Mark5:40 Baamushekyerera munonga. Kwonka ku yaaherize kubashohoza boona, yaatwara ishe w'omwishiki na nyina n'abu yaabaire aine, yaataahamu, yaahika ahu omwishiki yaabaire ari." 
Mark5:41 Yaamukwata aha mukono, yaamugira ati: Talisa-kuumi! amakuru gaakyo ngu Mwishiki 'we, ninkugambira nti: Imuka." 
Mark5:42 Ahonaaho omwishiki ogwo yaimuka, yaagyenda; ahakuba akaba ahikize emyaka ikumi n'ebiri. Ahonaaho baagira okutangaara kwingi munonga." 
Mark5:43 Yaabeehanangiriza munonga, ngu hatagira owaakimanya; yaaragiira ku bamuha eby'okurya." 
Mark6:1 Yaarugayo, yaagaruka omu kyanga ky'owaabo; abeegi be baamukuratira." 
Mark6:2 Sabato ku yaahikire, yaatandika kwegyesa omuri sinagogi; baingi ku baamuhuriire, baatangaara, nibagira bati: omushaija ogu akaiha hi ebi byona? Ni bwengye ki ogu obu yaahairwe? Ebi arikukora ka n'eby'okutangaaza!" 
Mark6:3 Beitu ngu t'omubaizi, omwana wa Mariamu, mukuru wa Yakobo na Yose na Yuda na Simooni? Na banyaanya tibari owaitu? Ebye byabashobera." 
Mark6:4 Yesu yaabagira ati: Nabi weena tabura kitiinisa, kureka omu ihanga ryabo, n'omu ruganda rwabo, n'omu ka ye." 
Mark6:5 N'ahabw'ekyo tarabaasize kukorerayo ky'okutangaaza kyona, kureka akata engaro aha barwaire bakye, yaabakiza." 
Mark6:6 Yaatangaara ahabw'okutaikiriza kwabo. Bwanyima yaagyendagyenda omu birorero, naayegyesa." 
Mark6:7 Kandi yaayeta abeegi be ikumi na babiri, yaatandika kubatuma babiri babiri, yaabaha obushoboorozi bw'okubinga baadaimoni." 
Mark6:8 Yaabaragiira kutagira ki baagyendana, kureka enkoni yonka; kutakoma ntanda, kutatwara furebe, n'obu zaakuba empiiha omu nshaho zaabo;" 
Mark6:9 kureka bagyende bajwaire enkaito; kandi n'okutatwara makanzu abiri. 
Mark6:10 Kandi yaabaragiira ati: Enju yoona, ei muraataahemu, mube niyo mwagumamu okuhitsya obu murirugayo." 
Mark6:11 Kandi hoonahoona ahu batariikiriza kubaraaza, bakanga n'okubahurira, ku muriba nimurugayo, mutsigye mwabakunkumurira omucuucu gw'omu bigyere byanyu okuba eky'okushinja." 
Mark6:12 Batyo baagyenda nibabuurira ku abantu bashemereire kweteisa. 
Mark6:13 Baabinga baadaimoni baingi, kandi baasiiga amajuta aha barwaire baingi, baakira." 
Mark6:14 Omugabe Heroode yaabihurira, ahakuba eiziina rya Yesu rikaba ryarangainwe. Yaahamya ati: Ogwo ni Yohaana Omubatizi, azookire omu bafu; nikyo ainiire amaani aga agarikumukoresa." 
Mark6:15 Kwonka abandi baagira bati: N'Eliya; abandi bati: Ni nabi nk'omwe ahari baanabi aba ira. 
Mark6:16 Kwonka Heroode ku yaabihuriire, yaagira ati: Ni Yohaana ou naatemire omutwe, azookire." 
Mark6:17 Ahakuba ebyo bitakabaireho, Heroode akatuma, baakwata Yohaana, baamuboha, baamuta omu kihome ahabwa Herodia, muka Filipo mwene ishe; ahabw'okuba Heroode akaba amuhindwire omukazi we." 
Mark6:18 Yohaana ku yaabimanyire, yaateisa Heroode, ati: Ebiragiro tibirikukwikiriza kushwera muka mwene sho." 
Mark6:19 Herodia nikyo yaamwangiire, akenda kumwita; kwonka atabaase;" 
Mark6:20 ahabw'okuba Heroode akaba naatiina Yohaana ahabw'okumumanya ku ari omuntu ohikiriire, kandi orikwera; yaamurinda. Kandi ku yaabaire agambira Yohaana, bikaba bimushobera, kwonka akaba amuhurira ashemereirwe."
