Luke18:18 Omutegyeki omwe yaamubuuza ati: Mwegyesa omurungi, nkaakora ki okuhungura amagara agatahwaho?" 
Luke18:19 Yesu yaamugira ati: Noonyetera ki omurungi? Tihariho murungi, kureka omwe wenka, niwe Ruhanga." 
Luke18:20 Noomanya ebiragiro, Otarishambana, Otariita, Otariiba, Otaribeiherera ondiijo, Otiine sho na nyoko." 
Luke18:21 Yaagira ati: Ebyo byona nkabyerinda okuruga omu buto bwangye. 
Luke18:22 Yesu ku yaakihuriire, yaamugira ati: Mbwenu nooburwaho kimwe; tunda ebi otungire byona, obihe abooro, oryatunga eitungo omu iguru; haza oije, onkuratire." 
Luke18:23 Ku yaabihuriire, yaagira enaku nyingi, ahabw'okuba akaba ari omutungi munonga." 
Luke18:24 Yesu ku yaamwetegyereize, yaagira ati: Ka nikiremeera abantungi kutaaha omu bukama bwa Ruhanga!" 
Luke18:25 Nikirahuka engamira kuraba omu nyindo y'empitirizo, okukira omutungi kutaaha omu bukama bwa Ruhanga." 
Luke18:26 Abaakihuriire baagira bati: Mbwenu shi hoona, n'oha orikubaasa kujunwa?" 
Luke18:27 Yaabagira ati: Ekitarikubaasika ha bantu nikibaasika ahari Ruhanga. 
Luke18:28 Petero yaamugira ati: Reeba, itwe tukatsiga ebyaitu, twakukuratira." 
Luke18:29 Yesu yaabagira ati: Buzimazima nimbagambira ati: Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Tihariho muntu owaatsigire enju, nari omukazi, nari beene ishe, nari abazaire be, nari abaana be, ahabw'okubukama bwa Ruhanga," 
Luke18:30 otariheebwa bingi okukiraho omu biro ebi, kandi omu busingye oburiija akaheebwa amagara agatahwaho." 
Luke18:31 Kandi Yesu yaayekiikana bari ikumi na babiri, yaabagira ati: Reeba, nitwinamuka Yerusaalemu, byona ebyahandiikirwe baanabi aha Mwana w'omuntu nibiija kuhikiirizibwa." 
Luke18:32 Aryaheebwayo aha Banyamahanga, baryamushungisa, bamugire kubi, bamucwere amacwante;" 
Luke18:33 baryamwasha, baryamwita, kandi aha kiro kya kashatu aryazooka." 
Luke18:34 Kwonka tibaashoborokyerwa kigambo na kimwe ahari ebyo, ahabw'okuba ekigambo ekyo kikaba kibasherekirwe, tibaamanya bi baagambirwa." 
Luke18:35 Ku yairiire haihi na Yeriko, yaashanga empumi eshutami aha rubaju rw'omuhanda neesheega." 
Luke18:36 Ku yaahuriire omutwe gw'abantu nigurabaho, egyo mpumi yaabuuza eti: N'enki ekyo?" 
Luke18:37 Baagigira bati: Yesu owa Nazareesi niwe arikuhingura. 
Luke18:38 Yaayeta munonga ati: Yesu, Omwana wa Daudi, ngirira embabazi." 
Luke18:39 Abaabaire beebembeire baagigambira kubi, nibagicureeza; kwonka yo yaakizaho kweta munonga eti: Iwe Mwana wa Daudi, ngirira embabazi!" 
Luke18:40 Yesu yaayemerera, yaaragiira ku bagimureetera; ku yaamuhikire, yaagibuuza ati:" 
Luke18:41 Nooyenda ngu nkukorere ki? Yaagira eti: Mukama wangye, niinyenda ngu mpumuukye." 
Luke18:42 Yesu yaagigira ati: Humuuka; okwikiriza kwawe nikwo kwakukiza. 
Luke18:43 Ahonaaho yaahumuuka, yaamukuratira naahimbisa Ruhanga; n'abantu boona ku baakireebire, baasiima Ruhanga." 
Luke19:1 Yaataaha omuri Yeriko, yaagumizamu naahingura." 
Luke19:2 Kandi hakaba hariho omushaija orikwetwa Zakaayo omuhooza mukuru, kandi omutungi." 
Luke19:3 Yaayenda kureeba oku Yesu arikushusha; kwonka tiyaabaasa ahabw'omutwe gw'abantu, kandi n'ahabw'okuba mugufu." 
Luke19:4 N'ahabw'ekyo yairuka, yaaza omumaisho, yaatemba omuri gw'omusikamoori, ngu amureebe; ahakuba akaba naija kuraba aho." 
Luke19:5 Yesu ku yaahikire omu mwanya ogwo, yaareeba ahaigur, yaamugira ati: Zakaayo, rahuka, temburuka; ahabw'okuba erizooba nshemereire kusiiba omu nju yaawe." 
Luke19:6 Yaarahuka kutemburuka, yaamutaasya owe ashemereirwe." 
Luke19:7 Abantu boona ku baakireebire, baayetomboita, nibagira bati: Yaaza kuraarira omuntu omusiisi." 
Luke19:8 Zakaayo yaayemerera, yaagambira Mukama ati: Reeba, Mukama wangye, ekicweka ky'ebintu byangye naaza kukigabira abooro; kandi ou naagobeize weena, nimmuriha kana." 
Luke19:9 Yesu yaamugira ati: Eri izooba okujunwa kwataaha omu nju egi, ahakuba ogu nawe n'omwana wa Abrahamu;" 
Luke19:10 kandi Omwana w'omuntu akaija kusherura n'okujuna ekyabuzire. 
Luke19:11 Ku baahuriire ebyo, yaagaruka yaacwa enfumu, ahabw'okuba akaba ari haihi na Yerusaalemu, kandi bakateekateeka ngu obukama bwa Ruhanga bwaza kureebwa omu bunaku obwo." 
Luke19:12 Nikyo yaagiriire ati: Omunyiginya omwe akagyenda omu nsi ya hare kuheebwa obugabe ngu bwanyima agarukye. 
Luke19:13 Yaayeta abambari be ikumi, ati: Muzishuuuze, okuhitsya obu ndigaruka." 
Luke19:14 Kwonka abantu be bakaba nibamwanga; baamukuratsa entumwa, nibagira bati: Titurikwenda muntu ogwo ku atutegyeka." 
Luke19:15 Ku yaagarukire, aheirwe obugabe, yaaragiira kumwetera abambari abo abu yaahaire empiiha, ngu amanye enshaagi ezi baihire omu kushuubura kwabo." 
Luke19:16 Ow'okubanza yaija omu maisho ge, yaagira ati: Mukama wangye, miina yaawe eshaagizemu ezindi miina ikumi." 
Luke19:17 Yaamugira ati: Okozire gye, mwambari wangye omurungi! Ahakuba oyesigirwe ahari bikye munonga, obe omutegyeki w'endembo ikumi." 
Luke19:18 N'owa kabiri yaija, yaagira ati: Mukama wangye, miina yaawe eshaagizemu ezindi miina itaano." 
Luke19:19 Yaamugira ati: Naiwe otegyekye endembo itaano. 
Luke19:20 N'ondiijo yaija, yaagira ati: Mukama wangye, miina yaawe ngigi! Nkagibiika omu kiremu." 
Luke19:21 Ahakuba nkakutiina, ahabw'okuba oba omuntu ogumire; oyaanura ebi otaanikire; ogyesha ebi otabibire." 
Luke19:22 Yaamugira ati: Iwe mwambari 'we omubi, ninkucwera orubanja, niinyiha aha bi waagamba. Okamanya ku ndi omuntu ogumire, ku nyanura ebi ntaanikire, nkagyesha ebi ntabibire." 
Luke19:23 Mbwenu n'enki ekyakuzibiire kuha empiiha zangye abazibiika kuzishuubuza, naanye ku naakugarukire, nkaaziihireyo n'enshaagi?" 
Luke19:24 Yaagambira abaabaire beemereire aho ati: Mumwakye miina egyo, mugihe oine miina ikumi." 
Luke19:25 Baamugira bati: Mukama waitu, ka aine ezindi kumi!" 
Luke19:26 Nimbagambira nti: Oine niwe aryongyerwa; kwonka otaine aryayakwa n'eki aine. 
Luke19:27 Kandi abo bazigu bangye abatarenzire ku mbategyeka, mubareete aha, mubaitire omu maisho gangye." 
Luke19:28 Ku yaaherize kugamba ebyo, yaagumizamu kwinamuka Yerusaalemu." 
Luke19:29 Ku yaahikire haihi na Besifaage na Besania aha kibungo ekirikwetwa Zeituuni, yaatuma babiri aha beegi be, yaagira ati:" 
Luke19:30 Mugyende omu kirorero ekibari omumaisho; ku muraabe nimutaahamu, nimwija kushanga omwana gw'endogoya gutisbikire, ogutakatembwahoga muntu; mugutsibure, mugureete aha." 
Luke19:31 Omuntu weena, ku araababuuze ati: Nimugutsiburira ki? Mugarukyemu muti: Mukama waitu naagwenda." 
Luke19:32 Abo abatumirwe baagyenda, baashanga kiri nk'oku yaabagambira." 
Luke19:33 Ku baabaire nibatsibura omwana gw'endogoya, bakama baagwo baababuuza bati: Nimutsiburira ki omwana gw'endogoya?" 
Luke19:34 Baabagarukamu bati: Mukama waitu naagwenda. 
Luke19:35 Baagureetera Yesu, baagutaho ebijwaro byabo, baagumushutamyaho." 
Luke19:36 Ku yaabaire naagyenda, baayara ebijwaro byabo omu nguuto." 
Luke19:37 KU yairiire haihi, yaahika aha kashuumo k'ekibungo kya Zituuni, omutwe gwona gw'abeegi be gwatandika kushemererwa n'okuhimbisa Ruhang n'eiraka rihango ahabw'eby'okutangaaza ebi baareebire," 
Luke19:38 nibagira bati: Omugabe orikwija omu iziina rya Mukama asiimwe! Obusingye bube omu iguru, n'ekitiinisa kibe ahaiguru ya byona." 
Luke19:39 Bamwe aha Bafarisaayo abaabaire bari omu mutwe ogwo, baamugira bati: Mwegyesa, hana abeegi baawe." 
Luke19:40 Yaabagarukamu ati: Nimbagambira nti: Aba ku baakuhunama, amabaare gakaagamba munonga." 
Luke19:41 Ku yairiire haihi, yaareeba orurembo, yaaruririra," 
Luke19:42 naagira ati: Eri izooba, kuri noomanya ebyakukureetera obusingye! Kwonka shi hati bisherekirwe amaisho gaawe." 
Luke19:43 Ahakuba ebiro biryakwizira, abazigu baawe bakuzitireho orugo, bakwehinguririze, bakutangatangye embaju zoona;" 
Luke19:44 bakuteere ahansi n'abaana baawe abakutwiremu; tibarikutsigamu ibaare eriri aha rindi, ahabw'okuba toramanyire biro eby'okutaayaayirwa kwawe." 
Luke19:45 Yaataaha omuri hekalu, yaatandika kubingamu abaabaire nibatunda," 
Luke19:46 yaabagira ati: Kikahandiikwa ngu, Enju yangye eryaba ey'okushabirwamu; mbwenu imwe mugihindwire enyanga y'abambuzi." 
Luke19:47 Yaaguma naayegyesa obutoosha omuri hekalu. Kwonka abanyamurwa abakuru n'abahandiiki n'abakuru b'abantu baacwa obwengye oku baraamwite; 
Luke19:48 baabura eki baraakore, ahakuba abantu boona bakata omutima munonga aha bigambo bye." 
Luke20:1 Aha izooba rimwe, ku yaabaire naayegyesa abantu omuri hekalu, naabuurira engiri, abanyamurwa abakuru n'abahandiiki n'abakuru baija ah'ari," 
Luke20:2 baamugira bati: tugambire, ni bushoboorozi ki oburikukukoresa ebi, kandi n'oha owaakuhaire obushoboorozi obu?" 
Luke20:3 Yaabagarukamu ati: Reka naanye mbabuuze ekigambo kimwe, haza mungarukyemu." 
Luke20:4 Okubatiza kwa Yohaana kukaruga omu iguru nari omu bantu? 
Luke20:5 Baahanuura bonka nibagira bati: Ku turaagire tuti, Kukaruga omu iguru, naatugarukamu ati, Kandi shi, n'enki ekyabazibiire kumwikiriza?" 
Luke20:6 Kandi ku turaagire tuti, Kukaruga omu bantu, abantu boona nibaija kututeera amabaare, ahakuba nibahamiza kimwe ngu Yohaana akaba ari nabi." 
Luke20:7 Baagarukamu ngu tibarikumanya ei kwarugire. 
Luke20:8 Yesu nikwo kubagira ati: Naanye tindikwija kubagambira bushoboorozi oburikunkoresa ebi. 
Luke20:9 Yaatandika kucwera abantu enfumu egi, ati: Omuntu akabyara omusiri gw'emizaabibu, yaagutsigamu abahingi, yaagyenda omu nsi endiijo, yaamarayo ebiro bingi." 
Luke20:10 Obunaku bw'okwera ku bwahikire, yaatuma omuhuuku we ahari abo bahingi, ngu bamutwekyere aha byana by'emizaabibu. Abahingi baamuteera, baamubinga, yaagarukayo engaro nsha." 
Luke20:11 Yaagaruka yaabatumaho ondiijo muhuuku, nawe baamuteera, baamuhemangura, baamubinga, yaagarukayo engaro nsha." 
Luke20:12 Nabwo yaagaruka yaabatumaho owa kashatu; ogwo baamuhutaaza, baamunaga aheeru." 
Luke20:13 Mukama w'omusiri gw'emizaabiru yaagira ati: Ngire nta? Niinyija kutuma omwana wangye ou ndikukunda; shana baryamuha ekitiinisa. 
Luke20:14 Kwonka abahingi abo ku baamureebire, baacuma enaama bonka, nibagira bati: Ogu niwe muhunguzi; murekye tumwite, obuhunguzi bube obwaitu." 
Luke20:15 Baamubinga omu musiri gw'emizaabibu, baamwita. Mbwenu mukama w'ogwo musiri aryabagira ata?" 
Luke20:16 Aryaija, acwekyereze abo bahingi, n'ogwo musiri gw'emizaabibu aguhe abandi. Ku baakihuriire, baagira bati; Nikikabure!" 
Luke20:17 Yaabeetegyereza, yaagira ati: Ekyahandiikirwe eki nikishoboorora ki? Eibaare eri abombeki baayangire, Niryo ryahindukire erikuru ery'obuhamizo bw'enju." 
Luke20:18 Omuntu weena origwa aha ibaare eryo aryahendagurika; kwonka weena ou ririgwera riryamucwa obusaasingo. 
Luke20:19 Omu mwanya ogwo abhandiiki n'abanyamurwa abakuru baacwa obwengye kumukwata, kwonka baatiina abantu; ahabw'okuba bakamanya ngu nibo yaarengyeza." 
Luke20:20 Baamugumyaho eriisho, baatuma abantu nk'entatsi, ezaayegizire nk'abahikiriire, ngu bamwiheho ekigambo, babone kumuhayo omu mikono y'Omutegyeki n'omu bushoboorozi bwe." 
Luke20:21 Baamubuuza bati: Mwegyesa, nitumanya ngu ogamba kandi oyegyesa omuhanda gwa Ruhanga omu mazima." 
Luke20:22 Ebiragiro nibiikiriza okuha Kaisaari omushoro, nari tikwo?" 
Luke20:23 Ku yaamanyire oburyarya bwabo, yaabagira ati:" 
Luke20:24 Muunyorekye edenaari. Ekishushani n'ebihandiikirweho n'eby'oha? Baagira bati: N'ebya Kaisaari. 
Luke20:25 Yaabagira ati: Mbwenu nu ebya Kaisaari mubihe Kaisaari, n'ebya Ruhanga mubihe Ruhanga." 
Luke20:26 Tibaabaasa kumwihaho kigambo omuri ebyo omu maisho g'abantu; baatangaarira okugarukamu kwe, baahunama." 
Luke20:27 Bwanyima bamwe aha Basadukaayo, abahakana ku hatariho kuzooka, baija ah'ari; baamubuuza bati:" 
Luke20:28 Mwegyesa, Musa akatuhandiikira ngu, Mwene ishe w'omuntu, ku arishwera omukazi, yaafa atakazaire nawe, omurumuna ahungure omukazi ogwo, amumuzaarireho abaana." 
Luke20:29 Mbwenu hakaba hariho enyineemwe mushanju; mukuru waabo yaashwera omukazi, yaafa atakamuzaireho mwana;" 
Luke20:30 n'owa kabiri nikwo; 
Luke20:31 n'owa kashatu yaamuhungura, okuhitsya boona mushanju obu bahweireho batamuzaireho baana." 
Luke20:32 Bwanyima omukazi nawe yaabakurata, yaafa." 
Luke20:33 Mbwenu omu kuzooka aryaba muka oha? Ahabw'okuba boona mushanju bakamushwera. 
Luke20:34 Yesu yaabagira ati: Abaana b'obusingye obu bashwera kandi bahingirwa; 
Luke20:35 kwonka abarikuteekateekwa ku bashemereire kuhika omu busingye obwo n'aha kuzooka kw'abafu, tibarishwera, kandi tibarihingirwa." 
Luke20:36 Tibaribaasa kufa bwa kabiri, ahakuba baryashusha nka baamaraika; kandi n'abaana ba Ruhanga, ahabw'okuba n'abaana b'okuzooka." 
Luke20:37 Ebirikukwata aha by'okuzooka kw'abafu, na Musa akabyoreka omu byahandiikirwe aha byabaire aha Rushaka, ahu yaayeteire Mukama eiziina Ruhanga wa Abrahamu, Ruhanga wa Isaaka, kandi Ruhanga wa Yakobo." 
Luke20:38 Ruhanga ti Ruhanga w'abafu, kureka ow'abahuriire; ahakuba omu maisho ge boona baba abahuriire." 
Luke20:39 Bamwe aha bahandiiki baagarukamu bati: Mwegyesa, waagamba gye." 
Luke20:40 Okuruga aho tihaine waagarukire kumuturukirira kumubuuza ekindi. 
Luke20:41 Kandi yaababuuza ati: Nibabaasa bata kuhamya ngu Kristo n'Omwana wa Daudi? 
Luke20:42 Ahakuba Daudi we omu kitabo kya Zaaburi naagira ati: Mukama akagambira Mukama wangye ati: Shutama aha rubaju rwangye rwa buryo," 
Luke20:43 Okuhitsya obu ndigira abazigu baawe Akatebe k'ebigyere byawe. 
Luke20:44 Ahabw'ekyo Daudi, ku araabe amweta Mukama we, naabaasa ata kuba omwana we?" 
Luke20:45 Kandi yaagambira abeegi be, abantu boona bahuriire, ati:" 
Luke20:46 Mwerinde abahandiiki, abakunda kugyenda bajwaire ebijwaro biraingwa, n'okutangarirwa omu katare, n'ebitege by'ekitiinisa omuri sinagogi, n'emyanya y'ekitiinisa omu magyenyi," 
Luke20:47 abanyaga enju z'abafaakazi, kandi abarandagatana omu kushaba, haza nibaryarya; abo baryacwerwa orubanja orurikukira obuhango." 
Luke21:1 Yainamura amaisho, yaareeba abatungi abaabaire nibata ebiconco byabo omu ibiikiro." 
Luke21:2 Kandi yaareba n'omufaakazi omworo naatamu obusente bubiri. 
Luke21:3 Yaagira ati: Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Omufaakazi oriya omworo yaatamu bingi okukira bariya boona; 
Luke21:4 ahakuba bo baatamu aha bibashaagire; kwonka omufaakazi oriya omu bworo bwe yaatamu ebi aine byona, kandi niryo itungo rye heza." 
Luke21:5 Bamwe, ku baabaire nibagamba ahari hekalu, oku ecumirwe n'amabaare ag'obuguzi bwingi n'ebihairweyo, yaagira ati:" 
Luke21:6 Ebi byona ebi murikureeba, ebiro biryaija, tihariho ibaare eriritsigara riri aha rindi eritarinagwa hansi." 
Luke21:7 Baamubuuza bati: Mwegyesa, beitu ebyo biryabaho ryari? Kandi ni kamanyiso ki akaryoreka obunaku obu ebyo byona biribeeraho?" 
Luke21:8 Yaagira ati: Mwerinde, mutarihabisibwa; ahabw'okuba baingi baryaija omu iziina ryangye, nibagira bati: Niinye Kristo! Kandi bati: Obunaku buri haihi! Mutaribakuratira." 
Luke21:9 Kandi ku murihurira engamba n'okujagarara, mutaritiina; ahabw'okuba ebyo bishemereire kubanza kubaho; kwonka emperu terihika ahonaaho." 
Luke21:10 Yaagaruka yaabagira ati: Eihanga riryateera erindi ihanga n'obugabe buryateera obundi; 
Luke21:11 haryabaho emitsitsa y'amaani, n'enjara n'orufu omu myanya mingi; haryabaho ebirikutiinisa n'obumanyiso bukuru oburikuruga omu iguru." 
Luke21:12 Kwonka ebyo byona ku biriba bitakabaireho, baryabakwata, babahiigye, babaheyo omuri sinagogi n'omu bihome, babatware omu maisho g'abagabe n'abategyeki, nibabatura eiziina ryangye." 
Luke21:13 Obwo buryaba obunaku bwanyu bw'okuba abajurizi. 
Luke21:14 N'ahabw'ekyo eki mukuhamye omu mitima yaanyu, ku mutariteekateeka by'okwetonganira, obunaku butakahikire;" 
Luke21:15 ahabw'okuba ndyabaha orurimi n'obwengye, ebi abazigu baanyu bataribaasa kurwanisa n'obu kwakuba okuhakanisa." 
Luke21:16 Muryaheebwayo abazaire baanyu, na beene shoimwe, n'abanyaruganda, n'abanywani baanyu; baryabaitisa bamwe ahariimwe;" 
Luke21:17 muryayangwa abantu boona ahabw'eiziina ryangye. 
Luke21:18 Kwonka n'akashokye k'aha mitwe yaanyu tikaribura. 
Luke21:19 Omukwehangaana nimwo murijunira amagara gaanyu. 
Luke21:20 Ku murireeba Yerusaalemu eyehinguririziibwe engabo, obwo muryamanya ngu okuhwerekyerera kwayo kuri haihi." 
Luke21:21 Obwo abari Buyudaaya bahungire aha nshozi, n'abariba bari omu rurembo bashohore; n'abariba bari omu byaro batarirutaahamu." 
Luke21:22 Ahakuba ebiro ebyo nibyo biriba eby'okuhooreramu enzigu, ngu Ebyahandiikirwe byona bihikiirire." 
Luke21:23 Omu biro ebyo abariba baine enda n'abarikwontsya baryareeba enaku! Ahakuba omu nsi haryabamu obusaasi bwingi, kandi n'ekiniga aha ihanga eri." 
Luke21:24 Abantu baryaitwa rurara, baryanyagwa batwarwe omu mahanga goona; na Yerusaalemu eryaguma neeribatiirirwa abanyamahanga, okuhitsya obu obusingye bw'Abanyamahanga burihwaho." 
Luke21:25 Haryabaho obumanyiso aha izooba n'aha kwezi n'aha nyonyoozi, kandi aha nsi amahanga garyashaasha, gashobeirwe ahabw'okuhoorera kw'enyanja n'ebingonzi;" 
Luke21:26 abantu bahahaaze emitima ahabw'obwoba n'okutegyereza ekirikwenda kwija aha nsi; ahabw'okuba eby'amaani eby'omu iguru biryatengyetsibwa. 
Luke21:27 Bwanyima y'ebyo baryareeba Omwana w'omuntu naizira omu kicu aine obushoboorozi n'ekitiinisa kingi. 
Luke21:28 Kandi ebi ku biritandika kubaho, mureebe ahaiguru, mwimutsye emitwe yaanyu, ahakuba okucungurwa kwanyu kuryaba kuri haihi." 
Luke21:29 Yaabacwera enfumu ati: Mwetegyereze omutiini n'emiti endiijo yoona; 
Luke21:30 ku etooka amababi, mwagareeba, mumanya ku obunaku bw'okugyesha buri haihi." 
Luke21:31 N'ahabw'ekyo naimwe ku murireeba ebyo nibibaho, mumanye ngu obukama bwa Ruhanga buri haihi." 
Luke21:32 Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Obusingye obu tiburihwaho, ebyo byona bitakabaireho." 
Luke21:33 Eiguru n'ensi biryahwaho, kwonka ebigambo byangye tibirihwaho." 
Luke21:34 Kwonka mwerinde, emitima yaanyu etakaaremesibwa omururu n'obusinzi n'amaganya g'amagara aga, ekiro ekyo kikabagwaho mutakimanyire, nk'orugogo;" 
Luke21:35 ahakuba kiryahika aha bantu boona abatwire omu nsi yoona. 
Luke21:36 Mugume nimureeba obutwire bwona, nimushaba ngu mubaase kukira ebyo byona ebiribaho, n'okwemerera omu maisho g'Omwana w'omuntu." 
Luke21:37 Kandi buri izooba akaba ayegyesa omuri hekalu; omu mwabazyo araara omu kibungo kya Zeituuni; 
Luke21:38 omu kasheeshe munonga abantu boona bamushanga omuri hekalu kumuhurira. 
Luke22:1 Kandi obugyenyi bw'Emigaati etatumbisiibwe oburikwetwa Okuhingurwaho bukaba nibwenda kuhika. 
Luke22:2 Abanyamurwa abakuru n'abahandiiki baacwa obwengye oku baramwite, ahakuba bakaba nibatiina abantu," 
Luke22:3 Sitaane yaataaha omuri Yuda, orikwetwa Iskaryota, owaabaire ari omwe ahari ikumi na babiri," 
Luke22:4 Yaagyenda yaahanuura n'abanyamurwa abakuru n'abaserukare, oku araamubareebeze." 
Luke22:5 Baahsemererwa, baaraganisa kumuha empiiha." 
Luke22:6 Yaikiriza, yaasherura oburyo bw'okumubareebeza, ahu omutwe gw'abantu gutari." 
Luke22:7 Kandi ekiro ky'Emigaati etatumbisiibwe kyahika; nikyo kiro ekyabaire kitambirwaho omwana gw'entaama gw'Okuhingurwaho. 
Luke22:8 Yesu yaatuma Petero na Yohaana naagira ati: Mugyende, mututebeekanisize Okuhingurwaho, turye." 
Luke22:9 Baamubuuza bati: Nooyenda ngu tukutebeekanisize nkahi? 
Luke22:10 Yaabagira ati: Reeba, ku muraataahe omu rurembo, nimwija kubuganwa omushaija oyekoreire enjoga y'amaizi; mumukurate omu nju ei araataahemu." 
Luke22:11 Mugire nyineeka muti: Omwegyesa yaakutumaho, naakubuuza ngu; Ekishengye ky'abagyenyi kirahi, omu araariire Okuhingurwaho n'abeegi be?" 
Luke22:12 Naija kubooreka ekishengye kihango eky'ahaiguru ekicumirwe; mutubonereze omwo. 
Luke22:13 Baagyenda, baashanga biri nk'oku yaabambira; baatebeekanisa Okuhingurwaho." 
Luke22:14 Eshaaha ku zaahikire, yaashutama aha by'okurya hamwe n'entumwa." 
Luke22:15 Yaabagira ati: Nyetengire munonga kuriira hamwe naimwe Okuhingurwaho oku, ntakabonabonesiibwe;" 
Luke22:16 ahakuba nimbagambira nti: Tindirya Kuhingurwaho okundi, okuhitsya obu kurihikiirizibwa omu bukama bwa Ruhanga." 
Luke22:17 Yaakwata ekikopo; yaaherize kusiima, yaagira ati: Mukwate eki, mukibagane," 
Luke22:18 ahakuba nimbagambira nti: Tindinywa aha byana by'emizaabibu, okuruga hati okuhitsya obu obukama bwa Ruhanga buriija." 
Luke22:19 Yaakwata omugaati; ku yaaherize kusiima yaagubega, yaagubaha, naagira ati; Ogu n'omubiri gwangye, ogwaheebwayo ahabwanyu; mugume mukore mutyo okuunyijukiraho." 
Luke22:20 Ku baaherize kurya, yaakwata atyo n'ekikopo, yaagira ati: Ekikopo eki niyo ndagaano ensya ehamibwa eshagama yangye, esheesheka ahabwanyu." 
Luke22:21 Reeba, omukono gw'orikundeebya guri hamwe naanye aha meeza;" 
Luke22:22 buzimazima Omwana w'omuntu naagyenda, nk'oku kyamuteekateekyeirwe; kwonka orikumureebya aryareeba enaku!" 
Luke22:23 Baatandika kubuuzana bonka ngu, N'oha aharibo orikwenda kukora ekyo." 
Luke22:24 Kandi bakagira empaka, ngu n'oha omuribo orikuteekateekwaho kuba mukuru." 
Luke22:25 Yaabagambira ati: Abagabe b'Abanyamahanga babategyeka; n'abaine obushoboorozi aharibo beetwa Abahwezi b'abantu. 
Luke22:26 Kwonka imwe mutariba mutyo; omukuru omuriimwe abe nk'omuto; kandi orikutegyeka abe nk'orikuheereza. 
Luke22:27 Beitu omukuru n'oha, oshutami aha by'okurya, nari orikuheereza? T'ogwo oshutami aha by'okurya? Kwonka nyowe ndi ahagati yaanyu nk'omuheereza." 
Luke22:28 Kandi niimwe abaagumisiriize naanye omu bi naagyeziibwe; 
Luke22:29 nk'oku Tata yambiikiire obukama, naanye mbubabiikiire," 
Luke22:30 ngu muriire, kandi munywere aha meeza yangye omu bukama bwangye; kandi ngu mushutame aha bitebe by'obugabe, mucwere enganda za Israeli ikumi na ibiri emanja." 
Luke22:31 Kandi Mukama waitu yaagira ati: Simooni, Simooni, Sitaane akashaba ngu abashungure nk'oburo;" 
Luke22:32 kwonka nyowe nkakushabira, ngu okwikiriza kwawe kutahwaho; kandi iwe, ku oriheza kuhinduka, ohamye ab'eishe-emwe." 
Luke22:33 Yaamugarukamu ati: Mukama wangye, nyeteekateekire kugyenda naiwe omu kihome, n'omu kufa." 
Luke22:34 Yesu yaagira ati: Ninkugambira iwe Petero, eri izooba enkoko terikwija kugamba, otakeehakanie kashatu ku otarikummanya." 
Luke22:35 Yaababuuza ati: Ku naabatumire mutaine nshaho y'empiiha, nari efurebe, n'obu zaakuba enkaito, mweine eki mwabuzirwe? Baagarukamu ngu, Ngaaha." 
Luke22:36 Yaabagira ati: Mbwenu hati, oine enshaho y'empiiha, agihagatire, n'oine efurebe atyo; kandi otabiine, atunde omunagiro gwe, agure rurara." 
Luke22:37 Ahakuba nimbagambira nti: Ekyahandiikirwe eki kishemerire kuhikiirira ahariinye ngu, Akabarirwa ahmwe n'abasiisi, ahabw'okuba ebyampandiikirweho nibyenda kuhika." 
Luke22:38 Baamugira bati: Mukama waitu, reeba zaarurara ibiri nzizi! Yaabagira ati: Ka bihwere aho!" 
Luke22:39 Yaashohora, yaatemba aha rushozi rwa Zeituuni, nk'omucwe gwe oku gwabaire guri; abeegi be baamukuratira." 
Luke22:40 Ku yaahikire okwo, yaabagira ati: Mushabe murekye kuza omu kwohibwa." 
Luke22:41 Yaabeeshorooramu hakye nk'aharikurekyerwa eibaare; yaatsimba amaju, yaashaba ati:" 
Luke22:42 Taata, ku oraabe noikiriza, onyiheho ekikopo eki; kwonka kirekye kuba nk'oku ndikwenda, kureka nka Iwe oku orikwenda." 
Luke22:43 Maraika yaamweyoreka naaruga omu iguru, yaamugumya." 
Luke22:44 Ku yaasaasire munonga, yaayezirika kushaba; etuutu ye yaashusha nk'amatondo mahango g'eshagama omu kuragarika ahansi." 
Luke22:45 Ku yaaherize kushaba, yaimuka, yaija aha beegi be, yaashanga bagwejegyeire ahabw'okuganya;" 
Luke22:46 yaababuuza ati: Ahabw'enki mugwejegyeire? Mwimukye, mushabe, murekye kuza omu kwohibwa." 
Luke22:47 Ku yaabaire naakigamba, haija omutwe gw'abantu, n'ogwo orikwetwa Yuda, omwe ahari ikumi na babiri, abeebembeire; yairira haihi Yesu kumnywegyera." 
Luke22:48 Yesu yaamubuuza ati: Yuda, noorebya Omwana w'omuntu n'okunywegyera?" 
Luke22:49 Abaabaire bamuhereire, ku baareebire ebyaza kubaho, baabuuza bati: Mukama waitu, tubateme na zaarurara?" 
Luke22:50 Omwe aharibo yaatema omuhuuku w'omunyamurwa omukuru, yaamucwaho okutu kwa buryo." 
Luke22:51 Yesu yaagira ati: Murekyere aho! Yaamukora aha kutu, yaamukiza." 
Luke22:52 Yesu yaabuuza abanyamurwa abakuru n'abakuru b'abaserukare ba hekalu, n'abandi bakuru, abamuhururiire, ati: Mukampururiire nk'oku bahururira omwambuzi na zaarurara n'ebikoni?" 
Luke22:53 Obu naabaire ntuura naimwe omuri hekalu, timurantaireho ngaro kunkwata; kwonka obunaku obu n'obwanyu, kandi n'obw'obushoboorozi bw'omwirima." 
Luke22:54 Baamukwata, baamutwara, baamutaasya omu nju y'omunyamurwa omukuru; kandi Petero yaamukuratira naamugyenda hare." 
Luke22:55 Ku baaherize kuhemba omuriro omu kibuga ahagati, baashutama hamwe ahansi, na Petero yaashutama ahagati yaabo." 
Luke22:56 Omuzaana yaamureeba ashutami aharikuhweza; ku yaamwetegyereize, yaagira ati: Omushaija ogu nawe abaire ari hamwe na Yesu." 
Luke22:57 Petero yaayehakana naagira ati: Mukazi 'we, tindikumumanya." 
Luke22:58 Ku hahingwireho akaanya kakye, ondiijo yaamureeba, yaagira ati: Naiwe ori owaabo. Petero yaagira ati: Mushaija 'we, tindi waabo." 
Luke22:59 Kandi bwanyima y'eshaaha nk'emwe n'ondiijo yaamwomesereza ati: Buzima omushaija ogu yaaba ari hamwe nawe; ahabw'okuba n'Omunyagalilaya. 
Luke22:60 Kwonka Petero yaagira ati: Mushaija 'we, tindikumanya ki orikugamba. Ahonaaho, ku yaabaire naakigamba, enkoko yaagamba." 
Luke22:61 Mukama waitu yaahinduka, yaareeba Petero, Petero yaijuka ekigambo kya Mukama waitu, oku amugizire ati: Enkoko etakagambire, noija kuunyehankana kashatu." 
Luke22:62 Yaashohora aheeru, yaarira munonga." 
Luke22:63 Abashaija abaabaire bakwaitwe Yesu, baamuteerera enaku, baamuteera." 
Luke22:64 Baamukoma aha maisho, baamugira bati: Gamba; owaakuteera n'oha?" 
Luke22:65 Baamugambaho n'ebindi bingi, nibamujuma." 
Luke22:66 Ku bwaseesire, omutwe gw'abakuru b'eihanga eryo baateerana hamwe n'abanyamurwa abakuru n'abahandiiki; baamutwara omu ishengyero ryabo, nibagira bati:" 
Luke22:67 Ku oraabe ori Kristo, tugambire. Yaabagarukamu ati: N'obu ndaabagambire, timurikwija kwikiriza;" 
Luke22:68 kandi n'obu naakubabuuza, timukangarukamu." 
Luke22:69 Kwonka okuruga hati Omwana w'omuntu aryashutama aha rubaju rwa buryo rw'Obushoboorozi bwa Ruhanga. 
Luke22:70 Boona baamubuuza bati: Iwe shi, ori Omwana wa Ruhanga? Yaabagarukamu ati: Ndi We nk'oku mwagamba." 
Luke22:71 Baagira bati: Kandi nitukyendera ki obwamushinja obundi? Ahabw'okuba itwe twayehuririra ebyaruga omu kanwa ke. 
Luke23:1 Omutwe gwabo boona baimuka, baamutwara omu maisho ga Pilaato." 
Luke23:2 Baatandika kumutabaariza, nibagira bati: omuntu ogu tukamureeba naahabisa eihanga ryaitu, naazibira abantu kushorera Kaisaari, naayehamya ku ari Kristo Omukama." 
Luke23:3 Pilaato yaamubuuza ati: Weeza ori Omugabe w'Abayudaaya? Yaamugarukamu ati: Nikwo kiri nk'oku waagamba. 
Luke23:4 Pilaato yaagira abanyamurwa abakuru n'omutwe gw'abantu ati: Tindikureeba rubanja aha mushaija ogu. 
Luke23:5 Kwonka bo baayeyongyera kuhamisiriza, nibagira bati: Naagomesa abantu, naayegyesa omuri Buyudaaya yoona, okuruga Galilaaya nangwa n'okuhika omu mwanya ogu." 
Luke23:6 Pilaato ku yaahuriire atyo, yaababuuza omushaija ogwo ku araabe ari owa Galilaaya." 
Luke23:7 Ku yaamanyire ngu n'ow'omu butegyeki bwa Heroode, yaamutweka ahari Heroode, owaabaire ari Yerusaalemu omu biro ebyo." 
Luke23:8 Heroode ku yaareebire Yesu, yaashemererwa munonga, ahabw'okuba okuruga kare akaba ayetenga kumureeba; ahakuba akaba yaamuhuriireho, yaaguma n'amatsiko g'okureeba naakora eky'okureeberaho." 
Luke23:9 Yaamubuuza ebigambo bingi; kwonka We tiyaamugarukamu. 
Luke23:10 Abanyamurwa abakuru n'abahandiiki baayemerera aho, nibamutabaariza n'amaani." 
Luke23:11 Heroose n'abaserukare be baamugaya, baamuteerera enaku, baamujweka ebijwaro ebirikwengyengyeta, yaamugarurira Pilaato." 
Luke23:12 Ahari ekyo kiro Heroode na Pilaato baihaho omukago, ahabw'okuba kare bakaba nibangana." 
Luke23:13 Pilaato nikwo kuteerana abanyamurwa abakuru n'abategyeki n'abandi bantu," 
Luke23:14 akabagira ati: Mwandeetera omushaija ogu, ngu ahabisa abantu; nyowe ahabwangye ku naamubuuriza munonga omu maisho gaanyu, tinaamureebaho rubanja omuri ebyo ebi mumutabaaririize;" 
Luke23:15 nangwa n'obu yaakuba Heroode, ahakuba nawe yaamutugarurira. Nimureeba ku atakozire ekishemereire kumwitsa." 
Luke23:16 N'ahabw'ekyo naaza kumuteera, mmurekure. [" 
Luke23:17 Ekyo akakigamba, ahabw'okuba akaba ashemereire kubabohoororera embohe emwe aha bugyenyi obwo.]" 
Luke23:18 Boona baayombera hamwe, bati: Ihaho omushaija ogu, oturekurire Barabba." 
Luke23:19 (Niwe mushaija owaabaire atairwe omu kihome, atuzirwe obugomi obwabaire buri omu rurembo, kandi n'obwitsi)" 
Luke23:20 Pilaato, ahabw'okwenda kurekura Yesu, yaagaruka yaagamba nabo;" 
Luke23:21 kwonka baayomba munonga, nibagira bati: Mubambe, omubambe aha musharaba!" 
Luke23:22 Yaabagambira obwa kashatu, naabagira ati: Ahanki? Ni kicumuro ki omuntu ogu eki acumwire? Tinaamureebaho rubanja orushemereire kumwitsa; n'ahabw'ekyo naaza kumuteera, mmurekure." 
Luke23:23 Baamugyemesereza nibayomba munonga, nibamushaba ngu abambwe; amaraka gaabo gaarugaho gaamuremesa." 
Luke23:24 Pilaato nikwo kucwa orubanja ngu eki barikufa kibe nikyo kyakorwa. 
Luke23:25 Yaarekura omushaija ou bamushabire, owaabaire atairwe omu kihome ahabw'obugomi n'obwitsi; kandi yaahayo Yesu, ku bamukora nk'oku barikwenda." 
Luke23:26 Ku baabaire nibamutwara, baakwata omushaija orikwetwa Simooni owa Kureene, owaabaire naaruga omu byaro, baamukorera omusharaba, ngu agwekorere akuratiire Yesu." 
Luke23:27 Kandi omutwe muhango gw'abantu gwamukuratira; gurimu n'abakazi nibamucurira, nibeemaamaata." 
Luke23:28 Yesu yaabahindukira, yaagira ati: Imwe abaishiki ba Yerusaalemu, mutandirira, kureka mweririre n'abaana baanyu." 
Luke23:29 Ahabw'okuba ebiro biryahika ebi barigiriramu bati: Baine omugisha abakazi engumba, n'enda ezitakazaarahoga, n'amabeere agatakontsyaga." 
Luke23:30 Obwo baryatandika kweshengyereza enshozi nibagira bati: Mutugwere, n'ebibungo bati, Mutushwekyerere." 
Luke23:31 Mbwenu ku baraabe nibagira bati omuti omubisi, ogwomire gwo baryagugira bata?" 
Luke23:32 Kandi hakaba hariho abandi babiri, abaabaire bari enkozi z'ebibi, abaatwairwe kwitwa nawe." 
Luke23:33 Ku baahikire aha mwanya ogurikwetwa Empanga y'omutwe, aho niho baamubambire hamwe n'ezo nkozi z'ebibi, omwe aha rubaju rwe rwa buryo, n'ondiijo aha rwa bumosho." 
Luke23:34 Yesu yaagira ati: Taata, obasaasire, ahakuba tibarikumanya ki barikukora. Baabagana ebijwaro bye, nibabiteerera enteenyu." 
Luke23:35 Abantu baayemerera aho nibashamaara; n'abategyeki baamutsyorera nibagira bati: Akajuna abandi; ku araabe ari Kristo owa Ruhanga, ou yaatooraine, naayejune." 
Luke23:36 N'abaserukare nabo baamutsyorera, baija, baamuheereza viinyo erikushaarira," 
Luke23:37 nibagira bati: Ku oraabe ori Omugabe w'Abayudaaya, yejune." 
Luke23:38 Kandi ahaiguru ye hakaba hariho ekirangiriro ekihandiikirwe kiti: OGU N'OMUGABE W'ABAYUDAAYA. 
Luke23:39 Omwe aha nkozi z'ebibi ezaabambirwe yaamuteerera enaku naagira ati: Tiiwe Kristo? Yejune, naitwe otujune." 
Luke23:40 Kwonka ondiijo yaagarukamu naamuteisa ati: Na Ruhanga torikumutiina, ahabw'okushushanisa nawe ekiheneso?" 
Luke23:41 Itwe tukishemereire, ahabw'okuba tutuzirwe ebi twakozire; kwonka ogu we taine ki acumwire." 
Luke23:42 Yaagira ati: Yesu, ku oriija omu bukama bwawe, onyijukye." 
Luke23:43 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Buzimazima ninkugambira nti: Eri izooba noija kuguma naanye omuri Paradiiso. 
Luke23:44 Eshaaha ku zaabaire ziri nka mukaaga, omwirima mwingi gwashweka ensi yoona okuhitsya aha shaaha ya mwenda." 
Luke23:45 Omukingo gw'omuri hekalu gwataagukira ahagati. 
Luke23:46 Yesu yaagamba n'eiraka rihango naagira ati: Taata, naata omwoyo gwangye omu mikono yaawe. Ku yaaherize kugamba ekyo, yaahayo amagara ge." 
Luke23:47 Omukuru w'abaserukare, ku yaareebire ekyabaho, yaahimbisa Ruhanga naagira ati: Buzima omushaija ogu yaaba ari omuntu ohikiriire." 
Luke23:48 Kandi abantu boona, abaabaire bateeraniire aho kushamaara, ku baareebire ebyabaho, baagaruka nibeemamaata." 
Luke23:49 Bagyenzi be boona n'abakazi abaamukuratiire okuruga Galilaaya, baayemerera hangahari, nibabireeba." 
Luke23:50 Kandi hakaba hariho omushaija orikwetwa Yosefu, owaabaire ari omujwekyerwa omu ishengyero, omuntu murungi kandi ohikiriire." 
Luke23:51 (We tarakwataniise nabo omu kuhanuura kwabo n'omuri ekyo eki bakozire.) Akaba ari owa Arimasaaya, tauni y'Abayudaaya, kandi akaba atuura ategyereize, obukama bwa Ruhanga." 
Luke23:52 Omushaija ogwo yaaza owa Pilaato, yaashaba omutumbi gwa Yesu." 
Luke23:53 Yaaguhanura, yaaguzinga omu mwenda gwa bafuta, yaagurambika omu kituuro, ekyarimirwe omu rukiri, ekitakaziikwamuga muntu." 
Luke23:54 Ekiro ekyo kikaba kiri eky'Okweteguura; kandi Sabato ekaba neetandika. 
Luke23:55 N'abakazi, abaarugire Galilaaya hamwe nawe, baabakuratira, baareeba ekituuro, n'omutumbi gwe oku gwateebwamu." 
Luke23:56 Baagarukayo, baateekateeka eby'emigaju n'amajuta. Ahari Sabato baahuumura, nk'oku ekiragiro kiri." 
Luke24:1 Aha kiro ky'okubanza omuri saabiiti, omushekye nigujuguta, abakazi baaza aha kituuro baine emigaju ei baateekateekire." 
Luke24:2 Baashanga eibaare rikumbagaziibwe okuruga aha kituuro. 
Luke24:3 Kwonka ku baatahiremu, tibaashangamu mutumbi gwa Mukama waitu Yesu." 
Luke24:4 Ku baabaire bakishobeirwe ahabw'ekyo, reeba, abashaija babiri baayemerera haihi nabo, bajwaire ebijwaro birikumurinkana." 
Luke24:5 Ku baayekangire, bainika emitwe n'amaisho gaabo ahansi, abashaija abo baababuuza bati: Ahabw'enki nimusherurira ohuriire omu bafu?" 
Luke24:6 Tari aha; azookire. Mwijukye ebi yaabagambiire akiri Galilaaya," 
Luke24:7 naagira ati: Omwana w'omuntu ashemereire kuheebwayo omu mikono y'abantu abanyabibi, n'okubambwa aha musharaba, kandi aha kiro kya kashatu okuzooka." 
Luke24:8 Baijuka ebigambo bye. 
Luke24:9 Baaruga aha ktuuro, baagarukayo; ebyo byona baabigambira bari ikumi n'omwe n'abandi boona." 
Luke24:10 Kandi abakazi abaabigambiire entumwa ni Mariamu Magadaleene, na Yoana, na Mariamu nyina wa Yakobo, n'abandi bakazi abaabaire bari hamwe nabo." 
Luke24:11 Kwonka ebigambo ebyo byabasusira nk'eby'okugana ebitaine mugasho, tibaabiikiriza." 
Luke24:12 Bwanyima Petero yaimuka, yairuka aha kituuro, yainama, yaaringuriza, yaareeba emyenda ya bafuta eri yonka; yaagaruka omuka, naatangaarira ebibaireho." 
Luke24:13 Eryo izooba babiri aharibo bakaba nibagyenda, nibaza omu kirorero ekirikwetwa Emau, ekyabaire kiri nka mahiro mushanju okuruga Yerusaalemu;" 
Luke24:14 nibagaaniira ahari ebyo byona ebibaireho. 
Luke24:15 Ku baabaire nibagaaniira, nibabuuzana, Yesu we wenka yairira haihi, yaagyenda nabo." 
Luke24:16 Kwonka amaisho gaabo gaakingirwa ngu barekye kumumanya. 
Luke24:17 Yaababuuza ati: Ni bigambo ki ebi murikugaaniira nimugyenda? Baayemerera, nibareebeka baine enaku." 
Luke24:18 Omwe aharibo orikwetwa Kuleopa yaagarukamu naamubuuza ati: Omu bagyenyi boona abari omuri Yerusaalemu, niiwe wenka otarikumanya ebibaireho omu biro ebi?" 
Luke24:19 Yaabagarukamu ati: Ni bigambo ki? Baamugira bati: Ebya Yesu owa Nazareesi, owaabaire ari nabi w'amaani omu bi yaabaire akora n'ebi yaabaire agamba, omu maisho ga Ruhanga n'ag'abantu boona." 
Luke24:20 Mbwenu abanyamurwa abakuru n'abategyeki baitu bamuhaireyo okucwerwa orubanja rw'okufa, baamubamba aha musharaba." 
Luke24:21 Haza itwe tukaba twine amatsiko ngu niwe aricungura Abaisraeli; kandi hamwe n'ebi byona, hati n'ekiro kya kashatu okwiha ahi ebi bibeereireho." 
Luke24:22 Kandi n'abakazi bamwe ab'owaitu abaaguruka kare munonga kuza aha kituuro, ku baija, baatutangaaza nibagira ngu baashanga omutumbi gwe gutarimu," 
Luke24:23 kandi ngu, baabonekyerwa baamaraika abaabagira ngu ariho ahuriire." 
Luke24:24 Na bagyenzi baitu abamwe baaza aha kituuro, baashanga biri nk'oku abakazi baagamba; kwonka We tibaamureeba." 
Luke24:25 Yesu yaabagambira ati: Imwe bashema 'mwe, ab'emitima etarikurahuka kwikiriza byona ebi baanabi baagambire!" 
Luke24:26 Timurikumanya ngu Kristo kikamushemerera kubonabonesibwa ebi byona n'okutaaha omu kitiinisa kye? 
Luke24:27 Yaatandikira ahari Musa na baanabi boona, yaabashobororera omu Byahandiikirwe byona ebyamuhandiikirweho." 
Luke24:28 Batyo bairira haihi n'ekirorero, ei baabaire nibaza; We yaashusha nk'orikwenda kwogaho;" 
Luke24:29 kwonka bo baamugyemesereza nibagira bati: Guma naitwe, ahabw'okuba bwaza kwira, n'eizooba ryarengyire. Atyo yaataaha omu nju yaabo kuguma nabo." 
Luke24:30 Ku yaabaire ashutami nabo aha by'okurya, yaakwata omugaati, yaagusiimira, yaagubega, yaagubaheereza." 
Luke24:31 Amaisho gaabo gaiguka, baamumanya; yaaburira aho, tibaamureeba." 
Luke24:32 Baagambirana bati: Emitima yaitu tiyaashashaanuka, obu yaaba naagamba naitwe omu muhanda, naatushuururira Ebyahandiikirwe?" 
Luke24:33 Omu shaaha egyo baimuka, baagaruka Yerusaalemu baashanga bari ikumi n'omwe bateeraine na bagyenzi baabo abandi:" 
Luke24:34 baahurira nibahamya bati: Mukama waitu Yesu yaazooka, kandi yaabonekyera na Simooni." 
Luke24:35 N'abo ababiri baabatekyerereza eby'omu muhanda, kandi ku baamumanyira aha kubega omugaati." 
Luke24:36 Ku baabaire nibagamba ebyo, Yesu we wenka yaayemerera ahagati yaabo, yaabaigira ati: Mugire obusingye!" 
Luke24:37 Baayekanga, baatiina, baateekateeka ngu baareeba omuzimu." 
Luke24:38 Yaababuuza ati: N'enki ekyabeemereza emitima, kandi n'okubanganisa kwaizira ki omu migima yaanyu?" 
Luke24:39 Mureebe engaro zangye n'ebigyere byangye, mumanye ngu niinye buzima; munkoreho, mureebe, ahakuba omuzimu tigugira mubiri n'amagufa, nk'ebi mwandeeba nabyo." 
Luke24:40 Ku yaaherize kugamba ebyo, yaabooreka engaro ze n'ebigyere bye." 
Luke24:41 Ku baabaire batakaikiriize ahabw'okushemererwa n'okutangaara, yaabagira ati: Beitu aha mwineho eky'okurya?" 
Luke24:42 Baamuha ekicweka ky'eky'enyanja kitarikire; 
Luke24:43 yaakyakiira, yaakiriira omu maisho gaabo." 
Luke24:44 Yaabagira ati: Ebi nibyo bigambo byangye ebi naabagambiire nkiri hamwe naimwe, ngu byona bishemereire kuhikiirizibwa ebyampandiikirweho omu biragiro bya Musa n'omu bya baanabi n'omuri zaaburi." 
Luke24:45 Atyo yaashuuruura obwengye bwabo, ngu bashoborokyerwe Ebyahandiikirwe;" 
Luke24:46 yaabagira ati: Oku nikwo kyahandiikirwe ngu Kristo ashemereire kubonabonesibwa, n'okuzooka omu bafu aha kiro kya kashatu;" 
Luke24:47 kandi ngu okweteisa n'okwihwaho ebibi bishemereire kubuurirwa omu iziina rye omu mahanga goona, okutandikira Yerusaalemu." 
Luke24:48 Imwe muri baakareebi b'ebigambo ebyo. 
Luke24:49 Kandi reeba, niinyija kubooherereza eki Tata yaaraganiise; kwonka mugume omu rurembo okuhitsya obu murijwekwa amaani agarikuruga omu iguru." 
Luke24:50 Yaabeebembera, yaabahitsya haihi na Besania, yaimutsya emikono ye, yaabaha omugisha." 
Luke24:51 Ku yaabaire naakibaha omugisha, yaabatsigaho, yaatwarwa omu iguru." 
Luke24:52 Baamuramya, baagaruka Yerusaalemu n'okushemererwa kwingi;" 
Luke24:53 kandi obutoosha baaguma nibaija omuri hekalu, nibasiima Ruhanga." 
John1:1 Bwa mbere na mbere hakaba hariho Kigambo; Kigambo ogwo akaba atuura na Ruhanga; kandi Kigambo akaba ari Ruhanga. 
John1:2 Ogwo omu kutandika akaba ariho na Ruhanga; 
John1:3 ebintu byona niwe yaabihangire, kandi omu byahangirwe byona tihariho kintu na kimwe eki atarahangire." 
John1:4 Amagara gakaba gari Omushana gw'abantu. 
John1:5 Omushana ogwo gujwa omu mwirima, kandi omwirima tigukaguraazaga." 
John1:6 Hakaija omuntu owaatumirwe Ruhanga, orikwetwa Yohaana." 
John1:7 Ogwo akaija kuba kareebi ngu ahamye eby'Omushana, abantu boona baikirize ahabwe." 
John1:8 We akaba atari Mushana ogwo; kwonka akaija kuhamya eby'Omushana. 
John1:9 Hakaba hariho Omushana ogw'amazima, ogujwera abantu boona, ogwabaire nigwija omu nsi." 
John1:10 Akaba ari omu nsi, kandi ensi niwe yaagihangire, kwonka ensi teramumanyire." 
John1:11 Akaija owe, abaabaire bari abe tibaamwakiira;" 
John1:12 kwonka boona abaamwakiire, nibo abaikiriize eiziina rye, akabaha obushoboorozi okuba abaana ba Ruhanga." 
John1:13 Abo tibarazairwe shagama, n'obu kwakuba okukunda kw'omuntu; bakazaarwa Ruhanga." 
John1:14 Kigambo ogwo yaaba omuntu, yaatuura naitwe, twareeba ekitiinisa kye, ekitiinisa ky'eky'Omwana omwe nyamunegyere, owaarugire ahari Isheboona, aijwire embabazi n'amazima." 
John1:15 Yohaana yaamuhamya naagambira ahaiguru ati: Ogu niwe naagambireho nti: Orikwija enyima yangye niwe arikunkira, ahabw'okuba akaba ariho ntakabaireho." 
John1:16 Kandi ebiri omuriwe byona nibyo twahairweho twena, n'embabazi ezongyererwa aha zindi." 
John1:17 Ahakuba Ebiragiro bikareetwa Musa; embabazi n'amazima byo byareetwa Yesu Kristo. 
John1:18 Okuruga iranaira tihariho orareebire Ruhanga; Omwana we omwe nyamunegyere, ori omu kifuba kya Ishe, niwe yaamumanyiise." 
John1:19 Oku nikwo kuhamya kwa Yohaana, obu Abayudaaya baamutumaho abanyamurwa n'Abaleevi abaarugire Yerusaalemu kumubuuza bati: Ori oha?" 
John1:20 Yaabagambira butunu, atarikwehakana, naahamya ati: Nyowe tindi Kristo." 
John1:21 Baamubuuza bati: Mbwenu shi ori Eliya? Yaabagarukamu ati: Tindi we. Bati, Ori nabi ori? Yaabagarukamu ati: Ngaaha!" 
John1:22 Nikyo baamubuuriize bati: Iwe shi, ori oha, tubone kugarukamu abatutumire? Nooyegamba ota?" 
John1:23 Yaagira ati: Ndi eiraka ery'orikugambira omu ihamba, naagira ati: Mugorore omuhanda gwa Mukama, nk'oku nabi Isaaya yaagambire." 
John1:24 Abaatumirwe abo bakaba batumirwe Abafarisaayo. 
John1:25 Baamubuuza bati: Ahabw'enki iwe noobatiza, ku oraabe otari Kristo, otari Eliya, nari shi nabi ori?" 
John1:26 Yohaana yaabagarukamu ati: Nyowe mbatiza n'amaizi; kwonka omuriimwe heemereiremu ou mutarikumanya; 
John1:27 niwe arikwija enyima yangye; tinshemereire kuyuzya orukoba rw'enkaito ze. 
John1:28 Ebyo bikabaho omuri Besania seeri ya Yorudani, ahu Yohaana yaabaire naabatiriza." 
John1:29 Ku bwaseesire, yaareeeba Yesu naija ah'ari, yaagira ati: Reeba, Omwana gw'entaama wa Ruhanga, orikwihaho ekibi ky'ensi!" 
John1:30 Ogu niwe naagambireho nti: Enyima yangye nihaija omuntu orikunkira, ahabw'okuba akaba ariho ntakabaireho." 
John1:31 Kandi nyowe ahabwangye tindamumanyire; kwonka nkaija nimbatiza n'amaizi, ngu abone kushuuruurirwa Abaisraeli." 
John1:32 Kandi Yohaana yaahamya naagira ati: Nkareeba Omwoyo naashuuma okuruga omu iguru nk'enkombe, yaamugumaho." 
John1:33 Nkaba ntamumanyire; kwonka Owantumire kubatiza n'amaizi, niwe yangambiire ati: Ou orireeba Omwoyo naashumaho, akamugumaho, Ogwo niwe abatiza n'Omwoyo Orikwera." 
John1:34 Naanye naareeba, naahamya nti, Ogwo n'Omwana wa Ruhanga." 
John1:35 Kandi ku bwaseesire, Yohaana akaba ayemereire n'abeegi be babiri," 
John1:36 yaareeba Yesu naagyenda, yaagira ati: Reeba, Omwana gw'entaama wa Ruhanga!" 
John1:37 Abeegi abo bombi baamuhurira naagamba, baakuratira Yesu." 
John1:38 Yesu yaahinduka, yaareeba bamukaratiire, yaababuuza ati: Nimwenda ki? Baamugarukamu bati: Rabi, (amakuru gaakyo ngu, Mwegyesa,) nooraara hi?" 
John1:39 Yaabagira ati: Mwije muhareebe. Baija, baareeba ahu yaabaire naaraara, baaguma nawe ekyo kiro, ahakuba eshaaha zikaba ziri nka ikumi." 
John1:40 Omwe ahari abo abaahuriire Yohaana, bakakuratira Yesu, ni Anderea, murumuna wa Simooni Petero." 
John1:41 Yaabanza kusherura mukuru we Simooni, yaamugira ati: Tureebire Mesia, (amakuru gaakyo ngu Kristo)." 
John1:42 Yaamureeba ahari Yesu. Yesu yaamureeba, yaagira ati: Ori Simooni mwene Yohaana; oryayetwa Keefa amakuru gaaryo ngu, Petero." 
John1:43 Ku bwaseesire, Yesu yaayenda kurugayo kuza Galilaaya. Yaareeba Filipo, yaamugira ati: Nkurata." 
John1:44 Kandi Filipo ogwo akaba ari owa Besesaida, tauni y'ow'aba Anderea na Petero." 
John1:45 Filipo yaasherura Nasanaeli, yaamugira ati: Tureebire ou Musa yaahandiikireho omu Biragiro, kandi akahandiikwaho na baanabi, Yesu owa Nazareesi, omwana wa Yosefu." 
John1:46 Nasanaeli yaamubuuza ati: Noogira ngu omuri Nazareesi nihabaasa kurugamu ekintu kirungi? Filipo yaamugira ati: Ija, oreebe." 
John1:47 Yesu ku yaareebire Nasanaeli naija ah'ari, yaamugambaho ati: Reeba Omwisraeli kashushu, otaine buryarya!" 
John1:48 Nasanaeli yaamugira ati: Wammanyisibwa ki? Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Filipo atakakwetsire, obu waaba ori ahansi y'omutiini, naakureeba." 
John1:49 Nasanaeli yaamugira ati: Rabi, ori Omwana wa Ruhanga! Ori Omugabe wa Israeli!" 
John1:50 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Ahabw'okukugambira nti, Naakureeba ahansi y'omutiini, nikyo waikiririza? Oryareeba ebikuru ebirikukira ebyo." 
John1:51 Yesu yaagaruka yaamugira ati: Buzimazima ninkugambira nti: Muryareeba eiguru rikinguukire, baamaraika ba Ruhanga nibatemba, kandi nibashuuma aha Mwana w'omuntu." 
John2:1 Aha kiro kya kashatu hakabaho obugyenyi bw'okushwera omuri Kaana eya Galilaaya, na nyina wa Yesu akaba ariyo." 
John2:2 Yesu nawe akeetwa aha bugyenyi n'abeegi be. 
John2:3 Bwanyima, viinyo ku yaahweire, nyina wa Yesu yaamugira ati: Tibaine viinyo." 
John2:4 Yesu yaamugira ati: Mukazi 'we, noofa ki naanye? Obunaku bwangye tibukahikire." 
John2:5 Nyina yaagira abaheereza ati: Eki araabaragiire kyona, mukikore." 
John2:6 Kandi hakaba hariho enyungu mpango mukaaga, ezibaizire omu mabaare, ezaabaire zihigikiirwe aho, zitairweho ahabw'okweyeza, nk'emigyenzo y'Abayudaaya oku eri; enyungu emwe ekaba ebamu enjoga ibiri nari ishatu." 
John2:7 Yesu yaabaragiira ati: Mwijuze enyungu amaizi. Baaziijuriza kimwe. 
John2:8 Yaabagira ati: Mbwenu mutahe, mutwarire omukuru w'obugyenyi. Baamutwarira." 
John2:9 Omukuru w'obugyenyi, ku yaarorize aha maizi agaahinduka viinyo, atarikumanya i yaaruga, (kwonka abaheereza abatahire amaizi bo nibakimanya) yaayeta kishwera," 
John2:10 yaamugira ati: Omuntu weena abanza kugabura viinyo enungi; bwanyima, abantu ku bahaaga, abaha viinyo etanuzire; kwonka iwe obiikire enungi okuhitsya hati." 
John2:11 Aka niko kamanyiso k'okubanza aku Yesu yaakozire; akakakorera omuri Kaana eya Galilaaya, naayoreka ekitiinisa kye; n'abeegi be baamwikiriza." 
John2:12 Bwanyima y'ekyo, yaashuuma, yaaza Kaperenaumu na nyina n'abarumuna n'abeegi be; baamarayo ebiro bikye." 
John2:13 Okuhingurwaho kw'Abayudaaya kukaba kuri haihi kuhika; Yesu yainamuka Yerusaalemu. 
John2:14 Ku yaataahire omuri hekalu, yaashangamu abarikutunda ente n'entaama n'enkombe, n'abarikuhingisa empiiha, bashutami nibazihingisa." 
John2:15 Yaakwata emigoye, yaagigira nk'orukoba, yaababinga boona omuri hekalu, n'entaama n'ente zaabo; yaashuka ahansi empiiha z'abarikuhingisa, yaajuumika n'emeeza zaabo;" 
John2:16 n'abaabaire nibatunda enkombe yaabagira ati: Mwiheho ebi; enju ya Tata murekye kugigira enju y'abashuubuzi. 
John2:17 Abeegi be baijuka ebyahandiikirwe ngu, Okusaasibwa enju yaawe kuryandya." 
John2:18 Abayudaaya baagarukamu, baamubuuza bati: Ebyo wabikozire; mbwenu ni kamanyiso ki aku waakutworeka?" 
John2:19 Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Musheenye hekalu egi; naanye ndyagiimutsya omu biro bishatu. 
John2:20 Abayudaaya baagira bati: Hekalu egi ekamara emyaka makumi ana na mukaaga neeyombekwa; mbwenu iwe oryagiimutsya omu biro bishatu? 
John2:21 Kwonka We akaba naagamba ahari hekalu ey'omubiri gwe. 
John2:22 Bwanyima, ku yaazookire omu bafu, abeegi be baijuka ku yaagambire ekyo, baikiriza Ebyahandiikirwe, n'ekigambo eki Yesu yaagambire." 
John2:23 Kandi ku yaabaire ari Yerusaalemu omu biro by'obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho, baingi baikiriza eiziina rye, ku baareebire obumanyiso obu yaakozire." 
John2:24 Kwonka Yesu tarabeesigire, ahakuba akaba naamanya abantu boona;" 
John2:25 n'ahabw'ekyo tarenzire muntu weena kumumanyisa eby'abantu; ahakuba We akaba naamanya ebiri omu muntu. 
John3:1 Hakaba hariho omuntu ow'omu Bafarisaayo, orikwetwa Nikodemu, omwe aha bategyeki b'Abayudaaya." 
John3:2 Omushaija ogwo akaija ahari Yesu nyekiro, yaamugira ati: Rabi, nitumanya ku ori omwegyesa owaarugire ahari Ruhanga; ahakuba tihariho muntu orikubaasa kukora obumanyiso obu orikukora, kureka Ruhanga yaaguma nawe." 
John3:3 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Buzimazima ninkugambira nti: Omuntu, ku aba atazairwe bwa kabiri, tabaasa kureeba bukama bwa Ruhanga." 
John3:4 Nikodemu yaamubuuza ati: Omuntu naabaasa ata kuzaarwa yaakuzire? Naabaasa kugaruka omu nda ya nyina, azaarwe?" 
John3:5 Yesu yaagarukamu ati: Buzimazima ninkugambira nti: Omuntu, ku aba atazairwe maizi na Mwoyo, tabaasa kutaaha omu bukama bwa Ruhanga." 
John3:6 Ekizaarwa omubiri kiba omubiri, n'ekizaarwa Omwoyo kiba omwoyo." 
John3:7 Otatangaarira eki naakugambira nti: Mushemereire kuzaarwa obwa kabiri. 
John3:8 Omuyaga guhuuha nigugarura ei gurikwenda, iwe ohurira okuhuuha kwagwo, kwonka tomanya i gurikuruga, n'obu yaakuba ei gurikuza; n'ozairwe Omwoyo weena nikwo aba." 
John3:9 Nikodemu yaamugarukamu ati: Ebyo nibibaasika bita? 
John3:10 Yesu yaagarukamu, naagira ati: Ori omwegyesa w'Abaisraeli, kandi torikumanya bigambo ebyo?" 
John3:11 Buzimazima ninkugambira nti: Itwe tugamba eki turikumanya, tuhamya eki twareebire; kwonka imwe timwikiriza kuhamya kwaitu." 
John3:12 Obu mbagambira eby'ensi, mutabiikirize, muryaikiriza muta, naabagambira eby'omu iguru?" 
John3:13 Tihariho oratembire omu iguru, kureka Ogwo owaashuumire okuruga omu iguru, niwe Mwana w'omuntu ori omu iguru." 
John3:14 Kandi nk'oku Musa yaahanikire enjoka omu ihamba, nikwo n'Omwana w'omuntu ashemereire kuhanikwa," 
John3:15 ngu omuntu weena orikumwikiriza aheebwe amagara agatahwaho. 
John3:16 Ahakuba oku nikwo Ruhanga yaakunzire atyo ensi, akahayo Omwana we omwe nyamunegyere, ngu omuntu weena orikumwikiriza arekye kuhwerekyerera, kureka atungye amagara agatahwaho." 
John3:17 Mumanye ngu Ruhanga taratumire Mwana we omu nsi kugicwera orubanja, kureka ngu ensi ejunwe ahabwe." 
John3:18 Orikumwikiriza, tarikucwerwa rubanja; kwonka otarikumwikiriza, aherize kurucwerwa, ahabw'okuba taikiriize iziina ry'Omwana wa Ruhanga omwe nyamunegyere." 
John3:19 Kandi oru nirwo rubanja, omushana gwizire omu nsi, abantu baakunda omwirima okukira omushana; ahakuba emicwe yaabo ekaba eri mibi." 
John3:20 Omuntu weena okora ebibi ayanga omushana, kandi taija ha mushana, ngu emicwe ye erekye kuhanwa." 
John3:21 Kwonka okora eby'amazima aija aha mushana, ngu emicwe ye ereebekye butunu ku yaakoreirwe omuri Ruhanga." 
John3:22 Bwanyima y'ebyo Yesu n'abeegi be baataaha omu ishaza rya Buyudaaya; yaagumayo nabo, naabatiza." 
John3:23 Kandi na Yohaana akaba naabatiriza Enoni haihi na Salimu, ahabw'okuba aho niho amaizi maingi gaabaire gari; abantu baingi baija, baabatizibwa." 
John3:24 Kandi obwo Yohaana akaba atakatairwe mu kihome. 
John3:25 Haabaho empaka ahagati y'abeegi ba Yohaana n'Omuyudaaya aha by'okweyeza. 
John3:26 Baija ahari Yohaana, baamugira bati: Rabi, omushaija owaabaire ari hamwe naiwe seeri ya Yorudani, ou waabaire noohamya, reeba nawe naabatiza, abantu boona nibagyenda ah'ari." 
John3:27 Yohaana yaagarukamu naagira ati: Omuntu tabaasa kweha kintu kyona, kureka biri akihairwe okuruga omu iguru." 
John3:28 Imwe mwenka nimuhamya ku naagambire nti: Nyowe tindi Kristo, kwonka nkatumwa kumwebembera." 
John3:29 Oine omugore niwe kishwera; omugambi w'obugyenyi, ku ayemerera aha rubaju rwa kishwera yaamuhurira, ashemererwa munonga ahabw'okuhurira eiraka rye; n'ahabw'ekyo okushemererwa kwangye oku kuhikire." 
John3:30 We ashemereire kuguma naakura, naanye nkaguma ningaruka ahansi." 
John3:31 Orugire omu iguru naakira boona; ow'ensi aba ari ow'ensi, kandi agamba eby'ensi. Orugire omu iguru naakira boona;" 
John3:32 eki yaareebire n'eki yaahuriire, nibyo ahamya; kwonka tihariho muntu oikiriza ebi ahamya." 
John3:33 Oikiriza eby'okuhamya kwe, aba ahamize eki, ngu Ruhanga n'Ow'amazima." 
John3:34 Ou Ruhanga yaatumire agamba ebigambo bya Ruhanga; ahakuba Ruhanga ku aza kuha Omwoyo, tamurenga." 
John3:35 Ishe akunda Omwana, kandi amurekuriire byona." 
John3:36 Orikwikiriza Omwana aine amagara agatahwaho; kwonka otarikworobera Mwana, taribona magara; kureka ekiniga kya Ruhanga kiguma ahariwe." 
John4:1 Mukama waitu yaamanya ku Abafarisaayo bahuriire ngu naayegyesa kandi naabatiza abeegi baingi okukira Yohaana," 
John4:2 (haza kunu Yesu We tarabatiize, kureka abeegi be nibo baabatiize.)" 
John4:3 Ahabw'ekyo yaaruga Buyudaaya, yaagaruka Galilaaya." 
John4:4 Yaahurira ashemereire kuraba Samaria. 
John4:5 Atyo yaahika omuri tauni ya Samaria, erikwetwa Sukaara, haihi n'ekibanja eki Yakobo yaahaire omutabani Yosefu." 
John4:6 Kandi aho hakaba hariho eiziba rya Yakobo. Yesu ahabw'okuruhibwa orugyendo, yaashutama aha rubaju rw'eiziba; obwo eshaaha zikaba ziri nka mukaaga." 
John4:7 Haija Omusamariakazi kutaaha amaizi; Yesu yaamushaba ati: Mpa eky'okunywa. 
John4:8 Ahakuba abeegi be bakaba bagiire omuri tauni kugura eby'okurya. 
John4:9 Omusamariakazi yaamubuuza ati: K'ori Omuyudaaya, kandi nyowe Omusamariakazi, noobasa ota kunshaba eky'okunywa? (Ahakuba Abayudaaya bakaba batakwatanisa n'Abasamaria.)" 
John4:10 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Kuri noomanya ekiconco kya Ruhanga, n'Ogu orikukushaba ati, Mpa eky'okunywa, naiwe okaamushabire, nawe akaakuhaire amaizi g'amagara." 
John4:11 Omukazi yaamugira ati: Mukama wangye, toine ky'okutahisa, kandi n'eiziba ni riraingwa; mbwenu ago maizi g'amagara noogaiha hi?" 
John4:12 Iwe nookira tatenkuriitwe Yakobo, owaatuhaire eiziba eri, eri yaabaire anywaho n'abaana be, akeesheraho n'amasyo ge?" 
John4:13 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Omuntu weena orikunywa aha maizi aga, aryagaruka agire eiriho;" 
John4:14 kwonka weena orikunywa aha maizi agu ndimuha, tarigira iriho ebiro byona; ahakuba amaizi agu ndimuha garyahinduka enshuro y'amaizi, efumukye omuriwe, neereeta amagara agatahwaho." 
John4:15 Omukazi yaamugira ati: Mukama wangye, mpa amaizi ago, ndekye kugira eiriho n'obu kwakuba okugaruka aha kutaha." 
John4:16 Yesu yaamugira ati: Irooko oyete baro, ogarukye aha." 
John4:17 Omukazi yaamugarukamu ati: Tiinyine mushaija. Yesu yaamugira ati: Waagamba gye okugira ngu, toine mushaija;" 
John4:18 ahabw'okuba okashwerwa abashaija bataano; n'ogwo ou oine hati ti baro; eki waagamba n'amazima. 
John4:19 Omukazi yaamugira ati: Mukama wangye, naayetegyereza ku ori nabi." 
John4:20 Baatatenkuriitwe bakaba baramiza aha rushozi oru, kwonka imwe nimugira ngu Yerusaalemu niyo abantu bashemereire kuramiza." 
John4:21 Yesu yaamugira ati: Mukazi 'we, nyikiriza, obunaku nibwija kuhika, obu mutariramizamu Isheboona aha rushozi oru, n'obu haakuba omuri Yerusaalemu." 
John4:22 Imwe muramya eki mutarikumanya; itwe turamya eki turikumanya, ahakuba okujunwa kuruga omu Bayudaaya." 
John4:23 Kwonka obunaku nibwija, kandi bwahikire, obu abaramya ab'amazima bariramizamu Isheboona omu mwoyo n'omu mazima; ahakuba Isheboona asherura abari nk'abo kumuramya." 
John4:24 Ruhanga n'Omwoyo; kandi abamuramya bashemereire kumuramiza omu Mwoyo n'omu mazima. 
John4:25 Omukazi yaamugira ati: Nimmanya ngu Mesia orikwetwa Kristo aryaija; ku ariija, aryatushobororera byona." 
John4:26 Yesu yaamugira ati: Manya, niinye orikugamba naiwe." 
John4:27 Omu mwanya ogwo abeegi be baija; baatangaara ahabw'okuba yaaba naagaaniira n'omukazi; kwonka tihaine waamubuurize ati: Nooyenda ki? Nari shi, ati: Ahabw'enki noogaaniira nawe?" 
John4:28 Atyo omukazi yaatsiga aho enyungu ye, yaagaruka omuri tauni, yaagambira abantu ati:" 
John4:29 Mwije mureebe omuntu owangambira ebi naakozire byona. Yaaba niwe Kristo? Shinta. 
John4:30 Baaruga omuri tauni, nibaza ei ari." 
John4:31 Ku baabaire batakamuhikire, abeegi be baamweshengyereza bati: Rabi, eby'okurya mbibi, ryaho." 
John4:32 Yaabagira ati: Nyine eby'okurya ebi mutarikumanya. 
John4:33 Abeegi be nikwo kubuuzana bati: Beitu shi, hariho owaamureetera eby'okurya?" 
John4:34 Yesu yaabagira ati: Eby'okurya byangye nikwo kukora eki Owantumire akunda n'okuhikiiriza omurimo gwe. 
John4:35 Imwe timurikugira ngu, hatsigaire ameezi ana okuhika aha igyesha? Nyowe nimbagambira nti: Munagye amaisho, mureebe emisiri ku eyezire, ku ehikire kugyeshwa." 
John4:36 Omugyesi aheebwa ebihembo, ahsanguririza emyaka omu magara agatahwaho, ngu omubibi n'omugyesi bashemererwe hamwe." 
John4:37 Ahakuba omuri ebi ekigambo eki nimwo kimanyirwa ku kiri eky'amazima, ngu: Habiba omwe, hagyesha ondiijo." 
John4:38 Nkabatuma kugyesha ebi mutarahendekyeire; abandi bakahendeka n'emirimo, imwe mwaija, mwahikira omu bi baafeereire kubi." 
John4:39 Abasamaria baingi ab'omuri tauni egyo baamwikiriza ahabw'ebigambo by'omukazi ebi yaagambire naahamya ati: Yangambira ebi naakozire byona. 
John4:40 N'ahabw'ekyo Abasamaria, ku baamuhikire, baamushaba ngu agume nabo; nawe nikwo kumarayo kabiri." 
John4:41 Haikiriza abandi baingi abarikukira ab'okubanza, ahabw'ekigambo kye." 
John4:42 Baagambira omukazi bati: Mbwenu titurikwikiriza habw'ebigambo byawe byonka; ahakuba naitwe twayehuririra, twamanya ngu Ogu niwe Mujuni w'ensi buzima." 
John4:43 Ebyo biro bibiri ku byahweire, yaarugayo, yaaza Galilaaya." 
John4:44 Ahakuba Yesu akahamya ati: Nabi tagira kitiinisa omu nsi y'owaabo. 
John4:45 Ku yaahikire Galilaaya, Abanyagalilaaya baamwakiira, ahabw'okuba bakareeba byona ebi yaakoreire Yerusaalemu aha bugyenyi; ahakuba nabo bakaba babutaahire." 
John4:46 Kandi yaagaruka, yaataaha Kaana eya Galilaaya, ahu yaahinduriire amaizi viinyo. Omuri Kaperenaumu hakaba harimu omukungu w'omugabe, owaabaire arwarize omutabani." 
John4:47 Ku yaahuriire ngu Yesu arugire Buyudaaya, yaaza Galilaaya, yaagyenda yaamushaba ngu ashuume akize omutabani, ahakuba akaba ari haihi kufa." 
John4:48 Ahabw'ekyo Yesu yaamugira ati: Ku muba mutareebire bumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza, timwikiriza na kakye." 
John4:49 Omukungu yaamushaba ati: Mukama wangye, shuuma oije, omwana wangye atakafiire." 
John4:50 Yesu yaamugira ati: Irooko otaahe; omwana waawe ahuriire. Omushaija ogwo yaikiriza ekigambo eki Yesu yaamugambira, yaagyenda." 
John4:51 Ku yaabaire naashuuma, abahuuku be baamubugana, baamugira bati: Omwana waawe ahuriire." 
John4:52 Yaababuuza eshaaha ei atandikiireho kubaho gye, baamugarukamu bati: Nyomwabazyo aha shaaha ya mushanju omushwija nibwo gumurugireho." 
John4:53 Ishe yaamanya ku nibwo bunaku obu Yesu amugambiriiremu ati: Omwana waawe ahuriire. Omushaija ogwo yaikiriza n'eka ye yoona. 
John4:54 Ako niko kamanyiso ka kabiri aku Yesu yaakozire, okwiha obu yaaruga Buyudaaya, naija Galilaaya." 
John5:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo hakaba hariho obugyenyi bw'Abayudaaya; Yesu yainamuka Yerusaalemu. 
John5:2 Kandi omuri Yerusaalemu haihi n'eirembo ry'entaama, hakaba hariho ekiyanja, ekirikwetwa omu Ruheburaayo Beseseda, kiriho ebiju bitaano." 
John5:3 Omwo nimwo baabaire bata abarwaire baingi munonga, empumi, abarema, n'abazingazingirwe, nibategyereza amaizi kubira;" 
John5:4 ahakuba obundi n'obundi maraika akaba ashuuma aija omu kiyanja, abiza amaizi; owaabaire atangamu abandi, amaizi gaatandika kubira, akaba akira endwara yoona ei yaabaire aba arwaire." 
John5:5 Aho hakaba hariho omushaija owaabaire amazire emyaka makumi ashatu na munaana arwaire. 
John5:6 Yesu ku yaamureebire abyami, kandi yaamanya ngu amazire aho omwanya muhango, yaamubuuza ati: Nooyenda kukira?" 
John5:7 Omurwaire yaamugarukamu ati: Mukama wangye, tingira muntu w'okunta omu kuyanja, amaizi gaaba nigatandika kubira; nyowe ku mba ninkiija, ondiijo antangamu." 
John5:8 Yesu yaamuragiira ati: Imuka, oyekorere ekirago kyawe, ogyende." 
John5:9 Ahonaaho omushaija yaakira, yaagyenda. Kandi eizooba eryo ekaba eri Sabato." 
John5:10 Abayudaaya baagambira owaatambirwa bati: Hati ni Sabato; ebiragiro tibirikukwikiriza kwekorera kirago kyawe. 
John5:11 Yaabagarukamu ati: Omushaija owantambira niwe yandagiira ati: Yekorere ekirago kyawe, ogyende." 
John5:12 Baamubuuza bati: Ogwo mushija n'oha owaakuragiira ati: Yekorere ekirago kyawe, ogyende?" 
John5:13 Kwonka owaatambiirwe tiyaamumanya, ahakuba Yesu akaba yaarugireho ahabw'omutwe muhango ogwabaire guriho." 
John5:14 Bwanyima Yesu yaamushanga omuri hekalu, yaamugira ati: Reeba, waakira; otarigaruka kushiisha, nyentsya otarihikwaho akabi akarikukira ako." 
John5:15 Omushaija yaagyenda, yaagambira Abayudaaya, ku Yesu niwe amukirize." 
John5:16 Ekyo nikyo Abayudaaya baahiigiire Yesu, ahabw'okuba akakora ebyo ahari Sabato." 
John5:17 Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Tata naakikora na hati, kandi naanye ninkora." 
John5:18 Nikyo kyakizire kureetera Abayudaaya kusherura oburyo bw'okumwita, ti habw'okushiisha Sabato yonka, kureka n'ahabw'okugira ati: Ruhanga ni Tata, akeeringanisa na Ruhanga." 
John5:19 Yesu yaagarukamu naabagira ati: Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Omwana tabaasa kukora kintu kyona ahabwe, kureka eki areeba Ishe naakora; mumanye ngu ebi Ruhanga akora byona, n'Omwana nawe nibyo akora;" 
John5:20 ahakuba Ishe akunda Omwana, kandi amworeka ebi akora byona; kandi aryamworeka ebirikukira ebi, ngu imwe mutangaare." 
John5:21 Nk'oku Isheboona azoora abafu, akabaha amagara, nikwo n'Omwana aha amagara abu ayenda kugaha." 
John5:22 Ahakuba na Ishe tacwera muntu weena orubanja, okucwa orubanja kwona akakurekurira Omwana," 
John5:23 ngu boona bahe Omwana ekitiinisa, nk'oku bakiha Ishe. Otaha Mwana kitiinisa, takiha na Ishe owaamutumire." 
John5:24 Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Orikuhurira ekigambo kyangye, akaikiriza Owantumire, aine amagara agatahwaho, kandi tariza mu rubanja; ahabw'okuba aherize kuruga omu kufa, yaataaha omu magara." 
John5:25 Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Obunaku nibwija, kandi buriho na hati mbwenu, abafu obu barihurira eiraka ry'Omwana wa Ruhanga; n'abo abaririhurira baryaba abahuriire." 
John5:26 Ahakuba nk'oku Ishe aine amagara omuriwe wenka, nikwo yaahaire n'Omwana kugagira omuriwe wenka;" 
John5:27 kandi akamuha obushoboorozi bw'okucwa emanja, ahabw'okuba niwe Mwana w'omuntu." 
John5:28 Mutatangaarira eki; ahakuba obunaku nibwija, abari omu bituuro boona obu barihurira eiraka rye," 
John5:29 bakarugamu, abo abaakozire gye, bakazookyera amagara; nabo abaakozire kubi, bakazookyera okucwerwa orubanja." 
John5:30 Tindikubaasa kukora kintu kyona ahabwangye; oku mpurira, nikwo ncwa orubanja; n'emanja ezi ncwa, nzicwa omu mazima, ahabw'okuba tiinyenda kutwaza nk'oku ndikwenda ahabwangye, kureka nk'Owantumire oku arikwenda." 
John5:31 Ku ndikwehamya nyenka, okwehamya kwangye nikuba kutari kw'amazima;" 
John5:32 hariho ondiijo orikumpamya, kandi nimmanya ngu okuhamya oku ampamya n'okw'amazima." 
John5:33 Imwe mukatuma ahari Yohaana, nawe yaabahamiza amazima." 
John5:34 Okuhamibwa, oku ndikwegamira, tikurikuruga ha muntu; kwonka ebi nimbigamba, ngu imwe mujunwe." 
John5:35 Yohaana ogwo akaba ari etabaaza erikwaka, ekamurika; naimwe mukamara akaanya kakye nimwikiriza kushemerererwa okumurika kwe." 
John5:36 Kwonka nyowe nyine ebirikumpamya ebikuru ebirikukira ebya Yohaana; ahakuba emirimo ei Tata yampaire kuhikiiriza, emirimo egyo ei ndikukora niyo erikumpamya ku Tata yantumire." 
John5:37 Kandi Tata owantumire niwe ampamize. Imwe timukahuriraga iraka rye, n'obu kwakuba okureeba enshusha ye;" 
John5:38 kandi ekigambo kye tikituura muriimwe; ahabw'okuba timwikiriza u yaatumire. 
John5:39 Musherura munonga omu Byahandiikirwe, ahakuba muteekateeka ngu omuribyo nimwo mwine amagara agatahwaho; haza kandi ebyo nibyo bimpamya." 
John5:40 Kwonka mwanga kwija ahariinye, ngu muheebwe amagara." 
John5:41 Tindikwikiriza kitiinisa eki ndikuheebwa abantu. 
John5:42 Ahakuba nimmanya imwe ku mutarikukunda Ruhanga omu mitima yaanyu. 
John5:43 Nyizire omu iziina rya Tata, timwanyakiira; ondiijo ku ariija omu iziina rye wenka, we muryamwakiira." 
John5:44 Nimubaasa muta kwikiriza, imwe abahaana ekitiinisa, haza mutasherura kitiinisa ekiruga ahari Ruhanga omwe wenka?" 
John5:45 Murekye kugira ngu niinye ndibarega ahari Tata; hariho omwe obarega, niwe Musa, ou mwesiga." 
John5:46 Kuri mwaikiriize Musa, naanye mukaanyikiriize, ahakuba niinye yaahandiikireho." 
John5:47 Ku muraabe mutaikiriza bi yaahandiikire, muryabaasa muta kwikiriza ebigambo byangye?" 
John6:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo Yesu yaarugayo, yaayambuka seeri y'enyanja ya Galilaaya, niyo nyanja ya Tiberia." 
John6:2 Omutwe muhango gw'abantu gwamukuratira, ahakuba bakareeba obumanyiso obu yaakozire aha barwaire." 
John6:3 Yesu yaatemba omu bibungo, yaashutamayo n'abeegi be." 
John6:4 Kandi obugyenyi bw'Abayudaaya obw'Okuhingurwaho bukaba buri haihi. 
John6:5 Yesu ku yaanagire amaisho, yaareeba omutwe gw'abantu baingi nigwija ah'ari, yaabuuza Filipo ati: Nitwija kugura hi emigaati, ei aba bantu baraarye?" 
John6:6 Akamubuuza atyo kumugyeza, ahakuba We akaba naamanya eki araakore." 
John6:7 Filipo yaamugarukamu ati: Emigaati erikugurwa edenaari magana abiri terikubahika, n'obu omuntu weena yaakuryaho kakye." 
John6:8 Omwe aha beegi be, Anderea murumuna wa Simooni Petero, yaamugira ati:" 
John6:9 Aha hariho omwojo oine emigaati ya sayiri etaano n'eby'enyanja bibiri; kwonka ebyo nibigasira ki abantu abarikwinga bati? 
John6:10 Yesu yaagira ati: Mushutamye abantu. Kandi aho hakaba hariho akacwamba kahango; abantu baashutama ahansi, bakaba bari nk'enkumi itaano." 
John6:11 Atyo Yesu yaayakiira egyo migaati; ku yaaherize kusiima, yaagigaburira abantu abaabaire bashutami; yaabaha n'eby'enyanja, nk'oku baayenzire." 
John6:12 Ku baahaagire, yaaragiira abeegi be ati: Mutorotoore oburagarika obwatsigaraho, hatagira akaaburaho." 
John6:13 Baabutorotoora, baijuza ebitenga ikumi na bibiri oburagarika obwashaagire aha migaati etaano ya sayiri, ei baariire." 
John6:14 Abantu ku baareebire akamanyiso aku yaakora, baagira bati: Buzima ogu niwe nabi ogwo orikwenda kwija omu nsi!" 
John6:15 Yesu, ku yaayetegyereize ngu nibenda kwija kumukwatsa amaani ngu bamugire omugabe, yaabarugamu mpora, yaagaruka omu bibungo wenka." 
John6:16 Ku bwabaire omu mwabazyo, abeegi be baashuuma aha nyanja," 
John6:17 baaragara omu bwato, baatandika kwambuka egyo nyanja, bagyemire Kaperenaumu. Bukaba bwaizire, kandi na Yesu akaba atakabahikire." 
John6:18 Enyanja yaahinduriza ahabw'omuyaga mwingi ogwabaire niguhuuha. 
John6:19 Ku baavugireho nka mahiro ishatu nari ina, baareeba Yesu naagyendera aha nyanja nairirira obwato, baatiina." 
John6:20 We yaabahuumuriza naagira ati: Niinye; mutatiina. 
John6:21 N'ahabw'ekyo baikiriza obwato bwahika aha nkungu, ahu baabaire nibaza." 
John6:22 Ku bwaseesire, abantu abaabaire batsigaire seeri y'enyanja, baijuka ku haabaire hariho obwato bumwe bwonka, kandi Yesu ku atabugyenziremu n'abeegi be, kureka ku baagyenzire bonka." 
John6:23 Agandi maato gaija nigaruga Tiberia, gaahika haihi n'omwanya, ahu baariiriire emigaati ei Mukama waitu Yesu yaasiimiire." 
John6:24 Batyo abantu abo, ku baareebire ngu Yesu tariyo, n'obu baakuba abeegi be, bo baaragara omu maato ago, baaza Kaperenaumu, nibamusherura." 
John6:25 Ku baamushangire seeri y'enyanja, baamubuuza bati: Rabi, aha oizireho ryari?" 
John6:26 Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Timurikunsherura ahabw'okuba mureebire obumanyiso, kureka ahabw'okuba muriire emigaati, mwaiguta." 
John6:27 Nutarihendekyera eby'okurya ebirikuhwaho, kureka eby'okurya ebirikugumaho okuhitsya aha magara agatahwaho, agu Omwana w'omuntu aribaha; ahakuba Ruhanga Ishe akamutaho akamanyiso." 
John6:28 Baamubuuza bati: Tushemereire kukora ki, tukabona kukora emirimo ya Ruhanga?" 
John6:29 Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: ogu nigwo murimo gwa Ruhanga, imwe okwikiriza Ogwo ou yaatumire." 
John6:30 N'ahabw'ekyo baamubuuza bati: Mbwenu nookora kamanyiso ki, aku twakureeba, tukakwikiriza? Okora ki?" 
John6:31 Baatatenkuriitwe bakarya emaanu omu ihamba; nk'oku kyahandiikirwe ngu, Akabaha omugaati ogwarugire omu iguru." 
John6:32 Yesu nikwo kubagira ati: Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Musa tiwe yaabahaire omugaati ogwarugire omu iguru; kureka Tata niwe abaha omugaati gw'amazima oguruga omu iguru. 
John6:33 Ahakuba omugaati gwa Ruhanga nigwo gushuuma niguruga omu iguru, gukaha ensi amagara." 
John6:34 Baamushaba bati: Mukama waitu ogume otuhe ogwo mugaati obutoosha. 
John6:35 Yesu yaabagira ati: Niinye mugaati gw'amagara; orikwija ahariinye, tarigira njara; n'orikuunyikiriza, tarikwatwa iriho na kakye." 
John6:36 Kwonka nkabagambira nti: Mundeebire, kunu timwanyikiriza." 
John6:37 Abu Tata ampa boona baryaija ahariinye; orikwija ahariinye tindimubinga na kakye. 
John6:38 Ahakuba tindarugire mu iguru kukora ebi ndikweyendera, kureka okukora ebi Owantumire akunda;" 
John6:39 kandi eki nikyo Owantumire akunda, ngu ahari boona abu yampaire, harekye kuburaho n'omwe, kureka mbazoore aha kiro ky'aha mperu." 
John6:40 Eki Tata akunda n'eki, ngu weena orikureeba Omwana, akamwikiriza, atungye amagara agatahwaho; naanye ndyamuzoora aha kiro ky'aha mperu." 
John6:41 Ekyo nikyo kyareeteire Abayudaaya kumwetomboitera, ahabw'okuba akagira ati: Niinye mugaati ogwarugire omu iguru." 
John6:42 Baagira bati: Ogu tiwe Yesu mwene Yosefu, ou turikumanya ishe na nyina? Mbwenu naabaasa ata kugira ngu akaruga omu iguru?" 
John6:43 Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Muteetomboita mwenka. 
John6:44 Tihariho orikubaasa kwija ahariinye, Tata owantumire yaaba atamwiriize haihi; naanye ndyamuzoora aha kiro ky'aha mperu." 
John6:45 Kikahandiikwa omu bya Baanabi ngu, Boona baryayegyesibwa Ruhanga. Omuntu weena ohurira ebya Tata, akabyega, aija ahariinye." 
John6:46 Mutagira ngu hariho orareebire Tata, kureka Ogwo owaarugire ahari Ruhanga; niwe yaamureebire." 
John6:47 Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Orikwikiriza aine amagara agatahwaho. 
John6:48 Niinye mugaati gw'amagara. 
John6:49 Bashwenkuriimwe bakarya emaanu omu ihamba, baafa." 
John6:50 Ogu nigwo mugaati oguruga omu iguru buzima ogu omuntu aryaho, atafe." 
John6:51 Niinye mugaati gw'amagara ogwarugire omu iguru; omuntu weena ku arikurya aha mugaati ogu, naagumaho ebiro byona; kandi omugaati, ogu ndiha ahabw'ab'omu nsi ngu batungye amagara, n'omubiri gwangye." 
John6:52 N'ahabw'ekyo Abayudaaya baahakana bonka nibagira bati: Omushaija ogu naabaasa ata kutuha omubiri gwe kugurya? 
John6:53 Yesu yaabagira ati: Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Ku murikuba mutariire mubiri gw'Omwana w'omuntu, kandi mutanyweire shagama ye, timurikugira magara omuriimwe." 
John6:54 Orikurya omubiri gwangye akanywa eshagama yangye, aine amagara agatahwaho, kandi ndyamuzoora aha kiro ky'aha mperu;" 
John6:55 ahakuba omubiri gwangye n'eky'okurya eky'amazima, kandi n'eshagama yangye n'eky'okunywa eky'amazima." 
John6:56 Orya omubiri gwangye, akanywa eshagama yangye, aguma omuriinye, naanye omuriwe." 
John6:57 Nka Tata ohuriire oku yantumire, naanye nk'oku ndi ohuriire ahabwa Tata, nikwo n'orikundya ariba ohuriire ahabwangye." 
John6:58 Ogu nigwo mugaati ogwarugire omu iguru, ti nk'ogu bashwenkuriimwe baariire bakafa; orikurya omugaati ogu aryagumaho ebiro byona." 
John6:59 Ebigambo ebyo akabigambira omuri sinagogi, naayegyesa omuri Kaperenaumu." 
John6:60 Baingi aha beegi be, ku baahuriire ekyo, baagira bati: Ekigambo eki nikiremeera; n'oha orikukibaasa?" 
John6:61 Yesu, ku yaamanyire ngu abeegi be bakyetomboitera, yaababuuza ati: Ekyo nikyo kyabaremesa?" 
John6:62 Mbwenu shi, kiryaba kita, ku murireeba Omwana w'omuntu naatemba ei yaabaire ari bwambere?" 
John6:63 Omwoyo niwe aha amagara; omubiri tigwine mugasho; ebigambo ebi naabagambira n'omwoyo n'amagara. 
John6:64 Kwonka omuriimwe harimu abatarikwikiriza. Ahakuba Yesu akaba naamanya okuruga karenakare abatarikumwikiriza, n'ogwo owaabaire naayenda kumureebya oku ari." 
John6:65 Yaagira ati: Nikyo naabagambirira nti: Tihariho orikubaasa kwija ahariinye kureka biri yaakiheebwa Tata. 
John6:66 Okuruga aho baingi aha beegi be baagaruka enyima, tibaagumizamu kugyenda nawe." 
John6:67 Yesu nikwo kubuuza bari ikumi na babiri ati: Naimwe nimwenda kwegyendera? 
John6:68 Simooni Petero yaamugarukamu ati: Mukama waitu, nituza ahari oha? Ka niiwe oine ebigambo by'amagara agatahwaho;" 
John6:69 naitwe tukaikiriza, twamanya ngu ori Orikwera wa Ruhanga." 
John6:70 Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Tiinye naabatooraine imwe ikumi na babiri? Kwonka omwe omuriimwe ni sitaane. 
John6:71 Ekyo akakigamba ahari Yuda mwene Simooni Iskaryota, owaabaire naayenda kumureebya, omwe ahari ikumi na babiri." 
John7:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo akagyendagyenda omuri Galilaaya; tiyaayenda kugyendagyenda omuri Buyudaaya, ahabw'okuba Abayudaaya bakaba nibenda kumwita." 
John7:2 Kandi obugyenyi bw'Abayudaaya, oburikwetwa obugyenyi bw'Ensiisira, bukaba buri haihi n'okuhika." 
John7:3 Abarumuna baamugira bati: Ruga aha, oze Buyudaaya, abeegi baawe babone kureeba emirimo ei orikukora." 
John7:4 Ahakuba tihariho muntu oyenda kumanywa butunu, akakora omu mubonano. Ku oraabe nookora ebi, oyeyorekye ensi." 
John7:5 Ahakuba na barumuna abo tibaramwikiriize. 
John7:6 Yesu yaabagambira ati: obunaku bwangye tibukahikire; kwonka obwanyu n'obw'obutoosha. 
John7:7 Ensi terikubaasa kubanga, kwonka nyowe neenyanga, ahabw'okuba nimpamya ku emirimo yaayo eri mibi." 
John7:8 Imwe mwinamukye aha bugyenyi; nyowe tinkabaire kuza ahari obwo bugyenyi, ahakuba obunaku bwangye tibukahikire." 
John7:9 Ku yaaherize kubagambira ebyo, yaaguma Galilaaya." 
John7:10 Abarumuna ku baaherize kwinamuka aha bugyenyi, nawe yainamuka, kwonka tiyaagyenda naareebwa, kureka yaagyenda bwesherekye." 
John7:11 Abayudaaya baamusherura aha bugyenyi, nibabuuririza bati: Ari nkahi?" 
John7:12 Haabaho okumuhakanaho munonga omu bantu: abamwe nibagira bati: N'omushaija murungi; abandi bati: Ngaaha, naahabisa abantu." 
John7:13 Kwonka ahabw'okutiina Abayudaaya tihariho n'omwe owaamugambireho butunu. 
John7:14 Obugyenyi ku bwahikire ahagati, Yetu yainamuka omuri hekalu, yaayegyesa." 
John7:15 Abayudaaya baatangaara, nibagira bati: omushaija ogu akaiha hi obwengye obu, haza atakeegaga?" 
John7:16 N'ahabw'ekyo Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Okwegyesa oku nyegyesa ti kwangye, n'okw'Ogwo owantumire." 
John7:17 Omuntu weena, ku ayenda kukora ebi Ogwo akunda, niwe arimanya yaaba okwegyesa okwo kuruga ahari Ruhanga, nari shi ku nyegambira ahabwangye." 
John7:18 Orikwegambira ahabwe, naaba naayesherurira ekitiinisa; kwonka orikusherurira Owaamutumire ekitiinisa, niwe w'amazima, kandi omuriwe tiharimu kutahikiirira kwona." 
John7:19 Musa tarabahaire Ebiragiro? Kwonka omuriimwe tihariho ohitsya Ebiragiro. Nimwendera ki kuunyita? 
John7:20 Abantu baamugarukamu bati: oriho daimoni. N'oha orikwenda kukwita? 
John7:21 Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Nkakora ekintu kimwe, mwena mwakitangaarira." 
John7:22 Musa akabateeraho omugyenzo gw'okushara; (kwonka tikurarugire hari Musa, kureka ahari baashwenkuriimwe,) kandi mushara omuntu ahari Sabato." 
John7:23 Mbwenu shi, omuntu ku araabe asharwa ahari Sabato, ngu ekiragiro kya Musa kitahendwa, nimungwererwa ki kubi ahabw'okukiriza kimwe omuntu ahari Sabato?" 
John7:24 Mutaricwa emanja nimwiha aha mireebekyere y'omuntu, mugume mucwe emanja z'oburyo." 
John7:25 Kandi aha ba Yerusaalemu baagira bati: Omushaija ou barikusherura kwita tiwe ogu? 
John7:26 Mbwenu ari aha, naagamba butunu, kandi tibaine ku baamugira! Ebyo, abakuru nibamanya buzima ku Ogu ari Kristo?" 
John7:27 Itwe nitumanya omushaija ogu ei arikuruga; kwonka Kristo we ku ariija, tihariho n'omwe orimanya ahi arikuruga." 
John7:28 Nikyo Yesu yaagambiire n'eiraka rihango naayegyesa omuri hekalu ati: Nyowe nimummanya, kandi nimumanya n'ei naarugire. Tindaizire habwangye; Owantumire n'ow'amazima, kwonka We timurikumumanya." 
John7:29 Kwonka nyowe nimmumanya, ahabw'okuba nkaruga ah'ari, kandi niwe yantumire." 
John7:30 N'ahabw'ekyo baayenda kumukwata; kwonka tihariho n'omwe owaamutaireho emikono, ahakuba obunaku bwe bukaba butakahikire." 
John7:31 Kwonka bantu baingi baamwikiriza, nibagira bati: kristo ku ariija, aryakora obumanyiso bwingi okukira obu omushaija ogu akozire?" 
John7:32 Abafarisaayo baahurira abantu nibamugambaho mpora batyo; abanyamurwa abakuru n'Abafarisaayo nikwo kutuma abakuru b'abaserukare kumukwata. 
John7:33 Nikyo Yesu yaagiriire ati: Hatsigaire omwanya mukye, nyowe nkiri hamwe naimwe; bwanyima ngarukye ahari Ogwo owantumire;" 
John7:34 muryansherura, timurimbona; kandi ei ndi, timurikubaasa kwijayo." 
John7:35 Abayudaaya baabuuzana bati: Omushaija ogu naayenda kuza hi, ei tutarimubona? Naayenda kuza omu baataataaniire omu Bagriika, ayegyese n'Abagriika?" 
John7:36 Eki eki yaagamba n'enki, ati: Muryansherura, timurimbona, kandi ati: Ei ndi, timurikubaasa kwijayo?" 
John7:37 Aha izooba ry'aha muheru ery'ekiro kikuru ky'obugyenyi, Yesu yaayemerera, yaagamba n'eiraka rihango ati: Omuntu weena, ku araagire eiriho, aije ahariinye, anywe." 
John7:38 Orikuunyikiriza, emigyera y'amaizi g'amagara eryahimintuka omunda ye, nk'oku Ebyahandiikirwe bigamba." 
John7:39 Ekyo akaba naakigamba aha Mwoyo, ou abarikumwikiriza bariija kuheebwa; ahakuba Omwoyo akaba atakahairwe, ahabw'okuba Yesu akaba atakahimbisiibwe." 
John7:40 Abantu bamwe, ku baahuriire ebigambo ebyo, baagira bati: Buzima ogu ni nabi ori." 
John7:41 Abandi baagira bati: Ogu ni Kristo. Kwonka abandi bati: Hoona Kristo n'ow'okuruga omuri Galilaaya? 
John7:42 Timurikumanya ku Ebyahandiikirwe bihamya ngu Kristo aryakomooka omu ruganda rwa Daudi, omu Betelehemu, ekirorero eki Daudi yaabaire atwiremu?" 
John7:43 Okwo abantu nikwo baamuhakaineho batyo. 
John7:44 Abamwe aharibo bakenda kumukwata; kwonka tihaine waamutaireho engaro. 
John7:45 Abakuru b'abaserukare baagaruka aha banyamurwa abakuru n'Abafarisaayo; bo baababuuza bati: Ahanki mutaamureeta? 
John7:46 Abakuru b'abaserukare baagarukamu bati: Tihakabahoga muntu orikugamba nk'ogu mushaija! 
John7:47 Abafarisaayo baabagarukamu bati: Kandi shi naimwe yaabahabya? 
John7:48 Hariho n'omwe omu bategyeki nari omu Bafarisaayo oramwikiriize? 
John7:49 Kureka abo bantu, abatamanya Biragiro, n'abakeyeenirwe." 
John7:50 Nikodemu, omwe aharibo, owaizire ahari Yesu ira, yaababuuza ati:" 
John7:51 Beitu ebiragiro byaitu nibiikiriza kucwera omuntu orubanja, batabandize kuhurira eki arikwetonganira, n'obu kyakuba eki akozire?" 
John7:52 Baamugarukamu bati: Hari naiwe ori owa Galilaaya? Sherura oreebe, ku hatariho nabi oruga Galilaaya." 
John7:53 Baagyenda, buri muntu yaataaha owaabo." 
John8:1 Yesu yainamuka ekibungo kya Zeituuni. 
John8:2 Omu kasheeshe munonga yaagaruka omuri hekalu, abantu boona baija ah'ari; yaashutama, yaabeegyesa." 
John8:3 Abahandiiki n'Abafarisaayo baareeta omukazi, okwatsirwe naashambana; baamuta ahagati," 
John8:4 baamugira bati: Mwegyesa, omukazi ogu akwatsirwe butunu, naashambana." 
John8:5 Kandi omu Biragiro Musa akaturagiira kuteera abarikukora batyo amabaare. Mbwenu iwe noomugambaho ki? 
John8:6 Eki bakakigamba nibamutega, ngu babone eki baraamuregye. Kwonka Yesu yainama, yaahandiika n'orukumu aha itaka." 
John8:7 Ku baagumiizemu nibamubuuza, yaajuumuuka, yaabagira ati: omuriimwe otakashiishaga, abe niwe yaabanza kumuteera eibaare." 
John8:8 Yaagaruka, yainama, yaahandiika n'orukumu aha itaka." 
John8:9 Bo ku baakihuriire, baashinjwa omu mitima yaabo, baashoobooka nibashohora omwe omwe, haabanza abakuru, haahereeruka abato; Yesu yaatsigara wenka n'ogwo mukazi, ahu yaabaire ari." 
John8:10 Yesu yaajuumuuka, yaamubuuza ati: Iwe mukazi 'we, bari nkahi? Tihariho n'omwe owaakucwera orubanja?" 
John8:11 Nawe yaagarukamu ati: Tariho, Mukama wangye. Yesu yaagira ati: Naanye tindikukucwera rubanja. Kwonka irooko okuruga hati otarigaruka kushiisha." 
John8:12 Yesu yaagaruka yaabagira ati: Niinye mushana gw'ensi; orikunkuratira, tarigyendera mu mwirima, kwonka aryagira omushana gw'amagara." 
John8:13 Abafarisaayo baamugira bati: Iwe nooyehamya; kwonka okwehamya kwawe ti kw'amazima. 
John8:14 Yesu yaagarukamu, yaabagira ati: N'obu ndaabe niinyehamya, okwehamya kwangye n'okw'amazima; ahakuba nimmanya ei naarugire, kandi n'ei ndikuza; kwonka imwe timurikumanya i naarugire, nari shi ei ndikuza." 
John8:15 Imwe mucwa orubanja nk'abantu-buntu; nyowe tihariho n'omwe ou nducwera. 
John8:16 Kandi nangwa n'obu naakurucwa, okucwa okwangye n'okw'amazima, ahabw'okuba nyowe tincwa nyenka, kureka nkwatanisa na Tata owantumire." 
John8:17 Omu biragiro byanyu kikahandiikwa ngu obwakareebi bw'abantu babiri n'obw'amazima; 
John8:18 nyowe nyehamya, kandi Tata owantumire nawe ampamya." 
John8:19 Nabo baamubuuza bati: Sho arahi? Yesu yaagarukamu ati: Timurikummanya n'obu yaakuba Tata; kuri nimummanya, na Tata mukaamumanyire." 
John8:20 Ebigambo ebyo akabigambira omu ibiikiro, naayegyesa omuri hekalu; kandi tihaabaho n'omwe owaamukwata, ahakuba obunaku bwe bukaba butakahikire." 
John8:21 Yaagaruka yaabagira ati: Nyowe ningyenda; imwe muryansherura, kandi muryafeera omu kibi kyanyu; ei ndikuza, timurikubaasa kwijayo." 
John8:22 Abayudaaya baayebuuza bati: Beitu shi naayenda kwehanika? Ahakuba naagira ati: Ei ndikuza, timurikubaasa kwijayo." 
John8:23 Yaabagambira ati: Imwe muri ab'omu nsi, nyowe ndi ow'omu iguru; imwe muri ab'ensi egi, nyowe tindi w'ensi egi." 
John8:24 Nikyo naabagambirira nti: Muryafeera omu bibi byanyu; kandi buzima muryafeera omu bibi byanyu, ku muriba mutaikiriize ku ndi We." 
John8:25 Baamubuuza bati: Beitu oba oha? Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Nk'oku naabagambiire okuruga ira ryona. 
John8:26 Nyine bingi eby'okubagambaho, n'okubacwera orubanja; kwonka Ogwo owantumire n'ow'amazima, kandi ebi naahuriire ahariwe, nibyo ngambira ensi." 
John8:27 Kwonka bo tibaramanyire ku arikubagambira Ishe.
