John8:28 Yesu yaabagira ati: Ku muriheza kuhanika Omwana w'omuntu, obwo nibwo murimanya ku ndi We, kandi ngu ebi nkora tiinyeragiira, kureka ngamba nk'oku Tata yaanyegyeise." 
John8:29 Ogwo owantumire turi hamwe; takantsigahoga nyenka, ahabw'okuba obutoosha nkora ebimushemeza." 
John8:30 Ku yaagambire ebigambo ebyo, baingi baamwikiriza." 
John8:31 Bwanyima Yesu yaagambira Abayudaaya abaamwikiriize ati: Ku muraahamire aha kigambo kyangye, nimuba muri abeegi bangye buzima;" 
John8:32 kandi muryamanya maazima, n'amazima garyabahindura ab'obusingye." 
John8:33 Baamugarukamu bati: Itwe turi baijukuru ba Abrahamu; titukahakwaga muntu weena. Aho noogiriraho ota oti, Turyahinduka ab'obusingye?" 
John8:34 Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Omuntu weena okora ekibi, aba omuhuuku w'ekibi." 
John8:35 Kandi omuhuuku taguma muka ebiro byona, kureka Omwana." 
John8:36 N'ahabw'ekyo Omwana ku aribahindura ab'obusingye, muryaba ab'obusingye buzima." 
John8:37 Nimmanya ku muri baijukuru ba Abrahamu; haza kunu nimwenda kuunyita, ahakuba ekigambo kyangye tikiine mwanya omuriimwe." 
John8:38 Nyowe ngamba ebi naareebire ahari Tata; naimwe mukora ebi mwahuriire ahari shoimwe. 
John8:39 Baagarukamu nibamugira bati: Abrahamu niwe tataitwe. Yesu yaabagira ati: Kuri muri abaana ba Abrahamu, mukaatwarize nk'oku Abrahamu yaatwarize." 
John8:40 Kwonka mbwenu nimwenda kuunyita, nyowe omuntu owaabagambira eby'amazima, ebi naahuriire ahari Ruhanga; haza kunu Abrahamu tarakozire atyo." 
John8:41 Imwe nimukora emirimo ya shoimwe. Baamugira bati: Tituri baana b'obushambani; twine Tataitwe omwe, ni Ruhanga." 
John8:42 Yesu yaabagira ati: Kuri noogira ngu Ruhanga ni Shoimwe, mukaankunzire, ahakuba omu kwija nkaruga ahari Ruhanga; tindaizire habwangye, kureka Ogwo niwe yantumire." 
John8:43 N'enki ekirikubazibira kushoborokyerwa eki ndikugamba? N'ahabwokuba timurikubaasa kworobera kigambo kyangye. 
John8:44 Muri aba shoimwe Sitaane, kandi mukunda kukora ebi shoimwe ayetenga. We n'omwitsi okuruga iranaira, taragumiire mu mazima, ahakuba amazima tigamubamu. Ku abeiha, aba naagamba ebye, ahakuba n'omubeihi, ishe w'ebishuba." 
John8:45 Kwonka nyowe ahabw'okugamba amazima, imwe timuunyikiriza." 
John8:46 N'oha ahariimwe orikunyomesereza ekibi? Ku ndaabe ningamba amazima, n'enki ekirikubazibira kuunyikiriza?" 
John8:47 Owa Ruhanga ahurira ebigambo bya Ruhanga; imwe eki mutabihuririra n'ahabw'okuba timuri ba Ruhanga. 
John8:48 Abayudaaya baamugarukamu bati: Tituhikire kukweta Omusamaria, kandi oriho daimoni?" 
John8:49 Yesu yaagarukamu ati: Tindiho daimoni; nimpa Tata ekitiinisa; kwonka imwe nimungaya. 
John8:50 Haza nyowe tiinyesherurira kitiinisa; hariho Omwe okinsherurira, kandi niwe Mucwi w'emanja." 
John8:51 Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Omuntu ku ayorobera ekigambo kyangye, tarifa ebiro byona." 
John8:52 Abayudaaya baamugira bati: Mbwenu ho twamanya ku oriho daimoni. Abrahamu akafa, na baanabi baafa; haza ogira oti: Omuntu ku ayorobera ekigambo kyangye, tariroza ha kufa ebiro byona!" 
John8:53 Iwe shi, nookira tatenkuriitwe Abrahamu owaafiire, kandi na baanabi? Nooyeyeta oha?" 
John8:54 Yesu yaagarukamu ati: Ku ndaabe niinyeha ekitiinisa, ekitiinisa kyangye ni busha. Tata, imwe ou mweta Ruhanga waanyu, niwe ampa ekitiinisa." 
John8:55 Imwe timukamumanyaga; kwonka nyowe nimmumanya; ku naakugira nti, Tindikumumanya, nkaaba omubeihi nkaimwe; kwonka nimmumanya, kandi nyorobera ekigambo kye." 
John8:56 Shoimwe Abrahamu akashemererwa aine ekihika ky'okureeba ekiro kyangye; ku yaakireebire, yaayesiima munonga." 
John8:57 Abayudaaya nikwo kumugarukamu bati: Tokahikize myaka makumi ataano, haza oti, nkareeba Abrahamu?" 
John8:58 Yesu yaabagira ati: Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Abrahamu atakazairwe, nyowe Ndiho." 
John8:59 Okuruga aho baatorotoora amabaare kugamuteera; kwonka Yesu yaayeshereka, yaashohora omuri hekalu." 
John9:1 Ku yaabaire naahingura, yaareeba omushaija owaazairwe ari empumi." 
John9:2 Abeegi be baamubuuza bati: Rabi, owaasiisire n'oha, n'omushaija ogu, nari n'abaamuzaire, nikyo yaazaariirwe ari empumi?" 
John9:3 Yesu yaagarukamu ati: Tarahumisiibwe kushiisha kwe nari okw'abazaire be, kureka kikabaho ngu emirimo ya Ruhanga eyorekyerwe ahariwe." 
John9:4 Tushemereire kukora emiromo y'Ogwo owantumire, bukiri nyomushana; ekiro nikiija, eki omuntu ataribaasa kukoreramu." 
John9:5 Obu nkiri omu nsi, ndi Omushana gw'ensi." 
John9:6 Ku yaaherize kugamba atyo, yaacwera amacwante aha itaka, yaagaritobesa, yaarimusiiga omu maisho," 
John9:7 yaamuragiira ati: Gyenda onaabe omu kiyanja kya Siloamu, (amakuru gaakyo ngu Otumirwe.) Yaagyenda, yaanaaba, yaagaruka naahweza." 
John9:8 Bataahi be n'abaabaire bamureeba ira naasheega, baagira bati: Ogu t'omushaija owaabaire atuura naasheega?" 
John9:9 Abamwe baagira ntu, Niwe; abandi ngu, Ngaaha, kwonka nibashushana. We yaagira ati: Niinye." 
John9:10 Baamubuuza bati: Beitu shi, amaisho gaawe gaahumuuka gata?" 
John9:11 Yaagarukamu ati: Omushaija orikwetwa Yesu yaatoba eitaka, yaarinsiiga omu maisho, yangira ati: Gyenda aha kiyanja Siloamu, onaabe; naanye naagyenda, naanaaba, naahweza." 
John9:12 Baamubuuza bati: Mbwenu we arahi? Yaagira ati: Tindikumanya. 
John9:13 Owaabaire ari empumi baamutwara, baamuhitsya Abafarisaayo." 
John9:14 Kandi eizooba eri Yesu yaatobeireho eitaka, akahumuura amaisho ge, rikaba riri erya Sabato." 
John9:15 Abafarisaayo nabo baamubuuza oku yaahumuuka. Yaabaigira ati: Yansiiga eitaka omu maisho, naanaaba, naahweza." 
John9:16 Abamwe aha Bafarisaayo baagira bati: Ti wa Ruhanga, ahakuba tarinda Sabato. Kwonka abandi baagira bati: Omuntu omusiisi naabaasa ata kukora obumanyiso bukuru nk'obu? Okuruga aho tibaikirizana." 
John9:17 Baagaruka baabuuza owaabaire ari empumi bati: Weeza iwe, nk'oku yaakuhumuura, noomugambaho ki? Yaagira ati: Ni nabi." 
John9:18 Abayudaaya baayanga kwikiriza ku yaabaire ari empumi, akahumuuka, okuhitsya obu baayetsire abazaire be," 
John9:19 bakababuuza nibagira bati: ogu ni mutabani waanyu, ou mugira ngu akazaarwa ari empumi? Mbwenu yaahumuuka ata?" 
John9:20 Abazaire be baagarukamu bati: Nitumanya ngu ogu n'omwana waitu, kandi akazaarwa ahumire;" 
John9:21 kwonka oku yaahumuuka hati, titurikukumanya, kandi n'owaamuhumuura, titurikumumanya. Naimwe mumwebuurize; ni mukuru, ayegambire." 
John9:22 Abazaire be eki baagambiire ebyo n'ahabw'okutiina Abayudaaya; ahabw'okuba Abayudaaya bakaba baragaine ngu omuntu weena origamba Yesu ku ari Kristo, abingwe omuri sinagogi." 
John9:23 Abazaire be nikyo baagiriire bati, Ni mukuru; mumwebuurize." 
John9:24 Omushaija ogwo owaabaire ari empumi, baamweta obwa kabiri, baamugira bati: Himbisa Ruhanga; itwe nitumanya ngu omushaija ogwo n'omusiisi." 
John9:25 Yaagarukamu ati: Ku araabe ari omusiisi, tindikumanya; eki ndikumanya ni kimwe; mbaire ndi empumi, mbwenu nimpweza." 
John9:26 Baamubuuza bati: Yaakugira ata? Amaisho gaawe yaagahumuuza ki? 
John9:27 Yaabagarukamu ati: Naaheza kubagambira, kwonka mwayanga kuhurira. Ahabw'enki nimwenda ngu nkigarukyemu? Naimwe nimwenda kuhinduka abeegi be?" 
John9:28 Baamujuma nibagira bati: Niiwe mwegi we, itwe turi aba Musa." 
John9:29 Nitumanya ngu Ruhanga akagamba na Musa; kwonka omushaija ogwo titurikumanya i yaarugire. 
John9:30 Omushaija yaagarukamu naabagira ati: Ka n'eihano, imwe okutamanya i yaarugire, haza ahumwire amaisho gangye!" 
John9:31 Nitumanya ngu Ruhanga tahurira basiisi, kwonka omuntu weena ku amuramya, yaakora ebi akunda, ogwo Ruhanga amuhurira." 
John9:32 Okuruga aha kuhangwa kw'ensi tikikahurirwaga ngu hariho orahumwire amaisho g'omuntu owaazairwe ari empumi. 
John9:33 Omushaija ogwo ku akubaire atari wa Ruhanga, taine ki yaakubaasize kukora." 
John9:34 Baamugarukamu bati: Iwe okazaarirwa omu bibi bisha; mbwenu naiwe nooyenda kutwegyesa? Baamubinga. 
John9:35 Yesu yaahurira ku baamubinga; yaamusherura; ku yaamuboine, yaamubuuza ati: Noikiriza Omwana wa Ruhanga?" 
John9:36 Yaamugarukamu ati: N'oha, Mukama wangye, nkamwikiriza?" 
John9:37 Yesu yaamugira ati: Waamureeba, niwe ogu orikugamba naiwe." 
John9:38 Yaamugira ati: Mukama wangye, niinyikiriza. Yaamuramya." 
John9:39 Yesu yaagira ati: Okucwa emanja nikwo kwandeetsire omu nsi egi, ngu abatarikureeba bareebe, kandi abarikureeba bahindukye empumi." 
John9:40 Abamwe aha Bafarisaayo abaabaire bamuri haihi baahurira ebyo bigambo, baamubuuza bati: Naitwe turi empumi?" 
John9:41 Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Kuri noogira ngu muri empumi, timwakugizire kibi; kwonka mbwenu ahabw'okugira muti, Nitureeba, nikyo ekibi kyanyu kirikugumiraho." 
John10:1 Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Orikutaaha omu itsibikiro ry'entaama atareetsirwe mu irembo, kureka akatembera ahandi, ogwo n'omushuma kandi omwambuzi;" 
John10:2 kwonka orikureetwa omu irembo niwe muriisa w'entaama. 
John10:3 We omurinzi w'eirembo amwiguriraho; n'entaama zijurira eiraka rye, ayetamu eze amaziina, azishohoza aheeru." 
John10:4 Ku aheza kushohoza eze zoona, azeebembera, nazo zimukuratira; ahakuba zimanya eiraka rye." 
John10:5 Ou zitarikumanya tizimukuratira, zimuhunga; ahakuba tizirikumanya maraka g'abandi." 
John10:6 Yesu akabacwera enfumu egyo, kwonka tibaamanya bi yaabaire naabagambira." 
John10:7 Yesu yaagaruka yaabagira ati: Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Niinye irembo ry'entaama. 
John10:8 Abambandiize boona bakaba bari abashuma kandi abambuzi, n'entaama tizirabahuriire." 
John10:9 Niinye irembo; omuntu weena orikutaaha naaraba omuriinye, naajunwa; naataaha, naashohora, naabona eiriisizo." 
John10:10 Omushuma tareetwa kindi kureka okwiba n'okwita n'okucwekyereza; nyowe nkaija ngu zigire amagara, kandi ngu zigire maingi munonga." 
John10:11 Niinye muriisa omurungi. Omuriisa omurungi ahayo amagara ge ahabw'entaama ze. 
John10:12 Oriisiza ebihembo, atari muriisa buzima, kandi n'entaama zitari ze, ku areeba omushega nigwija, atsigaho entaama, ahunga; omushenga guzishahuramu, ezindi guzitaataanisa." 
John10:13 Naahunga, ahabw'okuba n'oguriirwe, entaama tarikuzeetaho." 
John10:14 Niinye muriisa omurungi; nimmanya ezangye, kandi n'ezangye nizimmanya;" 
John10:15 nk'oku Tata arikummanya, naanye nkamanya Tata; kandi mpayo amagara gangye ahabw'ezo ntaama." 
John10:16 Nyine entaama ezindi, ezitari z'omu itsibikiro eri; nazo nshemereire kuzireeta, zihurire eiraka ryangye, zibe obusyo bumwe, n'omuriisa abe omwe." 
John10:17 Tata nikyo ankundira, ahabw'okuba mpayo amagara gangye, ngu mbone kugeegarurira." 
John10:18 Tihariho orikugaanyaka, ningahayo ahabwangye. Nyine obushoboorozi bw'okugahayo, kandi n'obw'okugeegarurira. Ekiragiro eki nkakiheebwa Tata." 
John10:19 Kandi Abayudaaya baagaruka kwebaganisamu ahabw'ebigambo ebyo. 
John10:20 Baingi aharibo baagira bati: Ariho daimoni, agwire eiraro; nimumuhuririra ki?" 
John10:21 Abandi bati: Ebigambo ebi ti by'omuntu oriho daimoni. Nimugira ngu daimoni naabaasa kuhumuura amaisho g'empumi? 
John10:22 Obwo bukaba buri obugyenyi bw'Okweza hekalu omuri Yerusaalemu; 
John10:23 ebiro ebyo bikaba biri eby'embeho. Yesu yaagyendagyenda omuri hekalu omu kisasi kya Sulemaani. 
John10:24 Abayudaaya baamwehinguririza, baamubuuza bati: Oryahitsya hi okutubanganisisa? Ku oraabe ori Kristo, otugambirire kimwe." 
John10:25 Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Nkabagambira, kwonka timurikwikiriza. Emirimo ei ndikukora omu iziina rya Tata, niyo erikumpamya;" 
John10:26 kwonka timurikwikiriza, ahakuba timuri b'omu ntaama zangye." 
John10:27 Entaama zangye zihurira eiraka ryangye, naanye nzimanya, nazo zinkuratira;" 
John10:28 nziha amagara agatahwaho, tizirikhwerekyerera ebiro byona, kandi tihaine orizishahura omu mikono yangye." 
John10:29 Tata, owaazimpaire, naakira boona, kandi tihaine orikubaasa kuzishahura mu mikono ye." 
John10:30 Nyowe na Tata tuba omwe. 
John10:31 Abayudaaya baagaruka baatorotoora amabaare kugamuteera. 
John10:32 Yaabagarukamu ati: Nkabooreka emirimo mingi kandi mirungi eyaarugire ahari Tata; ni guuha omuriiyo ogurikubanteeresa amabaare? 
John10:33 Abayudaaya baamugarukamu bati: Titurikukuteera mabaare ahabw'omurimo murungi, kureka ahabw'okurogota, okeegira Ruhanga, haza kunu ori omuntu." 
John10:34 Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Tikirahandiikirwe omu biragiro byanyu ngu, Nkagira nti: Muri baaruhanga?" 
John10:35 Abo abaziirwe ekigambo kya Ruhanga, ku araabe yaabeetsire baaruhanga, (kandi Ebyahandiikirwe tibibaasa kwihwaho,)" 
John10:36 ogwo Isheboona ou yaayerize akatuma omu nsi, mumubarira okurogota, ahabw'okuba ngizire nti, Ndi Omwana wa Ruhanga?" 
John10:37 Ku ndaabe ntakora mirimo ya Tata, murekye kuunyikiriza;" 
John10:38 kwonka ku ndaabe ngikora, n'obu muraabe mutarikuunyikiriza, mwikirize emirimo, obwo mukaashoborokyerwa, mumanya ku Tata ari omuriinye, naanye omuriwe." 
John10:39 Baateeraho kugaruka kumukwata, yaabooga omu mikono." 
John10:40 Yaagaruka yaayambuka Yorudani, ahu Yohaana yaabaire naabatiriza okubanza, yaagumayo." 
John10:41 Baingi baija ah'ari; baagira bati: Yohaana tarakozire ky'okureeberaho, kwonka byona ebi yaagambire aha muntu ogu bikaba biri eby'amazima." 
John10:42 Baingi baamwikiririza okwo. 
John11:1 Kandi hakaba hariho omushaija owaabaire arwaire, eiziina rye Laazaaro owa Besania, ekirorero eki Mariamu na mukuru we Mariza baabaire batwiremu." 
John11:2 Mariamu ogwo niwe yaasiigire Mukama waitu amajuta, akamusiisirira ebigyere n'eishokye rye; kandi Laazaaro owaabaire arwaire akaba ari munyaanyabo." 
John11:3 Banyaanya abo bakatuma ahari Yesu, nibagira bati: Mukama waitu, ou okunda arwaire." 
John11:4 Yesu ku yaakihuriire, yaagira ati: Endwara egi ti y'okumwita, kureka n'ey'okuhimbisisa Ruhanga, ngu Omwana wa Ruhanga nawe ahimbisibwe ahabwayo." 
John11:5 Kandi Yesu akaba akunda Mariza n'omurumuna na Laazaaro. 
John11:6 Ku yaahuriire ngu arwaire, yaamara kabiri ei yaabaire ari." 
John11:7 Bwanyima y'ebyo biro yaagira abeegi be ati: Ka tugarukye Buyudaaya. 
John11:8 Abeegi be baamugira bati: Rabi, ebiro ebi Abayudaaya babaire nibenda kukuteera amabaare, kandi ogarukyeyo?" 
John11:9 Yesu yaagarukamu ati: Omu izooba tiharimu eshaaha ikumi na ibiri? Omuntu ku agyenda nyomushana, tateera ntsibo, ahakuba areeba omushana gw'ensi egi." 
John11:10 Kwonka omuntu ku agyenda nyekiro, ateera entsibo, ahakuba omushana guba gutari muriwe." 
John11:11 Okwo nikwo yaagambire; bwanyima yaabagira ati: Munywani waitu Laazaaro agwejegyeire; ninza kumusisiimura omu turo. 
John11:12 Abeegi nikwo kumugira bati: Mukama waitu, ku araabe agwejegyeire, naija kukira." 
John11:13 Kwonka Yesu akaba naagama aha kufa kwe; haza bo baateekateeka ngu naagamba aha kugwejegyera okw'oturo. 
John11:14 Yesu yaabagambirira kimwe ati: Laazaaro afiire; 
John11:15 ahabwanyu nyowe niinyesiima okutabayo, mukaabona kwikiriza. Mbwenu ka tugyende ei ari." 
John11:16 Tomasi, orikwetwa Didumo, yaagambira abeegi bagyenzi be ati: Naitwe ka tugyende, tufe nawe." 
John11:17 Yesu ku yaahikireyo, yaashanga Laazaaro amazire kana omu kituuro." 
John11:18 Kandi Besania ekaba eri haihi na Yerusaalemu nka mahiro ibiri. 
John11:19 Abayudaaya baingi bakaba baizire kuyaagira Mariza na Mariamu ahabwa munyaanyabo. 
John11:20 Mariza ku yaahuriire ngu Yesu naija, yaagyenda, yaamubugana; Mariamu we yaaguma ashutami omu nju." 
John11:21 Mariza yaagambira Yesu ati: Mukama wangye, kuri obaire ori aha, munyaanyazi takufiire." 
John11:22 Hoona na hati nimmanya ngu eki oraashabe Ruhanga kyona, niaja kukikuha." 
John11:23 Yesu yaamugira ati: Munyaanyoko naija kuzooka. 
John11:24 Mariza yaamugira ati: Nimmanya ku arizooka aha kuzooka okw'aha mperu. 
John11:25 Yesu yaamugira ati: Niinye kuzooka n'amagara; orikuunyikiriza, n'obu yaakufa, aryaba ohuriire;" 
John11:26 n'omuntu weena oriho ohuriire, kandi orikuunyikiriza, tarifa ebiro byona. Noikiriza ekyo?" 
John11:27 Yaamugarakamu ati: Eego, Mukama wangye, naikiriza ku ori Kristo, Omwana wa Ruhanga, otuura ari ow'okwija omu nsi." 
John11:28 Ku yaaherize kugamba atyo, yaagyenda, yaayeta Mariamu omurumuna, yaamugambira mpora ati: Omwegyesa ari aha, naakweta." 
John11:29 Onu ku yaakihuriire, ahonaaho yaimuka, yaagyenda ah'ari." 
John11:30 Kandi Yesu akaba atakahikire mu kirorero, akiri omu mwanya ahu Mariza yaamushangire." 
John11:31 Abayudaaya abaabaire bari omu nju nibamuyaagira, ku baareebire Mariamu yaarahuka kwimuka yaashohora, baamukuratira nibateekateeka ngu naaza kuririra aha kituuro." 
John11:32 Mariamu ku yaahikire ahu Yesu ari, yaamureeba, yaamukwata amaguru, yaamugira ati: Mukama wangye, kuri obaire ori aha, munyaanyazi takufiire." 
John11:33 Yesu ku yaamureebire naarira, n'Abayudaaya abaizire nawe nabo nibarira, yaatsinda omu mutima gwe, yaagira obusaasi." 
John11:34 Yaababuuza ati: Mumuziikire hi? Baamugira bati: Mukama waitu, ija oreebe." 
John11:35 Yesu yaarira. 
John11:36 Abayudaaya baagira bati: Eshi abaire naamukunda! 
John11:37 Kwonka bamwe aharibo baagira bati: Beitu omushaija ogu, owaahumwire empumi, taakubaasize kuzibira n'omuntu ogwo kufa?" 
John11:38 Yesu yaagaruka yaatsinda, yaahika aha kituuro; (kikaba kiri enyanga, ekingirweho eibaare.)" 
John11:39 Yesu yaaragiira ati: Mwiheho eibaare. Mariza munyaanya w'ogwo nyakufa yaamugira ati: Mukama wangye, hati yaanuukire, ahabw'okuba amazire kana afiire." 
John11:40 Yesu yaamugira ati: Tinaakugira nti, Ku oraikirize, noija kureeba ekitiinisa kya Ruhanga?" 
John11:41 Batyo baihaho eibaare. Yesu yaimutsya amaisho ge, yaareeba ahaiguru, yaagira ati: Taata, ninkusiima, ahabw'okuba wampurira." 
John11:42 Kandi naamanya ku ompurira obutoosha; kwonka eki naakigamba ahabw'abantu aba abanyehinguririize, ngu baikirize ku niiwe wantumire." 
John11:43 Ku yaaherize kugamba ekyo, yaagamba n'eiraka rihango ati: Laazaaro, shohora, oije." 
John11:44 Nyakufa yaashohora, azingazingirwe omu myenda emikono n'amaguru, n'omutanda gukomire aha maisho ge. Yesu yaabaragiira ati: Mumukomorore, mumurekye agyende." 
John11:45 Abayudaaya baingi, abaizire owa Mariamu, ku baareebire ebi Yesu yaakora, baamwikiriza;" 
John11:46 kwonka abandi baagyenda aha Bafarisaayo, baabagambira ebi Yesu yaakora." 
John11:47 Abanyamurwa abakuru n'Abafarisaayo baateerana eishengyero, baagira bati: Tugire tuta? Ahakuba omushaija ogwo naakora obumanyiso bwingi." 
John11:48 Ku turaamurekye yaagumizamu atyo, boona nibaija kumwikiriza, kandi Abarooma baryaija batwakye omwanya gwaitu ogurikwera, batware n'eihanga ryaitu." 
John11:49 Omwe aharibo, Kayaafa, owaabaire ari omunyamurwa omukuru omu mwaka ogwo, yaabagambira ati: Timweine ki murikumanya;" 
John11:50 timurikwetegyereza ku kiri kirungi ahabwanyu omuntu omwe kufeera abantu, okukira eihanga ryona okuhwerekyerera." 
John11:51 Ekigambo ekyo tarakigambiise bwengye bwe wenka, kwonka ahabw'okuba omunyamurwa omukuru omu mwaka ogwo, karagura ku Yesu ashemereire kufeera eihanga eryo:" 
John11:52 kandi ti ihanga eryo ryonka, kureka okuteeranira hamwe abaana ba Ruhanga abaataataine." 
John11:53 Okuruga aha izooba eryo baaguma nibahanuura hamwe oku baraite Yesu. 
John11:54 Nikyo Yesu yaarekyeire kugyendagyenda naareebwa omu Bayudaaya; akarugayo akaza omu mwanya oguri haihi n'eihamba, omuri tauni erikwetwa Efuraimu; akaguma okwo n'abeegi be." 
John11:55 Kandi Okuhingurwaho kw'Abayudaaya kukaba kuri haihi; abantu baingi baaruga omu byaro, bainamuka yerusaalemu kweyeza, Okuhingurwaho kutakahikire." 
John11:56 Ku baahikireyo, baatandika kusherura Yesu, nibagambirana beemereire omuri hekalu bati: Nimuteekateeka muta? Nimugira ngu tarikwija aha bugyenyi?" 
John11:57 Kandi abanyamurwa abakuru n'Abafarisaayo bakaba bataireho ekiragiro ngu omuntu weena ku araamanye ei ari, aije abagambire, bamukwate." 
John12:1 Ku haabaire hatsigaireyo ebiro mukaaga okuhika aha Kuhingurwaho, Yesu yaija Besania, ahu Laazaaro, ou yaazoire omu bafu, yaabaire ari." 
John12:2 Okwo baamuteekyerayo eby'okurya bya nyekiro; Mariza yaaheereza, Laazaaro akaba ari omwe aha baabaire bashutami na Yesu aha by'okurya." 
John12:3 Mariamu yaakwata eraatiri y'amajuta g'omugaju ag'obuguzi bwingi munonga; yaagasiiga aha bigyere bya Yesu, yaabisiisiriza eishokye rye, enju yoona yaataamirana emigaju." 
John12:4 Kwonka Yuda Iskaryota, omwe aha beegi be, owaabaire naayenda kumureebya, yaagira ati:" 
John12:5 Ahabw'enki amajuta aga gataatundwa gakarugamu edenaari magana ashatu, zikagabirwa abooro?" 
John12:6 Taragambire atyo habw'okusaasira abooro; kureka akaba ari omushuma, kandi ahabw'okuba niwe yaabaire ahagatira enshaho, akaba atuura naakora aha byabaire biteebwamu." 
John12:7 Yesu yaagira ati: Mumurekye, agabiikire ekiro ky'okuziikwa kwangye." 
John12:8 Abooro mutuura nabo obutoosha, kwonka nyowe timuriguma naanye obutoosha." 
John12:9 Abantu baingi omu Bayudaaya ku baamanyire ngu ari okwo, bajayo, ti habwa Yesu wenka, kureka ngu bareebe na Laazaaro, ou yaazoire omu bafu." 
John12:10 Abanyamurwa abakuru baahanuura kwita na Laazaaro; 
John12:11 ahabw'okuba ahabwe baingi aha Bayudaaya bakabarugamu, baikiriza Yesu." 
John12:12 Ku bwaseesire, omutwe muhango gw'abantu, abaabaire baizire aha bugyenyi, ku baahuriire ngu Yesu naija Yerusaalemu," 
John12:13 baatwara amataagi g'enkindo, baaza kumubugana, nibeeshongora bati: Hosana! Orikwija omu iziina rya Mukama asiimwe, niwe Mugabe wa Israeli!" 
John12:14 Yesu, ku yaareebire omwana gw'endogoya, yaagutembaho, nk'oku kyahandiikirwe ngu," 
John12:15 Otatiina, iwe Saayuuni, reeba Mukama waawe naija, atembire omwana gw'endogoya." 
John12:16 Okubanza abeegi be tibarashoborokyeirwe ebyo; kwonka Yesu, ku yaaherize kuhimbisibwa, baabona kwijuka ngu ebyo byona bikamuhandiikwaho, kandi byamukorerwa." 
John12:17 Kandi omutwe gw'abantu abaabaire bariho obu yaayeta Laazaaro okuruga omu kituuro, akamuzoora omu bafu, baabihamya." 
John12:18 N'ahabw'ekyo omutwe gw'abantu gwaza kumubugana, ahakuba bakaba bahuriire ku akozire akamanyiso ako." 
John12:19 Abafarisaayo nikwo kugambirana bati: Mureebe ku mutakiine ky'okukora; reeba, ensi yoona yaamukuratira." 
John12:20 Kandi omuri abo abaizire aha bugyenyi kuramya, hakaba harimu Abagriika." 
John12:21 Abo baija ahari Filipo owa Besesaida ey'omuri Galilaaya, baamushaba nibagira bati: Taata, nitwenda kureeba Yesu." 
John12:22 Filipo yaija yaabigambira Anderea. Anderea yaija na Filipo, baabigambira Yesu." 
John12:23 Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Obunaku bwahika Omwana w'omuntu kuhimbisibwa. 
John12:24 Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Akajuma k'engano, ku kaba katagwire mu itaka, kakafa, kagumaho konka; kwonka ku kafa, kaana ebyana bingi." 
John12:25 Orikukunda amagara ge, ryagabuza; kandi ogwo orikwanga amagara ge omu nsi egi, aryagarinda okuhitsya aha magara agatahwaho." 
John12:26 Omuntu weena ku araabe nampeereza, ankuratire; kandi ahi ndi, n'omuheereza wangye niho ariba; omuntu weena ku ampeereza, Tata aryamuha ekitiinisa." 
John12:27 Mbwenu omutima gwangye gwine obusaasi; kandi ngambe ki? Ngire nti, Taata, njuna ntahika aha bunaku obu? Ngaaha, ahakuba eki naiziire n'okubuhikaho." 
John12:28 Taata, himbisa eiziina ryawe. Omu mwanya ogwo eiraka ryayema omu iguru, nirigira riti: Naarihimbisa, kandi ndyagaruka ndihimbise." 
John12:29 Abantu abaabaire beemereire aho, baarihurira, baagira bati, Eiguru ryahinda. Abandi bati: Ni maraika owaagamba nawe." 
John12:30 Yesu yaagarukamu naagira ati: Eiraka eri ryaija ahabwanyu, ti habwangye." 
John12:31 Hati ensi egi yaacwerwa orubanja; hati omutegyeki w'ensi egi naija kubingwa; 
John12:32 naanye ku ndiihwa aha nsi naahanikwa, ndyairiza abantu boona ahariinye." 
John12:33 Ekyo akakigamba kworeka okufa oku yaabaire naija kufa. 
John12:34 Abantu baamugarukamu bati: Omu Biragiro tukahurira ngu Kristo agumaho ebiro byona. Kandi noobaasa ota kugamba ngu Omwana w'omuntu ashemereire kuhanikwa? Omwana w'omuntu ogwo n'oha? 
John12:35 Yesu yaabagira ati: Hatsigaire omwanya mukye ogu mukiiniiremu omushana; mugyende mukiine omushana, obwire butakaabairirira omu muhanda; ogyendera omu mwirima, tamanya i arikuza." 
John12:36 Obu mukiine omushana, mwikirize omushana, mubone kuba abaana b'omushana. Yesu ku yaaherize kugamba ekyo, yaarugayo, yaabeeshereka." 
John12:37 Kwonka n'obu araabe yaakozire obumanyiso bwingi omu maisho gaabo, hoona nabwo tibaramwikiriize," 
John12:38 ngu ekigambo kya nabi Isaaya kihikiirire, eki yaagambire ati: Mukama, n'oha oikiriize ebigambo byaitu, Kandi omukono gwa Mukama gukashuuruurirwa oha?" 
John12:39 Nikyo baremeirwe okwikiriza, ahakuba Isaaya akagaruka yaagira ati:" 
John12:40 Akabahumya amaisho, yaagangaaza emitima yaabo, Ngu barekye kureeba n'amaisho, n'okwetegyereza n'emitima yaabo, N'okuhinduka, ngu mbakize." 
John12:41 Isaaya akagamba ekyo, ahakuba akareeba ekitiinisa kye, yaamugambaho." 
John12:42 Baingi nangwa n'abakuru baamwikiriza; kwonka ahabw'okutiina Abafarisaayo tibaakigamba, ngu batabingwa omuri sinagogi;" 
John12:43 ahabw'okuba bakenda kusiimwa abantu okukira okusiimwa Ruhanga. 
John12:44 Yesu yaagamba n'eiraka rihangao ati: Orikuunyikiriza, tiinye arikuba aikiriize, kureka Ogwo owantumire." 
John12:45 Kandi orikundeeba, naaba areebire Owantumire." 
John12:46 Nyowe nyizire omu nsi kuba omushana, ngu omuntu weena orikuunyikiriza arekye kuguma omu mwirima." 
John12:47 Omuntu weena ku ahurira ebi ngamba, ataabyorobera, nyowe timmucwera rubanja; ahakuba tindaizire kucwera nsi rubanja, kureka okugijuna." 
John12:48 Orikuunyanga, kanga n'ebigambo byangye, aine orikumucwera orubanja; ekigambo eki naagambire, nikyo kirimucwera orubanja aha kiro ky'aha mperu." 
John12:49 Ahakuba tindagambire habwangye; Tata owantumire niwe yandagiire eky'okugamba, n'oku ndaakigambe." 
John12:50 Nimmanya ngu ekiragiro kye n'amagara agatahwaho; n'ahabw'ekyo ebi ngamba, mbigamba nk'oku Tata yaabingambiire." 
John13:1 Obugyenyi bw'Okuhingurwaho butakahikire, Yesu akamanya ku obunaku bwe buhikire okuruga omu nsi egi kugaruka ahari Ishe. Ku yaakunzire abe ab'omu nsi, yaagumizamu naabakunda okuhitsya aha muheru." 
John13:2 Ku baabaire nibarya eby'okurya bya nyekiro, Sitaane yaaherize kwosya omutima gwa Yuda Iskaryota, mwene Simooni, kumureebya;" 
John13:3 na Yesu yaamanyire ngu Ishe amurekuriire byona, kandi ngu akaruga ahari Ruhanga, kandi naagaruka ahari Ruhanga," 
John13:4 yaaruga aha by'okurya, yaajuura eby'okujwara bye, yaakwata ekitambaara, yaakyezirika omunda." 
John13:5 Yaashuka amaizi aha kinaabiro, yaatandika kunaabisa abeegi be ebigyere n'okubiragarisa ekitambaara eki yaabaire ayezirikiise." 
John13:6 Atyo yaahika ahari Simooni Petero. Petero yaamubuuza ati: Mukama wangye, hoona Iwe kunnabisa ebigyere!" 
John13:7 Yesu yaagarukamu naamugira ati: Eki ndikukora torikukimanya; kwonka oryakimanya bwanyima. 
John13:8 Petero yaamugira ati: Reka! Torommabosa bogyere ebiro byona. Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Ku ndaabe ntakunaabiise, nituba tutakikwatanisa." 
John13:9 Simooni Petero yaamugira ati: Mukama wangye, kyabaire kityo, otannaabisa ebigyere byonka, kureka n'emikono n'omu mutwe." 
John13:10 Yesu yaamugira ati: Owaayogire, tashemereire kindi kureka okunaaba aha bigyere byonka; ahabw'okuba aba naayera weena; kandi imwe nimwera, kwonka ti mwena." 
John13:11 Ahakuba akaba naamanya oraamureebye; nikyo yaagiriire ati: Mwena timurikwera. 
John13:12 Ku yaaherize kubanaabisa ebigyere, yaajwara ebijwaro bye, yaagaruka omu mwanya gwe, yaababuuza ati: Nimumanya eki naabakorera?" 
John13:13 Muunyeta Omwegyesa kandi Mukama waanyu; kandi eki murikugamba nikyo, ahabw'okuba nikwo ndi." 
John13:14 Mbwenu ku ndaabe naabanaabisa ebigyere, haza ndi Mukama waanyu kandi Omwegyesa waanyu, naimwe kibashemereire kunaabisana ebigyere;" 
John13:15 ahakuba naabaha eky'okureeberaho, ngu naimwe mukore nk'oku naabakorera." 
John13:16 Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Omuhuuku takira mukama we; kandi n'entumwa tekira ogitumire. 
John13:17 Ku muraabe nimumanya ebyo, muhiiriirwe mwaba nimubikora." 
John13:18 Tindikubagambaho mwena; nimmanya abu naatooraine; kwonka Ekyahandiikirwe kihikiirire ngu, Owaarya aha by'okurya byangye, niwe ambangiire omugyere." 
John13:19 Nimbagambira eki hati, kitakabaireho, ngu ku kiriba kyabaireho, mwikirize ngu ndi Ogwo." 
John13:20 Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Oyakiira omuntu weena ou ntuma, biri niinye ayakiire; kandi onyakiira, biri ayakiire Ogwo owantumire." 
John13:21 Yesu ku yaaherize kugamba atyo, yaashoberwa omu mutima, yaahamya ati: Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Omwe ahariimwe naija kundeebya." 
John13:22 Abeegi baareebana, nibabanganisa aha u yaagambaho." 
John13:23 Kandi omwe aha beegi be ou Yesu yaabaire akunda, akaba amwegamiire omu kifuba, bari aha by'okurya." 
John13:24 Simooni Petero yaamwitira eriisho, yaamugira ati: Tugambire ou yaagambaho." 
John13:25 Ogwo, nk'oku yaabaire ayegamiire Yesu omu kifuba, yaamubuuza ati: Mukama wangye, n'oha?" 
John13:26 Yesu yaagarukamu ati: Ou ndaakoreze ekitongye, nkakimuha, niwe ogwo. Ku yaakorize ekitongye, yaakiha Yuda mwene Simooni Iskaryota." 
John13:27 Ku yaaherize kuheebwa ekitongye, Sitaane yaamutaahamu. Nikyo Yesu yaamugiriire ati: Eki orikwenda kukora, kirahutsye." 
John13:28 Omuri abo abaabaire bashutami aha by'okurya, tihariho n'omwe owaamanyire eki yaamugambiriire ekyo." 
John13:29 Ahabw'okuba Yuda niwe yaabaire arinda enshaho y'empiiha, abamwe baateekateeka ngu Yesu yaamuragiira kugura ebirikwetengwa aha bugyenyi, nari shi kugira eki yaaha abooro." 
John13:30 Yuda, ku yaaherize kwakiira ekitongye, ahonaaho yaashohora; kandi bukaba bwaizire." 
John13:31 Ku yaaherize kushohora, Yesu yaagira ati: Hati mbwenu Omwana w'omuntu yaahimbisibwa, na Ruhanga yaahimbisizibwa omuriwe;" 
John13:32 kandi Ruhanga ku araabe yaahimbisizibwa omu Mwana we, naija kuhimbisa Omwana we omuriwe, amuhimbise ahonaaho." 
John13:33 Baana bato 'mwe, nkiri naimwe omwanya mukye; muryansherura; kandi nk'oku naagambiire Abayudaaya, naimwe nikwo ndikubagambira nti: Ei ndikuza, timurikubaasa kwijayo." 
John13:34 Nimbaha ekiragiro kisya nti: Mukundane; nk'oku naabakunzire, naimwe mube nikwo mwakundana." 
John13:35 Ku muriguma nimukundana, nibwo abantu boona baribamanya ku muri abeegi bangye." 
John13:36 Simooni Petero yaamubuuza ati: Mukama wangye, nooza hi? Yesu yaagarukamu ati: Ei ndikuza, torikubaasa kunkuratayo hati; kwonka oryankurata bwanyima." 
John13:37 Petero yaamugambira ati: Mukama wangye, n'enki ekirikunzibira kukukuratayo hati? Niinyija kuhayo amagara gangye ahabwawe." 
John13:38 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Noija kuhayo amagara gaawe ahabwangye? Buzimazima ninkugambira nti: Enkoko terikwija kugamba, otakanyehakaine kashatu." 
John14:1 Emitima yaanyu etarishoberwa; mwikirize Ruhanga, naanye muunyikirize." 
John14:2 Omu nju ya Tata harimu emyanya mingi ey'okutuuramu; kuri kitari kityo, nkaabagambiire; hati ninza kubashemereza omwanya." 
John14:3 Kandi ku ndaabe ninza kubashemereza omwanya, ndyagaruka aha, mbatware ei ndi; okwo ei ndi, naimwe mube niyo mwatuura." 
John14:4 Kandi ei ndikuza, omuhanda nimugumanya." 
John14:5 Tomasi yaamubuuza ati: Mukama wangye, ka tutarikumanya i orikuza, omuhanda nitugumanya tuta?" 
John14:6 Yesu yaamugambira ati: Niinye muhanda, n'amazima, n'amagara; tihariho oija ahari Isheboona, atarabire muriinye." 
John14:7 Kuri mwammanyire, na Tata nawe mukaamumanyire. Okuruga hati nimumamanya, kandi mwamureeba." 
John14:8 Filipo yaamugira ati: Mukama wangye, tworekye Isheboona; ekyo nikitumara." 
John14:9 Yesu yaamubuuza ati: Filipo, ahi nakatuurira naimwe, tokammanyaga? Ondeebire, biri areebire Isheboona; n'enki ekirikukushabisa oti, Otworekye Isheboona?" 
John14:10 Torikwikiriza ku ndi omuri Tata, kandi na Tata ku ari omuriinye? Ebigambo ebi mbagambira timbyetuma, kureka Tata ori omuriinye niwe akora emirimo ye." 
John14:11 Muunyikirize ku ndi omuri Tata, na Tata ku ari omuriinye; nari shi muunyikirize ahabw'emirimo yonka." 
John14:12 Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Orikuunyikiriza, emirimo ei nkora erikukira eyangye obuhango, ahabw'okuba nyowe ningyenda ahari Tata." 
John14:13 Kandi kyona eki murishaba omu iziina ryangye, ndyakikora, Isheboona abone kuhimbisibwa omu Mwana." 
John14:14 Ku murishaba ekintu kyona omu iziina ryangye, ndyakikora." 
John14:15 Ku muraabe nimunkunda, nimwija kukwata ebiragiro byangye." 
John14:16 Naanye ndyashaba Tata, nawe aryabaha Omuhwezi ondiijo, agume naimwe obutwire bwona." 
John14:17 Omuhwezi ogwo n'Omwoyo ow'amazima, ou ensi etarikubaasa kwakiira, ahakuba temureeba n'obu kwakuba okumumanya; kwonka imwe mumumanya; ahakuba aguma naimwe, kandi aryatuura omuriimwe." 
John14:18 Tindibatsiga muri efuuzi; ndyaija ahi muri. 
John14:19 Hatsigaire omwanya mukye, ensi okutandeeba bundi; kwonka imwe muryandeeba; ahabw'okuba ndi ohuriire, naimwe muryaba abahuriire." 
John14:20 Aha kiro ekyo muryamanya ku ndi omuri Tata, naimwe ku muri omuriinye, naanye omuriimwe." 
John14:21 Oine ebiragiro byangye akabyorobera niwe arikunkunda; kandi orikunkunda, aryakundwa Tata, naanye ndyamukunda, mmweyorekye." 
John14:22 Yuda, otari Iskaryota, yaamubuuza ati: Mukama wangye, kibaire kita iwe okutweyoreka, oteeyorekye nsi?" 
John14:23 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Omuntu ku arikunkunda, aryarinda ekigambo kyangye, na Tata aryamukunda; kandi turyaija ahariwe, tutuure nawe." 
John14:24 Otarikunkunda, tarinda bigambo byangye; kandi ekigambo eki muhurira ti kyangye; n'ekya Tata owantumire." 
John14:25 Ebigambo ebi naabibagambira nkibaine. 
John14:26 Kwonka Omuhwezi, Omwoyo Orikwera, ou Isheboona aryohereza omu iziina ryangye, niwe aribeegyesa byona, akabaijutsya byona ebi naabagambiire." 
John14:27 Nimbatsigira obusingye; obusingye bwangye nimbubaha; tindikubaha nk'oku ensi eha. Emitima yaanyu etarishoberwa, n'obu kwakuba okutiina." 
John14:28 Mwahurira ku naabagambira nti, Ningyenda, kandi ndyagaruka ahu muri. Kuri nimunkunda, mukaashemereirwe, ahabw'okuba ninza ahari Tata; kandi Tata nankira." 
John14:29 Hati naakibagambira kitakabaireho, ngu ku kiriba kyahikire, mukiikirize." 
John14:30 Tinkigamba bingi naimwe, ahabw'okuba omutegyeki w'ensi egi naija, kwonka taanyineho bushoboorozi." 
John14:31 Nyowe nkora nk'oku Tata yandagiire, ngu ensi emanye ku mmukunda. Mwimukye, turugye aha." 
John15:1 Nyowe ndi omuzaabibu gw'amazima, na Tata niwe muhingi." 
John15:2 Buri itaagi eriri omuriinye, eritaana byana, aritemaho; kandi buri itaagi eryana ebyana, arisharira ngu rikizeho kwana." 
John15:3 Hati mwaheza kushemezibwa ahabw'ekigambo eki naabagambira. 
John15:4 Mugume omuriinye, naanye omuriimwe. Nk'oku eitaagi ritabaasa kwana byana ryonka, ryaba ritagumire ha muzaabibu, nikwo naimwe mutarikubaasa, mwaba mutagumire muriinye." 
John15:5 Niinye muzaabibu, naimwe muri amataagi. Oguma omuriinye, naanye omuriwe, ogwo niwe ayana ebyana bingi; ahakuba nyowe ahu ntari, timwine ki murikubaasa kukora." 
John15:6 Omuntu ku aba atagumire muriinye, anagwa nk'eitaagi, kandi ayoma; ago mataagi gashangurizibwa, ganagwa omu muriro, gasya." 
John15:7 Ku muraagume omuriinye, n'ebigambo byangye byaguma omuriimwe, mushabe kyona eki murikwenda, kiryabakorerwa." 
John15:8 Ekihimbisisa Tata, kikahamya ku muri abeegi bangye, niimwe okwana ebyana bingi." 
John15:9 Nk'oku Tata yankunzire, naanye nikwo naabakunzire; mugume omu kukunda kwangye." 
John15:10 Ku muriguma nimworobera ebiragiro byangye, muryaguma omu kukunda kwangye, nkaanye oku ntuura niinyorobera ebiragiro bya Tata, nkaguma omu kukunda kwe." 
John15:11 Ebi naabibagambira, ngu okushemererwa kwangye kube omuriimwe, kandi ngu okushemererwa kwanyu kube okuhikire." 
John15:12 Eki nikyo kiragiro kyangye, mukundane nk'oku naabakunzire." 
John15:13 Tihariho rukundo erikukira egi, omuntu okufeera banywani be." 
John15:14 Imwe muri banywani bangye, ku muraabe nimukora ebi ndikubaragiira." 
John15:15 Tinkibeeta bahuuku, ahakuba omuhuuku tamanya ki mukama we akora; kureka mbeetsire banywani bangye, ahakuba byona ebi naagambiirwe Tata, mbibamanyiise." 
John15:16 Timwe mwantooraine; niinye naabatooraine, nkabataho ngu mugyende mwane ebyana, kandi ngu ebyana byanyu bigumeho; n'ahabw'ekyo kyona eki murishaba Isheboona omu iziina ryangye, aryakibaha." 
John15:17 Ebi nimbibaragiira ngu mukundane. 
John15:18 Ensi ku eribanga, mumanye ngu ekabanza kuunyanga etakabangire." 
John15:19 Kuri muri ab'ensi, ensi ekaabakunzire, ahabw'okuba abaayo; kwonka ahabw'okuba timuri b'ensi, kandi nkabatoorana kubaiha omu b'ensi, nikyo ensi erikubangira." 
John15:20 Mwijukye ekigambo eki naabagambiire nti: Omuhuuku takira mukama we. Ku baraabe bampiigire, naimwe baryabahiiga; ku baraabe baarinzire ekigambo kyangye, n'ekyanyu baryakirinda." 
John15:21 Ebyo byona baryabibakora nibabatura eiziina ryangye, ahabw'okuba tibarikumanya Owantumire." 
John15:22 Kuri ntaraizire, nkagamba nabo, tibaakugizire kibi; kwonka hati tibaine ky'okwetonganira ahabw'ekibi kyabo." 
John15:23 Orikuunyanga, naaba ayangire na Tata." 
John15:24 Kuri ntarakozire muribo emirimo etakakorwaga ondiijo, tibaakugizire kibi; kwonka hati bagireebire, baayogaho baanyanga na Tata." 
John15:25 Byona bibaireho ngu ekigambo ekyahandiikirwe kihikiirire, ekirikugira kiti: Bakanyangira busha." 
John15:26 Kwonka Omuhwezi ku ariija, ou ndibooherereza okuruga ahari Isheboona, Omwoyo ow'amazima orikuruga ahari Tata, ogwo aryahamya ebyangye;" 
John15:27 naimwe muri baakareebi, ahabw'okuba okuruga aha kutandika mukaba muri hamwe naanye." 
John16:1 Ebi naabibagambira ngu mutarishoberwa. 
John16:2 Baryababinga omuri sinagogi; kandi obunaku buryahika, omuntu weena oribaita aryateekateeka ngu naakorera Ruhanga." 
John16:3 Ekyo baryakikora, ahabw'okuba tibaramanyire Isheboona n'obu yaakuba nyowe." 
John16:4 Ebi naabibagambira, ngu obunaku bwabyo ku buriba bwahikire, mwijukye ku naabibagambiire. Ebigambo ebyo tindabibagambiire ha kutandika, ahabw'okuba nkaba nkibaine." 
John16:5 Mbwenu hati ningyenda ahari Ogwo owantumire; kwonka tihaine n'omwe omuriimwe orikumbuuza ati: Nooza hi? 
John16:6 Emitima yaanyu eijwire obusaasi, ahakuba naabagambira ebigambo ebi." 
John16:7 Kwonka nimbagambira amazima; nigyenda; ahakuba nyowe ku ndiba ntagyenzire, Omuhwezi taribaizira; kwonka ku ndigyenda, ndyamubooherereza." 
John16:8 We ku ariija aryayomesereza ensi ekibi, n'okuhikiirira, n'orubanja;" 
John16:9 ekibi, ahabw'okutaanyikiriza;" 
John16:10 okuhikiirira, ahakuba ningyenda ahari Tata, kandi nimuba mutakindeeba;" 
John16:11 n'orubanja, ahakuba omutegyeki w'ensi egi aherize kucwerwa orubanja." 
John16:12 Nkiine bingi kubagambira, kwonka timurikubaasa kubyemera hati." 
John16:13 Kureka Omwoyo ow'amazima ku ariija, aryabeebembera omu mazima goona, ahakuba taryetuma; kwonka byona ebi arihurira, nibyo arigamba, kandi aryabamanyisa ebiriija kubaho." 
John16:14 Aryampimbisa, ahakuba aryaiha aha byangye, abibamanyise." 
John16:15 Ebi Tata aine byona n'ebyangye; nikyo naabagirira nti, Aryaiha aha byangye, abibamanyise." 
John16:16 Hatsigaire omwanya mukye kutandeeba; kandi ogundi mukye, muryandeeba." 
John16:17 Bamwe aha beegi be baagambirana bati: Eki arikutugambira n'enki ati, Hatsigaire omwanya mukye kutandeeba; kandi ati, Ogundi mukye, muryandeeba; kandi ati: Ahakuba ningyenda ahari Isheboona?" 
John16:18 Baagaruka baagira bati: Eki arikugamba n'enki ati, Hatsigaire omwanya mukye? Titurikumanya ki arikugamba." 
John16:19 Yesu yaamanya ku barikwenda kumubuuza, yaabagira ati: Nimubuuzana aha ki naabagira nti, Hatsigaire omwanya mukye, kutandeeba; kandi nti, Ogundi mukye, muryandeeba?" 
John16:20 Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Muryarira mucure, kwonka ensi eryashemererwa; muryagira obusaasi, kwonka obusaasi bwanyu buryahinduka okushemererwa." 
John16:21 Omukazi, ku arumwa kuzaara, agira obusaasi, ahakuba obunaku bwe buba buhikire; kwonka ku aheza kuzaara, aba atakiijuka buri busaasi ahabw'okushemerererwa omwana ozairwe omu nsi." 
John16:22 N'ahabw'ekyo imwe mwine obusaasi hati; kwonka ndyagaruka mbareebe, emitima yaanyu eshemererwe; kandi okushemererwa kwanyu tihaine orikubaaka." 
John16:23 Aha kiro ekyo tihariho bi murimbuuza. Buzimazima nimbagambira nti: Ku murishaba Isheboona ekintu kyona omu iziina ryangye, aryakibaha." 
John16:24 Okuhitsya hati tihariho ki mwashabire omu iziina ryangye; mushabe, muryaheebwa, okushemererwa kwanyu kubone kuhikiirira." 
John16:25 Ebyo naabibagambira omu nfumu; obunaku nibwija, obu ndiba ntakibagambira mu nfumu, kureka ndyabagambira ebya Tata bwerure." 
John16:26 Aha kiro ekyo muryashaba omu iziina ryangye; kandi tindikubagambira ku ndibashabira ahari Isheboona; 
John16:27 ahakuba Isheboona nawe abakunda, ahabw'okuba mukankunda, mwaikiriza ku naarugire ahari isheboona." 
John16:28 Nkaruga ahri Isheboona, naija omu nsi; mbwenu ensi ningirugamu, ningaruka ahari isheboona." 
John16:29 Abeegi be baagira bati: Mbwenu hati noogamba bwerure, tokigamba mu nfumu." 
John16:30 Hati twamanya ku omanya byona, kandi torikwetenga muntu weena kugira eki yaakubuuza; n'ahabw'ekyo nitwikiriza ku waarugire ahari Ruhanga." 
John16:31 Yesu yaabagarukamu ati: Hati nimwikiriza? 
John16:32 Reeba obunaku nibwija, kandi bwahikire, obu muritaataanisizibwamu, buri muntu omu ka ye, mukantsiga nyenka; kwonka tindi nyenka, ahabw'okuba Tata ari hamwe naanye." 
John16:33 Ebi naabibagambira ngu mugire obusingye omuriinye. Omu nsi mwine obusaasi; kwonka muhuumure, nyowe nsingwire ensi." 
John17:1 Yesu ku yaaherize kugamba ebigambo ebyo, yainamura amaisho, yaareeba ahaiguru, yaagira ati: Taata, obunaku bwahika; himbisa Omwana waawe, n'Omwana abone kukuhimbisa," 
John17:2 nk'oku waamuhaire obushoboorozi aha bantu boona, ngu abone kuha abu waamuhaire boona amagara agatahwaho." 
John17:3 Aga nigo magara agatahwaho, okumanya iwe Ruhanga omwe ow'amazima, n'Ogwo ou waatumire, Yesu Kristo." 
John17:4 Nkuhaisize ekitiinisa omu nsi, ahabw'okuba omurimo ogu wampaire kukora nguhikiriize." 
John17:5 Mbwenu, Tata, mpimbisa omu maisho gaawe n'ekitiinisa ekyo eki naabaire nyine naiwe, ensi etakahangirwe." 
John17:6 Abashaija, abu wampaire omu nsi, nkabooreka eiziina ryawe; bakaba bari abaawe, waabampa, kandi barinzire ekigambo kyawe." 
John17:7 Hati bamanyire ngu byona ebi wampaire biruga ah'ori; 
John17:8 ahakuba ebigambo ebi wampaire mbibahaire, baabiikiriza, baamanya omu mazima ku naarugire ah'ori, kandi baikiriza ngu niiwe wantumire." 
John17:9 Abo nibo ndikushabira; tindikushabira b'ensi, kureka abo abu wampaire, ahakuba n'abaawe;" 
John17:10 abangye boona n'abaawe, n'abaawe n'abangye, kandi nimpimbisibwa omuribo." 
John17:11 Mbwenu hati tinkiri mu nsi, kwonka bo bari omu nsi, kandi niinyija ah'ori. Taata orikwera, obarindire omu iziina ryawe eri wampaire, babe bamwe nkaitwe oku turi bamwe." 
John17:12 Obu naabaire nkibaine, nkabarindira omu iziina ryawe eri wampaire; nkabarinda, tihaine n'omwe owaabuzire, kureka omwana ow'okuhwerekyerera, ngu Ebyahandiikirwe bihikiirizibwe." 
John17:13 Mbwenu niinyija ah'ori; ebi nimbigamba nkiri omu nsi, ngu okushemererwa kwangye kuhikiirizibwa omuribo." 
John17:14 Mbahaire ekigambo kyawe; ensi yaabanga, ahabw'okuba ti b'ensi, nk'oku naanye ntari w'ensi." 
John17:15 Tindikukushaba ngu obaihe omu nsi, kureka ngu obarinde Omubi." 
John17:16 Ti b'ensi, nk'oku naanye ntari w'ensi." 
John17:17 Obeeze omu mazima; ekigambo kyawe nigo mazima. 
John17:18 Nk'oku wantumire omu nsi, naanye nikwo mbatumire omu nsi." 
John17:19 Nyowe niinyeyeza ahabwabo, ngu nabo beezibwe omu mazima." 
John17:20 Tindikushabira abo bonka, kureka n'abandi abariinyikiriza ahabw'ekigambo kyabo," 
John17:21 ngu boona babe bamwe, nkaiwe Taata, oku ori omuriinye, naanye omuriiwe, nabo babe omuriitwe, ab'ensi babone kwikiriza ku niiwe wantumire." 
John17:22 Ekitiinisa eki wampaire nkibahaire, ngu babe bamwe nkaitwe oku turi bamwe," 
John17:23 nyowe omuribo, naiwe omuriinye, babeere kimwe bamwe, ab'ensi bamanye ku niiwe wantumire, okabakunda nk'oku wankunzire." 
John17:24 Taata, niinyenda ngu abu wampaire nabo bagume naanye ahi ndi, babone kureeba ekitiinisa kyangye eki wampaire; ahakuba okankunda, ensi etakahangirwe." 
John17:25 Taata ohikiriire, ensi terakumanyire; kwonka nyowe nkakumanya; kandi n'aba nibamanya ku niiwe wantumire." 
John17:26 Nkabamanyisa eiziina ryawe, kandi ndyarimanyisa, ngu okukunda, oku wankunzire, kube omuribo, naanye mbe omuribo." 
John18:1 Yesu ku yaaherize kugamba ebigambo ebyo, yaashohora n'abeegi be, baayambuka akagyera Kederoni, baaza omu musiri ogwabaire guri aho." 
John18:2 Kandi Yuda, owaamureebize, akaba naamanya ogwo mwanya; ahakuba Yesu kaingi akaba ateeranirayo n'abeegi be." 
John18:3 Mpaho Yuda, ku yaaherize kutunga omutwe gw'abaserukare n'abakuru baabo, abu yaahairwe abanyamurwa abakuru n'Abafarisaayo, baazayo baine etabaaza n'emuri n'eby'okurwanisa." 
John18:4 Yesu, ku yaamanyire byona ebyaza kumubaho, yaarugayo yaababuuza ati: Nimusherura oha?" 
John18:5 Baamugarukamu bati: Yesu owa Nazareesi. Yesu yaabagira ati: Niinye. Yuda owaamureebize akaba ayemereire nabo. 
John18:6 Ku yaabagizire ati, Niinye, baagarura ebigyere enyima, baagwa ahansi." 
John18:7 Yaagaruka yaababuuza ati: Nimusherura oha? Baamugarukamu bati: Yesu owa Nazareesi. 
John18:8 Yesu yaagira ati: Manya, naabagira nti: Niinye; n'ahabw'ekyo, ku muraabe nimunsherura, murekye aba bagyende." 
John18:9 Akagira atyo ngu ekigambo eki yaagambire kibekwo, eki yaagizire ati: Ahari abo abu wampaire, tihariho n'omwe orambuzireho." 
John18:10 Simooni Petero, owaabaire aine rurara, yaagisyorayo, yaatema omuhuuku w'omunyamurwa omukuru, yaamucwaho okutu kwa buryo. Eiziina ry'omuhuuku ogwo akaba ari Maliko." 
John18:11 Yesu yaaragiira Petero ati: Garura rurara yaawe omu kyobati kyayo. Ekikopo eki Tata ampaire tindikukinywa? 
John18:12 Okuruga aho omutwe gw'abaserukare n'omukuru waabo n'abambari b'Abayudaaya baakwata Yesu, baamuboha." 
John18:13 Baabanza kumutwara ahari Aana; ahakuba akaba ari ishe-zaara wa Kayaafa, owaabaire ari omunyamurwa omukuru omu mwaka ogwo." 
John18:14 Kandi Kayaafa ogwo niwe yaahaire Abayudaaya obwengye ati, Ni kirungi omuntu omwe kufeera abantu." 
John18:15 Simooni Petero n'omwegi ondiijo baakurata Yesu. Kandi omwegi ogwo ahabw'okumanywa omunyamurwa omukuru yaataaha hamwe na Yesu omu kibuga ky'omunyamurwa omukuru; 
John18:16 kwonka Petero yaaguma ayemereire aheeru aha irembo. Omwegi ogwo, owaabaire naamanywa omunyamurwa omukuru, yaashohora, yaagamba n'omwishiki owaabaire naakumiirira, yaataasya Petero." 
John18:17 Omwishiki ogwo omukumiirizi yaabuuza Petero ati: Naiwe tori omwe aha beegi b'omushaija ogu? Yaagira ati: Ngaaha, tindi mwegi we." 
John18:18 Kandi abahuuku n'abambari bakaba niboota omuriro gw'amakara, ahakuba hakaba hariho embeho; beemereire aho, niboota; na Petero ayemereire nabo naayota." 
John18:19 Omunyamurwa omukuru yaabuuza Yesu aha beegi be, n'eby'okwegyesa kwe." 
John18:20 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Nkaba ngambira abantu butunu; nyegyesa obutosha omuri sinagogi n'omuri hekalu, ahi Abayudaaya boona bateeranira; tinkagambaga mu mubonano." 
John18:21 Mbwenu nombuuriza ki? Abo abaabaire bampurira, obe nibo waabuuza ebi naabagambiire; bo nibamanya ebi naagambire." 
John18:22 Yesu ku yaagambire ekyo, omwe aha bambari, owaabaire ayemereire aho, yaamuteerera oruhi, yaagira ati: Haza ogarukamu otyo omunyamurwa omukuru?" 
John18:23 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Ku ndaabe naagamba kubi, nyomesereza ekibi; mbwenu ku ndaabe naagamba gye, wanteerera ki?" 
John18:24 Bwanyima Aana yaamutwekyera Kayaafa omunyamurwa omukuru, abohirwe." 
John18:25 Kandi Simooni Petero akaba ayemereire naayota. Baamubuuza bati: Naiwe tori omwe aha beegi be? Yaayehakana ati: Ngaaha; tindi mwegi we. 
John18:26 Omwe aha bahuuku b'omunyamurwa omukuru, ow'omu ruganda rw'ogwo ou Petero yacwireho okutu, yaabuuza ati: Tinkureebire nawe omu musiri?" 
John18:27 Petero yaagaruka yaakyehakana; ahonaaho enkoko yaagamba. 
John18:28 Bwanyima baamwiha owa Kayaafa, baamutwara omuri Puratorio kare nibutaagurikana. Bo tibaataaha muri Puratorio, ngu bateeshiisha, babone kurya Okuhingurwaho." 
John18:29 Pilaato yaashohora, yaabashanga aheeru, yaababuuza ati: Omushaija ogu nimumutabaaririza ki?" 
John18:30 Baamugarukamu bati: Omushaija ogu, kuri atari nkozi y'ebibi, titwakumukuhaire." 
John18:31 Pilaato yaabagira ati: Mumwetwarire, mumucwere orubanja nk'ebiragiro byanyu oku biri. Abayudaaya baamugira bati: Ebiragiro tibitwikiriza kwita muntu." 
John18:32 Ekyo kikahikiiriza ekigambo eki Yesu yaagambire okworeka okufa oku arifa. 
John18:33 Pilaato yaagaruka yaataaha omuri Puratorio, yaayeta Yesu, yaamubuuza ati: Weeza ori Omugabe w'Abayudaaya?" 
John18:34 Yesu yaamubuuza ati: Ekigambo ekyo nookigamba ahabwawe, nari shi okugambiirwe abandi?" 
John18:35 Pilaato yaagarukamu ati: Noogira ngu nyowe ndi Omuyudaaya? Manya ab'eihanga ryawe n'abanyamurwa abakuru nibo baakundeetera. Ocumwire ki? 
John18:36 Yesu yaagarukamu ati: Obugabe bwangye ti bw'ensi egi: kuri obugabe bwangye bwaba buri obw'ensi egi, engabo zangye zikaarwaine, ndeka kuheebwayo omu Bayudaaya; kwonka obugabe bwangye ti bw'ensi egi." 
John18:37 Pilaato yaamugira ati: Biri shi naiwe ori Omugabe? Yesu yaagarukamu ati: Eki waagamba nikyo, ndi Omugabe. Ahakuba nikyo naiziire omu nsi, ngu mpamye amazima. Omuntu weena ow'amazima ahurira eiraka ryangye." 
John18:38 Pilaato yaamubuuza ati: Amazima n'enki? Ku yaaherize kukigamba, yaashohora, yaagaruka aha Bayudaaya, yaabagira ati: Tindikumureebaho rubanja." 
John18:39 Kwonka mugira omucwe ngu nshemereire kubarekurira omuntu omwe aha Kuhingurwaho; mbwenu nimwenda ngu mbarekurire Omugabe w'Abayudaaya? 
John18:40 Baagaruka baayomba, nibagira bati: T'ogu, kureka Barabba! Kandi Barabba ogwo akaba ari omwambuzi." 
John19:1 Bwanyima Pilaato yaatwara Yesu, baamwasha." 
John19:2 Ku baaherize, abaserukare baaruka ekirunga ky'amahwa, baakimujweka omu mutwe, baamujweka n'omwenda gwa bujwa;" 
John19:3 baija ah'ari, baamutangirira nibagira bati: Osingire, Mugabe w'Abayudaaya! Baamuteera empi." 
John19:4 Pilaato yaagaruka yaashohora, yaabagira ati: Reeba, naaza kumubareetera, mumanye ku ntaamureebaho rubanja." 
John19:5 Atyo Yesu yaashohora, ajwaire ekirunga ky'amahwa, n'omwenda gwa bujwa. Pilaato yaabagira ati: Reeba omuntu ogu!" 
John19:6 Abanyamurwa abakuru n'abambari, ku baamureebire, baayomba munonga, bati: Mubambe, mubambe aha musharaba! Pilaato yaabagarukamu ati: Mumutware, mumwebambire, ahakuba tindikumureebaho rubanja." 
John19:7 Abayudaaya baamugarukamu bati: Twine ekiragiro; n'ahabw'ekiragiro ekyo ashemereire kufa, ahabw'okuba ayegizire Omwana wa Ruhanga." 
John19:8 Pilaato ku yaahuriire ebigambo ebyo, yaayeyongyera kutiina;" 
John19:9 yaagaruka omuri Puratorio, yaabuuza Yesu ati: Ori owa nkahi? Kwonka Yesu tiyaamugarukamu." 
John19:10 Pilaato nikwo kumugambira ati: Torikungarukamu? Torikumanya ku nyine obushoboorozi bw'okukurekura nari kukubamba? 
John19:11 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Tokungizireho bushoboorozi, kuri otarabuhairwe okuruga omu iguru; n'habw'ekyo owaakumpa niwe aine ekibi ekirikukira ekyawe." 
John19:12 Okuruga aho Pilaato yaasherura oburyo bw'okumurekura; kwonka Abayudaaya baayomba munonga bati: ku oraarekure omushaija ogu, nooba otari munywani wa Kaisaari; omuntu oyegira Omugabe, aba acumwire ahari Kaisaari." 
John19:13 Pilaato ku yaahuriire ebigambo ebyo, yaashohoza Yesu, yaashutama aha kitebe ky'eiramuriro omu mwanya ogurikwetwa Amabaare agaariire, omu Ruheburaayo, Gabasa." 
John19:14 Eizooba eryo rikaba riri ery'Okweteguurira Okuhingurwaho, ziri nk'eshaaha mukaaga. Pilaato yaagambira Abayudaaya ati: Reeba Omugabe waanyu!" 
John19:15 Baayomba munonga nibagira bati: Mwiheho! Mwiheho! Omubambe. Pilaato yaababuuza ati: Mbambe omugabe waanyu? Abanyamurwa abakuru baamugarukamu bati; Titwine mugabe kureka Kaisaari. 
John19:16 Okuruga aho yaamubaha kubambwa aha musharaba. 
John19:17 Baatwara Yesu, yaagyenda ayekoreire omusharaba gwe, baahika aha mwanya ogurikwetwa Empanga y'omutwe, omu Ruheburaayo Gologosa." 
John19:18 Aho niho baamubambire, n'abandi babiri, omwe aha rubaju rumwe, n'ondi aha rundi, na Yesu ahagati." 
John19:19 Pilaato yaahandiika ekihandiiko; yaakita aha musharaba, nikigira kiti: YESU OWA NAZAREESI, OMUGABE W'ABAYUDAAYA." 
John19:20 Ekihandiiko ekyo kikashomwa Abayudaaya baingi; ahabw'okuba omwanya ogu Yesu yaabambirwemu gukaba guri haihi n'orurembo; kandi kikaba kihandiikirwe omu Ruheburaayo n'omu Rulatini n'omu Rugriika. 
John19:21 Abanyamurwa abakuru b'Abayudaaya baagambira Pilaato bati: otahandiika oti, Omugabe w'Abayudaaya, kureka oti, Akagira ati: Ndi Omugabe w'Abayudaaya." 
John19:22 Pilaato yaagarukamu ati: Eki naahandiikire, naakihandiikire." 
John19:23 Abaserukare ku baaherize kubamba Yesu, baatwara ebijwaro bye, baabibaganisa omu miteeko ena, buri muserukare yaatwara omuteeko gwe. Kwonka ekanzu ye ekaba etaine mubaziiro, ekaba erukirwe okuruga omu bitsya okuhika ahansi." 
John19:24 N'ahabw'ekyo baahanuura bati: Tutagitaagura, kureka tugiteerere enteenyu, tureebe oraagitware. Eki kikabaho ngu Ekyahandiikirwe kihikiirire ekirikugira kiti: Bakabagana ebijwaro byangye, baateerera ekanzu yangye enteenyu. Ebyo nibyo abaserukare baakozire." 
John19:25 Kandi haihi n'omusharaba gwa Yesu hakaba heemereireho nyina na nyinento, na Mariamu muka Kuleopa, na Mariamu Magadaleene." 
John19:26 Yesu ku yaareebire nyina, kandi n'omwegi ou yaabaire akunda ayemereire haihi, yaagambira nyina ati: Mukaikuru, reeba omwana waawe!" 
John19:27 Kandi yaagambira omwegi ogwo ati: Reeba omukaikuru waawe! Okuruga aho omwegi ogwo yaamutwara omu ka ye. 
John19:28 Bwanyima Yesu, ku yaamanyire ngu byona byahwa, yaagira ati: Naagira eiriho! Ngu abone kuhikiiriza Ebyahandiikirwe." 
John19:29 Kandi hakaba haateekirweho enjoga eijwire viinyo erikushaarira; baagijabikamu ekyangu, baakita aha kibingo, baakimukwatira aha munwa." 
John19:30 Yesu ku yaaherize kukiheebwa, yaagira ati: Kyahwa! Yainika omutwe gwe, yaahayo amagara ge." 
John19:31 Eizooba eryo rikaba riri ery'Okweteguura, kandi Abayudaaya bakaba batakunda mitumbi kuguma aha misharaba ahari Sabato; kandi Sabato egyo ekaba eri nkuru; Abayudaaya nikwo kushaba Pilaato kubahenda amaguru, ngu babone kuhanurwa." 
John19:32 Abaserukare baija, baahenda amaguru g'ow'okubanza, n'ag'owa kabiri, abaabaire babambirwe nawe;" 
John19:33 kwonka ku baahikire ahari Yesu, baashanga yaakabire; tibaamuhenda maguru." 
John19:34 Kwonka omwe aha baserukare yaamucumita eicumu omu rubaju, ahonaaho haarugamu eshagama n'amaizi." 
John19:35 Owaakireebire, niwe yaakihamize, n'okuhamya kwe n'okw'amazima; kandi naamanya ku agamba amazima, ngu naimwe mwikirize." 
John19:36 Ebyo bikabaho, ngu Ekyahandiikirwe kihikiirire ekirikugira kiti: Tarihendwa igufa;" 
John19:37 kandi Ekyahandiikirwe ekindi nikigira kiti: Baryareeba ogwo ou baacumitsire. 
John19:38 Bwanyima y'ebyo Yosefu owa Arimasaaya, owaabaire ari omwegi wa Yesu, kwonka omu mubonano ahabw'okutiina Abayudaaya, yaashaba Pilaato kumwikiriza kutwara omutumbi gwa Yesu; Pilaato yaamwikiriza. Atyo yaija, yaatwara omutumbi gwe." 
John19:39 Na Nikodemu, owaabandize kwija ahari Yesu nyekiro, nawe yaija, areetsire eby'omugaju ebirimu sumuruna n'enkaka, oburemeezi bwabyo nk'eraatiri igana." 
John19:40 Baatwara omutumbi gwa Yesu, baaguzinga omu myenda ya kitaani ei baatairemu eby'emigaju, nk'emicwe y'Abayudaaya ey'okuziika oku yaabaire eri." 
John19:41 Kandi omu mwanya ogu yaabaire abambirwemu hakaba harimu omusiri; n'omu musiri omwo hakaba harimu ekituuro kisya ekitakazikwamuga muntu. 
John19:42 Omwo nimwo baaziikire Yesu, ahabw'okuba rikaba riri eizooba ry'Okweteguura kw'Abayudaaya, kandi ekituuro ekyo kikaba kiri haihi." 
John20:1 Aha kiro ky'okubanza omu saabiiti Mariamu Magadaleene yaija aha kituuro kare, butakaseesire; yaareeba eibaare riihirwe aha kutuuro." 
John20:2 N'ahabw'ekyo yairuka, yaahika Simooni Petero n'omwegi ondiijo, ou Yesu yaabaire akunda, yaabagira ati: Baihire Mukama waitu omu kituuro, kandi titurikumanya hu bamutaire." 
John20:3 Petero yaashohora n'omwegi ogwo ondiijo kuza aha kituuro. 
John20:4 Bombi bairuka; kwonka omwegi ogwo ondiijo yaatsiga Petero, yaamutanga aha kituuro;" 
John20:5 yainama, yaaringurizamu, yaareeba emyenda ya kitaani etairwe aho, kwonka tiyaatahamu." 
John20:6 Bwanyima Simooni Petero yaija amukuratiire, yaataaha omu kituuro; yaareeba emyenda ya kitaani etairwe aho," 
John20:7 n'omutanda, ogwabaire guri aha mutwe gwe, gutatairwe ha myenda egyo ya kitaani, kureka gukubirwe, gutairwe aha kwagwo gwonka." 
John20:8 Omwegi ogwo ondiijo, owaabandize aha kituuro, nawe yaataahamu, yaareeba, yaikiriza;" 
John20:9 obwo bakaba batakeetegyereize Ekyahandiikirwe ngu ashemereire kuzooka omu bafu. 
John20:10 Bwanyima abeegi abo baagaruka omu maka gaabo. 
John20:11 Kwonka Mariamu Magadaleene yaaguma ayemereire aha kutuuro naarira; ku yaabaire naarira, yainama yaaringuriza omu kituuro;" 
John20:12 yaareeba baamaraika babiri bajwaire ebirikwera, bashutami ahu omutumbi gwa Yesu gubaire gutairwe, omwe aha mushego, n'ondiijo aha mirambikirizo." 
John20:13 Baamubuuza bati: Mukazi 'we, noorizibwa ki? Yaabagarukamu ati: Ahabw'eokuba batwaire Mukama wangye, kandi tindikumanya i bamutaire." 
John20:14 Ku yaaherize kugamba atyo, yaahinduka, yaareeba Yesu ayemereire; kwonka tiyaamanya ku ari Yesu." 
John20:15 Yesu yaamubuuza ati: Mukazi 'we, noorizibwa ki? Noosherura oha? Mariamu yaateekateeka ngu n'omuhingi w'ogwo musiri, yaamugira ati: Mukama wangye, ku oraabe niiwe omutwaire, ngambira ei omutaire, nze kumwihayo." 
John20:16 Yesu yaamugira ati: Mariamu. Yaahinduka, yaamugarukamu omu Ruheburaayo ati: Rabooni! (Amakuru gaakyo ngu Omwegyesa)," 
John20:17 Yesu yaamugira ati: Otankwata, ahakuba tinkatembire mu iguru ahari Tata; kwonka irooko ogyende aha b'eishe-emwe, obagire oti: Naatemba omu iguru ahari Ishe kandi Shoimwe, ahari Ruhanga we kandi Ruhanga waanyu." 
John20:18 Mariamu Magadaleene yaagyenda, yaagambira abeegi ati: Naareeba Mukama waitu. Yaabateekyerereza n'ebi yaamugambira." 
John20:19 Eryo izooba omu mwabazyo, aha kiro ky'okubanza omu saabiiti, abeegi be bakaba beekingiraine omu nju ahabw'okutiina Abayudaaya; Yesu yaija yaabeemerera ahagati, yaabagira ati: Mugire obusingye!" 
John20:20 Ku yaaherize kugamba atyo, yaabooreka engaro ze n'orubaju rwe. Abeegi, ku baareebire Mukama waabo, baashemererwa." 
John20:21 Yesu yaagaruka yaabagira ati: Mugire obusingye! Nk'oku Tata yantumire, naanye nikwo ndikubatuma." 
John20:22 Ku yaagambire keyo, yaabaikiza omwitsyo, ati: Mwakiire Omwoyo Orikwera." 
John20:23 Boona abu murisaasira ebibi, baryabisaasirwa; kandi abu murigumyaho ebibi, biryabagumaho." 
John20:24 Kwonka Tomasi, omwe ahari ikumi na babiri, orikwetwa Didumo, akaba atariho, obu Yesu yaija." 
John20:25 Abeegi abandi baamugira bati: Twareeba Mukama waitu. Kwonka we yaabagira ati: Ku ndaabe ntareebire nkojo z'emisumaari mu biganja bye, nkazitamu orukumu rwangye, nkata n'ekiganja kyangye omu rubaju rwe, tindiikiriza." 
John20:26 Ku haahingwireho ebiro munaana, nabwo abeegi be bari omu nju, kandi na Tomasi ari hamwe nabo. Yesu yaija enyigi zikingirwe, yaabeemerera ahagati, yaagira ati: Mugire obusingye." 
John20:27 Yaagambira Tomasi ati: Reeta orukumu rwawe, n'ekiganja kyawe, okite omu rubaju rwangye; orekye kuba otaine kwikiriza, kureka oine okwikiriza." 
John20:28 Tomasi yaagarukamu yaamugira ati: Mukama wangye! Kandi Ruhanga wangye! 
John20:29 Yesu yaamugira ati: Waikiriza ahabw'okundeeba. Baine omugisha abaikiriza, bataine ki bareebire." 
John20:30 Hariho n'eby'okureeberaho ebindi bingi, ebi Yesu yaakoreire omu maisho g'abeegi be, ebitahandiikirwe omu kitabo eki;" 
John20:31 kwonka ebi bihandiikirwe ngu mwikirize ku Yesu ari Kristo Omwana wa Ruhanga, kandi ngu, ku muraikirize, mugire amagara omu iziina rye." 
John21:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo Yesu yaagaruka yaayeyoreka abeegi be aha nyanja ya Tiberia; kandi oku nikwo yaabeeyorekire. 
John21:2 Simooni Petero, na Tomasi orikwetwa Didumo, na Nasanaeli owa Kaana eya Galilaaya, na beene Zebedaayo, n'abeegi be abandi babiri, bakaba bari hamwe." 
John21:3 Simooni Petero yaabagira ati: Ninza kujuba eby'enyanja. Baamugira bati: Naitwe nitugyenda naiwe. Baagyenda baaza omu bwato; kwonka ekiro ekyo tibaagira ki baakwata. 
John21:4 Ku bwabaire nibusheesha, Yesu yaayemerera aha nkungu; kwonka abeegi tibaamanya ku ariwe." 
John21:5 Yesu yaababuuza ati: Boojo, mwine eby'okurya? Baamugarukamu bati: Ngaaha!" 
John21:6 Yaabaragiira ati: Mutegye akatimba aha rubaju rwa buryo rw'obwato; nimwija kubikwata. Batyo baakatega, tibaabaasa kukaiha mu maizi ahabw'eby'enyanja kuba bingi." 
John21:7 Omwegi ogwo, ou Yesu yaabaire akunda, yaagambira Petero ati: Ni Mukama waitu. Simooni Petero, ku yaahuriire ngu ni Mukama waitu, yaajwara omwenda, ahakuba akaba ajwaire busha, yaayetuura omu nyanja." 
John21:8 Abeegi abandi baija omu bwato, nibakurura akatimba kaijwire eby'enyanja; ahakuba bakaba batari hare na nkungu, nk'entambwe igana." 
John21:9 Ku baahikire aha nkungu, baareebaho omuriro gw'amakara, guriho eby'enyanja, n'omugaati guri aha rubaju." 
John21:10 Yesu yaabagira ati: Mureete aha eby'enyanja aha bi mwakwata hati. 
John21:11 Simooni Petero yaaguruka omu bwato, yaakurura akatimba, yaakahitsya aha nkungu kaijwire eby'enyanja bihango igana na makumi ataano na bishatu; kwonka n'obu biraabe byabaire biri bingi bityo, akatimba tikaracwekire." 
John21:12 Yesu yaabeeta ati: Mwije murye. Kandi tihariho n'omwe aha beegi be owaateireho kumubuuza ati: Ori oha? Ahakuba bakamanya ku ari Mukama waabo. 
John21:13 Yesu yaija, yaakwata omugaati, yaagubaha, kandi n'eby'enyanja atyo." 
John21:14 Ogwo nigwo murundi gwa kashatu ogu Yesu yaareebekyeire abeegi be, aherize kuzooka omu bafu." 
John21:15 Ku baaherize kurya, Yesu yaabuuza Simooni Petero ati: Simooni mwene Yohaana, onkunda okukira aba? Yaamugarukamu ati: Eego, Mukama wangye; noomanya ku nkukunda. Yesu yaamugira ati: Riisa abaana b'entaama zangye." 
John21:16 Yesu yaamubuuza obwa kabiri ati: Simooni mwene Yohaana, onkunda? Yaamugarukamu ati: Eego, Mukama wangye; noomanya ku nkukunda. Yesu ati: Riisa entaama zangye." 
John21:17 Yaamubuuza obwa kashatu ati: Simooni, mwene Yohaana, onkunda? Petero yaashaasha ahabw'okumubuuza obwa kashatu ati: Onkunda? Yaamugira ati: Mukama wangye, iwe noomanya byona; noomanya ku nkukunda. Yesu yaamugira ati: Riisa entaama zangye." 
John21:18 Buzimazima ninkugambira nti: obu waabaire ori omutsigazi, okaba oyezirika, oza ei orikwenda yoona; kwonka ku oriba omugurusi, oryagorora emikono yaawe, ondiijo akuzirikye, akutware ei otarikwenda." 
John21:19 Ekyo akakigamba kworeka omuringo ogu arifamu oku gurihimbisisa Ruhanga. Bwanyima y'ekyo yaamugira ati: Nkurata. 
John21:20 Petero, ku yaahindukire yaareeba omwegi ogwo, ou Yesu yaabaire akunda, abakuratiire; niwe owaabiare ayegamirie Yesu omu kufuba nibarya, obu yaamubuuza ati: Mukama wangye, n'oha orikuza kukureebya?" 
John21:21 Petero, ku yaamureebire, yaabuuza Yesu ati: Mukama wangye, ogu aryaba ata?" 
John21:22 Yesu yaamugarukamu ati: Ku naakwenda ngu agumeho okuhitsya ahu ndiizira, noofa ki? Iwe nkuratira!" 
John21:23 Ekigambo ekyo kyabuga omu b'eishe-emwe, ku omwegi ogwo atarifa; kwonka Yesu taramugambiire ku atarifa, kureka ati: Ku naakwenda ngu agumeho okuhitsya ahu ndiizira, noofa ki?" 
John21:24 Ogwo niwe mwegi orikuhamya ebyo, kandi niwe yaabihandiikire; kandi nitumanya ngu okuhamya kwe n'okw'amazima." 
John21:25 Kandi hariho n'ebindi bingi ebi Yesu yaakozire; kuri noogira ngu byona bikahandiikwa buri kimwe, ninteekateeka nti, ebitabo ebyakuhandiikirwe bikaashaagire omu nsi." 
Acts1:1 Omu kitabo ky'okubanza kei naakuhandiikiire, Teofilo, nkahandiika byona ebi Yesu yaabandize kukora n'okwegyesa," 
Acts1:2 okuhitsya aha izooba eri yaatwariirweho omu igur, aherize kuragiira entumwa ezi yaatooraine, naazitumaho Omwoyo Orikwera." 
Acts1:3 Ku yaaherize kubonabonesibwa, yaabeeyoreka ahuriire, yaakihamisa obumanyiso bwingi, yaamara ebiro makumi ana naabeeyoreka, naabagambira eby'obukama bwa Ruhanga." 
Acts1:4 Ku yaabaire ateeraine nabo, yaabeehanangiriza kutaruga omuri Yerusaalemu, ati: Kureka mutegyereze eki Isheboona yaaraganiise, eki naabagambiire;" 
Acts1:5 ahakuba Yohaana akabatiza n'amaizi, kwonka imwe nimwija kubatizibwa n'Omwoyo Orikwera omu biro bikye." 
Acts1:6 Ku baabaire bateeraniire hamwe, baamubuuza bati: Mukama waitu, obu nibwo bunaku obu orikwenda kugaruriramu obugabe bwa Israeli?" 
Acts1:7 Yaabagarukamu ati: Imwe, ti kyanyu kumanya ebiro nari obunaku ebi Isheboona yaataireho kuba omu bushoboorozi bwe wenka;" 
Acts1:8 kwonka muryaheebwa amaani, Omwoyo Orikwera ku ariheza kubaijaho, kandi muryaba baakareebi bangye omuri Yerusaalemu, n'omuri Buyudaaya yoona, n'omuri Samaria, n'okuhitsya aha muheru gw'ensi." 
Acts1:9 Ku yaaherize kugamba atyo, yaatwarwa ahaiguru nibamureeba, ekicu kyamubakingira." 
Acts1:10 Ku baabaire bakihangire eiguru amaisho, We naakigyenda, reeba abashaija babiri baabeemerera haihi, bajwaire ebirikwera;" 
Acts1:11 baabagira bati: Imwe bashaija ba Galilaaya 'mwe, muhangiire ki amaisho ahaiguru? Yesu ogwo owaabaihwaho akatwarwa omu igur, nikwo arigaruka nk'oku mwamureeba naatemba omu iguru." 
Acts1:12 Batyo baagaruka Yerusaalemu nibaruga omu kibungo kya Zeituuni, ekyabaire kiri ahihi na Yerusaalemu orugyendo orutarikuzira kugyendwa ahari Sabato." 
Acts1:13 Ku baahikireyo, baatemba, baaza omu kishengye kya kanyinaibiri, omu aba boona baagumire, Petero, Yohaana, Yakobo, Anderea, Filipo, Tomasi, Batolomayo, Matayo, Yakobo mwene Alifaayo, Simooni Zeloote na Yuda mwene Yakobo." 
Acts1:14 Abo boona hamwe n'abakazi na Mariamu nyina wa Yesu n'abarumuna, baayezirika kuguma nibashaba n'omutima gumwe." 
Acts1:15 Omu biro ebyo Petero akeemerera ahagati y'ab'eishe-emwe, abaabaire bateeraine, bari nka igana na makumi abiri, yaabagira ati:" 
Acts1:16 B'eishe-emwe, Ebyahandiikirwe bishemereire kuhikiirizibwa ebi Omwoyo Orikwera yaarangiire omu kanwa ka Daudi ahari Yuda, owaayebembeire abaizire kukwata Yesu." 
Acts1:17 Ahabw'okuba akaba naabarirwa hamwe naitwe, yaaheebwa omugabo gw'obuheereza obu." 
Acts1:18 Omushaija ogwo akagura omusiri n'empiiha ezi yaahairwe ahabw'ekibi eki yaakozire; yaagwa ajuumaire, yaabaruka enda, amagara ge goona gaayohoka." 
Acts1:19 Ekyo kyamanywa boona abaabaire batwire Yerusaalemu, n'ahabw'ekyo omusiri ogwo gukeetwa Akeludaama omu rurimi rwabo, amakuru ngu, omusiri gw'eshagama." 
Acts1:20 Ahakuba kikahandiikwa omu kitabo kya Zaaburi ngu, Eka ye ehindukye eitongo; Hatarigira omuntu owaarituuramu. Kandi ngu, Obureeberezi bwe butwarwe ondiijo." 
Acts1:21 Mwenu omu bashaija abaabaire bagyenda naitwe ebiro byona ebi Mukama waitu Yesu yaamazire naitwe," 
Acts1:22 okuruga aha kubatiza kwa Yohaana okuhitsya aha izooba eri yaatwihiirweho okutwarwa omu iguru, omuri abo omwe ashemereire kuba kareebi hamwe naitwe ow'okuhamya okuzooka kwe." 
Acts1:23 Baatoorana babiri, Yosefu orikwetwa Barusaba, ou baayetsire Yusito, n'ondiijo Matiya." 
Acts1:24 Baashaba nibagira bati: Mukama waitu, Iwe orikumanya emitima y'abantu boona omuri aba bombi otworekyemu omwe ou waatoorana," 
Acts1:25 atware omwanya gw'obuheereza obu n'obutumwa, obu Yuda yaarugiremu akeegyendera." 
Acts1:26 Baabateerera enteenyu, enteenyu yaakwata Matiya; yaabarirwa hamwe n'entumwa ikumi n'emwe." 
Acts2:1 Eizooba rya Pentekoote obu ryahika, boona bakaba bateeraniire omu mwanya gumwe." 
Acts2:2 Ahonaaho okuhoorera kwaruga omu iguru, nk'omuyaga oku guhoorera n'amaani, kwaijuriza kimwe enju omu baabaire bashutami." 
Acts2:3 Haareebeka endimi nk'ez'omuriro, zeebaganiisemu, nizaakira ahari buri omwe omuribo." 
Acts2:4 Boona baijura Omwoyo Orikwera, baatandika kugamba endimi ezindi, nk'oku Omwoyo yaabahaire kuzigamba." 
Acts2:5 Omu biro ebyo omuri Yerusaalemu hakaba harimu Abayudaaya, abashaija abanyadiini abaarugire omu mahanga goona agari ahansi y'eiguru." 
Acts2:6 Omutwe muhango gw'abantu, ku baahuriire okuhoorera okwo, baateeranira hamwe bashobeirwe ahabw'okuba buri muntu akahurira entumwa nizigamba omu rurimi rw'owaabo." 
Acts2:7 Boona baatangaara nibagira bati: Beitu aba boona abarikugamba t'Abagalilaaya? 
Acts2:8 Mbwenu kyaruga hi itwe twena okuhurira nibagamba endimi z'owaitu ei twazaariirwe? 
Acts2:9 Haza turi Abapaazi, Abameedi, Abelamiti n'abatuura Mesopotamia, omuri Buyudaaya, omuri Kapadokia, omuri Ponto, omuri Asia," 
Acts2:10 omuri Furugia na Pamfulia, omuri Misri n'omu mashaza ga Libya agahereraine na Kureene, n'abagyenyi abarugire Rooma, by'Abayudaaya n'abahindukire bakataaha omu diini yaabo," 
Acts2:11 n'Abakureete n'Abaharabu; nitubahurira nibagamba omu ndimi ziatu eby'amaani ebikozirwe Ruhanga. 
Acts2:12 Boona baatangaara nibabanganisa, nibabuuzana bati: Eki n'enki?" 
Acts2:13 Kwonka abandi baabashekyerera, nibagira bati: Basinzire viinyo y'omutahe." 
Acts2:14 Bwanyima Petero yaayemerera hamwe na bari ikumi n'omwe, yaagamba n'eiraka rihango naabagira ati: Imwe bashaija ba Buyudaaya 'mwe n'abari Yerusaalemu mwena, mumanye eki, kandi mutegye amatu, muhurire ebigambo byangye." 
Acts2:15 Mumanye ku aba batasinzire, nk'oku murikuteekateeka, ahakuba hati n'eshaaha ishatu za nyomushana;" 
Acts2:16 kureka eki nikyo kyaragwirwe nabi Yoeli ati: 
Acts2:17 Ruhanga akagira ati: Omu biro by'aha muheru Ndyashuka Omwoyo wangye aha bantu boona; Batabani baanyu na bahara baanyu baryaragura; Abatsigazi baanyu baryayorekwa, N'abagurusi baanyu baryaroota ebirooto;" 
Acts2:18 Kandi omu biro ebyo ndyashuka Omwoyo wangye Aha bahuuku bangye n'abazaana bangye, baragure." 
Acts2:19 Ndyayoreka eby'okutangaaza omu iguru ahaiguru, N'obumanyiso omu nsi ahansi, Eshagama n'omuriro n'okucumba kw'omwika;" 
Acts2:20 Eizooba riryahinduka omwirima, N'okwezi kuhindukye eshagama, Ekiro ekyo ekikuru ekya Mukama eky'okutangaaza kutakahikire." 
Acts2:21 Kandi omuntu weena oritakira eiziina rya Mukama aryajunwa. 
Acts2:22 Imwe bashaija ba Israeli 'mwe, muhurire ebigambo ebi. Yesu owa Nazareesi, omushaija ou Ruhanga yaabahamiize n'emirimo mikuru n'eby'okutangaaza n'obumanyiso, ebi yaamukoreise ahagati yaanyu, nk'oku mwabyereebeire," 
Acts2:23 Yesu ogwo, ku yaaherize kuheebwayo nk'oku Ruhanga yaakiteekateekire, akakimanya kitakahikire, mwamubamba aha musharaba, mwamwitsa emikono y'Abanyamahanga abatategyekwa Biragiro." 
Acts2:24 Kwonka Ruhanga akamuzoora, aherize kubohoororwa omu kuhururwa kw'okufa, ahabw'okuba tikurabaasize kumuhamiza kimwe." 
Acts2:25 Kandi Daudi akamugambaho ati: Nkaba ndeeba Mukama omu maisho gangye obutoosha, Ahakuba atuura aha rubaju rwangye rwa buryo, ngu ntanyiganyiga;" 
Acts2:26 Nikyo omutima gwangye gwashemerereirwe, n'orurimi rwangye rukeesiiam; Kandi n'omubiri gwangye guryahuumura gwine amatsiko;" 
Acts2:27 Ahakuba toritsiga magara gangye kuzimu, N'obu kwakuba okureka Orikwera waawe kujunda." 
Acts2:28 Okampabura emihanda y'amagara; Kandi oryanyijuza okushemererwa ahabw'okuba omu maisho gaawe. 
Acts2:29 B'eishe-emwe, ka mbagambire n'obumanzi ebya tatenkuriitwe Daudi, ku yaafiire, yaaziikwa, n'ekituuro kye kiri aha owaitu n'okuhitsya hati." 
Acts2:30 Nka nabi akamanya ku Ruhanga yaamurahiriire endahiro, ku arita owme aha baijukuru aha ngoma." 
Acts2:31 Ku yaamanyire ekyo kitakabaireho, yaagamba aha kuzooka kwa Kristo, ku ataratsigirwe kuzimu, kandi n'omubiri gwe ku gutarajunzire." 
Acts2:32 Yesu ogwo Ruhanga akamuzoora, itwe twena turi baakareebi baakyo." 
Acts2:33 N'ahabw'ekyo, ku yaaherize kutunguurwa omukono gwa buryo gwa Ruhanga, n'okuheebwa Omwoyo Orikwera, ou Isheboona yaaraganiise, yaashuka eki, eki murikureeba, kandi eki murikuhurira." 
Acts2:34 Nimumanya ku Daudi we ataratembire mu iguru; kwonka akeegambaho ati: Mukama akagambira Muakam wangye ati: Shutama aha rubaju rwangye rwa buryo," 
Acts2:35 Okuhitsya obu ndigira abazigu baawe Akatebe k'ebigyere byawe. 
Acts2:36 N'ahabw'ekyo ab'enju ya Israeli boona bamanye buzima ngu, Yesu ogwo, ou mwabambire, Ruhanga akamuhindura Omukama kandi Kristo." 
Acts2:37 Abantu abo ku baakihuriire, baacumitwa omu mitima, baabuuza Petero n'ezindi ntumwa bati: B'eishe-emwe, tugire tuta?" 
Acts2:38 Petero yaabagarukamu ati: Mweteise, mwena mubatizibwe omu iziina rya Yesu Kristo, mubone kusaasirwa ebibi byanyu; kandi nimwija kuheebwa ekiconco ky'Omwoyo Orikwera." 
Acts2:39 Ahakuba okuraganisibwa oku n'okwanyu n'okw'abaana baanyu, n'okwa boona abari hare, omuntu weena oryetwa Mukama Ruhanga waitu." 
Acts2:40 Yaagaruka yaabamanyisa ebigambo ebindi bingi, naabeehanangiriza ati: Mujunwe, murugye omu bantu b'obusingye obu obutegami." 
Acts2:41 Kandi abaikiriize ekigambo kye baabatizibwa; eryo izooba haayongyerwaho abantu nk'enkumi ishatu. 
Acts2:42 Baaguma nibeezirikira okwegyesa kw'entumwa, n'okukwatanisa nazo omu kubega omugaati n'omu kushaba." 
Acts2:43 Abantu boona baagira obwoba; eby'okutangaaza n'obumanyiso bingi byakorwa entumwa. 
Acts2:44 Kandi abaikiriize boona bakaguma hamwe, nibakwatanisa omu bintu byabo byona;" 
Acts2:45 nibatunda amatungo gaabo n'ebintu byabo, nibabigabira boona nk'okukyena kw'omuntu oku kwabaire kuri." 
Acts2:46 Obutoosha baaguma nibeezirika kuteeranira omuri hekalu n'omutima gumwe, kandi n'okubega omugaati omu maka gaabo; kandi nibarya eby'okurya baine okushemererwa n'emitima etaine buryarya," 
Acts2:47 nibahimbisa Ruhanga, kandi nibasiimwa abantu boona. Obutoosha Mukama yaaguma naabongyeraho abarikujunwa." 
Acts3:1 Petero na Yohaana bakaba nibainamuka omuri hekalu omu shaaha ey'okushaba, niyo ya mwenda." 
Acts3:2 Kandi hakaba hariho omuntu owaazairwe aremaire ebigyere; ebiro byona bakaba bamuheeka, bamubyamya aha irembo rya hekalu eririkwetwa Erirungi, okushabiriza abarikutaaha omuri hekalu." 
Acts3:3 Ku yaareebire Petero na Yohana nibataaha omuri hekalu, yaabashaba empiiha." 
Acts3:4 Petero yaamutaho amaisho, hamwe na Yohaana, yaamugira ati: Tuteho amaisho!" 
Acts3:5 Onu yaagabataho, aine amatsiko ngu baza kugira eki baamuha." 
Acts3:6 Petero yaagira ati: Efeeza n'ezaabu tinziine; kwonka eki nyine, nikyo ndikukuha. Omu iziina rya Yesu Kristo owa Nazareesi, imuka ogyende." 
Acts3:7 Yaamukwata omukono gwa buryo, yaamwimutsya; ahonaaho ebigyere bye n'obugomba-mburi bwe byatunga amaani." 
Acts3:8 Yaabandatuka, yaayemerera, yaatandika kugyenda; yaataaha nabo omuri hekalu, naagyenda, naagaruka, naahimbisa Ruhanga." 
Acts3:9 Abantu boona baamureeba naagyenda naahimbisa Ruhanga; 
Acts3:10 bamanya ku ari ogwo owaabaire atuura aha irembo erirungi rya hekalu, naashabiriza; baashoberwa munonga, batangaarira ekyo ekyamubaho." 
Acts3:11 Ku yaabaire akwaitwe Petero na Yohaana, abantu boona bairukira ahu baabaire bari omu ksiasi ekirikwetwa ekya Sulemaani, nibatangaara munonga." 
Acts3:12 Petero ku yaabareebire, yaabagambira ati: Imwe bashaija ba Israeli 'mwe, ahabw'enki nimutangaarira omushaija ogu? Nari nimutushamaaririra ki nk'abarikuteekateeka ngu amaani gaitu nari shi okutiina Ruhanga kwaitu nibyo byagyendesa omushaija ogu?" 
Acts3:13 Ruhanga owa Abrahamu, owa Isaaka, kandi owa Yakobo, we yaahaisize ekitiinisa omuheereza we Yesu, ou mwahaireyo mukeehakanira omu maisho ga Pilaato, obu yaabaire amaririire kumurekura." 
Acts3:14 Kwonka imwe mwayehakana Orikwera kandi Ohikiriire, mwashaba kuheebwa omwitsi;" 
Acts3:15 kandi Mukama w'amagara mwamwita; kwonka Ruhanga yaamuzoora omu bafu; naitwe turi baakareebi ab'okukihamya. 
Acts3:16 Kandi omushaija ogu, ou murikureeba, kandi ou murikumanya, ahabw'okwikiriza eiziina rya Yesu, eiziina eryo niryo ryamuha amaani; kandi okwikiriza kimwe omu maisho gaanyu mwena." 
Acts3:17 Mbwenu, B'eishe-emwe, nimmanya ngu mukakikora omu butamanya, kandi n'abategyeki baanyu nikwo baakozire." 
Acts3:18 Kwonka Ruhanga, ebi yaaraguriire omu kanwa ka baanabi boona, ngu Kristo we aryabonabonesibwa, nikwo yaakihikiriize atyo." 
Acts3:19 N'ahabw'ekyo mweteise, muhindukye, ebibi byanyu biragazibwe, ebiro eby'okugaruka obusya bibone kwija okuruga ahari Mukama;" 
Acts3:20 atume Kristo owaabateereirweho, niwe Yesu," 
Acts3:21 ou eiguru rihsemereire kwakiira, okuhitsya obunaku bw'okugaruramu ebintu byona obusya, obu Ruhanga yaabaire agambira omu kanwa ka baanabi be abarikwera abaabire bariho okuruga aha kuhangwa kw'ensi." 
Acts3:22 Buzima kwo Musa akagira ati: Mukama Ruhanga aryabaimukiza nabi nkaanye okuruga omuri beene waanyu; ogwo ebi aribagambira byona, mubyorobere." 
Acts3:23 Nabi ogwo, ku ariija, omuntu weena otarimworobera aryahwerekyerezibwa, aihwe omu bantu." 
Acts3:24 Kandi na baanabi boona abaaragwire okuruga ahari Samueli n'abaamukuratiire, nabo nikwo baagambire aha biro ebi." 
Acts3:25 Imwe muri batabani ba baanabi, kandi ab'endagaano ei Ruhanga yaaraganiise baashwenkuriimwe, obu yaagambira Abrahamu ati: Kandi omuri mwijukuru waawe nimwo enganda zoona ez'ensi ziriheerwa omugisha." 
Acts3:26 Niimwe Ruhanga yaabandize kutumaho Omugaragwa we, aherize kumuzoora, ngu abahe omugisha naabahindura, omuntu weena omuriimwe arugye omu bibi bye." 
Acts4:1 Ku baabaire nibakigamba n'abantu, baayecura abanyamurwa n'omurinzi omukuru wa hekalu n'Abasadukaayo," 
Acts4:2 babagwereirwe kubi, ahabw'okwegyesa abantu, nibabagambira ngu omuri Yesu nimwo okuzooka omu bafu kubonekyeire." 
Acts4:3 Baabakwata, baabata omu kihome okuhitsya omu kasheeshe, ahakuba bukaba buri omu mwabazyo." 
Acts4:4 Kwonka baingi ahari abo abaahuriire ekigambo ekyo bakaikiriza; n'omubaro gw'abashaija gwayeyongyera, twahika nk'enkumi itaano." 
Acts4:5 Ku bwaseesire, abategyeki baabo n'abakuru b'abantu na'bahandiiki baateeranira Yerusaalemu," 
Acts4:6 na Aana omunyamurwa omukuru na Kayaafa na Yohaana na Alegizanda, n'abandi boona ab'omuryango gw'omunyamurwa omukuru." 
Acts4:7 Ku baaherize kubeemereza ahagati, baababuuza bati: Ni bushoboorozi ki, nari n'iziina ki, ebyabakoresa eki?" 
Acts4:8 Petero, aijwire Omwoyo Orikwera, yaabagarukamu ati: Imwe abategyeki b'abantu n'abakuru," 
Acts4:9 ku turaabe nitubuuzibwa hati ahabw'ekirungi eki tukoreire omuntu ogwo ekirema, n'ekimukirize," 
Acts4:10 imwe mwena n'abantu boona Abaisraeli mumanye ngu omu iziina rya Yesu Kristo owa Nazareesi, ou mwabambire aha musharaba, kandi ou Ruhanga yaazoire omu bafu, ahabw'Ogwo omushaija ogu ayemereire omu maisho gaanyu akizire." 
Acts4:11 Yesu ogwo niwe ibaare imwe abombeki eri mwayangire, eryahindukire obuhamizo bw'enju." 
Acts4:12 Kandi tihariho ondiijo ou twakuboneramu okujunwa, ahakuba tihariho rindi iziina ahansi y'eiguru eryahairwe abantu, erishemereire kutujuna." 
Acts4:13 Ku baareebire obumanzi bwa Petero na Yohaana, haza nibamanya ku bari abantu babisi abateegyesiibwe, baatangaara; bwanyima baijuka ku baabaire batuura na Yesu." 
Acts4:14 Kandi ku baareebire omushaija ogwo okizire ayemereire hamwe nabo, baabura oku baraabahakanise." 
Acts4:15 Ku baaherize kubaragiira kushohora aheeru y'eishengyero, baahanuura bonka," 
Acts4:16 nibagira bati: Abashaija aba tubagire tuta? Abantu boona abatwore Yerusaalemu nibamanya ku bakozire eky'okutangaaza ekirangainwe, kandi naitwe titurikubaasa kukyehakana." 
Acts4:17 Mbwenu okukizibira kubuga omu bantu, murekye tubakangise, okuruga hati batagira omuntu ou baagaruka kugambira omu iziina eryo." 
Acts4:18 Nikwo kubeeta, bakabeehanangiriza kutagaruka kuteeza n'obu kwakuba owkegyesa omu iziina rya Yesu." 
Acts4:19 Kwonka Petero na Yohaana baagarukamu, nibabaigira bati: Ku kiraabe kihikire omu maisho ga Ruhanga kuhurira imwe okukira Ruhanga, naimwe mukireebe;" 
Acts4:20 kwonka itwe titurikubaasa kuhunama kutagamba ebi twareebire, n'ebi twahuriire." 
Acts4:21 Ku baaherize kugaruka kubakangisa, baabarekura, ahabw'okuba bakabura oku baraabahane ahabw'okutiina abantu; ahakuba boona bakaba nibahimbisa Ruhanga ahabw'ekyo ekikozirwe." 
Acts4:22 Kandi omushaija ogwo, owaakoreirwe eky'okutangaaza ekyo eky'okukizibwa, akaba ahingwize emyaka makumi ana." 
Acts4:23 Ku baarekwirwe, baagyenda baashanga bagyenzi baabo, baabatekyerereza byona ebi abanyamurwa abakuru n'abakuru b'abantu baabagambira." 
Acts4:24 Ku baabihuriire, baimutsya amaraka gaabo ahari Ruhanga n'omutima gumwe, nibagira bati: Mukama waitu, niiwe owaahangire eiguru n'ensi n'enyanja n'ebirimu byona;" 
Acts4:25 kandi okagambira omu kanwa ka tatenkuriitwe Daudi, omugaragwa waawe, naagambisibwa Omwoyo Orikwera ati: N'enki ekyajagaraize Abanyamahanga, N'amahanga nigateekateekyera ki ebitaine mugasho?" 
Acts4:26 Abagabe b'ensi bakatenga orugamba, N'abategyeki bakeeteerana hamwe Kurwanisa Mukama na Kristo we." 
Acts4:27 N'eky'amazima omu rurembo oru Heroode na Pontio Pilaato hamwe n'abanyamahanga n'enganda za Israeli bakeeteerana kurwanisa Omuheereza waawe orikwera Yesu, ou waashukireho amajuta," 
Acts4:28 ngu bahikiirize bi waamaririire ira omu bwengye bwawe kukora n'omukono gwawe. 
Acts4:29 Hati mbwenu, Mukama waitu, reeba okukangisa kwabo, obaasise abahuuku baawe kugamba ekigambo kyawe n'obumanzi bwona," 
Acts4:30 iwe ogoroire omukono gwawe kukiza, haza obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza bikorwe omu iziina ry'Omuheereza waawe orikwera Yesu."
