Acts4:31 Ku baaherize kushaba, omwanya ogu baabaire bateeraniiremu gwatengyeta; boona baijura Omwoyo Orikwera, baagamba ekigambo kya Ruhanga n'obumanzi." 
Acts4:32 Abo boona baikiriize bakaba baine omutima gumwe n'enaama emwe; omuribo tihariho owaabaire aine obunyakantu aha bintu bye, bakaba nibakwatirana omu bintu byabo byona." 
Acts4:33 Kandi entumwa zikagira amaani maingi g'okuhamya okuzooka kwa Mukama waitu Yesu; n'embabazi nyingi zaabagumaho boona. 
Acts4:34 Omuribo tihaine owaabaire aine eki akyenire, ahabw'okuba abaabaire baine ebibanja nari amaju bakabitunda, baareeta empiiha ezaabirugiremu," 
Acts4:35 baazita aha bigyere by'entumwa; baazibabaganisiza nk'okwetunga kwa buri muntu oku kwabaire kuri. 
Acts4:36 Na Yosefu, ou entumwa zaayetsire Barunaba, amakuru ngu, Omwana w'Okwezirikisa, Omuleevi enzaarwa ya Kupuro," 
Acts4:37 akaba aine omusiri, yaagutunda, yaareeta empiiha, yaazita aha bigyere by'entumwa." 
Acts5:1 Kwonka omushaija orikwetwa Anania n'omukazi we Safira baatunda ekibanja; 
Acts5:2 yaayetsigariza ekicweka ky'obuguzi bwakyo, n'omukazi we naakimanya, yaareeta ekyatsigaireho, yaakita aha bigyere by'entumwa." 
Acts5:3 Petero yaagira ati: Beitu Anania, ahabw'enki Sitaane aijwire omutima gwawe okubeiha Omwoyo Orikwera, okeetsigariza ekicweka ky'obuguzi bw'ekibanja?" 
Acts5:4 Otakakitundize, kikaba kitari kyawe? Hoona na waaherize kukitunda, obuguzi bwakyo tiburagumire omu bushoboorozi bwawe? N'enki ekikuteekateekyeise omu mutima gwawe okukora otyo? Tobeihire bantu, obeihire Ruhanga." 
Acts5:5 Anania, ku yaahuriire ebigambo ebyo, yaagwa ahansi, yaafa. Boona abaakihuriire baakwatwa obwoba bwingi." 
Acts5:6 Abatsigazi baimuka, baamuzinga, baamutwara, baamuziika." 
Acts5:7 Ku haahingwireho omwanya gw'eshaaha nka ishatu, omukazi we yaija ataine ki arikumanya." 
Acts5:8 Petero yaamubuuza ati: Ngambira; obuguzi obu nibwo mwatunzire omu kibanja? Yaamugarukamu ati: Eego, nibwo obwo." 
Acts5:9 Petero yaamugira ati: Ahabw'enki mwaikirizaine kugyeza Omwoyo wa Mukama? Hurira emitsindo y'abarikuruga kuziika baro, bari aha rwigi, naiwe bakushohoze." 
Acts5:10 Ahonaaho yaagwa ahansi aha bigyere bye, yaakinuka. Abatsigazi abo, ku baataahiremu, baashanga yaafiire, baamushohoza aheeru, baamuziika aha rubaju rwa iba." 
Acts5:11 Obwoba bwingi bwakwata ekanisa yoona, na boona abaabihuriire." 
Acts5:12 Omu biro ebyo obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza bingi bikakorwa emikono y'entumwa omu bantu; kandi boona bakaba bateeranira omu kisasi kya Sulemaani n'omutima gumwe. 
Acts5:13 Aha bandi tihariho n'omwe owaayehangire kuteerana nabo; kwonka abantu boona bakaba babahimbisa munonga; 
Acts5:14 n'abaikiriize baingi, abashaija n'abakazi, baayeyongyera munonga kukanya, nibeehongyera Mukama;" 
Acts5:15 n'okutwara batwara abarwaire baabo, babarambika omu nguuto aha bitanda n'omu ngozi, ngu abamwe aharibo bakaahikwaho ekinyimanyimi kya Petero yaaba naahingura." 
Acts5:16 Kandi abantu baaruga omuri tauni eziri haihi na Yerusaalemu, baateeranira aho, bareetsire abarwaire n'abariho baadaimoni; boona baatambirwa." 
Acts5:17 Bwanyima omunyamurwa omukuru yaimuka n'abo abu yaabaire aine, ab'omu kicweka ky'Abasadukaayo, baijwire eihari;" 
Acts5:18 baakwata entumwa, baazita omu kihome zoona." 
Acts5:19 Kwonka nyekiro, maraika wa Mukama yaigura enyigi z'ekihome, yaabashohoza aheeru, yaagira ati:" 
Acts5:20 Mugyende mwemerere omuri hekalu, mugambire abantu ebigambo byona eby'Amagara aga." 
Acts5:21 Ku baakihuriire, baataaha omuri hekalu omu kasheeshe, baayegyesa. Ku baabaire bakiriyo, omunyamurwa omukuru yaija hamwe n'abo abu yaabaire aine, yaateerana eishengyero n'abakuru boona b'Abaisraeli, yaatuma omu kihome kubareeta." 
Acts5:22 Abakuru b'abaserukare ku baahikireyo, tibaabashangamu, baagaruka, baabamanyisa, bati:" 
Acts5:23 Ekihome twashanga kikingirwe gye buzima, n'abarinzi beemereire aha nyigi; kwonka ku twaiguraho, titwashangamu muntu." 
Acts5:24 Omurinzi wa hekalu n'abanyamurwa abakuru ku baahuriire ebigambo ebyo, baashoberwa munonga, baayebuuza ahu biraagarukire." 
Acts5:25 Omu mwanya ogwo haija omuntu yaabagambira ati: Reeba, abashaija abo abu mutaire omu kihome, beemereire omuri hekalu nibeegyesa abantu." 
Acts5:26 Omurinzi ogwo hamwe n'abakuru b'abaserukare nikwo kugyenda bakabareeta, batarikubaita kubi, ahakuba bakaba nibatiina abantu ngu batabateera amabaare." 
Acts5:27 Ku baabahikize aho, baabeemereza omu maisho g'eishengyero, omunyamurwa omukuru yaababuuza ati:" 
Acts5:28 Titurabeehanangiririize kimwe kutagaruka kwegyesa omu iziina eryo? Mbwenu reeba mwijwize Yerusaalemu okwegyesa kwanyu. Nimwenda ngu eshagama y'ogwo mushaija etutukurire? 
Acts5:29 Petero n'ezindi ntumwa baagarukamu bati: Tushemereire kworobera Ruhanga okukira abantu. 
Acts5:30 Ruhanga wa baatatenkuriitwe akazoora Yesu ou mwaitsire muhanikire aha muti. 
Acts5:31 Ogwo Ruhanga akamutembya, yaamuta aha rubaju rwe rwa buryo, ngu abe Omwebembezi mukuru kandi Omujuni, okuhaisa Abaisraeli okweteisa n'okusaasirwa ebibi." 
Acts5:32 Itwe turi baakareebi b'ebyo hamwe n'Omwoyo Orikwera ou Ruhanga yaahaire abarikumworobera. 
Acts5:33 Ku baahuriire ebyo, baakwatwa ekiniga munonga, baayenda kubaita." 
Acts5:34 Kwonka omu ishengyero hakaba harimu Omufarisaayo orikwetwa Gamalieli omwegyesa w'Ebiragiro, owaabaire ari ow'ekitiinisa omu bantu boona; yaayemerera, yaaragiira kushohoza entumwa omwanya mukye." 
Acts5:35 Yaabagira ati: Imwe bashaija ba Israeli 'mwe, mwerinde; ebi murikwenda kukora aba bantu, mubigyendeho mpora." 
Acts5:36 Nimumanya ngu omu biro bihingwire, hakaimuka omushaija orikwetwa Teuda, yaayegambaho ku ari omuntu mukuru; kandi abantu nka magana ana baakwatanisa nawe; kwonka omushaija ogwo akaitwa, n'abaamukuratiire boona baataataana, baahwaho." 
Acts5:37 Bwanyima y'ogwo omu biro by'okwehandiikisa, hakaimuka Yuda owa Galilaaya, yaagomesa abantu baingi, baamukuratira; kwonka nawe yaitwa, n'abaamukuratiire boona baataataana." 
Acts5:38 Mbwenu hati nimbagambira nti: Eby'aba bantu mubyetantare, mubarekye; ahakuba enaama egi nari omurimo ogu ku biraabe biri eby'abantu, biryahwerekyerera;" 
Acts5:39 kwonka ku biraabe biri ebya Ruhanga, timuribaasa kubihwerekyereza; mwerinde mutakaareebeka nimurwanisa Ruhanga." 
Acts5:40 Batyo baikiriza obwengye obu yaabaha; baayeta entumwa, baaziteera; baazeehanangiriza kutagaruka kugamba omu iziina rya Yesu, baazirekura." 
Acts5:41 Zityo zaaruga omu maisho g'eishengyero, nizishemererwa ahabw'okuheebwa ekitiinisa eky'okuhemurwa niziturwa eiziina rya Yesu." 
Acts5:42 Kandi ebiro byona, omuri hekalu n'omu maka gaabo tibararekire kwegyesa bya Yesu n'okubuurira abantu ku ari Kristo." 
Acts6:1 Omu biro ebyo abeegi ku baayeyongyeire kukanya, Abayudaaya abaarugire Bugriika baayetomboitera Abaheburaayo, ahabw'okuba abafaakazi baabo bakaba abahugirweho omu kugaburirwa kw'obutoosha." 
Acts6:2 Bari ikumi na babiri baayeta omutwe gwona ogw'abeegi, baagira bati: tikihikire itwe kurereera kugamba ekigambo kya Ruhanga ahabw'okugabura." 
Acts6:3 N'ahabw'ekyo, B'eishe-emwe, mutoorane omuriimwe abashaija mushanju abarikusiimwa, abaijwire Omwoyo n'obwengye, abu turaahe omurimo ogu." 
Acts6:4 Reero itwe nitwija kwezirikira okushaba n'okuheereza ekigambo kya Ruhanga. 
Acts6:5 Ekigambo ekyo kyasiimwa omutwe gwona; baatoorana Stefano, omushaija oijwire okwikiriza n'Omwoyo Orikwera, na Filipo, na Porokoro, na Nikanoori, na Timoni, na Pamena, na Nikola owa Antiokia, owaahindukiire omu diini y'Abayudaaya." 
Acts6:6 Baabeemereza omu maisho g'entumwa; ku baaherize kushaba, baabataho engaro." 
Acts6:7 Ekigambo kya Ruhanga kyayeyongyera kubuga; omubaro gw'abeegi gwakanya munonga omuri Yerusaalemu; kandi abanyamurwa baingi baayorobera okwikiriza. 
Acts6:8 Kandi Stefano, aijwire embabazi n'obushoboorozi, yaakora eby'okutangaaza n'obumanyiso bikuru omu bantu." 
Acts6:9 Kwonka bamwe ab'omuri sinagogi y'Abaliberitiino n'Abanyakureene n'aba Alegizanderia, n'ey'aba Kilikia n'aba Asia, baimuka baahakanisa Stefano." 
Acts6:10 Kwonka tibaabaasa kusinga obwengye n'Omwoyo ebyabaire nibumugambisa. 
Acts6:11 Nikwo kuguriirira abantu, abaagizire bati: Tukahurira naagamba ebigambo by'okurogota ahari Musa n'ahari Ruhanga" 
Acts6:12 Baayosya abantu n'abakuru baabo n'abahandiiki, baamugurukira, baamukwata, baamutwara omu maisho g'eishengyero." 
Acts6:13 Baataho baakareebi ab'ebishuba, abaagizire bati: Omushaija ogu tayosha kugamba kubi aha mwanya ogu ogurikwera n'aha Biragiro;" 
Acts6:14 ahakuba tukahurira naagira ati: Yesu ogwo owa Nazareesi aryahwerekyereza omwanya ogu, ahindure emigyenzo ei Musa yaatuhaire." 
Acts6:15 Boona abaabaire bashutami omu ishengyero, ku baamutaireho amaisho, baareeba ahamaisho ge nihashusha aha maraika." 
Acts7:1 Omunyamurwa omukuru yaamubuuza ati: Ebyo nikwo biri bityo? 
Acts7:2 Stefano yaagira ati: Beene waitu kandi baataata, muhurire. Ruhanga ow'ekitiinsia akabonekyera tatenkuriitwe Abrahamu, akiri Mesopotamia, atakatwire Harani;" 
Acts7:3 yaamuragiira ati: Ruga omu nsi y'owaanyu n'omuri beene waanyu, oze omu nsi ei ndikworeka." 
Acts7:4 Nawe nikwo kuruga omu nsi y'Abakaludaaya, akatuura Harani. Bwanyima ishe ku yaafiire, Ruhanga yaamwihayo, yaamutaasya omu nsi egi, ei mutwiremu na hati mbwenu." 
Acts7:5 Kwonka taragimuhairemu butaka, nangwa n'obu haakuba ah'okuta ekigyere; kureka akaraganisa kugimuha okuba obutaka bwe n'obw'abaana be bwanyima ye, n'obu araabe yaabaire ataine mwana." 
Acts7:6 Kandi Ruhanga yaagira ati: Oruzaaro rwe ruryashuhuukira omu nsi y'abandi; abo baryabagira abahuuku, bamare emyaka magana ana nibabategyeka kubi." 
Acts7:7 Eihanga eryo eriribahindura abahuuku, nyowe Ruhanga ndyaricwera orubanja; bwanyima y'ebyo baryarugayo, bandamize omu mwanya ogu." 
Acts7:8 Atyo yaamuha endagaano y'okusharwa; n'ahabw'ekyo Abrahamu ku yaazaire Isaaka, yaamushara aha kiro kya munaana; na Isaaka yaazaara Yakobo, na Yakobo yaazaara baatatenkuriitwe ikumi na babiri." 
Acts7:9 Baatatenkuriitwe abo baagirira Yosefu eihari, baamutunda omu nsi ya Misri; kwonka Ruhanga yaaguma nawe," 
Acts7:10 yaamwiha omu kubonabona kwe kwona, yaamuha okukundwa Faraho omugabe wa Misri n'okuba omunyabwengye omu maisho ge; Faraho ogwo yaamuhindura omutegyeki wa Misri n'ekikaari kye kyona." 
Acts7:11 Bwanyima enjara yaataaha omu nsi yoona eya Misri n'eya Kanaani, haabaho obusaasi bwingi; baatatenkuriitwe baabura eby'okurya." 
Acts7:12 Kwonka Yakobo, ku yaahuriire ngu Misri hariyo engano, yaatumayo baatatenkuriitwe omurindi gw'okubanza." 
Acts7:13 Aha murundi gwa kabiri Yosefu yaayemanyisa bakuru be; na Faraho yaamanyira aho oruganda rwa Yosefu. 
Acts7:14 Yosefu nikwo kutuma ahari Yakobo ishe, akamweta na beene waabo boona, abantu makumi mushanju na bataano." 
Acts7:15 Yakobo yaashuuma, yaaza Misri; okwo niyo yaagwire, na baatatenkuriitwe;" 
Acts7:16 emitumbi yaabo yaatwarwa Shekemu, yaaziikwa omu kituuro eki Abrahamu yaaguzire n'efeeza ahari batabani ba Hamori owa Shekemu." 
Acts7:17 Kwonka obunaku bw'endagaano ei Ruhanga yaaraganiise Abrahamu ku bwahikire, Abaisraeli baakanya, baaba baingi omuri Misri," 
Acts7:18 okuhitsya obu haayemire omugabe ondiijo, owaabaire atarikumanya Yosefu." 
Acts7:19 Ogwo yaacwa obwengye bw'okuteera aha mutwe eihanga ryaitu, yaagyema baatatenkuriitwe kunaga abaana baabo, ngu batagumaho." 
Acts7:20 Omu bunaku obwo Musa yaazaarwa, kandi akaba ari murungi munonga; yaarererwa omu nju ya ishe okumara ameezi ashatu." 
Acts7:21 Ku yaanagirwe, muhara wa Faraho yaamutwara, yaamworora nk'omwana we." 
Acts7:22 Musa yaayegyesibwa obwengye bwona obw'Abanyamisri; yaaba ow'amaani omu bigambo bye n'omu bi yaabaire naakora. 
Acts7:23 Ku yaahikize emyaka makumi ana, yaizirwa ekitekateeko ky'okutaayaayira beene ishe Abaisraeli." 
Acts7:24 Ku yaareebire omwe aharibo naaturwa busha, yaamurwanaho, yaamuhoorera, yaita Omunyamisri." 
Acts7:25 Yaagira ngu beene ishe bakaayetegyereza ku Ruhanga arikwenda kubajunisa omukono gwe; kwonka bo tibaakimanya. 
Acts7:26 Ku bwaseesire, yaashanga babiri nibarwana, yaayenda ngu abaramure abateerane, yaabagira ati: Bashaija 'mwe, ahabw'enki nimukorana kubi, haza muri ab'oruganda rumwe?" 
Acts7:27 Ogwo owaabaire naashaagiza mugyenzi we, yaatsindika Musa naagira ati: N'oha owaakugizire omutegyeki kandi omuramuzi waitu?" 
Acts7:28 Nooyenda kuunyita, nk'oku oitsire Omunyamisri nyomwabazyo?" 
Acts7:29 Ahabw'ekigambo ekyo Musa yaahunga, yaatuura omu nsi ya Midiani nk'omugyenyi, ei yaazaariire abatabani babiri." 
Acts7:30 Bwanyima y'emyaka makumi ana, maraika yaamweyorekyera omu rurimi rw'omuriro nigwaka omu rushaka, omu ihamba ry'orushozi Sinai." 
Acts7:31 Musa ku yaagureebire, yaagutangaarira; ku yairiire haihi kureeba, eiraka rya Mukama ryamugira riti:" 
Acts7:32 Ndi Ruhanga wa baashwenkuru, Ruhanga wa Abrahamu, owa Isaaka, kandi owa Yakobo. Musa yaatetema, yaatiina kugumyayo amaisho." 
Acts7:33 Mukama yaamugira ati: Iha enkaito omu bigyere, ahakuba omwanya ogu oyemereiremu n'ogurikwera." 
Acts7:34 Buzimazima ndeebire okubonabonesibwa kw'abantu bangye abari omuri Misri, naahurira okutsinda kwabo; mbwenu nshuumire kubajuna. N'ahabw'ekyo ija hati, nkutume Misri." 
Acts7:35 Musa ogwo ou baayangire, nibagira ngu, N'oha owaakugizire omutegyeki kandi omuramuzi, ogwo niwe Ruhanga yaatumire kuba omutegyeki n'omujuni, kubajuna n'omukono gwa maraika owaamubonekyeire aha Rushaka." 
Acts7:36 Ku yaaherize kukora eby'okutangaaza n'obumanyiso omuri Misri, yaabaihayo, yaagumizamu naabikora aha Nyanja erikutukura, n'omu ihamba omu myaka makumi ana." 
Acts7:37 Kandi Musa ogwo niwe yaaraguriire Abaisraeli ati: Ruhanga aryabaimukiza nabi omuri beene waanyu, nk'oku yaanyimukize." 
Acts7:38 Hoona niwe yaabaire ari ahagati y'omutwe gw'abantu omu ihamba, ari hamwe na maraika owaamugambiriire aha rushozi Sinai, kandi ari hamwe na baatatenkuriitwe; niwe yaahairwe ebigambo by'amagara ngu abituhe." 
Acts7:39 Baatatenkuriitwe baayanga kumworobera, baamutsindika kuriya, kandi omu mitima yaabo baahinduka, baagaruka Misri" 
Acts7:40 baagambira Arooni bati: Otukorere baaruhanga, batwebembere; ahakuba Musa ogwo owaatwihire omu nsi ya Misri, titurikumanya oku abaire." 
Acts7:41 Omu biro ebyo baaheesha ekishushani ky'enyana, baakihongyera ekitambo, baashemerererwa emirimo y'emikono yaabo." 
Acts7:42 Ruhanga nikwo kuhinduka, akabareka ngu baramye eihe ry'omu iguru, nk'oku kyahandiikirwe omu kitabo kya baanabi, ngu: Imwe ab'oruganda rwa Israeli, amatungo n'ebitambo ebi mwatambiire omu ihamba emyaka egyo makumi ana, nimugira ngu niinye mwabitambiire?" 
Acts7:43 Ngaaha; omu mazima ebi mwabaire nimuheeka n'eihema rya Moloki, n'enyonyoozi ya ruhanga Refani, ebishushani ebi mwayekoreire kuramya. Naanye ndyabatwara, mbarengyeze Babulooni." 
Acts7:44 Baatatenkuriitwe bakaba baine eihema ry'Ebirikuhamya omu ihamba, nk'Owaagambiire Musa oku yaamuragiire kurikora naarishushanisa n'ekishushani eki yaareebire." 
Acts7:45 Eihema eryo niryo baatatenkuriitwe baahairwe baishebo, bakaritaasya omu nsi egi, obu baija na Yoshua, bakakubuura ensi y'Abanyamahanga abu Ruhanga yaabingire omu maisho gaabo okuhitsya aha busingye bwa Daudi." 
Acts7:46 Daudi ogwo, ku yaatungire obuganzi omu maisho ga Ruhanga, yaashaba kwikirizibwa kusherurira Ruhanga wa Yakobo ah'okutuura." 
Acts7:47 Kwonka Sulemaani niwe yaamwombekyeire enju. 
Acts7:48 Haza Rukira-boona atatuura mu maju agombekirwe emikono, nk'oku nabi yaagizire ati:" 
Acts7:49 Eiguru nikyo kitebe kyangye ky'obukama, N'ensi n'akatebe k'ebigyere byangye. Ni nju ki ei muriinyombekyera? Nikwo Mukama arikubuuza. Nari shi ni mwanya ki ogu ndihuumuriramu?" 
Acts7:50 Omukono gwangye tigwo gwahangire ebyo byona? 
Acts7:51 Imwe ab'ebitsya bigangaire, abatashazirwe mu mitima n'omu matu, murwanisa obutoosha Omwoyo Orikwera! Nk'oku bashwekuriimwe baakozire, naimwe nikwo mukora." 
Acts7:52 Ni nabi ki ou baashwenkuriimwe batarahiigire? Bakaita abo abaarangire okwija kw'Ogwo ohikiriire; mbwenu naimwe mukamureebya, mwamwita," 
Acts7:53 imwe abaahairwe Ebiragiro nk'oku byaragiirwe baamaraika, haza mutabyorobere." 
Acts7:54 Ku baahuriire ebyo, baagira ekiniga kingi, baamunenera amaino." 
Acts7:55 Kwonka we, aijwire Omwoyo Orikwera, yaagumya amaisho ge ahaiguru, yaareeba ekitiinisa kya Ruhanga, na Yesu ayemereire aha rubaju rwa buryo rwa Ruhanga;" 
Acts7:56 yaagira ati: Reeba, nindeeba eiguru rikinguukire, n'Omwana w'omuntu ayemereire aha rubaju rwa buryo rwa Ruhanga." 
Acts7:57 Baayomba munonga, baayekwata aha matu, baamweshukaho;" 
Acts7:58 baamutsindika aheeru y'orurembo, baamuteera amabaare; akndi baamushinja baatambika ebijwaro byabo aha bigyere by'omutsigazi orikwetwa Saulo." 
Acts7:59 Okwo nikwo baateire Stefano amabaare, naashaba naagira ati: Mukama wangye Yesu, yakiira omwoyo gwangye." 
Acts7:60 Yaatsimba amaju, yaagamba n'eiraka rihango ati: Mukama wangye, otabatura ekibi eki. Ku yaaherize kugamba atyo, yaagwejegyera." 
Acts8:1 Kandi Saulo akasiima okwitwa kwe. Aha izooba eryo baatandika kuhiiga munonga ekanisa y'omuri Yerusaalemu; boona baataataanira omu byanga bya Buyudaaya na Samaria, okwihaho entumwa zonka." 
Acts8:2 Abashaija abarikutiina Ruhanga baaziika Stefano, baamucurira munonga." 
Acts8:3 Kwonka Saulo we yaaguma naashiisha ekanisa, naataaha omuri buri nju, naakwata abashaija n'abakazi, naabata omu kihome." 
Acts8:4 N'ahabw'ekyo abaataataine baagyenda boona nibabuurira ekigambo. 
Acts8:5 Filipo yaashuuma, yaaza omu rurembo rwa Samaria, yaababuurira Kristo." 
Acts8:6 Emitwe mingi y'abantu, ku baabaire bahurira ebi Filipo arikugamba, baareeba obumanyiso obu arikukora, baabiikiriza n'omutima gumwe." 
Acts8:7 Ahabw'okuba baingi aharibo abaabaire bariho baadaimoni, baadaimoni bakaba babarugaho nibaamuza munonga; kandi baingu abaabaire bazingazingirwe, n'abaremaire, bakizibwa." 
Acts8:8 Haabaho okushemererwa kwingi omu rurembo orwo. 
Acts8:9 Kandi hakaba hariho omushaija orikwetwa Simooni, owaabaire akora eby'obufumu omu rurembo orwo, naatangaaza eihanga ry'Abasamaria, naayeyeta omuntu mukuru." 
Acts8:10 Abantu boona, okuruga aha muto okuhika aha mukuru, bakaba bamutiina, nibagira bati: Omushaija ogu niwe naani ga Ruhanga ageetwa Rugambwa." 
Acts8:11 Bakaba bamutiina, ahabw'okuba akaba amazire omwanya muhango naabatangaaza n'obufumu bwe." 
Acts8:12 Kwonka ku baikiriize Filipo owaababuuriire ebigambo birungi eby'obukama bwa Ruhanga n'eiziina rya Yesu Kristo, baabatizibwa, abashija n'abakazi." 
Acts8:13 Kandi Simooni nawe yaikiriza; ku yaaherize kubatizibwa, yaaguma na Filipo; ku yaareebire naakora obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza bikuru, yaatangaara munonga." 
Acts8:14 Kandi entumwa ezaabaire ziri Yerusaalemu, ku zaahuriire ngu aba Samaria baikiriize ekigambo kya Ruhanga, zaabatumaho Petero na Yohaana." 
Acts8:15 Nabo, ku baahikireyo, baabashabira ngu baheebwe Omwoyo Orikwera;" 
Acts8:16 ahakuba Omwoyo akaba atakaizire aha muntu weena omuribo, kureka bakaba babatiziibwe omu iziina rya Mukama waitu Yesu." 
Acts8:17 Ahonaaho Petero na Yohaana baabataho engaro, baaheebwa Omwoyo Orikwera." 
Acts8:18 Simooni, ku yaareebire baaheebwa Omwoyo Orikwera ahabw'okuteebwaho engaro z'entumwa, yaazireetera empiiha," 
Acts8:19 naagira ati: Naanye mumpe amaani aga, weena ou ndaateho engaro aheebwe Omwoyo Orikwera." 
Acts8:20 Kwonka Petero yaamugarukamu ati: Efeeza yaawe ebure naiwe, ahabw'okuba waateekateeka kugura ekiconco kya Ruhanga n'empiiha." 
Acts8:21 Toine mugabo n'obu kwakuba okukwatanisa naitwe omu kigambo eki; ahabw'okuba omutima gwawe tiguri gye mu maisho ga Ruhanga. 
Acts8:22 N'ahabw'ekyo oyeteise obubi bwawe obu, oshabe Mukama, shana akaakusaasira ekiteekateeko ky'omu mutima gwawe." 
Acts8:23 Nindeeba ku ori omu ndurwe erikushaarira n'omu nkomo z'obubi. 
Acts8:24 Simooni yaagarukamu naagira ati: Munshabire ahari Mukama, byona ebi mwagamba bitampikaho." 
Acts8:25 Bwanyima entumwa, ku zaaherize kuhamya ekigambo kya Mukama n'okukigamba, zaagaruka Yerusaalemu, nizibuurira engiri omu birorero bingi eby'Abasamaria." 
Acts8:26 Maraika wa Mukama yaagambira Filipo ati: Imuka ogyende, otoore omuhanda gw'eihamba ogw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo ogurikushuuma, okuruga Yerusaalemu okuhika Gaaza." 
Acts8:27 Yaimuka, yaagyenda. Kandi hakaba hariho omushaija omukonwa owa Esiopia, ow'obushoboorozi bwingi, obu yaahairwe Kandake, omugabekazi wa Esiopia, owaabaire ari omubiiki w'ebintu bye byona; ogwo akaba agiire Yerusaalemu kuramya." 
Acts8:28 Ku yaabaire naagaruka owaabo, ashutami omu kigaari kye, naashoma ekitabo kya nabi Isaaya," 
Acts8:29 Omwoyo yaagambira Filipo, ati: Hika ekigaari kiriya, ogyende nakyo." 
Acts8:30 Filipo yairuka, yaamuhika, yaahurira naashoma omu kitabo kya nabi Isaaya, yaamubuuza ati: Nooshoborokyerwa ebi orikushoma?" 
Acts8:31 Yaamugarukamu ati: Nimbaasa nta, ntaine w'okunshobororera? Yaashaba Filipo ngu atembe omu kigaari, ashutame nawe." 
Acts8:32 Kandi ekicweka eky'omu Byahandiikirwe eki yaabaire naashoma, kikaba kiri eki ngu: Akatwarwa kwitwa nk'entaama, Kandi nk'omwana gw'entaama oku gucureera omu maisho g'omukyemuzi waagwo, Nikwo ataraashamize kanwa ke." 
Acts8:33 Omu kugarurwa ahansi kwe bakamwitira orubanja; Oruganda rwe n'oha orirushoboorora? Ahakuba amagara ge gakaihwa omu nsi. 
Acts8:34 Omukonwa yaabuuza Filipo naagira ati: Ninkushaba onshobororere, nabi ogwo akagamba ahari oha? Akeegambaho, nari akagamba aha muntu ondiijo?" 
Acts8:35 Filipo yaatandika kugamba naihirira aha Byahandiikirwe ebyo, yaamugambira ebya Yesu." 
Acts8:36 Ku baabaire nibakigyenda, baahika aha maizi; omukonwa yaagira ati: Reeba, amaizi ngaga! Ekirikunzibira kubatizibwa niki?" 
Acts8:37 Filipo yaamugira ati: Ku oraabe waikiriza n'omutima gwawe gwona, nikibaasika. Yaagarukamu ati: Niinyikiriza ku Yesu Kristo ari Omwana wa Ruhanga." 
Acts8:38 Atyo yaaragiira ku beemereza ekigaari; bombi Filipo n'omukonwa baashuuma omu maizi; yaamubatiza. 
Acts8:39 Ku baarugire omu maizi, Omwoyo wa Mukama yaatwara Filipo, omukonwa tiyaagaruka kumureeba; kureka yaagumizamu, yaagyenda ashemereirwe." 
Acts8:40 Kwonka Filipo we yaashangwa Azooto; bwanyima yaagyenda naabuurira engiri omuri tauni zoona okuhitsya obu yaahikire Kaisarea. 
Acts9:1 Kwonka Saulo, ku yaabaire naakigamba eby'okukangisa n'eby'okwita abeegi ba Mukama, yaaza aha munyamurwa omukuru," 
Acts9:2 yaamushaba kuhandiikira sinagogi za Damasiko ebaruha ngu, ku araashangyeyo abarikwikiriza eby'Omuhanda ogwo, yaaba abashaija nari abakazi, abatware Yerusaalemu babohirwe." 
Acts9:3 Ku yaabaire naakigyenda, yaahika haihi na Damaisko, omushana ogurikuruga omu iguru gwamujwera gumwehinguririize," 
Acts9:4 yaagwa ahansi, yaahurira eiraka nirimugira riti: Saulo, Saulo, nompiigira ki?" 
Acts9:5 Yaagarukamu ati: Ori oha, Mukama wangye? We ati: Niinye Yesu ou orikuhiiga." 
Acts9:6 Taatetema ashobeirwe, yaabuuza ati: Mukama wangye, nooyenda ngu ngire nta? Mukama yaamugarukamu ati: Imuka, otaahe omu rurembo, noija kugambirwa ebi oshemereire kukora." 
Acts9:7 Abashaija abaabire nibagyenda nawe baayemerera bahunami, nibahurira eiraka, kwonka batarikureeba muntu." 
Acts9:8 Saulo yaimuka ahansi; ku yaabuurwire amaisho, tiyaahweza kintu; baamukwata omukono, baamutwara Damasiko." 
Acts9:9 Yaamarayo ebiro bishatu atarikuhweza, kandi atarikurya n'obu kwakuba okunywa." 
Acts9:10 Kandi Damasiko hakaba hariyo omwegi orikwetwa Anania. Mukama waitu yaamugambira omu kworekwa ati: Anania! Yaamugarukamu ati: Ndi aha, Mukama wangye." 
Acts9:11 Mukama waitu yaamugira ati: Imuka oze omu muhanda ogurikwetwa Ogugororokire, obuuze omu nju ya Yuda omuntu orikwetwa Saulo owa Taruso; ahakuba hati naashaba." 
Acts9:12 Kandi areebire omu kworekwa omushaija orikwetwa Anania naija kumutaho engaro ngu ahumuukye. 
Acts9:13 Kwonka Anania yaagarukamu ati: Mukama wangye, nkahurira baingi nibagamba aha mushaija ogwo, ku yaakozire kubi munonga abarikwera baawe omuri Yerusaalemu;" 
Acts9:14 na mbwenu aha aine obushoboorozi, obu aihire aha banyamurwa abakuru, kuboha boona abarikwikiriza eiziina ryawe." 
Acts9:15 Kwonka Mukama yaamugira ati: Irooko ogyende; ahakuba omushaija ogwo n'ekintu kyangye eki ntooraine okutwara eiziina ryangye omu maisho g'Abanyamahanga n'abagabe n'Abaisraeli; 
Acts9:16 naanye ndyamworeka obusaasi bwingi obu ashemereire kwemera ahabw'eiziina ryangye. 
Acts9:17 Anania nikwo kugyenda, akataaha omu nju egyo; akmutaho engaro, akamugira ati: Ow'eishe-emwe Saulo, Mukama waitu Yesu, okweyorekyeire omu muhanda ogu oreetsirwemu, yantuma ngu ohumuukye, oijure Omwoyo Orikwera." 
Acts9:18 Ahonaaho ebintu ebiri nk'ebikoko byamuruga aha maisho, yaahumuuka; yaayemerera, yaabatizibwa." 
Acts9:19 Ku yaaherize kurya eby'okurya, yaagarukwamu amaani. Bwanyima yaamara ebiro bikye n'abeegi Damasiko." 
Acts9:20 Ahonaaho yaatandika kugamba Yesu omuri sinagogi, ku ari Omwana wa Ruhanga." 
Acts9:21 Boona abaamuhuriire baatangaara nibagira bati: ogu t'omushaija owaabaire anyangaraza aba Yerusaalemu abaabaire batakira eiziina eryo? Kandi ekyo nikyo kibaire kimureetsire n'aha, ngu abatware babohirwe omu maisho g'abanyamurwa abakuru." 
Acts9:22 Kwonka Saulo yaayeyongyera kutunga amaani, yaakwatsa enshoni Abayudaaya abaabaire batwire Damasiko, naahamiza kimwe ku Yesu ari Kristo." 
Acts9:23 Ebiro bingi ku byahingwireho, Abayudaaya baacuma enaama y'okumwita;" 
Acts9:24 kwonka enaama yaabo Saulo yaagimanya. Baamugwera aha marembo nyomushana na nyekiro, ngu bamwite;" 
Acts9:25 kwonka abeegi be baamucwisa nyekiro, baamurengyeza aha rugo rw'amabaare, baamushuumiza omu kitukuru." 
Acts9:26 Ku yaahikire Yerusaalemu, yaateeraho kwehitsya abeegi; kwonka boona baamutiina, tibaikiriza ku ari omwegi." 
Acts9:27 Kwonka Barunaba yaamutwara, yaamuhitsya entumwa, yaabashobororera oku yaareebire Mukama akiri omu muhanda, Mukama akagamba nawe, kandi n'oku yaabuuriire n'obumanzi omu iziina rya Yesu omuri Damasiko." 
Acts9:28 Yaaguma naataayaayira ab'omuri Yerusaalemu," 
Acts9:29 naabuurira n'obumanzi omu iziina rya Mukama. Kandi yaahakanisa Abahelenesti; nabo baasherura oku baraamwite. 
Acts9:30 Ab'eishe-emwe ku baakimanyire, baamutwara Kaisarea, baamwohereza Taruso." 
Acts9:31 N'ahabw'ekyo ekanisa y'omuri Buyudaaya yoona na Galilaaya na Samaria yaagira obusingye yahamibwa; abantu baayeyongyera kukanya nibagyendera omu kutiina Mukama, bahangainwe Omwoyo Orikwera." 
Acts9:32 Omu biro ebyo Petero, ku yaabaire naataayaayira hoona, yaashuuma, yaataayaayira n'abarikwera abaabaire batwire Luuda." 
Acts9:33 Yaashangayo omushaija orikwetwa Ainea, owaabaire amazire emyaka munaana abyami aha kitanda ahabw'okuzingazingwa." 
Acts9:34 Petero yaamugira ati: Ainea, Yesu Kristo yaakutambira; imuka, oyeyarire. Ahonaaho yaimuka." 
Acts9:35 Abaabaire batwire Luuda na Sharooni boona ku baamureebire, baahndukira Mukama." 
Acts9:36 Omuri Yoopa hakaba harimu omwegi orikwetwa Tabisa, amakuru gaaryo ni Doruka, nari Esirabo; omukazi ogwo akaba akora emirimo mingi mirungi n'eby'embabazi eby'okuhwera abooro." 
Acts9:37 Omu biro ebyo akarwara, yaafa. Ku baaherize kwozya omutumbi gwe, baagubyamya omuri kanyinaibiri." 
Acts9:38 Kandi ahabwa Luuda kuba haihi na Yoopa, abeegi ku baahuriire ngu Petero niyo ari, baamutumaho abashaija babiri, baamweshengyereza nibagira bati: Orahukye, oije otureebe." 
Acts9:39 Petero yaimuka, yaagyenda nabo. Ku yaahikireyo, baamutembya omuri kanyinaibiri; n'abafaakazi boona baija, baamwemerera haihi nibarira, nibooreka amakanzu n'ebijwaro ebi Doruka yaakozire akiriho." 
Acts9:40 Petero yaabashohoza, yaatsimba amaju, yaashaba; yaahindukira omutumbi, yaagira ati: Tabisa, imuka. Yaabuuruura amaisho; ku yaareebire Petero yaashutama." 
Acts9:41 Petero yaamuha omukono, yaamwimutsya, yaayeta abarikwera n'abafaakazi, yaamubooreka ahuriire." 
Acts9:42 Ekyo kyamanywa omuri Yoopa yoona; baingi baikiriza Mukama. 
Acts9:43 Bwanyima yaamara ebiro bingi omuri Yoopa omu nju ya Simooni omuhazi w'empu. 
Acts10:1 Omuri Kaisarea hakaba harimu omushaija orikwetwa Koruneelio, omukuru w'abaserukare b'omu mutwe ogurikwetwa Italiano;" 
Acts10:2 akaba ari omunyadiini, orikutiina Ruhanga hamwe n'ab'omu ka ye boona, owaabaire ahwera abooro n'ebintu bye bingi, kandi naashaba Ruhanga obutoosha." 
Acts10:3 Eizooba rimwe aha shaaha nk'eya mwenda akareeba maraika wa Ruhanga omu kworekwa naija ah'ari, yaamugira ati: Koruneelio." 
Acts10:4 We yaamuhanga amaisho aine obwoba, yaamubuuza ati: N'enki, Mukama wangye? Yaamugarukamu ati: Okushaba kwawe n'obuhwezi bwawe bitembire okuba ekiijutsyo ahari Ruhanga." 
Acts10:5 Mbwenu tuma abashaija Yoopa, beeteyo omuntu Simooni orikwetwa Petero," 
Acts10:6 orikuraara owa Simooni omuhazi w'empu, enju ye eri aha rubaju rw'enyanja." 
Acts10:7 Maraika owaabarize nawe ku yaagyenzire, Koruneelio yaatuma abambari be babiri, n'omuserukare omunyadiini w'omuri abo abaabaire bamuheereza obutoosha;" 
Acts10:8 ku yaaherize kubateekyerereza byona, yaabatuma Yoopa." 
Acts10:9 Omu kasheeshe, abo abaatumirwe ku baabaire bahika haihi na tauni egyo, bakiri omu rugyendo rwabo, Petero yaatembas aha utwe gw'enju kushaba aha shaaha nk'eya muakaga;" 
Acts10:10 yaagira enjara, yaayenda kurya; ku baabaire nibaihura, yaaba nk'orikuroota;" 
Acts10:11 yaareeba eiguru rikinguukire, n'ekintu ekirikushusha nk'omwenda muhango munonga, ogukwatsirwe aha nshonda ina, nikishuuma ahansi," 
Acts10:12 kirimu enganda zoona z'enyamaishwa n'ebirikugyendesa enda n'ebirikuguruka omu mwanya. 
Acts10:13 Yaahurira eiraka nirimugira riti: Petero, imuka, oite orye." 
Acts10:14 Kwonka Petero yaagira ati: Ngaaha, Mukama wangye; ahabw'okuba tinkaryaga kintu kyona ekirikuzira nari ekitashemeire." 
Acts10:15 Eiraka ryagaruka ryamugambira obwa kabiri riti: Eki Ruhanga yashemeize, otarikihindura ekirikuzira." 
Acts10:16 Ebyo byabaho bityo kashatu; ahonaaho ekintu ekyo kyagarurwa omu iguru. 
Acts10:17 Petero ku yaabaire arimbagiriirwe, akishobeirwe amakuru g'okworekwa okwo oku yaareeba, abashaija abo, abatumirwe Koruneelio, ku baaherize kuhabuza enju ya Simooni, baija, baayemerera aha irembo," 
Acts10:18 baayeta nibabuuza bati: Simooni orikwetwa Petero naaraara aha? 
Acts10:19 Petero ku yaabaire naakiteekateeka aha kworekwa, Omwoyo yaamugira ati: Reeba, abashaija bashatu nibakusherura;" 
Acts10:20 imuka oshuume, ogyende nabo otarikubanganisa; ahakuba niinye naabatuma." 
Acts10:21 Petero nikwo kushuuma, akabahika, akabagira ati: Niinye ou murikusherura. Muhuutsirwe ki?" 
Acts10:22 Baamugira bati: Koruneelio, omukuru w'abaserukare, omushaija ohikiriire, orikutiina Ruhanga, kandi orikusiimwa eihanga ry'Abayudaaya ryona, aragiirwe maraika orikwera kukweta kwija omu ka ye, ngu ahurire ebi oraamugambire." 
Acts10:23 Yaabataasya omu nju, yaabaraaza. Ku bwaseesire, Petero yaimuka, yaagyenda nabo hamwe n'ab'eishe-emwe bamwe aba Yoopa." 
Acts10:24 Aha kiro ekindi baataaha Kaisarea. Baashanga Koruneelio abategyereize n'abanywani be buzima. 
Acts10:25 Petero ku yaabaire naakitaaha, Koruneelio yaamubugana, yaamugwa aha bigyere, yaamuramya." 
Acts10:26 Kwonka Petero yaamwimutsya, naagira ati: Imuka; naanye ndi omuntu nkaiwe." 
Acts10:27 Ku yaabaire naakigamba nawe, yaataahamu, yaashanga baingi bateeraine;" 
Acts10:28 yaabagira ati: Imwe nimumanya ku kizira Omuyudaaya okukwatanisa n'omuntu w'eihanga erindi, n'obu kwakuba kumutaayaayira; kwonka nyowe Ruhanga akaanyoreka ku ntashemereire kunuga muntu weena nari shi okumweta otashemeire." 
Acts10:29 N'ahabw'ekyo, ku nyetsirwe, tinaayanga kwija. Nikyo ndikubuuriza eki muunyeteire." 
Acts10:30 Koruneelio yaagira ati: Ebiro bina ebihingwire mbaire ninshabira omu nju yangye aha shaaha y'okushaba eya mwnea; ku mbaire ninshaba, naareeba omushaija anyemereire omumaisho, ajwaire ebijwaro ebirikwengyengyeta," 
Acts10:31 yaagira ati: Koruneelio, okushaba kwawe kuhuriirwe, n'obuhwezi bwawe bwijukirwe ahari Ruhanga." 
Acts10:32 N'ahabw'ekyo tuma Yoopa, oyeteyo Simooni orikwetwa Petero; hati naaraara omu nju ya Simooni omuhazi w'empu aha rubaju rw'enyanja." 
Acts10:33 Ahonaaho naakutumaho; kandi naiwe waakora gye kwija. Mbwenu hati turi aha twena omu maisho ga Ruhanga okuhurira byona ebi oragiirwe Mukama. 
Acts10:34 Petero yaatandika kugamba, naagira ati: Buzimazima naayetegyereza ku Ruhanga atashoroora mu bantu;" 
Acts10:35 kureka omu mahanga goona orikumutiina, akakora eby'okuhikiirira, ogwo niwe arikusiimwa." 
Acts10:36 Ekigambo ky'engiri y'obusingye obu tuhairwe ahabwa Yesu Kristo, (niwe Mukama wa boona,) Ruhanga akakyoherereza Abaisraeli." 
Acts10:37 Ekigambo ekyo naimwe nimukimanya, nikyo kyagambirwe omuri Buyudaaya yoona, okutandikira Galilaaya, bwanyima y'okubuurira kwa Yohaana okw'okubatiza;" 
Acts10:38 nikigamba ebya Yesu owa Nazareesi, oku Ruhanga yaamushukireho Omwoyo Orikwera n'amaani, akagyendagyenda naakora ebirungi, naakiza boona abaabaire nibaitwa kubi Sitaane; ahabw'okuba Ruhanga akaba ari hamwe nawe." 
Acts10:39 Naitwe turi baakareebi by'ebyo byona ebi yaakozire omu nsi y'Abayudaaya n'omuri Yerusaalemu. Yesu ogwo bakamwita, bamuhanikire aha muti;" 
Acts10:40 kwonka Ruhanga yaamuzoora aha kiro kya kashatu yaamworeka butunu," 
Acts10:41 ti mu bantu boona, kureka ahari baakareebi, abaatoorainwe Ruhanga ira, nibo itwe abaariire kandi abaanyweire nawe aherize kuzooka omu bafu." 
Acts10:42 Bwanyima yaaturagiira kubuurira abantu, n'okuhamya ngu niwe ogwo ou Ruhanga yaataireho kuba Omucwi w'emanja z'abahuriire n'abafiire." 
Acts10:43 Ogwo niwe baanabi boona baahamize, ngu ahabw'eiziina rye omuntu weena orikumwikiriza naihwaho ebibi." 
Acts10:44 Petero ku yaabaire naakigamba ebigambo ebyo, Omwoyo Orikwera yaashuuma ahari boona abaabaire nibahurira ekigambo." 
Acts10:45 Abaikiriize ab'omu bashazirwe, abaizire na Petero boona, baatangaara ahabw'Abanyamahanga nabo kushukwaho ekiconco ky'Omwoyo Orikwera." 
Acts10:46 Ahakuba bakabahurira nibagamba “omu ndimi”, nibahimbisa Ruhanga. Petero nikwo kubuuza ati:" 
Acts10:47 Abantu aba abaaheebwa Omwoyo Orikwera nkaitwe, hariho orikubaasa kubaima amaizi ngu batabatizibwa?" 
Acts10:48 Yaaragiira ngu babatizibwe omu iziina rya Yesu Kristo. Bwanyima baamweshengyereza kumarayo ebiro bikye. 
Acts11:1 Entumwa n'ab'eishe-emwe abaabaire bari Buyudaaya bakahurira ngu Abanyamahanga nabo baikiriize ekigambo kya Ruhanga. 
Acts11:2 Petero ku yaagarukire Yerusaalemu, ab'omu kigombe ky'abashazirwe baahakana nawe," 
Acts11:3 nibagira bati: Okataaha omu bantu abatashazirwe, kandi waarya nabo." 
Acts11:4 Petero yaatandika kubashobororera byona oku byakurataine, naagira ati:" 
Acts11:5 Nyowe nkaba ndi omuri tauni Yoopa, ninshaba; naashusha nk'orikuroota, naayorekwa ekintu, ekirikushusha nk'omwenda muhango munonga ogukwatsirwe aha nshonda ina, nikishuuma okuruga omu iguru; kyampikaho." 
Acts11:6 Ku naakigumizeho amaisho, naayetegyereza, naareeba enyamaishwa z'omu nsi z'amaguru ana, n'endi z'abantu, n'ebirikugyendesa enda, n'ebirikuguruka omu mwanya." 
Acts11:7 Kandi naahurira n'eiraka eririkungambira riti: Petero, imuka oite orye." 
Acts11:8 Kwonka nyowe naagira nti: Ngaaha, Mukama wangye! Ahabw'okuba ekintu ekirikuzira nari ekitashemeire tikikahikaga mu kanwa kangye." 
Acts11:9 Kwonka eiraka ryangarukamu obwa kabiri, niriruga omu iguru riti: Eki Ruhanga yashemeize, otarikihindura ekirikuzira." 
Acts11:10 Ekyo kyabaho kashatu; bwanyima byona byagarurwa omu iguru. 
Acts11:11 Omu shaaha egyo abashaija bashatu baayemerera omu maisho g'enju, ei twabaire turimu, batumirwe ahariinye nibaruga Kaisarea." 
Acts11:12 Omwoyo yandagiira kugyenda nabo ntarikubanganisa. Nikwo kugyenda n'ab'eishe-emwe mukaaga, tukataaha omu nju y'omushaija ogwo." 
Acts11:13 Nawe akatuteekyerereza oku yaareebire maraika ayemereire omu nju ye, naagira ati: Tuma Yoopa, oyeteyo Simooni orikwetwa Petero;" 
Acts11:14 ogwo aryakugambira ebigambo ebirikujunisa n'ab'omu ka yaawe boona. 
Acts11:15 Ku naatandikire kugamba, Omwoyo Orikwera yaabashuumaho, nk'oku yaizire ahariitwe bwa mbere." 
Acts11:16 Ahonaaho naijuka ekigambo kya Mukama, eki yaagambire ati: Buzimazima Yohaana akabatiza n'amaizi; kwonka imwe muryabatizibwa n'Omwoyo Orikwera." 
Acts11:17 Mbwenu, Ruhanga ku araabe yaabahaire ekiconco nk'eki yaatuhaire obu twaikiriza Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo, nyowe nkaba ndi oha okurwanisa Ruhanga?" 
Acts11:18 Ku baahuriire ebyo, baacureera, baahimbisa Ruhanga nibagira bati: Mbwenu Ruhanga ahaire n'Abanyamahanga okweteisa ngu baheebwe amagara agatahwaho." 
Acts11:19 Kandi abaataataanisiibwe okuhiigwa okwabaireho ahabw'ebya Stefano, baagyenda baahika Foiniike na Kupuro n'omuri Antiokia, bataine u barikugambira ekigambo kureka Abayudaaya bonka." 
Acts11:20 Kwonka hakaba hariho bamwe aharibo, abashaija ba Kupuro na Kureene; abo ku baahikire Antiokia, baagambira n'Abagriika, nibababuurira ebya Mukama waitu Yesu." 
Acts11:21 Omukono gwa Mukama gukaba guri aharibo, omutwe mwingi gw'abantu abaikiriize baahindukira Mukama." 
Acts11:22 Enkuru zaabyo zaahurirwa ekanisa ey'omuri Yerusaalemu, baatuma Barunaba Antiokia." 
Acts11:23 Ku yaahikireyo, yaareeba embabazi za Ruhanga, yaashemererwa; yaabeehanangiriza boona kuguma ahari Mukama n'omutima oguhamire." 
Acts11:24 Barunaba ogwo akaba ari omushaija murungi, oijwire Omwoyo Orikwera n'okwikiriza; kandi abantu baingi baija, baayehongyera Mukama." 
Acts11:25 Bwanyima yaarugayo, yaaza Taruso kusherura Saulo;" 
Acts11:26 ku yaamureebire, yaamureeta Antiokia. Okuruga aho baamarayo omwaka gwona, nibakwatanisa n'ekanisa yaayo, nibeegyesa abantu baingi. Kandi Antiokia okwo abeegi niyo batandikiire kwetwa Abakristaayo." 
Acts11:27 Omu biro ebyo baanabi aba Yerusaalemu baija Antiokia. 
Acts11:28 Omwe aharibo orikwetwa Agabo yaayemerera, yaaragurira omu Mwoyo ku haribaho enjara nyingi munonga omu nsi yoona; niyo njara eyaabaireho omu biro bya Kulaudio." 
Acts11:29 Abeegi baayo baamariirira, buri muntu nk'oku yaabaasize, kwohereza eby'okuhwera ab'eishe-emwe abaabaire batwire Buyudaaya." 
Acts11:30 Baakora batyo, baabyoherereza abakuru, byatwarwa Barunaba na Saulo." 
Acts12:1 Omu biro ebyo omugabe Heroode akakwata bamwe aha b'omu kanisa okubakora kubi. 
Acts12:2 Yakobo mukuru wa Yohaana yaamwitsa rurara. 
Acts12:3 Ku yaareebire Abayudaaya baakisiima, yaagaruka yaakwata na Petero. (Ebiro ebyo bikaba biri eby'Emigaati etatumbisiibwe.)" 
Acts12:4 Ku yaaherize kumukwata, yaamuta omu kihome, yaamutaho abaserukare ikumi na mukaaga kumurinda bana-bana, amaririire kumureeta omu maisho g'abantu bwanyima y'Okuhingurwaho." 
Acts12:5 Petero nikwo yaarinzirwe atyo omu kihome. Kwonka ekanisa yaayezirika kumushabira ahari Ruhanga. 
Acts12:6 Heroode ku yaabaire naayenda kumubareetera omu kasheeshe, ekiro ekyo Petero akaba agwejegyeire ari ahagati y'abaserukare babiri, n'abarinzi bari aha rwigi barinzire ekihome." 
Acts12:7 Maraika wa Mukama yaamwemerera aha rubaju, omushana gwajwa omu kishengye; yaateerateera Petero omu mbaju, yaamusisiimura, yaagira ati: Rahuka kwimuka. Enjegyere zaamuruga aha mikono." 
Acts12:8 Maraika yaamugira ati: Yezirikye, ojware enkaito zaawe. Yaakora atyo. Kandi ati: Jwara omunagiro gwawe, onkurate." 
Acts12:9 Yaashohora, yaamukuratira; kwonka tiyaamanya ekyakorwa maraika yaaba kiri eky'amazima, kureka yaateekateeka ngu n'okworekwa." 
Acts12:10 Ku baahingwire aha barinzi b'okubanza n'aba kabiri, baahika aha rwigi rw'ekyoma, orurikuza omu irembo. Orwigi orwo rwabaigukira rwonka; baashohora, baahingura omu muhanda gumwe; ahonaaho maraika yaamutsigaho." 
Acts12:11 Petero ku yaagarukirwe omutima omunda, yaagira ati: Mbwenu naamanyira kimwe ku Mukama yaatuma maraika we kunjuna omu mikono ya Heroode, n'okunkiza omuri byona ebi Abayudaaya baabaire baineho amatsiko." 
Acts12:12 Ku yaabyetegyereize, yaaza owa Mariamu nyina wa Yohaana orikwetwa Mako; okwo niyo baabaire bateeraniire baingi nibashaba." 
Acts12:13 Ku yaakongootsire aha rwigi rw'eirembo, omwishiki orikwetwa Rooda yaija kwetaba." 
Acts12:14 Ku yaamanyire eiraka rya petero, okushemererwa kwamuzibira kwiguraho orwigi, yaagaruka omu nju nairuka, yaabagira ati: Petero ayemereire aha irembo." 
Acts12:15 Baamugira bati: Ogwire eiraro. Omwihsiki yaahamiza kimwe ku nikwo kiri. Baagira bati: Ni maraika we. 
Acts12:16 Kwonka Petero yaagumizamu naakongoota; ku baigwireho, baamureeba, baatangaara munonga." 
Acts12:17 Yaabacureeza n'omukono, yaabateekyerereza oku Mukama yaamwiha omu kihome. Kandi yaagira ati: Mubigambire Yakobo n'ab'eishe-emwe. Atyo yaarugayo, yaaza ahandi." 
Acts12:18 Ku bwaseesire, haabaho okujagarara kwingi omu baserukare ahabw'okushoberwa oku Petero abaire." 
Acts12:19 Heroode ku yaatumire kumweta, yaashanga abuzire, yaabuuza munonga abarinzi; atyo yaaragiira ku babaita. Bwanyima yaaruga Buyudaaya, yaaza Kaisarea, yaagumayo." 
Acts12:20 Heroose akaba agwereirwe kubi munonga aba Tuuro na Sidoni. Nabo baija ah'ari n'omutima gumwe; ku baaherize kunywana na Bulasto omukuru w'abambari b'omugabe, baashaba obusingye, ahakuba ensi yaabo ekaba neeshaka omu nsi y'omugabe." 
Acts12:21 Aha kiro eki yaataireho, Heroode yaajwara ebijwaro by'obugabe, yaashutama aha kitebe kye, yaabagambira ebigambo bye." 
Acts12:22 Abantu baagamba n'eiraka rihango bati: Eiraka eri n'erya ruhanga, ti ry'omuntu." 
Acts12:23 Ahonaaho maraika wa Mukama yaamuteera, ahakuba tarahaire Ruhanga kitiinisa; yaariibwa enyogori, yaafa." 
Acts12:24 Kwonka ekigambo kya Ruhang akyayeyongyera, kandi kyakanya." 
Acts12:25 Barunaba na Saulo, ku baaherize omurimo gwabo gw'okuheereza, baaruga Yerusaalemu, baagarukayo, nibatwara Yohaana orikwetwa Mako." 
Acts13:1 Omu kanisa eyaabaire eri Antiokia hakaba harimu baanabi n'abeegyesa, Barunaba na Simeoni orikwetwa Niga na Lukio owa Kureene na Manaeni owaarezirwe hamwe n'Oweishaza Heroode, na Saulo." 
Acts13:2 Ku baabaire nibaheereza Mukama nibeesiibyakwo, Omwoyo Orikwera yaagira ati: Muntooranire Barunaba na Saulo, bakore omurimo ogu mbeeteire." 
Acts13:3 Ku baaherize kwesiibyakwo n'okushaba, baabataho engaro, baaboohereza." 
Acts13:4 Ku baatumirwe Omwoyo Orikwera, baashuuma Selukia; okwo baaragarirayo omu meeri, baayambuka Kupuro." 
Acts13:5 Ku baabaire bari Salami, baabuurira ekigambo kya Ruhanga omuri sinagogi z'Abayudaaya; kandi bakaba baine Yohaana nk'omuhereza waabo." 
Acts13:6 Ku baaherize kuraba omuri ekyo kirwa kyona, baahika Paafo; okwo baashangayo omushaija omurogi, nabi w'ebishuba, Omuyudaaya, orikwetwa Bayesu;" 
Acts13:7 kandi akaba atwire n'Oweishaza Omutegyeki, orikwetwa Serugiro Paulo, omushaija w'omunyabwengye. Ogwo yaayeta Barunaba na Saulo, naayenda kuhurira ekigambo kya Ruhanga." 
Acts13:8 Kwonka Eluma omurogi (ahakuba nigo makuru g'eiziina rye) yaabahakanisa, ngu abone kuhabisa Oweishaza ataikiriza." 
Acts13:9 Kwonka Saulo, niwe Paulo, aijwire Omwoyo Orikwera, yaamutaho amaisho," 
Acts13:10 naagira ati: Iwe oijwire obugobya bwona n'obubi bwona, iwe mwana wa Sitaane 'we, omuzigu w'okuhikiirira kwona, torireka kukiikamya emihanda ya Mukama egororokire?" 
Acts13:11 Mbwenu hati omukono gwa Mukama nigukuhana, noija kuhuma, noomara omwanya otarikureeba mushana. Ahonaaho oruho n'omwirima byamushweka; yaabandagira, naasherura ow'okumwebembera amukwaitse omukono." 
Acts13:12 Okuruga aho oweishaza, ku yaareebire ebyakorwa, yaikiriza, ahabw'okuba akatangaarira okwegyesa kwa Mukama." 
Acts13:13 Bwanyima Paulo n'abagyenzi be baaruga Paafo omu meeri, baayambuka, baahika Peruga ey'omuri Pamfulia. Yohaana yaabatsigayo, yaagaruka Yerusaalemu;" 
Acts13:14 kwonka bo ku baahingwire nibaruga Peruga, baahika Antiokia ey'omuri Pisidia. Baataaha omuri sinagogi aha izooba rya Sabato, baashutama." 
Acts13:15 Bwanyima y'okushoma Ebiragiro n'ebya Baanabi, abakuru ba sinagogi baabeeta, baabagira bati: B'eishe-emwe, ku muraabe mwine ekigambo ky'okugumya abantu, mukigambe." 
Acts13:16 Paulo nikwo kwimuka, akaimutsya omukono, naagira ati: Imwe bashaija ba Israeli 'mwe, naimwe abarikutiina Ruhanga, muhurire." 
Acts13:17 Ruhanga ow'eihanga eri ry'Israeli akatoorana baatatenkuriitwe, yaakuza abantu abo obu baabaire batwire omu nsi ya Misri; bwanyima yaabaihisayo omukono gw'amaani." 
Acts13:18 Yaamara emyaka nka makumi ana abagumisiririize omu ihamba. 
Acts13:19 Ku yaaherize kuhwerekyereza amahanga mushanju omu nsi ya Kanaani, yaabaha ensi yaabo kuba obuhunguzi," 
Acts13:20 baamarayo emyaka nka magana ana na makumi ataano; bwanyima y'ebyo yaabaha abaramuzi okuhitsya ahari nabi Samueli. 
Acts13:21 Bwanyima baashaba omugabe; Ruhanga yaabaha Saulo mutabani wa Kiishi, ow'omuruganda rwa Benyamiini, yaabategyekyera emyaka makumi ana." 
Acts13:22 Ogwo ku yaamwihireho, yaayemeka Daudi kuba omugabe waabo, ou yaahamize, naagira ati: Mboine Daudi mutabani wa Yese, omuntu ori nk'omutima gwangye oku gurikwenda; aryakora byona ebi ndikukunda." 
Acts13:23 Omu ruzaaro rw'omushaija ogwo, nimwo Ruhanga yaihiire Israeli Omujuni, Yesu, nk'oku yaaraganiise." 
Acts13:24 Yesu ogwo atakaizire, Yohaana kabuurira Abaisraeli boona okubatizibwa okw'okweteisa." 
Acts13:25 Kandi Yohaana ku yaabaire naamariiriza orugyendo rwe, yaagira ati: Nimugira ngu, mba oha? Nyowe tindi We. Kwonka hariho orikwija enyima yangye, ou ntashemereire kuyuzya enkaito ze." 
Acts13:26 B'eishe-emwe, abaana b'oruganda rwa Abrahamu, n'abari omuriimwe abarikutiina Ruhanga, ekigambo ky'okujunwa oku niitwe kyatumirweho." 
Acts13:27 Mumanye ngu abaabaire batwire Yerusaalemu n'abategyeki baabo, ahabw'okutamumanya, n'obu kwakuba okushoborokyerwa ebyagambirwe baanabi, ebirikushomwa buri Sabato, bakabihikiiriza, obu baamusingisa orubanja." 
Acts13:28 Kandi n'obu baraabe baabuzire orubanja rw'okumwitsa, bakashaba Pilaato ngu aitwe." 
Acts13:29 Ku baaherize kuhikiiriza byona ebyamuhandiikirweho, baamuhanura aha muti, baamuziika omu kituuro." 
Acts13:30 Kwonka Ruhanga yaamuzoora omu bafu; 
Acts13:31 yaamara ebiro bingi naareebwa abo abaarugire nawe Galilaaya nibaza Yerusaalemu; nibo baakareebi abarikumuhamya hati omu bantu. 
Acts13:32 Naitwe tubareeteire ebigambo birungi eby'endagaano, ei Ruhanga yaaraganiise baatatenkuriitwe," 
Acts13:33 kandi endagaano egyo akagihikiiriza ahariitwe, abaana baabo, obu yaazoora Yesu; nk'oku kyahandiikirwe omuri zaaburi eya kabiri ngu, Ori Omwana wangye, eri izooba naakuzaara." 
Acts13:34 Nk'oku yaamuzoire omu bafu okutagaruka mu kujunda, akagira ati: Ndyabaha emigisha erikwera kandi etahwaho eya Daudi." 
Acts13:35 Kandi akagambira n'omuri zaburi endiijo ati: Toriikiriza Orikwera waawe kujunda. 
Acts13:36 Nimumanya Daudi ku yaaherize kuhikiiriza enaama ya Ruhanga omu biro bye, yaagwejegyera, yaaziikwa na baishenkuru, yaajunda;" 
Acts13:37 kwonka Ogwo ou Ruhanga yaazoire tarajunzire. 
Acts13:38 N'ahabw'ekyo, B'eishe-emwe, mumanye ngu ahabw'Omushaija ogwo okwihwaho ebibi nikubagambirwa;" 
Acts13:39 kandi ahabw'Ogwo orikwikiriza weena naihwaho orubanja rw'ebibi byona, ebi mutaakubaasize kwihwaho Bragiro bya Musa." 
Acts13:40 Mbwenu mwerinde, mutakaahikwaho ekyagambirwe baanabi, nibagira bati:" 
Acts13:41 Imwe abagaya, mureebe, mutangaare, muhweho; ahakuba ninkora omurimo omu biro byanyu, omurimo ogu mutariikiriza na kakye, n'obu omuntu yaakuba naagubashobororera." 
Acts13:42 Ku baabaire nibashohora, abantu baayeshengyereza ngu ebigambo ebyo bagarukye babigambirwe ahari Sabato erikwija." 
Acts13:43 Ku baaherize kushohora, Abayudaaya baingi n'abahindukiire omu diini yaabo baakuratira Paulo na Barunaba; bo baabeehanangiriza nibabagambira kugumizamu omu mbabazi za Ruhanga." 
Acts13:44 Ahari Sabato egyo ab'omu rurembo haihi boona baateerana kuhurira ekigambo kya Ruhanga. 
Acts13:45 Kwonka Abayudaaya ku baareebire emitwe y'abantu, baagira eihari ringi, baahakanisa ebigambo ebyagambirwe Paulo, baamujuma." 
Acts13:46 Paulo na Barunaba baagamba n'obumanzi, bati: Kikaba kishemereire kuba niimwe mwabanza kugambirwa ekigambo kya Ruhanga; mbwenu obu mwakyanga, mukeeyoreka ku mutashemereire magara agatahwaho, reeba twahindukira Abanyamahanga." 
Acts13:47 Ahakuba Mukama waitu nikwo yaaturagiira ati: Nkutaireho kuba Omushana gw'Abanyamahanga Ngu otware okujunwa, okuhitsya aha muheru gw'ensi." 
Acts13:48 Abanyamahanga ku baakihuriire, baashemererwa, baahimbisa ekigambo kya Ruhanga; boona abatooraniirwe amagara agatahwaho baikiriza." 
Acts13:49 Ekigambo kya Mukama kyabuga omu nsi egyo yoona. 
Acts13:50 Kwonka Abayudaaya baayosya abakazi abanyadiini ab'ekitiinisa n'abashaija bakuru ab'omu rurembo, baahiiga Paulo na Barunaba, baababinga omu ishaza ryabo." 
Acts13:51 Kwonka bo baabakunkumurira omucuucu gw'omu bigyere byabo, baaza Ikonio." 
Acts13:52 Abeegi baijura okushemererwa n'Omwoyo Orikwera. 
Acts14:1 Ku baahikire Ikonio, baataaha omuri sinagogi y'Abayudaaya, baagamba ebigambo birungi ebyareeteire omutwe gw'Abayudaaya n'Abagriika baingi okwikiriza." 
Acts14:2 Kwonka Abayudaaya, abaayangire kuhurira, baayosya Abanyamahanga, baashiisha emitima yaabo ngu bangye ab'eishe-emwe." 
Acts14:3 Okuruga aho baamarayo ebiro bingi, nibagamba n'obumanzi, beegamiire Mukama, owaahamize ekigambo ky'embabazi ze n'obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza ebi yaabahaire kukora n'emikono yaabo." 
Acts14:4 Kwonka ab'omu rurembo baayebaganisamu; abamwe baaza aha rubaju rw'Abayudaaya, abandi aha rw'entumwa." 
Acts14:5 Bwanyima Abanyamahanga n'Abayudaaya baacuma enaama y'okubakora kubi n'okubaitsa amabaare; 
Acts14:6 entumwa ku zaakimanyire, zaahungire Lusitura na Derube, tauni za Lukaonia, n'ebyanga ebihikaine n'aho;" 
Acts14:7 okwo baaruurirayo engiri. 
Acts14:8 Omuri Lusitura hakaba harimu omushaija, owaabaire atarikubaasa kugyendesa maguru, owaazairwe ari ekirema, otakagyendahoga." 
Acts14:9 Ogwo yaahurira Paulo naagamba. Paulo, ku yaamwetegyereize, yaareeba ku aine okwesiga ngu naabaasa kutambirwa," 
Acts14:10 yaagamba n'eiraka rihango, ati: Imuka, oyemerere n'ebigyere byawe. Yaabandatuka, yaagyenda." 
Acts14:11 Ab'emitwe ku baareebire eki Paulo yaakora, baayombera ahaiguru, nibagamba omu rurimi rwa Lukaonia, bati: Baaruhanga baatushuumamu omu nshusha y'abantu." 
Acts14:12 Barunaba baamweta Zeu, na Paulo baamweta Herume, ahabw'okuba niwe yaabaire ari mukuru omu kugamba." 
Acts14:13 Omunyamurwa wa hekalu ya Zeu, eyaabaire eri omu maisho g'orurembo, yaareeta ente n'ebishaba by'ebirabyo aha irembo, yaija n'abantu kutamba ekitambo." 
Acts14:14 Kwonka entumwa, Barunaba na Paulo, ku baahuriire ekyo, baataagura ebijwaro byabo, baayeshuka omu bantu, nibagamba n'eiraka rihango bati:" 
Acts14:15 Bashaija 'mwe, n'enki ekirikubakoresa ebyo? Naitwe turi abantu-buntu nkaimwe, twabareetera ebigambo ebirungi, ngu murekye ebi ebitaine mugasho, muhindukire Ruhanga ohuriire, owaahangire eiguru n'ensi n'enyanja n'ebintu byona ebirimu." 
Acts14:16 Omu busingye bwa ira akareka amahanga goona kugyendera omu muhanda yaago. 
Acts14:17 Kwonka tararekyeire aho kubura eky'okumuhamya, ahakuba akaguma naabakora gye, naabagwisiza enjura okuruga omu iguru, naabeereza emyaka omu bunaku bwayo, naabahaazya eby'okurya, naijuza emitima yaanyu okushemererwa." 
Acts14:18 Batyo baazibira abantu kubatambira ebitambo n'ebigambo ebyo, kwonka kyabarusya munonga." 
Acts14:19 Bwanyima haija Abayudaaya abaarugire Antiokia na Ikonio; ku baaherize kwosya abantu, baateera Paulo amabaare, baamukurura nibamushohoza aheeru y'orurembo, nibagira ngu afiire." 
Acts14:20 Kwonka abeegi ku baayemereire bamwehinguririize, yaimuka, yaagaruka omu rurembo; ku bwaseesire, yaashohora na Barunaba, baaza Derube." 
Acts14:21 Ku baaherize kubuurira engiri ah'omuri tauni egyo n'okuhindura abeegi baingi, baagaruka Lusitura na Ikonio na Antiokia" 
Acts14:22 nibagumya emitima y'abeegi, nibabeehanangiriza kuguma omu kwikiriza, kandi bati: Tushemeriere kutaaha omu bukama bwa Ruhanga, nituraba omu busaasi bwingi." 
Acts14:23 Kandi ku baaherize kubateeraho abakuru omuri buri kanisa, nibashaba nibeesiibyakwo, baabatsigira Mukama ou baikiriize." 
Acts14:24 Bwanyima baaraba omuri Pisidia, baahika Pamufulia." 
Acts14:25 Ku baaherize kugamba ekigambo omuri Peruga, baashuuma, baataaha Atalia." 
Acts14:26 Omu kurugayo baaza omu meeri, baahika Antiokia, ahu baatsigiriirwe embabazi za Ruhanga ahabw'omurimo, ogu baaheza kuhikiiriza." 
Acts14:27 Ku baahikireyo, baateerana ekanisa yoona, baabateekyerereza byona ebi Ruhanga yaakozire hamwe nabo, kandi n'oku yaiguriire Abanyamahanga orwigi rw'okwikiriza." 
Acts14:28 Baagumayo n'abeegi ebiro bitari bikye. 
Acts15:1 Bwanyima haija abashaija bamwe abaarugire Buyudaaya, baayegyesa ab'eishe-emwe bati: Ku muraabe mutashazirwe nk'omugyenzo gwa Musa oku guri, timurikubaasa kujunwa." 
Acts15:2 Paulo na Barunaba baahakanisa abantu abo munonga, baahika n'aha kutongana; ab'eishe-emwe nikwo kwohereza Paulo na Barunaba n'abandi bamwe aharibo kwinamuka Yerusaalemu aha ntumwa n'abakuru, ngu babamare empaka ahari ekyo." 
Acts15:3 N'ahabw'ekyo abo, ku baaherize kushendekyerezibwa ab'ekanisa, baaraba omuri Foiniike na Samaria, nibagambira ab'eishe-emwe eby'okuhinduka kw'Abanyamahanga, byareetera boona okushemererwa kwingi." 
Acts15:4 Ku baahikire Yerusaalemu, baayakiirwa ab'ekanisa n'entumwa n'abakuru, baabateekyerereza byona ebi Ruhanga yaakozire hamwe nabo." 
Acts15:5 Kwonka haayemerera bamwe ab'omu kigombe ky'Abafarisaayo abaikiriize, baagira bati: Ekirikwetengwa n'okubashara, kandi n'okubaragiira okuhitsya Ebiragiro bya Musa." 
Acts15:6 Entumwa n'abakuru baateerana hamwe kuteekateeka aha kigambo ekyo. 
Acts15:7 Ku baaherize omwanya muhango nibahanuura, Petero yaayemerera, yaabagira ati: B'eishe-emwe, nimumanya ngu omu biro byahweire Ruhanga akantoorana omuriimwe kuba niinye naagambira Abanyamahanga ekigambo ky'engiri, ngu bakihurire, baikirize." 
Acts15:8 Kandi Ruhanga orikumanya emitima yaabahamya, naabaha Omwoyo Orikwera nk'oku yaamutuhaire;" 
Acts15:9 tiyaatutaansia nabo, yaashemeze emitima yaabo ahabw'okwikiriza." 
Acts15:10 Mbwenu nimugyereza ki Ruhanga okwekoreza abeegi emitwaro ei baatatenkuriitwe batarabaasize kwekorera, n'obu baakuba itwe?" 
Acts15:11 Kwonka itwe nitwikiriza ngu turyajunwa ahabw'embabazi za Mukama waitu Yesu, nk'abo oku barikunwa." 
Acts15:12 Abantu boona baamucureera, baahurira Barunaba na Paulo nibabateekyerereza obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza ebi Ruhanga yaabakoreise omu Banyamahanga." 
Acts15:13 Ku baaherize kugamba, Yakobo yaagira ati: B'eishe-emwe, mumpurire!" 
Acts15:14 Simooni yaaheza kubateekyerereza oku Ruhanga yaatandikire kutaayaayira Abanyamahanga okutoorana abantu omuribo kuba eihanga eririkwetererwa eiziina rye. 
Acts15:15 Kandi ebigambo bya baanabi nibiikirizana nabyo, nk'oku kyahandiikirwe ngu" 
Acts15:16 Bwanyima y'ebyo ndyagaruka, Nyimutsye enju ya Daudi eyaagwire; Ahu yaasheenyukire ndyahashemeza, mpaimutsye," 
Acts15:17 Ngu abantu abaahonokireho basherure Mukama, Hamwe n'Abanyamahanga boona abarikwetererwa eiziina ryangye;" 
Acts15:18 Nikwo Mukama arikugira, okora ebyo byona Ebyamanyirwe okuruga iranaira." 
Acts15:19 N'ahabw'ekyo nindagiira nti: Turekye kurusya abarikuruga omu Banyamahanga bakahindukira Ruhanga; 
Acts15:20 kwonka tubahandiikire, barekye kweshiisha n'okuramya ebishushani, n'eshagama." 
Acts15:21 Ahakuba okuruga ira Musa aine omu ndembo zoona abarikumugambaho, kandi buri Sabato ebitabo bye bishomerwa omuri sinagogi." 
Acts15:22 Bwanyima entumwa n'abakuru hamwe n'ekanisa yoona baasiima kutoorana omuribo abashaija ab'okutuma na Paulo na Barunaba omuri Antiokia. Baatuma Yuda orikwetwa Barusaba na Siila, abantu bakuru omu b'eishe-emwe;" 
Acts15:23 baahandiika ebaruha, baagibaha, ehandiikirwe eti: Itwe entumwa n'ab'eishe-emwe abakuru nitubahandiikira imwe ab'eishe-emwe ab'omu Banyamahanga abari Antiokia na Siria na Kilikia, nitubaramutysa." 
Acts15:24 Tukahurirangu bamwe abaarugire omuriitwe bakabagambira ebigambo by'okubeemereza emitima n'okubabanganisisa, haza tutarabaragiire." 
Acts15:25 N'ahabw'ekyo ku twateeraine, twasiimira hamwe kutoorana abashaija n'okubabatumaho hamwe na Barunaba na Paulo, abu turikukunda," 
Acts15:26 abashaija abaayogire amagara gaabo ahabw'eiziina rya Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo. 
Acts15:27 Mbwenu abu twatuma ni Yuda na Siila, nibo baraabashobororere ebigambo ebyo n'akanwa." 
Acts15:28 Mumanye ngu Omwoyo Orikwera naitwe twasiima kutabakorera gundi mutwaro oguremeire kureka okwikiriza ebi ebibashemereire," 
Acts15:29 okureka kurya ebihongyeirwe ebishushani, n'eshagama, n'ebinigirwe, n'obushambani; ku muraayerinde ebyo, muryaguma muri gye. Mugumeho." 
Acts15:30 Ku baaherize kuragwa, baashuuma, baaza Antiokia. Ku baahikireyo, baateerana ab'omutwe boona, baabaha ebaruha." 
Acts15:31 Ku baagishomire, baashemererwa ahabw'okuhuumurizibwa okwo." 
Acts15:32 Kandi Yuda na Siila, ahabw'okuba nabo bakaba bari baanabi, baayehanangiriza ab'eishe-emwe n'ebigambo bingi, baabagumya." 
Acts15:33 Ku baamazireyo ebiro ebitari bikye, baaragwa n'obusingye ab'eishe-emwe kugaruka ahari abo abaabatumire." 
Acts15:34 Kwonka Siila we yaasiima kutsigarayo. 
Acts15:35 Kandi Paulo na Barunaba nabo baajuma Antiokia, nibeegyesa, nibabuurira ekigambo kya Ruhanga hamwe n'abandi baingi." 
Acts15:36 Ebiro ku byahingwireho, Paulo yaagira Barunaba ati: Ka tugarukyeyo hati, tutaayaayire ab'eishe-emwe ab'omu ndembo zoona, ei twagambire ekigambo kya Mukama, tureebe oku bari." 
Acts15:37 Barunaba akaba naakunda ngu bagyende na Yohaana orikwetwa Mako; 
Acts15:38 kwonka Paulo tiyaasiima kugyenda n'omuntu owaataaniire nabo Pamfulia, obu yaayanga kugyendanabo aha murimo." 
Acts15:39 Haabaho empaka nyingi, ahabw'ekyo baataana; Barunaba yaatwara Mako, baaza omu meeri, baayambuka Kupuro." 
Acts15:40 Paulo we yaatoorana Siila; ab'eishe-emwe ku baaherize kumutsigira embabazi za Mukama, yaagyenda." 
Acts15:41 Yaaraba omuri Siria na Kilikia, naagumya amakanisa." 
Acts16:1 Bwanyima yaahika Derube na Lusitura; okwo hakaba hariyo omwegi orikwetwa Timoseo, mutabani w'Omuyudaayakazi owaikiriize, kwonka ishe akaba ari Omugriika." 
Acts16:2 Timoseo ogwo akaba asiimwa ab'eishe-emwe aba Lusitura na Ikonio. 
Acts16:3 Pauli yaayenda ngu bagyendane; yaamutwara, yaamushara ahabw'Abayudaaya abaabaire bari omu myanya egyo; ahakuba boona bakaba nibamanya ngu ishe n'Omugriika." 
Acts16:4 Ku baabaire nibaraba omuri tauni ezo, baabaha ebiragiro ebyatairweho entumwa n'abakuru abaabaire bateeraniire Yerusaalemu, ngu babikwate." 
Acts16:5 N'ahabw'ekyo amakanisa gaagumibwa omu kwikiriza, abantu baayeyongyera kukanya obutoosha." 
Acts16:6 Ku baazibiirwe Omwoyo Orikwera kugamba ekigambo omuri Asia, baaraba omu byanga bya Furugia na Galatia;" 
Acts16:7 ku baahikire haihi na Musia, baayenda ngu baze Bisunia; kwonka Omwoyo wa Yesu tiyaabaikiriza." 
Acts16:8 Batyo baaraba Musia, baashuuma baahika Troa." 
Acts16:9 Nyekiro Paulo yaayorekwa, yaareeba omushaija owa Makedonia, ayemereire, naamweshengyereza ati: Yambuka, oije Makedonia, otuhwere." 
Acts16:10 Ku yaareebire okworekwa okwo, ahonaaho twayenda kuza Makedonia, twahamiza kimwe ngu Ruhanga atwetsire kubabuurira engiri." 
Acts16:11 N'ahabw'ekyo twaruga Troa omu meeri, twagyema ogurikwambuka Samoserakia; aha izooba erindi twahika Neapooli;" 
Acts16:12 ku twarugireyo, twahika Filipi, orurembo orukuru orwa Makedonia, orwayombekirwe Abarooma abaafurukiireyo; twamara ebiro omu rurembo orwo." 
Acts16:13 Aha izooba rya Sabato twashohora twaraba omu irembo ryarwo, twaza aha rubaju rw'omugyera, ahu twateekateekire ngu hariho omwanya gw'okushabiramu; twahsutama ahansi, twagamba n'abakazi abaateeraniireyo." 
Acts16:14 Omuri abo hakaba harimu omukazi orikwetwa Ludia, omushuubuzi w'emyenda ya bujwa, ow'omuri tauni eya Suatira, owaabaire atiina Ruhanga; ku yaatuhuriire, Mukama yaigura omutima gwe okweta aha bigambo ebyagambwa Paulo." 
Acts16:15 Ku yaaherize kubatizibwa n'ab'omu ka ye, yaatweshengyereza, naagira ati: Ku muraabe mwansiima ngu ndi omwesigwa ahari Mukama, mwije omu nju yangye, mucumbikyemu. Yaatugyemesereza." 
Acts16:16 Ku twabaire nituza omuri ogwo mwanya gw'okushabiramu, twabuganwa omuzaana oriho daimoni orikuragura, owaabaire atungisa bakama be munonga n'emikimbo ei yaabaire akimbirwa." 
Acts16:17 Omuzaana ogwo yaakuratira Paulo naitwe, naayamuza n'eiraka rihango ati: Abashaija aba n'abahuuku ba Ruhanga Rukira-boona; nibabamanyisa omuhanda gw'okujunwa." 
Acts16:18 Yaaguma naakora atyo ebiro bingi. Paulo, ku yaatamirwe, yaahinduka, yaagira daimoni ati: Ninkuragiira omu iziina rya Yesu Kristo, murugyeho. Daimoni yaamurugaho omuri ako kaanya." 
Acts16:19 Bakama be ku baareebire baahwa amatsiko g'okumutungaho ebintu, baakwata Paulo na Siila, baabakurura, baabatwara omu katare omu maisho g'abategyeki;" 
Acts16:20 ku baabahikize abaramuzi, baagiba bati: Abashaija aba n'Abayudaaya, nibarabanisamu orurembo rwaitu." 
Acts16:21 Nibeegyesa emicwe ei ebiragiro bituzibira kwikiriza n'obu kwakuba okukora, ahakuba turi Abarooma." 
Acts16:22 N'abaabaire bateeraniire aho baabaimukiririra hamwe; n'abaramuzi baabataagurira ebijwaro aha mibiri, baaragiira kubateeza enkoni." 
Acts16:23 Ku baaherize kubateera enkoni nyingi, baabaroha omu kihome, baaragiira omurinzi w'embohe kubarinda munonga." 
Acts16:24 Ku yaaragiirwe atyo, yaabatsindika omu kishengye kya hagati eky'omu kihome, yaaboha amaguru gaabo omu nkomo." 
Acts16:25 Nyekiro nk'omu itumbi Paulo na Siila bakaba nibashaba, nibeeshongorera Ruhanga, n'embohe zibategire amatu;" 
Acts16:26 omu mwanya ogwo haabaho omutistsa mwingi, omusingu gw'ekihome gwatengyetsibwa; ahonaaho enyigi zoona zaiguka, n'emihama ya buri muntu yaakomoroka." 
Acts16:27 Omurinzi w'ekihome ku yaasisiimukire, yaareeba enyigi ziigukire, yaasyorayo rurara ye, yaayenda kwerezya, ahabw'okuba akateekateeka ngu embohe zicwire." 
Acts16:28 Kwonka Paulo yaagamba n'eiraka rihango, naagira ati: Oteekora kubi, ahakuba twena turi aha." 
Acts16:29 Yaatuma amatabaaza, yaayetuura omu nju, yaajuumara omu maisho ga Paulo na Siila, naatetema aine obwoba;" 
Acts16:30 yaabashohoza aheeru, yaababuuza ati: Baataata, nshemereire kukora ki, nkajunwa?" 
Acts16:31 Baagarukamu bati: Ikiriza Mukama waitu Yesu, noija kujunwa, iwe n'eka yaawe." 
Acts16:32 Kandi baamugambira ekigambo kya Mukama hamwe na boona abaabaire bari omu ka ye. 
Acts16:33 Yaabatwara omu shaaha egyo nyekiro, yaabanaabisa emihiriirizi; ahonaaho yaabatizibwa n'abomu ka ye boona." 
Acts16:34 Bwanyima yaabatwara omu nju ye, yaabareetera eby'okurya, ashemereirwe munonga n'ab'omu nju ye ahabw'okwikiriza Ruhanga." 
Acts16:35 Ku bwaseesire, abaramuzi baatuma abaserukare, nibagira bati: Murekure abashaija abo." 
Acts16:36 Omurinzi w'embohe yaagambira Paulo ebigambo ebyo, ati: Abaramuzi baatuma ngu tubarekure; mbwenu hati mushohore, mugyende n'obusingye." 
Acts16:37 Kwonka Paulo yaabagira ati: Batuteereire omu maisho g'abantu tutakacwereirwe rubanja, haza turi Abarooma; kandi baaturoha omu kihome; mbwenu nibenda kutwihamu kitamanyirwe? Ngaaha! Reka, babe nibo baija, batweshohoreze." 
Acts16:38 Abo baserukare baagambira abaramuzi ebigambo ebyo; ku baahuriire ngu n'Abarooma, baatiina." 
Acts16:39 Baija, baabeehohoora; ku baabashohoize, baabashaba kuruga omu rurembo." 
Acts16:40 Batyo baaruga omu kihome, baataaha omu nju ya Ludia; ku baareebaine n'ab'eishe-emwe, baabagumya, baarugayo." 
Acts17:1 Ku baarabire omuri Amfipooli na Apolonia, baahika Tesalonika; aho hakaba hariho sinagogi y'Abayudaaya." 
Acts17:2 Paulo, nk'omucwe gwe oku gwabaire guri, yaabataahamu, yaabahakanisa omu Byahandiikirwe okumara amazooba ashatu ga Sabato," 
Acts17:3 naashoboorora, kandi naahamya ku Kristo yaashemereire kubonabonesibwa, n'okuzooka omu bafu; kandi ati: Yesu ogwo, ou ndikubagambira, niwe Kristo buzima." 
Acts17:4 Abamwe aharibo baikiriza, baakwatanisa na Paulo na Siila; kandi haikiriza omutwe muhango gw'Abagriika abanyadiini, n'abakazi bw'ekitiinisa abatari bakye." 
Acts17:5 Kwonka Abayudaaya bo baakwatwa eihari, baatwara abashaija babi b'ebizengyerezi, baateerana omutwe muhango, baateerera orwari omu rurembo; baakuba enju ya Yasooni, nibenda kushohoza Paulo na Siila, ngu babareete omu maisho g'abantu." 
Acts17:6 Ku baababuriire, baakurura Yasooni n'abamwe aha b'eishe-emwe, baabatwara omu maisho g'abategyeki b'orurembo, nibagamba n'eiraka rihango bati: Abashaija aba abajuumikire ensi, mbwenu baizire n'aha;" 
Acts17:7 na Yasooni yaabaakiira; haza boona nibagomera ebiragiro bya Kaisaari, nibagira ngu hariho omugabe ondiijo, Yesu." 
Acts17:8 Omutwe gw'abantu n'abategyeki b'orurembo, ku baabihuriire, baayemereza emitima." 
Acts17:9 Ku baaherize kwiha ahari Yasooni n'abandi omusingo, baabarekura." 
Acts17:10 Ahonaaho ab'eishe-emwe baayohereza Paulo na Siila nyekiro ngu bataahe Beroya. Ku baahikireyo, baaza omuri sinagogi y'Abayudaaya." 
Acts17:11 Kwonka abo bo bakaba batwaza gye okukira aba Tesalonika, ahabw'okuba bakaakiira ekigambo n'emitima erikukundira kiwme, nibashwijuma omu Byahandiikirwe obutoosha, kureeba ebigambo ebyo ku biraabe nikwo biri." 
Acts17:12 N'ahabw'ekyo baingi aharibo baikiriza, n'Abagriikakazi ab'ekitiinisa n'abashaija abatari bakye." 
Acts17:13 Kwonka Abayudaaya ba Tesalonika ku baamanyire ngu Paulo agambire ekigambo kya Ruhanga n'omuri Beroya, nayo baazayo, baayosya abantu, baabajagaraza emitima." 
Acts17:14 Ahonaaho ab'eishe-emwe baayohereza Paulo kugyenda ngu ahikye aha nyanja; Siila na Timoseo baatsigarayo. 
Acts17:15 Abaashendekyereize Paulo baamuhitsya Aseene; ku yaaherize kubaragiira kugambira Siila na Timoseo ngu beehuute bamushangyeyo, baagyenda." 
Acts17:16 Paulo ku yaabaire akibategyerereize Aseene, omutima gwe gwashaasha munonga ahabw'okureeba orurembo rwijwire ebishushani ebirikuramibwa." 
Acts17:17 Atyo yaahakanisa Abayudaaya n'abanyadiini omuri sinagogi, kandi n'omu katare yaahakana n'abu yaabaire ashangamu obutoosha." 
Acts17:18 Kandi bamwe aha banyabwengye Abaepikureyo n'Abastoyiko baamubugana. Abamwe baagira bati: Mbwenu reero naayenda kugamba ki, egi ngambi y'amaingi? Abandi bati: Naashusha nk'orikugamba ebya baaruhanga abasya; ahakuba akaba naagamba ebya Yesu n'eby'okuzooka." 
Acts17:19 Baamukwata, baamutwara Areopaago, nibagira bati: Nitwenda kumanya eby'okwegyesa oku okusya, oku orikugamba, oku kuri." 
Acts17:20 Ahakuba oreetsire ebigambo bisya omu matu gaitu; nikyo turikwendera kumanya amakuru gaabyo. 
Acts17:21 Kandi aba Aseene boona n'abagyenyi abaabaire bariyo bakaba batakiine kindi eki barikukora kureka okugamba, n'okuhurira ebigambo bisya ebihangire." 
Acts17:22 Paulo nikwo kwemerera ahagati ya Areopaago, akagira ati: Imwe abashaija ba Aseene, ndeebire omuri byona ku murengyesereize okuba abanyadiini." 
Acts17:23 Ahakuba ku mbaire nimpungura, naareeba ebi murikuramya, naashanga eitambiro erihandiikirweho ngu, N'ERYA RUHANGA OTARIKUMANYWA. Haza mbwenu eki muramya nk'ekitarikumanya, nikyo ndikwenda kubagambira." 
Acts17:24 Ruhanga owaahangire ensi n'ebintu byona ebirimu, ahabw'okuba Mukama w'eiguru n'ensi, tatuura muri hekalu ezombekirwe n'emikono," 
Acts17:25 n'obu kwakuba okuheerezibwa emikono y'abantu, nk'one eki akyenire; ahakuba niwe wenka aha abantu boona amagara n'omwitsyo na buri kintu kyona;" 
Acts17:26 kandi akahanga amahanga goona ag'abantu, naabakomoora aha muntu omwe, ngu batuure omu nsi yoona. Niwe yaataireho obunaku bw'emyaka okwihaihana, akataho emyatano y'ahu abantu batwire;" 
Acts17:27 ngu babone kusherura Ruhanga, nibabandagira baine amatsiko g'okumugwaho, n'obu araabe atare hare n'omuntu weena omuriitwe;" 
Acts17:28 ahakuba omuriwe tuba abahuriire, tugyenda, kandi tugumaho; nk'abamwe aha bahimbi baanyu b'ebyoshongoro oku baagambire nibagira bati: Ahakuba naitwe turi oruzaaro rwe." 
Acts17:29 N'ahabw'ekyo ku turaabe turi oruzaaro rwa Ruhanga, tutushemereire kuteekateeka ngu Ruhanga naashusha ezaabu nari efeeza, nari amabaare agasharwire omu buringaringo n'obwengye bw'abantu." 
Acts17:30 Ebiro ebyo eby'okutamanya, Ruhanga akabirenzya amaisho, kwonka hati naaragiira abantu boona abari hoona kweteisa," 
Acts17:31 ahakuba akataho ekiro eki aricweraho emanja z'ensi yoona omu kuhikiirira, naazicwisa Omuntu ou yaatooraine; kandi ebyo akabihamiza abantu boona, obu yaamuzoora omu bafu." 
Acts17:32 Ku baahuriire aha by'okuzooka omu bafu, abamwe baabishekyerera, abandi baagira bati: Turyakuhurira obundi, obutugambire." 
Acts17:33 Atyo Paulo yaabarugaho. 
Acts17:34 Kwonka abashaija bamwe baaguma nawe, baikiriza; omuribo hakaba harimu Dionisio ow'omu ba Areopaago, n'omukazi orikweta Damari, hamwe n'abandi." 
Acts18:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo yaaruga Aseene yaaza Korinso. 
Acts18:2 Yaashangayo Omuyudaaya orikwetwa Akula, enzarwa ya Pontio, nibwo yaabaire arugire Italia n'omukazi we Priskila, ahabw'okuba Kulaudio akaba aragiire Abayudaaya boona kuruga Rooma. Paulo yaaza owaabo kubareeba;" 
Acts18:3 kandi, ahabw'okushangwa ari ow'omwoga gumwe n'ogwabo, yaaguma nabo, nibakora hamwe; ahakuba omwoga gwabo gukaba guri okubaziira amahema." 
Acts18:4 Buri Sabato yaaguma naahakanisa Abayudaaya n'Abagriika omuri sinagogi, naabaikiririsa." 
Acts18:5 Siila na Timoseo ku baarugire Makedonisa, Paulo yaagyemwa ekigambo kya Ruhanga, naahamiza Abayudaaya ku Yesu ari Kristo." 
Acts18:6 Ku baamuhakaniise munonga, baarogota, yaakunkumura ebijwaro bye, yaabagira ati: Eshagama yaanyu ebe niimwe yaatukururira; nyowe ndi mwere; okuruga hati niinyija kuza omu Banyamahanga." 
Acts18:7 Yaarugayo, yaataaha omu nju y'omuntu orikwetwa Tito Yusto, owaabaire aramya Ruhanga, enju ye ekaba eri haihi na sinagogi." 
Acts18:8 Kandi Krispo omukuru wa sinagogi yaikiriza Mukama n'eka ye yoona; n'aba Korisno baingi, ku baahuriire, baikiriza, baabatizibwa." 
Acts18:9 Mukama waitu yaagambira Paulo nyekiro omu kworekwa ati: Otatiina, ogume ogambe, orekye kuhunama;" 
Acts18:10 ahabw'okuba ndi hamwe naiwe, kandi tihariho muntu oraakutaahirire kukukora kubi; ahakuba nyine abantu baingi omu rurembo oru." 
Acts18:11 Bwanyima yaamarayo omwaka n'ameezi mukaaga, naabeegyesamu ekigambo kya Ruhanga." 
Acts18:12 Galio ku yaabaire ari omutegyeki wa Akaya, Abayudaaya baimukirira Paulo n'omutima gumwe, baamutwara omu maisho g'ekitebe ky'eiramuriro;" 
Acts18:13 nibagira bati: Omushaija ogu naikiririsa abantu kuramya Ruhanga omu buryo oburikuhakanisa Ebiragiro. 
Acts18:14 Kwonka Paulo ku yaabaire naayenda kwashamya akanwa ke kwetonganira, Galio yaagambira Abayudaaya ati: Imwe Bayudaaya 'mwe, kuri ruri orubanja rw'ekibi nari shi ekihagaro, nkaagizire oburyo bw'okubagumisiririza, mbahurira;" 
Acts18:15 kwonka obu ziri empaka z'ebigambo n'amazima n'ebiragiro byanyu mwenka, mubyemarire; tindikwenda kucwa orubanja rw'ebigambo nk'ebyo." 
Acts18:16 Yaababinga omu maisho g'ekitebe ky'eiramuriro. 
Acts18:17 Boona baakwata Soseene, omukuru wa sinagogi, baamuteerera omu maisho g'ekyo kitebe. Kwonak ebyo byona Galio tiyaabyetaho." 
Acts18:18 Bwanyima y'ebyo Paulo yaamarayo ebindi biro bingi; ku byahweire, yaaraga ab'eishe-emwe, yaaza omu meeri na Priskila na Akula, baayambuka Siria; ku yaahikire Kenkereya, yaamweisa eishokye, ahakuba nikwo yaabaire arahiire." 
Acts18:19 Ku baahikire Efeso, yaabatsigayo; yaataaha omuri sinagogi wenka, yaahakansia Abayudaaya." 
Acts18:20 Ku baamushabire kuguma nabo ebiro ebindi, tiyaabaikiriza;" 
Acts18:21 kwonka yaabaraga naagira ati: Ruhanga ku arikunda, ndyagaruka. Atyo yaaza omu meeri, yaaruga Efeso." 
Acts18:22 Ku yaayambukire Kaisarea, yainamuka, yaaramutsya ekanisa; bwanyima yaaza Antiokia." 
Acts18:23 Ku yaamazireyo ebiro, yaarugayo, yaaraba omu mashaza ga Galatia na Furugia, naareeba emyanya yaamwo nk'oku yaabaire ekurataine, naagumya abeegi boona." 
Acts18:24 Kandi hakaba hariho Omuyudaaya orikweta Apolo, enzaarwa ya Alegizanderia, omushaija orikumanya kugamba, kandi owaabaire ari omunyabwengye omu Byahandiikirwe; yaija Efeso." 
Acts18:25 Omushaija ogwo akaba ayegyesiibwe omuhanda gwa Mukama; kandi ahabw'okwezirika omu Mwoyo, yaagamba ebya Yesu, naabeegyesa gye, n'obu araabe yaabaire naamanya okubatiza kwa Yohaana kwonka." 
Acts18:26 Yaatandika kubuurira n'obumanzi omuri sinagogi. Kwonka Priskila na Akula, ku baamuhuriire, baamutwara owaabo, baayongyera kumushobororera gye omuhanda gwa Ruhanga." 
Acts18:27 Ku yaateekateekire kwambuka Akaya, ab'eishe-emwe baamugumya, baahandiikira abeegi kumwakiira; ku yaahikireyo, embabazi za Ruhanga zaamubaasisa kuhwera abo abaabaire baikiriize;" 
Acts18:28 ahakuba akaba ahakanisa Abayudaaya n'amaani omu maisho ga boona, abasinga, naabahamiza omu Byahandiikirwe ku Yesu ari Kristo." 
Acts19:1 Apolo ku yaabaire akiri Korinso, Paulo yaaraba omu kyanga kya ruguru, yaahika Efeso, yaashangayo abeegi bamwe;" 
Acts19:2 yaababuuza ati: Obu mwaikiriza, mukaheebwa Omwyoyo Orikwera? Baamugarukamu bati: Ngaaha, n'okuhurira titukahuriraga, yaaba habaho Omwoyo Orikwera." 
Acts19:3 Yaagira ati: Mukabatizibwa omu kubatizibwa ki? Bati: Omu kubatuza kwa Yohaana. 
Acts19:4 Paulo yaagira ati: Yohaana akabatiza okubatiza kw'okweteisa, naagambira abantu kwikiriza Ogwo orikwenda kwija enyima ye, niwe Yesu." 
Acts19:5 Ku baahuriire ekyo, baabatizibwa omu iziina rya Mukama waitu Yesu." 
Acts19:6 Paulo ku yaabataireho engaro, Omwoyo Orikwera yaabaijaho; baagamba endimi ezindi, baaragura." 
Acts19:7 Boona bakaba bari ikumi na babiri. 
Acts19:8 Yaataaha omuri sinagogi, yaamara ameezi ashatu naagamba n'obumanzi, naahakanisa abantu, kandi naabaikiririsa eby'obukama bwa Ruhanga." 
Acts19:9 Kwonka bamwe ku baagangaize emitima, baayanga kuhurira nibajuma Omuhanda ogwo omu maisho g'abantu, yaabarugaho, yaashorooramu abeegi, yaaguma naahakanira omu ishomero rya Turaano." 
Acts19:10 Yaagumizamu naakora atyo okumara emyaka ebiri; n'ahabw'ekyo boona abaabaire batwire Asia, Abayudaaya n'Abagriika, baahurira ekigambo kya Mukama." 
Acts19:11 Ruhanga yaakoresa emikono ya Paulo eby'okutangaaza ebitari by'obutoosha; 
Acts19:12 kandi ebitambaara n'emyenda ebyarugire aha mubiri gwe baabitwarira abarwaire, baakira endwara zaabo, n'abariho baadaimoni baabarugaho." 
Acts19:13 Hakaba hariho ebizengyerezi by'Abayudaaya, abatiriki b'emizimu, baayehanga kutsirika baadaimoni omu iziina rya Mukama waitu Yesu, nibagira bati: Ninkwitsa Yesu ou Paulo agamba." 
Acts19:14 Hakaba hariho abashaija mushanju, batabani ba Skewa Omuyudaaya, omunyamurwa omukuru, abaabaire nibakora batyo." 
Acts19:15 Daimoni yaabagarukamu ati: Yesu nimmumanya, na Paulo nimmumanya; beitu imwe muri baahi?" 
Acts19:16 Omushaija owaabaire ariho daimoni yaabagurukira boona, yaabakiza amaani, yaababinga, baahunga omu nju egyo bajwaire busha, bahutaire." 
Acts19:17 Kandi ekyo kyamanywa boona, Abayudaaya n'Abagriika, abaabire batwiire Efeso; boona baatiina munonga, kandi eiziina rya Mukama waitu Yesu ryahimbisibwa." 
Acts19:18 Kandi baingi ahari abo abaikiriize baija, baayatura ebibi byabo, baagamba n'ebi baakozire." 
Acts19:19 Baingi ahari abo, abaabaire bakora eby'obufumu baateeranira hamwe ebitabo byabo eby'okuragura, baabyokeza omu maisho g'abantu boona; baabariirira obuguzi bwabyo, baashanga nibuhika ebicweka by'efeeza obukumi butaano." 
Acts19:20 Okwo nikwo ekigambo kya Mukama kyayeyongyeire kityo amaani, kikasingura." 
Acts19:21 Kandi ebyo ku byahweire, Paulo yaamariirira omu mutima gwe kubanza kuraba Makedonia na Akaya, ngu abone kuza Yerusaalemu, naagira ati: Ku ndiba naahikireyo, nshemereire kuza kureeba Rooma nayo." 
Acts19:22 Ku yaaherize kutuma Makedonia babiri aha bahwezi be, Timoseo na Erasto, we yaaguma Asia ebiro bikye." 
Acts19:23 Omu biro ebyo hakabaho okujagarara kwingi ahabw'eby'Omuhanda ogwo. 
Acts19:24 Ahakuba omushaija orikwetwa Demeterio, omuheesi w'efeeza, owaabaire aheesha ebishushani bya hekalu ya Atemi omu feeza, naatungisa abaheesi be munonga;" 
Acts19:25 akabateerana hamwe n'abandi abaabaire bakora omwoga ogwo, yaabagira ati: Bashaija 'mwe, nimumanya omwoga ogu ku nigwo gubaire nigututungisa." 
Acts19:26 Mbwenu nimureeba, kandi nimuhurira ku kitari muri Efeso yonka, kureka n'omuri Asia haihi yoona, Paulo ogwo ayohize abantu baingi, naabahindura, naagira ati: Baaruhanga abakozirwe n'emikono, ti baaruhanga b'amazima." 
Acts19:27 Mbwenu nu hariho akabi, ti habw'omwoga gwaitu kugaywa kwonka, kureka n'ahabwa hekalu na ruhangakazi rugambwa Atemi kuhindurwa busha; kandi na ruhanga-kazi ogwo, orikuramibwa ab'omu nsi zoona, kwihwaho ekitiinisa kye." 
Acts19:28 Ku baahuriire ekyo, baakwatwa ekiniga kingi, baayomba munonga bati: Atemi wa Efeso ni mukuru!" 
Acts19:29 Orurembo rwona rwayoogoorekana; abantu baakwata Gaayo na Aristariiko aba Makedonia, abaabaire bagyenda na Paulo omu ngyendo ze, boona baashutuka, baaza omu izaaniro." 
Acts19:30 Paulo yaayenda kubataahamu, kwonka abeegi be tibaamwikiriza;" 
Acts19:31 kandi bamwe aha bakungu bakuru ba Asia, abaabaire bari banywani be, baamutumaho, baamweshengyereza ngu arekye kweroha omu iteeraniro." 
Acts19:32 Ab'omu mutwe ogwo abamwe baayomba okwabo, n'abandi okwabo, ahakuba boona bakaba nibayoogoorekana, kandi abaingi batamanyire ekyabateerana." 
Acts19:33 Baiha Alegizanda omu mutwe, Abayudaaya baaba nibo baamwebembeza. Alegizanda yaabacureeza n'omukono, ngu abone kwetonganira aha bantu." 
Acts19:34 Kwonka ku baamanyire ku ari Omuyudaaya, boona baayombera hamwe okumara nk'eshaaha ibiri nibagira bati: Atemi wa Efeso ni mukuru!" 
Acts19:35 Bwanyima omuhandiiki omukuru ow'omu rurembo yaacureeza abantu naagira ati: Imwe bashaija ba Efeso 'mwe, ni muntu ki otarikumanya ngu orurembo rwa Efeso nirwo rurinda hekalu ya Atemi omukuru, n'ekishushabni ekyarugire omu iguru?" 
Acts19:36 Mbwenu, nk'oku hatariho orikubaasa kubyehakana, mushemereire kuhunama, mutakora ekintu kyona nimurahukiriza." 
Acts19:37 Ahakuba abashaija abo tibaibire by'omuri hekalu zaitu, n'obu kwakuba okurogota ahari ruhanga-kazi waitu; mbwenu mwabareeta aha." 
Acts19:38 N'ahabw'ekyo Demeterio n'abaheesi bagyenzi be, ku baraabe baine eki barikutabaariza omuntu weena, amaramuriro gariho, n'abategyeki barihp; babe niyo baatabaarizana." 
Acts19:39 Kwonka ku muraabe mwine ekindi eki murikushobooroza, biryamarirwa omu ishengyero ry'obutoosha." 
Acts19:40 Mumanye ku turi omu kabi k'okuregwa ahabw'okuyoogoorekana kw'eri izooba; ahakuba tihariho buryo obu turaayetonganire bukashoboorora okuteerana oku. 
Acts19:41 Ku yaaherize kugamba ekyo, yaagambira abantu, baayabuuka." 
Acts20:1 Okurabanamu ku kwahweireho, Paulo yaatuma abeegi; ku yaaherize kubagumya, yaabaraga, yaarugayo kuza Makedonia." 
Acts20:2 Ku yaaherize kuraba omu bicweka ebyo, n'okubagumya omuri bingi, yaahika Bugriika." 
Acts20:3 Okwo yaamarayo ameezi ashatu; ku yaabaire naayenda kugyendera omu meeri kuza Siria, Abayudaaya baacuma enaama y'okumwita; n'ahabw'ekyo yaamariirira kugaruka ogwa Makedonia." 
Acts20:4 Abaagyenzire nawe kumuhitsya Asia ni Sopateera owa Beroya, mwene Puuro, Aristariiko na Sekundo aba Tesalonika, Gaayo owa Derube, na Timoseo, Tukiko na Trofimo aba Asia." 
Acts20:5 Abo baatwebembera, baatutegyerereza Troa;" 
Acts20:6 kwonka itwe, bwanyima y'ebiro by'Emigaati etatumbisiibwe, twaruga Filipi, twaza omu meeri, twabashanga Troa, tumazire ebiro bitaano; okwo twamarayo ebiro mushanju." 
Acts20:7 Aha kiro ky'okubanza omu saabiiti, ku twabaire tuteeraine hamwe kubega omugaati, Paulo yaabagaaniirira, naayenda kurugayo omu kasheeshe; yaagumizamu naagamba okuhitsya omu itumbi." 
Acts20:8 Omuri kanyinaishatu omu twabaire tuteeraniire, hakaba harimu amatabaaza maingi;" 
Acts20:9 kandi omutsigazi orikwetwa Yutuko akaba ashutami omu dirisa; yaagira oturo twingi; Paulo ku yaagumiizemu naagamba, Yutuko ogwo yaarembibwa oturo, yaahanantuka omuri kanyinaishatu, yaagwa ahansi, baamwihaho akabire." 
Acts20:10 Paulo yaashuuma, yaamwinamaho, yaamubumbatira, naagira ati: Mutacura, ahakuba akihuriire." 
Acts20:11 Paulo yaagaruka yaatemba, yaabega omugaati, yaarya, bwanyima yaagumizamu naagaaniira nabo omwanya muhango okuhitsya omu kasheeshe; atyo yaagyenda." 
Acts20:12 Omutsigazi ogwo baamwihayo ahuriire, baagarukwa emitima omunda." 
Acts20:13 Itwe twayebembera kuza aha meeri, twagizamu, twayambuka Asosi, ei twayenzire ngu twakiirire Paulo; ahakuba akaba aturagiire atyo, ngu we arabe ogw'ebigyere." 
Acts20:14 Ku yaatubugaine Asosi, twamutaasya omu meeri, twaija Mituleene." 
Acts20:15 Ku twarugireyo, omu kasheeshe twahika aharikureeba Kio; aha kiro kya kashatu twahika Samo; aha kiro kya kana twahika Mileeto." 
Acts20:16 Paulo akaba amaririire kuhingura Efeso ari omu meeri, ngu atakyerererwa Asia; ahabw'okuba akaba naayehuuta ngu, ku kiraabe nikibaasika, ekiro kya Pentekoote kimushangye Yerusaalemu." 
Acts20:17 Ku yaabaire ari Mileeto, yaatuma omuri Efeso kwetayo abakuru b'ekanisa." 
Acts20:18 Ku baamuhikireho, yaabagira ati: Imwe nimumanya oku naatwire naimwe ebiro byona okuruga aha izooba eri naahikiireho omuri Asia;" 
Acts20:19 nkaba nkorera Mukama n'obucureezi bwingi nindira, omu by'okugyezibwa ebyambaireho ahabw'enaama mbi z'Abayudaaya." 
Acts20:20 Nimumanya ku ntaratiinire kubagambira kigambo kyona eky'omugasho, nimbeegyeseza omu maisho ga boona, kandi n'omu maju gaanyu emwe-emwe," 
Acts20:21 nimpamiza Abayudaaya n'Abagriika okweteisiza Ruhanga, n'okwikiriza Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo."
