Acts20:22 Kandi mbwenu, reeba niinyinamuka Yerusaalemu, ngyemirwe Omwoyo, ntarikumanya birambeho naahikayo;" 
Acts20:23 kureka Omwoyo Orikwera nammanyisiza omuri buri tauni ku okubohwa n'okubonabonesibwa bintegyerereizeyo. 
Acts20:24 Tindikuteekateeka ha magara gangye nk'ekintu kikuru eky'obuguzi; eki ndikwenda ni kimwe, n'okuheza orugyendo rwangy en'obuheereza obu naahairwe Mukama waitu Yesu, bw'okuhamya engiri y'embabazi za Ruhanga." 
Acts20:25 Hati mbwenu nimmanya ngu imwe mwena abu naabaire ndabamu nimbuurira eby'obukama, timurindeeba bundi." 
Acts20:26 Nikyo ndikuhamiza omu maisho gaanyu mwena nti: Ndi mwere aha by'eshagama y'abantu boona; 
Acts20:27 ahakuba tindatiinire kubagambira naama yoona eya Ruhanga. 
Acts20:28 Imwe mwerinde, kandi murinde n'obusyo bwona obu Omwoyo Orikwera yaabakwatsize kuba abareeberezi baabwo, okuriisa ekanisa ya Ruhanga ei yaayeguriire n'eshagama ye." 
Acts20:29 Nimmanya ngu, ku ndiheza kubarugaho, emishega eshuugire eryabataahirira, terisaasira busyo;" 
Acts20:30 kandi n'omuriimwe haryarugamu abantu, abarikugamba eby'obuhabe, niboosya abeegi ngu babakurate." 
Acts20:31 N'ahabw'ekyo mugume nimureeba, kandi mwijukye ku ntararekire kuhana muntu weena n'amarira, okumara emyaka eshatu nyomushana na nyekiro." 
Acts20:32 Kandi na hati mbwenu, B'eishe-emwe, nimbatsigira Ruhanga n'ekigambo ky'embabazi ze, ekirikubaasa kubombeka n'okubaha obuhunguzi hamwe na boona abeeziibwe." 
Acts20:33 Tindeetengire feeza y'omuntu weena, n'obu eraabe ezaabu, n'obu kyakuba eky'okujwara." 
Acts20:34 Imwe mwena nimumanya ngu emikono yangye egi nimwo naabaire nyiha eby'okuntunga n'abu naabaire nyine. 
Acts20:35 Omuri byona mbabeereire eky'okureeberaho, ngu mubone kukora mutyo emirimo, kuhwera abataine maani, n'okwijuka ebigambo ebi Mukama waitu Yesu yaagambire naagira ati: Okugaba kuhaisa omugisha okukira okuheebwa." 
Acts20:36 Ku yaaherize kugamba atyo, yaatsimba amaju, yaashaba hamwe nabo boona." 
Acts20:37 Boona baarira munonga, baagwa Paulo omu bitsya, baamunywegyera," 
Acts20:38 nibashaasha, n'okukira byona ahabw'ekigambo eki yaabaragisa, ati: Amaisho n'aga. Baamushendekyereza okuhika aha meeri." 
Acts21:1 Ku twataine nabo, twaza omu meeri, twagyema ogurikuza Koosi; ku bwaseesire, twahika Roodo; twarugayo twahika Patara." 
Acts21:2 Ku twashangire emeeri neeyenda kuza Foiniike, twagizamu, twagyenda." 
Acts21:3 Ku twarangiza Kupuro, twagitsiga aha rubaju rwa bumosho, twaza Siria, twahika aha nkungu ya Tuuro, ahakuba niho baabaire nibaza kuteekururira ebintu omu meeri." 
Acts21:4 Ku twareebire abeegi, twamarayo ebiro mushanju. Abo baateisa Paulo nibagambisibwa Omwoyo, kutaza Yerusaalemu." 
Acts21:5 Ku twamazireyo ebyo biro, twarugayo, twahamya orugyendo rwaitu; boona hamwe n'abakazi baabo n'abaan baatushendekyereza, okuhitsya obu baatwogize omu rurembo; ku twahikire aha nyanja, twatsimba amaju, twashaba, twaragana." 
Acts21:6 Ku twataahire omu meeri, baagaruka owaabo." 
Acts21:7 Ku twaherize orugyendo rw'okuruga Tuuro, twahika Potolemai; twaramutsya ab'eishe-emwe, twaraarayo nabo." 
Acts21:8 Ku bwaseesire, twarugayo, twahika Kaisarea; twataaha omu nju ya Filipo omubuurizi w'engiri, owaabaire ari omwe ahari bari badiikoni mushanju, twaguma owe." 
Acts21:9 Kandi akaba aine abaishiki bana b'empangare, abaabaire baragura." 
Acts21:10 Ku twagumireyo ebiro bingi, haija omushaija nabi, orikwetwa Agabo, naaruga Buyudaaya." 
Acts21:11 Ku yaatuhikire, yaakwata orukoba rwa Paulo, yaarwekomesa ebigyere n'emikono, yaagira ati: Oku nikwo Omwoyo Orikwera arikugira ati: Abayudaaya ba Yerusaalemu nikwo barikoma mukama w'orukoba oru, bakamuhayo omu mikono y'Abanyamahanga." 
Acts21:12 Ku twahuriire ekyo, itwe n'abantu baayo twamweshengyereza ngu arekye kwinamuka Yerusaalemu." 
Acts21:13 Paulo yaagarukamu ati: Nimukora ki okurira n'okuncwa omutima? Mumanye ngu tiinyeteekateekire kuboherwa Yerusaalemu kwonka, kureka n'okufeerayo ahabw'eiziina rya Mukama waitu Yesu." 
Acts21:14 Ku yaayangire kutuhurira, twarereera, twagira tuti: Eki Mukama arikwenda kibe nikyo kyakorwa." 
Acts21:15 Bwanyima y'ebiro ebyo twakoma ebyaitu, twainamuka Yerusaalemu;" 
Acts21:16 n'abeegi bamwe aba Kaisarea baagyenda naitwe, baija n'omwegi owa ira orikwetwa Munasooni owa Kupuro, owaabaire naayenda kuturaaza." 
Acts21:17 Ku twahikire Yerusaalemu, ab'eishe-emwe baatwakiira n'okushemererwa." 
Acts21:18 Ku bwaseesire, Paulo yaagyenda naitwe owa Yakobo; kandi abakuru boona bakaba bari aho." 
Acts21:19 Ku yaaherize kubaramutsya, yaabateekyerereza byona buri kimwe, ebi Ruhanga yaakozire omu Banyamahanga omu kuheereza kwe." 
Acts21:20 Nabo ku baabihuriire, baahimbisa Ruhanga. Bwanyima baamugira bati: Ow'eishe-emwe, oreebire omu Bayudaaya ku harimu abantu enkumi n'enkumi abaikiriize; boona baine obweziriki ahabw'Ebiragiro;" 
Acts21:21 kandi boona bakagambirwa ebyawe ngu oyegyesa Abayudaaya boona abaatwire omu Banyamahanga kureka ebya Musa, kandi obagambira ngu barekye kushara abaana baabo, n'okukwata emigyenzo y'ediini yaabo." 
Acts21:22 Mbwenu tigure tuta? Ahakuba tibaribura kuhurira ku oizire. 
Acts21:23 N'ahabw'ekyo kora eki turikukugambira. Aha twineho abashaija bana abaayerahiriire endahiro; 
Acts21:24 obatware, oyeyeze hamwe nabo, obaihurire ebi bacwereirwe, babone kumwa eishokye aha mitwe yaabo. Mbwenu boona nibaija kumanya ngu ebi baagambiirwe ahariiwe n'ebishuba, ahakuba naiwe wenak oyerinda, kandi oyorobera Ebiragiro." 
Acts21:25 Kandi eby'Abanyamahanga abaikiriize, tukabahandiikira ebaruha, nitubaragiira kwerinda ebihongyirwe ebishushani ebirikuramibwa, n'eshagama, n'ebinigirwe, n'obushambani." 
Acts21:26 Atyo Paulo yaatwara abashaija abo; ku bwaseesire, yaayeyeza nabo, yaataaha nabo omuri hekalu, yaaranga ahu ebiro by'okwezibwa birihwera, ku nibwo ekitambo kya buri omwe kiriheebwayo." 
Acts21:27 Ebiro ebyo mushanju ku byabaire biri haihi kuhwa, Abayudaaya abaarugire Asia, ku baamureebire omuri hekalu, baajagaraza omutwe gwona ogw'abantu, baamuyookyera, baamukwata," 
Acts21:28 baayomba nibagira bati: Imwe bashaija Baisraeli 'mwe, nimutuhwere! Omushaija ogu niwe ayegyesa abantu boona hoonahoona kugaya eihanga ryaitu, n'Ebiragiro, n'omwanya ogu; kandi areetsire Abagriika omuri hekalu, yaashiisha omwanya ogu ogurikwera." 
Acts21:29 Ahakuba bakaba bahereerukire kumureeba omu rurembo na Trofimo owa Efeso, baateekateeka ngu Paulo amureetsire omuri hekalu." 
Acts21:30 Orurembo rwona rwatengatenga, abantu baayooka, baakwata Paulo, baamukurura omuri hekalu; ahonaaho enyigi zaakingwa." 
Acts21:31 Ku baabaire nibenda kumwita, enkuru yaahika aha mukuru w'engabo, ngu Yerusaalemu yoona neerabanamu." 
Acts21:32 Ahonaaho yaahurura n'abaserukare n'abakuru baabo, yaabashuumira nairuka; bo, ku baamureebire n'abaserukare, baarekyeraho kuteera Paulo." 
Acts21:33 Omukuru w'engabo yairira haihi, yaakwata Paulo, yaaragiira kumukomesa enjegyere ibiri; bwanyima yaamubuuza eiziina rye, n'eki akozire." 
Acts21:34 Abamwe aha b'omu mutwe baayomba okwabo, n'abandi okwabo; ku yaareebire ataabaasa kushoborokyerwa amazima ahabw'okuyomba, yaaragiira kumutwara omu kigo ky'abaserukare." 
Acts21:35 Ku yaahikire aha matembero, abaserukare baamukiriza ahabw'ekiniga ky'abantu;" 
Acts21:36 ahabw'okuba omutwe gw'abantu gukamukuratira niguyomba munonga nigugira guti: Mumwiheho! 
Acts21:37 Paulo, ku yaabaire ari haihi kutaaha omu kigo, yaashaba omukuru w'engabo ati: Nkaagira eki naagamba? Yaamubuuza ati: Noomanya Orugriika?" 
Acts21:38 Tori Omunyamisri ori owaagomeise abantu omu biro bihingwire, akatwara omu ihamba abashaija enkumi ina abaitsi b'abantu?" 
Acts21:39 Paulo yaamugarukamu ati: Ndi Omuyudaaya owa Taruso ey'omuri Kilikia, ow'omu rurembo orutarikugaywa; ninkweshengyereza, onyikirize ngambire aba bantu." 
Acts21:40 Ku yaamwikiriize, Paulo yaayemerera aha matembero, yaacureeza abantu n'omukono; ku haabaireho okucureera kwingi yaabagambira omu Ruheburaayo ati:" 
Acts22:1 Beene waitu kandi Baataata, muhurire ebigambo ebi ndikwetonganira omu maisho gaanyu." 
Acts22:2 Ku baahuriire yaabagambira omu Ruheburaayo, baayeyongyera kucureera. Yaagira ati:" 
Acts22:3 Nyowe ndi Omuyudaaya; nkazaarirwa Taruso ey'omuri Kilikia, kwonka naakurira omu rurembo oru, nintendekwa Gamalieli, niinyegyesibwa munonga kukuratira emigyenzo y'ebiragiro bya baatatenkuriitwe, nyine obweziriki ahari Ruhanga, nkaimwe oku mubwine hati;" 
Acts22:4 kandi nkaba mpiiga ab'Omuhanda ogu ngu baitwe, nimboha abashaija n'abakazi, nimbataisa omu kihome." 
Acts22:5 N'omunyamurwa omukuru niwe kareebi wangye, hamwe n'abakuru b'eishengyero boona; nibo bampaire ebaruha ezi baahandikiire beene waitu aba Damasiko, ntwairweyo okukwata abaayo n'okubareeta Yerusaalemu babohirwe, ngu baheebwe ekiheneso." 
Acts22:6 Ku naabaire ningyenda, naahika haihi na Damasiko, nk'omu ihangwe ahonaaho naayakirwa omushana mwingi niguruga omu iguru gwanyehinguririza." 
Acts22:7 Naagwa ahansi, naahurira eiraka niringira riti: Saulo, Saulo, ompiigira ki?" 
Acts22:8 Naagarukamu nti: Ori oha, Mukama wangye? Yangira ati: Niinye Yesu owa Nazareesi, ou orikuhiiga." 
Acts22:9 Abu naabaire ngyenzire nabo baareeba omushana ogwo, kwonka tibaahurira iraka ry'ogwo owaabaire naagamba naanye." 
Acts22:10 Naabuuza nti: Ngire nta, Mukama wangye? Mukama yangarukamu ati: Imuka oze Damasiko; niyo oraagambirirwe byona ebi oragiirwe kukora." 
Acts22:11 Okumurinkana kw'omushana ogwo kwampumya; n'ahabw'ekyo naakwatirirwa abo abu naabaire nyine, naahika Damasiko." 
Acts22:12 Omushaija orikwetwa Anania, omunyadiini omu Biragiro, orikusiimwa Abayudaaya boona abaabaire batwire okwo," 
Acts22:13 yaija, yaanyemerera aha rubaju, yangambira ati: ow'eishe-emwe Saulo, humuuka. Omu kaanya ako naahumuuka, naamureeba." 
Acts22:14 Yaagira ati: Ruhanga wa baatatenkuriitwe akutooraine ngu omanye ebi akunda, oreebe Ogwo Ohikiriire, kandi ohurire eiraka eririkuruga omu kanwa ke." 
Acts22:15 Ahakuba oryaba kareebi we ow'okuhamiza abantu boona ebi oreebire n'ebi ohuriire. 
Acts22:16 Mbwenu otegyereize ki? Imuka, obatizibwe, oyogye ebibi byawe, otakire eiziina rye." 
Acts22:17 Naagaruka Yerusaalemu; ku naabaire ndi omuri hekalu ninshaba, naashusha nk'orikuroota," 
Acts22:18 naamureeba yangira ati: Otakyerererwa; rahuka orugye Yerusaalemu, ahabw'okuba tibarikwija kwikiriza okuhamya oku orikumpamya." 
Acts22:19 Naanye naagira nti: Mukama wangye, bo bonka nibamanya ngu nkaba nkwata abarikukwikiriza, mbata omu bihome, kandi mbateerera omuri sinagogi zoona;" 
Acts22:20 kandi obu baajwisa eshagama ya Stefano kareebi waawe, nkaba nyemereireho nimbisiima, ndinzire n'ebijwaro byabo abaamwitsire." 
Acts22:21 Yangambira ati: Irooko, ahakuba niinyija kukutuma hare omu Banyamahanga." 
Acts22:22 Baaguma bamuhurikiize okuhitsya obu yaagambire ekigambo ekyo; okuruga aho baayomba munonga nibagira bati: Mwihe omu nsi ekishaija ekyo; tikishemereire kugumaho. 
Acts22:23 Ku baabaire nibayomba munonga, nibatambika emyenda yaabo, kandi nibanaga n'omucuucu ahaiguru," 
Acts22:24 omukuru w'engabo yaaragiira kumutaasya omu kigo, n'okumwasha nibamutatsya, ngu abone kwetegyereza eki baamuteererera enduuru." 
Acts22:25 Ku baaherize kumubohesa enkoba, Paulo yaabuuza omukuru w'abaserukare owaabaire ayemereire haihi, ati: Ebiragiro nibibaikiriza kwasha omuntu Omurooma, atakacwereirwe rubanja?" 
Acts22:26 Omukuru ogwo, ku yaakihuriire, yaaza aha mukuru w'engabo, yaamugira ati: Nooyenda kukora ki? Ahakuba omushaija ogu n'Omurooma." 
Acts22:27 Omukuru w'engabo yaija, yaamubuuza ati: Ngambira; ori Omurooma? Paulo ati: Eego." 
Acts22:28 Omukuru w'engabo yaagira ati: Nyowe nkatunga Oburooma obu n'empiiha nyingi. Paulo ati: Kwonka nyowe nibwo naazairwemu. 
Acts22:29 Ahonaaho abo abaabaire nibenda kumutatsya baamurugaho; kandi omukuru w'engabo nawe yaatiina, ahabw'okumanya ku Paulo ari Omurooma, kandi yaamubohire." 
Acts22:30 Ku bwaseesire, yaayenda kumanya amazima g'ekigambo eki Abayudaaya bamutabaaririize, yaamubohoorora, yaaragiira abanyamurwa abakuru n'ab'eishengyero boona kuteeranira hamwe, yaashuumya Paulo, yaamuta omu maisho gaabo." 
Acts23:1 Paulo yaahamya amaisho ab'eishengyero, yaagira ati: Beene waitu, ntuura nyine omutima ogutarikunshinja kibi omu maisho ga Ruhanga n'okuhitsya eri izooba." 
Acts23:2 Omunyamurw aomukuru orikwetwa Anania yaaragiira abamwemereire ahihi kumuteera omunwa. 
Acts23:3 Paulo yaamugira ati: Ruhanga aryakuteera naiwe, iwe kisiika ekisiigirwe einoni 'we! Waashutama kuncwera orubanja nk'Ebiragiro oku biri; kandi waaragiira kunteera omu buryo oburikubihenda?" 
Acts23:4 Abeemereire haihi baagira bati: Okaajumire omunyamurwa wa Ruhanga omukuru? 
Acts23:5 Paulo yaagira ati: Beene waitu, naaba ntamanyire ku ari omunyamurwa omukuru; ahakuba kikahandiikwa ngu: Otarijuma omutegyeki w'eihanga ryanyu." 
Acts23:6 Paulo ku yaayetegyereize ngu ekicweka ekimwe n'eky'Abasadukaayo, ekindi n'eky'Abafarisaayo, yaagamba n'eiraka rihango omu ishengyero ati: Beene waitu, ndi Omufarisaayo, kandi omwana w'Abafarisaayo; nincwerwa orubanja ababw'okuturwa amatsiko agu nyine aha kuzooka kw'abafu." 
Acts23:7 Ku yaaherize kugamba atyo, haabaho okutongana kw'Abafarisaayo n'Abasadukaayo; eishengyero ryayebaganisamu habiri." 
Acts23:8 Ahakuba Abasadukaayo bagira ngu tihariho kuzooka, n'obu yaakuba maraika, n'obu gwakuba omuzimu; kwonka Abafarisaayo bo babiikiriza byona." 
Acts23:9 Haabaho okuyoogoorekana kwingi; abamwe ab'omu kigombe ky'abahandiiki b'Abafarisaayo baayemerera, baahakana nibagira bati: Tihariho kibi eki twareeba aha mushaija ogu. Shana omwoyo nari maraika akaaba amugambiire?" 
Acts23:10 Empaka zaabo ku zaabire ez'amaani maingi munonga, omukuru w'engabo yaatiina ngu baaza kutaanyagura Paulo, nikwo kuragiira abaserukare kushuuma kumubaihamu n'amaani, n'okumureeta omu kigo." 
Acts23:11 Eryo izooba nyekiro Mukama yaamwemerera aha rubaju, yaamugira ati: Guma omutima ahakuba, nk'oku wampamize ori Yerusaalemu, nikwo oshemereire kumpamya n'omuri Rooma." 
Acts23:12 Ku bwaseesire, Abayudaaya baateeranira hamwe, baahiga nibarahira okutarya n'obu kwakuba okunywa okuhitsya obu baraite Paulo." 
Acts23:13 Abaacumire egyo naama bakaba nibakira makumi ana. 
Acts23:14 Baaza aha banyamurwa abakuru n'abakuru b'abantu, baabagira bati: Turahiire endahiro mpango munonga kutaroza ha by'okurya, okuhitsya obu turaite Paulo." 
Acts23:15 N'habw'ekyo imwe n'ab'eishengyero mugambire omukuru w'engabo hati, amubashuumize, nk'abarikwenda kwongyera kwetegyerereza kimwe eby'orubanja rwe; itwe tweteekateekire kumwita, atakabahikire." 
Acts23:16 Kwonka mwihwa wa Paulo yaahurira enaama yaabo ey'okumugwera, yaagyenda yaataaha omu kigo, yaakigambira Paulo." 
Acts23:17 Paulo nikwo kweta omwe aha bakuru b'abaserukare, akagira ati: Twara omutsigazi ogu, omuhitsye omukuru w'engabo; ahakuba aine eki arikwenda kumugambira." 
Acts23:18 Yaamutwara, yaamuhitsya omukuru w'engabo, yaagira ati: Paulo embohe yaanyeta, yanshaba kukureetera omutsigazi ogu, ngu aine eki arikwenda kukugambira." 
Acts23:19 Omukuru w'engabo yaamukwata omukono, yaamukiika aha rubaju, yaamubuuza omu mubonano ati: Nooyenda kungambira ki?" 
Acts23:20 Onu yaagira ati: Abayudaaya bacumire enaama emwe kukushaba, ngu nyencakare oshuumye Paulo omu ishengyero, nk'abarikwenda kwongyera kubuuza ebye." 
Acts23:21 Kwonka otabaikiriza; ahabw'okuba abashaija baabo abarikukira ahari makumi ana bamugwereire, kandi barahiire endahiro okutarya n'obu kwakuba okunywa batakamwitsire; mbwenu beeteekateekire, bategyereize ekigambo kyawe." 
Acts23:22 Omukuru w'engabo yaaraga omutsigazi, naamwehanangiriza ati: Otagira ou waamanyisa ku waabingambira." 
Acts23:23 Atyo yaayeta abakuru b'abaserukare babiri, yaabaragiira ati: Muteekateekye abaserukare magana abiri n'ab'embaraasi makumi mushanju n'ab'amacumu magana abiri, baimukye eshaaha ishatu za nyekiro baze Kaisarea;" 
Acts23:24 kandi yaabaragiira kusherura enyamaishwa ezirikuheeka kuheeka Paulo, babone kumuhitsya gye Felikisi omutegyeki." 
Acts23:25 Yaahandiika n'ebaruha erikugira eti: 
Acts23:26 Ow'ekitiinisa Felikisi Omutegyeki, nyowe Kulaudio Lusia ninkuramutsya munonga." 
Acts23:27 Omushaija ogu akakwatwa Abayudaaya, baayenda kumwita; ku naamanyire ku ari Omurooma, naabaizira n'abaserukare, naamujuna." 
Acts23:28 Kandi ku naayenzire kwetegyereza ebi barikumutabaariza, naamureeta omu ishengyero ryabo." 
Acts23:29 Naahsanga atabaariziibwe ahabw'ebigambo by'omu biragiro byabo, kwonka rutari rubanja orw'okumwitsa n'obu kwakuba okumubohesa." 
Acts23:30 Ku naagambiirwe ku hariho enaama y'okumwita, ahonaaho naamukwoherereza, naaragiira n'abaamutabaariize okugambira omu maisho gaawe eki barikufa nawe." 
Acts23:31 Batyo abaserukare batwara Paulo, nk'oku baaragiirwe, baamuhitsya Antipatiri nyekiro." 
Acts23:32 Ju bwaseesire, abaserukare baamutsigira ab'embaraasi kugumizamu nawe, bo baagaruka omu kigo." 
Acts23:33 Kandi abo, ku baahikire Kaisarea, baahereza Omutegyeki ebaruha, baamumurikira na Paulo," 
Acts23:34 Ku yaaherize kugishoma, yaabuuza eishaza eri yaarugiremu; ku yaamanyire ngu n'owa Kilikia," 
Acts23:35 yaagira ati: Abaakutabaariize ku baraije, niinyija kuhurira orubanja rwawe. Yaaragiira kumurindira omu kikaari kya Heroode." 
Acts24:1 Ku haahingwireho ebiro bitaano, omunyamurwa omukuru Anania yaashuma n'abakuru b'abantu bamwe n'omushija orikwetwa Terituulo ow'okubatonganira. Batyo baatabaariza Paulo aha Mutegyeki." 
Acts24:2 Ku baamwetsire, Terituulo yaatandika kumutabaariza, naagira ati: Ow'ekitiinisa Felikisi, noomanya ngu obusingye obu bwona, obu turikwesiimiramu, niiwe burikurugaho, kandi n'ebindi ebi orikwezirika kukora kushemeza eihanga eri." 
Acts24:3 Ebyo nitubiikiriza omu buryo bwona n'omu myanya yoona, kandi nitubikusiimira munonga." 
Acts24:4 Kwonka, ka ndekye kwongyera kukurusya, ninkushaba ahabw'embabazi zaawe kutuhurira omu bigambo bikye." 
Acts24:5 Tukareeba omushaija ogu ku ari mubi munonga, naagomesa Abayudaaya baingi abari omu nsi zoona, kandi niwe mukuru omu kigombe ky'Abanazaraayo." 
Acts24:6 Ekindi akateeraho kushiisha hekalu, twamukwata, twayenda ngu tumucwere orubanja nk'ebiragiro byaitu oku biri;" 
Acts24:7 kwonka omukuru w'engabo Lusia yaija, yaamutwakisa amaani maingi," 
Acts24:8 yaaragiira abaamutabaariize kwija ah'ori. Na mbwenu ku oraamubuuze, noija kumanya ebi byona ebi turikumutabaaririza." 
Acts24:9 Abayudaaya nabo baakwatanisa nawe omuribyo, baahamya ku byona nikwo biri." 
Acts24:10 Omutegyeki ku yaamwikiriize kugamba, Paulo yaagarukamu ati: Nimmanya ngu omazire emyaka mingi ori omuramuzi w'eihanga eri; n'ahabw'ekyo naaza kwetonganira nshemereirwe." 
Acts24:11 Ku oraabuuze, noija kumanya ku mmazire ebiro ikumi na bibiri nyinamukire Yerusaalemu kuramya." 
Acts24:12 Tibaranshangire nimpakana n'omuntu weena, nari shi ninjagaraza abantu omuri hekalu nari omuri sinagogi nari omu rurembo." 
Acts24:13 Kandi tibakaabaasa kukuhamiza ebi barikuntabaaririza hati. 
Acts24:14 Kwonka eki ndikwemera omu maisho gaawe n'eki: Omuhanda ogwo, ogu aba barikweta ekigombe, nigwo ngyederamu nimpeereza Ruhanga wa baatatenkuriitwe, niinyikiriza ebyahandiikirwe omu Biragiro n'omu bya Baanabi byona;" 
Acts24:15 kandi nyine amatsiko ahari Ruhanga, nk'oku nabo barikwikiriza, ngu haryabaho okuzooka kw'abahikiriire n'abatahikiriire." 
Acts24:16 Omuri ebyo nyezirika obutoosha kuguma n'omutima ogutariho rubanja ahari Ruhanga n'aha bantu. 
Acts24:17 Bwanyima y'emyaka mingi, nkaija ndeetsire empiiha z'okuhwera eihanga ryaitu n'eby'okuhonga." 
Acts24:18 Nkiri omuri ebyo, banshanga omuri hekalu nyeziibwe, ntaine mutwe gw'abantu abu nteeraine, n'obu rwakuba orwari. Kwonka hakaba hariho Abayudaaya bamwe abaarugire omuri Asia;" 
Acts24:19 nangwa kuri nibo baizire omu maisho gaawe kuntabaariza, ku baraabe baine ekigambo ahariinye." 
Acts24:20 Nari shi reka abantu aba bagambe ekibi eki bandeebireho, obu naayemerera omu maisho g'eishengyero," 
Acts24:21 okwihaho ekigambo kimwe eki naagambire butunu nyemereire ahagati yaabo nti: Okuzooka kw'abafu nikwo kuunyemereize omu rubanja omu maisho gaanyu eri izooba. 
Acts24:22 Kwonka Felikisi, ahabw'okushoborokyerwa gye eby'Omuhanda ogwo, yaabooshesa, naagira ati: Lusia omukuru w'engabo ku ariija, nibwo ndicwa orubanja rwanyu." 
Acts24:23 Yaaragiira omukuru w'abaserukare kumurinda n'okumuha obusingye, n'okutazibira banywani be kumuhwera." 
Acts24:24 Ku haahingwireho ebiro, Felikisi yaija n'omukazi we Durusila Omuyudaayakazi; yaayeta Paulo, yaahurira ebi arikugamba aha by'okwikiriza Kristo Yesu." 
Acts24:25 Ku yaabaire naagamba aha by'okuhikiirira n'eby'okwerinda n'eby'orubanja oruriija, Felikisi yaatiina munonga, yaagira ati: Hati rekera aho! Ku ndibona omwanya, ndyakweta." 
Acts24:26 Kandi akaba aine amatsiko ngu Paulo aryamuha enguzi. Nikyo yaabaire amwetera kaingi kugaaniira nawe. 
Acts24:27 Kwonka ku haahingwireho emyaka ebiri, Felikisi yaahungurirwa Porokio Festo; kandi Felikisi, ahabw'okwenda kusiimwa Abayudaaya, yaatsiga Paulo omu kihome." 
Acts25:1 Festo ku yaahikire omu butegyeki bwe, bwanyima y'ebiro bishatu yaaruga Kaisarea, yainamuka Yerusaalemu." 
Acts25:2 Abanyamurwa abakuru n'abakuru b'Abayudaaya baamuregyera Paulo; 
Acts25:3 baamweshengyereza nibamushaba ngu abakorere gye, amwete aije Yerusaalemu, babone kumugwera kumwitira omu muhanda." 
Acts25:4 Kwonka Festo yaagarukamu ati: Paulo arindiirwe Kaisarea, kandi niinyenda kugarukayo juba." 
Acts25:5 Yaagaruka yaagira ati: N'ahabw'ekyo abakuru omuriimwe bashuume tugyendane; omushaija ogwo ku araabe aine ekibi eki yaakozire, bamutabaarize." 
Acts25:6 Ku yaamazire owaabo ebiro ebitarikukira ahari munaana nari ikumi, yaashuuma Kaisarea; ku bwaseesire, yaashutama aha kitebe ky'eiramuriro, yaaragiira kureeta Paulo." 
Acts25:7 Ku yaizire, Abayudaaya abarugire Yerusaalemu baayemerera bamwehinguririize, nibamutabaariza emanja nyingi ez'eihano, ezi batarabaasize kuhamya mu mazima." 
Acts25:8 Paulo yaayetonganira ati: Tihariho kibi eki naakozire okushobya ebiragiro by'Abayudaaya, nari okushiisha hekalu, nari okugomera Kaisaari." 
Acts25:9 Kwonka Festo, ku yaayenzire kusiimwa Abayudaaya, yaamubuuza ati: Nooyenda kwinamuka Yerusaalemu, ngu obe niyo waacwererwa emanja ezi omu maisho gangye?" 
Acts25:10 Paulo yaagarukamu ati: Nyemereire omu maisho g'ekitebe ky'eiramuriro ekya Kaisaari; niho nshemereire kucwererwa orubanja. Aha Bayudaaya tihariho kibi eki naakozire, kandi naiwe nookimanya gye." 
Acts25:11 Ku ndaabe nkozire kubi, nari shi nkozire ekishemereire kuunyitsa, tindikwanga kufa; kwonka omuri ebyo ebi barikuntabaariza, ku haraabe hatarimu na kimwe ekihikire, tihariho muntu orikubaasa kubampa. Ninjurira ahari Kaisaari." 
Acts25:12 Festo, ku yaaherize kuhanuura n'ab'eishengyeo rye, yaagira ati: Waajurira ahari Kaisaari; owa Kaisaari obe niyo waaza." 
Acts25:13 Bwanyima ku haahingwireho ebiro, Aguripa omugabe na Bereniike baahika Kaisarea, baaramutsya Festo." 
Acts25:14 Ku baamazireyo ebiro bingi, Festo yaateekyerereza omugabe orubanja rwa Paulo, naagira ati: Hariho omushaija ou Felikisi yaatsigire omu kihome." 
Acts25:15 Ku naabaire ndi Yerusaalemu, abanyamurwa abakuru n'abakuru b'Abayudaaya banteekyerereza ebye, nibanshaba kumucwera orubanja." 
Acts25:16 Naabagarukamu nti: Timucwe gw'Abarooma kuhayo omuntu oregirwe, atakeemereire n'abarikumurega, akaheebwa omwanya gw'okwetonganira ebi bamuregire." 
Acts25:17 N'ahabw'ekyo ku baateeraniire aha, tinaabiraariza; ku bwaseesire, naashutama aha kitebe ky'eiramuriro, naaragiira kureeta ogwo mushaija." 
Acts25:18 Baakitabaaza ku baayemereire, tibaareeta rubanja rw'ebigambo bibi, nk'oku naabaire ninteekateeka;" 
Acts25:19 kureka baamutabaaririza empaka zimwe z'ediini yaabo, n'eby'omuntu orikwetwa Yesu owaafiire, ou Paulo arikuhamya ngu ariho ahuriire." 
Acts25:20 Ku naashobeirwe, naabura kwetegyereza empaka ezo, naamubuuza ku araabe naayenda kwinamuka Yerusaalemu, n'okucwererwayo orubanja rw'ezo mpaka." 
Acts25:21 Kwonka Paulo ku yaashabire kwemereza orubanja okuhitsya obu ruricuubwa Augusto, naaragiira ngu bamurinde, okuhitsya obu ndimwoherereza Kaisaari." 
Acts25:22 Aguripa yaagambira Festo ati: Naanye nkaayenzire kuhurira omuntu ogwo. Festo yaagira ati: Omu kasheeshe noija kumuhurira. 
Acts25:23 Ku bwaseesire, Aguripa na Bereniike baija n'ekitiinisa kingi, baataaha omu iramuriro n'abakuru b'engabo n'abakungu b'orurembo. Festo yaaragiira ku bareeta Paulo." 
Acts25:24 Festo yaagira ati: Nyakusinga Aguripa naimwe mwena abari aha, omutwe gwona gw'Abayudaaya gwanshabiire Yerusaalemu n'aha, nibayomba munonga ngu tashemereire kugumaho." 
Acts25:25 Kwonka nkareeba atakozire kibi ekishemereire kumwitsa; kandi nawe ku yaajuriire ahari Augusto, naamariirira kumumutwekyera." 
Acts25:26 Mbwenu mbuzire ekigambo kihikire ahariwe eky'okuhandiikira mukama wangye. Nikyo naamureetera omu maisho gaanyu, n'okukira munonga omu maisho gaawe, Nyakusinga Aguripa, ngu ku turaaheze kumutonganisa, mbone eky'okuhandiika." 
Acts25:27 Ahakuba ninteekateeka ngu n'eky'obushema kwohereza embohe, haza ntoorekye rubanja rwe." 
Acts26:1 Aguripa yaagambira Paulo ati: Noikirizibwa kwetonganira. Paulo yaimutsya omukono, yaayetonganira naagira ati:" 
Acts26:2 Nyakusinga Aguripa, naahiirwa ahakuba ebi naatabaariziibwe Abayudaaya byona niiwe naaza kubitonganaho;" 
Acts26:3 kandi okukira munonga ahabw'okuba noomanyira kimwe emicwe yoona n'empaka zoona eby'Abayudaaya; n'ahabw'ekyo ninkweshengyereza ogumisirize ompurire. 
Acts26:4 Okwiha omu buto bwangye emicwe yangye, ei naakuriiremu omu ihanga ryaitu na Yerusaalemu, Abayudaaya boona nibagimanya." 
Acts26:5 Okuruga ira nibammanya, ku baakuba nibaikiriza kugamba, bakaahamya ku naabaire ndi Omufarisaayo ow'omu kicweka ekirikukira ebindi okuhitsya emigyenzo y'ediini yaitu." 
Acts26:6 Mbwenu nyemereire aha kucwerwa orubanja ahabw'amatsiko ag'eki Ruhanga yaaraganiise baatatenkuriitwe; 
Acts26:7 kandi n'enganda zaitu ikumi na ibiri, ezirikwezirika kuheereza Ruhanga nyomushana na nyekiro, nazo nikyo zitegyereize kuhikaho. Kandi naanye, ahabw'amatsiko ago, nikyo ntabaaririziibwe Abayudaaya, Nyakusinga Aguripa!" 
Acts26:8 N'enki ekirikubateekateekyesa ekigambo eki ku kitarikubaasika Ruhanga kuzoora abafiire? 
Acts26:9 Naanye nkaba ninteekateeka buzima ku nshemereire kukora bingi kurwanisa eiziina rya Yesu owa Nazareesi. 
Acts26:10 N'okukora nkabikora Yerusaalemu; naata abarikwera baingi omu bihome, mpairwe obushoboorozi abanyamurwa abakuru; t'ekyo kyonka, kandi n'abaabaire baitwa, nkaba nsiima ngu baitwe." 
Acts26:11 Kaingi omuri sinagogi zoona nkaba mbaha ebiheneso, mbagyemesereza kurogota; kandi ku naabaire mbagirira ekiniga kunshaza, mbahiiga nangwa n'okuhika mpika omu ndembo z'Abanyamahanga." 
Acts26:12 Mbwenu ku naabaire ninza Damasiko nyine obushoboorozi n'obutumwa bw'abanyamurwa abakuru," 
Acts26:13 Nyakusinga Omugabe, nkiri omu muhanda omu ihangwe, naareeba omushana niguruga omu iguru, nigumurinkana okukira eizooba, gwanjwera guunyehinguririize n'abo abu twagyendaine." 
Acts26:14 Ku twagwire ahansi twena, naahurira eiraka niringambira omu Ruheburaayo riti: Saulo, Saulo, ompiigira ki? Nooyerusya kuteera emigyere aha mihunda." 
Acts26:15 Naamubuuza nti: Ori oha, Mukama wangye? Mukama waitu yaagira ati: Ndi Yesu ou orikuhiiga." 
Acts26:16 Kwonka imuka, oyemerere; ahakuba nikyo naakubonekyerera, ngu nkutoorane nkugire omuheereza na kareebi w'okuhamya ebi ebi wandeeberamu, n'ebindi ebi ndikweyorekyeramu;" 
Acts26:17 kandi ngu nkujune omu ihanga eri n'omu Banyamahanga abu ndikutumamu," 
Acts26:18 okuhumuura amaisho gaabo, ngu bahindukye barugye omu mwirima, baze omu mushana, barugye omu bushoboorozi bwa Sitaane, bahindukire Ruhanga; babone kwihwaho ebibi, n'okuheebwa obuhunguzi hamwe n'abarikwezibwa ahabw'okuunyikiriza." 
Acts26:19 N'ahabw'ekyo, Nyakusinga Aguripa, tindagomeire kworekwa okwo okw'omu iguru;" 
Acts26:20 naatandikira aho kugambira aba Damasiko, bwanyima aba Yerusaalemu n'ab'omu ishaza ryona erya Buyudaaya, kandi n'Abanyamahanga, ngu beeteise, bahindukire Ruhanga, bakore ebishemereire okweteisa kwabo." 
Acts26:21 Nikyo Abayudaaya bankwatiire ndi omuri hekalu, bakenda kuunyita." 
Acts26:22 Kwonka ahabw'okuhwera kwa Ruhanga nkyemereire n'okuhitsya eri izooba, nimpamiza abato n'abakuru, ntaine kindi eki ndikugamba kureka ebi baanabi na Musa baaragwire ku biribaho;" 
Acts26:23 bati: Kristo ashemereire kubonabonesibwa; kandi ahabw'okuba ow'okubanza kuzooka omu bafu, amanyise eihanga eri n'Abanyamahanga eby'omushana." 
Acts26:24 Ku yaabaire naakyetonganira, Festo yaagamba n'eiraka rihango ati: Paulo oshazire; obwengye bwawe bwingi bwaza kukugwisa eiraro." 
Acts26:25 Kwonka Paulo yaagira ati: Ow'ekitiinisa Festo, tinshazire, kureka ningamba ebigambo by'amazima, ntarikurengyesereza." 
Acts26:26 Ahakuba n'omugabe naamanya ebigambo ebi; kandi nimbimugambira ntaine ki ndikwekyenga; nimmanyira kimwe ngu tihariho kigambo na kimwe omuri ebi eki atarikumanya; ahakuba tibirakozirwe bwesherekye. 
Acts26:27 Nyakusinga Omugabe Aguripa, noikiriza baanabi? Nimmanya ku orikwikiriza." 
Acts26:28 Aguripa yaamugarukamu ati: Iwe oyenzire kukirahutsya kumpindura, ngu mbe omukristaayo." 
Acts26:29 Paulo yaagira ati: Ninshaba Ruhanga, yaaba mu kaanya kakye, nari shi kahango, tiiwe wenka, kureka na boona abampurira eri izooba bahindukye nkaanye, okwihaho eby'ezi njegyere." 
Acts26:30 Omugabe yaimuka n'Omutegyeki na Bereniike n'abo abaabaire bashutami nabo; 
Acts26:31 ku baashohoire, baagambirana bati: Omuntu ogu takozire kibi ekishemereire kumwitsa nari okumubohesa." 
Acts26:32 Aguripa yaagira Festo ati: Omushaija ogu akaareekwirwe, kuri atarajuriire hari Kaisaari." 
Acts27:1 Ku baaherize kuturagiira kwambuka omu meeri kuza Italia, baahayo Paulo n'ezindi mbohe, baabakwatsa omukuru w'omutwe gw'abaserukare ogurikwetwa Omutwe gwa Augusto, eiziina rye Yulio." 
Acts27:2 Twaza omu meeri ya Aduramutio, eyaabaire neeyenda kuraba aha nyambukiro za Asia, twagyenda omu nyanja, tushendekyereziibwe Aristariiko, Omunyamakedonia owa Tesalonika." 
Acts27:3 Aha kiro kya kabiri twahika Sidoni; okwo Yulio yaagirirayo gye Paulo, yaamwikiriza kutaayaayira banywani be n'okuruhuukaho." 
Acts27:4 Twarugayo, twaraba ahansi y'ekirwa kya Kupuro kwekingayo omuyaga, ahakuba gukaba gututurukire omumaisho." 
Acts27:5 Ku twayambukire enyanja eri haihi na Kilikia na Pamufulia, twahika Mura, tauni ya Likia." 
Acts27:6 Okwo omukuru w'abaserukare niyo yaashangire emeeri ya Alegizanderia, neeza Italia, akagitutamu." 
Acts27:7 Twamara ebiro bingi nitugyenda mpora, twahika haihi na Kunido twaruhire; omuyaga ku gwatuzibiire kugumizamu, nikwo kugaruka ahansi y'ekirwa kya Kureete omu maisho ga Salumooni kugwekingaho." 
Acts27:8 Twakyekiikuura twaruhire, twahika aharikwetwa Nyambukiro-nungi haihi n'orurembo Lasea." 
Acts27:9 Tutyo twakyerererwa omu rugyendo ebiro bingi, kandi n'akabi k'okuraba omu nyanja kaaba kaingi, ahakuba obwo ebiro by'Okwesiibyakwo bikaba byahingwire. Paulo yaabahabura naagira ati:" 
Acts27:10 Baataata, nindeeba ngu orugyendo oru nirwija kubamu okusiisikarirwa n'okufeerwa kwingi, ti kwa bintu n'emeeri byonka, kureka kandi n'amagara gaitu." 
Acts27:11 Kwonka omukuru w'abaserukare yaayeta aha bigambo by'omuvugi n'omukuru w'emeeri okukira ebya Paulo. 
Acts27:12 Ahabw'enyambukiro kutaba nungi kumariramu ebiro by'embeho, abaingi babahabura ngu ekirungi n'okurugayo bakagumizamu aha nyanja, ngu shana bakaahika Foinike enyamubukiro y'omuri Kureete erikureeba ahagati y'obukiizi-bwa-bumosho n'oburugwa-izooba, n'ahagati y'obukiizi-bwa-buryo n'oburugwa-izooba, bamarirayo ebiro by'embeho." 
Acts27:13 Omuyaga ku gwahuuhire mpora nigwiha omu bukiizi-bwa-buryo, baateekateeka ngu baabona eki baaba nibenda; baakuura ekitsibo, baagyena bakiikuuka Kureete haihi n'enkungu." 
Acts27:14 Kwonka ku haahingwireho omwanya mukye, haija eihunga ry'amaani eririkwetwa Yurakuulo niriruga aha kirwa." 
Acts27:15 Emeeri yaayemerera, yaaremawa kugyema omu muyaga, nikwo kugireka, gukatutwara gwonka." 
Acts27:16 Twaraba ahansi y'akarwa akarikwetwa Kulauda, twayekingaho omuyaga, twabona kukomera akaato ak'enyima omu meeri, kwonka kyaturusya munonga." 
Acts27:17 Ku baaherize kukahitsya omu meeri, baihayo emirunga, baagirabya ahansi y'emeeri, baagikoma, baagigumya. Bwanyima ku baatiinire kunagwa aha musheenyi ogurikwetwa Siruti, baahanura amatanga, baatwarwa batyo omuyaga." 
Acts27:18 Ku twacurangiibwe eihunga munonga, aha kiro kya kabiri baatandika kunaga ebintu omu nyanja." 
Acts27:19 Aha kiro kya kashatu baanaga ebirikugyendesa emeeri n'emikono yaabo. 
Acts27:20 Ku twamazire ebiro bingi tutakireeba izooba n'obu zaakuba enyonyoozi, kandi eihunga ringi nirikituteera, amatsiko goona ag'okukira twagahwa." 
Acts27:21 Ku baamazire omwanya muhango batarikurya, Paulo yaayemerera ahagati yaabo, yaagira ati: Baataata, mukaba mushemereire kumpurira kutaruga Kureete, kureeba okusiisiikarirwa oku, n'okufeerwa." 
Acts27:22 Mbwenu nimbagambira nti: Mugume emitima, ahabw'okuba tiharikwija kufa muntu n'omwe omuriimwe, kureka emeeri yonka." 
Acts27:23 Ahakuba eki kiro haizire maraika wa Ruhanga, naanye ou ndi owe, kandi ou mpeereza, yaanyemerera aha rubaju;" 
Acts27:24 yaagira ati: Paulo, otatiina; oshemereire kwemerera omu maisho ga Kaisaari; kandi reeba, Ruhanga akuhaire abo boona abarikugyenda naiwe." 
Acts27:25 Mbwenu, mugume emitima, bashaija 'mwe; ahakuba niinyesiga Ruhanga, ku kirikwija kuba nk'oku ngambiirwe." 
Acts27:26 Kwonka tushemereire kugira ekirwa eki twanagwaho. 
Acts27:27 Ekiro kya ikumi na bina kyahika nitucurangibwa omuyaga omu nyanja ya Aduria; omu itumbi abarimbi baateekateeka ngu bairiire haihi n'enkungu. 
Acts27:28 Baagyera oburaingwa bw'amaizi, baashanga ziri yaadi makumi ana; ku bairiire kakye omumaisho, baagaruka baagyera, baashanga ziri yaadi makumi ashatu." 
Acts27:29 Ahabw'okutiina kweshekura aha nkiri, baashuumya ebitsibo bina enyima y'emeeri, nibenda ngu bubanze busheeshe." 
Acts27:30 Abarimbi baateeraho kuruga omu meeri ngu bahungye, baashuumya akaato omu nyanja, nibeeshushanisa nk'abarikwenda kushuumya ebitsibo omu maisho g'emeeri;" 
Acts27:31 Paulo yaagambira omukuru w'abaserukare n'abaserukare ati: Abo ku baraabe batagumire mu meeri, timurikubaasa kukira." 
Acts27:32 Abaserukare nikwo kushara emirunga y'akaato, bakakareka, kakagyenda." 
Acts27:33 Ku bwabaire nibutaagurikana, Paulo yaabeeshengyereza boona kurya aha by'okurya, naagira ati: Eri izooba n'ekiro kya ikumi na bina nimusiibakwo, mutariire kantu." 
Acts27:34 Nikyo ndikubeeshengyerereza kurya aha by'okurya; nibyo biraija kubaha amaani, kandi tiharikwija kugira kashokye na kamwe akaabura aha mitwe yaanyu mwena." 
Acts27:35 Ku yaaherize kugamba atyo, yaakwata omugaati, yaasiima Ruhanga omu maisho ga boona, yaagubega, yaatandika kurya." 
Acts27:36 Boona baiha aho baaguma emitima, baarya aha by'okurya." 
Acts27:37 Twena abaabaire bari omu meeri tukaba turi abantu magana abiri na makumi mushanju na mukaaga. 
Acts27:38 Ku baaherize kuhaaga, baanaga engano omu nyanja, ngu emeeri eyanguhirwe." 
Acts27:39 Ku bwaseesire, tibaamanya nsi ei baareebire; kwonka baareeba omukono gw'enyanja oguriho enyambukiro y'omusheenyi, baahanuura kureeba yaaba nibabaasa kuhitsyayo emeeri." 
Acts27:40 Baacwaho ebitsibo, baabitsiga omu nyanya; ku baabaire nibakikora ebyo, baakomorora emirunga eyaabaire ekwatisre ebirikubogora emeeri; baahanika eitanga ery'omumaisho ngu babone kutwarw aomuyaga nibagyema enyambukiro." 
Acts27:41 Kwonka ku baahikire ahu amaizi gaabugaabuganira, omutwe gw'emeeri gwashaaya, emeeri yaaguma aho, kandi ekibunu kyayo kyasheenyagurwa amaani g'ebingozi." 
Acts27:42 Abaserukare baacwa obwengye kwita embohe, ngu zitaziha, zikacwa;" 
Acts27:43 kwonka omukuru waabo, ahabw'okwenda kukiza Paulo, yaabazibira kubaita; yaaragiira ngu, abakumanya kuziha beetuure omu nyanja, bazihe bahikye aha nkungu," 
Acts27:44 kandi ngu abandi bagyendere aha mbaaho nari aha bicweka by'emeeri. Batyo boona baakira, baahika aha nkungu." 
Acts28:1 Ku twaherize kukira, twabona kumanya ngu ekirwa ekyo nikyetwa." 
Acts28:2 Enzaarwa zaakyo zaatugirira embabazi ezitagirwa bantu boona; ahakuba zikatuhembera omuriro, zaatwakiira twena, ahabw'enjura eyaabaire neegwa, kandi hariho n'embeho." 
Acts28:3 Paulo ku yaateeraine omuganda gw'enku, yaazita omu muriro; ahonaaho ahabw'ekibabo ky'omuriro haarugamu empiri, emuri aha mukono neereereeta." 
Acts28:4 Abazaarwa b'ekyo kirwa, ku baareebire egyo mpiri emwezingire aha mukono, baagambirana bati: Buzima omuntu ogu n'omwitsi; n'obu araabe yaakira enyanja, ruhanga otasingisiriza tayenzire ku agumaho." 
Acts28:5 Kwonka Paulo yaakunkumurira egyo mpiri omu muriro, tiyaagira ku yaaba." 
Acts28:6 Abashaija abo baateekateeka ngu naija kuzimba, nari shi agwe aho, afeereho; kwonka ku baamazire omwanya muhango bategyereize, baareeba hataine kabi akaamubaho, baahindura ebiteekateeko, baagira ngu, Ni ruhanga." 
Acts28:7 Haihi n'omwanya ogwo hakaba hariho emisiri y'omutegyeki mukuru w'ekirwa ekyo orikwetwa Pubulio, yaatwakiira, yaatukunira gye ebiro bishatu." 
Acts28:8 Kandi ishe wa Pubulio akaba arwaire omushwija n'esheshe. Paulo yaataaha omu nju ye, yaamushabira, yaamutaho engaro, yaamukiza." 
Acts28:9 Ekyo ku kyakozirwe, n'abandi barwaire ab'omu kirwa ekyo baija, baatambirwa." 
Acts28:10 Baatuha ekitiinisa kingi; kandi ku twabaire niturugayo, baatureetera omu meeri ebi twabaire nitwetenga byona." 
Acts28:11 Ku hahingwireho ameezi ashatu, twarugayo omu meeri eya Alegizanderia, eyaamazire ebiro by'embeho omu kirwa ekyo, akamanyiso kaayo bari Baaruhanga b'Empasha." 
Acts28:12 Twahika Surakuusa, twamarayo kashatu." 
Acts28:13 Omukurugayo twayekiikuura, twahika Regio; ku haahingwireho ekiro kimwe, haija omuyaga gw'obukiizi-bwa-buryo; aha kiro kya kabiri twahika Puteoli." 
Acts28:14 Okwo twashangayo ab'eishe-emwe, baatweshengyereza kumara nabo ebiro mushanju. Okwo nikwo twahikire Rooma." 
Acts28:15 Ab'eishe-emwe ab'omuri Rooma, ku baatuhuriire, baija, baatubugana aha Katare ka Apio, n'aha Maduuka Ashatu. Paulo, ku yaabareebire, yaasima Ruhanga, yaaguma omutima." 
Acts28:16 Ku twataahire omuri Rooma, omukuru w'abaserukare yaamurikira embohe omukuru w'abaserukare abaabaire nibarinda Kaisaari; kwonka baikiriza Paulo kweraaza naarindwa omuserukare." 
Acts28:17 Ku haahingwireho ebiro bishatu, yaayeta abakuru b'Abayudaaya; ku baateeraine hamwe, yaabagira ati: Beene waitu, nyowe n'obu ndaabe ntaine kibi eki naakozire aha ihanga ryaitu, nari okushobya emigyenzo ya baatatenkuriitwe, kwonka bakampayo aha Barooma ndi embohe, nibaanyiha Yerusaalemu." 
Acts28:18 Abarooma bo, ku baaherize kuntonganisa, baayenda kudnekura, ahabw'okuba bakareeba ntaine rubanja rw'okuunyitsa." 
Acts28:19 Bwanyima Abayudaaya ku baabyangire, naagyemwa kujurira ahari Kaisaari; kwonka ntaine ki ndikurega eihanga ryaitu." 
Acts28:20 Ebyo nibyo mbatumiire ngu tureebane, tugaaniire; ahabw'okuba eki naatuzirwe, kandi ekimboheise omu rujegyere oru, n'amatsiko agu Abaisraeli batuura bategyereize." 
Acts28:21 Nabo baamugarukamu bati: Itwe titukatungaga mabaruha agarikuruga Buyudaaya kutumanyisa ebyawe, kandi tihariho n'omwe omuri beene waitu oraizire aha, akatugambira enkuru mbi ahariiwe, n'obu kwakuba okukugambaho kubi." 
Acts28:22 Mbwenu ka tuhurire eki orikuteekateeka; ahakuba ekigombe eki nikijumwa hoonahoona. 
Acts28:23 Baamuraganisa erindi izooba; baija baingi omu nju ei yaabaire acumbikiremu. Yaabashobororera okuruga omu kasheeshe okuhitsya omu mwabazyo, naabahamiza eby'obukama bwa Ruhanga, naateeraho, kubaikiririsa ebya Yesu, naiha omu Biragiro bya Musa n'omu bya Baanabi." 
Acts28:24 Abamwe baikiriza ebi yaabagambira, abandi tibaabiikiriza." 
Acts28:25 Ku baabire nibenda kurugayo bataikirizaine, Paulo yaayongyera kubagambira ekigambo kimwe ati: Ebi Omwoyo Orikwera yaagambiire baashwenkuriimwe omu kanwa ka nabi Isaaya, akabigamba gye ati:" 
Acts28:26 Gyenda aha b'eihanga eri, obagire oti: Okuhurira kwo muryahurira, kwonka timurishoborokyerwa; Okureeba kwo muryareeba, kwonka timuryetegyereza;" 
Acts28:27 Ahakuba emitima y'abantu aba ehindukire ebitsire, N'amatu gaabo nigahurira kubi, N'amaisho gaabo bagahumiize, Ngu batakaareebesa amaisho gaabo, N'okuhuriza amatu gaabo, N'okwetegyereza n'emitima yaabo, N'okuhinduka, ngu mbakize." 
Acts28:28 Imwe mumanye ngu oku kujuna kwa Ruhanga kukatwekyerwa Abanyamahanga; kandi bo baryakworobera. 
Acts28:29 Ku yaagambire ebigambo ebyo, Abayudaaya baagyenda nibahakana munonga bonka na bonka." 
Acts28:30 Bwanyima Paulo yaamarayo emyaka ebiri yoona, nayeihurira empiiha z'enju ei yaabaire naaraaramu; naayakiira boona abaabaire bamutaayaayira," 
Acts28:31 naabuurira eby'obukama bwa Ruhanga, naayegyesa ebya Mukama waitu Yesu n'obumanzi bwona, ataine orikumuzibira." 
Romans1:1 Nyowe Paulo, omuhuuku wa Yesu Kristo, nkeetwa kuba entumwa, naashoroorerwa engiri ya Ruhanga," 
Romans1:2 ei yaaraganiise ira omu kanwa ka baanabi be omu Byahandiikirwe ebirikweta; 
Romans1:3 engiri egyo niyo emanyisa eby'Omwana we owaazairwe omuri baijukuru ba Daudi omu mubiri," 
Romans1:4 kandi akaoorekwa n'amaani ku ari Omwana wa Ruhanga ahabw'okuzooka omu bafu, nk'oku Omwoyo Orikwera yaaragwire, Ogwo niwe Yesu Kristo Mukama waitu." 
Romans1:5 Niwe yaatuhaisize embabazi n'okuba entumwa ez'okureetera ab'omu mahanga goona okworobera owkeikiriza ahabw'eiziina rye; 
Romans1:6 kandi naimwe muri omuri abo abaayetsirwe kuba aba Yesu Kristo. 
Romans1:7 Mbwenu iwme ab'omuri Rooma, abarikukundwa Ruhanga, kandi abaayetsirwe kuba abarikwera, naabahandiikira. Nimbendeza embabazi n'obusingye ebirikuruga ahari Ruhanga Tataitwe, na Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo." 
Romans1:8 Okubanza ninsiima Ruhanga wangye omuri Yesu Kristo ahabwanyu mwena, ahabw'okuba okwikiriza kwanyu nikugambwa omu nsi zoona." 
Romans1:9 Ruhanga, ou mpeereza omu mutima gwangye omu ngiri n'Omwana we, niwe kareebi wangye orikuhamya ku mbaijuka obutoosha omu kushaba kwangye," 
Romans1:10 ngu, ku kiraabe nikibaasika hati ahabw'okukunda kwa Ruhanga, aha muheru gwa byona aikirize kundeeta n'obusingye, ampitsye owaanyu," 
Romans1:11 ahakuba mbainiire orushusho ngu mbone kubaha omugisha gw'Omwoyo, gubagumye;" 
Romans1:12 nikwo kugira ngu tugumyane, nyowe ngumibwe okwikiriza kwanyu, naimwe okwangye." 
Romans1:13 B'eishe-emwe, niinyenda ku mumanya ngu kaingi nkenda kwija owaanyu, ngu ndeebe n'omuriimwe ebyana, nk'oku naabireebire omu Banyamahanga abandi; kwonka hariho ebyanzibiire n'okuhitsya hati." 
Romans1:14 Abagriika n'ab'amahanga agandi, abanyabwengye n'abatabwine, mbaineho eibanja;" 
Romans1:15 n'ahabw'ekyo nyowe ahabwangye ninkunda munonga kubabuurira engiri naimwe ab'omuri Rooma. 
Romans1:16 Ahakuba engiri terikunkwatsa nshoni, ahabw'okuba nigo maani ga Ruhanga, agahaisa orikwikiriza weena okujunwa, okubandiza aha Bayudaaya, kandi n'aha Bagriika." 
Romans1:17 Ahakuba omu ngiri egyo okuhikiirira okurikuruga ahari Ruhanga nimwo kushuuruurirwa okuheebwa ahabw'okwikiriza, kukagumizamu omu kwikiriza, nk'oku kyahandiikirwe ngu: Ohikiriire aryaba ohuriire ahabw'okwikiriza." 
Romans1:18 Mumanye ngu ekiniga kya Ruhanga nikishuuruurwa okuruga omu iguru, nikiija kurwanisa okutatiina Ruhanga kwona n'okutahikiirira kw'abantu, abazindisa amazima okutahikiirirakwabo;" 
Romans1:19 ahakuba ebirikubaasikira abantu kumanya ahari Ruhanga babishoborokyerwa, ahabw'okuba Ruhanga akabibashuuruurira." 
Romans1:20 Okuruga aha kuhangwa kw'ensi ebya Ruhanga ebitareebwa eby'obushoboorozi bwe obutahwaho, n'obwaruhanga bwe, bikareebekyera kimwe, nibimanyirwa aha bi yaahangire; n'ahabw'ekyo tibaine ky'okwekwatsa;" 
Romans1:21 ahakuba, n'obu baraabe baamanyire Ruhanga, kwonka tibaramuhimbiise nka Ruhanga, n'obu kwakuba okumusiima, bakahabisibwa ebiteekateeko byabo, n'emitima yaabo y'emishema yaashwekwa omwirima." 
Romans1:22 Ku baayeyetsire abanyabwengye, baahinduka ebifa-mutima;" 
Romans1:23 omu mwanya gw'ekitiinisa kya Ruhanga otafa baatamu ebishushani by'abantu abafa, n'eby'ebirikuguruka, n'eby'enyamaishwa, n'eby'ebirikugyendesa enda." 
Romans1:24 Nikyo Ruhanga yaabarekyeire kukurata ebi emitima yaabo erikwetenga, bakakora ebihagaro, bakashiisha oburungi bw'emibiri yaabo bonka na bonka;" 
Romans1:25 ahakuba amazima ga Ruhanga bakagahindura ebishuba, baaramya ebyahangirwe, baabiheereza okukira Omuhangi orikusiimwa ebiro byona Amiina." 
Romans1:26 N'ahabw'ekyo Ruhanga akabareka, ngu bategyekwe emize erikwitsa enshoni; abakazi baabo baareka eki emibiri yaabo yaahangiirwe, baagikoresa ekitari ky'obuhangwa;" 
Romans1:27 kandi n'abashaija nabo baareka kukorera abakazi eby'obuhangwa, baabugumwamu okurigira okubi, abashaija baakora eby'obuhemu aha bandi bashaija, baihurwa omu mibiri yaabo ebishemereire obuhabe bwabo." 
Romans1:28 Kandi nk'oku baayangire kumanya Ruhanga omu mitima yaabo, Ruhanga nikyo yaabarekyeire kugira emitima etarikusiimwa, n'okukora ebitashemeire;" 
Romans1:29 baijuriire kimwe okutahikiirira kwona, obubi, omururu, n'okwangana; baijwire n'eihari, obwitsi, n'entongane, obugobya, n'eitima;" 
Romans1:30 n'abantu abahwihwitsa, n'abagambuura nibabeiha, abanga Ruhanga, abanyamaryo, abeemanya, abeekuza, abeecwera ebibi, abagomera abaabazaire," 
Romans1:31 abateetegyereza, abaita endagaano, abatakunda bantu, abatasaasira." 
Romans1:32 Abo, n'obu bamanya orubanja oru Ruhanga acwera abakora nk'ebyo, ngu bashemereire kufa, tibabikora kwonka, kandi basiima n'ababikora." 
Romans2:1 Nikyo otainiire ky'okwetonganira, iwe omuntu weena ocwera ondiijo orubanja; ahakuba omu kurumucwera, oba noorwesingisa; haza iwe orumucwera, ebi okora nibyo bimwe n'ebi akora." 
Romans2:2 Kandi nitumanya ngu orubanja, oru Ruhanga acwera abakora nk'ebyo, n'orw'amazima." 
Romans2:3 Iwe omuntu, ocwera abakora nk'ebyo orubanja, haza naiwe noobikora, nooteekateeka ngu oryakira orubanja rwa Ruhanga?" 
Romans2:4 Nari noogaya obutungi bw'embabazi ze, n'obw'okugumisiriza kwe, n'obw'okwetwara kwe? Torikumanya ngu embabazi za Ruhanga ziba ez'okukuhitsya aha kweteisa?" 
Romans2:5 Kwonka ahabw'omutima gwawe ogugangaire, oguteeteisa, oyebiikira ekiniga ekiribaho aha kiro ky'ekiniga, ahu Ruhanga arishuuruurira orubanja oruhikire;" 
Romans2:6 ahakuba ayaihura omuntu weena ebishemereire ebi yaakozire. 
Romans2:7 Abasherura ekitiinisa n'okusiimwa n'okutafa, nibabisheruza okukora gye batarikuruha, aryabaihura amagara agatahwaho;" 
Romans2:8 kwonka abaine emitima y'empaka n'abatoorobera mazima, kureka aboorobera okutahikiirira, aryabaihura okuguubwa kubi n'ekiniga kingi," 
Romans2:9 n'okubonabonesibwa n'obusaasi; ebyo nibyo biriba aha muntu weena okora kubi, okubandiza aha Muyudaaya okuhika aha Mugriika;" 
Romans2:10 kwonka oburungi n'ekitiinisa n'obusingye biryaba aha muntu weena okora gye, okubandiza aha Muyudaaya okuhika aha Mugriika;" 
Romans2:11 ahakuba Ruhanga tashoroora mu bantu. 
Romans2:12 Abaakozire ebibi batarikumanya Biragiro, baryahwerekyerezibwa batarikuturwa Biragiro; kandi boona abaakozire ebibi nibamanya Ebiragiro, baryacwerwa orubanja omu Biragiro;" 
Romans2:13 ahakuba abahurira buhurizi Ebiragiro tibo bahikiriire omu maisho ga Ruhanga; kureka ababyorobera nibo baihwaho orubanja. 
Romans2:14 Abanyamahanga abataine Biragiro, ku baraabe bakora ebi ebiragiro biragiira ahabw'obuhangwa, biri baba beehindukiire ebiragiro, n'obu baraabe bataine Biragiro." 
Romans2:15 Booreka ngu eki Ebiragiro byetenga kihandiikirwe omu mitima yaabo, kihamibwa eiraka ry'omwoyo erituura omuribo, kandi kikwatanisa n'ebiteekateeko byabo kubashinja, nari kubatonganira;" 
Romans2:16 kandi nikwo kiriba aha kiro eki Ruhanga aricweraho emanja z'ebi abantu baakozire omu mubonano, naazicwisa Yesu Kristo, nk'engiri ei naahwairwe oku egira." 
Romans2:17 Kwonka iwe oyeyeta Omuyudaaya, okeegamira Ebiragiro, okeehimbisiza omuri Ruhanga," 
Romans2:18 okamanya ebi akunda, okasiima ebirikukira oburungi ahabw'okwegyesibwa eby'omu Biragiro," 
Romans2:19 kandi okeehamya ku ori omwebembezi w'empumi, n'omushana gw'abari omu mwirima," 
Romans2:20 n'omuhabuzi w'abataine bwengye, n'omwegyesa w'abaana abato, ahabw'okuba omu Biragiro oine ebirikumanyisa obwengye n'amazima;" 
Romans2:21 mbwenu iwe oyegyesa abandi, toyeyegeysa? Iwe obuurira abandi okutaiba, oiba?" 
Romans2:22 Iwe ogira ngu omuntu tashemereire kushambana, oshambana? Iwe onuga ebishushani by'abacwezi, oiba eby'omuri hekalu zaabo?" 
Romans2:23 Iwe oyehimbisiza omu Biragiro, kandi niiwe ogayisa Ruhanga omu kubishobya?" 
Romans2:24 Nk'oku kyahandiikirwe ngu: Eiziina rya Ruhanga nirijumwa omu Banyamahanga ahabwanyu. 
Romans2:25 N'eky'amazima, okusharwa nikugasha, waaba noohitsya Ebiragiro; kwonka ku orikuba noobishobya, okusharwa kwawe nikuhinduka okutasharwa." 
Romans2:26 Omuntu otashazirwe, ku araabe naahitsya ebi Ebiragiro biragiira, okutasharwa kwe tikuribarwa nk'okusharwa?" 
Romans2:27 Otashazirwe mu mubiri, ku araabe naahitsya eby'omu Biragiro, tarikusingisa orubanja iwe orikushobya Ebiragiro, haza oine Ebyahandiikirwe kandi oshazirwe omu mubiri?" 
Romans2:28 Ahakuba Omuyudaaya ow'aharuguru kwonka tiwe Muyudaaya w'amazima, kandi okusharwa okw'aharuguru okw'omubiri tikwo kusharwa kw'amazima;" 
Romans2:29 kwonka Omuyudaaya ow'omu mutima niwe Muyudaaya, kandi okusharwa okw'omu mutima okw'omu mwoyo, kutari kw'omu bihandiiko, nikwo kusharwa; okusiimwa kw'omuntu ogwo tikuruga ha bantu, kureka ahari Ruhanga." 
Romans3:1 Omuyudaaya naakiza ki abandi? Nari shi okusharwa nikugasha ki? 
Romans3:2 Nibigasha munonga omu miringo yoona. Eky'okubanza, Abayudaaya nibo baakwatsiibwe ebyagambirwe Ruhanga." 
Romans3:3 Mbwenu shi tugambe ki? N'obu abamwe bataraikiriize, okutaikiriza kwabo nikubaasa kuhindura okwesigwa kwa Ruhanga okuba busha?" 
Romans3:4 Rubuuza! Ka tuhamye Ruhanga ku aba ow'amazima, n'obu omuntu weena yaakuba omunyabishuba, nk'oku kyahandiikirwe ngu: Obe ohikiriire omu bigambo byawe; Osingye, ku oraacwerwe orubanja." 
Romans3:5 Okutahikiirira kwaitu ku kuraabe nikuhamya okuhikiirira kwa Ruhanga, tugambe ki? Tugire tuti: Ruhanga ku ahanisa ekiniga, aba atahikiriire? (Naagamba nk'oku abantu bagamba.)" 
Romans3:6 Rubuuza! Ku kiraabe kiri kityo, Ruhanga aryacwera ata ensi orubanja?" 
Romans3:7 Ebishuba byangye ku biraabe nibimanyisa amazima ga Ruhanga, bikamuhaisa ekitiinisa, ahanki nyowe nicwerwa orubanja nk'omusiisi?" 
Romans3:8 Kandi n'enki ekirikutuzibira kukora ekibi, ngu ebirungi bibone kwoja? Nk'oku abamze batubeiherera, bakahamya ngu nikwo tugamba. Abarikugira batyo baryacwerwa orubanja orubashemereire." 
Romans3:9 Mbwenu tugire tuta? Tuti, itwe Abayudaaya twine eki turikukiza abandi? Ngaaha, na kakye; ahakuba mperize kuhamya ngu abantu boona, Abayudaaya n'Abagriika, bategyekwa ekibi," 
Romans3:10 nk'oku kyahandiikirwe ngu: Tihariho ohikiriire, tihariho n'omwe;" 
Romans3:11 Tihariho orikushoborokyerwa, tihariho orikusherura Ruhanga." 
Romans3:12 Boona bakahaba, boona hamwe baahinduka entakimazire; Tihariho orikukora gye, tihariho n'omwe." 
Romans3:13 Emimiro yaabo n'ekituuro ekirangaire, Bagobya n'endimi zaabo, Obushegu bw'encwera buri omu minwa yaabo;" 
Romans3:14 Akanwa kaabo kaijwire okukyeena n'obushaarizi; 
Romans3:15 Amaguru gaabo garahukira okusheesha eshagama; 
Romans3:16 Okuhwerekyereza n'enaku biri omu mihanda yaabo," 
Romans3:17 N'omuhanda gw'obusingye tibarikugumanya; 
Romans3:18 Tibata mutima aha kutiina Ruhanga. 
Romans3:19 Kandi nitumanya ngu byona ebi Ebiragiro bigamba, bibigambira abo abu bitegyeka, ngu buri kanwa kabumbwe, kandi ab'ensi boona basingwe orubanja omu maisho ga Ruhanga;" 
Romans3:20 ahakuba omu maisho ge tihariho muntu n'omwe orisinga orubanja ahabw'okukora emirimo erikuragiirwa Ebiragiro; ahabw'okuba Ebiragiro nibyo bimanyisa ekibi. 
Romans3:21 Kwonka hati hariho okuhikiirira okushuurwirwe okuruga ahari Ruhanga, kutari kw'ebiragiro, haza Ebiragiro n'ebya baanabi nibikuhamya," 
Romans3:22 nikwo kuhikiirira kwa Ruhanga, oku abarikwikiriza boona baheebwa ahabw'okwikiriza Yesu Kristo. Mumanye ngu tihariho mutaano;" 
Romans3:23 ahakuba boona bakashiisha, kandi tibarikuhika ha kitiinisa kya Ruhanga." 
Romans3:24 Kureka baihirwaho busha orubanja ahabw'embabazi ze, naabacunguza okucungurwa okuri omuri Yesu Kristo." 
Romans3:25 Niwe Ruhanga yaataireho okuba ekarabo y'abarikwikiriza eshagama ye, ngu abone kworeka okuhikiirira kwe, okwamureeteire okwetsiza ebibi ebyakozirwe ira, ebi yaagumisiririize;" 
Romans3:26 kandi ngu omu biro ebi ayorekye okuhikiirira kwe, abe Ohikiriire, kandi Oiha orubanja aha muntu weena orikwikiriza Yesu." 
Romans3:27 Mbwenu aho okwehimbisa kurahi? Tikuriho. Nikuzibirwa ki? Ahabw'emirimo? Ngaaha; kureka n'ahabw'okwikiriza. 
Romans3:28 Ahakuba nituhamya ngu omuntu aihwaho orubanja ahabw'okwikiriza, tarwihwaho habw'okukora emirimo y'Ebiragiro." 
Romans3:29 Nari shi Ruhanga n'ow'Abayudaaya bonka? Ti Ruhanga w'Abanyamahanga nabo? Eego, n'ow'Abanyamahanga nabo;" 
Romans3:30 ahakuba Ruhanga aba omwe; kandi niwe ariiha aha bashazirwe orubanja ahabw'okwikiriza, n'aha batashazirwe ahabw'okwikiriza." 
Romans3:31 Mbwenu shi Ebiragiro nitubihindura busha ahabw'okwikiriza? Ngaaha! Tikwo kiri; nituhamya Ebiragiro. 
Romans4:1 Ku biraabe biri bityo, tugambe ki ahari Abrahamu, tatenkuriitwe omu mubiri, eki yaareebire?" 
Romans4:2 Ahabw'okuba Abrahamu, kuri yaihirweho orubanja ahabw'emirimo, akaagizire eky'okwehimbisizaho, kwonka takiine ahari Ruhanga." 
Romans4:3 Ebyahandiikirwe nibigira bita? Biti: Abrahamu akaikiriza Ruhanga, kyamubarirwa okuba okuhikiirira." 
Romans4:4 Nimumanya ngu, okora omurimo, ebihembo bye tibibarwa nk'ekiconco kureka nk'enyihurano." 
Romans4:5 Kwonka otakora mirimo, akaikiriza Ogwo oiha orubanja aha batatiina Ruhanga, okwikiriza kwe kumubarirwa okuba okuhikiirira." 
Romans4:6 Nk'oku Daudi nawe yaagambire aha mugisha oguheebwa omuntu ou Ruhanga abarira okuhikiirira, okutari habw'okukora emirimo, ati:" 
Romans4:7 Baine omugisha abasaasiirwe eby'okushiisha byabo, N'ebibi byabo bikashwekwa." 
Romans4:8 Aine omugisha omuntu ou Mukama ataribarira kibi. 
Romans4:9 Mbwemu omugisha ogu gugambwa ahabashazirwe bonka, nari n'aha batashazirwe? Ahakuba twagira tuti: Okwikiriza kwa Abrahamu kukamubarirwa okuba okuhikiirira." 
Romans4:10 Kukamubarirwa ryari: Yaashazirwe, nari atakashazirwe? Tikuramubariirwe yaashazirwe, kureka atakashazirwe." 
Romans4:11 Bwanyima yaaheebwa okusharwa okuba akamanyiso k'okuhamya okuhikiirira kwe kw'okwikiriza, oku yaabaire aine atakashazirwe, ngu abone kuba ishenkuru wa boona abaikiriza batashazirwe, ngu nabo babarirwe okuhikiirira;" 
Romans4:12 kandi abe na ishenkuru w'abashazirwe, batari abafiire kusharwa kwonka, kureka abagyendera omu kwikiriza kwa tatenkuriitwe Abrahamu, oku yaabaire aine atakashazirwe." 
Romans4:13 Ahakuba endagaano ei Abrahamu n'abaijukuru baaraganisiibwe ku barihungura ensi, terarugire mu Biragiro, kureka omu kuhikiirira ahabw'okwikiriza." 
Romans4:14 Abeesiga Ebiragiro kuri nibo bahunguzi, okwikiriza kukaabaire okwa busha, n'ebyaraganisiibwe bikaabaire bifiire;" 
Romans4:15 ahakuba Ebiragiro bireeta ekiniga; kwonka ahu Ebiragiro bitari tihariho kushobya. 
Romans4:16 N'ahabw'ekyo okuhikiirira kuruga omu kwikiriza, ngu ebyaraganisiibwe ebyo bibone kwegamira embabazi, kandi bihamibwe aha baijukuru boona, t'abarikwesiga Biragiro bonka, kureka nabo abarikugyendera omu kwikiriza kwa Abrahamu; ahabw'okuba niwe tatenkuriitwe twena;" 
Romans4:17 nk'oku kyahandiikirwe ngu: Nkakugira ishenkuru w'amahanga maingi omu maisho g'Ogwo ou yaikiriize, niwe Ruhanga ozoora abafu, kandi oyeta ebitariho nk'ebiriho." 
Romans4:18 Abrahamu ogwo akaikiriza, yaagira amatsiko omu bunaku obu yaakugahwereiremu, ngu aryaba ishenkuru w'amahanga maingi, nk'oku kyagambirwe ngu: Abaijukuru nikwo bariba batyo." 
Romans4:19 Kandi n'obu araabe yaareebire omubiri gwe nigushusha nk'ogufiire ahabw'okumara emyaka y'obukuru nka igana, akareeba na Saara yaabaire ekicura atakibaasa kuzaara, okwikiriza kwe tikuratentebukire;" 
Romans4:20 kureka, ku yaataire amaisho aha bi Ruhanga yaaraganiise, tiyaabanganisisibwa kutaikiriza, kureka yaagumibwa okwikiriza, yaahimbisa Ruhanga;" 
Romans4:21 kandi yaamanyira kimwe ngu eki Ruhanga yaaraganiise, naabaasa kukikora." 
Romans4:22 Nikyo okwikiriza kwe kwamubariirwe okuba okuhikiirira. 
Romans4:23 Tikiramuhandiikiirwe wenka, ngu kikamubarirwa okuba okuhikiirira," 
Romans4:24 kureka ahabwaitu naitwe abaribarirwa okuhikiirira, itwe abarikwikiriza Ogwo owaazoire Yesu Mukama waitu omu bafu;" 
Romans4:25 niwe yaahairweyo ahabw'eby'okushiisha byaitu, kandi akazoorwa kutwihaho orubanja." 
Romans5:1 N'ahabw'ekyo, twihirweho orubanja ahabw'okwikiriza, twine obusingye ahari Ruhanga ahabwa Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo;" 
Romans5:2 kandi ahabw'Ogwo tureebire oburyo bw'okutaaha omu mbabazi ezi, ezi tuhamiiremu ahabw'okwikiriza, kandi nitwesiima twine amatsiko g'okureeba ekitiinisa kya Ruhanga." 
Romans5:3 Kandi t'ekyo kyonka; kureka nitwesiimira n'omu busaasi, ahabw'okuba nitumanya ngu omu busaasi harugamu okugumisiriza," 
Romans5:4 omu kugumisiriza harugamu okuhamibwa, n'omu kuhamibwa harugamu amatsiko;" 
Romans5:5 kandi amatsiko tigakwatsa nshoni, ahabw'okuba okukunda kwa Ruhanga kushukirwe omu mitima yaitu Omwoyo Orikwera ou twahairwe." 
Romans5:6 Ku twabaire tukiri enshoberwa, omu bunaku buhikire Kristo yaafeera abatatiina Ruhanga." 
Romans5:7 Nimumanya ku kigumire omuntu kufeera ohikiriire; nangwa shana akaayemera kufeera ow'emicwe mirungi; 
Romans5:8 kwonka Ruhanga ayoreka okukunda kwe oku atukunda, ahakuba ku twabaire tukiri abanyabibi, Kristo yaatufeera." 
Romans5:9 Mbwenu okukira munonga, nk'oku tuherize kwihwaho orubanja ahabw'eshagama ye, turyakira ekiniga kya Ruhanga ahabwe." 
Romans5:10 Ahakuba ku turaabe twagarukaine na Ruhanga ahabw'okufa kw'Omwana we tukiri abazigu be, mbwenu okukira munonga, nk'oku tuherize kugarukana nawe, amagara ge garyatukiza;" 
Romans5:11 kandi t'ekyo kyonka, kureka nitushemerererwa omuri Ruhanga ahabwa Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo, otuhaisize hati okugarukana oku." 
Romans5:12 N'ahabw'ekyo, nk'oku ekibi kyaizire omu nsi ahabw'okushiisha kw'omuntu omwe, kandi kikarugamu okufa, nikwo n'okufa kwabugire omu bantu boona, ahakuba boona bakashiisha." 
Romans5:13 Nimumanya ngu Ebiragiro bitakatairweho, ekibi kikaba kiri omu nsi; kwonka ekibi tikibarirwa muntu ahu Ebiragiro bitari." 
Romans5:14 Okuruga ahari Adamu okuhika ahari Musa, okufa kukaba kutegyeka abantu, nangwa n'abatarasiisire nk'oku Adamu yaacumwire, kandi niwe kishushani ky'Ogwo owaabaire naayenda kwija." 
Romans5:15 Kwonka ekiconco ky'embabazi tikiine kakwate n'ekicumuro ekyo; ahakuba ekicumuro ky'omuntu omwe ku kiraabe kyareeteire abantu baingi okufa, okukira munonga embabazi za Ruhanga n'ekiconco ky'embabazi z'omuntu omwe Yesu Kristo nikwo byakanyire ahari baingi." 
Romans5:16 Kandi ekiconco ekyo eky'embabazi tikirikushushana n'ebyarugire aha kicumuro ky'omuntu ogwo omwe; ahakuba orubanja orwarugire aha kicumuro ekyo eky'omwe rukareeta okusingwa; kwonka ekiconco ky'embabazi, ekyaizire ahanyima y'ebicumuro bingi, kikareeta okurwihwaho." 
Romans5:17 Ekicumuro ky'omuntu omwe ku kiraabe kyareeteire rufu okwema ahabw'ogwo, okukira munonga abaakiira ezo embabazi nyingi munonga n'ekiconco ky'okuhikiirira, baryayemekwa omu magara masya ahabw'omwe niwe Yesu Kristo." 
Romans5:18 Nk'oku ekicumuro ky'omuntu omwe kyasingiise abantu boona orubanja, nikwo n'eky'okuhikiirira, eki omuntu omwe yaakozire, kyahikire kityo aha bantu boona, ngu baihweho orubanja, baheebwe amagara." 
Romans5:19 Ahakuba nk'oku baingi baahindukire abasiisi ahabw'okutahurira kw'omuntu omwe, nikwo baingi barihinduka abahikiriire ahabw'okuhurira kw'omwe." 
Romans5:20 Kandi Ebiragiro nabyo bikaija, ngu ebicumuro bikanye; kwonka ei ekibi kyagarukiire kukanya, embabazi zikakiraho kukanya munonga," 
Romans5:21 ngu, nk'oku ekibi kyategyekire kikareeta okufa, embabazi zibe nikwo zaategyekyesa okuhikiirira okuhitsya omu magara agatahwaho ahabwa Yesu Kristo Mukama waitu." 
Romans6:1 Mbwenu tugambe ki? Tugume omu kibi, ngu embabazi zibone kukanya?" 
Romans6:2 Nikikabure! Itwe abaaherize kufa aha kibi, nitubaasa tuta kukigaruakmu, tukakigumamu?" 
Romans6:3 Timurikumanya ngu itwe twena abaabatiziibwe kutaaha omuri Kristo Yesu, tukabatizibwa kutaaha omu kufa kwe?" 
Romans6:4 N'ahabw'ekyo ahabw'okutatizibwa tukaziikwa nawe kutaaha omu kufa, nk'oku Kristo yaazookire omu bafu ahabw'amaani g'ekitiinisa kya Isheboona, naitwe tube nikwo twagyendera tutyo omu magara masya." 
Romans6:5 Ku turaaba twateeraine nawe ahabw'okushushanisibwa nawe omu kufa kwe, turyateerana nawe tutyo omu kuzooka nk'okwe." 
Romans6:6 Nitumanya ngu omuntu waitu owa ira akabambwa nawe, ngu omubiri gw'ekibi guhindurwe busha, itwe turekye kuguma nitutegyekwa ekibi;" 
Romans6:7 ahakuba ofiire aba atakitegyekwa kibi. 
Romans6:8 Kwonka ku turaabe twafiire hamwe na Kristo, nitwikiriza ngu turyamereera nawe;" 
Romans6:9 ahabw'okuba nitumanya ngu, Krito nk'oku yaazookire omu bafu, takigaruka kufa; okufa tikwakimutegyeka." 
Romans6:10 Okufa oku yaafiire, akafa rimwe aha kibi yaaheza; mbwenu amagara agu aine, againe ahari Ruhanga." 
Romans6:11 Naimwe mwebare mutyo, ku mufiire aha kibi, kwonka ku muri abahuriire ahari Ruhanga omuri Kristo Yesu." 
Romans6:12 N'ahabw'ekyo mutaikiriza ekibi kutegyeka omu mibiri yaanyu ey'okufa, mukoorobera okurigira kwayo okubi;" 
Romans6:13 kandi mutaha ekibi engingo zaanyu kuzikoresa eby'okutahikiirira, kureka mweheereze Ruhanga nk'abahuriire abazoirwe kuruga omu bafu, kandi n'engingo zaanyu muzimuhe kuzikoresa eby'okuhikiirira." 
Romans6:14 Ekibi tikiribategyeka, ahabw'okuba timurikutegyekwa Biragiro kureka embabazi." 
Romans6:15 Mbwenu shi, tukore ekibi, ngu ahabw'okuba titurikutegyekwa Biragiro kureka embabazi? Rubuuza!" 
Romans6:16 Timurikumanya ngu ogwo ou mweha nk'abahuuku kumuhurira, muba muri abahuuku b'ogwo ou muhurira, yaaba kibi ekireeta okufa, nari okuhurira okureeta okuhikiirira?" 
Romans6:17 Kwonka Ruhanga asiimwe, ahakuba imwe abaabaire muri abahuuku b'ekibi, mbwenu muhindukire abarikutegyekwa enyegyesa ei mwahairwe, mukagyorobera omu mitima yaanyu;" 
Romans6:18 kandi nk'oku mwacungwirwe okuruga omu butegyeki bw'ekibi, muhindukire abahuuku b'okuhikiirira." 
Romans6:19 Naagamba nk'omuntu ahabw'amaani makye ag'obuntu bwanyu; kwonka nk'oku mwabaire muhayo engingo zaanyu nk'abahuuku kukora ebihagaro n'eby'okushiisha ebirengyesereize, hati mube nikwo mwahayo engingo zaanyu nk'abahuuku kukora eby'okuhikiirira, mubone kwezibwa." 
Romans6:20 Obu mwabaire mukiri abahuuku b'ekibi, mukaba mutategyekwa kuhikiirira." 
Romans6:21 Mbwenu ni mugasho ki ogu mwatungire omu bunaku obwo omuri ebyo ebirikubakwatsa enshoni hati? Ahabw'okuba omuheru gwabyo n'okufa. 
Romans6:22 Kwonka hati nk'oku mucungwirwe kuruga omu butegyeki bw'ekibi, mukahinduka abahuuku ba Ruhanga, ebyana ebi murikwana n'okwezibwa; kandi omuheru gwabyo n'amagara agatahwaho." 
Romans6:23 Ahakuba ebihembo by'ekibi n'okufa; kwonka ekiconco kya Ruhanga n'amagara agatahwaho omuri Kristo Yesu Mukama waitu. 
Romans7:1 B'eishe-emwe, timurikumanya ku Ebiragiro bitegyeka omuntu, akiriho? (Ningambira abarikumanya Ebiragiro.)" 
Romans7:2 Nimumanya ngu omukazi oine iba, ekiragiro kimutegyeka kuguma na iba, akiriho; kandi iba ku afa, aba atakitegyekwa kiragiro kya iba." 
Romans7:3 Kwonka ku ashwerwa ondiijo mushaija, iba akiriho, ayetwa omushambani; kwonka iba ku afa, aba atakitegyekwa ekyo kiragiro; n'ahabw'ekyo ku ashwerwa omushaija ondiijo, tayetwa mushambani." 
Romans7:4 Nikyo kimwe, B'eishe-emwe, mukafa aha Biragiro ahabw'okufeera hamwe na Kristo omu mubiri gwe, ngu mubone kuba ab'ondiijo owaazoirwe omu bafu, ngu twanire Ruhanga ebyana." 
Romans7:5 Ku twabaire tukiri omu buzaarwa bw'omubiri, okwetenga ebibi kwaitu, okwaimukiibwe Ebiragiro, kukakorera omu ngingo zaitu ngu twanire okufa ebyana." 
Romans7:6 Kwonka hati tukomoroirwe, titwakitegyekwa Biragiro ahabw'okufa ahari ekyo ekyabaire kitukwatsire, ngu tubone kuheereza omu buhuuku busya obw'Omwoyo, butari bwa ira obw'ebihandiiko." 
Romans7:7 Mbwenu tugambe ki? Tuti: Ebiragiro nikyo kibi? Ngaaha! Tinkumanyire kibi, kuri ntarakimanyisiibwe Biragiro; ahakuba tinkumanyire kwetenga, kuri Ebiragiro bitaragizire biti: Otaryetenga." 
Romans7:8 Kwonka ekibi, ku kyaboine obwiho omu Biragiro, kyaimutsya omuriinye emiringo yoona ey'okwetenga; ahakuba ahatari Biragiro, ekibi kiba kifiire." 
Romans7:9 Naanye ira nkaba ndi ohuriire ahatari Biragiro; kwonka Ekiragiro, ku kyaizire, ekibi kyahimbuuka, nyowe naafa." 
Romans7:10 Ekiragiro, ekyakubaire eky'okumpa amagara, nkashanga kindugiiremu okufa;" 
Romans7:11 ahakuba ekibi, ku kyaboine obwiho omu kiragiro, kyangobeza, kyanyita nikyema omuri ekyo kiragiro." 
Romans7:12 Mbwenu Ebiragiro nibyera, n'ekiragiro nikyera, kihikire, kandi ni kirungi." 
Romans7:13 Nimugira ngu ekirungi nikyo kyandeeteire okufa? Ngaaha! Ekyakundeeteire n'ekibi; kikaanyitsa ekirungi, ngu ekibi kimanywe ku kiri kibi, kandi ahabw'Ebiragiro kihindukye kibi buzima ekirengyesereize." 
Romans7:14 Kwonka nitumanya ngu Ebiragiro n'eby'Omwoyo; kwonka nyowe ndi ow'obuzaarwa bw'obuntu, nkagurwa kutegyekwa ekibi;" 
Romans7:15 eki nkora, tinkimanya; ahabw'okuba eki nkunda kukora tikyo nkora; kureka eki nyanga nikyo nkora." 
Romans7:16 Mbwenu ku ndaabe nkora eki ntenda, biri niinyikiriza ngu Ebiragiro ni birungi." 
Romans7:17 N'ahabw'ekyo tiinye nkikora, kureka ekibi ekituura omuriinye." 
Romans7:18 Nimmanya ngu omuriinye omu buntu bwangye tihabamu karungi koona; ahakuba obutoosha nkunda kukora ekirungi, kwonka okukikora kundema." 
Romans7:19 Ekirungi eki nkunda kukora tikyo nkora; kureka ekibi eki nyanga nikyo nkora. 
Romans7:20 N'ahabw'ekyo ku ndaabe nkora eki ntenda, tiinye nkikora, kureka ekibi ekintuuramu." 
Romans7:21 N'ahabw'ekyo nshangire ebiragiro biri biti, nyowe ku mba niinyenda kukora ekirungi, ekibi kimba haihi." 
Romans7:22 Omu mutima gwangye nsiima ebiragiro bya Ruhanga; 
Romans7:23 kwonka omu ngingo zangye nshangamu ekindi kiragiro ekirwanisa ekiragiro eky'omu bwengye bwangye, kimpindura omuhuuku w'ebiragiro by'ekibi ebiri omu ngingo zangye." 
Romans7:24 Ai bambe, ka ndi omuntu enshoberwa! N'oha orinjuna omu mubiri ogu ogw'okufa?" 
Romans7:25 Ruhanga asiimwe, ahabwa Yesu Kristo Mukama waitu. Mbwenu omu bwengye bwangye nyorobera Ebiragiro bya Ruhanga, kwonka omu mubiri gwangye nyorobera ebiragiro by'ekibi." 
Romans8:1 N'ahabw'ekyo abari omuri Kristo Yesu tibakiine rubanja; 
Romans8:2 hakuba ekiragiro ky'Omwoyo gw'amagara agari omuri Kristo Yesu kikankomoorora kutategyekwa kiragiro eky'ekibi n'okufa. 
Romans8:3 Ruhanga yaakora eki Ebiragiro bitarabaasize kukora ahabw'okuremesibwa amaani makye g'obuntu; yaatuma Omwana we omu kishushani ky'omubiri gw'ekibi, kandi ahabw'ekibi, yaacwera ekibi orubanja omu mubiri," 
Romans8:4 ngu ebi Ebiragiro birikutwihuza bibone kuhikiirira omuriitwe abatakuratira by'omubiri, kureka eby'Omwoyo." 
Romans8:5 Ahabw'okuba abakuratira eby'omubiri bata omutima aha by'omubiri; kwonka abakuratira Omwoyo bata omutima aha by'Omwoyo. 
Romans8:6 Mumanye ngu okuta omutima aha by'omubiri n'okufa; kwonka okuta omutima aha by'Omwoyo n'amagara n'obusingye; 
Romans8:7 ahabw'okuba okuta omutima aha by'omubiri n'obuzigu ahari Ruhanga; ahakuba tikworobera biragiro bya Ruhanga, kandi buzima tikubaasa kubyorobera;" 
Romans8:8 n'ahabw'ekyo abarikutegyekwa omubiri tibabaasa kugwisa gye Ruhanga. 
Romans8:9 Kwonka imwe timuri mu buryo bw'omubiri, kureka omu Mwoyo, Omwoyo wa Ruhanga ku araabe atuura omuriimwe buzima. Mumanye ngu omuntu weena otaine Mwoyo wa Kristo, ti muntu we na kakye." 
Romans8:10 Kandi Kristo ku araabe ari omuriimwe, biri omubiri gufiire ahabw'ekibi, kwonka omwoyo guhuriire ahabw'okuhikiirira." 
Romans8:11 Ku muraabe mutuurwamu Omwoyo w'Ogwo owaazoire Yusu omu bafu, Ogwo owaazoire Kristo Yesu omu bafu aryahindura n'emibiri yaanyu ey'okufa okuba ehuriire ahabw'Omwoyo we otuura omuriimwe." 
Romans8:12 B'eishe-emwe, twine eibanja, ti ry'omubiri ngu tukuratire ebyagwo;" 
Romans8:13 ahakuba ku muraakuratire eby'omubiri, nimwija kufa; kwonka ku muraitse Omwyo emicwe yaanyu ey'omubiri, muryaba abahuriire." 
Romans8:14 Manya, boona abeebemberwa Omwoyo wa Ruhanga, nibo baana ba Ruhanga;" 
Romans8:15 ahakuba timurahairwe mwoyo gw'obuhuuku kugaruka kutiina, kureka mukaheebwa Omwoyo owaabahindwire abaana ba Ruhanga, otugambisa tukagira tuti: Abba, Taata!" 
Romans8:16 Omwoyo ogwo niwe ahamya n'emyoyo yaitu ku turi abaana ba Ruhanga; 
Romans8:17 kandi ku turaabe turi abaana, turi abahunguzi, abahunguzi ba Ruhanga, kandi ab'okuhungura hamwe na Kristo, ku turaabe nitushaasha hamwe nawe, ngu tubone kuheebwa ekitiinisa hamwe nawe." 
Romans8:18 Kandi ninteekateeka ngu obusaasi obu twine omu biro ebi, tibushemereire kugyeranisibwa n'ekitiinisa eki turishuuruurirwa." 
Romans8:19 Mumanye ngu ebyahangirwe byona bituura bitegyereize n'ekihika okushuuruurwa kw'abaana ba Ruhanga; 
Romans8:20 ahakuba ebihangirwe bikaragiirwa kutegyekwa ebitaine mugahso, ti habw'okweyendera, kureka kikakorwa Ogwo owaaragiire ku bitegyekwa bityo biine amatsiko;" 
Romans8:21 ahabw'okuba ebihangirwe ebyo nabyo biryacungurwa, birekye kuba eby'okujunda, kureka biheebwe obusingye bw'abaana ba Ruhanga obw'ekitiinisa." 
Romans8:22 Nitumanya ngu ebihangirwe byona bituura nibitsinda, nibisaasira hamwe n'okuhitsya hati;" 
Romans8:23 kandi tibyo byonka, kureka naitwe abaine ebyana by'omujigaijo eby'Omwoyo, nitutsinda omu mitima yaitu, nitutegyereza kuhindurwa abaana ba Ruhanga, nikwo kucungurwa kw'emibiri yaitu;" 
Romans8:24 ahakuba tukajunwa twine amatsiko ago. Manya, eki omuntu aineho amatsiko, ku aheza kukireeba, gaba gatakiri matsiko. Mbwenu n'oha ogira amatsiko aha ki arikureeba?" 
Romans8:25 Kwonka ku tugira amatsiko aha ki tutakareebire, tukitegyereza n'okugumisiriza." 
Romans8:26 Oku nikwo Omwoyo atuhwera omu bweremwa bwaitu; ahakuba titumanya kushaba nk'oku kitushemereire, kwonka Omwoyo we wenka atutonganira n'okutsinda oku omuntu atakaabaasa kugamba." 
Romans8:27 Kandi Ogwo, ocaaka emitima y'abantu, amanya ebi Omwoyo ateekateeka, ku atonganira abarikwera, nk'oku Ruhanga akunda." 
Romans8:28 Nitumanya ngu, aha barikukunda Ruhanga, bakeetwa nk'enaama ye oku eri, byona ebibabaho bikwatanisiza hamwe kubareetera oburungi." 
Romans8:29 Ahakuba abu yaamanyire ira, nibo yaashoroire batakabaireho kushushanisibwa n'Omwana we, ngu abone kuba omujigaijo omu b'eishe-emwe baingi." 
Romans8:30 Abu yaashoroire batakabaireho, nibo yaayetsire; n'abu yaayetsire, nibo yaihireho orubanja; kandi n'abu yaihireho orubanja, nibo yaahaire ekitiinisa." 
Romans8:31 Mbwenu tugambe ki ahari ebyo? Ruhanga ku araabe ari aha rubaju rwaitu, oritubaasa n'oha?" 
Romans8:32 Otaratwimire Mwana we ahabwe, kureka akamuhayo ahabwaitu twena, aryazibirwa ki kutuha byona hamwe nawe?" 
Romans8:33 N'oha orirega entoore za Ruhanga? Ni Ruhanga, haza kandi obaihaho orubanja?" 
Romans8:34 N'oha oribacwera orubanja rw'okubasinga? Ni Kristo Yesu owaabafeereire, kandi okukira owaazookire omu bafu, ori aha rubaju rwa buryo rwa Ruhanga okututonganira?" 
Romans8:35 N'oha oritutaanisa n'okukunda kwa Kristo? N'obusaasi, okwitwa kubi, okuhiigwa, enjara, okujwara busha, akabi, nari shi rurara?" 
Romans8:36 Nk'oku kyahandiikirwe ngu: Ahabwawe nitwitwa eizooba ryona, Nituteekateekwa nk'entaama z'okubaagwa." 
Romans8:37 Kwonka omuri ebyo byona tusingwire nangwa n'okukiraho ahabw'Ogwo owaatukunzire. 
Romans8:38 Ahakuba nimmanyira kimwe ngu okufa, n'obu gaakuba amagara, nari baamaraika, nari abarikutegyeka, nari ebiriho, nari ebiribaho, nari ab'obushoboorozi," 
Romans8:39 nari oburaingwa obwa bwemi nari oburaingwa obw'okuzimu, n'obu kyakuba ekindi kintu kyona ekihangirwe, tihaine kiribaasa kututaanisa n'okukunda kwa Ruhanga okuri omuri Kristo Yesu Mukama waitu." 
Romans9:1 Ningamba amazima omuri Kristo, tindikubeiha; nimpamya n'omutima gwangye omu Mwoyo Orikwera," 
Romans9:2 ku nyine enaku nyingi n'obusaasi obutarikutuuza omu mutima gwangye. 
Romans9:3 Ahakuba nkaayenzire ngu nyowe ahabwangye nkyeenwe, kandi ncuubwe ahari Krito ahabwa beene waitu ab'oruganda rwangye omu mubiri, nibo Baisraeli," 
Romans9:4 abaahairwe omugabo gw'okuba abaana ba Ruhanga, n'ekitiinisa kye, n'endagaano ze, n'Ebiragiro n'emigyenzo y'okuramya Ruhanga, n'ebyaraganisiibwe;" 
Romans9:5 nibo baakomookire ahari baatatenkuriitwe; kandi na Kristo nibo yaakomookiremu omu mubiri, otegyeka byona, kandi niwe Ruhanga ohimbisibwa ebiro byona. Amiina." 
Romans9:6 Ku ndikugamba ntyo, tindikugira nti: Ekigambo kya Ruhanga tikirahikire; ahabw'okuba ti kugira ngu abaakomookire omuri Israeli boona n'Abaisraeli buzima;" 
Romans9:7 kandi okuba oruzaaro rwa Abrahamu tikyo kihindura boona abaana be buzima; kwonka nikigira kiti: Baijukuru baawe baryayetererwa Isaaka. 
Romans9:8 Nikwo kugira ngu, abazairwe omu mubiri tibo baana ba Ruhanga, kureka abazairwe omu ndagaano nibo babarwa kuba abaijukuru." 
Romans9:9 Nimumanya ku ekigambo ekyaraganisiibwe kyagizire kiti: Omu bunaku nk'obu ndyagaruka, kandi Saara aryazaara omwana w'omwojo." 
Romans9:10 Kandi t'ekyo kyonka, kureka na Rebeka, ku yaabaire abakire enda y'empasha z'omushaija tatenkuriitwe Isaaka," 
Romans9:11 yaagambirwa ngu: Kakuru aryaheereza Kato, nk'oku kyahandiikirwe ngu: Yakobo nkamukunda, Esau naamwanga; yaabigambirwa, abaana abo batakazairwe, kandi batakakoire kirungi nari ekibi, ngu eki Ruhanga yaatooraine omu naama ye kigumeho, kiteegamiire mirimo, kureka Ogwo owaatwetsire." 
Romans9:12  
Romans9:13  
Romans9:14 Mbwenu tugambe ki? Tuti, omu mitwarize ya Ruhanga habamu okutainganisa? Rubuuza!" 
Romans9:15 Ahakuba akagambira Musa ati: Ndyasaasira ou ndisaasira, kandi ndyagirira embabazi ou ndizigirira." 
Romans9:16 N'ahabw'ekyo tikirikwegamira kweyendera kw'omuntu, nari obweziriki bwe, kureka okusaasira kwa Ruhanga." 
Romans9:17 Nimumanya ngu, omu Byahandiikirwe Ruhanga akagira Faraho ati: Eki naakwemekyeire n'okukworekyeraho amaani gangye, ngu eiziina ryangye rigambwe omu nsi zoona." 
Romans9:18 Nikwo asaasira ou ayenda kusasira, kandi agangaaza omutima gw'ogwo ou ayenda ngu gugangaare." 
Romans9:19 Mbwenu noija kumbuuza oti: Ahanki naakibarira abantu ebishobyo? Kandi n'oha owaakubaasa kuzibira ebi arikwenda? 
Romans9:20 Beitu shi, iwe omuntu, niiwe oha orikuhakanisa Ruhanga? Ekibumbirwe nikibaasa kubuuza owaakibumbire kiti, Ahabw'enki okambumba oti?" 
Romans9:21 Omubumbi taine obushoboorozi aha ibumba omu mugoma gumwe kubumbamu orwabya rumwe rw'okukoresa eby'ekitiinisa, n'orundi rw'okukoresa ebirikwitsa enshoni?" 
Romans9:22 Mbwenu Ruhanga, ku araabe yaayenzire kworeka ekiniga kye, n'okumanyisa obushoboorozi bwe, nikiita ki We okugumisiririza n'embabazi ze nyingi enyabya ez'ekiniga ezaateekateekyeirwe okuhwerekyerera;" 
Romans9:23 ngu abone kworeka obutungi bw'ekitiinisa kye aha nyabya ez'okusaasirwa ezi yaateekateekyeire ekitiinisa okuruga ira," 
Romans9:24 niitwe abu yaayetsire, ti mu Bayudaaya bonka, kureka n'omu Banyamahanga?" 
Romans9:25 Nk'oku yaagambire naaraba omuri nabi Hosea ati: Abantu abatari b'eihanga ryangye Ndyabeeta eihanga ryangye; Kandi owaabaire ari enyangwakazi Ndyamweta enkundwakazi. 
Romans9:26 Kandi omu mwanya ogwo ahu baagambiriirwe ngu timuri ihanga ryangye. Niho baryeterwa abaana ba Ruhanga ohuriire. 
Romans9:27 Kandi Isaaya nawe akagamba aha Baisraeli ati: Omubaro gw'Abaisraeli n'obu guriba nk'omusheenyi gw'aha nyanja, abarihonokaho bonka nibo barijunwa;" 
Romans9:28 ahakuba Mukama aryahikiiriza orubanja oru yaacwereire ensi, aruheze atarusiibizeho." 
Romans9:29 Kandi nk'oku Isaaya yaagizire ira ati: Kuri Mukama ow'amahe ataratutsigiireho baijukuru, Tukaabaire nka Sodoma, tushushana na Gomora." 
Romans9:30 Mbwenu tugambe ki? Tuti: Abanyamahanga, abatarakuratiire kuhikiirira, bakakuhikaho, nikwo kuhikiirira okuruga omu kwikiriza;" 
Romans9:31 kwonka Abaisraeli, abaakuratiire Ebiragiro by'okuhikiirira, tibarahikize biragiro byakwo." 
Romans9:32 Bakazibirwa ki? Ahabw'okuba tibareezirikire kukuhikaho ahabw'okwikiriza, kureka ahabw'emirimo. Baateera entsibo aha ibaare ry'okuteerwaho entsibo," 
Romans9:33 nk'oku kyahandiikirwe ngu, Reeba, ninta omuri Saayuuni Eibaare eririkuteeza entsibo n'orukiri orurikugwisa, Kandi orikumwikiriza tarikwatwa nshoni." 
Romans10:1 B'eishe-emwe, ekyakunanura omutima gwangye, kandi eki nshabira Abaisraeli ahari Ruhanga nikyo eki, ngu bajunwe." 
Romans10:2 Ahakuba nimpamya nti: Baine obweziriki ahari Ruhanga, kwonka tiburimu kushoborokyerwa;" 
Romans10:3 ahabw'okutamanya kuhikiirira okurikuruga ahari Ruhanga, bakeesherurira oku baakuhamya okuhikiirira kwabo ahabwabo, tibaroorobeire kuhikiirira okurikuruga ahari Ruhanga." 
Romans10:4 Ahakuba omuri Kristo nimwo Ebiragiro bihikiiririzibwa, ngu abone kuhaisa okuhikiirira omuntu weena orikwikiriza." 
Romans10:5 Nimumanya ngu Musa akahandiika eby'okuhikiirira okuheebwa ahabw'okuhitsya Ebiragiro ati: Orikubihitsya aryagira amagara ahabwabyo. 
Romans10:6 Kwonka okuhikiirira okwegamiire okwikiriza nikugira kuti: Otagamba omu mutima gwawe oti: N'oha oritemba omu iguru? (amakuru ngu, okushuumya Kristo ahansi,)" 
Romans10:7 nari shi oti: N'oha orishuuma okuzimu? (amakuru ngu, okwiha Kristo omu bafu.)" 
Romans10:8 Beitu kugira kuta? Kugira kuti, Ekigambo kikuri haihi, omu kanwa kaawe n'omu mutima gwawe, nikyo kigambo ky'okwikiriza eki tubuurira;" 
Romans10:9 tuti: Ku oryatura n'akanwa kaawe oti, Yesu niwe Mukama, waikiriza n'omutima gwawe ku Ruhanga yaamuzoire omu bafu, oryajunwa;" 
Romans10:10 ahakuba omutima nigwo omuntu aikiririsa akaheebwa okuhikiirira, kandi akanwa niko ayatuza akaheebwa okujunwa." 
Romans10:11 Ebyahandiikirwe nibigira biti: Omuntu weena orikumwikiriza tarikwatwa nshoni. 
Romans10:12 Tihariho mutaano gw'Omuyudaaya n'Omugriika; ahakuba Mukama omwe niwe Mukama wa boona, kandi n'omutungi ahari boona abamutakira;" 
Romans10:13 ahabw'okuba omuntu weena oritakira eiziina rya Mukama aryajunwa. 
Romans10:14 Mbwenu shi, abantu baryatakira bata, ou batakaikiriize? Kandi bayaikiriza bata ou batakahuriraga? Kandi baryahurira bata ahatari mubuurizi?" 
Romans10:15 Kandi baryabuurira bata batatumirwe? Nk'oku kyahandiikirwe ngu: Ebigyere by'ababuurizi ka ni birungi munonga, abo ababuurira engiri y'ebigambo ebirungi!" 
Romans10:16 Kwonka abaayorobiere engiri ti boona; ahakuba Isaaya akagira ati: Mukama n'oha oikiriize ebi twarangire? 
Romans10:17 Manya, okwikiriza kuruga omu bi tuhurira, kandi ebi tuhurira biruga omu kigambo kya Kristo." 
Romans10:18 Beitu nimbuuza nti: Tibarahuriire? Eego, buzima bakahurira; ahakuba Eiraka ryabyo rikabuga omu nsi zoona, N'ebigambo byabyo byahika aha muheru gw'ensi." 
Romans10:19 Kandi nimbuuza nti: Abaisraeli tibarabimanyire? Musa niwe yaabandize kugira ati: Ndyabaitsa eihari aha ihanga eritari ihanga buzima, Ndyabakwatsa ekiniga n'eihanga eritaine bwengye." 
Romans10:20 Kandi Isaaya akagamba n'obumanzi ati: Nkabonwa abataransherwire, Naayeyoreka abatarambuuririize." 
Romans10:21 Kwonka aha Baisraeli yaagira ati: Eizooba ryona nsiiba ntegire emikono eihanga eritahurira kandi erigomi. 
Romans11:1 Mbwenu nimbuuza nti: Ruhanga akacwera kimwe abantu be? Ngaaha! Ahakuba naanye ndi Omwisraeli ow'omu nda ya Abrahamu omu ruganda rwa Benyamiini. 
Romans11:2 Ruhanga taracwire bantu be abu yaamanyire batakabaireho. Timurikumanya ebi Ebyahandiikirwe bigamba ahari Eliya, oku yaaregire Abaisraeli ahari Ruhanga?" 
Romans11:3 Ati: Mukama baitsire baanabi baawe, basheenyire amatambiro gaawe; niinye ntsigaireho nyenka, kandi naanye nibenda kuunyita." 
Romans11:4 Beitu Ruhanga akamuagarukamu ata? Ati: Nyetsigariize abantu enkumi mushanu abatakatsimbiraga Baali maju. 
Romans11:5 Na mbwenu omu bunaku obu nikwo biri; hariho abantu bakye abatsigaireho abaatoorainwe embabazi. 
Romans11:6 Kwonka, ku biraabe biri ahabw'embabazi, tibikiri habw'emirimo; ahakuba ku kyakubaire kitari kityo, embabazi tizaakubaire mbabazi." 
Romans11:7 Mbwenu tugambe ki? Tuti: Abaisraeli tibaraboine ki baasherwire; kureka abatoorainwe nibo baakiboine; kwonka abandi bakagangaazibwa," 
Romans11:8 nk'oku kyahandiirwe ngu: Ruhanga akabaha omutima gw'okuhungira, n'amaisho ngu batareeba, n'amatu ngu batahurira n'okuhitsya eri izooba." 
Romans11:9 Kandi Daudi akagira ati: Emeeza yaabo ebahinduukire omutego n'orugogo, N'enkongi, n'eky'okubaihura." 
Romans11:10 Amaisho gaabo gashwekwe omwirima, ngu batahweza, Emigongo yaabo ogiinikye ebiro byona." 
Romans11:11 Nikyo ndikubuuriza nti: Bakateera entsibo, ngu bagwe? Ngaaha! Kureka ahabw'okucumura kwabo, okujunwa kwizire aha Banyamahanga kubaitsa eihari." 
Romans11:12 Mbwenu okucumura kwabo ku kuraabe kwatungiise ab'ensi zoona, kandi n'okuremwa kwabo kukatungisa Abanyamahanga, kaashwa okugarurwa kwabo!" 
Romans11:13 Kwonka ningambira imwe Abanyamahanga. Nk'oku ndi entumwa aha Banyamahanga, nimpimbisa obutumwa bwangye,"
