Philippians2:2 muhikiirize okushemererwa kwangye ahabw'okugira omutima gumwe omu kukundana, nimwikirizana n'omutima gumwe." 
Philippians2:3 Mutarikora ekintu kyona ahabw'okurwanira orubaju nari okwekuza, kureka omu bucureezi omuntu weena asiime mugyenzi we okukira oku arikwesiima." 
Philippians2:4 Omuntu weena omuriimwe arekye kweta aha bye wenka, kureka ayete n'aha by'abandi." 
Philippians2:5 Mugire omutima guri ogwabaire guri omuri Kristo Yesu. 
Philippians2:6 Ogwo, n'obu araabe yaabaire ari omu muringo gwa Ruhanga, tarateekateekire okwingana na Ruhanga ku kiri ekintu eki ahsmereire kugumya;" 
Philippians2:7 kureka akeeyihaho ekitiinisa, yaikiriza kuhinduka nk'omuhuuku, yaazaarwa omu muringo gw'abantu;" 
Philippians2:8 ku yaareebirwe ari omu muringo gw'omuntu, yaayecureeza, yaayoroba okuhika aha kufa, kandi okufa okw'aha musharaba." 
Philippians2:9 Nikyo Ruhanga yaamukuriize munonga, akamuha eiziina eririkukira amaziina goona," 
Philippians2:10 ngu boona abari omu iguru n'omu nsi n'okuzimu batsimbire amaju eiziina rya Yesu," 
Philippians2:11 kandi endimi zoona zaature ku Yesu Kristo ari Mukama, Ruhanga Tataitwe ahimbisibwe." 
Philippians2:12 N'ahabw'ekyo, abarikukundwa, nk'oku mwabaire mworoba obutoosha, na mbwenu mube nikwo mwahikiiriza okujunwa kwanyu mwine obwoba n'okutetema, t'obu ndiho bwonka, kureka okukira munonga n'obu ntariho;" 
Philippians2:13 ahakuba Ruhanga niwe akorera omuriimwe, akabaha okukunda ebi asiima n'okubikora." 
Philippians2:14 Mukore byona mutarikwetomboita, mutaine mpaka," 
Philippians2:15 mubone kuba abataine ky'okuhanwa nari oburyarya, muri abaana ba Ruhanga abataine kamogo, ahagati y'ab'obusingye obu obukiikami, oburikwehabagiza, abu mwakiramu nk'etabaaza omu nsi, nimworeka ekigambo ky'amagara," 
Philippians2:16 naanye ngire eki ndyehimbisizaho aha izooba rya Kristo, ku ntarairukiire busha, nari ku ntarakoreire busha." 
Philippians2:17 Kandi n'obu eshagama yangye yaakuba nk'empongano y'eby'okunywa eshukwa aha kitambo ky'okuheereza Ruhanga ky'okwikiriza kwanyu, nkaananuka, nshemererwa hamwe naimwe mwena." 
Philippians2:18 Kandi naimwe mukaananuka mutyo, mushemererwa hamwe naanye." 
Philippians2:19 Nyine amatsiko omuri Mukama waitu Yesu kubatumaho juba Timoseo, naanye nkaagarukwa omutima omunda, naamanya eby'owaanyu." 
Philippians2:20 Ahakuba tiinyine ondiijo nkawe, orita omutima munonga aha byanyu." 
Philippians2:21 Abandi boona nibasherura ebyabo bonka, ti bya Yesu Kristo;" 
Philippians2:22 kwonka omugasho gwa Timoseo nimugumanya; nk'oku omwana akorera ishe, nikwo yaakozire naanye omu kubuzya engiri." 
Philippians2:23 N'ahabw'ekyo ogwo niwe nyine amatsiko kwohereza ahonaaho, naaheza kureeba ebyangye oku byaba;" 
Philippians2:24 kandi niinyesiga Mukama ngu naanye niinyija kwija juba. 
Philippians2:25 Kandi nkateekateeka ku nshemereire kubatumaho Epafurodiito, mwene waitu, ou tukwataniise omurimo n'orugamba, kandi entumwa ei mwanyoherereize kumpwera omu bi ndikwetenga;" 
Philippians2:26 ahabw'okuba kabagirira orushusho mwena; kandi yaashaasha ahabw'okuba mukahurira ku yaabaire arwaire. 
Philippians2:27 Kandi n'ekya buzima akaba arwaire, ari haihi kufa. Kwonka Ruhanga akamugirira embabazi, kandi tiwe yaazigiriire wenka, naanye akazingirira, ngu obusaasi burekye kuntembekyeranaho." 
Philippians2:28 Nikyo nteereireho omutima kumubooherereza, ngu mushemererwe ahabw'okugaruka kumureeba, kandi naanye obusaasi bwangye butuube." 
Philippians2:29 N'ahabw'ekyo mumwakiire omuri Mukama n'okushemererwa kwingi; kandi abantu nk'abo mubahe ekitiinisa," 
Philippians2:30 ahakuba kaba ari haihi kufa ahabw'omurimo gwa Kristo, ayogire amagara ge, ngu abone kuhikiiriza eby'okumpwera kwanyu." 
Philippians3:1 Eky'aha muheru, B'eishe-emwe, mushemererwe omuri Mukama. Okugaruka kubahandiikira ebyo, ahabwangye tikirikundusya, kandi ahabwanyu nikibareetera obusingye." 
Philippians3:2 Mwerinde ezo mbwa, mwerinde ezo nkozi z'ebibi, mwerinde abo abafa okushara kwonka." 
Philippians3:3 Ahabw'okuba abashazirwe omu mazima niitwe, abaramya Ruhanga omu Mwoyo, abeehimbisiza omuri Kristo Yesu, kandi abateesiga mubiri;" 
Philippians3:4 nyowe n'obu ndaabe nyine ekirikuunyesigisa omubiri. Omuntu ondiijo ku yaakuteekateeka kwesiga omubiri, nkaaba nimmukira." 
Philippians3:5 Nkasharwa aha kiro kya munaana, ndi ow'omu ihanga rya Israeli, ow'omu ruganda rwa Benyamiini, Omuheburaayo enzaarwa, omu by'Ebiragiro ndi Omufarisaayo;" 
Philippians3:6 omu by'obweziriki nkahiiga ekanisa; omu kuhikiirira okw'okukwata Ebiragiro nkaba ntaine ki ndikugaywaho. 
Philippians3:7 Kwonka ebyo ebyabaire biri nk'enshaagi ahariinye, nkabibara nk'ebifiire ahabwa Kristo;" 
Philippians3:8 kandi buzima byona nimbibara nke'bifiire, ahabw'okuba okumanya Kristo Yesu Mukama wangye nikubikira munonga. Ahabw'Ogwo nkafeerwa byona, naabibara nk'eshaabo, ngu mbone kutunga Kristo," 
Philippians3:9 kandi ndeebwe ndi omuriwe, ntaine kuhikiirira okwengye ahabwangye okw'okuhitsya Ebiragiro, kureka okuri omu kwikiriza Kristo, nikwo kuhikiirira okuruga ahari Ruhanga ahabw'okwikiriza;" 
Philippians3:10 ngu mmumanye, kandi mmanye n'amaani ag'okuzooka kwe, nkwatanise nawe omu kubonabonesibwa kwe, nshushane nawe omu kufa kwe," 
Philippians3:11 naanye, ku kiribaasika, mbone kuhika aha kuzooka omu bafu." 
Philippians3:12 Tindikugira ngu mperize kukitunga, nari shi ngu mperize kuhikiirizibwa; kwonka ningumizamu, ngu naanye nkwate ekyo eki Kristo Yesu yankwatiire." 
Philippians3:13 B'eishe-emwe, tindikweteekateekaho ngu naaherize kukikwata; kureka eki ndikukora ni kimwe; niinyebwa eby'enyima, ninkununkirira eby'omumaisho," 
Philippians3:14 niinyezirika kuhika aharikuhakanirwa ngu mpeebwe ekihembo eky'okweta kwa Ruhanga omuri Kristo Yesu okw'okuba omu iguru. 
Philippians3:15 N'ahabw'ekyo itwe abahikiriire twena oku turikwingana, tuteekateekye tutyo; kandi ku muraateekateekye okundi aha kintu kyona, nakyo Ruhanga aryakibashuuruurira." 
Philippians3:16 Kwonka amazima agu tuhikiremu, tube nigo twagyenderamu." 
Philippians3:17 B'eishe-emwe, mukwatanise mutooreze emitwarize yangye, kandi mwetegyerereze ahari abo abarikugyenda batyo, nk'oku turi eky'okureeberaho ahariimwe." 
Philippians3:18 Ahakuba hariho baingi, abu naabagambiireho kaingi, na mbwenu ningaruka kubagambira nindira, nti, batuura bari abazigu b'omusharaba gwa Kristo;" 
Philippians3:19 emperu yaabo n'okuhwerekyerera, ruhanga waabo n'enda yaabo, nibeehimbisiza omu birikuhemura, emitima yaabo bagitaire aha by'ensi." 
Philippians3:20 Kwonka itwe owaitu n'omu iguru, ei tutegyereza Omujuni kuruga, Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo," 
Philippians3:21 orihindura emibiri yaitu emyeremwa kuba nk'omubiri gwe ogw'ekitiinisa n'amaani agamubaasisa kwegomoorera byona. 
Philippians4:1 N'ahabw'ekyo, B'eishe-emwe, kushemererwa kwangye kandi kirunga kyangye, abu nkunda nkagirira orushusho, mwemerere mutyo muhamire omri Mukama, abarikukundwa." 
Philippians4:2 Ninteisa Eodia, kandi ninteisa na Suntuke, ngu baikirizane omuri Mukama." 
Philippians4:3 Kandi naiwe, mugyenzi wangye ou tukwataniise buzima, ninkweshengyereza kuhwera abakazi abo; ahakuba bakakwatanisa naanye omu murimo gw'engiri, hamwe na Kelementi n'abandi bakozi bagyenzi bangye, abu amaziina gaabo gari omu kitabo ky'amagara." 
Philippians4:4 Mushemererwe obutoosha omuri Mukama; kandi ningaruka kugira nti: Mugume mushemererwe. 
Philippians4:5 Okworoberana kwanyu kumanywe abantu boona. Mukama waitu ari haihi. 
Philippians4:6 Muteemereza omutima aha kintu kyona, kureka omuri byona mumanyise Ruhanga ebi murikwetenga omu kushaba n'okweshengyereza, kandi musiime." 
Philippians4:7 Kandi obusingye bwa Ruhanga, oburengire okwetegyereza kw'omuntu weena, buryaguma burinde emitima yaanyu n'obwengye bwanyu omuri Kristo Yesu." 
Philippians4:8 Eky'aha muheru, B'eishe-emwe, byona eby'amazima, byona ebishemereire kuheebwa ekitiinisa, byona eby'oburyo, byona ebishemeire, byona ebirikushemeza, byona ebirikusiimwa, ku haraabe hariho oburungi, ku haraabe hariho ebishemereire kuhimbisibwa, mube nibyo mwateekateekaho." 
Philippians4:9 Ebi muunyegyeireho, ebi mwahairwe, ebi mwampuriireho, n'ebi mwandeebireho, mube nibyo mwakora; obwo nibwo Ruhanga mukama w'obusingye ariguma naimwe." 
Philippians4:10 Ninshemererwa munonga omuri Mukama, ahakuba mbwenu aha muheru gwa byona mugarukire kuunyijuka; kandi n'ekya buzima mukaba nimuunyijuka, kwonka mukabura omwanya." 
Philippians4:11 Ekyo tindikukigambisibwa kwetenga; ahakuba nkeega kumarwa omu muringo gwona ogu mba ndimu. 
Philippians4:12 Nimmanya okugarurwa ahansi, nimmanya n'okugira ebishaagire; omu kintu kyona n'omu miringo yoona nkeega oburyo bw'okumarwa, omu kwiguta n'omu njara, omu kugira ebishaagire kandi n'omu bworo." 
Philippians4:13 Nimbaasa kukora byona omuri Kristo ompa amaani. 
Philippians4:14 Kwonka mukakora gye kukwatanisa naanye omu busaasi bwangye. 
Philippians4:15 Kandi, imwe Abafilipi, nimumanya omu kutandika kw'engiri, obu naaruga Makedonia, tihariho kanisa eyaakwataniise naanye omu kigambo ky'okuha n'okuheebwa, kureka imwe mwenka." 
Philippians4:16 Ahakuba n'omuri Tesalonika mukantwekyera eby'okumpwera, kandi ti rimwe, ni kabiri." 
Philippians4:17 Ti kugira ngu ninkunda ebiconco, kureka niinyenda ngu ebyana byanyu byeyongyere, kandi bibabariwe." 
Philippians4:18 Ahabwangye nyine ebi ndikwetenga byona, nangwa n'okushaaga nibishaaga; mpaagire, ahabw'okuheebwa ebiconco ebi mwatwekire Epafurodito, ebyambeereire nk'omugaju, ekitambo ekiikirizibwa kandi ekirikusiimwa Ruhanga." 
Philippians4:19 Kandi Ruhanga wangye aryamara obukyene bwanyu bwona, nk'obutungi bw'ekitiinisa kye omuri Kristo Yesu oku buri." 
Philippians4:20 Ruhanga waitu Tataitwe aheebwe ekitiinisa ebiro n'ebiro. Amiina. 
Philippians4:21 Muramutsye orikwera weena omuri Kristo Yesu. Ab'eishe-emwe abari kunu baabaramutsya. 
Philippians4:22 Abarikwera boona, okukira munonga ab'omu kikaari kya Kaisaari, baabaramutsya." 
Philippians4:23 Embabazi za Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo zigume n'emyoyo yaanyu. 
Colossians1:1 Nyowe Paulo, entumwa ya Kristo Yesu, nk'oku Ruhanga yaakunzire, na Timoseo ow'eishe-emwe," 
Colossians1:2 twabahandiikira, imwe abarikwera n'ab'eishe-emwe abarikwesigwa omuri Kristo abari omuri Kolosai. Nitubendeza embabazi n'obusingye ebirikuruga ahari Ruhanga Tataitwe." 
Colossians1:3 Obutoosha ku tuba nitubashabira, tusiima Ruhanga, Ishe wa Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo," 
Colossians1:4 ahabw'okuhurira eby'okwiriza kwanyu oku murikwikiriza Kristo Yesu, n'okukunda oku mwine aha barikwera boona," 
Colossians1:5 n'ahabw'ebi mubiikiirwe omu iguru ebi mwineho amatsiko. Amatsiko ago mukagahuriraho ira omu kigambo ky'amazima g'engiri," 
Colossians1:6 eyaizire omuriimwe, nk'oku yaahikire omu nsi zoona, ekaana ebyana, ekeeyongyera, nk'oku kiri omuriimwe okuruga aha kiro eki mwahuririireho embabazi za Ruhanga, mukazeetegyereza omu mazima," 
Colossians1:7 n'oku mwayegyesiibwe Epafufa, omuhuuku mugyenzi waitu orikukundwa. N'omuheereza omwesigwa wa Kristo ahabwaitu," 
Colossians1:8 kandi niwe yaatugambiire okukunda kwanyu oku mwine omu Mwoyo. 
Colossians1:9 N'ahabw'ekyo naitwe, okuruga aha kiro eki twakihuririireho, titukarekaga kubashabira, nitweshengyereza ngu mwijuzibwe okumanya ebi akunda omu bwengye bwona obw'omwoyo n'okwetegyereza," 
Colossians1:10 mugyende nk'oku aba Mukama bashemereire, nimumushemeza omuri byona, nimwana ebyana omu mirimo yoona emirungi, kandi nimweyongyera omu kumanya Ruhanga." 
Colossians1:11 Mugumibwe n'obushoboorozi bwona, nk'amaani g'ekitiinisa kye oku gari, mubone kugumisiriza omuri byona n'okutaruha, mwine okushmererwa," 
Colossians1:12 nimusiima Isheboona, owaatuhindwire abashemereire kubagana n'abarikwera omugabo gw'obuhunguzi omu mushana." 
Colossians1:13 Niwe yaatwihire omu butegyeki bw'omwirima, akatutaasya omu bukama bw'Omwana we ou akunda," 
Colossians1:14 ou twatungiiremu okucungurwa, nikwo kusaasirwa ebibi byaitu." 
Colossians1:15 Yesu ogwo niwe kishushani kya Ruhanga otarikureebwa, omujigaijo omu byahangirwe byona;" 
Colossians1:16 ahakuba omuri Ogwo nimwo ebintu byona byahangiirwe, eby'omu iguru n'eby'ahansi, ebirikureebwa n'ebitarikureebwa, yaaba bitebe by'obugabe, nari obukama, nari obutegyeki, nari obushoboorozi byona niwe yaabihangire, kandi byahangwa kuba ebye." 
Colossians1:17 Niwe yaabandiize ebintu byona, kandi omuriwe byona nimwo biteeranira." 
Colossians1:18 Niwe Mutwe gw'omubiri, niyo kanisa; niwe butandikiro, niwe mujigaijo gw'okuruga omu bafu, ngu abone kuba ow'okubanza omuri byona." 
Colossians1:19 Ahakuba Ruhanga akasiima ngu obwaruhanga bwe bwona bube omuriwe," 
Colossians1:20 kandi ku yaaherize kureeta obusingye ahabw'eshagama ya Yesu aha musharaba, yaasiima ngu omuriwe ayegarurire byona, yaaba by'ahansi nari eby'omu iguru." 
Colossians1:21 Naimwe abaabaire bataanisiibwe ira na Ruhanga, kandi abazigu omu biteekateeko byanyu nimukora ebibi," 
Colossians1:22 mbwenu Yesu abagarukaniise na Ruhanga omu mubiri gwe ogw'obuntu ahabw'okufa kwe, ngu abone kubamurika omu maisho ga Ruhanga, muri abarikwera abataine kamogo, kandi abatarikugaywa," 
Colossians1:23 mwaba mugumire omu kiwikiriza, mwombekirwe gye muhamire, mutarikutengyetsibwa, mutarikwihwa omu matsiko g'engiri, ei mwahuriire, kandi eyaagambiirwe ebihangirwe byona eby'ahansi y'eiguru, ei nyowe Paulo naagizirwe omuheereza waayo." 
Colossians1:24 Mbwenu ninshemerererwa omu kubonabonesibwa kwangye ahabwanyu, kandi ebyatsigaire aha by'okubonabonesibwa kwa Kristo nibyo ndikuhikiiriza ahabw'omubiri gwe, niyo kanisa;" 
Colossians1:25 ei naagizirwe omuheereza waayo, nk'obukuru obu Ruhanga yampaire ahabwanyu oku buri, okumanyisiza kimwe ekigambo kya Ruhanga," 
Colossians1:26 niyo naama eyaasherekirwe okwiha ira ryona n'obusingye bwona, kwonka hati emanyirwe abarikwera be." 
Colossians1:27 nibo Ruhanga yaasiimire kumanyisa obutungi bw'ekitiinisa ky'enaama egi oku eri omu Banyamahanga; enaama egyo ni Kristo okuba omuriimwe, niwe matsiko g'ekitiinisa." 
Colossians1:28 Ogwo niwe tugamba, nituhana omuntu weena omu bwengye bwona, ngu tumurikye omuntu weena akihire omuri Kristo." 
Colossians1:29 Kandi nikyo nyezirikira kukora, nindwana nk'obushoboorozi bwe oku buri, oburikunkoresa n'amaani." 
Colossians2:1 Ahakuba niinyenda ku mumanya oku ndikubarwanirira munonga imwe n'aba Laodikea, n'abandi boona abatakandeebaga," 
Colossians2:2 ngu emitima yaabo egumibwe, nk'oku barikuteerana hamwe omuri rukundo, baheebwe obutungi bw'okwetegyereza n'okumanyira kimwe enaama ya Ruhanga; n'enaama egyo niwe Kristo;" 
Colossians2:3 kandi omuri Ogwo nimwo obutungi bwona obw'obwengye n'okumanya busherekirwe. 
Colossians2:4 Eki ninkigamba ngu hatagira omuntu owaabahabya n'ebigambo by'okubabeihabeiha; 
Colossians2:5 ahakuba, n'obu ndaabe ntari naimwe omu mubiri, kwonka ndi naimwe omu mwoyo, ninshemerererwa kureeba obuteeka bwanyu oburungi n'okuhama kw'okwikiriza kwanyu omuri Kristo." 
Colossians2:6 N'ahabw'ekyo, nk'oku mwayakiire Kristo Yesu Mukama, mube nikwo mwagyendera mutyo omuriwe," 
Colossians2:7 mutsimbire emizi omuriwe, mwombekirwe omuriwe, kandi muhamiibwe omu kwikiriza, nk'oku mwayegyesiibwe, kandi muhingurane omu kusiima." 
Colossians2:8 Mwerinde, hatagira omuntu owaabanyagisa obwengye bw'abantu n'oburyarya obutaine mugasho, omu kukuratira emigyenzo y'abantu, n'okukuratira eby'okubanza eby'omu nsi egi, okutakuratira Kristo." 
Colossians2:9 Ahakuba omuriwe harimu Obwaruhanga bwona obureeberwa omu mubiri gwe; 
Colossians2:10 kandi naimwe mwine amagara agahikire omuriwe, niwe Mutwe gw'obutegyeki bwona n'obushoboorozi bwona." 
Colossians2:11 Kandi omuriwe mukasharwa okusharwa okutari kw'abantu, obu mwajuura omubiri gw'obuntu omu kusharwa kwa Kristo;" 
Colossians2:12 kandi mukaziikwa nawe omu kubatizibwa, oku mwazookyeiremu nawe ahabw'okwikiriza okukora kwa Ruhanga owaamuzoire omu bafu." 
Colossians2:13 Naimwe, abaabaire bafeereire omu by'okushiisha byanyu n'omu kutasharwa kw'emibiri yaanyu, Ruhanga kabahindura abahuriire hamwe nawe, ku yaaherize kutusaasira eby'okushiisha byaitu byona," 
Colossians2:14 yaaragaza ebihandiikirwe aha rupapura, ebyabaire nibitwomesereza nibiturega, yaarwihaho, yaarubamba aha musharaba;" 
Colossians2:15 kandi ku yaaherize kujuura eby'obutegyeki n'obushoboorozi, yaabihemura butunu, yaabisinguza ogwo musharaba." 
Colossians2:16 N'ahabw'ekyo hatarigira omuntu owaabacwera orubanja ahabw'eby'okurya nari eby'okunywa, nari eby'obugyenyi, nari eby'okuboneka kw'okwezi, nari sabato." 
Colossians2:17 Ebyo n'ekishushani ky'ebiriija, kwonka amazima gaabyo gari omuri Kristo." 
Colossians2:18 Hatarigira owaanyaga ebihembo byanyu ahabw'okubendeza okwecwendeeka nk'okwe n'okuramya baamaraika, ayegamiire ebi ayorekirwe, naayehimbisiza aha bwengye bwe bw'obuntu obutaine mugasho;" 
Colossians2:19 haza atahamiire ha Mutwe, omu omubiri gwona guriisibwa, gukahamibwa hamwe emitsi y'engingo zaagwo, kandi gukakura omu kukura okurikuruga ahari Ruhanga." 
Colossians2:20 Ku muraabe mwafiire na Kristo, mukareka eby'okubanza eby'omu nsi egi, ahabw'enki nimworobera emigyenzo nk'abakiri ab'ensi," 
Colossians2:21 ngu, Otarikwataho, Otarirozaho, Otarikoraho;" 
Colossians2:22 (haza ebyo byona n'ebihwaho byaheza kuriibwa), mukakurata ebyaragiirwe abantu n'enyegyesa yaabo?" 
Colossians2:23 N'amazima, ebyo nibishusha nk'eby'obwengye ahabw'okukundisa abantu emigyenzo y'ediini ei beegunziire, n'okwecwendeeka, n'okwesaasa omubiri; kwonka tibiine mugasho na kakye kuzibira okwetenga kw'omubiri." 
Colossians3:1 Mbwenu nu ku muraabe mwazoirwe na Kristo, musherure ebiri omu iguru, ei Kristo atuura, ashutami aha rubaju rwa buryo rwa Ruhanga." 
Colossians3:2 Mute omutima aha by'omu iguru, murekye eby'omu nsi;" 
Colossians3:3 ahakuba mukafa, kandi amagara gaanyu gasherekirwe na Kristo omuri Ruhanga." 
Colossians3:4 Kristo amagara gaitu ku ariboneka, naimwe muryareebwa muri hamwe nawe omu kitiinisa." 
Colossians3:5 N'ahabw'ekyo mwite eby'ensi ebiri omu ngingo zaanyu, obushambani, ebihagaro, okurigira okubi, okwetenga okubi, kandi n'okwetenga, nikwo kuramya ebishushani." 
Colossians3:6 Ebyo nibyo bireeta ekiniga kya Ruhanga aha batarikuhurira," 
Colossians3:7 kandi naimwe mukaba mubigyenderamu, obu mwabaire mukibirimu." 
Colossians3:8 Kwonka hati mbwenu murekye n'ebi byona, okuguubwa kubi, ekiniga, eitima, n'okujumiirana, kandi omu kanwa kaanyu hatarirugamu ebigambo ebirikwitsa enshoni." 
Colossians3:9 Mutaribeihana, ahakuba mukajuura omuntu owa ira n'emitwarize ye," 
Colossians3:10 mwajwara omuntu omusya, ohindurwa musya obutoosha omu bwengye kushushanisibwa n'Owamuhangire." 
Colossians3:11 Aho tihariho Mugiriika n'obuyaakuba n'Omuyudaaya, oshazirwe n'otashazirwe, omunyamahanga, n'Omusikuusi, omuhuuku n'ow'obusingye, kureka Kristo ni byona, kandi ari omuri boona." 
Colossians3:12 N'ahabw'ekyo nk'oku muri abaatoorainwe Ruhanga, abarikwera kandi abarikukundwa, mujware omutima gw'esaasi, embabazi, okutwaza gye, obucureezi, n'okugumisiriza," 
Colossians3:13 nimugumisiririzana; kandi ku haraabe hariho oine eki arikufa na mugyenzi we, musaasirane; nk'oku Mukama yaabasaasiire, mube nikwo mwatwaza." 
Colossians3:14 Kandi okwongyera ahari ebyo byona mujware okukunda, nikwo kukomerana byona bikakwatanisiza kimwe." 
Colossians3:15 Kandi obusingye bwa Kristo obu mwayeteirwe nk'engingo z'omubiri gumwe, butegyekye omu mitima yaanyu. Kandi mube abarikusiima." 
Colossians3:16 Ekigambo kya Kristo kigume omuriimwe kikanye, mwegyesane, muhanane omu bwengye burungi bwona, nimweshongorera Ruhanga zaaburi n'ebyeshongoro n'eibyevugo by'Omwoyo, nimumuhimbisa omu mitima yaanyu." 
Colossians3:17 Kandi eki muraagambe kyona, n'eki muraakore kyona, byona mubikore omu iziina rya Mukama waitu Yesu, nimusiima Ruhanga Isheboona omuriwe." 
Colossians3:18 Imwe abakazi, mworobere baabaroimwe nk'oku kishemereire omuri Mukama." 
Colossians3:19 Imwe abashaija, mukunde abakazi baanyu, murekye kubaitsa omwaga." 
Colossians3:20 Imwe abaana, mworobere abazaire baanyu omuri byona; ahakuba ekyo nikyo kishemeza Mukama." 
Colossians3:21 Imwe baishebo, mutagwisa kubi abaana baanyu, barekye kuhahaara emitima." 
Colossians3:22 Imwe abahuuku, omuri byona mworobere bakama baanyu ab'omu nsi, mutabakorera ahabw'okureebwa nk'abarikwenda kusiimwa abantu, kureka mubakorere n'omutima ogutaine buryarya, nimutiina Mukama." 
Colossians3:23 Kyona eki muraakore, mukikore mwihere aha mutima, nk'abarikukorera Mukama, kunu ti bantu;" 
Colossians3:24 nimumanya ngu Mukama niwe aribaha obuhunguzi, nibyo bihembo byanyu; ahakuba nimukorera Mukama waitu Kristo;" 
Colossians3:25 ahakuba orikukora kubi aryaihurwa ahabw'ekibi eki yaakozire; kandi Mukama tashoroora mu bantu. 
Colossians4:1 Imwe abakama, muhe abahuuku baanyu ebihikire n'ebishemereire emirimo yaabo, nimumanya ngu naimwe mwine Mukama waanyu omu iguru." 
Colossians4:2 Mwezirikire okushaba; omu kushaba kwanyu mugume nimureeba hamwe n'okusiima; 
Colossians4:3 kandi naitwe mutushabire Ruhanga atwigurire orwigi, tubone kugamba ekigambo ky'okumanyisa enaama ya Kristo, eki mboheirwe," 
Colossians4:4 nkimanyise nk'oku nshemereire kugamba. 
Colossians4:5 Ab'aheeru mubagyendemu n'obwengye, murekye kufiisa busha omwanya." 
Colossians4:6 Ebigambo byanyu bigume biri eby'embabazi, nk'ebirimu omwonyo, mubone kumanya oku mushemereire kugarukamu omuntu weena." 
Colossians4:7 Ebyangye byona muryabigambirwa Tukiko, ow'eishe-emwe orikukundwa, omuheereza orikwesigwa, kandi mugyenzi wangye omu murimo gwa Mukama." 
Colossians4:8 Eki naamubatumiraho n'okubamanyisa oku turi, kandi ngu agumye emitima yaanyu;" 
Colossians4:9 naamutuma na Onesimo, ow'eishe-emwe omwesigwa orikukundwa, kandi mwene waanyu. Baryabateekyerereza byona ebiri kunu." 
Colossians4:10 Aristariiko ou mbohirwe nawe yaabaramutysa, na Mako mwihwa wa Barunaba, (ou mwaragiirwe, ngu ku ariija, mumwakiire);" 
Colossians4:11 na Yesu orikwetwa Yusto yaabaramutsya. Omu bakozi bagyenzi bangye abu nkora nabo omurimo gw'obukama bwa Ruhanga, abo nibo bonka abaarugire omu bashazirwe, kandi bakampuumuza." 
Colossians4:12 Epafura, mwene waanyu, yaabaramutsya; nawe n'omuhuuku wa Kristo Yesu, oyezirika obutoosha kubaijuka omu kushaba kwe, ngu mugume muri abahikire, kandi abarikumanyira kimwe byona ebi Ruhanga akunda." 
Colossians4:13 Ahakuba nimmuhamya ku akozire omurimo muhango munonga ahabwanyu n'ahabw'aba Laodikea, n'aba Hierapooli." 
Colossians4:14 Luka omufumu orikukundwa na Deema baabaramutsya. 
Colossians4:15 Mundamukize ab'eishe-emwe ab'omuri Laodikea, kandi muramutsye na Numfa n'ekanisa y'omu nju ye." 
Colossians4:16 Ebaruha egi ku eriheza kubashomerwa, eshomerwe n'omu kanisa eya Laodikea, kandi naimwe mushome egyo eriruga Laodikea." 
Colossians4:17 Mugambire Arakipo muti: Oyezirikye ohitsye obuheereza obu waahairwe omuri Mukama. 
Colossians4:18 Nyowe Paulo naahandiika okuramutsya oku n'omukono gwangye. Mwijukye ku ndi omu kihome. Embabazi zigume naimwe. 
1Thessalonians1:1 Paulo na Siluwaano na Timoseo twabahandiikira imwe ab'ekanisa y'aba Tesalonika, abari omuri Ruhanga Isheboona na Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo; nitubendeza embabazi n'obusingye." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Ebiro byona tusiima Ruhanga ahabwanyu mwena, nitugamba aha maziina gaanyu omu kushaba kwaitu," 
1Thessalonians1:3 nitwijuka obutoosha omu maisho ga Ruhanga Tataitwe emirimo yaanyu erikuruga omu kwikiriza, n'okukora okurikuruga omu kukunda, n'okugumisiriza okurikuruga omu matsiko agu mwine omuri Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo." 
1Thessalonians1:4 B'eishe-emwe abarikukundwa Ruhanga, nitumanya ku yaabatooraine," 
1Thessalonians1:5 ahakuba engiri yaitu terabaiziire mu bigambo byonka, kureka omu maani n'omu Mwoyo Orikwera n'omu kwikiririza kimwe mutarikubanganisa. Naimwe nimumanya oku twabaire turi omuriimwe ahabw'okubahwera;" 
1Thessalonians1:6 kandi obu mwayakiira ekigambo omu busaasi bwingi mwine okushemererwa okurikuruga omu Mwoyo Orikwera, mukatooreza emitwarize yaitu n'eya Mukama;" 
1Thessalonians1:7 n'ahabw'ekyo mukahinduka eky'okureeberaho aha barikwikiriza boona ab'omuri Makedonia na Akaya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Ahakuba ekigambo kya Mukama nimwo kyarugire nikigambwa, ti muri Makedonia na Akaya zonka, kureka hoonahoona okwikiriza Ruhanga kwanyu kurangainwe; n'ahabw'ekyo titwine kindi eki tushemereire kubigambaho." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Ahakuba nabo bonka nibagamba ebyaitu, oku mwatwakiire, n'oku mwarekire ebishushani ebirikuramibwa, mukahindukira Ruhanga, okuheereza Ruhanga ogwo ohuriire, ow'amazima," 
1Thessalonians1:10 n'okutegyereza Omwana we kuruga omu iguru, ou yaazoire omu bafu, Yesu otujuna ekiniga ekirikwenda kwija." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Ahakuba naimwe, B'eishe-emwe, nimumanya ngu okubataayaayira kwaitu tikurabaire kwa busha;" 
1Thessalonians2:2 kwonka, n'obu turaabe twabonabonesiibwe tukahemangurwa munonga omuri Filipi, nk'oku murikumanya, tukagira obumanzi omuri Ruhanga waitu kubabuurira engiri ye omu kuhakanisibwa kwingi." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Mumanye ngu okubuurira kwaitu ti kw'okuhabya, ti kw'ebihagaro, kandi tikurimu bugobya;" 
1Thessalonians2:4 kureka, nk'oku twasiimirwe Ruhanga kukwatsibwa engiri, nikwo tugamba, ti habw'okushemeza bantu, kureka okushemeza Ruhanga ocaaka emitima yaitu." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Nimumanya ngu titukakoresaga bigambo by'okushunga, n'obu byakuba eby'okushwekyerera okwetenga okubi, Ruhanga niwe kareebi;" 
1Thessalonians2:6 kandi titukendaga bantu kutuha ekitiinisa, yaaba imwe, nari abandi, n'obu turaabe twabaire tushemereire kubarusya nk'entumwa za Kristo." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Kwonka tukatwaza gye omuriimwe, nk'oku omurezi arera abaana be." 
1Thessalonians2:8 N'ahabw'ekyo, ahabw'okubasaasibwa munonga, tukashemerererwa okubaha, ti ngiri ya Ruhanga yonka, kureka n'okuhayo amagara gaitu, ahabw'okuba mukahinduka abaitu ab'aha mara." 
1Thessalonians2:9 B'eshe-emwe, nimwijuka okukora kwaitu n'okufa kubi kwaitu; tukaba tukora nyomushana na nyekiro, ngu tutagira ou twarusya omuriimwe, nitubabuurira engiri ya Ruhanga." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Imwe muri baakareebi, hamwe na Ruhanga, abarikuhamya emitwarize yaitu ahariimwe abarikwikiriza, ku yaabaire eri erikwera, ey'okuhikiirira, kandi etarikugaywa;" 
1Thessalonians2:11 ahakuba nimumanya oku twabaire twehnangiriza omuntu weena omuriimwe nitubagumya, kandi nitubaragiira, nk'oku omushaija ahana abaana be," 
1Thessalonians2:12 ngu mutwaze nk'oku kishemereire aba Ruhanga orikubeeta kutaaha omu bukama bwe n'ekitinisa kye. 
1Thessalonians2:13 Kandi hoona eki tusiimira Ruhanga obutoosha n'eki; ahakuba, ku mwahuriire ekigambo ky'engiri ya Ruhanga eki twabagambiire, mwakyakiira; kandi timwakyakiira nk'ekigambo ky'abantu, kureka nk'ekigambo kya Ruhanga ekirikukora omuriimwe abarikwikiriza; kandi omu mazima nikwo kiri." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Kandi, B'eishe-emwe, mukakuratira amakanisa ga Ruhanga aga Buyudaaya agari omuri Kristo Yesu; ahakuba ebi mwabonabonesiibwe beene waanyu bikashusha nk'ebi ab'ago makanisa baabonabonesiibwe Abayudaaya," 
1Thessalonians2:15 abaitsire Mukama waitu Yesu na baanabi, naitwe bakatubinga, bakagwisa kubi Ruhanga, bakaba abazigu b'abantu boona," 
1Thessalonians2:16 nibatuzibira kubuurira Abanyamahanga eby'okujunwa, ngu babone kuhikiiriza batyo obutoosha orugyero rw'ebibi byabo. Kwonka ekiniga kya Ruhanga kiizire kubamariraho kimwe." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Kwonka itwe, B'eishe-emwe, ku twabaihirweho okumara omwanya mukye, omu mubiri ti mu mutima, twayeyongyera munonga kugira orushusho rw'okwenda kureebana naimwe;" 
1Thessalonians2:18 ahakuba tukamariirira kwija owaanyu, nangwa nyowe Paulo nkenda kwija, ti rimwe ni kabiri; kwonka Sitaane yaatuzibira." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Mbwenu amatsiko gaitu niki, nari okushemererwa kwaitu nari ekirunga kyaitu eky'okwesiimiraho? Tiimwe, omu maisho ga Mukama waitu Yesu ku ariija?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Ahakuba niimwe kitiinisa kyaitu n'okushemererwa kwaitu. 
1Thessalonians3:1 N'ahabw'ekyo, ku twaremirwe kugumisiriza, twasiima kutsigara twenka omuri Aseene," 
1Thessalonians3:2 twatuma ow'eishe-emwe Timoseo, omuheereza wa Ruhanga omu ngiri ya Kristo, kubagumya n'okubeezirikisa omu kwikiriza kwanyu," 
1Thessalonians3:3 ngu hatagira owaashoberwa ahabw'okubonabonesibwa okwo. Naimwe ahabwanyu nimumanya ku nikyo twateereirweho. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Ahakuba tukabamanyisa kare tukiri owaanyu, ku turi ab'okubonabonesibwa; kandi nikwo kyabaire, nk'oku murikumanya." 
1Thessalonians3:5 N'ahabw'ekyo, ku naaremirwe kugumisiriza, naabatumaho kumanya okwikiriza kwanyu oku kuri, twine obwoba, ngu shana obundi omutegi akaaba yaabategire, naitwe okukora kwaitu kufa busha." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Kwonka mbwenu Timoseo ku aizire naaruga okwo, yaatureetera amakuru marungi ag'okwikiriza kwanyu n'okukunda kwanyu, kandi ngu nimutwijuka obutoosha n'embabazi, mutwiniire orushusho, nkaitwe oku turubainiire." 
1Thessalonians3:7 N'ahabw'ekyo, B'eishe-emwe, tuhuumwire ahabwanyu omu kushoberwa n'omu kubonabona kwaitu ahabw'okwikiriza kwanyu;" 
1Thessalonians3:8 mbwenu hati turiyo gye, ahabw'okuba mwemereire muhamiire omuri Mukama." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Ni kusiima ki oku turaabasiimire Ruhanga ahabw'okushemererwa kwona oku twine ahabwanyu omu maisho ga Ruhanga waitu," 
1Thessalonians3:10 tukashaba n'obweziriki nyomushana na nyekiro, ngu tureebane, kandi tuhikiirize ekibuzire omu kwikiriza kwanyu?" 
1Thessalonians3:11 Mbwenu Ruhanga Tataitwe ahabwe na Mukama waitu Yesu atuhe oburyo bw'okwija owaanyu; 
1Thessalonians3:12 Mukama abongyere kandi abakanyisize okukunda oku murikukundana, kandi oku murikukunda abantu boona, nk'oku turikubakunda imwe," 
1Thessalonians3:13 abone kuhamya emitima yaanyu, eshangwe etaine ki erikugaywa omu kwera omu maisho ga Ruhanga Tataitwe aha kiro ky'okwija kwa Mukama waitu Yesu n'abarikwera be boona." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Eky'aha muheru, B'eishe-emwe, nitubeeshengyereza omuri Mukama waitu Yesu, kandi nitubeehanangiriza ngu, nk'oku mwayegire ahariitwe oku mushemereire kutwaza n'okushemeza Ruhanga, kandi nk'oku murikukora hati, mugume mweyongyere mutyo n'okukiraho." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Ahakuba nimumanya ebiragiro ebi twbahaire omu iziina rya Mukama waitu Yesu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Mumanye ngu eki nikyo Ruhanga arikubendeza, okwezibwa, mukeerinda obushambani," 
1Thessalonians4:4 omuntu weena omuriimwe amanye kutegyeka omubiri gwe omu kwera n'omu kitiinisa," 
1Thessalonians4:5 ti mu mururu gw'okurigira okubi nk'abanyamahanga abatarikumanya Ruhanga," 
1Thessalonians4:6 omuntu weena arekye kushiisha akashaagiza mugyenzi we omu kigambo ekyo, ahakuba Mukama niwe muhoozi w'enzigu ow'ebyo byona, nk'oku twabaire twabahabwire nitubahamiiriza." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Ahakuba Ruhanga taratweteire kukora bihagaro, kureka akatwetera okuba abarikwera." 
1Thessalonians4:8 N'ahabw'ekyo omuntu orikugaya ebyo, naaba atagayire muntu kureka Ruhanga obaha Omwoyo we Orikwera." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Kwonka ebirikukwata aha kukundana kw'ab'eishe-emwe, timuri b'okubihandiikirwa; ahabw'okuba imwe ahabwanyu mukeegyesibwa Ruhanga okukundana;" 
1Thessalonians4:10 kandi buzima nimukunda ab'eishe-emwe boona ab'omuri Makedonia yoona. Kwonka nitubeehanangiriza, B'eishe-emwe, mugume mweyongyere kukundana," 
1Thessalonians4:11 mwezirikire okucureera, mukore emirimo yaanyu, kandi mukorese emikono yaanyu, nk'oku twabaragiire," 
1Thessalonians4:12 mugire emicwe mirungi aha b'aheeru, kandi murekye kutungwa eby'abandi." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Kwonka, B'eishe-emwe, titwakwenzire ngu mutamanya eby'abo abagwejegyeire, murekye kuganya nk'abandi abataine matsiko." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Ahakuba ku turaabe nitwikiriza ngu Yesu akafa yaazooka, n'abaagwejegyereire omuri Yesu nikwo Ruhanga aribareeta atyo hamwe nawe." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Kandi nitubagambira eki, tukigambiirwe Mukama waitu, ngu itwe abahuriire abarishangwa bakiriho aha kiro ky'okwija kwa Mukama, tituribandiza abo abaagwejegyeire." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Ahakuba Mukama aryayeimukira ashuume naaruga omu iguru agambe munonga n'eiraka rya maraika omukuru n'enzamba ya Ruhanga; kandi abaafeereire omuri Kristo nibo baribanza kuzooka; 
1Thessalonians4:17 bwanyima naitwe abahuriire abariba bakiriho turyatwarwa nabo omu bicu kubugana Mukama waitu omu kaabunga; tutyo tugume na Mukama ebiro byona. 
1Thessalonians4:18 N'ahabw'ekyo muhuumurizane n'ebigambo ebyo. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Kwonka aha by'ebiro n'obunaku, B'eishe-emwe, timuri b'okuhandiikirwa;" 
1Thessalonians5:2 ahabw'okuba imwe ahabwanyu nimumanya gye ngu ekiro kya Mukama kiryaija nk'omushuma wa nyekiro. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Ku bariba nibagira ngu, n'obusingye, tihariho kabi, obwo nibwo okucwekyerera kuribagwaho, nk'oku ebisha bikwata omukazi orikurumwa kuzaara, kandi tibarikira na kakye." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Kwonka imwe, B'eishe-emwe, timuri omu mwirima, ekiro ekyo kubagwaho nk'omushuma;" 
1Thessalonians5:5 ahabw'okuba imwe mwena muri abaana b'omushana, kandi abaana ba nyomushana; itwe tituri ba nyekiro n'obu baakuba ab'omwirima." 
1Thessalonians5:6 N'ahabw'ekyo turekye kugwejegyera nk'abandi; kureka tugume nitureeba, tutasina;" 
1Thessalonians5:7 ahakuba abagwejegyera bagwejegyera nyekiro, n'abasinda basinda nyekiro;" 
1Thessalonians5:8 kwonka itwe, nk'oku turi aba nyomushana, twerinde ebirikusinza, tujware okwikiriza na rukundo nk'eky'okwekingiza omu kufuba, kandi n'amatsiko g'okujunwa nk'enkofiira." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Mumanye ngu Ruhanga taratuteereireho kiniga kureka okutunga okujunwa ahabwa Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo," 
1Thessalonians5:10 owaatufeereire ngu tugume nawe, yaaba tuhuriire nari tugwejegyeire." 
1Thessalonians5:11 N'ahabw'ekyo mugumyane, kandi mwombekane, nk'oku murikukora." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Kwonka, nitubeeshengyereza, B'eishe-emwe, ku mumanya abo abarikubakoramu, abarikubategyeka omuri Mukama, bakabahabura," 
1Thessalonians5:13 mubahe ekitiinisa munonga omuri rukundo ahabw'omurimo gwabo. Mugume mwine obusingye, omuntu na mugyenzi we." 
1Thessalonians5:14 Ahabw'okuba nitubeeshengyereza, B'eishe-emwe, muteise entahurira, mugumye abahahaire emitima, muramire abataine maani, mugumisiririze boona." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Mwerinde hatagira omuntu weena omuriimwe owaihura ondiijo ekibi ahabw'kibi, kureka obutoosha mwezirikire okukorerana gye, n'okukorera gye abandi boona." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Mugume mushemererwe ebiro byona," 
1Thessalonians5:17 mushabe obutoosha," 
1Thessalonians5:18 kandi omuri byona musiime; ahakuba nikyo Ruhanga arikubendeza omuri Kristo Yesu. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Mutaraaza Omwoyo; 
1Thessalonians5:20 mutagaya ebya baanabi; 
1Thessalonians5:21 mugyeze byona; muhamire aha kirungi; 
1Thessalonians5:22 mwetantare kyona ekirikushusha ekibi. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Ruhanga mukama w'obusingye we wenka abeereza kimwe; kandi emyoyo yaanyu n'amagara gaanyu n'emibiri yaanyu birindwe gye, bishangwe bitaine ki birikuhanwa aha kiro ky'okwija kwa Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Ogwo orikubeeta n'omwesigwa, kandi n'okukora niwe arikikora." 
1Thessalonians5:25 B'eishe-emwe, mutushabire." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Muramutsye ab'eishe-emwe boona n'okunywegyera okurikwera. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Nimbarahiza Mukama mushomere ab'eishe-emwe boona ebaruha egi. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Embabazi za Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo zigume naimwe. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Paulo na Siluwaano na Timoseo twabahandiikira imwe ab'ekanisa y'Abatesalonika abari omuri Ruhanga Isheboona na Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo; 
2Thessalonians1:2 nitubendeza embabazi n'obusingye ebirikuruga ahari Ruhanga Tataitwe na Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Kitushemereire kusiima Ruhanga obutoosha, ahabwanyu, B'eishe-emwe, nk'oku kishemereire, ahabw'okuba okwikiriza kwanyu nikweyongyera munonga, kandi n'okukunda kwa buri omwe omuriimwe oku murikukundana ni kwingi buzima." 
2Thessalonians1:4 N'ahabw'ekyo naitwe nitwehimbisa ahabwanyu omu makanisa ga Ruhanga, nitusiima okugumisiriza kwanyu n'okwikiriza kwanyu omu kuhiigwa n'omu kubonabona ebi mwemeire;" 
2Thessalonians1:5 (ebyo nibyoreka ku Ruhanga acwa emanja z'oburyo,) ngu mubone kuteekateekwa kuba abashemereire obukama bwa Ruhanga, obu murikubonabonera;" 
2Thessalonians1:6 ahabw'okuba Ruhanga naateekateeka ngu kihikire okwihura obusaasi abarikubasaasa," 
2Thessalonians1:7 n'okuha imwe abarikushaasha okuhuumura naitwe, Mukama waitu Yesu ku arishuuruurwa naaruga omu iguru na baamaraika be ab'amaani," 
2Thessalonians1:8 ari omu muriro ogurikwaka, okuhoora enzigu abatarikumanya Ruhanga n'abarikwanga kworobera engiri ya Mukama waitu Yesu." 
2Thessalonians1:9 Abo baryaheebwa ekifubiro eky'okuhwerekyerera okw'ebiro n'ebiro, babingwe omu maisho ga Mukama n'omu kitiinisa ky'obushoboorozi bwe," 
2Thessalonians1:10 ku ariija aha izooba eryo kuhimbisibwa omu barikwera be, n'okutangaarirwa ahabw'abaamwikiriize boona, ahakuba obujurizi bwaitu obu twabahaire bukaikirizibwa." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Nikyo tubashabirira obutoosha, ngu Ruhanga waitu abaikirize okuba abashemereire okweta kwe, kandi ahikiirize n'amaani ge ebirungi byona ebi murikwetenga n'emirimo y'okwikiriza," 
2Thessalonians1:12 eiziina rya Mukama waitu Yesu ribone kuhimbisibwa omuriimwe, naimwe omuriwe, nk'embabazi za Ruhanga waitu na Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo oku ziri." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Ebirkukwata aha by'ikwija kwa Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo n'okuteerana kwaitu okumubugana, nitubeeshengyereza, B'eishe-emwe," 
2Thessalonians2:2 mutarahuka kuhahaaza emitima mukabura obwengye, mutajagarazibwa yaaba mwoyo nari ekigambo nari ebaruha, ei barikugira ngu ekahandiikwa itwe, ebirikuranga ngu ekiro kya Mukama kiiriire haihi." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Hatagira omuntu owaababeihabeiha omu muringo gwona; ahakuba ekiro ekyo tikiriija, hatakabandize kubaho okutaana na Ruhanga, omuntu ogwo omugomi akashuuruurwa, niwe mwana w'okuhwerekyerera," 
2Thessalonians2:4 kandi omuzigu oyetunguura, akarwanisa ekintu kyona ekyetwa Ruhanga nari ekiramibwa, akashutama omuri hekalu ya Ruhanga, naayeyeta Ruhanga." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Timurikwijuka ku naabagambiire ebyo, nkiri owaanyu?" 
2Thessalonians2:6 Kandi nimumanya ekirikumuzibira hati n'eki, ngu arekye kushuuruurwa obunaku bwe butakahikire." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Ahakuba enaama y'obugomi na mbwenu etandikire kukora; kwonka orikuzibira hati naija kugumizamu okuhitsya obu ariihwaho. 
2Thessalonians2:8 Obwo, omugomi ogwo aryashuuruurwa, kandi Mukama waitu Yesu araymwitsa orwoya rw'omu kanwa ke, amuhwerekyereze n'okumurinkana kw'ekitiinisa ky'okwija kwe." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Omugomi ogwo oriija ahabw'amaani ga Sitaane, aryaija n'obushoboorozi bwona, n'obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza by'ebishuba," 
2Thessalonians2:10 n'obugobya bwona obubi obw'okuhabya ab'okuhwerekyerera, ahabw'okuba bakanga kukunda amazima ngu bajumwe." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Nikyo Ruhanga arikubooherereza ekirikuhabya eky'amaani kubaikiririsa eby'ebishuba," 
2Thessalonians2:12 ngu boona abatarikiriize mazima, bakashemerererwa okutahikiirira, basingwe orubanja." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Kwonka kitushemereire kusiima Ruhanga obutoosha ahabwanyu, B'eishe-emwe abarikukundwa Mukama, ahakuba Ruhanga akabatooranira okujunwa iranaira ahabw'okwezibwa Omwoyo n'okwikiriza amazima." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Nikyo yaabeeteire n'engiri yaitu, ngu mutungye ekitiinisa kya Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo." 
2Thessalonians2:15 N'ahabw'ekyo, B'eishe-emwe, mwemerere muhamire, mugumye emitwarize ei twabeegyeise, yaaba mu bigambo, nari omu baruha zaitu." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Kandi Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo na Ruhanga Tataitwe, owaatukunzire akatuha okuhuumura okutahwaho n'amatsiko marungi ahabw'embabazi ze," 
2Thessalonians2:17 ahuumuze emitima yaanyu, agigumye gye omu mirimo yoona emirungi n'ebigambo byona ebirungi." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Eky'aha muheru, B'eishe-emwe, mutushabire, ekigambo kya Mukama kirahukye kubuga, nikiheebwa ekitiinisa, nk'oku kyabaire omuriimwe," 
2Thessalonians3:2 kandi naitwe tukire abantu babi abahabire; ahakuba abaine okwikiriza ti boona. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Kwonka Mukama waitu n'ow'okwesigwa; aryabagumya, kandi abarinde Omubi." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Kandi hoona twine obwesigye omuri Mukama ahabwanyu, ngu nimukora ebi turikubaragiira, kandi nimwija kugumizamu nimubikora." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Mukama waitu atebeekanise emitima yaanyu omu kukunda kwa Ruhanga n'omu kugumisiriza kwa Kristo. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Mbwenu nitubaragiira, B'eishe-emwe, omu iziina rya Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo, mwetantare ow'eishe-emwe weena omweremwa, otarikukuratira mitwarize ei mwatwegireho." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Ahakuba naimwe ahabwanyu nimumanya oku mushemereire kutooreza emitwarize yaitu; obu twabaire turi owaanyu, tituragyendeire mu bweremwa," 
2Thessalonians3:8 titurariiriire busha by'okurya by'omuntu weena, kureka tukaba tukora munonga twecurenga nyomushana na nyekiro, ngu tutagira ou twarusya omuriimwe;" 
2Thessalonians3:9 ti habw'okugira ngu tukaba tutashemereire kubikorerwa, kwonka tukenda ngu tube eky'okureeberaho, mubone kutooreza emitwarize yaitu." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Nangwa n'obu twabaire tukiri owaanyu, tukabaragiira tuti: Omuntu weena ku araabe atarikwenda kukora, arekye n'okurya." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Ahakuba tuhuriire ngu omuriimwe harimu abeeremwa abatarikukora na kakye, kureka okwetaasya omu by'abandi." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Abantu nk'abo nitubaragiira, kandi nitubeehanangiriza omuri Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo kukora emirimo yaabo batuurize, babone kugira eby'okubatunga." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Kwonka imwe, B'eishe-emwe, murekye kuruha omu kikora gye." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Omuntu weena otarikuhurira eki turikugamba omu baruha egi, mumumanye, mutakwatanisa nawe, abone kukwatwa enshoni." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Kwonka mutamuteekateekaho nk'omuzigu, kureka mumuhabure nk'ow'eishe-emwe." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Kandi Mukama w'obusingye we wenka agume abahe obusingye ebiro byona n'omu miringo yoona. Mukama agume naimwe mwena. 
2Thessalonians3:17 Nyowe Paulo, naahandiika endamutsyo egi n'omukono gwangye nyenka. Niko kamanyiso omu baruha yangye yoona; okwo nikwo mpandiika." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Embabazi za Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo zigume naimwe mwena. 
1Timothy1:1 Nyowe Paulo, entumwa ya Kristo Yesu ahabw'okuragiirwa Ruhanga Omujuni waitu, na Kristo Yesu amatsiko gaitu," 
1Timothy1:2 naakuhandiikira, Timoseo omwana wangye buzima omu kwikiriza; ninkwendeza embabazi n'okusaasirwa n'obusingye ebirikuruga ahari Ruhanga Isheboona na Kristo Yesu Mukama waitu." 
1Timothy1:3 Ku naabaire ninza Makedonia, nkatsiga naakwehanangiriza ku oguma Efeso, ngu obone kuhana abantu bamwe barekye kwegyesa endiijo nyegyesa," 
1Timothy1:4 n'okuhugira aha nfumu z'ebigunjano, n'okutondoora obukomooko bwa baishenkurubo obutaine bugarukiro, ebirikuzaarukwamu empaka, bitarikugasira murimo gwa Ruhanga oguri omu kwikiriza;" 
1Timothy1:5 haza ekigyendererwa omu kwegyesa kwaitu n'okukunda okurikuruga aha mutima ogushemeire n'omwoyo ogutarikweshinja n'okwikiriza okutarimu buryarya. 
1Timothy1:6 Hariho abantu bamwe abateishukire ebyo, bakahabira omu mpaka ezitaine mugasho," 
1Timothy1:7 nibenda kuba abeegyesa b'Ebiragiro, haza batarikwetegyereza ki barikugamba, n'obu byakuba ebi barikuhamya." 
1Timothy1:8 Kwonka itwe nitumanya ngu Ebiragiro ni birungi, omuntu yaaba naabikoresa nk'oku bishemereire," 
1Timothy1:9 naashoborokyerwa ngu Ebiragiro tibiratairweho habw'abahikiriire, kureka ahabw'abagomi n'abatarikuhurira, ahabw'abatatiina Ruhanga n'abasiisi, ahabw'abatarikwera n'abateeta ha bya Ruhanga, ahabw'abaita baishebo na baanyinabo, n'abaitsi b'abandi," 
1Timothy1:10 n'abashambani, n'abashaija abakorana eby'enshoni, n'abanyaga abantu bakabatunda, n'ababeihi, n'abarahira ebishuba, n'ebindi byona ebirikurwanisa enyegyesa ehikire," 
1Timothy1:11 erikukuratira engiri y'ekitiinisa eya Ruhanga orikusiimwa, ei naakwatsiibwe." 
1Timothy1:12 Ninsiima Kristo Yesu Mukama waitu owampaire amaani, ahabw'okuba akanteekateekaho kuba omwesigwa, yampa omurimo gw'okumuheereza," 
1Timothy1:13 n'obu ndaabe obunyakare naamurogotsireho, nkamujuma, ndi omuntu enshaarizi; kwonka nkasaasirwa ahabw'okubikorera omu butamanya n'omu butaikiriza;" 
1Timothy1:14 kandi embabazi za Mukama waitu zikaba nyingi munonga hariinye hamwe n'okwikiriza n'okukunda okuri omuri Kristo Yesu. 
1Timothy1:15 Ekigambo eki n'eky'okwesigwa, kishemereire kwikiririzibwa kimwe, ngu Kristo Yesu akaija omu nsi kujuna abasiisi; kandi omuri abo niinye w'okubanza;" 
1Timothy1:16 kwonka eki naasaasiriirwe, Yesu Kristo akenda kworekyera omuriinye, omusiisi w'okubanza, eky'okureeberaho ahari abo abarimwikiriza kutunga amagara agatahwaho." 
1Timothy1:17 Mukama otahwaho, otafa, otareebwa, Ruhanga Nyamuhanga, aheebwe ekitiinisa, ahimbisibwe ebiro n'ebiro. Amiina." 
1Timothy1:18 Omurimo ogwo naagukukwatsa, Timoseo mwana wangye, nk'ebi baanabi baabire bakugambireho, ngu bikwezirikise kurwana okurwana okurungi," 
1Timothy1:19 noohamya okwikiriza n'omutima murungi ogutarikweshinja, ogu abamwe baanagire hare, bakasiisikarirwa okwikiriza kwabo nk'obwato oku bufeera omu nyanja." 
1Timothy1:20 Omuri abo ni Humenaayo na Alegizanda, abu naarekyeire Sitaane, ngu bakaayega okutarogota." 
1Timothy2:1 Eky'okubanza, nimbeehanangiriza kushabira abantu boona, n'okubeeshengyerereza, n'okubatonganira, n'okubasiimira Ruhanga;" 
1Timothy2:2 mushabire abagabe n'abategyeki boona tubone kugira obusingye tutebeekane, nitutiina Ruhanga kandi nitwerinda omu buryo bwona." 
1Timothy2:3 Eki nikyo kirungi kandi ekishemeire omu maisho ga Ruhanga Omujuni waitu," 
1Timothy2:4 oyenda ngu abantu boona bajunwe, bamanyire kimwe amazima;" 
1Timothy2:5 ahakuba hariho Ruhanga omwe, kandi n'Omuteerani omwe owa Ruhanga n'abantu, ogwo muntu ni Kristo Yesu," 
1Timothy2:6 owaayehaireyo kuba ow'okucungura abantu boona. Ebyo bikahamibwa omu bunaku bwabyo; 
1Timothy2:7 nyowe nkateebwaho kuba omubuurizi waabyo kandi entumwa, (ningamba amazima, tindikubeiha), n'omwegyesa w'Abanyahanga kubeegyesa okwikiriza n'amazima." 
1Timothy2:8 N'ahabw'ekyo niinyenda ngu abashaija babe nibo baashaba omu myanya yoona, nibaimutsya emikono erikwera bataine kiniga nari empaka." 
1Timothy2:9 Kandi abakazi bo bagume beecume, bajware ebijwaro ebibashemereire, baine obucureezi n'okwerinda, barekye kutisba eishokye, n'obu kwakuba okujwara ezaabu nari eruuru nari ebijwaro by'obuguzi bwingi," 
1Timothy2:10 kureka bakore emirimo miringu eshemereire abakazi abeeyeta abarikutiina Ruhanga. 
1Timothy2:11 Omukazi agume ayegye ahunami omu kworoba kwona. 
1Timothy2:12 Ahakuba tindikwikiriza mukazi kubuurira nari kutegyeka abashaija; kureka agume ahunami. 
1Timothy2:13 Ahakuba Adamu niwe yaabandize kuhangwa, haakurataho Haawa;" 
1Timothy2:14 kandi Adamu tiwe yaabeihabeihirwe, kureka omukazi niwe yaabeihabeihirwe, akahinduka omusiisi." 
1Timothy2:15 Kwonka omukazi ku ariguma omu kwikiriza, omu kukunda, omu kwera, hamwe n'omu kwerinda, aryaguma atabaarukye gye omu kuzaara abaana." 
1Timothy3:1 Ekigambo eki n'eky'amazima. Omuntu ku ayenda omurimo gw'omureeberezi, aba akunzire omurimo murungi." 
1Timothy3:2 Mumanye ngu omureeberezi ashemereire kutagira ki arikugaywaho, omushaija oine omukazi omwe, omwerinzi, omunyabwengye, omukwata mpora, orikukunira abagyenyi, orikurahukirwa kwegyesa," 
1Timothy3:3 otarikusinda, otarikurwana, kureka orikutwaza gye, otarikutongana, otarikukunda mpiiha," 
1Timothy3:4 orikutegyeka gye eka ye, ou abaana be barikworobera bakamuha ekitiinisa omu miringo yoona;" 
1Timothy3:5 (omuntu otarikumanya kutegyeka ab'omu ka ye, naabaasa ata kutegyeka ekanisa ya Ruhanga?)" 
1Timothy3:6 tashemereire kuba Mukristaayo musya, obundi atakaayetunguura, akagwa, akacwerwa orubanja nk'oru Sitaane yaacwereirwe;" 
1Timothy3:7 kandi ashemereire kuba orikusiimwa ab'aheeru, arekye kujumwa n'okugwa omu mutego gwa Sitaane." 
1Timothy3:8 Kandi abadiikoni nabo bashemereire kuba abeerinzi abatarikugambira habiri, abatarikunywa viinyo nyingi, abatarikwetenga nshaagi," 
1Timothy3:9 abarikurinda enaama y'okwikiriza, abaine omutima ogutarikweshinja." 
1Timothy3:10 Kandi abo babanze bagyezibwe; ku baraashangwe bataine ki barikugaywaho, babone kukora omurimo gw'obudiikoni." 
1Timothy3:11 Abadiikoni nabo bashemereire kuba abeerinzi, abatarikubeiherera bandi, abatarikukunda birikusinza, kandi abeesigwa omuri byona." 
1Timothy3:12 Abadiikoni babe abashaija abaine omukazi omwe, abarikutegyeka gye abaana baabo n'abamaka gaabo;" 
1Timothy3:13 ahakuba abaheereza gye omu murimo gw'obudiikono beetungira eiziina rirungi n'obumanzi bwingi omu kwikiriza okuri omuri Kristo Yesu. 
1Timothy3:14 Nyine amatsiko g'okwija okwo juba; kwonka naakuhandiikira ebyo," 
1Timothy3:15 ngu, ku ndiba ntarahukire kwija, omanye oku abantu bashemereire kutwaza omu nju ya Ruhanga, niyo kanisa ya Ruhanga ohuriire, enyomyo kandi obuhamizo bw'amazima." 
1Timothy3:16 Kandi tihariho kubanganisa, enaama y'ediini yaitu ku eri nkuru buzima, erikugira eti: Akoorekwa aine omubiri, yaahamibwa Omwoyo, yaareebwa baamaraika, yaabuurirwa omu mahanga, yaikirizibwa ab'omu nsi, yaatwarwa omu iguru kutaaha omu kitiinisa." 
1Timothy4:1 Kwonka Omwoyo naagamba butunu ati: Omu biro ebya bwanyima bamwe baryareka okwikiriza ahabw'okuhurira emyoyo erikuhabya n'okwegyesa kwa baadaimoni," 
1Timothy4:2 bahabisibwe oburyarya bw'abantu abarikubeiha ebishuba, abaine emitima etakihuriira, nk'esiriiziibwe ekyoma ekirukwotsya," 
1Timothy4:3 abaziza okushwera, kandi eby'okurya ebi Ruhanga yaahangiire abarikwikiriza bakamanya amazima ngu babyakiire n'okusiima." 
1Timothy4:4 Ahakuba eki Ruhanga yaahangire kyona ni kirungi; kandi tihariho kirikuzira, ku kiba kyakiirwe n'okusiima;" 
1Timothy4:5 ahakuba nikiba kyeziibwe ekigambo kya Ruhanga n'okushaba. 
1Timothy4:6 Ku orishobororera ab'eishe-emwe ebigambo ebyo, oryaguma ori omuheereza murungi wa Kristo Yesu, orikutungwa ebigambo by'okwikiriza n'eby'enyegyesa nungi ei waakuratiire." 
1Timothy4:7 Ebiteekyerezo by'ebigunjano eby'abakaikuru, ebitari bya Ruhanga, otaribiikiriza. Yemanyiize okutiina Ruhanga;" 
1Timothy4:8 ahakuba okwemanyiiza eby'omubiri nikugasha kakye, kwonka okwemanyiiza okutiina Ruhanga nikugasha omu muringo gwona, ahakuba kwine eki kuturaganisa aha magara g'ebiro ebi n'ag'ebiro ebiriija." 
1Timothy4:9 Ekigambo ekyo n'eky'okwesigwa, kandi kishemereire kwikiririzibwa kimwe." 
1Timothy4:10 Nikyo tufeera kubi, kandi nikyo twezirikira, ahakuba twesiga Ruhanga ohuriire, Omujuni w'abantu boona, na buzima ow'abarikwikiriza." 
1Timothy4:11 Ebyo obiragiire kandi obyegyese. 
1Timothy4:12 Hatagira owaagaya obutsigazi bwawe, kureka obe eky'okureeberaho aha barikwikiriza omu kugamba n'omu mitwarize, omu kukunda, omu kwikiriza n'omu kugira omutima ogushemeire." 
1Timothy4:13 Oyezirikye kushomera abantu Ebyahandiikirwe, n'okubuurira, n'okwegyesa, okuhitsya obu ndiija." 
1Timothy4:14 Otarireka kukoresa ekiconco eki oine, eki waahairwe ahabw'ebi waagambirweho baanabi, obu abakuru baakutaho engaro." 
1Timothy4:15 Ebyo obyezirikire, obe nibyo waataho omutima, boona bareebe oku orikweyongyera kugyenda omumaisho." 
1Timothy4:16 Oyerinde iwe wenka, kandi n'omu bi orikwegyesa. Ogumizemu n'ebyo; ahakuba omu kukora otyo, noija kwejuna, kandi ojune n'abarikukuhurira." 
1Timothy5:1 Otariteisa omushaija mukuru n'amaani, kureka omuhuguure nka sho; abatsigazi obatwaze nka barumuna baawe," 
1Timothy5:2 abakazi bakuru nka nyoko, abakazi bato n'abaishiki nka banyaanyoko, obaineho omutima ogushemeire." 
1Timothy5:3 Abafaakazi enshoberwa buzima obahe ekitiinisa. 
1Timothy5:4 Omufaakazi, ku araabe aine abaana nari abaijukuru, babanze beegye kworeka okutiina Ruhanga kwabo omu bi barikukorera ab'omu maka gaabo, nibaihura ebi abazaire baabo baabakoreire, ahabw'okuba ekyo nikyo kishemeire omu maisho ga Ruhanga." 
1Timothy5:5 Omufaakazi enshoberwa ata amatsiko ahari Ruhanga, aguma naashaba naayeshengyereza nyomushana na nyekiro;" 
1Timothy5:6 kwonka oyehayo kweshemeza, aba afiire n'obu aba ahuriire." 
1Timothy5:7 Obaragiire otyo, barekye kugira eki barikugaywaho." 
1Timothy5:8 Kwonka omuntu weena, otarikuhwera banyabuzaare, n'okukira munonga ab'omu ka ye, biri ayehakaine okwikiriza, kandi naaba ari mubi okukira otarikwikiriza." 
1Timothy5:9 Hatarigira omufaakazi owaabarirwa omu b'okuhwerwa atakahikize myaka makumi mukaaga ey'obukuru, kandi ashemereire kuba omukazi owaashweirwe omushaija omwe," 
1Timothy5:10 kandi orikusiimwa ahabw'emirimo mirungi, owaakurize gye abaana be, owaabaire akunira abagyenyi, akanaabisa ebigyere by'abarikwera, akahwera abarikushaasha, kandi owaayehaireyo kukora ebirungi omu muringo gwona." 
1Timothy5:11 Kwonka abafaakazi abakiri bato otariikiriza kubataasya omu mutwe gw'abafaakzi, ahakuba ku barema kwerinda n'okworobera Kristo, benda kushwerwa;" 
1Timothy5:12 batyo basingwa orubanja, ahabw'okwita endagaano yaabo ey'okubanza." 
1Timothy5:13 N'ekindi beega obweremwa, basiiba nibabungeera omu maka; kandi ti bweremwa bwonka, kureka baba ab'okubuzya orukuru, beetaasya omu bitari byabo, nibagamba ebitabashemereire." 
1Timothy5:14 N'ahabw'ekyo ninkunda ngu abafaakazi abakiri bato bashwerwe, bazaare abaana, bombekye amaka gaabo, barekye kuha abazigu obwiho bw'okutujuma." 
1Timothy5:15 Ahakuba na hati hariho bamwe abahabire bakakuratira Sitaane. 
1Timothy5:16 Omukazi weena orikwikiriza ku araabe aine abafaakazi abanyabuzaare, abe niwe yaabahwera, barekye kurusya ekanisa, ebone kuhwera abafaakazi enshoberwa." 
1Timothy5:17 Abakuru abarikutegyeka gye bateekateekweho kuba abashemereire kuheebwa ekitiinisa kingi okukira abandi, na buzima abarikukora omurimo gw'okubuurira n'okwegyesa;" 
1Timothy5:18 ahabw'okuba Ebyahandiikirwe biragiira biti: Otariboha akanwa k'ente erikujunga engano. Kandi biti: Omukozi ashemereire ebihembo bye. 
1Timothy5:19 Otariikiriza ekirego kyona aha mukuru, kureka kyahamibwe baamushinja babiri nari bashatu." 
1Timothy5:20 Abo abakozire ekibi ogume obateisize omu maisho ga boona, n'abandi babone kutiina." 
1Timothy5:21 Ninkwehanangiriza omu maisho ga Ruhanga na Kristo Yesu na baamaraika abaatoorainwe, oyerinde ebyo biragiro, okutagira rubaju ru waagwera, n'obu kwakuba okukorera omuntu weena ekintu ahabw'obuganzi." 
1Timothy5:22 Otarirahukiriza kuta engaro aha muntu weena, n'obu kwakuba okukwatanisa n'abandi omu bibi; oyerinde ogume ori oshemeire." 
1Timothy5:23 Okuruga hati otarinywa amaizi gonka; kureka onywe viinyo nkye ahabw'enda yaawe, n'ahabw'okurwararwara kwawwe." 
1Timothy5:24 Ebibi by'abantu abamwe nibireebwa butunu, biri eby'okureeta orubanja; kwonka eby'abandi bireebwa bwanyima." 
1Timothy5:25 Okwo nikwo n'emirimo mirungi ereebwa butunu; kwonka n'obu biba bitari bityo, tibibaasa kuguma bisherekirwe." 
1Timothy6:1 Abahuuku boona abarikutegyekwa bamanye bakama baabo ku bashemereire kuheebwa ekitiinisa, buzima, eiziina rya Ruhanga n'enyegyesa yaitu birekye kujumwa." 
1Timothy6:2 Abaine bakama baabo abarikwikiriza bataribagaya ngu niho bari ab'eishe-emwe; kureka bakizeho okubakorera gye, ahabw'okuba abaine omugisha gw'okuheerezibwa okwo n'abantu abarikwikiriza kandi abarikukundwa. Ebyo guma obyegyese kandi obyehanangirize abantu." 
1Timothy6:3 Omuntu weena oyegyesa okundi, akahakanisa ebigambo by'amazima ebya Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo n'enyegyesa erikwikirizana n'okutiina Ruhanga," 
1Timothy6:4 aba ayekurize, kandi ataine ki arikumanya; arwaire endwara y'empaka n'okuhakana aha bigambo, ezriugwamu eihari n'okutongana n'okugambuurana n'okurengyerera," 
1Timothy6:5 n'empaka z'abantu abasiisikaire obwengye, abaihiirweho amazima, nibateekateeka ngu okutiina Ruhanga n'oburyo bw'okutunga enshaagi." 
1Timothy6:6 Haza kunu okutiina Ruhanga, okurimu okumarwa, kurimu enshaagi nyingi;" 
1Timothy6:7 ahakuba titurareetsire kintu mu nsi, kandi titurikubaasa kwihamu kintu;" 
1Timothy6:8 ku turaabe twine eby'okurya n'eby'okujwara, ebyo bigume bitumare." 
1Timothy6:9 Kwonka abeetenga kuba abatungi bagwa omu kwohibwa n'omu mutego n'omu kwetenga kwingi kw'obushema okurikushiisha, kukaroha abantu omu kuconcoboza n'okuhwerekyerera." 
1Timothy6:10 Ahakuba okwetenga empiiha n'omuzi gw'ebibi byona; hariho bamwe abaagiriire ebyo omururu, bakahaba, bakaruga omu kwikiriza, bakeecumitira kimwe n'enaku nyingi." 
1Timothy6:11 Kwonka iwe omuntu wa Ruhanga, oyetantare ebyo; okuratire okuhikiirira n'okutiina Ruhanga, okwikiriza, okukunda, okugumisiriza, n'obucureezi." 
1Timothy6:12 Rwana okurwana okurungi okw'okwikiriza, ohamize kimwe amagara agatahwaho, agu waayeteirwe, obu waagamba butunu okuhamya okurungi omu maisho ga baakareebi baingi." 
1Timothy6:13 Ninkwehanangiriza omu maisho ga Ruhanga oha ebintu byona amagara, na Kristo Yesu, owaahamize okuhamya okurungi omu maisho ga Pontio Pilaato," 
1Timothy6:14 oyorobere ekiragiro otaine kamogo, kandi otaine ki orikugaywaho okuhitsya aha kworekwa kwa Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo," 
1Timothy6:15 okuryorekwa omu bunaku bwakwo, Omutegyeki ogwo orikusiimwa omwe wenka, Omugabe w'abagabe, Omukama w'abakama," 
1Timothy6:16 niwe wenka oine okutafa, otuura omu mushana ogutahikwaho, otakareebwaga muntu weena, kandi otabaasa kureebwa. Ekitiinisa n'obutegyeki obutahwaho bibe ebye. Amiina." 
1Timothy6:17 Ebirikukwata aha batungi b'ensi egi, obeehanangirize barekye kwemanya, nari kwegamiza amatsiko gaabo aha butungi obutarikwesigwa, kureka bagagire ahari Ruhanga, otuha byona atarikubariirira, ngu tubishemerererwe." 
1Timothy6:18 Kandi bakore ebirungi, babe abatungi omu micwe mirungi, babe efura omu kugaba, bagire omutima gw'okukwatanisa n'abandi;" 
1Timothy6:19 batyo beebiikire obutungi obu baryegamira omu biro ebiriija, babone kutunga amagara aga buzima." 
1Timothy6:20 Nyabura 'we Timoseo, rinda eki waakwatsiibwe, oyetantare ebigambo by'okuregyeta eby'okutatiina Ruhanga, n'empaka z'ebigambo by'ebi beeta obwengye, haza butari bwo;" 
1Timothy6:21 ahakuba bamwe ahabw'okwegira ngu babwine, bakahaba baaruga omu kwikiriza. Embabazi zigume naimwe. Amiina." 
2Timothy1:1 Paulo, entumwa ya Kriso Yesu, nk'oku Ruhanga yaayenzire, eyaatumirwe kugamba eby'amagara agaraganisiibwe omuri Kristo Yesu," 
2Timothy1:2 naakuhandiikira, Timoseo omwana wangye orikukundwa; ninkwendeza embabazi n'okusaasirwa n'obusingye ebirikuruga ahari Ruhanga Isheboona, na Kristo Yesu Mukama waitu." 
2Timothy1:3 Nsiima Ruhanga ou mpeereza n'omutima ogutarikweshinja, nk'oku baatatenkuru baakozire, ku mba ninkwijuka obutoosha omu kushaba kwangye nyomushana na nyekiro." 
2Timothy1:4 Ku nyijuka okurira kwawe, ngira orushusho kukureeba ngu nyijure okushemererwa." 
2Timothy1:5 Biinyijutsya okwikiriza kwawe okutarimu buryarya, okwabandize kuba omuri nyokwenkuru Loisi, na nyoko Yunike, na hati nimpamya ngu kuri n'omuriiwe." 
2Timothy1:6 Nikyo ndikukwijukiza kwenegyeza ekiconco kya Ruhanga ekiri omuriiwe, eki waahairwe ahabw'okuteebwaho engaro zangye;" 
2Timothy1:7 ahakuba Ruhanga taratuhaire mutima gw'obwoba, kureka omutima ogw'amaani n'okukunda n'okwerinda." 
2Timothy1:8 N'ahabw'ekyo otarikwatwa enshoni z'okuhamya ebya Mukama waitu, nari okuzigira ahabwangye embohe ye; kureka okwatanise naanye omu kubonabonesibwa ahabw'engiri omu maani ga Ruhanga," 
2Timothy1:9 owaatujunire akatwetesa okweta okurikwera, ti habw'emirimo yaitu, kureka ahabw'eki yaagyendereire, n'ahabw'embabazi ezi yaatuhaire ira ryona omuri Kristo Yesu;" 
2Timothy1:10 kandi hati ebyo abyorekyeire omu kwija kw'omujuni waitu Kristo Yesu, owaahindwire okufa akakucwa busha, akooreka amagara n'okutafa omu mushana gw'engiri." 
2Timothy1:11 Engiri egyo niyo naateereirweho kuba omubuurizi waayo, n'okuba entumwa kandi omwegyesa;" 
2Timothy1:12 kandi ahabwayo ninshaasha, nk'oku ndikushaasha hati; kwonka tindikwitwa nshoni; ahabw'okuba nimmanya ou naikiriize, kandi nimpamiza kimwe ngu naabaasa kurinda meki yankwatsize okuhitsya aha kiro ekyo." 
2Timothy1:13 Eky'okureeberaho ky'ebigambo by'amazima ebi waahuriire ningamba, okikuratire omu kwikiriza n'okukunda ebiri omuri Kristo Yesu;" 
2Timothy1:14 orinde ekyo kirungi eki waakwatsiibwe Omwoyo Orikwera otuura omuriitwe. 
2Timothy1:15 Noomanya ku ab'omuri Asia boona bampemukireho; abamwe ahari abo ni Figelo na Herumogene. 
2Timothy1:16 Mukama agirire embabazi ab'omuka ya Onesifooro, ahabw'okuba kaingi akaba angarura omutima omunda; kandi taraitsirwe nshoni ahabw'enjegyere zangye." 
2Timothy1:17 Ku yaahikire Rooma, yaataho omutima kunsherura, yambona." 
2Timothy1:18 Mukama amuhe okusaasirwa omu maisho ge aha kiro ekyo. Kandi noomanya gye ebi yankoreire byona omuri Efeso. 
2Timothy2:1 Mbwenu nu, mwana wangye, guma ori ow'amaani omu mbabazi eziri omuri Kristo Yesu;" 
2Timothy2:2 kandi ebi waahuriire ningamba omu maisho ga baakareebi baingi, obikwatse abantu abarikwesigwa, abaribaasa kubyegyesa abandi." 
2Timothy2:3 Okwatanise naanye omu kwemera obusaasi nk'omuserukare murungi owa Kristo Yesu. 
2Timothy2:4 Tihariho muserukare oza kurwana, akeetaasya omu mirabanamu ey'amagara aga, ngu asiimwe owaamuhandiikiire obuserukare." 
2Timothy2:5 Kandi omuzaani orikuhakana omu mpaka taheebwa kirunga kureka yaazaana nk'ebiragiro by'okuzaana oku biri. 
2Timothy2:6 Omuntu empingi niwe ashemereire kuba ow'okubanza omu kutogyera ebi ahingire. 
2Timothy2:7 Ta omutima aha bi ndikugamba; ahakuba Mukama naija kukuha okushoborokyerwa byona. 
2Timothy2:8 Guma oijukye Yesu Kristo owaazookire omu bafu, mwijukuru wa Daudi, nk'engiri ei naahairwe oku egamba;" 
2Timothy2:9 niyo ngiri ei barikumbonaboneseza, kandi ei mboheirwe nk'enkozi y'bibi. Kwonka ekigambo kya Ruhanga kyo tikibohirwe." 
2Timothy2:10 N'ahabw'ekyo ningumisiririza byona ahabw'abatoorainwe, ngu nabo batungye okujunwa n'ekitiinisa ekitahwaho ebiri omuri Kristo Yesu." 
2Timothy2:11 Ekigambo eki n'eky'okwesigwa ngu, Ku turaabe twafiire hamwe nawe, turyaba abahuriire hamwe nawe;" 
2Timothy2:12 Ku turigumisiriza, turyayema tutegyekye nawe; Ku turimwehakana, nawe aryatwehakana;" 
2Timothy2:13 N'obu tutamwesiga, We aguma ari omwesigwa, Ahakuba We tabaasa kuhinduka." 
2Timothy2:14 Ebyo ogume obibaijutsye, noobeehanangiriza omu maisho ga Mukama kwetantara okuhakana aha bigambo okutaine mugasho, kureka okurikugwisa abarikukuhurira." 
2Timothy2:15 Oyezirikye kweyoreka ahari Ruhanga nk'orikusiimwa, omukozi otashemereire kukwatwa nshoni, orikushoboorora gye ekigambo ky'amazima." 
2Timothy2:16 Oyetantare okuregyeta okutarimu kutiina Ruhanga, ahakuba nikwongyera kureetera abantu kutamutiina;" 
2Timothy2:17 kandi ebigambo byabo biryarima nk'ekishebe ekirikutana. Omuri abo ni Himenaayo na Fileeto," 
2Timothy2:18 abaateishukire amazima, nibahamya ngu okuzooka kukaheza kuhwaho, bakajuumikirira kimwe okwikiriza kw'abamwe." 
2Timothy2:19 Kwonka omusingi gwa Ruhanga oguhamire guriho, gwine akamanyiso aka ngu, Mukama naamanya abe; kandi ngu, Omuntu weena orikugamba eiziina rya Mukama arugye omu bubi." 
2Timothy2:20 Omuri nyaruju tihabamu bintu by'ezaabu n'efeeza byonka, kureka n'eby'ebiti n'eby'eibumba; ebimwe bikoresibwa emirimo y'ekitiinisa, ebindi erikugaywa." 
2Timothy2:21 Omuntu weena ku arikweshemeza yaatetaanisa n'ebyo, aryaba orwabya rw'okukoresa omurimo gw'ekitiinisa, orweziibwe, orutebeekanisiibwe ahabw'omurimo gwona omurungi." 
2Timothy2:22 N'ahabw'ekyo oyetantare okwetenga okubi kw'obutsigazi, okuratire okuhikiirira, okwikiriza, okukunda n'obusingye hamwe na boona abatakira Mukama n'omutima ogushemeire." 
2Timothy2:23 Kwonka empaka z'obushema ezitaine buryo ozeetantare, noomanya ku zizaarukwamu okutongana." 
2Timothy2:24 Kandi omuhuuku wa Mukama tashemereire kuba entongani, kureka orikutwaza gye ahari boona, orikurahukirwa kwegyesa, orikugumisiriza," 
2Timothy2:25 orikuhana n'obucureezi abarikumuhakanisa, ngu ku kiraabe nikibaasika, Ruhanga abahe okweteisa, bamanyire kiwme amazima," 
2Timothy2:26 basinduukye barugye omu mutego gwa Sitaane, owaabaire abakwatsire, babone kukora ebi Ruhanga akunda." 
2Timothy3:1 Kwonka omanye eki ngu, omu biro by'aha mperu, haryabaho ebiro by'akabi kaingi," 
2Timothy3:2 ahakuba abantu baryaba abarikwekunda, abakunzi b'empiiha, abanyamaryo, abarikwemanya, abarikujumiirana, abarikugomera abazaire baabo, entasiima, abatarikwera," 
2Timothy3:3 abatarikukunda baabo, abatarikwenda kugarukana n'abandi, abarikubeihererana, abatarikweyangisa, enshaarizi, abarikwanga ebirungi," 
2Timothy3:4 abarikureebyana, engangaazi, abarikwekuza, abarikukunda kweshemeza bonka okukira Ruhanga," 
2Timothy3:5 abarikuhamya emigyenzo y'ediini, bakahakanisa obushoboorozi bwayo. Abantu nk'abo obeetantare;" 
2Timothy3:6 ahakuba omuri abo harimu abashoobookyera omu maju, bakahamba abakazi abataine mutima, abaremereirwe ebibi, kandi abarikutwarwa okurigira okubi kw'emiringo mingi," 
2Timothy3:7 abeega obutoosha, kwonka batahikye ha kumanyira kimwe amazima." 
2Timothy3:8 Nka Yane na Yambere oku baahakaniise Musa, nikwo n'abashaija abo bahakanisa amazima; n'abasiisikaire obwengye, abatarikusiimwa omu kwikiriza." 
2Timothy3:9 Kwonka tibaribaasa kurengaho, ahakuba obushema bwabo buryareebwa butunu abantu boona, nk'obw'abashaija abo bombi oku bumanyirwe." 
2Timothy3:10 Kwonka iwe, okakuratira enyegyesa yangye, emitwarize yangye, eki ndikugyenderera, okwikiriza kwangye, okugumisiriza kwangye, okukunda kwangye, okuhamya kwangye," 
2Timothy3:11 n'okuhiigwa n'obusaasi ebyambaireho omuri Antiokea na Ikonio na Lusitura; okuhiigwa kwo nkahiigwa munonga, naagumisiriza; kwonka Mukama waitu yaabinkizamu byona." 
2Timothy3:12 Kandi buzima abamaririire kumara ebiro by'amagara gaabo byona omuri Yesu nibatiina Ruhanga baryahiigwa. 
2Timothy3:13 Kwonka abantu babi, abarikwegira oku batari, baryayeyongyera kuba babi nibabeihabeiha, kandi nabo nibabeihwabeihwa." 
2Timothy3:14 Kwonka iwe, ogumizemu omu bi waayegire okamanyira kimwe, ahakuba noomanya abaabikwegyeise," 
2Timothy3:15 kandi noijuka ngu okuruga omu buto bwawe okamanya Ebyahandiikirwe ebirikwera ebirikubaasa kukuhaisa obwengye bw'okukuhabura omuhanda gw'okujunwa ahabw'okwikiriza Kristo Yesu. 
2Timothy3:16 Ebyahandiikirwe byona, ebihandiikisiibwe Omwoyo wa Ruhanga, biine omugasho gw'okwegyesa omuntu, n'okumuhana, n'okumuhabura, n'okumutendeka omu by'okuhikiirira," 
2Timothy3:17 ngu omuntu wa Ruhanga abone kuba ohikire buzima, oine byona ebishemereire omurimo gwona omurungi." 
2Timothy4:1 Ninkwehanangiriza omu maisho ga Ruhanga na Kristo, oricwera abahuriire n'abafiire orubanja, kandi ahabw'okugaruka kwe n'obukama bwe," 
2Timothy4:2 ogume obuurire ekigambo kya Ruhanga, ogambe n'obweziriki omu bunaku oburagiirwe n'butaragiirwe, ohane, oteise, oyehanangirize n'okugumisiriza kandi n'okwegyesa." 
2Timothy4:3 Ahakuba ebiro biryaija, obu abantu baryanga kuhurira enyegyesa y'amazima; kwonka ahabw'okugira amatu agarikubarya baryayekanyisiza abeegyesa abarikwegyesa nk'okwetenga kwabo oku kuri," 
2Timothy4:4 beigare amatu ngu batahurira amazima, bahabe, bakuratire ebiteekyerezo by'ebigunjano." 
2Timothy4:5 Kwonka iwe, oyerinde omuri byona, ogumisiririze obusaasi, okore omurimo gw'omubuurizi w'engiri, ohikize kimwe okuheereza kwawe." 
2Timothy4:6 Ahakuba na mbwenu nyowe ndi haihi kutambwa nk'empongano y'eby'okunywa eshukwa aha itambiro, kandi obunaku bwangye bw'okuruga omu nsi bwiriire haihi." 
2Timothy4:7 Ndwaine okurwana okurungi, mperize orugyendo rwangye, ndinzire okwikiriza." 
2Timothy4:8 Ekitsigaire mbiikiirwe ekirunga ky'okuhikiiria, eki Mukama omucwi w'emanja ohikiriire arimpa aha kiro ekyo, kandi tiinye nyenka, kureka na boona abarikukunda okugaruka kwe." 
2Timothy4:9 Oteereho, nk'oku orikubaasa, kwija kundeeba juba;" 
2Timothy4:10 ahakuba Deema, ahabw'okukunda eby'ensi eby'ebiro ebi, akantsigaho, yaataaha Tesalonika; Kreskeene yaaza Galatia, na Tito yaaza Dalumatia." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka wenka niwe ntsigaire nawe. Reeba Mako, mwijane; ahakuba nangasira munonga omu kuheereza." 
2Timothy4:12 Tukiko nkamutuma Efeso. 
2Timothy4:13 Omu kwija ondeetere eky'okwefubika eki naatsigire Troa owa Kaapo, n'ebitabo, kandi okukira munonga oreete eby'empu." 
2Timothy4:14 Alegizanda omuheesi w'emiringa akankora kubi munonga; Mukama waitu aryamwihura ebi yaakozire. 
2Timothy4:15 Naiwe omwerinde; ahakuba akarwanisa munonga ebigambo byaitu. 
2Timothy4:16 Omu kwetonganira kwangye okw'okubanza tihaine waanyemereireho, boona bakantsigaho. Ninshaba ngu batarikiturwa." 
2Timothy4:17 Kwonka Mukama waitu akanyemerera haihi, yangumya, ngu mbone kugambira kimwe ekigambo kya Ruhanga, Abanyamahanga boona bakihurire. Kandi nkashahurwa omu kanwa k'entare." 
2Timothy4:18 Mukama waitu aryaguma ankize omu kabi koon, anjune okuhitsya obu nditaaha omu bukama bwe bw'omu iguru. Aheebwe ekitiinisa ebiro byona. Amiina." 
2Timothy4:19 Ondamukize Priska na Akula kandi n'ab'omu ka ya Onesifooro. 
2Timothy4:20 Erasto akaguma Korinso; kandi Trofimo nkamutsiga Mileeto arwaire. 
2Timothy4:21 Oteho omutima munonga, oije ebiro by'embeho bitakahikire. Yubulo, Pudenti, Liino, Kulaudio n'ab'eishe-emwe boona baabaramutsya." 
2Timothy4:22 Mukama agume n'omwoyo gwawe. Embabazi zibe naimwe. 
Titus1:1 Nyowe Paulo, omuhuuku wa Ruhanga kandi entumwa ya Yesu Kristo, owaatumirwe aha baatooraimwe Ruhanga ngu beeyongyere omu kwikiriza n'okumanya amazima agarimu okutiina Ruhanga," 
Titus1:2 baine amatsiko g'amagara agatahwaho, agu Ruhana otabaasa kubeiha yaaraganiise iranaira;" 
Titus1:3 kandi obunaku obu yaatooraine ku bwahikire, yaayoreka ekigambo kye omu butumwa obu naakwatsiibwe nka Ruhanga Omujuni waitu oku yandagiire;" 
Titus1:4 naakuhandiikira, Tito mwana wangye buzima omu kwikiriza oku tukwataniise; ninkwendeza embabazi n'obusingye ebirikuruga ahari Ruhanga Isheboona na Kristo Yesu Omujuni waitu." 
Titus1:5 Eki naakutsigiire Kureeeta n'okushemeza ebyatsigariire kandi n'okutaho abakuru omuri tauni zoona, nk'oku naakuragiire;" 
Titus1:6 omuntu weena omuribo abe otaine ki arikugaywaho, oine omukazi omwe, kandi oine abaana abarikwikiriza, abatarikwetwa birare nari abagomi." 
Titus1:7 Ahakuba omureeberezi ashemereire kutagira ki arikugaywaho, nk'omubiiki wa Ruhanga; kandi tashemereire kuba otarikuteisibwa nari orikurahuka kubiihirwa nari omusinzi nari omuteezi w'abantu nari oine omururu gw'enshaagi," 
Titus1:8 kureka abe orikukunira abagyenyi, orikukunda oburungi, oine omutima murungi, ohikiriire, orikwera, omwerinzi," 
Titus1:9 orikuhamira aha kigambo ky'okwesigwa ekiri nk'okwegyesa kwaitu oku kuri, abone kushobororera abantu enyegyesa y'amazima, n'okusinga abarikugihakanisa." 
Titus1:10 Ahakuba hariho abagomi baingi, abagamba busha kandi engobya, okukira munonga ab'omu kigombe ky'abashazirwe;" 
Titus1:11 abo bashemereire kuzibirwa kugamba; n'abantu abarikusheenya amaka, nibeegyesa ebitashemeire ahabw'okwetungira enshaagi." 
Titus1:12 Omwe omuribo, nabi waabo, akagira ati: Aba Kureete obutoosha bashangwa baba abanyabishuba, enyamaishwa mbi, abeeremwa, endiirakukinduka." 
Titus1:13 Okuhamya oku n'okw'amazima. N'ahabw'ekyo obahane n'amaani, babone kuhamira omu kwikiriza;" 
Titus1:14 omu mwanya gw'okweta aha biteekerezo by'ebigunjano by'Abayudaaya n'ebiragiro by'abantu abarikuteishuka bakaruga omu mazima. 
Titus1:15 Aha bashemeire byona bishemeire, kwonka aha basiisikaire n'abatarikwikiriza tihariho kishemeire; ahakuba obwengye bwabo n'emitima yaabo bisiisikaire." 
Titus1:16 Beegamba ku barikumanya Ruhanga, kwonka omu micwe yaabo bamwehakana; n'ab'okunugwa, entahurira, kandi abatarikugasha mu murimo gwona omurungi." 
Titus2:1 Kwonka iwe ogume oyegyese ebishemereire enyegyesa y'amazima," 
Titus2:2 ogambire abagurusi barekye kusinda, babe abeerinzi, abaine omutima ogurikweyangisa, kandi babe abahikire omu kwikiriza n'omu kukunda kandi n'omu kugumisiriza;" 
Titus2:3 abakaikuru nabo batwaze nk'oku kishemereire abarikwera, abatarikubeiherera bandi, abatari bahuuku b'ebirikusinza; beegyese ebirungi," 
Titus2:4 babone kutendeka abakazi bato kukunda baibabo n'abaana baabo," 
Titus2:5 bagire omutima murungi, beerinde obushambani, bakore emirimo yaabo omu maka, bagire embabazi, boorobere baibabo, ekigambo kya Ruhanga kirekye kujumwa;" 
Titus2:6 kandi oragiire abatsigazi nabo bagire omutima ogurikweyangisa; 
Titus2:7 naiwe omuri byona oyeyorekye nk'eky'okureeberaho omu kukora gye; omu kwegyesa kwawe oyeyorekye ku otari ndyarya, kureka ku ori omwerinzi," 
Titus2:8 orikugamba ebigambo by'amazima ebitarikugaywa, haza ogwo orikuturwanisa akwatwe enshoni ahabw'okubura ekibi ky'okutwomesereza." 
Titus2:9 Gambira abahuuku boorobere bakama baabo, babone kusiimwa omuri byona; barekye kwetomboita," 
Titus2:10 nari okwiba; kureka beeyorekye bari abeesigwa buzima, babone kusiimisa enyegyesa ya Ruhanga Omujuni waitu omuri byona." 
Titus2:11 Ahakuba embabazi za Ruhanga zireebekire nizireetera abantu boona okujunwa," 
Titus2:12 nizituhabura kwanga okutatiina Ruhanga n'okwetenga eby'ensi, ngu tubone kugumaho omu busingye obu obwa hati, nitwerinda, turi abahikiriire, abarikutiina Ruhanga," 
Titus2:13 tutegyereize eki twineho amatsiko agarimu omugisha, nikwo kworekwa kw'ekitiinisa okwa Ruhanga waitu, Yesu Kristo," 
Titus2:14 owaayehaireyo ahabwaitu, kutucungura omu bugomi bwona, n'okutweza ahabwe, ngu tubone kuba eihanga rye eritoorainwe, eririkwezirikira kukora emirimo emirungi." 
Titus2:15 Ebyo obe nibyo waagamba, obibahabure, obahane n'obushoboorozi bwingi. Hatagira omuntu weena owaakugaya." 
Titus3:1 Obaijutsye kworobera abategyeki n'abaine obushoboorozi, n'okubahurira, n'okweteekateekyera omurimo gwona omurungi," 
Titus3:2 okutagira ou bagambaho kubi, okutatongana kureka okutwaza gye, nibooreka obucureezi bwingi aha bantu boona." 
Titus3:3 Ahakuba naitwe ira tukaba turi abashema, entahurira, abahabisiibwe, abahuuku b'okwetenga okubi n'okweshemeza okw'emiringo mingi, nitumarira omwanya gwaitu omu itima n'eihari, nitwangwa, kandi nitwangana." 
Titus3:4 Kwonka embabazi za Ruhanga Omujuni waitu n'okukunda oku yaakunzire abantu ku byareebekire," 
Titus3:5 yaatujuna, ti habw'eby'okuhikiirira ebi twakozire, kureka ahabw'okusaasira kwe, akatujunisa okwogibwa okw'okuzaarwa obwa kabiri n'okuhindurwa abasya omu Mwoyo Orikwera," 
Titus3:6 ou yaatushukireho atarikubariirira, naamurabya omuri Yesu Kristo Omujuni waitu," 
Titus3:7 ngu tubone kwihwaho orubanja ahabw'embabazi ze, tuhindukye abahunguze abaine amatsiko g'amagara agatahwaho." 
Titus3:8 Ekigambo eki n'eky'okwesigwa; kandi niinyenda ngu ebyo obihamye otarikubanganisa, abaikiriize Ruhanga babone kuguma nibata omutima aha kukora ebirungi. Ebigambo ebi ni birungi, kandi nibigasira abantu." 
Titus3:9 Kwonka oyetantare ebibuuzo by'obushema n'eby'okutondoora obukomooko bwa baishenkurubo n'entongane n'okuhakana aha Biragiro; ahakuba ebyo tibiine mugasho kandi n'ebya busha. 
Titus3:10 Orikureeta okwecwamu ebicweka omu kanisa, ku orimuteisa rimwe nari kabiri, yaayanga, omurekye;" 
Titus3:11 noomanya ku omuntu nk'ogwo ahabire, kandi ku ari enkozi y'ebibi, orikwesingisa orubanja." 
Titus3:12 Ku ndikutumaho Arutema nari Tukiko, oteereho nk'oku orikubaasa, kunshanga Nikopooli; ahakuba okwo niyo mmaririire kumarira ebiro by'embeho." 
Titus3:13 Kandi oteereho n'okushendekyereza Zeena, omwegyesa w'Ebiragiro, na Apolo; oreebe ngu tibaine ki babuzire." 
Titus3:14 Kandi abantu baitu b'okwo beegye kuguma nibakora ebirungi, babone kuhwera abashemereire kuhwerwa buzima, barekye kuba abatarikwana byana." 
Titus3:15 Boona abari hamwe naanye baakuramutsya. Naiwe ondamukize abarikutukunda omu kwikiriza. Embabazi zigume naimwe mwena. 
Philemon1:1 Nyowe Paulo, embohe ahabwa Kristo Yesu na Timoseo ow'eishe-emwe, twakuhandiikira, iwe Filemooni omukozi mugyenzi waitu orikukundwa," 
Philemon1:2 na Apofia munyaanyaitwe, na Arakipo ou tukwataniise orugamba, n'ekanisa ey'omu nju yaawe," 
Philemon1:3 nitubendeza embabazi n'obusingye ebirikuruga ahari Ruhanga Tataitwe na Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo. 
Philemon1:4 Obutoosha nsiima Ruhanga wangye, ku nkwijuka omu kushaba kwangye," 
Philemon1:5 ahabw'okuhurira okukunda kwawe oku oine aha barikwera boona, n'okwikiriza oku oine ahari Mukama waitu Yesu," 
Philemon1:6 kandi nkushabira ngu okukwatanisa n'abandi eby'okwikiriza kwawe kwongyere omuribo okuhsoborokyerwa ebirungi byona ebi twine omuri Kristo. 
Philemon1:7 Ow'eishe-emwe, okukunda kwawe kukanshemeza munonga, kwangarura omutima omunda, ahabw'okuba okaruhuura emitima y'abarikwera." 
Philemon1:8 N'ahabw'ekyo, n'obu ndaabe nyine obumanzi bwingi omuri Kristo kukuragiira kukora ekihikire," 
Philemon1:9 kwonka ahabwa rukundo naihamu kukweshengyereza, nyowe Paulo omugurusi kandi hati embohe ahabwa Kristo Yesu." 
Philemon1:10 Ninkweshengyereza ahabw'omwana wangye, Onesimo, ou naazaariire omu kihome." 
Philemon1:11 Ira akaba atakwiniire mugasho, kwonka hati n'ow'omugasho buzima ahariiwe n'ahariinye." 
Philemon1:12 Naamukugarurira, nk'owaakugarurira orura rwangye buzima." 
Philemon1:13 Nkaayenzire kuguma nawe, ngu ampeereze omu mwanya gwawe omu kubohwa kwangye ahabw'engiri;" 
Philemon1:14 kwonka tiinyenzire kukora kintu kyona otaanyikiriize, ngu ekirungi kyawe kirekye kuba eki ogyemirwe, kureka eki oyekundiire." 
Philemon1:15 Shana akaaba yaakurugireho omwanya mukye, ngu abone kugaruka kuguma naiwe ebiro byona," 
Philemon1:16 atakiri muhuuku kureka orikukira omuhuuku, ow'eishe-emwe orikukundwa na buzima ahariinye, kwonka okukira munonga ahariiwe, omu by'obuntu n'omu bya Mukama." 
Philemon1:17 N'ahabw'ekyo ku oraabe noonyenta mugyenzi waawe, omwakiire nk'oku waakuunyakiire." 
Philemon1:18 Kandi ku araabe yaakushaagiize, nari aine eibanja ryawe, obe niinye waihuza." 
Philemon1:19 Nyowe, Paulo, niinye naahandiika ebi n'omukono gwangye, nti, Ndyariihura; ndekye kusiiba ninkugambira nti, naiwe oine eibanja ryangye; eibanja ryangye eryo n'amagara gaawe." 
Philemon1:20 Eego Ow'eishe-emwe, ka ntungye okushemererwa ahariiwe omuri Mukama. Oruhuure omutima gwangye omuri Kristo." 
Philemon1:21 Naakuhandiikira nyesigire okworoba kwawe, kandi nimmanya ngu nangwa oryakora ebirikukira ebi naagamba." 
Philemon1:22 Kandi ekindi onteguurire aha'okuraara, ahabw'okuba nyine amatsiko ngu nimwija kundeeba ahabw'okushaba kwanyu." 
Philemon1:23 Epafura, embohe mugyenzi wangye omuri Kristo Yesu, yaabaramutysa," 
Philemon1:24 kandi na Mako, Aristariiko, Deema na Luka, abakozi bagyenzi bangye." 
Philemon1:25 Embabazi za Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo zigume n'emyoyo yaanyu. 
Hebrews1:1 Ira Ruhanga akatuma baanabi ahari baatatenkuriitwe kubagambira omu miringo mingi etari emwe; 
Hebrews1:2 kwonka omu biro ebi ebya bwanyima itwe akatutumaho Omwana we kuba niwe yaatugambira, ou yaataireho kuba omuhunguzi w'ebintu byona, kandi ou yaahangiise ensi." 
Hebrews1:3 Ogwo niwe kumurinkana kw'ekitiinisa kya Ruhanga kandi ekishushani kye buzima, kandi niwe ahigika byona n'ekigambo kye eky'obushoboorozi. Ku yaaherize kuhikiiriza eky'okwozyaho ebibi, yaashutama aha rubaju rwa buryo orw'Ow'ekitiinisa omu iguru," 
Hebrews1:4 yaakiza atyo baamaraika obukuru, nk'oku eiziina eri yaatungire ryahitsire agaabo." 
Hebrews1:5 Mbwenu n'oha ahari baamaraika ou Ruhanga aragizire ati: Ori Omwana wangye, Eri izooba naakuzaara? m Nari ahandi ati: Nyowe ndyamubeera Omuzaire, Nawe ambeere Omwana?" 
Hebrews1:6 Kandi ahandi, ku yaareetsire omwana w'omujigaijo omu nsi, yaagira ati: Baamaraika boona aba Ruhanga bamuramye." 
Hebrews1:7 Kandi baamaraika akabagambaho ati: Ohindura baamaraika be emiyaga, N'abaheereza be endimi z'omuriro." 
Hebrews1:8 Kwonka eby'Omwana we akagira ati: Ekitebe kyawe ky'obukama, ai Ruhanga, n'eky'ebiro n'ebiro, Enkoni yaawe y'obukama n'ey'okuhikiirira." 
Hebrews1:9 Okakunda okuhikiirira, waayanga obugomi; Nikyo Ruhanga, Ruhanga waawe, yaakushukiireho amajuta G'okushemererwa okukira bagyenzi baawe." 
Hebrews1:10 Kandi ati: Iwe, Mukama, omu kutandika okataho omusingi gw'ensi, N'eiguru rikahangwa emikono yaawe;" 
Hebrews1:11 Ebyo biryahwaho, kwonka Iwe oryagumaho; Ebyo byona biryakura nk'ekijwaro;" 
Hebrews1:12 Kandi oryabizinga nk'omunagiro, Bihindurwe okundi; Kwonka Iwe tohinduka, N'emyaka yaawe terihwaho." 
Hebrews1:13 Kandi n'oha ahari baamaraika ou aragizire ati; Shutama aha rubaju rwangye rwa buryo, Okuhitsya obu ndihindura abazigu baawe Akatebe k'ebigyere byawe?" 
Hebrews1:14 Baamaraika boona t'emyoyo erikuheereza, etumwa kukora omurimo gw'okuhwera abarihungura okujunwa?" 
Hebrews2:1 Nikyo tushemerereire kuta omutima aha bi twahuriire, ngu tutahaba tukabirugaho." 
Hebrews2:2 Mbwenu ekigambo ekyagambirwe baamaraika, ku kiraabe kyahamire, kandi n'okushiisha kwona n'okutahurira kwona ku biraabe byahairwe ekifubiro ekibishemereire," 
Hebrews2:3 itwe turyakira tuta, ku turiba tuteetaire ha kujunwa okukuru okurikwingana kuti? Okujunwa okwo kukabanza kugambwa Mukama, twakuhamizibwa abaamuhuriire;" 
Hebrews2:4 kandi na Ruhanga yaakuhamya n'obumanyiso n'eby'okutangaaza n'eby'amahano by'emiringo mingi n'ebiconco by'Omwoyo Orikwera, ebi Ruhanga yaagabire nk'oku yaasiimire." 
Hebrews2:5 Ahakuba baamaraika ti bo Ruhanga yaahaire kutegyeka ensi eribaho, ei turikugambaho." 
Hebrews2:6 Kandi hariho owaahamize ahandi ati: Omuntu ni kintu ki, Iwe kumwijuka, Nari Omwana w'omuntu, Iwe kumwetaho?"
