Hebrews2:7 Omu mwanya mukye waamugarura ahansi okukira baamaraika, Waamujweka ekirunga ky'ekitiinisa n'okuhimbisibwa, Waamutegyekyesa emirimo y'emikono yaawe," 
Hebrews2:8 Waata ebintu byona ahansi y'ebigyere bye. Ruhanga omu kumugomoorera byona taine ki yaatsigire kitari mu butegyeki bwe. Mbwenu hati titurikureeba bintu byona bimugomookyeire. 
Hebrews2:9 Kureka owaagarwirwe ahansi omwanya mukye okukira baamaraika, niwe Yesu, nitumureeba ajwekirwe ekirunga ky'ekitiinisa n'okuhimbisibwa ahabw'okwemera obusaasi bw'okufa, ngu aroze aha kufa omu mwanya gw'abantu boona ahabw'embabazi za Ruhanga." 
Hebrews2:10 Ahakuba Ruhanga, Omuhangi wa byona, ou ebintu byona byahangiirwe, ku yaayenzire kutaasya abaana baingi omu kitiinisa, kikamushemerera kuhindura Omwebembezi w'okujunwa kwabo kuba ohikire ahabw'obusaasi." 
Hebrews2:11 Ahakuba Orikweza n'abarikwezibwa boona bakakomooka ahari Omwe. Nikyo atakwatirwa nshoni kubeeta beene Ishe," 
Hebrews2:12 naagira ati: Ndyagamba eiziina ryawe omuri beene Tata, Ndyayeshongora eby'okukuhimbisa omu kanisa." 
Hebrews2:13 Kandi ahandi ati: Ndyamwesiga. Kandi ahandi ati: Reeba ndi aha n'abaana abu Ruhanga yampaire. 
Hebrews2:14 N'ahabw'ekyo nk'oku abaana baine omubiri n'eshagama, nikwo nawe yaabigizire, ngu ahabw'okufa kwe ahindure busha ogwo oine obushoboorozi bwa rufu, niwe Sitaane," 
Hebrews2:15 kandi ajune boona abatuura omu buhuuku ebiro byona eby'amagara gaabo ahabw'okutiina okufa. 
Hebrews2:16 Ahakuba nitumanyira kimwe ngu baamaraika tibo ahwera, kureka baijukuru ba Abrahamu." 
Hebrews2:17 N'ahabw'ekyo kikamushemerera kushushanisibwa na beene Ishe omuri byona, ngu abone kuba Omunyamurwa omukuru ow'embabazi kandi ow'ekwesigwa omu murimo gwa Ruhanga, ahongyerere ebibi by'abantu;" 
Hebrews2:18 ahabw'okuba We, nk'oku yaabonabonesiibwe atyo, kandi akoohibwa, naabaasa kuhwera abarikwohibwa." 
Hebrews3:1 N'ahabw'ekyo, B'eishe-emwe abarikwera abakwataniise omu kwetwa okw'omu iguru, muteekateekye munonga ahari Yesu, Entumwa kandi Omunyamurwa omukuru ow'ediini ei turikwikiriza." 
Hebrews3:2 Akaba ari owmesigwa ahari Ogwo owaamutooraine, nk'oku Musa yaabaire ari omwesigwa omu nju ya Ruhanga;" 
Hebrews3:3 kwonka Yesu ogwo akateekateekwaho ku ashemereire kuheebwa ekitiinisa ekirikukira ekya Musa, nk'omwombeki w'enju oku agira ekitiinisa okukira egyo nju." 
Hebrews3:4 (Ahakuba enju yoona eyombekwa omuntu nanka, kwonka Omwombeki w'ebinti byona ni Ruhanga.)" 
Hebrews3:5 Buzima kwo Musa akaba ari omwesigwa omu nju ya Ruhanga yoona, kwonka shi nk'omugaragwa ow'okuhamya ebyabaire nibiija kugambwa bwanyima;" 
Hebrews3:6 kwonka Kristo akaba ari omwesigwa orikutegyeka enju ya Ruhanga nk'omwana we. Kandi enju ye niitwe, ku turaabe nitugumiza kimwe obumanzi bwaitu n'okwesiimira ebi twineho amatsiko tuhamire okuhitsya aha muheru." 
Hebrews3:7 N'ahabw'ekyo nk'oku Omwoyo Orikwera arikugira ati: Eri izooba, ku muraahurire eiraka rye," 
Hebrews3:8 Mutagangaaza, emitima yaanyu, nk'oku mwagigangaize omu bunaku obu mwangomeiremu, aha kro eky'okugyezibwa omu ihamba," 
Hebrews3:9 Baashwenkuriimwe ei bantegyeire nibangyeza, Bakamara emyaka makumi ana nibareeba emirimo yangye." 
Hebrews3:10 Nikyo naagwerirwe kubi ab'obusingye obwo, Ningira nti: Emitima yaabo ehaba obutoosha; Kandi tibakamanyire mihanda yangye." 
Hebrews3:11 Nikyo naagiriire ekiniga nkarahira nti: Tibaritaaha mu buruhuukiro bwangye. 
Hebrews3:12 B'eishe-emwe, mwerinde, omuntu weena omuriimwe atagira omutima mubi ogutarikwikiriza, gukamuhabya kuruga ahari Ruhanga ohuriire." 
Hebrews3:13 Kureka muhaburane obutoosha, obunaku butakarengire; hatagira n'omwe omuriimwe owaagangaazibwa obugobya bw'ekibi." 
Hebrews3:14 Ahakuba tuhindukire abakwataniise omuri Kristo, ku turaabe nitugumiza kimwe ebi twabandize kwikiriza tutarikubanganisa okuhitsya aha muheru;" 
Hebrews3:15 nk'oku kyagambirwe ngu: Eri izooba ku muraahurire eiraka rye, mutagangaaza emitima yaanyu, nk'oku mwagigangaize omu bunaku obu mwangomeiremu." 
Hebrews3:16 Nimugira ngu ni baahi abaahuriire, haza bakagoma? T'abo abaarugire Misri, beebembeirwe Musa?" 
Hebrews3:17 Kandi ni baahi abaamazire emyaka makumi ana nibamugwisa kubi? T'abo abaasiisire, abu emitumbi yaabo yaagwire omu ihamba?" 
Hebrews3:18 Kandi ni baahi abu yaarahiriire okutataaha mu buruhuukiro bwe? T'abo abatarahuriire? 
Hebrews3:19 N'ahabw'ekyo nitureeba ngu bakaremwa kutaahamu ahabw'okutaikiriza. 
Hebrews4:1 N'ahabw'ekyo nk'oku endagaano y'okutaaha omu buruhuukiro bwe ekiriho, ka tutiine, omuntu weena omuriimwe atashusha nk'owaaremwa kubuhikaho." 
Hebrews4:2 Ahakuba buzima naitwe tukagambirwa ebigambo birungi nka bo, kwonka ekigambo eki baahuriire tikirabagasiire, ahabw'okuba tikirashangire kwikiriza omuribo." 
Hebrews4:3 Mumanye ngu itwe abaikiriize tutaaha omu buruhuukiro obwo, nk'oku yaagizire ati: Nikyo naagiriire ekiniga nkarahira nti, Tibaritaaha mu buruhuukiro bwangye; n'obu emirimo ye eraabe yaahweire, okuruga aha kuhangwa kw'ensi." 
Hebrews4:4 Ahakuba hariho ahandi ahu yaagambire aha by'ekiro kya mushanju ati: Ruhanga akahuumura emirimo ye yoona aha kiro kya mushanju. 
Hebrews4:5 Kandi hoona omu mwanya ogwo yaagira ati: Tibaritaaha mu buruhuukiro bwangye. 
Hebrews4:6 N'ahabw'ekyo nk'oku hakiriho bamwe ab'okubutaahamu, kandi abaagambiirwe ira obutumwa burungi baaremirwe kubutaahamu ahabw'okutahurira," 
Hebrews4:7 nikyo Ruhanga yaateereireho ekindi kiro, eki yaayetsire “Eri izooba”, naakigambira omuri Daudi bwanyima y'ebiro bingi, (nk'oku kyaheza kugambwa eruguru,) ati: Eri izooba ku muraahurire eiraka rye, mutagangaaza emitima yaanyu." 
Hebrews4:8 Ahakuba kuri noogira ngu Yoshua akabaha oburuhuukiro, Ruhanga takugambire ha kiro ekindi bwanyima." 
Hebrews4:9 N'ahabw'ekyo hakiriho sabato y'okuhuumuriraho ebiikiirwe abantu ba Ruhanga; 
Hebrews4:10 ahakuba omuntu weena otaahire omu buruhuukiro bwa Ruhanga, biri ahuumwire emirimo ye, nk'oku Ruhanga yaahuumwire eye." 
Hebrews4:11 N'ahabw'ekyo ka twezirikye kutaaha omu buruhuukiro obwo, hatagira omuntu weena owaagwisibwa okutahurira okw'omuringo nk'ogwo." 
Hebrews4:12 Ahakuba ekigambo kya Ruhanga kiine amagara n'amaani, kiine obwogi bwingi okukira rurara yoona ey'amoogi abiri, nikicumita kihika ahu kitaanisiza amagara n'omwoyo, ngingo n'omushokooro, kandi kirahuka kucaaka ebi omuntu arikuteekateeka n'ebi amaririire omu mutima gwe kukora." 
Hebrews4:13 Kandi omu maisho ge tihariho kihangirwe ekisherekirwe; kureka ebintu byona bishuurwirwe nibireebwa butunu omu maisho g'Ogwo oshoboorora ebyaitu. 
Hebrews4:14 Mbwenu nk'oku twine Omunyamurwa omukuru rugambwa, owaarabire omu myanya y'omu iguru, Yesu Omwana wa Ruhanga, ka tuhamize kimwe okwikiriza kwaitu;" 
Hebrews4:15 ahakuba titwine munyamurwa omukuru otarikubaasa kusaasira hamwe naitwe omu bweremwa bwaitu, kureka twine owaayohiibwe omu miringo yoona nkaitwe, kwonka We atashiishe." 
Hebrews4:16 N'ahabw'ekyo ka twirire haihi n'ekitebe ky'embabazi tutaine bwoba, tubone kuheebwa okusaasirwa, n'okugirirwa embabazi z'okutuhwera ahu turaazeetengyere hoona." 
Hebrews5:1 Nimumanya ngu omunyamurwa omukuru weena, otoorainwe omu bantu, aba atairweho kukora ebya Ruhanga ahabw'abantu, okuhonga empongano n'okutamba ebitambo ahabw'ebibi." 
Hebrews5:2 Naabaasa kutwaza gye abataine bwengye n'abahabire, ahabw'okuba nawe ayehinguririziibwe obweremwa." 
Hebrews5:3 N'ahabw'ekyo ashemereire kwetambirira ebitambo ahabw'ebibi bye, nk'oku abitambirira abandi." 
Hebrews5:4 Kandi tihariho oyeha obukuru obwo, kureka yaaba ayetsirwe Ruhanga, nk'oku Arooni yaayetsirwe." 
Hebrews5:5 Na mbwenu Kristo nawe tareekurize ngu aheebwe obunyamurwa obukuru, kureka akabuteebwaho Ogwo owaamugizire ati: Ori Omwana wangye, Eri izooba naakuzaara;" 
Hebrews5:6 nk'oku yaagizire ahandi ati: Ori Omunyamurwa w'ebiro byona, Omu muringo gwa Melikizedeki." 
Hebrews5:7 Kristo, omu biro ebi yaabaire akiriho omu mubiri, akashaba yaayeshengyereza munonga naarira, yaatakira Ogwo owaabaasize kumukiza okufa; yaahurirwa ahabw'okutiina Ruhanga;" 
Hebrews5:8 n'obu araabe yaabaire ari Omwana, akeega kworoba omu bi yaabonabonesiibwemu." 
Hebrews5:9 Kandi ku yaaherize kuhikiirizibwa, yaahinduka obukomooko bw'okujunwa okutahwaho ahari boona abamworobera," 
Hebrews5:10 ou Ruhanga yaayetsire Omunyamurwa omukuru omu muringo gwa Melikizedeki. 
Hebrews5:11 Ogwo twine bingi by'okumugambaho, kandi ebigumire eishoborora, ahakuba muhindukire abarikuhurira kubi." 
Hebrews5:12 N'obu muraabe mwabaire mushemereire kuba abeegyesa ahabw'okumara omwanya muhango nimwega, kwonka nimwetenga omuntu w'okugaruka kubeegyesa eby'okubandizaho ebyorobi omu byagambirwe Ruhanga. Kandi muhindukire abarikwetenga amate, bitari by'okurya ebigumire." 
Hebrews5:13 Mumanye ngu omuntu weena otungwa amate aba atakamanyiire kukoresa kigambo ky'okuhikiirira, ahakuba n'omwana;" 
Hebrews5:14 kureka eby'okurya ebigumire bishemereire abakuru, abu emitima yaabo eherize kumanyiira kutaanisa ekirungi n'ekibi." 
Hebrews6:1 N'ahabw'ekyo ka turekye kwegyesa eby'okubandizaho ebya Kristo, tugumizemu tuhikye aha by'obukuru, tutagaruka kwombeka omusingi, nikwo kweteisa emirimo efiire, n'okwikiriza Ruhanga," 
Hebrews6:2 n'okwegyesa eby'okubatiza n'eby'okutaho engaro n'eby'okuzooka kw'abafu n'orubanja orwe'ebiro n'ebiro. 
Hebrews6:3 Kandi ekyo turyakikora, Ruhanga ku arisiima." 
Hebrews6:4 Mumanye ngu abaabaire bajwereirwe omushana, bakaroza aha kiconco eky'omu iguru, bakahinduka abakwataniise omu Mwoyo Orikwera," 
Hebrews6:5 kandi bakaroza aha burungi bw'ekigambo kya Ruhanga n'aha maani ag'obusingye oburiija," 
Hebrews6:6 abo, ku bagwa baabirugamu, kiba kitakibaasika kubagarura bwa kabiri omu kweteisa, ahabw'okuba baba bagarukire kwebambira Omwana wa Ruhanga aha musharaba, n'okumukwatsa enshoni butunu." 
Hebrews6:7 Eitaka ku rihaaga enjura erigwireho kaingi, ryamera emboga ezishemereire abu rihingiirwe, Ruhanga ariha omugisha;" 
Hebrews6:8 kwonka ku rimera amahwa n'amatojo, riba ritakiine mugasho, riri haihi n'okukyeenwa; n'omuheru gwaryo kuri okwokibwa." 
Hebrews6:9 Kwonka, abarikukundwa, n'obu turaabe twagamba tutyo, nituteekateeka tutarikubanganisa ngu ebyanyu biri gye okukira ebyabo, kandi birimu okujunwa." 
Hebrews6:10 Ahakuba Ruhanga t'otahikiriire kwebwa emirimo yaanyu n'okukunda oku mwayorekire aha iziina rye, obu mwaheereza abarikwera, abu mukirikuheereza na hati." 
Hebrews6:11 Naitwe nitwetenga ngu omuntu weena omuriimwe ayorekye obweziriki, abone kugira amatsiko atarikubanganisa okuhitsya aha muheru;" 
Hebrews6:12 murekye kuba abarikweganda, kureka mutooreze abo abahungura ebyaraganisiibwe ahabw'okwikiriza n'okugumisiriza." 
Hebrews6:13 Ahakuba Ruhanga, obu yaaraganisa Abrahamu, akeerahira, ahabw'okutagira w'okurahira orikumukira," 
Hebrews6:14 naagira ati: Buzima okukuha ndyakuha omugisha, kandi n'okukukanyisa ndyakukanyisa." 
Hebrews6:15 Nikwo Abrahamu yaahairwe atyo eki yaaraganisiibwe, ku yaaherize kugumisiriza obutaruha." 
Hebrews6:16 Nimumanya ngu abantu barahira orikubakira, kandi omu mpaka zaabo zoona ekizimara n'okurahira." 
Hebrews6:17 N'ahabw'ekyo Ruhanga ku yaayenzire kworekyera kimwe abahunguzi b'ebi yaaraganiise, ku enaama ye etahinduka, yaagihamya n'okurahira;" 
Hebrews6:18 ngu ebintu bibiri ebitabaasa kuhinduka, ebi Ruhanga atabaasa kubeiheramu, bigumye emitima yaitu buzima, itwe abaamuhungiireho, tubone kuhamya eki twiineho amatsiko ekyatairwe omu maisho gaitu." 
Hebrews6:19 Amatsiko aga tugaine nk'ekitsibo ky'amagara, n'amatsiko agahamire kandi agatarikunyiganyigibwa, agataaha Aharikwera munonga omunda y'omukingo," 
Hebrews6:20 ahu Yesu yaabandize kuza ahabwaitu obu yaahinduka Omunyamurwa omukuru ow'ebiro byona omu muringo gwa Melikezedeki. 
Hebrews7:1 Ahakuba Melekizedeki ogwo, omugabe wa Salemu, omunyamurwa wa Ruhanga Rukira-boona, akabugana Abrahamu, naatabaaruka omu rugamba kwita abagabe, yaamuha omugisha;" 
Hebrews7:2 kandi niwe Abrahamu yaahaire kimwe kya ikumi ekya byona. Melikizedeki ogwo okubanza n'omugabe w'okuhiikirira, nk'eiziina rye oku ririkushoboororwa, ekya kabiri n'omugabe wa Salemu, ekirikushoboororwa ngu omugabe w'obusingye." 
Hebrews7:3 Taine ishe, taine nyina, n'obu baakuba baishenkuru; taine butandikiro bw'amagara ge, kandi taine bugarukiro, kureka naashushanisibwa nk'Omwana wa Ruhanga, atuura ari omunyamurwa ebiro byona." 
Hebrews7:4 Muteekateekye aha muntu ogwo, mureebe ku ari mukuru munonga, ou Abrahamu tatenkuriitwe yaahaire kimwe kya ikumi eky'eminyago erikukira oburungi." 
Hebrews7:5 Nimumanya ku Ebiragiro biragiira ab'omuri baijukuru ba Leevi, abaheebwa obunyamurwa, kutwara kimwe kya ikumi ky'eby'abantu beene waabo, n'obu baraabe bakomookire ahari Abrahamu;" 
Hebrews7:6 kwonka omushaija ogwo, otari w'omu ruganda rwabo, katoijerwa Abrahamu kimwe kya ikumi, yaashabira omugisha ogwo owaabaire araganisiibwe." 
Hebrews7:7 Tihariho kubanganisa ku omuto niwe ashabirwa omukuru omugisha. 
Hebrews7:8 Kandi nk'oku biri hati, kimwe kya ikumi kiheebwa abantu abafa; kwonka omu bunaku obwo kikaheebwa ogwo orikuhamibwa ku ariho." 
Hebrews7:9 Nangwa nitubaasa kugamba ngu na Leevi orikuheebwa kimwe kya ikumi akabitoijera omuri Abrahmu ishenkuru; 
Hebrews7:10 ahakuba akaba akiri omunda ye, obu Melikizedeki yaamubugana." 
Hebrews7:11 Kuri noogira ngu okuhikiirizibwa kukatungwa ahabw'obunyamurwa bw'ekileevi, (ahakuba omu butegyek obwo nimwo abantu baaheereirwe Ebiragiro) n'enki ekyakwetengyeise ondiijo munyamurwa kwimuka ow'omuringo gwa Melikizedeki, ateetsirwe omu muringo gwa Arooni?" 
Hebrews7:12 Ahakuba, ku haraabe hariho okuhinduka omu bunyamurwa, hashemereire kubaho okuhinduka n'omu Biragiro." 
Hebrews7:13 Kwonka Ogwo owaagambirweho ebyo n'ow'omu ruganda orundi, orutakarugwamuga muntu w'okuheereza aha itambiro." 
Hebrews7:14 Ahakuba nikimanywa ngu Mukama waitu akakomooka omuri Yuda; kandi oruganda orwo Musa tararugambireho by'obunyamurwa. 
Hebrews7:15 Kandi ekyo kikakira kumanywa gye, obu haimuka ondiijo munyamurwa orikushusha Melikizedeki," 
Hebrews7:16 otaratooraniirwe bunaymurwa nk'ekiragiro ky'abantu nyabuntu oku kiragiira, kureka owaabuhairwe ahabw'okugira amaani g'amagara agatarikuhwerekyerezibwa." 
Hebrews7:17 Ahakuba bakamuhamya bati: Ori omunyamurwa w'ebiro byona omu muringo gwa Melekizedeki. 
Hebrews7:18 Ahakuba ekiragiro eky'okubanza kikaihwaho ahabw'okutagira maani n'okubura omugasho; 
Hebrews7:19 (mumanye ngu ekiragiro tikiine ki kyahikize buzima), haagarurwaho amatsiko agarikukira oburungi, agarikutwiriza haihi na Ruhanga." 
Hebrews7:20 Kandi ekyo tikirabaireho hatari ndahiro. 
Hebrews7:21 Abalevi bo bakaheebwa obunyamurwa, hatariho ndahiro; kwonka Owaabuhaire Ogwo akarahira, yaamugira ati: Mukama akarahira, kandi taryefuuza Yaagira ati: Ori omunyamurwa ow'ebiro byona." 
Hebrews7:22 Okwo nikwo Yesu yaabaire omwema ow'endagaano erikukira oburungi. 
Hebrews7:23 Kandi abanyamurwa aba ira bakaba bakuratana baingi, ahakuba rufu ekaba ebazibira kugumaho;" 
Hebrews7:24 kwonka Ogwo, ahabw'okugumaho ebiro byona, aguma ari omunyamurwa otarikurugaho." 
Hebrews7:25 N'ahabw'ekyo naabaasa kujunira kimwe abairirira Ruhanga nibaraba omuriwe, ahakuba atuura obutoosha bwona naabeeshengyerereza." 
Hebrews7:26 Kikaba kihikire itwe kugira omunyamurwa omukuru nk'Ogwo, orikwera, otaine ki arikuganywa, otaine kamogo, otaanisiibwe n'abasiisi, owaakuziibwe okuba ahaiguru munonga harikweshumba eiguru ryona." 
Hebrews7:27 Tarikushusha banyamurwa abakuru abandi, abeetenga kutamba ebitambo obutoosha, okubanza ahabw'ebibi byabo, bwanyima ahabw'ebibi by'abandi. Ahakuba ekyo We akakikora rimwe yaaheza, obu yaayehayo kuba ekitambo." 
Hebrews7:28 Mumanye ngu Ebiragiro bikataho abantu b'amaani makye kuba abanyamurwa abakuru; kwonka ekigambo ky'egyo ndahiro, kikataho Omwana wa Ruhanga owaahikiririziibwe kimwe okuhitsya ebiro byona." 
Hebrews8:1 Omuri ebyo ebi twagamba, ekirikukira obukuru nikyo eki. Twine Omunyamurwa omukuru nk'ogwo, oshutami aha rubaju rwa buryo orw'ekitebe ky'obukama obw'Ow'ekitiinisa omu iguru," 
Hebrews8:2 orikuheerereza Aharikwera omu Ihema ery'amazima, eritarateirwe bantu, kureka eryateirwe Mukama." 
Hebrews8:3 Nimumanya ngu omunyamurwa omukuru weena ateebwaho okuhonga empongano n'okutamba ebitambo; n'ahabw'ekyo nawe ashemereiree kugira eky'okuhonga. 
Hebrews8:4 Kuri yaabaire ari omu nsi, takubaire munyamurwa na kakye, ahakuba hariho abanyamurwa abashangwa bahonga empongano, nk'oku kiragiirwa." 
Hebrews8:5 Kandi ebyo ebi bakora n'enshusha kandi n'ebishushani by'eby'omu iguru; ahakuba Musa ku yaabaire naayenda kuteera eihema, akahaburwa Ruhanga owaamugizire ati: Oteho omutima, okore byona, noobishushanisa nk'ebi waareebire aha rushozi." 
Hebrews8:6 Kwonka hati Kristo ahairwe obuheereza oburikukira obwa ira oburungi, ahabw'okuba We n'omuteerani w'endagaano erikukira oburungi, ahakuba neehamibwa ebyaraganisiibwe ebirikukira ebya ira." 
Hebrews8:7 Endagaano ey'okubanza kuri yaabaire etaine kishobiremu, tihaakwetengirwe ndiijo;" 
Hebrews8:8 ahakuba Mukama akabahana naagira ati: Reeba, ebiro biryaija, nikwo Mukama arikugira, Obu ndiragaana endagaano nsya N'ab'enju ya Israeli n'eya Yuda," 
Hebrews8:9 Etarikushusha ndagaano ei naaragaine na baishenkurubo Aha kiro eki naabakwatiire aha mukono Kubaiha omu nsi ya Misri; Ahakuba tibaragumire mu ndagaano yangye. Nikyo naarekyeire kubataho omutima, nikwo Mukama arikugira." 
Hebrews8:10 Kwonka egi niyo ndagaano ei ndiragaana n'enju ya Israeli Bwanyima y'ebiro ebyo, nikwo Mukama arikugira; Ndyata ebiragiro byangye omu bwengye bwabo, Kandi aha mitima yaabo niho ndibihandiika; Nyowe ndyaba Ruhanga waabo, Nabo babe abantu bangye." 
Hebrews8:11 Kandi tibaryegyesana buri muntu na mutaahi we, Nari shi omuntu weena na mwene ishe bati: Manya Mukama! Ahakuba boona baryammanya Okuruga aha muto okuhika aha mukuru;" 
Hebrews8:12 Ahabw'okuba ndyabasaasira eby'okushiisha byabo, N'ebibi byabo tindibiijuka bundi." 
Hebrews8:13 Mukama ku araabe naagamba atyo aha ndagaano nsya, biri aitsire ey'okubanza. Ahakuba ekirikukura, kikahanguura, kiba kiri haihi kuhwaho." 
Hebrews9:1 Nimumanya ngu endagaano ey'okubanza ekaba eine emigyenzo eyaaragiirwe ey'okuramya Ruhanga, n'omwanya ogurikwera ogw'omu nsi egi;" 
Hebrews9:2 ahakuba hakaba hariho Eihema eryakozirwe; omu mwanya gw'okubandizaho omuriryo hakaba harimu etabaaza n'emeeza n'emigaati y'okumurikwe; aho niho haabaire heetwa Aharikwera. 
Hebrews9:3 Kandi omunda y'omukingo ogwa kabiri hakaba heebwa Aharikwera munonga," 
Hebrews9:4 harimu eky'okwotereraho obubaane ekiheesirwe omu zaabu, n'eshanduukye y'endagaano eshwekirwe ezaabu embaju zoona, eyaabaire erimu orwabya rw'ezaabu orwabiare rubiikirwemu emaanu, n'enkoni ya Arooni eyaatookire, kandi n'ebishate by'amabaare g'endagaano;" 
Hebrews9:5 ahaiguru yaayo hakaba hariho Baakerubi b'ekitiinisa basangiire ekitebe ky'okusaasira. Ebyo titurikubaasa kubitondoora buri kimwe. 
Hebrews9:6 Ku baaherize kutebeekanisa ebyo byona, okuruga aho abanyamurwa baguma nibataaha omu mwanya ogw'okubanza kuhikiiriza emirimo y'okuheereza;" 
Hebrews9:7 kwonka omu mwanya ogwa kabiri hakaba hazamu omunyamurwa omukuru wenka rimwe omu mwaka, akaba atazayo ataine shagama y'okwetambirira n'okutambirira ebibi by'abantu ebi baakoreire omu butamanya," 
Hebrews9:8 Omwoyo Orikwera naamanyisa atyo, ngu omuhanda gw'okutaaha omu mwanya ogurikwera munonga tigurkabonekire, eihema ery'okubanza rikiriho, (eririkutushobororera eby'obusingye obu.)" 
Hebrews9:9 N'omu biro ebyo bakaba bahonga empongano, batamba n'ebitambo ebitarikubaasa kushemeza buzima mutima gw'ogwo orikuramya Ruhanga," 
Hebrews9:10 kureka bikwata aha by'okurya n'eby'okunywa n'eby'okwoga okw'emiringo etari emwe, niyo migyenzo eyaatairweho ahabw'omubiri okuhitsya aha biro by'okuhindurwa obusya." 
Hebrews9:11 Kwonka Kristo ku yaizire kuba omunyamurwa omukuru ow'ebirungi ebyabaire nibyenda kwija, yaaraba omu Ihema eririkukira obukuru n'okuhikiirira, (eritakozirwe bantu, amakuru ngu eritari ry'ebihangirwe by'omu nsi);" 
Hebrews9:12 tarataahire mu Mwanya ogurikwera, aine eshagama y'embuzi nari ey'ente, kureka akataahayo rimwe yaaheza, aine eye; atyo yaatutungira okucungurwa okutahwaho." 
Hebrews9:13 Mbwenu eshangama y'embuzi n'ente n'eiju ry'enyana y'eruutsi ebimiisiirwa aha bantu abasiisikaire ku biraabe nibyeza emibiri ekashemera," 
Hebrews9:14 eshagama ya Kristo, owaayehaireyo ahari Ruhanga ahabw'Omwoyo Orikwera kuba ekitambo ekitaine kamogo, terikira munonga kushemeza emitima yaanyu kureka emirimo efiire, mukabona kuheereza Ruhanga ohuriire?" 
Hebrews9:15 N'ahabw'ekyo Kristo n'omuteerani w'endagaano ensya, ngu abaayetsirwe baheebwe obuhuunguzi obutahwaho obwaraganisiibwe ahabw'okufa kw'Ogwo owaafiire kucungura abaasiisire, abarikutegyekwa endagaano ey'okubanza." 
Hebrews9:16 Nimumanya ngu, ahi endagaano ey'okuraga eri, hashemereire kubaho ekirikuhamya okufa kwa nyakuraga;" 
Hebrews9:17 ahakuba endagaano ey'okuraga ehama, nyakuraga yaaheza kufa; ahabw'okuba tekora nyakuraga akiriho." 
Hebrews9:18 N'ahabw'ekyo n'endagaano ey'okubanza terahamiibwe ahatari shagama. 
Hebrews9:19 Ahakuba Musa ku yaaherize kugambira abantu boona buri kiragiro ekyaragiirwe omu Biragiro, yaatwara eshagama y'enyana n'embuzi hamwe n'amaizi n'obwoya bw'entaama oburikutukura n'enyaweera, yaamiisiira ekitambo kye'biragiro n'abantu boona;" 
Hebrews9:20 naagira ati: Eshagama egi n'ey'endagaano ei Ruhanga yaabaragiire. 
Hebrews9:21 Bwanyima egyo shagama yaagimiisiira atyo Eihema n'ebintu byona ebyabaire nibikoresibwa emirimo y'obuheereza. 
Hebrews9:22 Buzima omu Biragiro haihi buri kintu kyezibwa eshagama; kandi ahatari kuhseesha shagama, tihariho kwihwaho bibi." 
Hebrews9:23 N'ahabw'ekyo kikaba kihikire ebishushani by'eby'omu iguru kwezibwa ebyo; kwonka eby'omu iguru byo byezibwa ebitambo ebirikukira ebyo. 
Hebrews9:24 Ahakuba Kristo tarataahire mu mwanya ogurikwera ogwakozirwe abantu, ogurikushushanisibwa nk'ogwo ogw'amazima, kureka akataaha omu iguru buzima ngu ayeyorekye hati omu maisho ga Ruhanga ahabwaitu." 
Hebrews9:25 Taragiireyo kwehayo kaingi, nk'omunyamurwa omukuru oku yaabaire ataaha omu mwanya ogurikwera buri mwaka, aine eshagama etari ye ahabwe." 
Hebrews9:26 Kuri kyabaire kityo, akaabaire ashemereire kubonabonesibwa kaingi okwiha aha kuhangwa kw'ensi; kwonka hati mbwenu aha muheru gw'obusingye obwo akareebeka rimwe yaaheza, ngu abone kwihaho ebibi ahabw'okwehayo kuba ekitambo." 
Hebrews9:27 Kandi nk'oku abantu bateereirweho okufa rimwe, bwanyima yaakwo bakacwerwa orubanja," 
Hebrews9:28 nikwo na Kristo, ku yaaherize kuheebwayo rimwe kwekorera ebibi bya baingi, aryareebeka omurindi gwa kabiri, ti habw'ebibi, kureka ahabw'okujuna abariba bamutegyereize." 
Hebrews10:1 Ebiragiro ahabw'okushusha ebirungi ebyabaire nibyenda kwija, bitari byo buzima, tibibaasa kuhikiiriza abantu abarikwirira haihi ahabw'ebitambo ebyo ebyabaire biheebwayo obutoosha buri mwaka." 
Hebrews10:2 Kuri kyabaire nikibaasika, tibyakurekirwe kutambwa? Ahakuba abarikuramya, ku baakuherize kushemezibwa rimwe buzima, tibaakugarukire kwemanyaho bibi." 
Hebrews10:3 Kwonka ebitambo ebyo bikaba bibaijutsya ebibi byabo buri mwaka; 
Hebrews10:4 ahakuba eshagama y'enimi n'ey'embuzi tebaasa kwihaho bibi. 
Hebrews10:5 N'ahabw'ekyo Kristo, ku yaabaire naija omu nsi, yaagira ati: Ebitambo n'empongano torabikunzire, Kureka okanteekateekyera omubiri;" 
Hebrews10:6 Ebitambo ebyokiibwe ebitambwa ahabw'ebibi ti byo waasiimire. 
Hebrews10:7 Nyowe nikwo kugira nti: Ai Ruhanga reeba, naija kukora ebi okunda, Nk'oku kyahandiikirwe ahariinye omu muzingo gw'ekitabo." 
Hebrews10:8 Omu bi arikugamba aharuguru, ku yaaherize kugira ati: Ebitambo n'empongano n'ebitambo ebyokiibwe ebiheebwayo ahabw'ebibi torabisiimire n'obu kwakuba okubishemerererwa, (ebyo nibyo biheebwayo nk'oku Ebiragiro biragiira)" 
Hebrews10:9 yaagaruka yaagira ati: Reeba, naija kukora ebi okunda. Atyo yaihaho eby'okubanza, ngu ahamye ekya kabiri." 
Hebrews10:10 Kandi omuri ekyo eki akunda itwe tukeezibwa ahabw'okuheebwayo kw'omubiri gwa Yesu Kristo rimwe akaheza. 
Hebrews10:11 Nimumanya ngu omunyamurwa weena ayemerera obutoosha omu rubu rwe, naatamba ebitambo kaingi ebitahainduka ebitarikubaasa kwihaho bibi ebiro byona;" 
Hebrews10:12 kwonka Kristo we, ku yaaherize kutamba ekitambo kimwe eky'ebiro byona ahabw'ebibi, yaashutama aha rubaju rwa buryo rwa Ruhanga;" 
Hebrews10:13 okwiha obwo atuura ategyereize, okuhitsya obu abazigu be barihindurwa akatebek'ebigyre bye." 
Hebrews10:14 Ahakuba abarikwezibwa akabahikiiriza ahabw'ekitambo kimwe yaaheza okumara ebiro byona. 
Hebrews10:15 Kandi Omwoyo orikwera nawe naabituhamiza; ahakuba ku yaaherize kugamba ati: 
Hebrews10:16 Egi niyo ndagaano ei ndiragaana nabo Bwanyima y'ebiro ebyo, nikwo Mukama arikugira, Ndyata ebiragiro byangye omu mitima yaabo, Kandi mbihandiikye omu bwengye bwabo." 
Hebrews10:17 Yaagaruka yaagira ati: Ebibi byabo n'eby'okushiisha byabo tindibiijuka bundi. 
Hebrews10:18 Kandi ahi ebibi bisaasiirwe, haba hatakiriho kutamba kitambo ahabw'ekibi." 
Hebrews10:19 N'ahabw'ekyo, B'eishe-emwe, nk'oku twine obumanzi kutaaha Aharikwera munonga ahabw'eshagama ya Yesu," 
Hebrews10:20 nituraba omu muhanda musya ogw'amagara, ogu yaatucwereire omu mukingo, nigwo mubiri gwe," 
Hebrews10:21 kandi nk'oku twine omunyamurwa omukuru orikutegyeka enju ya Ruhanga," 
Hebrews10:22 katwirire haihi n'omutima gw'amazima nitwikiririza kkimwe tutarikubanganisa, twine emitima emiisiirwe okwihwaho ebibi ebi emyoyo yaitu erikutushinja, kandi n'emibiri yaitu eyogiibwe amaizi amarungi." 
Hebrews10:23 Ka tugumizemu kuhamya amatsiko gaitu tutarikunyiganyiga, ahabw'okuba Owaaraganiise n'omwesigwa." 
Hebrews10:24 Kandi ka tuteekateekye oku twakwezirikisana kukundana n'okukora ebirungi," 
Hebrews10:25 tutarikureka kuteeranira hamwe, nk'oku abamwe bagira, kureka tugumyane, kandi nk'oku murikureeba ngu ekiro ekyo kiri haihi n'okuhika, mweyongyere kutwaza mutyo." 
Hebrews10:26 Ahakuba itwe abaaherize kuheebwa okumanya amazima, kutugaruka twashiisha nkana, haba hatakiriho kitambo ahabw'ebibi," 
Hebrews10:27 kureka hatsigara kutegyereza n'obwoba okucwerwa orubanja, n'omuriro gw'ekibabo oguryokeza kimwe abazigu ba Ruhanga." 
Hebrews10:28 Omuntu ku agomera ekiragiro kya Musa, yaashinjwa abantu bashatu nari babiri, tasaasirwa, aitwa." 
Hebrews10:29 Mbwenu owaateire Omwana wa Ruhanga omugyere, akateekateeka aha shagama y'endagaano ei yaayeziibwemu okuba etaine mugasho, akarogota aha Mwoyo ow'embabazi, nimuteekateeka ngu tashemereire kifubiro kihango ekirikukira ekyabo?" 
Hebrews10:30 Ahakuba nitumanya Ogwo owaagizire ati: Okuhoora enzigu n'okwangye; niinye ndiihura. Kandi ati: Mukama aryacwera abantu be orubanja. 
Hebrews10:31 Ka n'eihano omuntu okugwa omu mikono ya Ruhanga ohuriire! 
Hebrews10:32 Kwonka mwijukye ebiro ebyahingwire, muherize kujwerwa omushana, oku mwagumisiririize engamba nyingi n'obusaasi;" 
Hebrews10:33 obundi mukahinduka ab'okushungwa nibabajuma nibababonabonesa; obundi mukakwatanisa n'abarikugirwa batyo. 
Hebrews10:34 Ahakuba mukagirira embohe esaasi, kandi imwe ahabwanyu mwaikiriza n'okuhsemererwa kunyagwa ebi mutungire, ahabw'okumanya ngu imwe mwine eitungo eririkukira oburungi, kandi eritahwaho." 
Hebrews10:35 N'ahabw'ekyo mutarinaga okugumisiriza kwanyu okwine ebihembo bingi; 
Hebrews10:36 ahakuba nimwetenga kugumisiriza, ku muriheza kukora ebi Ruhanga akunda, mubone kuheebwa ebyaraganisiibwe." 
Hebrews10:37 Hatsigaire akaanya kakye, Orikwija aryaija, tariikarayo;" 
Hebrews10:38 Kwonka owangye ohikiriire aryaba ohuriire ahabw'okwikiriza; Kandi ku agaruka enyima, omutima gwangye tigumushemerererwa." 
Hebrews10:39 Kwonka itwe tituri muuri abo abarikugaruka enyima, bakahwerekyerera, kureka turi omuri abo abarikwikiriza, bakajuna amagara gaabo." 
Hebrews11:1 Okwikiriza nikwo kuhamiza kimwe ebi twineho amatsiko, kandi nikwo kutumanyisiza kimwe ebitarikureebwa;" 
Hebrews11:2 abakuru aba ira bakasiimwa Ruhanga ahabw'okukugira. 
Hebrews11:3 Okwikiriza nikwo kutumanyisa ku ensi yaahangirwe ekigambo kya Ruhanga, kandi n'ebirikureebwa kubitarahangirwe mu bintu ebiriho." 
Hebrews11:4 Ahabw'okwikiriza Abeeli akahayo ekitambo ekirikusiimwa ahari Ruhanga okukira ekya Kaini; nikyo kyamuhamize ku ahikiriire, kandi Ruhanga yaabihamya naayakiira ebi yaamutoijeire, kandi ahabw'okwikiriza okwo n'obu araabe yaafiire, naakigamba." 
Hebrews11:5 Ahabw'okwikiriza Enoka akatwarwa omu iguru ngu arekye kufa; tiyaagaruka kureebwa, ahakuba Ruhanga, akamutwara. Kandi ku yaabaire atakatwairwe, akahamibwa ku ashemeize Ruhanga." 
Hebrews11:6 Kandi otarikwikiriza tarikubaasa kumushemeza; ahakuba omuntu weena orikwija ahari Ruhanga, ashemereire kwikiriza ku ariho, kandi ku aha ebihembo abamusherura." 
Hebrews11:7 Ahabw'okwikiriza, Noa ku yaahabwirwe Ruhanga aha byabaire bitakabaireho, akamworobera, yaakora emeeri ey'okukiza ab'omu nju ye; n'ahabw'ekyo akasingisa ensi orubanja, yaahinduka omuhunguzi w'okuhikiirira okurikuruga omu kwikiriza." 
Hebrews11:8 Ahabw'okwikiriza, Abrahamu ku yaayetsirwe kuruga owaabo kuza omu nsi ei yaabaire naaza kuheebwa kuba obuhunguzi, akooroba, yaarugayo, atarikumanya ei arikuza." 
Hebrews11:9 Ahabw'okwikiriza akatuura nk'omwaijaija omu nsi ei yaaraganisiibwe, nk'etari yaabo, yaaguma omu mahema na Isaaka na Yakobo, abahunguzi b'ebyaraganisiibwe hamwe nawe." 
Hebrews11:10 Ahakuba akaba aine amatsiko g'okutaaha omu rurembo orwine emisingi, oru Ruhanga yaagyezire, kandi akarwombeka." 
Hebrews11:11 Ahabw'okwikiriza, na Saara akaheebwa amaani kugira enda, n'obu araabe yaabaire akakwire, ahakuba akateekateeka ahari Ogwo owaamuraganiise ku ari omwesigwa." 
Hebrews11:12 N'ahabw'ekyo omuntu omwe, kandi owaabaire ari nk'ofiire, yaakomookwaho abaijukuru baingi nk'enyonyoozi z'omu iguru, kandi nk'omusheenyi gw'aha rubaju rw'enyanja ogutarikubarwa." 
Hebrews11:13 Abo boona bakafa bakiri omu kwikiriza, batakahairwe bi baaraganisiibwe, kwonka bakaba babireebera hare, baabyesiimira, baahamya ku bari abagyenyi kandi abagyenzi omu nsi egi." 
Hebrews11:14 Ahakuba abarikugamba batyo baba nibamanyisa ku barikusherura ensi yaabo buzima. 
Hebrews11:15 Kuri baajuzire ensi egyo ei baarugiremu, bakaabaasize kugarukayo." 
Hebrews11:16 Kwonka hati nibeetenga ensi erikukira oburungi, niyo y'omu iguru; nikyo Ruhanga atakwatirwa nshoni kwetwa Ruhanga waabo, ahakuba akabateekateekyera orurembo." 
Hebrews11:17 Ahabw'okwikiriza, Abrahamu ku yaagyeziibwe, yaahayo Isaaka; kandi owaahairwe ebyaraganisiibwe yaikiriza kuhayo omwana we omwe nyamunegyere," 
Hebrews11:18 owaabaire agambirweho ngu: Omuri Isaaka nimwo baijukuru baawe baryetererwa; 
Hebrews11:19 ahakuba akateekateeka ngu Ruhanga naabaasa kuzoora abafu: nikyo yaamugaruriirwe nk'owaaruga omu bafu. 
Hebrews11:20 Ahabw'okwikiriza, Isaaka akashabira Yakobo na Esau omugisha ogw'ebiribaho bwanyima." 
Hebrews11:21 Ahabw'okwikiriza, Yakobo ku yaabaira ari haihi kufa, yaashabira abaana ba Yosefu bombi omugisha, naaramya Ruhanga ayehigikire eifundo ry'nkoni ye." 
Hebrews11:22 Ahabw'okwikiriza, Yosefu ku yaabaire ari haihi kufa, yaagamba ha by'okuruga Misri kw'Abaisraeli, kandi yaabaragiira n'eby'okuziikwa kwe." 
Hebrews11:23 Ahabw'okwikiriza, abazaire ba Musa ku baamuzaire, baamushereka ameezi ashatu, ahakuba bakareeba ku ari omwana murungi; kandi tibaatiina kiragiro ky'omugabe." 
Hebrews11:24 Ahabw'okwikiriza, Musa ku yaakuzire, yaayanga kwetwa mutabani wa muhara wa Faraho," 
Hebrews11:25 yaihamu okukorwa kubi hamwe n'abantu ba Ruhanga, yaayanga kuguma omu by'okweshemeza by'ekibi ebirikuhwaho juba." 
Hebrews11:26 Yaateekateeka okujumwa naaturwa Kristo ku kuri eitungo ringi okukira obutungi bwa Misri; ahakuba akaba ategyereize ekihembo eki ariheebwa. 
Hebrews11:27 Ahabw'okwikiriza, akaruga Misri atatiinire kiniga ky'omugabe; ahakuba akagumisiriza, amaisho agataire ahari Ogwo otareebwa." 
Hebrews11:28 Ahabw'okwikiriza akataho Okuhingurwaho, kandi yaamiisiira eshagama, ngu ogwo owaabaire naacwekyereza emijigaijo atakaabakoraho." 
Hebrews11:29 Ahabw'okwikiriza, Abaisraeli bakaraba omu Nyanja erikutukura nk'abarikuraba ahoomire; kwonka Abanyamisri ku baateireho kurabamu, baamirwa amaizi." 
Hebrews11:30 Ahabw'okwikiriza, orugo rw'amabaare rwe Yeriko rukagwa bwanyima y'okurweziguruka amazooba mushanju." 
Hebrews11:31 Ahabw'okwikiriza, Rahabu maraaya taracwekyereire hamwe n'abandi abaabaire bari abagomi, ahakuba aka kunira gye entatsi." 
Hebrews11:32 Mbwenu ngambe mpitsye hi? Ahakuba omwanya gukaampwaho, ku naakuza kugamba ebya Gideoni, Baraki, Samusooni, Yefusa, Daudi na Samueli na baanabi:" 
Hebrews11:33 abaasingwire obundi bugabe ahabw'okwikiriza, abaakozire eby'okuhikiirira, abaahairwe ebyaraganisiibwe, abaabumbire eminwa y'entare," 
Hebrews11:34 abaaraize ekibabo ky'omuriro, abaakizire obwogi bwa rurara, abaarugire omu bweremwa, bakatunga amaani, abaahindukire amamanzi omu ngamba, abaabingire engabo z'amahanga agandi." 
Hebrews11:35 Abakazi bakagarurirwa abafu baabo abaazoirwe. Abamwe bakateerwa ez'okubaita, batarikwenda kurekurwa, ngu nyentsya babone kuheebwa okuzooka okurikukira oburungi." 
Hebrews11:36 Abandi bakashekyererwa, abandi bakaashwa, abandi bakabohwa n'enjegyere, baatebwa omu bihome;" 
Hebrews11:37 abandi bakateerwa amabaare, baasharwamu habiri n'emisimeeno, abandi bakarengwa buzima, baitwa zaarurara, abandi bakazengyerera bajwaire empu z'entaama n'ez'embuzi, baconcoboize, nibabonabonesibwa, nibaitwa kubi;" 
Hebrews11:38 abu ensi etarashemereire ngu bagituuremu; nibazengyerera omu mahamba n'omu nshozi, nibaraara omu maaya n'omu biina omu itaka." 
Hebrews11:39 Abo boona, n'obu baraabe bahamiibwe ahabw'okwikiriza kwabo, tibaratungire bi baaraganisiibwe," 
Hebrews11:40 ahakuba Ruhanga akatuteekateekyera ira ekirikukira oburungi, ngu barekye kuhikiirizibwa, itwe tutariho." 
Hebrews12:1 N'ahabw'ekyo nk'oku twine omutwe muhango gwa baakareebi abatwehinguririize, tujuure ebirikuturemeera byona n'ekibi ekitwezingiriire, twirukye okwiruka okw'empaka oku tuteereirweho n'okugumisiriza," 
Hebrews12:2 amaisho tugahangire Yesu wenka, owaatandikire okwikiriza kwaitu kandi omuhikiiriza waakwo; owaayemeire omusharaba ahabw'okushemererwa okwatairweho omu maisho ge, akagaya enshoni zaagwo, kandi hati ashutami aha rubaju rwa buryo rw'ekitebe ky'obukama bwa Ruhanga." 
Hebrews12:3 Muteekateekye ahari Ogwo, owaagumisiririize okwangwa kutyo oku abasiisi baamwangire, murekye kuruha n'okugwa enshazi omu mirima yaanyu." 
Hebrews12:4 Imwe timukahikire ha kujwisibwa eshagama nimurwana n'ekibi. 
Hebrews12:5 Mwebirwe ekigambo ekirikubeehanangiriza nk'abaana kiti? Mwana wangye, otagaya okuhana kwa Mukama, Kandi otagwa enshazi ku araakuhane." 
Hebrews12:6 Ahakuba ou Mukama akunda niwe ahana, Kandi ateera omwana weena ou aikiriza." 
Hebrews12:7 Mugumisiririze okuhanwa; ahakuba Ruhanga naabatwaza nk'abaana; mbwenu ni mwana ki ou ishe atahana? 
Hebrews12:8 Kwonka ku muraabe mutarikuhanwa nk'abandi boona nimuba mutari baana, kureka ebizaarwa." 
Hebrews12:9 Kandi hoona tukaba twine baatataitwe ab'omu nsi abaabaire batuhana, naitwe tukaba tuboorobera. Mbwenu titushemereire kukizaho kworobera Ishe w'emyoyo yaitu, tukagira amagara?" 
Hebrews12:10 Ahakuba abo bakaba batuhana ebiro bikye nk'oku baabaire basiima; kwonka We atuhana ngu tugasirwe, kandi tukwatanise nawe omu kuhikiirira kwe." 
Hebrews12:11 Omuntu ku aba naakihanwa, tashemererwa kureka ashaasha; kwonka abamanyiziibwe okuhanwa, bwanyima kubarugiramu ebyana by'okuhikiirira ebirikureeta obusingye." 
Hebrews12:12 N'ahabw'ekyo mwimutsye emikono yaanyu enoganogokire, munanuure amaju gaanyu agazingazingirwe," 
Hebrews12:13 mucwere ebigyere byanyu emihanda eshororokire, abarikucumbagira barekye kugiremerwamu, kureka bakire." 
Hebrews12:14 Mwezirikye okugira obusingye n'abantu boona, kandi n'okwezibwa; ahakuba ahatari kwezibwa tihariho orireeba Mukama." 
Hebrews12:15 Mwerinde hatagira omuntu owaagwa akaruga omu mbabazi za Ruhanga, haza omuzi ogurikushaarira ogwabameramu, gukabatuntuza emitima, n'abaingi bakasiisikara;" 
Hebrews12:16 kandi hatabaho omushambani weena, nari otarikweta ha bya Ruhanga nka Esau owaagurize obuhunguzi bwe bw'omujigaijo akaihuro k'eby'okurya." 
Hebrews12:17 Ahakuba nimumanya ngu, bwanyima ku yaayenzire kuragwa omugisha ogwo, akangirwa, tiyaabona buryo bw'okweteisa, n'obu araabe yaagushabire naarira." 
Hebrews12:18 Kandi imwe timwizire ha rushozi orurikuhikwaho, orurikubugumwaho omuriro, n'obu haakuba harikwiririmba n'omu mwirima ndindindi, n'eihunga ry'amaani," 
Hebrews12:19 n'okugamba kw'enzamba, n'eiraka ry'ebigambo; abaarihuriire bakeeshengyereza ngu batagambirwa ebindi." 
Hebrews12:20 Ahabw'okuba tibareemeire kyaragiirwe ngu, Ekirihika aha rushozi orwo kyona, n'obu kyakuba ekitungirwe, kiteerwe amabaare." 
Hebrews12:21 Kandi n'ebyareebirwe bikaba nibitiinisa; nikyo Musa yaagiriire ati: Nyine obwoba bwingi nintetema. 
Hebrews12:22 Kureka mwizire aha rushozi Saayuuni, omu rurembo rwa Ruhanga ohuriire, Yerusaalemu orw'omu iguru, n'ahari baamaraika abateeraine omu mitwe etarikubarwa," 
Hebrews12:23 n'omu iteraniro ry'emijigaijo ehandiikirwe omu iguru, kandi mwizire n'ahari Ruhanga omucwi w'emanja za boona, n'emyoyo y'abahikiriire abaahikiriziibwe," 
Hebrews12:24 n'ahari Yesu omuteerani w'endagaano ensya, n'eshagama erikumiisiirwa, erikugamba ebirungi okukira eya Abeeli." 
Hebrews12:25 Mwerinde, mutanga kuhurira Ogwo orikugamba. Ahakuba abaayangire kworobera owaabahaniire omu nsi, ku baraabe batarakizire, itwe turyakira tuta ku turyanga kworobera Ogwo otuhana naayema omu iguru." 
Hebrews12:26 Obwo eiraka rye rikatengyetsa ensi; kwonka hati araganiise ati: Niinyija kugaruka kutengyetsa ensi rimwe, kandi ti nsi yonka kureka n'eiguru." 
Hebrews12:27 Ekigambo eki ngu, Hatsigaire rimwe, nikimanyisa okwihwaho okw'ebiritengyetsibwa, nibyo byahangirwe, ngu ebyo ebitarikutengyetsibwa bibone kugumaho." 
Hebrews12:28 N'ahabw'ekyo nk'oku twine obukama obutarikubaasa kutengyetsibwa, ka tusiime Ruhanga, tumuheereze nk'oku akunda, nitumuha ekitiinisa nitutiina;" 
Hebrews12:29 ahakuba Ruhanga waitu n'omuriro ogurikurya busha. 
Hebrews13:1 Okukundana kugumeho. 
Hebrews13:2 Mutarireka kukunira abagyenyi; ahakuba omu muringo nk'ogwo hariho abaakuniire baamaraika batakimanyire. 
Hebrews13:3 Mwijukye abari omu bihome, nk'ababohirwe nabo; kandi mwijukye n'abarikwitwa kubi, ahakuba naimwe mwine emibiri." 
Hebrews13:4 Obushwere mwena mubuhe ekitiinisa; kandi ekitabo ky'obushwere kirekye kushiishwa, ahakuba abashambani Ruhanga aryabacwera orubanja." 
Hebrews13:5 Mutarigira omutima ogurikukunda empiiha, ebi mwine bibe nibyo byabamara; ahakuba We akagira ati: Tindikutsigaho, kandi tindikuhemukaho na kakye." 
Hebrews13:6 Nikyo turikugambira, tutarikubanganisa, tuti: Mukama niwe muhwezi wangye, Tinditiina; Omuntu naabaasa kungira ata?" 
Hebrews13:7 Mwijukye abeebembezi baanyu, abaabagambiire ekigambo kya Ruhanga; mwetegyereze omuheru gw'amagara gaabo, mutooreze okwikiriza kwabo." 
Hebrews13:8 Yesu Kristo tahinduka; oku abaire ari nyomwabazyo, n'eri izooba nikwo ari, kandi nikwo ariguma ebiro byona." 
Hebrews13:9 Mutahabisibwa enyegyesa ezihangire ez'emiringo mingi; ahakuba ni kirungi omutima kuhamibwa embabazi za Ruhanga, kunu ti migyenzo y'eby'okurya etaragasiire baagiikiriize." 
Hebrews13:10 Twine eitambiro eri abaheereza b'omu Ihema bataikirizibwa kurya ebiritambiirweho. 
Hebrews13:11 Ahakuba enyamaishwa, ezi omunyamurwa omukuru atwara eshagama yaazo omu Mwanya ogurikwera okuba ebitambo by'ebibi, emitumbi yaazo bagyokyeza aheeru y'orusiisira." 
Hebrews13:12 Nikwo na Yesu yaabonaboneire aheeru y'eirembo, ngu abone kweza abantu n'eshagama ye." 
Hebrews13:13 N'ahabw'ekyo naitwe ka tushohore, tumushangye aheeru y'orusiisira, twekoreire ekijumo ahabwe." 
Hebrews13:14 Ahabw'okuba aha titwineho rurembo orurikugumaho, kureka nitusherura orundi oruriija." 
Hebrews13:15 Mbwenu ahabw'Ogwo ka tugume tutambe ekitambo ky'okusiima Ruhanga, nikyo kyana ky'eminwa erikuhimbisa eiziina rye." 
Hebrews13:16 Mutarireka kukorera abantu ebirungi, n'okukwatanisa omu bi mwine; ahakuba ebhitambo nk'ebyo nibyo bishemeza Ruhanga." 
Hebrews13:17 Muhurire abeebembezi baanyu, muboorobere; ahakuba nibo barinda amagara gaanyu, nk'abarikumanya ngu baryagabuuzibwa. Nabo babone kukora ekyo bashemereirwe, batagwirwe kubi; ahabw'okuba ekyo naimwe tikikaabagasira." 
Hebrews13:18 Mutushabire, ahakuba nituhamya ngu twine omutima ogutarikweshinja, nitwetenga kutwaza gye omuri byona." 
Hebrews13:19 Kandi nimbeeshengyereza munonga, mwezirikye kutushabira, mbone kurahuka kubagarurirwa juba." 
Hebrews13:20 Kandi Ruhanga ow'obusingye, owaagarwire Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo okuruga omu bafu, Omuriisa w'entaama omukuru, ahabw'eshagama y'endagaano etahwaho," 
Hebrews13:21 abahe ebirungi byona, mubone kukora ebi akunda, naakorera omuriimwe ebirikusiimwa omu maisho ge, ahabwa Yesu Kristo; aheebwe ekitiinisa ebiro byona. Amiina." 
Hebrews13:22 B'eshe-emwe, nimbeeshengyereza, mwikirize ekigambo eki naabahabura, ahakuba naabahandiikira nincwera hagufu." 
Hebrews13:23 Mumanye ngu ow'eishe-emwe Timoseo akarekurwa; ku ariija juba, turyabareebera hamwe." 
Hebrews13:24 Mundamukize abeebembezi baanyu boona n'abarikwera boona. Aba Italia baabaramutsya. 
Hebrews13:25 Embabazi zigume naimwe mwena. Amiina. 
James1:1 Yakobo, omuhuuku wa Ruhanga na Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo, naabahandiikira nimbaramutsya, imwe enganda ikumi na ibiri ezaataataine." 
James1:2 Beishe-emwe, ku muraagume mwahikwaho okugyezibwa kw'emiringo etari emwe, mukutwara nk'okushemererwa buzima;" 
James1:3 ahakuba nimumanya ngu okugyezibwa omu kwikiriza kwanyu kurugamu okugumisiriza. 
James1:4 Kandi murekye okugumisiriza kuhitsye omurimo gwakwo, naimwe mubone kuba abahikire omuri byona, mutaine ki mubuzirweho." 
James1:5 Kwonka omuriimwe ku haraabe harimu obuzirwe obwengye, abushabe Ruhanga, oha boona n'omutima ogutarikwima, n'obu kwakuba okweshaamya, kandi aryabuheebwa." 
James1:6 Kwonka ashabe aine okwikiriza, atarikubanganisa, ahakuba orikubanganisa naashusha nk'ekingonzi ky'enyanja ekirikutwarwa omuyaga oku n'oku." 
James1:7 Kandi omuntu ogwo arekye kuteekateeka ngu Mukama naija kumuha ekintu kyona; 
James1:8 ahakuba aine emitima ebiri, kandi omu mihanda ye taine hu ahamiire." 
James1:9 Ow'eishe-emwe omworo ayehimbise. Ahabw'okutunguurwa kwe; 
James1:10 kandi n'omutungi ayehimbise ahabw'okugarurwa ahansi, ahakuba aryahunduuka nk'orurabyo rw'obunyaatsi." 
James1:11 Nimumanya ngu omu kasheeshe eizooba riija n'omushana gurigwotsya, guhonzya obunyaatsi, orurabyo rwabwo ruragara, n'oburungi bwabwo buhwaho. Nikwo n'omuntungi arihunduuka omu mihanda ye." 
James1:12 Omuntu orikugumisiriza omu kugyezibwa aine omugisha; ahakuba ku arisingura, aryaheebwa ekirunga ky'amagara, eki Ruhanga yaaraganiise abarikumukunda." 
James1:13 Omuntu weena ku araayohibwe, arekye kugira ati: Naayohibwa Ruhanga; ahakuba Ruhanga tabaasa kwohibwa kibi, kandi nawe tayosya muntu;" 
James1:14 kwonka omuntu weena ayohibwa, yaabeihwabeihwa okwetenga kwe, kwamwosyosya." 
James1:15 Bwanyima okwetenga okwo, ku kuheza kutwara enda, kuzaara ekibi; n'ekibi ku kikura, kizaara okufa." 
James1:16 B'eishe-emwe abarikukundwa, mutabeihwabeihwa;" 
James1:17 engabirano yoona enungi n'ekiconco kyona ekihikire biruga omu iguru, nibishuuma okuruga ahari Isheboona, Omuhangi w'ebirikwaka, otahindahinduka na kakye, n'obu kwakuba okugira ekicuucu ekireetwa okuhinduka." 
James1:18 Ahabw'okukunda kwe akatuzaaza ekigambo ky'amazima, ngu tube nk'emijigaijo y'ebi yaahangire." 
James1:19 Eki nimukimanya, B'eishe-emwe abarikukundwa; omuntu weena arahukye kuhurira, kwonka atarahukiiriza kugamba, n'okugira ekiniga;" 
James1:20 ahakuba ekiniga ky'omuntu tikikora by'okuhikiirira kwa Ruhanga. 
James1:21 N'ahabw'ekyo mwiheho ekihagaro kyona n'obubi oburengyesereize; mwakiire n'obucureezi ekigambo ekibyairwe omuriimwe, ekirikubaasa kujuna amagara gaanyu." 
James1:22 Kandi mube abarikworobera Ekigambo, beitu ti kukihurira kwonka, mukeebeiha." 
James1:23 Ahakuba omuntu weena ku aba omuhurizi w'Ekigambo, ataakyorobera, ashusha nk'omuntu orikwereebera omu ndeeberwamu oku arikushusha ahamaisho;" 
James1:24 akiheza kwereeba, yaagyenda, ahonaaho akeebwa oku arikushusha." 
James1:25 Kwonka ogwo orikwetegyereza ebiragiro ebihikire eby'obusingye, akabyezirikira, atari orikubihurira kaeebwa, kureka ari omukozi orikubyorobera, omuntu ogo aryaheebwa omugisha omu kukora kwe." 
James1:26 Omuntu weena ku ayeteekateekaho kuba omunyadiini, ataarinda rurimi rwe, yaayebeiha omu mutima gwe, ediini y'omuntu ogwo n'eya busha." 
James1:27 Ediini eshemeire, etaine kamogo omu maisho ga Ruhanga Isheboona niyo egi: okutaayaayira efuuzi n'abafaakazi omu busaasi bwabo, n'okwerinda okugira amabara g'ensi." 
James2:1 B'eishe-emwe, mutariikiriza Mukama waitu ow'ekitiinisa, Yesu Kristo, kandi mukashoroora omu bantu." 
James2:2 Mbwenu omuntu ku yaakwija ahu muteeraniire, ajwaire empeta z'ezaabu n'ebijwaro ebirikwengyengyeta, kandi haija omworo ojwaire emyenda y'obutaanyagurika," 
James2:3 mwata omutima ahari ogwo ojwaire gye, muti; Ija oshutame aha aharungi; kandi mwagira omworo ogwo muti, Iwe! yemerera kuriya! nari shi, Shutama ahansi aha bigyere byangye;" 
James2:4 obwo nimuba muteetaaniisemu, mukaba abaramuzi abaine ebiteekateeko bibi?" 
James2:5 Muhurire, B'eishe-emwe abarikukundwa. Abooro omu nsi egi, Ruhanga tarabatooraine kuba abatungi omu kwikiriza, n'okuba abahunguzi b'obukama obu yaaraganiise abarikumukunda?" 
James2:6 Kwonka nimwanga mugaya ogwo mworo. Abatungi tibo babatwaza eikama, bakababindirana nibabata omu maramuriro?" 
James2:7 Tibo barogota aha Iziina ry'ekitiinisa eri mweta? 
James2:8 Ku muraabe nimuhitsya ekiragiro kya Mukama, ekyahandiikirwe ngu: Okunde mutaahi waawe nk'oku oyekunda, nimukora gye." 
James2:9 Kwonka ku murikushoroora omu bantu, nimuba musiisire, nimwomeserezibwa Ebiragiro nk'abasiisi." 
James2:10 Ahakuba omuntu weena orikuhitsya Ebiragiro byona, akashobyaho kimwe, naaba ashobize byona." 
James2:11 Ahabw'okuba Owaagizire ati: otarishambana, niwe yaagizire ati: Otariita. N'ahabw'ekyo n'obu orikuba otashambaine, kwonka okaita, nooba oshobize Ebiragiro." 
James2:12 Ahabw'ekyo mugambe kandi mukore, nk'abantu abaricwerwa orubanja Ebiragiro by'obusingye." 
James2:13 Otasaasira aryacwerwa orubanja atarikusaasirwa; kwonka embabazi zeehimbisiza aha rubanja. 
James2:14 B'eishe-emwe, nikigasha ki omuntu kugira ngu aine okwikiriza, haza ataine kukora? Okwikiriza okwo nikubaasa kumujuna?" 
James2:15 Mbwenu ku haakubaho ow'eishe-emwe, omushaija nari omukazi, otaine by'okujwara nari eby'okurya," 
James2:16 omwe ahariimwe yaabagira ati: Mugyende n'obusingye, mutagate, muhaagye, haza atabahaire by'okuhwera emibiri yaabo, kikaabagasira ki?" 
James2:17 N'okwikiriza kwonka, ku kuba kutaine kukora, kuba kufiire." 
James2:18 Shana omuntu akaagira ati: Iwe oine okwikiriza, nyow enyine okukora. Mbwenu nyoreka okwikiriza kwawe okutaine kukora; naanye nkworekye okwikiriza kwangye okurikureeberwa omu bi ndikukora." 
James2:19 Iwe oikiriza ngu Ruhanga n'omwe; ekyo ni kirungi. Nangwa na baadaimoni bakiikiriza, nibatetema." 
James2:20 Iwe mushema 'we, nooyenda kworekwa okwikiriza okutaine kukora ku kuri okufiire?" 
James2:21 Torikumanya ngu Abrahamu tatenkuriitwe akaihwaho orubanja ahabw'okukora, obu yaahayo omutabani Isaaka aha itambiro?" 
James2:22 Waareeba oku okwikiriza kwe kwagyendeire hamwe n'okukora, kandi ahabw'okukora, okwikiriza kwe kukahika;" 
James2:23 kandi Ekyahandiikirwe kikahikiirizibwa ekirikugira ngu: Abrahamu akaikiriza Ruhanga, kyamubarirwa kuba okuhikiirira; kandi yaayetwa munywani wa Ruhanga." 
James2:24 Mwareeba omuntu oku aihwaho orubanja ahabw'okukora, kutari kwikiriza kwonka." 
James2:25 Kandi na Rahabu maraaya taraihirweho orubanja ahabw'okukora, obu yaakunira entumwa, akazigarura omuhanda ogundi?" 
James2:26 Ahakuba nk'omubiri ogutarimu mwoyo oku guba gufiire, nikwo n'okwikiriza okutaine kukora kuba kufiire." 
James3:1 B'eishe-emwe, mutariikiriza baingi omuriimwe kuhinduka abeegyesa; ahakuba nimumanya ngu itwe abeegyesa turyacwerwa orubanja orurikukira ez'abandi." 
James3:2 Ahabw'okuba twena tushobya omuri bingi; omuntu weena otashobya mu kugamba, ogwo n'omuntu ohikire, naabaasa kutegyeka n'omubiri gwona." 
James3:3 Nimumanya ngu, ku tuta ebyoma omu kanwa k'embaraasi, ngu zitworobere, tuhindura emibiri yaazo yoona." 
James3:4 Kandi mureebe n'emeeri; n'obu ziraabe ziri mpango munonga, kandi nizitwarwa omuyaga gw'amaani, kwonka zihindurwa kabaho kakye munonga, kuza ei omuvugi arikwenda yoona." 
James3:5 N'orurimi narwo nikwo ruri; n'akagingo kakye, akeehimbisa omu bintu bikuru. Mureebe ekibira n'obu kiraabe kiri kihango kita, kitwekwa akariro kakye!" 
James3:6 N'orurimi ruba omuriro. Orurimi n'ensi mbi etuura omu ngingo zaitu, rushiisha omubiri gwona, rwotsya obuzaarwa bw'obuntu bwaitu bwaona, kandi narwo rwokibwa Gehana." 
James3:7 Nimumanya ngu emiringo yoona ey'enyamaishwa n'ebirikuguruka, ebirikwekurura n'eby'omu nyanja, nibibaasa kutegyekwa kandi bikaba bitegyekwa abantu;" 
James3:8 kwonka tihariho muntu orikubaasa kutegyeka orurimi; n'obubi obutatuuza, rwijwire obushegu oburikwita." 
James3:9 Nirwo tuhimbisisa Mukama Isheboona, kandi nirwo tukyeenesa abantu, abahangirwe omu kishushani kya Ruhanga." 
James3:10 Omu kanwa kamwe harugamu okuhimbisa n'okukyeena. B'eishe-emwe, ebyo tibishemerire kuba bityo." 
James3:11 Enshuro neebaasa kurugwamu amaizi amarungi n'agarikushaarira? 
James3:12 B'eishe-emwe, omutiini nigubaasa kwana emizeituuni, nari omuzaabibu kwana emitiini? Nikwo n'amaizi g'omwonyo gatabaasa kurugwamu amarungi." 
James3:13 Omuriimwe n'oha oine obwengye, orikwetegyereza? Ahabw'emitwarize ye mirungi ayorekye emirimo ye n'obwengye oburimi obucureezi." 
James3:14 Kwonka ku muraabe mwine eihari ry'obushaarizi n'okweyendeza omu mitima yaanyu, murekye kwehimbiwsa n'okubeiha, mukarwanisa amazima." 
James3:15 Obwengye obwo ti bwengye oburikuruga omu iguru, kureka n'obw'ensi, n'obw'abantu-buntu, n'obwa baadaimoni." 
James3:16 Ahakuba ahu eihari n'okweyendeza biri, niho haba okurabanamu n'okukora kubi kwona." 
James3:17 Kwonka obwengye oburikuruga omu iguru, okubanza buba obushemeire, kandi obw'obusingye, obw'okutwaza gye, obwikiriza okuteisibwa, obwijwire embabazi n'ebyana ebirungi, obutarimu kugambira habiri n'obu bwakuba obugobya." 
James3:18 Abareeta obusingye babiba embibo omu busingye ezireeta ebyana by'okuhikiirira. 
James4:1 Engamba n'endwano eziri omuriimwe niziruga hi? Tizirikuruga omu kwetenga okubi okurikurwanira omu ngingo zaanyu? 
James4:2 Mwetenga, timuheebwa; n'ekirugamu mwita; kandi mukwatwa eihari, timubaasa kutunga; n'ekirugamu murwana, kandi muhurura. Ekibazibira kuheebwa n'okutashaba." 
James4:3 Mushaba, timuheebwa, ahakuba mushaba kubi kubikoresa okwetenga kwanyu." 
James4:4 Imwe bashambani 'mwe, timurikumanya ngu omukago gw'ensi n'obuzigu ahari Ruhanga? N'ahabw'ekyo omuntu okunda kuba munywani w'ensi, aba ayehindwire omuzigu wa Ruhanga." 
James4:5 Nari nimugira ngu Ebyahandiikirwe bigambira busha obu bigira biti: Omwoyo ogu yaatuhaire kutuura omuriitwe tagugirira bwiko? 
James4:6 Kwonka akanyisa omugisha. Nikyo bigirira biti: Ruhanga arwanisa abaine amaryo, kwonka abacureezi abaha omugisha." 
James4:7 N'ahabw'ekyo mworobere Ruhanga. Murwanise Sitaane, aryabahunga." 
James4:8 Mwirire haihi Ruhanga, nawe abone kubairira haihi. Munaab3e engaro zaanyu, imwe abasiisi; mushemeze emitima yaanyu imwe abaine emitima ebiri." 
James4:9 Mushaashe, mucure, murire; okusheka kwanyu kuhindukye okucura, n'okushemererwa kwanyu kuhindukye okuganya." 
James4:10 Mwecureeze omu maisho ga Mukama, nawe aryabatunguura." 
James4:11 B'eishe-emwe, mutarigambuurana. Orikugambuura mwene ishe, nari orikumucwera orubanja, naaba agambire kubi aha Biragiro, kandi abicwereire orubanja. Kwonka ku orikucwera Ebiragiro orubanja, nooba otarikworobera Biragiro, kureka ori omucwi w'emanja." 
James4:12 Hariho Omwe owaataireho Ebiragiro, kandi omucwi w'emanja; niwe arikubaasa kujuna kandi n'okucwekyereza. Mbwenu iwe niiwe oha orikucwera mutaahi waawe orubanja?" 
James4:13 Muhurire, imwe abarikugira muti: Eri izooba nari nyencakare nitwija kuza omuri tauni nanka nari nanka, tumareyo omwaka gumwe nitushuubuza, tutungye enshaagi;" 
James4:14 haza mutarikumanya ekiraabeho nyencakare. Amagara gaanyu ni ki? Muri nk'oruhu orureebwa akaanya kakye, bwanyima rukaamuuka." 
James4:15 Kureka mukaagizire muti: Mukama waitu ku arikunda, turyagumaho tukore eki na kiriya." 
James4:16 Kwonka hati nimwesiimira omu kwehimbisa kwanyu; haza okwesiima kwona nk'okwo ni kubi. 
James4:17 N'ahabw'ekyo omuntu orikumanya kukora ebirungi, atabikore, ahariwe kiba kibi." 
James5:1 Mbwenu naimwe abatungi, murire, muboroogye ahabw'enaku ezi mwaza kureeba." 
James5:2 Obutungi bwanyu bujunzire, n'ebijwaro byanyu biriirwe ebiyenje." 
James5:3 Ezaabu zaanyu n'efeeza zikyereenyire, n'omukyereenyo gwazo guryabashinja, kandi gurye emibiri yaanyu nk'omuriro. Mukeebiikira eitungo ahabw'ebiro by'aha muheru." 
James5:4 Reeba, ebihembo byabagyesi b'emisiri yaanyu, ebi mwabaimire ahabw'obugobya, nibibarega; kandi n'okurira kw'abashaaruuzi kuhikire omu matu ga Mukama ow'amahe." 
James5:5 Mukatuura omu nsi omu kwegira gye n'omu kweshemeza; mukahaazya emitima yaanyu aha kiro ky'okwitwa. 
James5:6 Mukacwera ohikiriire orubanja, mwamwita, tiyaabangira." 
James5:7 N'ahabw'ekyo B'eishe-emwe, mugumisirize okuhitsya ahu Mukama waitu ariizira. Reeba, omuhingi ategyereza emyaka ei yaahingire ey'obuguzi bwingi, agigumisiririza okuhitsya obu etunga enjura ey'eibiba n'eya katumba." 
James5:8 Naimwe mugumisirize. Mugumye emitima yaanyu; ahabw'okuba okwija kwa Mukama wiatu kuru haihi. 
James5:9 B'eishe-emwe, mutaryetomboiterana, nyentsya mutaricwerwa orubanja; reeba, Omucwi w'emanja ayemereire aha rwigi." 
James5:10 B'eishe-emwe, baanabi abaabagambiire omu iziina rya Mukama, mubatware nk'eky'okureeberaho eky'okubonabona n'okugumisiriza." 
James5:11 Mumanye ngu abagumisiriza tubeeta abahiiriirwe. Mukahurira aha kugumisiriza kwa Yobu, kandi mwareeba eki Mukama yaagyendereire, oku aine embabazi nyingi n'okusaasira." 
James5:12 Kwonka ekirikukira byona, B'eishe-emwe, mutarirahira eiguru n'obu yaakuba ensi nari okundi kurahira kwona, kureka ekigambo kyanyu kibe Eego, Eego, nari Ngaaha, Ngaaha; mutakaagyibwaho orubanja." 
James5:13 Omuriimwe harimu orikushaasha? Ashabe. Harimu oshemereirwe? Ayeshongore eby'okuhimbisa. 
James5:14 Omuriimwe harimu orwaire? Atume aha bakuru b'ekanisa, bamushabire, bamusiigye amajuta omu iziina rya Mukama;" 
James5:15 n'okushaba okurimu okwikiriza kuryakiza ogwo orwaire, Mukama amwimutsye; kandi ku araabe aine ebibi ebi akozire, aryabisaasirwa." 
James5:16 N'ahabw'ekyo mweteisizane ebibi byanyu, kandi mushabirane, mubone kukira. Okushaba kw'ohikiriire kugira amaani maingi omu kukora kwakwo." 
James5:17 Eliya akaba ari omuntu nkaitwe; yaashaba munonga ngu enjura erekye kugwa; n'enjura yaamara emyaka eshatu n'ameezi mukaaga etarikugwa ha nsi. 
James5:18 Yaagaruka yaashaba, eiguru ryagwisa enjura, eitaka ryameza emyaka yaaryo." 
James5:19 B'eishe-emwe, omuntu weena omuriimwe ku araahabe, yaaruga omu mzima, ondiijo yaamugarura," 
James5:20 mumanye ngu orikuhindura omusiisi akamwiha omu muhanda ogu yaahabiiremu, aryaba akirize amagara ge okufa, kandi aryaba ashwekire ebibi bingi munonga." 
1Peter1:1 Nyowe Petero, entumwa ya Yesu Kristo, naabahandiikira imwe abaanyagirwe, mukataataanira omuri Ponto, Galatia, Kapadokia, Asia na Bitunia," 
1Peter1:2 abaatoorainwe Ruhanga Isheboona, nk'oku yaabamanyire ira, mukeezibwa Omwoyo, ngu mworobere Yesu Kristo, kandi ngu mumiisiirwe eshagama ye. Embabazi n'obusingye bikanye omuriimwe." 
1Peter1:3 Ruhanga, Ishe wa Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo, asiimwe! Ahabw'embabazi ze nyingi akatuzaara obwa kabiri ngu tugire amatsiko agatahwaho ahabw'okuzooka omu bafu kwa Yesu Kristo;" 
1Peter1:4 ngu tutungye obuhunguzi obutarikubaasa kuhwerekyerera, obutarikusiisikara, kandi obutarikuhunduuka, obwababiikiirwe omu iguru," 
1Peter1:5 imwe abarindwa amaani ga Ruhanga ahabw'okwikiriza, murindiirwe okujunwa okurishuuruurwa aha kiro ky'aha mperu." 
1Peter1:6 Ebyo nimubishemerererwa, n'obu muraabe hati mushemereire kumara akaanya kakye nimushaasha ahabw'okugyezibwa okw'emiringo mingi, ku kiraabe nikyetengwa," 
1Peter1:7 ngu okwikiriza kwanyu kuhamibwe ku kuri okw'amazima, kandi ku kurikukiza ezaabu obuguzi bwingi (mumanye ngu ezaabu, n'obu eraabe eri erikuhwaho, ehamibwa yaagyezibwa omu muriro) kandi okugyezibwa kw'okwikiriza kwanyu kubareetere okusiimwa n'ekitiinisa n'okuhimbusibwa aha kushuuruurwa kwa Yesu Kristo." 
1Peter1:8 Ogwo mumukunda, mutakamureebaga; kandi n'obu muraabe mutarikumureeba hati, nimumwikiriza, mumushemerererwa n'okwesiima okutarikubaasa kushoboororwa okwine ekitiinisa kingi," 
1Peter1:9 nimuheebwa okujunwa kw'amagara gaanyu, nk'ebihembo by'okwikiriza kwanyu." 
1Peter1:10 Eby'okujunwa okwo baanabi abaaragwire eby'embabazi ezi mwabaire nimwija kuheebwa, bakeezirika kubisherura n'okubishobooroza," 
1Peter1:11 nibabuuza obunaku n'obumanyiso bwabwo oku buri, obu baayorekirwe Omwoyo wa Kristo owaabaire ari omuribo, naabamanyisa obusaasi bwa Kristo butakabaireho, n'ekitiinisa ekiribaho bwanyima y'ebyo." 
1Peter1:12 Kandi nabo bakashuuruurirwa, baamanya ngu ti habw'abo bonka, kureka n'ahabwanyu, baaragura ebigambo, ebi mugambiirwe omu biro ebi abantu abaababuuriire ebigambo birungi ahabw'Omwoyo Orikwera owaatumirwe naaruga omu iguru; kandi ebigambo ebyo na baamaraika nibeetenga kubyetegyereza." 
1Peter1:13 N'ahabw'ekyo mwezirikye mugume emitima, mwerinde, mute amatsiko gaanyu aha mbabazi eziribareeterwa aha kiro ky'Okushuuruurwa kwa Yesu Kristo." 
1Peter1:14 Mube nk'abaana abarikuhurira, mutashushanisibwa nk'oku mwabaire muri, nimukurata okwetenga okubi omu butamanya bwanyu obwa ira;" 
1Peter1:15 kureka nk'Ogwo owaabeetsire oku ari orikwera, naimwe mube nikwo mwaba abarikwera omu micwe yaanyu yoona;" 
1Peter1:16 ahakuba kikahandiikwa ngu: Muryaba abarikwera, ahabw'okuba nyowe ndi orikwera." 
1Peter1:17 Kandi ku muraatakire Ogwo nka Shoimwe, ocwera omuntu weena orubanja orushemereire ebi yaakozire, atarikweta aha kitiinisa kye, mumare ebiro by'obushuhuuki bwanyu nimutiina." 
1Peter1:18 Nimumanya ku mutaracunguziibwe bintu ebihwaho nk'efeeza n'ezaabu okuruga omu micwe yaanyu etaine mugasho ei mwahungwire ahari baashwenkuriimwe," 
1Peter1:19 kureka Kristo kabacungura n'eshagama ye ey'obuguzi bwingi, nk'ey'omwana gw'entaama ogutaine kamogo n'obu ryakuba eibara;" 
1Peter1:20 owaamanyirwe ira ensi etakahangirwe, kwonka akoorekwa omu bunaku bw'aha mperu ahabwanyu," 
1Peter1:21 imwe abu yaahaire okwikiriza Ruhanga, owaamuzoire omu bafu, akamuha ekitiinisa, ngu okwikiriza kwanyu n'amatisko gaanyu bibe omuri Ruhanga." 
1Peter1:22 Mbwenu nk'oku muherize kweza amagara gaanyu omu kworobera amazima, ngu mubone kukunda ab'eishe-emwe mutarikuryarya, mukundane munonga mwihire aha mutima." 
1Peter1:23 Ahakuba mukaheza kuzaarwa obwa kabiri, mutazairwe mbibo erikujunda, kureka etarikujunda, nikyo kigambo kya Ruhanga ekihuriire kandi ekigumaho;" 
1Peter1:24 ahakuba Emibiri yoona eba nk'obunyaatsi N'oburungi bwayo buba nk'orurabyo rw'obunyaatsi; Obunyaatsi buhonga, n'orurabyo ruhunduura," 
1Peter1:25 Kwonka ekigambo kya Ruhanga kigumaho ebiro byona. Kandi ekigambo ekyo nibwo butumwa burungi obu mwagambiirwe. 
1Peter2:1 N'ahabw'ekyo mujuure eitima ryona n'obugobya bwona n'oburyarya bwona n'eihari ryona n'okubeiherera abandi kwona. 
1Peter2:2 Mube nk'abaana abeereere, mwetengye amate g'Omwoyo agatafungwire, gabakuze, gabahitsye aha kujunwa," 
1Peter2:3 ku muraabe mwarorize aha mbabazi za Mukama waitu. 
1Peter2:4 Mwije ahariwe, niwe ibaare erihuriire, eryayangirwe abantu, kwonka ahari Ruhanga eritoorainwe, ery'obuguzi bwingi;" 
1Peter2:5 kandi naimwe nk'amabaare agahuriire mwombekirwe okuba enju y'omwoyo, n'oruganda rw'abanyamurwa abarikwera ab'okutamba ebitambo by'omwyo ebirikusiimwa Ruhanga ahabwa Yesu Kristo." 
1Peter2:6 Ahakuba omu Byahandiikirwe kikahandiikwa ngu: Reeba, ninta omuri Saayuuni eibaare ry'obuhamizo bw'enju, Eritoorainwe ery'obuguzi bwingi; Kandi orikumwikiriza tarikwatwa nshoni." 
1Peter2:7 N'ahabw'ekyo ahariimwe abarikwikiriza n'Ow'obuguzi bwingi, kwonka aha batarikwikiriza kikahandiikwa ngu, Eibaare eri abombeki baayangire Niryo ryahindukire ery'obuhamizo bw'enju;" 
1Peter2:8 kandi ngu, N'eibaare eriteeza abantu entsibo, N'orukiri orubagwisa, bateera entsibo, ahabw'okuba tiboorobera kigambo, nk'oku baakiteereirweho ira." 
1Peter2:9 Kwonka imwe muri oruganda orutoorainwe, n'abanyamurwa b'obukama, eihanga eririkwera, abantu abu Ruhanga yaayetooraniire, ngu mubone kworeka oburungi bw'Owaabeetsire okuru omu mwirima, okutaaha omu mushana gwe ogurikutangaaza." 
1Peter2:10 Ira mukaba mutari ihanga, kwonka hati muri eihanga rya Ruhanga; ira mukaba mutasaasiirwe, mbwenu hati musaasiirwe." 
1Peter2:11 Abarikukundwa, nimbeeshengyereza nk'abagyenyi kandi abagyenzi, mwerinde okwetenga okubi okw'omubiri okutuura nikurwanisa amagara gaanyu," 
1Peter2:12 mugire emicwe mirungi omu Banyamahanga, kandi ku baraaze kubagambuura nibabeeta enkozi z'ebibi, bareebe ebirungi ebi murikukora, bahimbise Ruhanga omu bunaku bw'okutaayaayirwa." 
1Peter2:13 Ahabwa Mukama mworobere obutegyeki bwona obw'abantu, yaaba buri obw'omugabe nk'omutwe gwa boona," 
1Peter2:14 nari obw'abategyeki nk'abatairweho Ogwo kuhana enkozi z'ebibi, n'okusiima abarikukora gye." 
1Peter2:15 Ahakuba eki Ruhanga akunda n'eki ngu okukora gye kwanyu kubumbe akanwa k'abashema babure eky'okubagambaho omu butamanya bwabo. 
1Peter2:16 Mugire obusingye, kwonka obusingye bwanyu mutabukoresa nk'eky'okushwekyerera obubi, kureka mube abahuuku ba Ruhanga." 
1Peter2:17 Muhe abantu boona ekitiinisa. Mukunde ab'eishe-emwe. Mutiine Ruhanga. Muhe omugabe ekitiinisa. 
1Peter2:18 Imwe abahuuku, mworobere bakama baanyu nimubaha ekitiinisa kyona, ti barungi n'abarikutwaza gye bonka, kureka n'abanyamwaga nabo." 
1Peter2:19 Ahakuba omuntu asiimwe, yaagumisiririza obusaasi naaturwa busha, ahabw'okugira omutima murungi ahari Ruhanga." 
1Peter2:20 Mbwenu nimusiimwa ki, ku muraabe nimuteerwa ahabw'okukora kubi mukagumisiriza? Kwonka ku murikukora gye, mwabonabonesibwa, mukagumisiriza, ekyo nikyo kirikusiimwa ahari Ruhanga." 
1Peter2:21 Kandi nikyo mwayeteirwe, ahakuba na Kristo akabonabonesibwa ahabwanyu, yaabatsigira eky'okureeberaho, ngu mutoore omuhanda ogu yaarabiremu." 
1Peter2:22 We tarakozire kibi; n'omu kanwa ke tihararugiremu bugobya. 
1Peter2:23 Ku yaajumirwe, tiyaabagarurira; ku yaabonabonesiibwe, tiyaabahayira, kureka kaeehayo ahari Ogwo ocwa emanja z'amazima." 
1Peter2:24 Niwe yaayekoreire ebibi byaitu omu mubiri gwe aha muti, ngu itwe abaherize kufa aha bibi, tugire amagara omu kuhikiirira." 
1Peter2:25 Ahakuba mukaba nimuhaba nk'entaama, kwonka hati mugarukire aha Muriisa kandi Omureeberezi w'amagara gaanyu." 
1Peter3:1 Naimwe abakazi, mworobere mutyo baabaroimwe; ku haraabe harih abatarikworobera kigambo kya Ruhanga, bahindurwe emitwarize y'abakazi baabo, bataine kigambo kyona eki babagambiire," 
1Peter3:2 ahabw'okureeba emitwarize yaanyu mirungi ey'okutiina Ruhanga. 
1Peter3:3 Okwecuma kwanyu kurekye kuba okw'aharuguru, okw'okutisba eishokye, n'okujwara eby'ezaabu, n'okujwara ebijwaro ebiragaize aha bigyere," 
1Peter3:4 kureka okwecuma kwanyu kube okw'omunda omu mutima, okw'ekijwaro ekitasiisikara eky'omwoyo omucureezi ogutuurize ogw'obuguzi bwingi omu maisho ga Ruhanga." 
1Peter3:5 N'abakazi abarikwera aba ira, abaabaire baine amatsiko ahari Ruhanga, nikwo baabaire beecuma, niboorobera baibabo;" 
1Peter3:6 nk'oku Saara yaabaire ayorobera Abrahamu, naamweta mukama we. Naimwe hati muri bahara be, ku muraabe nimukora gye, mutaine kirikubatiinisa." 
1Peter3:7 Naimwe abashaija, mugume mutyo n'abakazi baanyu, nk'abarikwetegyereza ebishemeire, nimubaha ekitiinisa, ahakuba ni nk'enyabya zitagumire, kandi n'abahunguzi abakwataniise naimwe omu magara agu mwahereirwe busha, okushaba kwanyu kurekye kugira ekyakuzibira." 
1Peter3:8 Eky'aha muheru mwena mukwatanise omu mwoyo, musaasirane, mukundane nk'eishe-emwe, mugirirane embabazi n'omutima omucureezi." 
1Peter3:9 Murekye kwihurana ebibi, nari okugarurirana ebijumo; kureka omu mwanya gw'ebyo mushabirane omugisha; manya nikyo mwayeteirwe ngu muhungure omugisha." 
1Peter3:10 Ahakuba Orikwenda kukunda amagara ge, N'okugira obusingye omu biro bye, Ashemereire kuzibira orurimi rwe kugamba kubi, N'eminwa ye kugamba eby'obugobya;" 
1Peter3:11 Kandi ahindukye arugye omu bubi, akore ebirungi; Asherure obusingye, kandi abukuratire." 
1Peter3:12 Ahakuba amaisho ga Mukama agata aha bahikiriire, N'amatu ge agatega okushaba kwabo, Kwonka abarikukora kubi abateera ekitsyori." 
1Peter3:13 Mbwenu n'oha oribakora kubi, ku muraabe nimwezirika kukora ebirungi?" 
1Peter3:14 Kwonka ku muraabe nimuhiigwa ahabw'okuhikiirira, muhiiriirwe. Mutaritiina okukangisa kwabo, kandi mutaryemereza omutima;" 
1Peter3:15 kureka muhe Kristo ekitiinisa nka Mukama omu mitima yaanyu. Mugume mweteekateekire kushobororera omuntu weena orikubashobooroza eby'amatsiko agu mwine, kwonka mubashobororere n'obucureezi n'okutiina Ruhanga," 
1Peter3:16 n'omutima ogutarikweshinja, ngu omuri ebyo ebi murikugambwaho kubi, abarikujuma emitwarize yaanyu mirungi ey'omuri Kristo bakwatwe enshoni." 
1Peter3:17 Ahakuba ni kirungi okubonabonesibwa ahabw'okukora gye, Ruhanga ku araabe naakisiima, okukira okubonabonesibwa ahabw'okukora kubi." 
1Peter3:18 Ahabw'okuba na Kristo akabonabonesibwa rimwe ahabw'ebibi yaaheza, Ohikiriire ahabw'abatahikiriire, ngu atureete ahari Ruhanga, yaitwa omu mubiri, kwonka yaahindurwa ohuriire omu mwoyo," 
1Peter3:19 ou yaagyendeiremu okubuurira emyoyo ey'omu kihome," 
1Peter3:20 ey'abantu abatarahuriire Ruhanga ira, obu yaagumisiriza omu biro bya Noa, nibakikora emeeri, ei abantu bakye munaana bakiriiremu amaizi." 
1Peter3:21 Amaizi ago nikyo kishushani ky'ago agabakiza omu kubatizibwa, ti kwihaho nziro z'omubiri, kureka n'endagaano y'omutima ogutarikweshinja ahari Ruhanga, kandi ebajuna ahabw'okuzooka kwa Yesu Kristo," 
1Peter3:22 owaagiire omu iguru, ari aha rubaju rwa buryo rwa Ruhanga, naategyeka baamaraika n'abategyeki n'ab'obushoboorozi." 
1Peter4:1 N'ahabw'ekyo nk'oku Kristo yaabonabonesiibwe omu mubiri, naimwe muhagatire eby'okurwanisa, nigwo mutima nk'ogwe; ahakuba oherize kubonabonesibwa omu mubiri, biri aherize kureka ebibi," 
1Peter4:2 mubone kumara ebiro ebi mutsigaize omu magara g'omubiri, mutarikukora by'okurigira okubi kw'abantu, kureka ebi Ruhanga akunda." 
1Peter4:3 Murekye ebiro ebyahingwire bimare, ebi mwakoreiremu ebi Abanyamahanga bakunda, okugyendera omu micwe mibi ey'obushambani, n'okwetenga okubi, n'obusinzi, n'okuraara enkyera, n'okunywa amaarwa maingi, n'emizizo mibi ey'okuramya ebishushani." 
1Peter4:4 Ekirikubatangaaza n'okureeba mutarikurahuka kukwatanisa nabo omu burare obuhinguraine; nikyo barikubajumira. 
1Peter4:5 Kwonka baryatonganisibwa Ogwo oyeteekateekire kucwa orubanja rw'abahuriire n'abafiire. 
1Peter4:6 Nikyo engiri yaagambiriirwe n'abaafiire, ngu bacwerwe orubanja nk'abantu oku barucwerwa, babone kugira amagara omu mwoyo nka Ruhanga." 
1Peter4:7 Emperu ya byona eri haihi; n'ahabw'ekyo mwerinde, muhuguukye, mwezirikire kushaba." 
1Peter4:8 Okukira byona mukundane munonga; ahabw'okuba okukunda kushweka ebibi bingi. 
1Peter4:9 Mukunirane mutarikunyomwa; 
1Peter4:10 nk'oku omuntu weena yaahairwe ekiconco, mube nikwo mwabihweresana, nk'ababiiki barungi ab'embabazi za Ruhanga ez'emiringo yoona;" 
1Peter4:11 orikugamba agambe nk'orikugamba ebi ashuururiirwe Ruhanga; orikuheereza aheereze n'amani agu Ruhanga amuhaire, Ruhanga abone kuhimbisibwa omuri byona ahabwa Yesu Kristo; aheebwe ekitiinisa n'obutegyeki ebiro byona Amiina." 
1Peter4:12 Abarikukundwa, mutatangaazibwa omuriro ogwizire kubagyeza, nk'abahikwaho eihano;" 
1Peter4:13 kureka mushemererwe ahabw'okukwatanisa na Kristo omu busaasi bwe; kandi ekitiinisa kye ku kirishuuruurwa, nabwo mushemererwe n'okwesiima kwingi." 
1Peter4:14 Ku muraabe nimujumwa ahabw'okuturwa eiziina rya Kristo, muhiiriirwe, ahabw'okuba Omwoyo ow'ekitiinisa kandi owa Ruhanga atuura ahariimwe." 
1Peter4:15 Kwonka hatarigira omuntu omuriimwe owaabonabonesibwa ahabw'okwita, nari okwiba, nari okukora kubi, nari okweta omu by'abandi;" 
1Peter4:16 kwonka omuntu ku araabonabonesibwe nk'omukristaayo, arekye kukwatwa enshoni, kureka ahimbise Ruhanga ahabw'eiziina eryo." 
1Peter4:17 Ahakuba obunaku buhikire orubanja okutandikira aha b'omu nju ya Ruhanga; mbwenu ku ruraabe nirubandiza ahariitwe, omuheru gw'abatoorobera ngiri ya Ruhanga guryaba guta?" 
1Peter4:18 Kqandi abahikiriire ku baraagumirwe okujunwa, abatatiina Ruhanga n'abasiisi baryaba bata?" 
1Peter4:19 N'ahabw'ekyo abarikubonabona nk'oku Ruhanga akunda, bagume nibakora gye, kandi bakwatse amagara gaabo Omuhangi orikwesigwa." 
1Peter5:1 Mbwenu niinyehanangiriza abakuru omuriimwe, nk'omukuru mugyenzi waanyu, kareebi w'okubonabona kwa Kristo, kandi okwataniise naimwe ekitiinisa ekirishuuruurwa;" 
1Peter5:2 Muriise gye obusyo bwa Ruhanga, obu mwakwatsiibwe, mutaburiisa nk'abagyemirwe, kureka muburiise mweyendeire nk'oku Ruhanga arikukunda; ti habw'omururu mubi gw'okutunga ebintu, jureka mwine omutima ogurikukunda," 
1Peter5:3 murekye kutegyekyesa eikama obusyo obu mwakwatsiibwe, kureka mube eky'okureeberaho aharibwo." 
1Peter5:4 Bwanyima Omuriisa omukuru ku aryorekwa, muryaheebwa ekirunga ky'ekitiinisa ekitarikuhunduuka." 
1Peter5:5 Nikwo naimwe abato mworobere abakuru. Mwena mwezirikye obucureezi, mubone kuheerezana; ahakuba Ruhanga arwanisa ab'amaryo, kwonka abacureezi abaha omugisha." 
1Peter5:6 N'ahabw'ekyo mwecureeze ahansi y'omukono gwa Ruhanga ogw'amaani, obunaku ku burihika abatunguure." 
1Peter5:7 Mumwegyekyerere okushoberwa kwanyu kwona, ahabw'okuba naabataho omutima." 
1Peter5:8 Mwerinde; mugume nimureeba. Sitaane omuzigu waanyu naashooba nk'entare erikutsinda, naasherura ou araarye." 
1Peter5:9 Mumurwanise, muhamire omu kwikiriza kwanyu, nimumanya ngu ab'eishe-emwe abari omu nsi yoona nabo bahikwaho obusaasi nk'obwanyu." 
1Peter5:10 Kandi Ruhanga ow'embabazi zoona, owaabeeteire ekitiinisa kye ekitahwaho omuri Kristo, ku muriheza kubonabonesibwa akaanya kakye, aryabagarura busya, abagumye, abahe amaani." 
1Peter5:11 Aheebwe obutegyeki ebiro n'ebiro. Amiina. 
1Peter5:12 Naabahandiikira nincwera ahagufu, nimpandiikisa Siluwano, ow'eishe-emwe orikwesigwa, nk'oku ndikuteekateeka; nimbeehanangiriza, kandi nimpamya ngu ezi nizo mbabazi za Ruhanga ez'amazima; mube nizo mwahamiramu." 
1Peter5:13 Ekanisa ya Babulooni eyaatooraimwe nkaimwe yaabaramutsya; kandi na Mako omwana wangye yaabaramutsya. 
1Peter5:14 Muramukanise okunywegyera kw'okukunda. Mugume n'obusingye, imwe mwena abari omuri Kristo." 
2Peter1:1 Nyowe Simooni Petero, omuhuuku kandi entumwa ya Yesu Kristo, naabahandiikira imwe, abaahairwe okwikiriza kw'obuguzi bwingi nk'okwaitu, omu kuhikiirira kwa Ruhanga waitu kandi Omujuni waitu Yesu Kristo;" 
2Peter1:2 embabazi n'obusingye byongyerwe omuriimwe omu kumanya Ruhanga na Yesu Mukama waitu. 
2Peter1:3 Ahakuba tureebire ngu amaani g'obwaruhanga bwe gakatuha ebintu byona ebishemereire amagara n'okutiina Ruhanga ahabw'okumanya Ogwo owaatweteire ekitiinisa kye n'oburungi bwe," 
2Peter1:4 ebyamureeteire kuturaganisa eby'obuguzi bwingi kandi ebikuru munonga, ngu ahabw'ebyo murugye omu kujunda okw'omu nsi okurikureetwa okwetenga okubi, mubone kukwatanisa na Ruhanga omu buteeka bwe." 
2Peter1:5 N'ahabw'ekyo mugire obweziriki bwingi; aha kwikiriza kwanyu mwongyereho emicwe emirungi; aha micwe emirungi yaanyu mwongyereho okwetegyereza; 
2Peter1:6 aha kwetegyereza mwongyereho kwerinda; aha kwerinda mwongyreho okugumisiriza; aha kugumisiriza mwongyereho okutiina Ruhanga; 
2Peter1:7 aha kutiina Ruhanga mwongyereho okukunda ab'eishe-emwe mwongyereho okukunda. 
2Peter1:8 Kandi ebyo ku muraabe mubiine, byayongyera kuba bingi munonga, nibibazibira kuba abeeremwa nari abatarikwana byana omu by'okumanya Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo." 
2Peter1:9 Ahakuba obuzirweho ebyo aba afiire amaisho, naareeba ebiri haihi, kandi aba ayebirwe ku yaashemeziibweho ebibi bye ebya ira." 
2Peter1:10 N'ahabw'ekyo, B'eishe-emwe, mwongyere kwezirika kuhamya okwetwa kwanyu n'okutooranwa kwanyu; ahakuba ku muraatwaze mutyo, timurigwa biro byona;" 
2Peter1:11 kureka muryaheerwa kimwe okutaaha omu bukama obutahwaho bwa Mukama waitu kandi Omujuni waitu Yesu Kristo. 
2Peter1:12 Nikyo nyendera kubaijutsya obutoosha ebigambo ebyo, n'obu muraabe nimubimanya, kandi muhamiire omu mazima agu mwine." 
2Peter1:13 Kandi ninteekateeka nti, obu nkiri omu rusiisira oru, nshemereire kubeezirikisa ahabw'okubaijutsya," 
2Peter1:14 nimmanya ngu okwihwaho okw'orusiisira rwangye kuri haihi, nka Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo oku yammanyiise." 
2Peter1:15 Kandi niinyija kwezirika ngu, ku ndiheza kufa, mubaase kuguma nimweyijutsya ebyo buri mwanya gwona." 
2Peter1:16 Mumanye ngu titurakuratiire nfumu ezaagunzirwe n'obwengye, obu twabamanyisa obushoboorozi bwa Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo n'okwija kwe, kureka tukaba turi baakareebi b'ekitiinisa ky'obukama bwe." 
2Peter1:17 Ahakuba Ruhanga Isheboona akamuha ekitiinisa n'okuhimbisibwa, obu eiraka ryamwizira niriruga omu kitiinisa ekirikukira byona, nirigira riti: Ogu n'Omwana wangye orikukundwa, ou nshemerererwa munonga;" 
2Peter1:18 kandi eryo iraka tukarihurira niriruga omu iguru, obu twabaire turi hamwe nawe aha rushozi orwo orurikwera." 
2Peter1:19 Kandi twine ekigambo ky'obunabi ekirikukira kuhamibwa. Ku murikyetaho, muryaba mukozire gye, ahakuba kiri nk'etabaaza erikwaka omu mwirima, okuhitsya obu buritaagurikana, n'enyonyoozi ey'omu kasheeshe ekaaka omu mitima yaanyu." 
2Peter1:20 Mubanze mumanye eki ngu tihariho kigambo ky'obunabi eky'omu Byahandiikirwe ekirikubaasa kushoboororwa omuntu nk'oku arikweyendera; 
2Peter1:21 ahakuba tihariho kigambo kya baanabi ekyabaire kireetwa okukunda kw'omuntu, kureka abantu bakaba bagamba ebyaruga ahari Ruhanga, nibakoresibwa Omwoyo Orikwera." 
2Peter2:1 Kwonka hakaba haimuka na baanabi ab'ebishuba omu ihanga (rya israeli), nk'oku omuriimwe haribamu abeegyesa ab'ebishuba, abaritaasya omu mubonano enyegyesa erikuhabisa, ekahwerekyereza, nangwa bakeehakana Mukama waabo owaabacungwire, bakeereetaho okucwekyerera kw'ahonaaho." 
2Peter2:2 Kandi baingi baryakuratira emicwe yaabo ey'obushambani; abo baryajumisa omuhanda gw'amazima. 
2Peter2:3 Omu kwetenga kwabo baryabaihamu enshaagi, nibababihabeiha n'ebigambo by'ebishuba; kwonka orubanja oru baacwereirwe ira tiruriikarayo, n'okucwekyerera kwabo tikurihungira." 
2Peter2:4 Ahakuba Ruhanga ku araabe atarasaasiire baamaraika obu baashiisha, akabanaga okuzimu, akabata omu biina eby'omwirima okurindirwayo okuhitsya aha kiro ky'orubanja;" 
2Peter2:5 kandi ku araabe atarasaasiire nsi eya ira, akakiza Noa omurangi w'okuhikiirira n'abandi mushanju, obu yaareeta omwegyemure gw'amaizi aha nsi ey'abatarikumutiina;" 
2Peter2:6 kandi ku araabe yaacwereire endembo za Sodoma na Gomora orubanja, akazihindura eiju, kazigira eky'okureeberaho aha barikugyendera omu kutamutiina;" 
2Peter2:7 akakiza looti ohikiriire, owaabaire ashobeirwe ahabw'emicwe mibi y'abashambani;" 
2Peter2:8 (ahakuba omushaija ogwo ohikiriire akaba atwire nabo, naareeba kandi naahurira ebi baabaire bakora, kwonka agira enaku ebiro byona omu mutima gwe oguhikiriire ahabw'eby'obugomi ebi baabaire nibakora)" 
2Peter2:9 n'ahabw'ekyo Mukama naamanya kukiza abarikumutiina omu kugyezibwa, kandi n'okugumya abatahikiriire omu kifubiro okuhitsya aha kiro ky'orubanja," 
2Peter2:10 okukira abo abatwarwa omubiri n'okwetenga kwagwo okurikubashiisha, n'abarikugaya obutegyeki. N'abantu abatagira ki batiina, ebyegyengye abatatiina kujuma b'ekitiinisa," 
2Peter2:11 kunu baamaraika, n'obu baraabe babakiza amaani n'obushoboorozi, tibacwera b'ekitiinisa abo rubanja omu maisho ga Mukama, nibabajuma." 
2Peter2:12 Kwonka abo bashusha nk'enyamaishwa ezitaine bwengye, ezaahangiirwe kutegwa n'okwitwa, kandi basheka ebi batarikumanya; aha muheru okuherekyerera kwabo nabo kuryabahwerekyereza," 
2Peter2:13 bakorwe kubi, nibaihurwa ebihembo by'okukora kubi kwabo. Beesiimira ebinoomo nyomushana; n'abantu b'amabara mabi n'obumogo, bazaana kubi omu magyenyi gaabo, nibariira hamwe naimwe;" 
2Peter2:14 baine amaisho agaijwire obushambani, kandi agataruha kushiisha; niboosya ab'emitima etahamire, baine omutima ogumanyiire okwetenga okubi; n'abaana bakyeenirwe;" 
2Peter2:15 abaateishukire omuhanda oguhikire, bakahaba, bakatoora omuhanda gwa Balamu mutabani wa Beori, owaakunzire ebihembo by'okutahikiirira;" 
2Peter2:16 kwonka akahanwa ahabw'okushiisha kwe, obu endogoya etagamba yaagamba nk'omuntu, ekazibira eiraro rya nabi ogwo." 
2Peter2:17 Abo ni nk'amaziba agatarimu maizi, kandi ebicu ebitwarwa omuyaga; barindiirwe okunagwa omu mwirima ndindindi." 
2Peter2:18 bagamba ebigambo ebikuru eby'okwetunguura ebitaine mugasho; boosya abantu ababa bahungire abatuura omu buhabe, nibababeihabeihesa okwetenga okubi okw'omubiri." 
2Peter2:19 Babaraganisa obusingye, haza bo bari abahuuku b'okujunda; ahakuba ekisingura omuntu, nikyo aba omuhuuku waakyo." 
2Peter2:20 Ahabw'okuba abaaherize kukira ebihagaro eby'ensi ahabw'okumanya Mukama n'Omujuni waitu Yesu Kristo, ku baagaruka kubyetaasyamu, byabasingura, ebya bwanyima byabo biba bibi okukira eby'okubanza." 
2Peter2:21 Mumanye ngu ekyakubaire gye aharibo, kuri bataramanyire muhanda gw'okuhikiirira, okukira obu baherize kugumanya, bakateishuka, bakareka ekiragiro ekirikwera eki baahairwe." 
2Peter2:22 Ekyo kibahikireho nk'enfumu y'amazima erikugira eti: Embwa neegarukira ebitanaki byayo, n'empunu eyoogiibwe egaruka kwekuringa omu shaabo." 
2Peter3:1 Abarikukundwa, egi n'ebaruha ya kabiri ei naabahandiikira; omu baruha ezo zombi eki naagyendereire n'okusisiimura emitima yaanyu etarimu buryarya nimbaijutsya;" 
2Peter3:2 ngu mwijukye ebigambo ebyagambirwe ira baanabi abarikwera, n'ekiragiro kya Mukama kandi Omujuni waitu eki mwagambiirwe entumwa ezaabatumirweho." 
2Peter3:3 Mubanze mumanye eki ngu, omu biro by'aha mperu haryaija abagaaniizi abarikugaaniiza, nibakuratira okwetenga kwabo okubi," 
2Peter3:4 nibagira bati: Ku yaaraganiise kwija! Mbwenu arahi? Ahakuba okwiha obu baatatenkuriitwe baagwejegyera, byona bituura nk'oku byabaire biri aha kutandika kw'okuhangwa kw'ensi." 
2Peter3:5 Ahakuba nibabyeyebesa nkana, nibamanya ngu hakaba hariho eiguru okuruga ira, n'ensi eyaahangirwe ekigambo kya Ruhanga okuruga omu maizi, kandi ekaguma eri ahagati yaago;" 
2Peter3:6 kandi ahabw'ekigambo kya Ruhanga ensi eyaabaire eriho ekagaruka yaashwekwa amaizi g'omwegyemure, yaamirwa;" 
2Peter3:7 kwonka eiguru n'ensi ebiriho hati, ahabw'ekigambo ekyo, bibiikiirwe omuriro, nibirindwa okuhitsya aha kiro ky'orubanja eki abantu abatatiina Ruhanga baricwekyererezibwaho." 
2Peter3:8 Kwonka, B'eishe-emwe, mutaryebwa ekigambo eki, ngu ekiro kimwe ahari Mukama ni nk'emyaka rukumi, kandi n'emyaka rukumi ni nk'ekiro kimwe." 
2Peter3:9 Mukama tatuuzayo ki yaaraganiise, nk'abamwe oku barikuteekateeka, kureka agumisiriza ahabwanyu, atarikwenda muntu weena kuhwerekyerera, kureka naayenda ngu boona bahikye aha kweteisa." 
2Peter3:10 Kwonka ekiro kya Mukama kiryaija nk'omushuma; obwo eiguru riryarugaho n'okuhinda kuhango, n'ebintu by'obuhangwa biryayagibwa omuriro, kandi ensi n'ebigirimu biryayokibwa." 
2Peter3:11 Ebyo byona ku biraabe biri eby'okuyaga bityo, mureebe oku mushemereire kuba abarikwera kandi abarikutiina Ruhanga omu mitwarize yaanyu," 
2Peter3:12 nimutegyereza ekiro kya Mukama, kandi nimukora eby'okukirahutsya; ahabw'ekyo kiro eiguru riryayokibwa rihweho, kandi eby'obuhangwa biryayagibwa omuriro mwingi." 
2Peter3:13 Kwonka itwe nitutegyereza eiguru eritsya n'ensi ensya ebituurwamu okuhikiirira, nk'oku yaaraganiise." 
2Peter3:14 N'ahabw'ekyo, abarikukundwa, nk'oku mutegyereize ebyo, mwezirikye abashangye mwine obusingye, mutaine ibara ribi n'obu kaakuba akamogo omu maisho ge." 
2Peter3:15 Mumanye ngu okugumisiriza kwa Mukama waitu okwo nikwo kujunwa; nka mugyenzi waitu orikukundwa paulo oku yaabahandiikiire nk'obwengye obu yaahairwe oku buri," 
2Peter3:16 naagamba atyo omu baruha ze zoona. Omuri ezo harimu ebigambo bimwe ebigumire kwetegyerezibwa, ebi abatarikwetegyereza n'abatahamire bakiikamya, nk'oku bagira ebyahandiikirwe ebindi, bakeereetaho okuhwerekyerera." 
2Peter3:17 N'ahabw'ekyo naimwe, abarikukundwa, nk'oku mushangirwe nimumanya ebyo, mwerinde mutahabisibwa obuhabe bw'abantu babi, mukaruga omu kuhama kwanyu."
