2Peter3:18 Kureka mukurire omu mbabazi za Mukama waitu kandi Omujuni Yesu Kristo, n'omu kumumanya. Aheebwe ekitiinisa hati n'ebiro byona. Amiina."

1John2:16 Ahakuba byona eby'omu nsi, ebi omubiri gwetegna, n'ebi amaisho geetenga, n'okwehimbisa ahabw'eby'amagara aga, tibiruga hari Isheboona, kureka biruga omu nsi egi."

Jude1:1 Nyowe Yuda, omuhuuku wa Yesu Kristo, kandi murumuna wa Yakobo, naabahandiikira imwe abaayetsirwe, abarikukundwa omuri Ruhanga Isheboona, kandi abarindiirwe Yesu Kristo;" 
Jude1:2 embabazi n'obusingye n'okukunda byeyongyere omuriimwe. 
Jude1:3 Abarikukundwa, ku naabaire niinyezirika munonga kubahandiikira eby'okujunwa kwaitu twena, nkagyemwa kubahandiikira nimbeehanangiriza kurwanira munonga okwikiriza oku abarikwera baahairwe rimwe kikahwa." 
Jude1:4 Ahakuba hariho abantu bamwe abashensheire omuriitwe batamanyirwe, abaarangirwe ira ku baricwerwa orubanja oru; n'abantu abatatiina Ruhanga, abahindura embabazi za Ruhanga orwekwatso ngu bashambane, bakeehakana Omutegyeki waitu omwe wenka kandi Omujuni waitu Yesu Kristo." 
Jude1:5 Mbwenu n'obu muraabe mwamanyiire kimwe byona, niinyenda kubaijutsya nti, Mukama owaajunire eihanga ry'Israeli okuruga omu nsi ya Misri, bwanyima akahwerekyereza abataraikiriize;" 
Jude1:6 kandi na baamaraika, abatararinzire bukuru bwabo, bakaruga omu mwanya gwabo ogu baabaire batuuramu, akibarindiire omu mwirima omu njegyere ezitarugwamu, okuhitsya aha kiro kikuru eky'orubanja;" 
Jude1:7 kandi n'aba Sodoma na Gomora n'ab'omu ndembo ezaabaire zihereraine nazo, abaayehaireyo omu bushambani n'okukoranaho eby'enshoni ebitari by'obuhangwa, bakaheebwa ekifubiro ky'omuriro ogutaraara, baaba eky'okureeberaho." 
Jude1:8 Kandi omu muringo ogwo abashaija abo bashiisha emibiri yaabo omu birooto, bagaya obutegyeki, kandi bajuma ab'ekitiinisa." 
Jude1:9 Kwonka Mikaeli maraika omukuru, ku yaarwaniise Sitaane, naahakana nawe nibafa omubiri gwa Musa, tareehangire kumucwera rubanja naamujuma, kureka akagira ati: Mukama akuhane." 
Jude1:10 Kwonka abashaija abo bajuma ebi batarikumanya; kandi ebi barikumanya, babimanyisibwa obuntu bwabo nk'enyamaishwa ezitaine bwengye, nibyo bakoresa okweshiisha." 
Jude1:11 Baryakareeba! Ahakuba batoora omuhanda gwa Kaini, boohokyera omu buhabe bwa Balamu ahabw'okutunga enshaagi, kandi bacwekyererera omu bugomi bwa Koora." 
Jude1:12 Abo, ku baba nibarya naimwe, ni nk'amabara agarikushiisha amagyenyi gaanyu ag'okukundana; n'abariisa b'entaama abariisa enda zaabo batarikutiina; n'ebicu ebitarimu njura ebitwarwa omuyaga; n'ebiti ebitariho byana omu bunaku bw'ekyanda ebifiire kabiri, ebirimbwirwe n'emizi;" 
Jude1:13 ni nk'ebingonzi by'enyanja eby'amaani, babira eifuro ry'enshoni zaabo; kandi ni nk'enyonyoozi ezitahamiire hamwe, abarindiirwe omwirima ndindindi ebiro byona." 
Jude1:14 Kandi abo nibo Enoka, owa mushanju okuruga ahari Adamu, yaaragwireho ati: Reeba, Mukama akaija n'abarikwera be obukumi n'obukumi," 
Jude1:15 okucwera boona orubanja, n'okurusingisa boona abatatiina Ruhanga ahabw'eby'okutamutiina ebi baakozire bakamucumuraho, kandi n'ebigambo ebigumire byona ebi abasiisi abatatiina Ruhanga baamugambireho nibamurwanisa." 
Jude1:16 Abo n'abeetomboita, abatuura nibatonzya, abakurata okwetenga kwabo okubi, abeehimbisa n'ebigambo ebirengyesereize, kandi abaha abantu ekitiinisa nibabendamu enshaagi." 
Jude1:17 Kwonka imwe, abarikukundwa, mwijukye ebigambo ebyagambirwe ira entumwa za Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo," 
Jude1:18 oku zaabagambiire, nizigira ziti: Omu biro by'aha mperu haryabaho abashekyerezi, abarikukurata okwetenga kwabo okw'okutatiina Ruhanga." 
Jude1:19 Abo nibo bareeta okwetaanisamu, abantu-buntu abataine Mwoyo." 
Jude1:20 Kwonka imwe, abarikukundwa, mweyombekye aha musingi gw'okwikiriza kwanyu okurikwera munonga; mushabe omu Mwoyo Orikwera." 
Jude1:21 Mwerindire omu kukunda kwa Ruhanga; mutegyereze okusaasira kwa Mukama waitu Yesu Kristo, okuribahitsya omu maara agatahwaho." 
Jude1:22 Kandi abamwe abarikubanganisa mubaikiririse; 
Jude1:23 abandi mubakize nimubashahura omu muriro; n'abandi mubasaasire nimutiina, nangwa mwangye n'ekijwaro ekiine amabara agateirweho omubiri." 
Jude1:24 Ogwo orikubaasa kubarinda kutagwa kandi n'okubamurika omu maisho g'ekitiinisa kya Ruhanga nimushemererwa munonga mutaine kamogo," 
Jude1:25 Ruhanga ogwo omwe wenka, Omujuni waitu owaatujunire ahabwa Yesu Kristo Mukama waitu, aheebwe ekitiinisa eky'obukama bwe n'obutegyeki n'obushoboorozi, ebi yaabaire aine ira ryona, hati n'ebiro byona. Amiina." 
Revelation1:1 Ebyashuurwirwe Yesu Kristo, ebi Ruhanga yaamuhaire kworeka abahuuku be ebyabaire nibyenda kubaho juba, nawe akatuma maraika we kubimanyisa omuhuuku we Yohaana," 
Revelation1:2 owaahamize ebi yaareebire byona eby'ekigambo kya Ruhanga n'eby'okuhamya oku Yesu Kristo yaahamize. 
Revelation1:3 Orikushoma ebigambo by'obunabi obu aine omugisha, kandi baine omugisha abarikubihurira, bakata omutima aha bihandiikirwemu; ahabw'okuba obunaku buri haihi." 
Revelation1:4 Nyowe Yohaana naabahandiikira imwe amakanisa mushanju ag'omuri Asia; nimbendeza embabazi n'obusingye ebirikuruga ahari Ogwo oriho, kandi owaabaire ariho, kandi oribaho, kandi ebirikuruga aha myoyo mushanju eri omu maisho g'ekitebe kye eky'obukama," 
Revelation1:5 kandi ebirikuruga ahari Yesu Kristo kareebi omwesigwa, omujigaijo omu kuzooka, kandi omutegyeki w'abagabe b'ensi. Ogwo otukunda, kandi owaatukomoroire omu bibi byaitu n'eshagama ye," 
Revelation1:6 akatuhindura obukama n'abanyamurwa ahari Ruhanga we kandi Ishe, aheebwe ekitiinisa n'obutegyeki ebiro byona. Amiina." 
Revelation1:7 Reeba, naija n'ebicu, kandi eriisho ryona riryamureeba, n'abo abaamucumitsire; n'enganda zoona ez'omu nsi ziryaborooga ahabw'okwija kwe. Eego, Amiina." 
Revelation1:8 Niinye Alufa na Omega; nikwo Mukama Ruhanga arikugira, oriho, kandi owaabaire ariho, kandi oribaho, Ow'obushoboorozi bwona." 
Revelation1:9 Nyowe Yohaana mwene waanyu, okwataniise naimwe omuri Yesu omu busaasi n'omu bukama n'omu kugumisiriza, nkaba ndi aha kirwa Patumo, ntuzirwe ekigambo kya Ruhanga n'okuhamya ebya Yesu." 
Revelation1:10 Aha izooba rya Mukama nkaba ndi omu Mwoyo, naahurira eiraka rihango nk'ery'enzamba enyima yangye," 
Revelation1:11 nirigira riti: Ebi oraareebe obihandiikye omu kitabo, okyoherereze amakanisa aga mushanju, eya Efeso, Sumuruna, Perugamo, Suatira, Saadi, Filudelafia na Laodikia." 
Revelation1:12 Ahonaaho naahinduka kureeba owaabaire naagamba naanye; ku naahindukire, naareeba ebikondo by'etabaaza mushanju eby'ezaabu," 
Revelation1:13 kandi ahagati y'ebyo bikondo hakaba hariho Orikushusha Omwana w'omuntu, ojwaire ekijwaro ekihikire aha bigyere, kandi ayezirikire orukoba rw'ezaabu omu kifuba;" 
Revelation1:14 omutwe gwe n'eishokye rye bikaba nibyera nk'ebyoya by'entaama, nibyerera kimwe nk'orubaare; amaisho ge gakaba gari nk'endimi z'omuriro," 
Revelation1:15 ebigyere bye bikaba nibyengyengyeta nk'omuringa ogushemereziibwe omu iziiko, kandi eiraka rye rikaba nirihoorera nk'amaizi maingi;" 
Revelation1:16 omu mukono gwe gwa buryo akwaitsemu enyonyoozi mushanju, omu kanwa ke haarugamu rurara ey'amoogi abiri, kandi ahamaisho ge hakaba ninamurinkana nk'eizooba eririkujwisa amaani." 
Revelation1:17 Ku naamureebire, naagwa aha bigyere bye nk'ofiire. Kwonka yantaho omukono gwe gwa buryo naagira ati: Otatiina; niinye w'okubanza kandi ow'aha muheru, mbwenu ohuriire." 
Revelation1:18 Nkaba nfiire, mbwenu ndi ohuriire ebiro byona; kandi nyine ebishumuruzo bya Rufu n'Okuzimu." 
Revelation1:19 Mbwenu handiika ebi waareeba, ebiriho kandi ebiribaho bwanyima." 
Revelation1:20 Amakuru g'enyonyoozi mushanju ezi waareeba omu mukono gwangye gwa buryo, kandi n'ebikondo by'etabaaza mushanju eby'ezaabu, ezo nyonyoozi mushanju nibo baamaraika b'ago makanisa mushanju, kandi ebyo bikondo by'etabaaza mushanju nigo makanisa mushanju." 
Revelation2:1 Handiikira maraika w'ekanisa ey'omuri Efeso, oti: Ebi nibyo bigambo by'Ogwo okwaitse enyonyoozi mushanju omu mukono gwe gwa buryo, kandi ogyenda naataayaayira ebikondo by'etabaaza mushanju eby'ezaabu." 
Revelation2:2 Ati: Nimmanya ebi orikukora, okwezirika kwawe, n'okugumisiriza kwawe; kandi nimmanya ku otabaasa kugumisiririza abantu babi, kandi ku waayetegyereize abeeyeta entumwa, haza batari bo, okashanga bari ab'ebishuba." 
Revelation2:3 Nimmanya ku ogumisiriza, kandi ku oyemera bingi ahabw'eiziina ryangye, kandi ku otakaruhaga." 
Revelation2:4 Kwonka nyine eki ndikufa naiwe; okareka okukunda kwawe okw'okubanza. 
Revelation2:5 N'ahabw'ekyo oijukye ahu waihire waaza kugwa, oyeteise, ogarukye okore nk'oku waabaire nookora okubanza. Ku oraabe otakozire otyo, ndyaija ahariiwe, nyihe ekikondo ky'etabaaza yaawe omu mwanya gwakyo, ku oriba oteeteisize." 
Revelation2:6 Kwonka eki oine, oyanga ebi Abanikolaiti bakora, naanye ebi nyanga." 
Revelation2:7 Oine amatu ahurire eki Omwoyo arikugambira amakanisa. Orikusingura ndyamwikiriza kurya aha muti gw'amagara, oguri omuri Paradiiso ya Ruhanga." 
Revelation2:8 Handiikira maraika w'ekanisa ey'omuri Sumuruna, oti: Ebi nibyo bigambo by'Ow'okubanza kandi Ow'aha muheru, owaabaire afiire, mbwenu ahuriire." 
Revelation2:9 Naagira ati: Nimmanya obusaasi bwawe, n'obworo bwawe (kwonka ori omutungi), kandi nimmanya ngu ojumwa abeeyeta Abayudaaya, haza batari bo, bari sinagogi ya Sitaane." 
Revelation2:10 Otatiina ebi orikwija kubonabonesibwamu. Reeba, Sitaane naija kuta bamwe omuriimwe omu kihome, ngu mugyezibwe, kandi mumare ebiro ikumi nimubonabonesibwa. Guma ori omwesigwa okuhitsya aha kufa; naanye ndyakuha ekirunga ky'amagara." 
Revelation2:11 Oine amatu ahurire eki Omwoyo arikugambira amakanisa. Orikusingura, okufa okwa kabiri tikwine ki kurimwitsa." 
Revelation2:12 Handiikira maraika w'ekanisa ey'omuri Perugamo oti: Ebi nibyo bigambo by'Ogwo oine rurara y'amoogi abiri arikugamba," 
Revelation2:13 naagira ati: Nimmanya ahu otuura ku niho ekitebe ky'obukama bwa Sitaane kiba; ku ogumiza kimwe eiziina ryangye, kandi ku otareehakaine ku orikuunyikiriza, nangwa n'omu biryo bya Antipa, kareebi wangye omwesigwa, owaitiirwe owaanyu, ahu Sitaane atuura." 
Revelation2:14 Kwonka nyine ebigambo bikye ebi ndikufa naiwe; okwo oineyo abarikwikiriza enyegyesa ya Balamu, owaayegyeise Balaki kuta enkongi omu maisho g'Abaisraeli, ngu barye ebitambiirwe ebishushani ebirikuramibwa, kandi bashambane." 
Revelation2:15 Kandi hoona oine n'abandi abarikwikiriza enyegyesa ey'Abanikolaiti. 
Revelation2:16 N'ahabw'ekyo oyeteise; ku oraabe oteeteisize, niinyija kwija juba ahariiwe, mbarwanise na rurara ey'omu kanwa kangye." 
Revelation2:17 Oine amatu, ahurire eki Omwoyo arikugambira amakanisa. Orikusingura ndyamuha omugabo aha maanu esherekirwe, kandi ndyamuha eibaare eririkwera, erihandiikirweho eiziina risya, eritarikumanywa muntu weena kureka ogwo owaariheebwa." 
Revelation2:18 Handiikira maraika w'ekanisa ey'omuri Suatira, oti: Ebi nibyo bigambo by'Omwana wa Ruhanga, oine amaisho agari nk'endimi z'omuriro, n'ebigyere bye biri nk'omuringa ogurikwengyengyeta." 
Revelation2:19 Naagira ati: Nimmanya emirimo yaawe, n'okukunda kwawe n'okwikiriza n'okuheereza n'okugumisiriza kwawe, kandi nimmanya ngu emirimo yaawe eya bwanyima neekira ey'okubanza." 
Revelation2:20 Kwonka nyine eki ndikufa naiwe; ogumisiririza omukazi Yezebeeli, orikweyeta nabikazi, kandi oyegyesa abahuuku bangye, akabahabya ngu bashambane, kandi ngu barye ebitambiirwe ebishushani." 
Revelation2:21 Nkamuha omwanya gw'okweteisa; kwonka yaayanga kweteisa obushambani bwe. 
Revelation2:22 Reeba, niinyija kumunaga aha kitabo n'abashambane be omu kubonabona kwingi, ku baraabe bateeteisize by'emicwe ye;" 
Revelation2:23 kandi n'abaana be ndyabaitsa rufu; amakanisa goona garyamanya ngu niinye ocaaka emitima n'emyoyo; kandi ndyazimuurira omuntu weena omuriimwe ebishemereire ebi yaakozire. 
Revelation2:24 Kwonka imwe ab'omuri Suatira abatsigaire mutaikiriize nyegyesa egyo, abatarikumanya bi abandi beeta enaama za Sitaane, nimbagambira ku ntarikubakorera gundi mutwaro;" 
Revelation2:25 kwonka muhamye eki mwine okuhitsya obu ndiija. 
Revelation2:26 Orikusingura, akaguma naakora emirimo yangye okuhitsya aha muheru, ndyamuha obutegyeki aha mahanga goona," 
Revelation2:27 kandi aryabategyeka n'enkoni y'ekyoma, nk'oku omuntu ayatagura enyabya z'eibumba, nkaanye oku naahairwe Tata obutegyeki;" 
Revelation2:28 kandi ndyamuha Enyonyoozi ey'obusheeshe. 
Revelation2:29 Oine amatu, ahurire ebi Omwoyo arikugambira amakanisa." 
Revelation3:1 Handiikira maraika w'ekanisa y'omuri Saadi, oti: Ebi nibyo bigambo by'Ogwo oine emyoyo mushanju ya Ruhanga, kandi n'ezonyonyoozi mushanju. Naagira ati: Nimmanya ebi okora; oine eiziina ry'okuba ohuriire, kwonka ori ofiire." 
Revelation3:2 Sisiimuka, ogume nooreeba, ogumye ebikiriho ebiri haihi kufa; ahakuba nshangire omuri byona ebi okora hatarimu kihikire omu maisho ga Ruhanga wangye." 
Revelation3:3 N'ahabw'ekyo oijukye ebi waahairwe kandi n'ebi waahuriire; obihamye, oyeteise. Ahabw'okuba ku oraabe otasisiimukire, okareeba, ndyaija nk'omushuma; torimanya bunaku obu ndikuhikiraho." 
Revelation3:4 Kwonka oine amaziina makye g'abantu b'omuri Saadi, abatarasiisire bijwaro byabo; abo baryagenda naanye bajwaire ebirikwera, ahakuba babishemereire." 
Revelation3:5 Orikusingura aryajwekwa atyo ebijwaro birikwera, kandi tindiiha iziina rye mu kitabo ky'amagara, kureka ndyarihamya omu maisho ga Tata n'omu maisho ga baamaraika be." 
Revelation3:6 Oine amatu, ahurire eki Omwoyo arikugambira amakanisa." 
Revelation3:7 Handiikira maraika w'ekanisa y'omuri Filadelufia oti: Ebi nibyo bigambo by'Ogwo orikwera, ow'amazima, oine ekishumuruzo kya Daudi, oigura hatagire owaakinga, kandi okinga hatagire, owaigura." 
Revelation3:8 Naagira ati: Nimmanya emirimo yaawe. Reeba, ntaire omu maisho gaawe orwigi orwigwire, oru omuntu weena atarikubaasa kukinga. Nimmanya ngu oine amaani makye, kwonka okeerinda ekigambo kyangye, tiwaayehakana iziina ryangye." 
Revelation3:9 Mbwenu reeba, naakuha ab'omuri sinagogi ya Sitaane, abeeyeta Abayudaaya, haza batari bo, nibabeiha; ndyabagyema baije bainame omu maisho gaawe, babone kumanya ku naakukunzire." 
Revelation3:10 Iwe okarinda ekigambo eki waagambiirwe aha by'okugumisiriza kwangye; naanye nikyo ndikurindira omu bunaku bw'okutegwa okuriija omu nsi yoona, okugyeza boona abagituuramu." 
Revelation3:11 Niinyija juba; gumiza kimwe eki oine, hatagira owaakwaka ekirunga kyawe." 
Revelation3:12 Orikusingura ndyamugira enyomyo omuri hekalu ya Ruhanga wangye; nawe tarigirugamu ebiro byona; kandi ndyamuhandiikaho eiziina rya Ruhanga wangye, n'eiziina ry'orurembo rwa Ruhanga wangye, nirwo rurembo Yerusaalemu orusya orurikushuuma okuruga omu iguru ahari Ruhanga wangye, kandi n'eiziina ryangye erisya." 
Revelation3:13 Oine amatu, ahurire eki Omwoyo arikugambira amakanisa." 
Revelation3:14 Handiikira maraika w'ekanisa ey'omuri Laodikea, oti: Ebi nibyo bigambo by'Ogwo orikwetwa Amiina, kareebi omwesigwa kandi ow'amazima, obukomooko bw'ebihangirwe bya Ruhanga." 
Revelation3:15 Ati: Nimmanya emirimo yaawe, ku otarikufuka kandi ku otarikwotsya; nangwa kuri noofuka, nari nooyotsya!" 
Revelation3:16 Mbwenu ahabw'okutagata kooyakooya, otarikufuka kandi otarikwotsya, niinyija kukutanaka." 
Revelation3:17 Noogira oti: Ndi omutungi, ntungire bingi, tiinyine ki nkyenire; kunu torikumanya ku ori enshoberwa, ow'okusaasirwa, omworo, empumi kandi ojwaire busha." 
Revelation3:18 N'ahabw'ekyo ninkuhabura ku onguraho ezaabu eshemeziibwe omu muriro obone kuba omutungi, n'ebijwaro ebirikwera obone kujwara, orekye kukwatwa enshoni ahabw'okureebwa ojwaire busha, ogure n'omubazi gw'okuta omu maisho, obone kuhweza." 
Revelation3:19 Boona abu nkunda mbateisa kandi mbahana; n'ahabw'ekyo oyezirikye, oyeteise." 
Revelation3:20 Reeba, nyemereire aha rwigi, nindukongoota niinyiguza; omuntu weena, ku araahurire eiraka ryangye yaanyigurira, niinyija kutaaha omu nju ye, ndye nawe, nawe arye naanye." 
Revelation3:21 Orikusingura, ndyamwikiriza kushutama aha kitebe kyangye ky'obukama, nkaanye oku naasingwiere, nkashutama hamwe na Tata aha kitebe ky'obukama bwe." 
Revelation3:22 Oine amatu, ahurire eki Omwoyo arikugambira amakanisa." 
Revelation4:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo, ku naimukize amaisho, naareeba orwigi rwigwire omu iguru, kandi naahurira eiraka eri naabandize kuhurira nk'ery'enzamba, nirigira riti: Inamuka oije kunu, nkworekye ebishemereire kubaho bwanyima." 
Revelation4:2 Ahonaaho naashanga ndi omu Mwoyo, naareeba ekitebe ky'obukama kitairwe omu iguru, naareeba n'Owaabaire akishutamiho;" 
Revelation4:3 kandi Ogwo owaabaire ashutami akaba naashusha nk'eibaare rya yasipi n'erya sarudi, kandi ekyo kitebe ky'obukama kikaba kyehinguririziibwe omuhanganzima, ogwabaire nigushusha simaragido." 
Revelation4:4 Kandi kikaba kyehinguririziibwe ebindi bitebe makumi abiri na bina; aha bitebe ebyo hakaba hashutamiho abakuru makumi abiri na bana, bajwaire ebijwaro birikwera n'ebirunga by'ezaabu aha mitwe yaabo." 
Revelation4:5 Ahansi y'ekyo kitebe ky'obukama haarugaho emirabyo n'amaraka n'okuhinda kw'enkuba; kandi omu maisho gaakyo haayakamu amatabaaza g'omuriro mushanju, niyo myoyo mushanju eya Ruhanga;" 
Revelation4:6 kandi omu maisho g'ekyo kitebe hakaba hariho ekirikushusha nk'enyanja y'endeeberwamu, erikushusha kristalo. Okwehinguririza ekyo kitebe embanju zoona, hakaba hariho ebihangirwe ebiine amagara bina, ebiijwire amaisho omumaisho n'enyima." 
Revelation4:7 Ekihangirwe eky'okubanza kikaba nikishusha entare, ekya kabiri nikishusha enimi, ekya kashatu kikaba kiine ahamaisho aharikushusha ah'omuntu, n'ekya kana nikishusha empungu erikuguruka." 
Revelation4:8 Ebyo bihangirwe ebina buri kimwe kiine amapapa mukaaga, biijwire amaisho embaju zoona n'omunda; kandi nibyeshongora obutaremura nyomushana na nyekiro, biti: Mukama Ruhanga ow'obushoboorozi bwona Owaabaire ariho, oriho, kandi oribaho, Niwe Arikwera, Arikwera, Arikwera." 
Revelation4:9 Ebihangirwe ebyo ebiine amagara bikiha ekitiinisa Oshutami aha kitebe ky'obukama, kandi oriho ebiro n'ebiro, byamuhimbisa, kandi byamusiima," 
Revelation4:10 abakuru abo makumi abiri na bana bagwa ahansi, bajuumara omu maisho g'Ogwo oriho ebiro n'ebiro, kandi banaga ahansi ebirunga byabo omu maisho g'ekitebe ky'obukama, nibagira bati:" 
Revelation4:11 Mukama Ruhanga waitu, oshemereire Kuhimbisibwa n'okuheebwa ekitiinisa n'obushoboorozi, Ahabw'okuba niiwe waahangire byona; Ahabw'okukunda kwawe bikahangwa kandi byabaho." 
Revelation5:1 Kandi omu mukono gwa buryo gw'Ogwo oshutami aha kitebe ky'obukama naareebamu omuzingo gw'ekitabo ekihandiikirwe omunda n'enyima, kandi kikomirwe n'obumanyiso mushanju." 
Revelation5:2 Bwanyima naareeba maraika w'amaani, naagamba n'eiraka rihango, ati: N'oha oshemereire kushuuruura ekitambo n'okubambuura obumanyiso bwakyo?" 
Revelation5:3 Kwonka tihaabaho n'omwe omu iguru n'omu nsi n'obu haakuba ahansi y'ensi, owaabaasa kushuuruura ekyo kitabo, n'obu kwakuba okukireebamu;" 
Revelation5:4 naarira munonga ahabw'okutabaho waareebeka ashemereire kushuuruura ekyo kitabo n'okukireebamu. 
Revelation5:5 Omwe ahari abo bakuru yangira ati: Otarira! Reeba, Entare y'omu ruganda rwa Yuda, ekitsitsa kya Daudi, akasingura; n'ahabw'ekyo naabaasa kushuuruura ekyo kitabo n'okubambuura obumanyiso bwakyo mushanju." 
Revelation5:6 Kandi ahagati y'ekitebe ky'obukama n'ebihangirwe ebyo ebiine amagara ebina n'abo bakuru, naareebaho Omwana gw'entaama ayemereire, naashusha owaitsirwe, aine amahembe mushanju n'amaisho mushanju, niyo myoyo mushanju ya Ruhanga etumwa omu nsi zoona." 
Revelation5:7 Yaija, yaiha ekitabo omu mikono gwa buryo gw'Ogwo oshutami aha kitebe ky'obukama." 
Revelation5:8 Ku yaatwaire ekitabo, ebihangirwe ebyo ebina n'abakuru abo makumi abiri na bana baagwa ahansi, baajuumara omu maisho g'Omwana gw'entaama, buri omwe aine enanga n'orwabya rw'ezaabu orwijwire obubaane bw'omugaju, nibyo by'okushaba by'abarikwera;" 
Revelation5:9 baayeshongora ekyeshongoro kisya nibagira bati: Oshemereire kutwara ekitabo n'okubambuura obumanyiso bwakyo, Ahabw'okuba okaitwa, waacungurira Ruhanga abantu n'eshagama yaawe Ab'enganda zoona n'endimi zoona n'abantu boona n'amahanga goona," 
Revelation5:10 Waabahindura obukama n'abanyamurwa ahari Ruhanga waitu; Kandi baryaba abategyeki omu nsi. 
Revelation5:11 Ku naareebire, naahurira amaraka ga baamaraika baingi abeehinguririize ekitebe ky'obukama n'ebihangirwe ebyo ebiine amagara n'abakuru abo; omuhendo gwabo bakaba bari kakumi emirundi kakumi n'enkumi emirundi rukumi," 
Revelation5:12 nibagamba n'eiraka rihango bati: Omwana gw'entaama owaitsirwe ashemereire kuheebwa obushoboorozi n'obutungi n'obwengye n'amaani n'ekitiinisa n'okuhimbisibwa n'omugisha! 
Revelation5:13 Kandi naahurira buri kihangirwe kyona ekiri omu iguru n'omu nsi n'ahansi y'ensi n'omu nyanja n'ebirimu byona, nibigira biti: Oshutami aha kitebe ky'obukama n'Omwana gw'entaama baheebwe omugisha n'ekitiinisa n'okuhimbisibwa n'obushoboorozi ebiro n'ebiro!" 
Revelation5:14 Ebihangirwe ebyo ebiine amagara ebina byaikiriza biti: Amiina! n'abakuru abo baagwa ahansi, baaramya." 
Revelation6:1 Bwanyima naareeba Omwana gw'entaama naabambuura akamanyiso kamwe ahari obwo mushanju, naahurira ekihangirwe kimwe ahari ebyo ebiine amagara ebina nikigamba n'eiraka nk'ery'okuhinda kw'enkuba, kiti: Ija!" 
Revelation6:2 Ku naimukize amaisho, naareeba embaraasi erikwera, kandi owaabaire agishutamiho akaba aine obuta; yaaheebwa ekirunga, yaagyenda naasingura omu kurwana ngu abone kusingurira kimwe." 
Revelation6:3 Ku yaabambwire akamanyiso ka kabiri, naahurira ekihangirwe ekya kabiri nikigira kiti: Ija!" 
Revelation6:4 Haarugayo embaraasi endiijo erikutukura; owaabaire agishutamiho yaikirizibwa kwiha obusingye omu nsi, ngu abantu baitane; kandi yaaheebwa rurara mpango." 
Revelation6:5 Ku yaabambwire akamanyiso ka kashatu, haahurira ekihangirwe ekya kashatu nikigira kiti: Ija! Ku naimukize amaisho, naareeba embaraasi erikwiragura; kandi owaabaire agishutamiho akaba aine eminzaani omu ngaro ze;" 
Revelation6:6 naahurira nk'eiraka ahagati y'ebihangirwe ebiine amagara ebina, nirigira riti: Endengo y'engano y'edenaari, n'endengo ishatu za sayiri z'edenaari; kwonka amajuta na viinyo otabishiisha." 
Revelation6:7 Ku yaabambwire akamanyiso ka kana, naahurira eiraka ry'ekihangirwe ekya kana nikigira kiti: Ija!" 
Revelation6:8 Ku naimukize amaisho, naareeba embaraasi kisa, n'owaabaire agishutamiho akaba naayetwa Rufu, Okuzimu yaamukuratira, baaheebwa obushoboorozi aha kicweka kimwe kya kana eky'ensi okwitsa abantu rurara n'enjara na rufu n'enyamaishwa mbi z'omu nsi." 
Revelation6:9 Ku yaabambwire akamanyiso ka kataano, naareeba ahansi y'eitambiro emyoyo y'abaitsirwe ahabw'ekigambo kya Ruhanga n'ahabw'obujurizi obu baahaire;" 
Revelation6:10 baataka n'eiraka rihango, nibagira bati: Ai bambe, Mukama waitu orikwera kandi ow'amazima, oryahitsya hi okutacwera rubanja abatuura omu nsi n'okubahoora enzigu ahabw'eshagama yaitu?" 
Revelation6:11 Bwanyima buri omwe yaaheebwa ekijwaro ekirikwera, kandi baaragiirwa kumara ogundi mwanya mukye bahuumwire, okuhitsya omuhendo gw'abaheereza bagyenzi baabo na beene waabo, abarikwija kwitwa nkabo, obu gurihika." 
Revelation6:12 Ku yaabambwire akamanyiso aka mukaga, naareeba omutsitsa mwingi; eizooba ryairagura nk'ekiguniya ky'obwoya oburikwiragura, n'okwezi kwahinduka nk'eshagama," 
Revelation6:13 n'enyonyoozi z'ahaiguru zaagwa aha nsi, nk'oku omutiini guragaza ebijuma byagwo bitakahiisize, gwatengyetsibwa omuyaga mwingi;" 
Revelation6:14 n'eiguru ryaihwaho nk'oku omuzingo gw'ekitabo guzingwa, kandi enshozi zoona n'ebirwa byona byaihwa omu myanya yaabyo." 
Revelation6:15 Kandi n'abagabe b'ensi, n'abakungu, n'abakuru b'engabo, n'abatungi, n'ab'obushoboorozi n'abantu boona, abahuuku n'ab'obusingye, baayeshereka omu nyanga n'omu nkiri z'omu nshozi," 
Revelation6:16 nibatakira enshozi n'enkiri, bati: Mutugwere, mutusherekye amaisho g'Ogwo oshutami aha kitebe ky'obukama, n'ekiniga ky'Omwana gw'entaama;" 
Revelation6:17 ahakuba ekiro kikuru ky'ekiniga kyabo kyahika; n'oha orikubaasa kukyemera? 
Revelation7:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo nkareeba baamaraika bana beemereire aha nshonda ina z'ensi, bakingiire emiyaga ena y'ensi, ngu hatagira omuyaga ogwahuuha aha nsi nari aha nyanja n'obu haakuba aha kiti kyona." 
Revelation7:2 Kandi naareeba maraika ondiijo nainamuka naaruga oburugwa-izooba, aine akamanyiso ka Ruhanga ohuriire; yaayeta n'eiraka rihango baamaraika abo abana abaahairwe obushoboorozi kushiisha ensi n'enyanja," 
Revelation7:3 naagira ati: Mutashiisha ensi nari enyanja n'obu byakuba ebiti, okuhitsya obu turiheza kuta akamanyiso aha buso bw'abahuuku ba Ruhanga waitu." 
Revelation7:4 Naahurira omubaro gw'abaatairweho akamanyiso, ogwabaire guri akasiriira n'obukumi buna n'enkumi ina, abaarugire omu nganda zoona ez'abaana ba Israeli;" 
Revelation7:5 ab'omu ruganda rwa Yuda abaatairweho akamanyiso bakaba bari kakumi n'enkumi ibiri, ab'omu ruganda rwa Reubeeni kakumi n'enkumi ibiri, ab'omu ruganda rwa Gaadi kakumi n'enkumi ibiri," 
Revelation7:6 ab'omu ruganda rwa Asheeri kakumi n'enkumi ibiri, ab'omu ruganda rwa Nafutaali kakumi n'enkumi ibiri, ab'omu ruganda rwa Manaase kakumi n'enkumi ibiri," 
Revelation7:7 ab'omu ruganda rwa Simeoni kakumi n'enkumi ibiri, ab'omu ruganda rwa Leevi kakumi n'enkumi ibiri, ab'omu ruganda rwa Isakaari kakumi n'enkumi ibiri," 
Revelation7:8 ab'omu ruganda rwa Zebuluuni kakumi n'enkumi ibiri, ab'omu ruganda rwa Yosefu kakumi n'enkumi ibiri, n'ab'omu ruganda rwa Benyamiini abaatairweho akamanyiso nabo kakumi n'enkumi ibiri." 
Revelation7:9 Bwanyima y'ebyo ku naimukize amaisho, naareeba omutwe muhango gw'abantu ogu omuntu atarikubaasa kubara, abaarugire omu mahanga goona n'enganda zoona n'abantu boona n'endimi zoona, beemereire omu maisho g'ekitebe ky'obukama n'omu maisho g'Omwana gw'entaama, bajwaire ebijwaro birukwera, baine amataagi g'enkindo omu ngaro zaabo," 
Revelation7:10 nibagamba n'eiraka rihango bati: Okujuna n'okwa Ruhanga waitu, oshutami aha kitebe ky'obukama, kandi n'okw'Omwana gw'entaama." 
Revelation7:11 Kandi baamaraika boona abaabaire beemereire, beehinguririize ekitebe ky'obukama n'abakuru n'ebihangirwe ebiine amagara ebina, baagwa ahansi, baajuumara omu maisho g'ekitebe, baaramya Ruhanga," 
Revelation7:12 nibagira bati: Amiina! Ruhanga waitu aheebwe omugisha n'ekitiinisa n'obwengye n'okusiimwa n'okuhimbisibwa n'obushoboorozi n'amaani ebiro n'ebiro, Amiina." 
Revelation7:13 Kandi omwe aha bakuru abo yambuuza, naagira ati: Aba abajwaire ebijwaro birikwera ni baahi, kandi nibaruga hi?" 
Revelation7:14 Naanye naamugarukamu nti: Mukama wangye, niiwe orikumanya. Yangira ati: Aba nibo baarugire omu kubonabona kwingi, bakoozya ebijwaro byabo omu shagama y'Omwana gw'entaama, bikeera." 
Revelation7:15 Nikyo bagumira omu maisho g'ekitebe kya Ruhanga eky'obukama nibamuheereza omuri hekalu ye nyomushana na nyekiro; kandi Ogwo oshutami aha kitebe ky'obukama aryabasangira n'eihema rye. 
Revelation7:16 Tibarigira njara bundi, n'obu ryakuba eiriho; tibariitwa mushana, n'obu kyakuba ekibabo kyagwo;" 
Revelation7:17 ahabw'okuba Omwana gw'entaama ori aha kitebe ky'obukama aryaba omuriisa waabo; aryabeebembera abahitsye aha nshuro z'amaizi g'amagara; kandi Ruhanga aryaragaza amarira goona aha maisho gaabo. 
Revelation8:1 Omwana gw'entaama ku yaabambwire akamanyiso ka mushanju, haabaho akaceceko omu iguru okumara nk'ekicweka ky'eshaaha." 
Revelation8:2 Bwanyima naareeba baamaraika mushanju abeemerera omu maisho ga Ruhanga, kandi baaheebwa enzamba mushanju." 
Revelation8:3 Haija maraika ondiijo, yaayemerera aha itambiro, aine ekyoterero ky'ezaabu; yaaheebwa obubaane bwingi bw'okwotera eby'okushaba by'abarikwera boona, ngu abyoterere aha itambiro ry'ezaabu omu maisho g'ekitebe ky'obukama;" 
Revelation8:4 omwika gw'obubaane gwainamuka n'eby'okushaba by'abarikwera omu maisho ga Ruhanga, niguruga omu mukono gwa maraika." 
Revelation8:5 Maraika yaakwata ekyoterero, yaakiijuza omuriro gw'aha itambiro, yaakinaga aha nsi; haabaho okuhinda n'amaraka n'emirabyo n'omutsitsa." 
Revelation8:6 Baamaraika mushanju, abaabaire baine enzamba mushanju, baayeteekateeka kuziteera." 
Revelation8:7 Maraika ow'okubanza yaateera enzamba ye: haabaho orubaare n'omuriro birimu eshagama, byagwa aha nsi; ekicweka kya kashatu eky'ensi kyasya, n'ekicweka kya kashatu ky'ebiti kyasya, n'obunyaatsi bwona obubisi bwasya." 
Revelation8:8 Maraika owa kabiri yaateera eye; ekintu ekirikushusha orushozi ruhango orurikwaka omuriro kyanagwa omu nyanja; ekicweka kya kashatu ky'enyanja kyahinduka eshagama; 
Revelation8:9 n'ekicweka kya kashatu ky'ebihangirwe eby'omu nyanja ebiine amagara kyafa; kandi n'ekicweka kya kashatu ky'emeeri zoona kyacwekyerezibwa. 
Revelation8:10 Na maraika owa kashatu yaateera; enyonyoozi mpango, erikwaka nk'orumuri, yaagwa neeruga omu iguru; yaagwa ahari kimwe kya kashatu ky'emigyera n'aha nshuro z'amaizi." 
Revelation8:11 Kandi eiziina ry'enyonyoozi egyo ni Apusinto. Ekicweka kya kashatu ky'amaizi kyahinduka omurura; abantu baingi baafa, baitwa amaizi ago, ahakuba gakaba nigashaarira." 
Revelation8:12 Kandi maraika owa kana nawe yaateera eye nzamba, ekicweka kya kashatu ky'eizooba n'ekicweka kya kashatu ky'okwezi n'ekicweka kya kashatu ky'enyonyoozi byateerwa; n'ahabw'ekyo ekicweka kya kashatu ky'okwaka kwabyo kyaba omwirima; eizooba ryarereera kwaka ekicweka kya kashatu kya nyomushana, kandi na nyekiro byaba bityo." 
Revelation8:13 Ku naimukize amaisho naareeba eishamba nirizeereera omu mwanya, naahurira nirigamba n'eiraka rihango riti: Ai mbambe! Ai bambe! abatuura omu nsi baryareeba enaku, ku barihurira amaraka g'enzamba ezi baamaraika abashatu barikwenda kuteera." 
Revelation9:1 Maraika owa kataano yaateera enzamba, naareba enyonyoozi egwire aha nsi okuruga omu iguru, maraika ogwo yaaheebwa ekishumuruzo ky'ekiina ekitaine bugarukiro;" 
Revelation9:2 yaigura ekyo kiina ekitaine bugarukiro, kyarugwamu omwika nk'ogw'ekikoomi kihango, eizooba n'akaabunga byaba omwirima ahabw'omwika ogwaruga omuri ekyo kiina." 
Revelation9:3 Kandi omu mwika ogwo haarugamu enzigye, zaija aha nsi, zaaheebwa obushoboorozi nka skorupio ez'omu nsi." 
Revelation9:4 Zaaragiirwa kutashiisha bunyaatsi bw'omu nsi, n'obu kyakuba ekintu kyona ekibisi, nari ekiti kyona, kureka abantu bonka abataine kamanyiso ka Ruhanga aha buso bwabo;" 
Revelation9:5 zaikirizibwa kubabonabonesa ameezi ataano, wkonka okutabaitira kimwe; kandi okusaasa kwazo kukaba kuri nk'okwa skorupio yaatonera omuntu." 
Revelation9:6 Omu biro ebyo abantu baryasherura okufa, tibarikubona; baryayetenga rufu, eryabahunga." 
Revelation9:7 Enzigye ezo zikaba nizishusha nk'embaraasi eziteekateekyeirwe orugamba; aha mitwe yaazo hakaba hariho ebintu ebirikushusha nk'ebirunga by'ezaabu; kandi ahamaisho gaazo hakaba nihashusha ah'abantu; 
Revelation9:8 obwoya bwazo bukaba nibushusha eishokye ry'abakazi, n'amaino gaazo nigashusha ag'entare;" 
Revelation9:9 ziine eby'okwekingiza aha kifuba ebigumire nk'ebyoma, n'okuhoorera kw'amababa gaazo kukaba kuri nk'okw'ebigaari ebirikukururwa embaraasi ezaasyoka niziza aha rugamba;" 
Revelation9:10 ziine emikira n'emburi ez'obushegu nka skorupio, kandi amaani gaazo g'okubonabonesa abantu ameezi ataano gakaba gari omu mikira yaazo;" 
Revelation9:11 kandi ziine omukama waazo maraika w'ekiina ekitaine bugarukiro, eiziina rye omu Ruheburaayo ni Abadooni, kandi n'omu Rugriika naayetwa Apolyoni." 
Revelation9:12 Ekibonaboneso eky'okubanza kyahwa; reeba nihaija kukurataho ebindi bibiri. 
Revelation9:13 Maraika owa mukaaga yaateera enzamba, naahurira eiraka niriruga omu mahembe ana g'eitambiro ry'ezaabu eriri omu maisho ga Ruhanga," 
Revelation9:14 nirigambira maraika owa mukaaga owaabaire aine enzamba, riti: Komorora baamaraika bana ababoheirwe aha mugyera Furaati." 
Revelation9:15 Baamaraika abo abana baakomororwa, abaabaire bateekateekyeirwe eshaaha n'ekiro n'okwezi n'omwaka ngu baite ekicweka kya kashatu eky'abantu." 
Revelation9:16 Omubaro gw'abarikurwanira aha mbaraasi gukaba guri kakumi emirundi kakumi emirundi ebiri; naahurira omubaro gwabo. 
Revelation9:17 Oku nikwo naareebire omu kworekwa, nkareeba embaraasi n'abaabaire bazishutamiho. Abo abazishutamiho bakaba bajwaire ebyoma eby'okwekingiza aha kifuba ebirikushusha omuriro na huakinto n'ekibiriiti; n'emitwe y'embaraasi neeshusha ey'entare; omu kanwa kaazo haarugamu omuriro n'omwika n'obuganga bw'ekibiriiti." 
Revelation9:18 Ekicweka kya kashatu ky'abantu kyaitwa ebibonaboneso ebyo byonshatu, omuriro n'omwika n'obuganga bw'ekibiriiti, ebyaruga omu kanwa kaazo." 
Revelation9:19 Ahakuba amaani g'embaraasi gaba omu kanwa kaazo n'omu mikira yaazo; emikira yaazo ehsusha enjoka, eine emitwe; kandi niyo zirumisa." 
Revelation9:20 Abantu abaahonokireho bataitsirwe bibonaboneso ebyo, baayanga kweteisa ebi baakozire n'emikono yaabo, n'okurereera kuramya baadaimoni n'ebishushani by'ezaabu n'eby'efeeza n'eby'emiringa n'eby'amabaare n'eby'ebiti, ebitarikubaasa kureeba nari okuhurira, n'obu kwakuba okugyenda," 
Revelation9:21 kandi baayanga n'okweteisa obwitsi bwabo, oburogo bwabo, obushambani bwabo n'obushuma bwabo." 
Revelation10:1 Kandi nkareeba maraika ondiijo ow'amaani naashuma naaruga omu iguru, ayefubikire ekicu, n'omuhangazima guri ahaiguru y'omutwe gwe; ah'amaisho ge nihaaka nk'eizooba, n'amaguru ge nk'enyomyo z'omuriro." 
Revelation10:2 Akaba aine omuzingo gw'akatabo kashuurwirwe omu ngaro ze. Yaata ekigyere kye kya buryo aha nyanja n'ekya bumusho aha nsi; 
Revelation10:3 yaagamba n'eiraka rihango nk'oku entare etsinda; kandi ku yaagambire, ebirikuhinda mushanju byagamba." 
Revelation10:4 Ku byaherize kugamba, naayenda kuhandiika; kwonka naahurira eiraka niriruga omu iguru, nirigira riti: koma n'akamanyiso ebyo bigambo ebyagambwa ebirikuhinda mushanju; otabihandiika." 
Revelation10:5 Maraika ogwo, ou naareebire ayemereire aha nyanja n'aha nsi; yaimutsya ahaiguru omukono gwe gwa buryo," 
Revelation10:6 yaarahira Ogwo obaho ebiro byona, owaahangire eiguru n'ensi n'enyanja n'ebirimu byona, ku hataribaho kutuuraho bundi;" 
Revelation10:7 kwonka omu biro ebi maraika owa mushanju ariteereramu enzamba ye, enaama ya Ruhanga eryahikiirizibwa, nk'ebigambo ebirungi oku biri ebi yaagambiire abaheereza be baanabi." 
Revelation10:8 Eiraka eryo eri naahuriire niriruga omu iguru ryagaruka ryagira riti: Gyenda, otware omuzingo gw'akatabo akashuurwirwe akari omu mukono gwa maraika oyemereire aha nyanja n'aha nsi." 
Revelation10:9 Ntyo naaza ahari maraika, naamugambira kumpa ako katabo; yangarukamu ati: Nkako, katware, okarye, nikaija kunura nk'obwoki omu kanwa kaawe, kwonka omunda yaawe kashaarire." 
Revelation10:10 Nikwo kukaiha omu mukono gwa maraika, nkakarya; omu kanwa kangye kakanura nk'obwoki; kwonka ku naaherize kukarya, omu nda kaashaarira." 
Revelation10:11 Naagambirwa ku nshemereire kugaruka kuranga eby'abantu b'enganda nyingi, n'amahanga, n'endimi, n'eby'abagabe." 
Revelation11:1 Bwanyima naaheebwa ekibingo ekyemi nk'orubango; omwe yangira ati: Imuka, ogyere hekalu ya Ruhanga n'eitambiro n'abarikugiramizamu;" 
Revelation11:2 kwonka otagyera ekibuga kyayo; okirekye, ahabw'okuba kikaheebwayo omu mikono y'Abanyamahanga, kandi baryaribatiirira orurembo orurikwera okumara ameezi makumi ana n'abiri." 
Revelation11:3 Kandi abajurizi bangye babiri ndyabaha obushoboorozi bw'okumara ebiro rukumi na magana abiri na makumi mukaaga nibaranga bajwaire ebiguniya. 
Revelation11:4 Abo niyo mizeituuni ebiri, kandi ebikondo by'etabaaza bibiri, abeemerera omu maisho g'Omukama w'ensi yoona." 
Revelation11:5 Omuntu weena ku ayenda kubakora kubi, omuriro guruga omu kanwa kaabo, gumaraho abazigu baabo; kandi okwo nikwo omuntu weena orikwenda kubakora kubi, ashemereire kwitwa." 
Revelation11:6 Abo baine obushoboorozi kuzibira eiguru kugwisa enjura omu biro by'okuranga kwabo; kandi baine obushoboorozi okuhindura amaizi eshagama, n'okubonabonesa ensi n'ekibonaboneso kyona, ahu bayendera hoona." 
Revelation11:7 Kandi ku bariheza obujurizi bwabo, enyamaishwa eryaruga okuzimu omu kiina ekitaine bugarukiro, ebarwanise, ebasingure, ebaite;" 
Revelation11:8 n'emitumbi yaabo eryaguma erambiire omu nguuto y'orurembo oruhango, orurikwetwa omu migambire y'omwoyo Sodoma na Misri, ahu Mukama waabo yaabambirwe." 
Revelation11:9 Kandi abantu b'emiringo mingi n'enganda n'endimi n'amahanga baryamara ebiro bishatu n'ekicweka nibashamaarira emitumbi yaabo, tibariikiriza ku eziikwa omu kituuro;" 
Revelation11:10 n'abatwire omu nsi yoona baryayesiima ahabw'okufa kwabo, bashemererwe; kandi baryatwekyerana ebiconco; ahabw'okuba baanabi abo ababiri bakaba babonabonesa abatuura omu nsi." 
Revelation11:11 Kwonka bwanyima, ebiro ebyo bishatu n'ekicweka bihingwireho, omwitsyo gw'amagara ogurikuruga ahari Ruhanga gwabataahamu, baayemerera; abaabareebire baakwatwa obwoba bwingi;" 
Revelation11:12 kandi baahurira eiraka rihango eririkuruga omu iguru niribagira riti: Mwinamukye mwije kunu! Baatemba omu iguru omu kicu, abazigu baabo nibabareeba." 
Revelation11:13 Omu shaaha egyo haabaho omutsitsa mwingi, ekicweka kya ikumi ky'orurembo kyagwa; abantu enkumi mushanju baitwa omutsitsa; kandi abaatsigaireho baakwatwa obwoba; baahimbisa Ruhanga ow'omu iguru." 
Revelation11:14 Ekibonaboneso kya kabiri kyahwaho; reeba, ekibonaboneso kya kashatu kiri haihi kwija." 
Revelation11:15 Maraika owa mushanju yaateera enzamba; haabaho amaraka mahango omu iguru nigagira gati: Obukama bw'ensi bwahinduka obwa Mukama waitu n'obwa Kristo we, kandi aryaguma aha ngoma ebiro n'ebiro." 
Revelation11:16 Abakuru abo makumi abiri na bana, abashutama aha bitebe byabo omu maisho ga Ruhanga, baagwa, baajuumara, baaramya Ruhanga," 
Revelation11:17 nibagira bati: Nitukusiima, Mukama Ruhanga ow'obushoboorozi bwona, oriho kandi owaabaireho, ahakuba otwaire obushoboorozi bwawe obukuru, kandi oyemire," 
Revelation11:18 Amahanga gakaba gaguubwa kubi, mbwenu ekiniga kyawe kyaija, obunaku bwahika bw'okucwera abafiire orubanja, n'obw'okuha abaheereza baawe ebihembo, nibo baanabi n'abarikwera, kandi n'abandi abato n'abakuru abarikutiina eiziina ryawe, n'okuhwerekyereza abahwerekyereza b'ensi." 
Revelation11:19 Kandi hekalu ya Ruhanga ey'omu iguru yaigurwa, n'eshanduukye y'endagaano yaareebeka omuri hekalu ye; haabaho emirabyo n'amaraka mahango n'okuhinda n'omutsitsa n'orubaare rwingi." 
Revelation12:1 Eky'okutangaaza kihango munonga kikareebwa omu iguru, omukazi ajwaire eizooba, n'okwezi kuri ahansi y'ebigyere bye, n'aha mutwe gwe hariho ekirunga ky'enyonyoozi ikumi na ibiri." 
Revelation12:2 Omukazi ogwo akaba aine enda; yaarumwa, yaatakibwa ebisha by'okuzaara." 
Revelation12:3 Kandi eky'okutangaaza ekindi kyareebwa omu iguru, ekijoka kihango ekirikutukura, ekiine emitwe mushanju n'amahembe ikumi, kandi kiine ebirunga mushanju aha mitwe yaakyo." 
Revelation12:4 Omukira gwakyo gwayeyerera ekicweka kya kashatu ky'enyonyoozi z'omu iguru, gwazinaga aha nsi. Ekyo kijoka kyayemerera omu maisho g'omukazi owaabaire naayenda kuzaara ngu, ku araaheze ati kuzaara, kishonshomere omwana we." 
Revelation12:5 Yaazaara omwana w'omwojo oritegyekyesa amahanga goona enkoni y'ekyoma; kwonka omwana ogwo yaashahurwa, yaatwarwa ahari Ruhanga n'aha kitebe ky'obukama bwe;" 
Revelation12:6 kandi omukazi yaahungira omu ihamba ei Ruhanga yaamuteekateekyeire omwanya, ngu babone kumuriisizayo okumara ebiro rukumi na magana abiri na makumi mukaaga." 
Revelation12:7 Hakabaho orugamba omu iguru, Mikaeli na baamaraika be nibarwanisa ekijoka; kandi ekijoka na baamaraika baakyo baabarwanisa;" 
Revelation12:8 baabingwa, kandi okuruga obwo tibaratungire mwanya omu iguru obundi." 
Revelation12:9 Ekijoka ekyo ekihango ekya ira, ekirikwetwa Omuregi kandi Sitaane, orikugobeza ensi yoona, yaanagwa aha nsi hamwe na baamaraika be." 
Revelation12:10 Kandi naahurira eiraka rihango omu iguru nirigira riti: Hati mbwenu okujuna kwa Ruhanga waitu n'amaani ge n'obukama bwe n'obushoboorozi bwa Kristo we biizire, ahakuba omuregi w'ab'eishe-emwe anagirwe ahansi, obarega nyomushana na nyekiro omu maisho ga Ruhanga waitu." 
Revelation12:11 Bakamusingura ahabw'eshagama y'Omwana gw'entaama n'ahabw'ekigambo ky'obujurizi bwabo, nangwa n'okufa bakakwemera." 
Revelation12:12 N'ahabw'ekyo, iwe eiguru naimwe abarituuramu, naiwe enyanja, muryareeba enaku ahabw'okuba omuregi yaabaizira n'ekiniga kingi, ahakuba naamanya ku aine omwanya mukye." 
Revelation12:13 Ekijoka ku kyareebire kyanagwa aha nsi, kyahiiga omukazi owaazaire omwana w'omwojo." 
Revelation12:14 Kwonka omukazi yaaheebwa amapapa abiri g'eishemba rihango, ngu agurukye ahungire ekyo kijoka omu ihamba, omu mwanya ogu aririisizibwamu okumara omwanya n'emyanya n'ekicweka ky'omwanya." 
Revelation12:15 Ekijoka kyacwera amaizi agarikwingana omwegyemure enyima y'ogwo mukazi, ngu gamutware;" 
Revelation12:16 kwonka ensi yaahwera omukazi, yaayashama, yaamira omwegyemure, ogu ekyo kijoka cyacweire." 
Revelation12:17 Ekijoka nikwo kugirira ogwo mukazi ekiniga, kikaza kurwanisa oruzaaro rwe orutsigaireho, orurikworobera ebiragiro bya Ruhanga, rukahamya ebya Yesu; kikeemerera aha musheenyi gw'enyanja." 
Revelation13:1 Kandi naareeba enyamaishwa neetuuhuuka omu nyanja eine amahembe ikumi n'emitwe mushanju; aha mahembe gaayo hariho ebirunga ikumi, n'aha mitwe yaayo hariho eiziina ry'okurogota." 
Revelation13:2 Ebyo nyamaishwa ei naareebire keaba neeshusha engwe, ebiganja byayo nibishusha eby'edubu, n'akanwa kaayo nikashusha ak'entare. Ekijoka kyagiha amaani gaakyo n'ekitebe ky'obukama bwakyo n'obushoboorozi bwingi." 
Revelation13:3 Ogumwe aha mitwe yaayo nooshusha oti gukaba gwine obuhuta obw'okugiita; kwonka obuhuta obwo bukakira; ab'ensi yoona baagikurata nibagitangaarira. 
Revelation13:4 Kandi baaramya ekijoka ahabw'okuba kikaha egyo nyamaishwa obushoboorozi bwakyo; baaramya enyamaishwa egyo nibagira bati: N'oha orikushusha enyamaishwa egi? Kandi n'oha owaakubaasa kugirwanisa? 
Revelation13:5 Egyo nyamaishwa yaaheebwa akanwa akarikugamba ebigambo by'amaryo n'eby'okurogota; kandi yaikirizibwa kukoresa obushoboorozi bwayo okumara ameezi makumi ana n'abiri. 
Revelation13:6 Yaayashamya akanwa kaayo, yaagamba eby'okurogota ahari Ruhanga, neerogota aha iziina rye n'aha ihema rye, nibo abatuura omu iguru." 
Revelation13:7 Kandi yaikirizibwa kurwanisa abarikwera n'okubasingura; yaaheebwa n'obushoboorozi aha nganda zoona n'abantu n'endimi n'amahanga; 
Revelation13:8 boona abatuura omu nsi baryagiramya, abu amaziina gaabo gatahandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'amagara eky'Omwana gw'entaama owaitsirwe okuruga aha kuhangwa kw'ensi." 
Revelation13:9 Weena oine okutu ahurire. 
Revelation13:10 Omuntu weena ow'okunyagwa aryanyagwa; weena ow'okwitwa na rurara, ashemereire kwitwa na rurara. Aho niho okugumisiriza n'okwikiriza kw'abarikwera kumanyirwa." 
Revelation13:11 Kandi naareeba enyamaishwa endiijo neeruga okuzimu omu itaka, eine amahembe abiri nk'ag'omwana gw'entaama, neegamba nk'ekijoka." 
Revelation13:12 Neetegyekyesa obushoboorozi bwona obw'enyamaishwa ey'okubanza omu maisho gaayo, neegyema ensi n'abagituuramu kuramya enyamaishwa ey'okubanza, eyaakizire obuhuta bw'okugiita." 
Revelation13:13 Neekora obumanyiso obukuru, nangwa n'okwiha omuriro omu iguru gukagwa aha nsi omu maisho g'abantu;" 
Revelation13:14 ahabw'obumanyiso obwo obu yaahairwe kukorera omu maisho g'egyo nyamaishwa, yaabeihabeiha abatuura omu nsi, ngu bakore ekishushani ahabw'enyamaishwa egyo eyaahutaaziibwe na rurara, ekanga ekagumaho." 
Revelation13:15 Yaikirizibwa kuha ekyo kishushani ky'enyamaishwa omwitsyo, ngu kigambe, kandi kiitise abantu boona abangire kukiramya." 
Revelation13:16 Kandi abantu boona, abato n'abakuru, abatungi n'abooro, ab'obusingye n'abahuuku, yaabaragiira kuteebwa akamanyiso aha mukono gwa buryo, nari aha buso," 
Revelation13:17 ngu hatabaho owaagura nari owaatunda, kureka ogwo oine ako kamanyiso, niryo iziina ry'enyamaishwa, nari enamba y'eiziina ryayo." 
Revelation13:18 Okukishoborokyerwa nikwetenga obwengye. Orikwetegyereza abare enamba y'enyamaishwa; ahakuba n'enamba y'omuntu; enamba egyo ni magana mukaaga na makumi mukaaga na mukaaga. 
Revelation14:1 Ku naimukize amaisho, naareeba Omwana gw'entaama ayemereire aha rushozi Saayuuni hamwe n'abantu akasiriira n'obukumi buna n'enkumi ina, aha buso bwabo hahandiikirweho eiziina rye n'eiziina rya Ishe." 
Revelation14:2 Naahurira eiraka eririkuhoorera nk'amaizi maingi kandi nk'eiraka ery'okuhinda kuhango niriruga omu iguru; kandi eiraka eryo eri naahuriire rikaba riri nk'ery'enanga ezirikuteerwa abateezi baazo; 
Revelation14:3 nibeeshongorera ekyeshongoro kisya omu maisho g'ekitebe ky'obukama n'omu maisho g'ebihangirwe ebiine amagara ebina n'ag'abo bakuru. Kandi tihariho owaabaasize kwega ekyeshongoro ekyo, kureka abo akasiriira n'obukumi buna n'enkumi ina, abaacungwirwe okuruga omu nsi." 
Revelation14:4 Abo nibo abatareesiisire na bakazi, ahakuba bakaba nibabyerinda; kandi abo nibo bakuratira Omwana gw'entaama ei aza yoona. Abo bakacungurwa omu bantu okuba omuganuro ahari Ruhanga n'aha Mwana gw'entaama;" 
Revelation14:5 kandi omu kanwa kaabo hakaba hatabamu bishuba, ahakuba bakaba batagira kamogo." 
Revelation14:6 Kandi naareeba ondiijo maraika naagyendera ahaiguru hagati omu mwanya, aine engiri ey'ebiro n'ebiro okubuurira abatuura omu nsi amahanga goona n'enganda zoona n'endimi n'abantu;" 
Revelation14:7 yaagamba n'eiraka rihango ati: Mutiine Ruhanga, mumuhe ekitiinisa, ahakuba obunaku bwe bw'okucweramu orubanja buhikire; muramye Ogwo owaahangire eiguru n'ensi n'enyanja n'enshuro z'amaizi." 
Revelation14:8 Haakurataho maraika owa kabiri, naagira ati: Orurembo orukuru Babulooni rugwire, rugwire, orwanyweisize amahanga goona amarwa g'ekiniga ky'obushambani bwarwo." 
Revelation14:9 Maraika ondiijo owa kashatu yaakurataho, naagamba n'eiraka rihango ati: omuntu weena, orikuramya enyamaishwa n'ekishushani kyayo, akateebwa akamanyiso kaayo aha buso bwe nari aha mukono gwe," 
Revelation14:10 ogwo nawe aryanywa aha amarwa g'ekiniga kya Ruhanga, agaashukirwe omu kikopo ky'okubiihirwa kwe agatafungwire, kandi aryabonabonesibwa n'omuriro n'obuganga bw'ekibiriiti omu maisho ga baamaraika abarikwera n'omu maisho g'Omwana gw'entaama." 
Revelation14:11 Omwika gw'okubonabonesibwa kwabo gucumbuuka ebiro n'ebiro; abo abaramya enyamaishwa n'ekishushani kyayo, n'omuntu weena oteebwaho akamanyiso k'eiziina ryayo tibahuumura nyomushana na nyekiro." 
Revelation14:12 Aho niho okugumiriza kw'abarikwera kumanyirwa, aboorobera ebiragiro bya Ruhanga, bakaikiriza Yesu." 
Revelation14:13 Kandi naahurira eiraka eririkuruga omu iguru niringira riti: Handiika. Okwiha hati baine omugisha abafu abafeera omuri Mukama; eego, nikwo Omwoyo arikugira, ngu babone kuhuumurira kimwe emirabanamu yaabo; ahakuba ebi baakozire bigyenda nabo." 
Revelation14:14 Bwanyima ku naimukize amaisho, naareeba ekicu kirikwera, kandi aha kicu ekyo hashutamiho orikushusha Omwana w'omuntu ajwaire ekirunga ky'ezaabu aha mutwe, kandi omu ngaro ze ainemu omuhoro gw'obwogi." 
Revelation14:15 Maraika ondiijo yaaruga omuri hekalu, yaagamba n'eiraka rihango, naagira Ogwo owaabaire ashutami aha kicu ati: Kiika omuhoro gwawe oteme, ahabw'okuba obunaku bw'okutema buhikire; kandi eby'okushaaruurwa by'ensi byereire kimwe." 
Revelation14:16 Atyo owaabaire ashutami aha kicu yaanaga omuhoro gwe aha nsi, ensi yaashaaruurwa." 
Revelation14:17 Maraika ondiijo yaaruga omuri hekalu ey'omu iguru, kandi nawe aine omuhoro gw'obwogi." 
Revelation14:18 Na maraika ondiijo, oine obushoboorozi aha muriro, yaaruga ha aitambiro, yaagamba n'eiraka rihango, naagira ogwo owaabaire aine omuhoro gw'obwogi ati: Kiika omuhoro gwawe gw'obwogi, ogucwise ebijuma by'omuzaabibu gw'ensi; ahakuba bihiisiize kimwe." 
Revelation14:19 Atyo maraika yaanaga omuhoro gwe aha nsi, yaacwa ebijuma by'omuzaabibu gw'ensi, yaabishuka omu inyuukiro rihango ery'ekiniga kya Ruhanga." 
Revelation14:20 Byanyuukirwa omu inyuukiryo eryo n'ebigyere aheeru y'orurembo, eshagama yaaruga omu inyuukiro, yaijura okuhika ahaiguru aha nkoba z'embaraasi, kandi ahansi yaahitsya mahiro magana abiri." 
Revelation15:1 Naagaruka naareeba omu iguru eky'okureeberaho ekindi, ekikuru kandi eky'okutangaaza, baamaraika mushanju baine ebibonaboneso mushanju eby'aha mperu; ahabw'okuba omuribyo nimwo ekiniga kya Ruhanga kyabaire nikihwera." 
Revelation15:2 Naareeba ekirikushusha nk'enyanja y'endeeberwamu ejwangize n'omuriro, kandi n'abaatabaarukire omu rugamba rw'enyamaishwa n'ekishushani kyayo n'enamba y'eiziina ryayo basingwire, beemereire aha rubaju rw'egyo nyanja, baine enanga za Ruhanga omu ngaro zaabo." 
Revelation15:3 Nibeeshongora ekyeshongoro kya Musa omugaragwa wa Ruhanga, n'ekyeshongoro ky'Omwana gw'entaama nibagira bati: Mukama Ruhanga ow'obushoboorozi bwona, Ebi waakozire ni bikuru kandi n'eby'okutangaaza; Emihanda yaawe ehikiriire kandi n'ey'amazima, Nyakusinga Mukama w'amahanga." 
Revelation15:4 Mukama waitu, n'oha otaritiina, akahimbisa eiziina ryawe? Ahakuba niiwe wenka orikwera; Amahanga goona garyaija gakuramye, Ahakuba emitwarize yaawe y'oburyo eyorekirwe." 
Revelation15:5 Bwanyima y'ebyo naareeba hekalu ey'eihema ry'obujurizi omu iguru eigwire; 
Revelation15:6 omuri hekalu egyo haarugamu baamaraika mushanju abaabaire baine ebibonaboneso mushanju, bajwaire emyenda mirungi erikwengyengyeta, beezirikire emyeko y'ezaabu omu kifuba." 
Revelation15:7 Kimwe aha bihangirwe ebiine amagara ebina kyaha baamaraika mushanju enyabya z'ezaabu ziijwire ekiniga kya Ruhanga otuuraho ebiro n'ebiro. 
Revelation15:8 Hekalu yaijura omwika ogurikuruga omu kitiinisa kya Ruhanga n'omu bushoboorozi bwe; kandi tihariho muntu weena owaabaasize kutaaha omuri egyo hekalu, ebibonaboneso mushanju bya baamaraika mushanju bitakahweireyo." 
Revelation16:1 Bwanyima naahurira eiraka rihango eririkuruga omuri hekalu nirigambira baamaraika mushanju riti: Mugyende, mushukye aha nsi enyabya mushanju z'ekiniga kya Ruhanga." 
Revelation16:2 Maraika ow'okubanza yaagyenda, yaashuka orwabya rwe aha nsi; abantu abaabaire baine akamanyiso k'egyo nyamaishwa nibaramya ekishushani kyayo baakwatwa ebironda bibi ebirikunuuka." 
Revelation16:3 Maraika owa kabiri yaashuka orwabya rwe omu nyanja, enyanja yaahinduka, yaashusha eshagama y'omufu, kandi ekintu kyona ekihuriire ekyabaire kiri omu nyanja kyafa." 
Revelation16:4 Maraika owa kashatu yaashuka orwabya rwe omu migyera n'omu nshuro z'amaizi, byahinduka eshagama." 
Revelation16:5 Naahurira maraika naagira ati: Iwe Orikwera, oriho, kandi owaabaireho, Ori ohikiriire, ahabw'okucwa otyo emanja;" 
Revelation16:6 Ahakuba bakasheesha eshagama y'abarikwera n'eya baanabi; Mbwenu obahaire eshagama kuginywa; Kandi nikyo kibashemereire. 
Revelation16:7 Kandi naahurira eitambiro nirigira riti: Eego, kibe kityo, Mukama Ruhanga ow'obushoboorozi bwona, Emicwere yaawe n'ey'amazima kandi n'ey'oburyo." 
Revelation16:8 Maraika owa kana yaashuka orwabya rwe aha izooba, ryaikirizibwa kubabura abantu n'omuriro;" 
Revelation16:9 abantu baayokibwa ekibabo kingi; baajuma eiziina rya Ruhanga, oine obushoboorozi aha bibonaboneso ebyo; tibaayeteisa ngu bamuhe ekitiinisa." 
Revelation16:10 Maraika owa kataano yaashuka orwabya rwe aha kitebe ky'obukama ky'egyo nyamaishwa, obukama bwayo bwashwekwa omwirima; baayeruma endimi ahabw'obusaasi bwingi," 
Revelation16:11 baajuma Ruhanga ow'omu iguru ahabw'okuhururwa n'ahabw'ebironda byabo, kandi nabwo tibaayeteisa bi baakozire." 
Revelation16:12 Maraika owa mukaaga yaashuka orwabya rwe aha mugyera muhango, Furaati; amaizi gaagwo gaayoma, ngu omuhanda gushemezibwe ahabw'abagabe abarikuruga oburugwa-izooba." 
Revelation16:13 Kandi naareeba omu kanwa k'ekijoka n'omu kanwa k'enyamaishwa n'omu kanwa ka nabi ow'ebishuba niharugamu emyoyo mibi eshatu erikushusha ebikyere; 
Revelation16:14 niyo myoyo ya baadaimoni erikukora obumanyiso, erikuza oku n'oku omu bagabe b'ensi zoona, okubateeranira hamwe kuza omu rugamba orw'ekiro kikuru kya Ruhanga ow'obushoboorozi bwona." 
Revelation16:15 (Reeba, niinyija nk'omushuma! Aine omugisha orikuguma naareeba, akarinda ebijwaro bye, ngu arekye kugyenda ajwaire busha, bakareeba enshoni ze.)" 
Revelation16:16 Emyoyo egyo yaabateeranira omu mwanya ogurikwetwa Haramagedoni omu Ruheburaayo. 
Revelation16:17 Maraika owa mushanju yaashuka orwabya rwe ahaiguru omu mwanya, eiraka rihango ryaruga omuri hekalu aha kitebe ky'obukama, nirigira riti: Kyahwa." 
Revelation16:18 Haabaho emirabyo n'amaraka mahango n'okuhinda n'omutsitsa muhango; omutsitsa muhango kandi ogw'amaani gutyo tigukabahoga okwiha obu abantu baabaho omu nsi. 
Revelation16:19 Orurembo rukuru rwabaganukamu ebicweka bishatu: endembo z'amahanga zaagwa; kandi Ruhanga yaijuka Babulooni, orurembo orukuru, okuruha ekikopo kya viinyo ey'obushaarizi bw'ekiniga kye." 
Revelation16:20 Ebirwa byona byahunga, kandi ebibungo byona byabura." 
Revelation16:21 Orubaare rwingi rwateera abantu niruruga omu iguru, buri rubaare rwine oburemeezi bw'eraatiri igana; abantu baajuma Ruhanga ahabw'ekibonaboneso ky'orubaare orwo; ahakuba kikaba kiri kihango munonga." 
Revelation17:1 Bwanyima omwe ahari baamaraika mushanju abaabaire baine enyabya mushanju yaija, yangira ati: Ija nkworekye orubanja oruricwerwa maraaya omukuru oshutami aha maizi maingi," 
Revelation17:2 owaashambaine n'abagabe b'ensi, n'abatuura omu nsi bakasinda viinyo, nibwo bushambani bwe." 
Revelation17:3 Yantwara omu ihamba ndi omu Mwoyo, naareeba omukazi ashutami aha nyamaishwa erikutukura, eijwire amaziina g'okurogota, kandi eine emitwe mushanju n'amahembe ikumi." 
Revelation17:4 Omukazi ogwo akaba ajwaire emyenda ya bujwa n'erikutukura, ayehunzire eby'ezaabu n'amabaare ag'obuguzi bwingi n'eruuru, aine ekikopo ky'ezaabu omu ngaro ze ekiijwire ebihagaro n'okusiisikara kw'obushambani bwe;" 
Revelation17:5 kandi aha buso bwe hahandiikirweho eiziina erisherekirwe, BABULOONI ORUREMBO ORUKURU, NYINA WA BAAMARAAYA N'EBIHAGARO BY'ENSI." 
Revelation17:6 Naareeba omukazi ogwo asinzire eshagama y'abarikwera n'ey'abaitsirwe ahabwa Yesu. Ku naamureebire, naatangaara munonga." 
Revelation17:7 Maraika yambuuza ati: Waatangaazibwa ki? Niinyija kukugambira eky'omubonano ky'ogwo mukazi n'eky'enyamaishwa ei arikugyenderaho, eine emitwe mushanju n'amahembe ikumi." 
Revelation17:8 Enyamaishwa ei waareeba ekaba eriho, hati teriho, neeyenda kuruga omu kiina ekitaine bugarukiro, eze omu kuhwerekyerera; kandi abatuura omu nsi, abu amaziina gaabo gatakahandiikwaga mu kitabo ky'amagara okuruga aha kuhangwa kw'ensi, baryatangaara ahabw'okureeba enyamaishwa egyo, ahakuba ekaba eriho, mbwenu teriho, haza kandi n'eija kubaho." 
Revelation17:9 Eki nikyetenga omutima ogwine obwengye. Emitwe mushanju nibwo bubungo mushanju, ahu ogwo mukazi ashutami;" 
Revelation17:10 kandi nibo bagabe mushanju; aharibo bataano bakagwa, omwe ariho, ondiijo takaizire; ku ariija, ashemereire kugumaho omwanya mukye." 
Revelation17:11 Enyamaishwa eyaabaire eriho, bwenu etariho, niwe mugabe owa munaana, kwonka n'omwe ahari abo mushanju, kandi nawe naija kuhwerekyerera." 
Revelation17:12 Kandi amahembe ikumi agu waareeba n'abagabe ikumi abatakeemire; kwonka nibaija kuheebwa obushoboorozi nka'bagabe okumara eshaaha emwe hamwe n'egyo nyamaishwa. 
Revelation17:13 Abo nibakwatanisa hamwe kuha egyo nyamaishwa amaani gaabo n'obushoboorozi bwabo; 
Revelation17:14 baryarwanisa Omwana gw'entaama, kwonka Omwana gw'entaama aryabasingura, ahakuba ni Mukama w'abakama kandi Omugabe w'abagabe, kandi abo abu aine n'abaayetsirwe, abaatoorainwe kandi abeesigwa." 
Revelation17:15 Yaagaruka yangira ati: Amaizi agu waareeba ahi maraaya ogwo yaaba ashutami, n'abantu b'emiringo mingi n'emitwe mingi n'amahanga n'endimi." 
Revelation17:16 Kandi amahembe ikumi agu waareeba hamwe n'enyamaishwa baryayanga maraaya ogwo, atsigare wenka ajwaire busha; baryarya enyama ye, bamwokyeze kimwe n'omuriro;" 
Revelation17:17 ahakuba Ruhanga akakita omu mitima yaabo ngu bahikiirize enaama ye, ahabw'okugira omutima gumwe okuha enyamaishwa egyo obushoboorozi bw'okutegyeka obugabe bwabo, okuhitsya obu ebigambo bya Ruhanga birihikiirizibwa." 
Revelation17:18 Kandi omukazi ogwo, ou waareeba, nirwo rurembo orukuru orurikutegyeka abagabe b'ensi." 
Revelation18:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo naareeba maraika ondiijo naashuuma okuruga omu iguru, aine obushoboorozi bwingi. Ensi yaajwerwa omushana gw'ekitiinisa kye." 
Revelation18:2 Yaagamba n'eiraka rihango ati: Orurembo orukuru Babulooni rugwire, rugwire! Ruhindukire obutaaho bwa baadaimoni, n'obweshereko bw'emyoyo yoona emibi n'obw'amahungu goona amabi agarikunugwa;" 
Revelation18:3 ahakuba amahanga goona ganyweire viinyo y'okurigira okubi kw'orurembo orwo, n'abagabe b'eisni bashambaine narwo, kandi n'abashuubuzi b'ensi batungisiibwe ebintu byarwo n'okwegira gye kwarwo okurengyesereize." 
Revelation18:4 Kandi naahurira eiraka erindi niriruga omu iguru nirigira riti: Mururugyemu, imwe bantu bangye 'mwe, mutakaakwatanisa narwo omu bibi byarwo, mukaheebwa ekifubiro ky'ebirikwija kurubonabonesa;" 
Revelation18:5 ahakuba ebibi byarwo bituumire byahika ahaiguru munonga, kandi Ruhanga aijukire eby'okushiisha byarwo." 
Revelation18:6 Murugire, nk'oku rwagizire abandi; murwihure kabiri ahabw'ebi rwakozire; omu kikopo eki rwabaijuriizemu ebijwangire, murujwangizemu ebijwangire, murujwangizemu kabiri." 
Revelation18:7 Nk'oku rwayehimbiise, rukarengyesereza omu kwegira gye, mube nikwo mwarwihura okubonabona n'amaganya; ahakuba nirugira omu mutima gwarwo ruti: Nshutami nk'omugabekazi; tindi mufaakazi; tindigira maganya na kakye." 
Revelation18:8 N'ahabw'ekyo ebibonaboneso ebyo biryarugwaho omu izooba rimwe, rufu n'amaganya n'enjara, rwokibwe n'omuriro; ahabw'okuba Mukama Ruhanga orikurucwera orubanja n'ow'amaani." 
Revelation18:9 Abagabe b'ensi abaashambaine narwo n'abaakunire narwo, ku barireeba okucumbuuka kw'omwika gwarwo nirusya, baryarucurira, baruborogyere;" 
Revelation18:10 baryayemerera hangahari ahabw'okutiina okubonabonesibwa kwarwo nibagira bati: Ai bambe! Ai bambe! Babulooni orurembo orukuru orw'amaani! Okucwerwa orubanja kwawe kwaizira omu shaaha emwe. 
Revelation18:11 Abashuubuzi b'ensi nibarira nibarucurira, ahabw'okuba tihakiriho b'okugura eby'obushuubuzi byabo," 
Revelation18:12 eby'ezaabu n'efeeza, amabaare ag'obuguzi bwingi n'eruuru, emyenda emirungi ya kitaani n'eya bujwa n'eya riiri n'erikutukura, ebiti eby'emigaju eby'emiringo yoona, ebintu by'emiino, n'ebintu byona ebibaizirwe omu mbaaho z'obuguzi bwingi, n'eby'emiringa n'eby'ebyoma, n'ebibaizirwe omu ibaare eririkwetwa maruburo," 
Revelation18:13 omudarasiini n'ebinzaari n'omugaju na sumuruna n'obubaane, viinyo n'amajuta n'esaano y'obunono n'engano, ente n'entaama, embaraasi n'ebigaari, n'abahuuku, niyo mibiri y'abantu n'emyoyo yaabo." 
Revelation18:14 Ebyana ebi omutima gwawe gwayetengire bikurugireho, n'ebintu byona ebinuzire, n'ebirungi byawe, bikuhweireho; tibirigaruka kureebwa na kakye." 
Revelation18:15 Abashuubuzi b'ebintu ebyo, abu rwatungiise, baryayemerera hangahari ahabw'okutiina okubonabonesibwa kwarwo nibarira, nibaborooga, nibagira bati:" 
Revelation18:16 Ai bambe! Ai bambe! Orurembo orukuru orwabaire rujwara emyenda mirungi ya kitaani n'eya bujwa n'erikutukura, rwehunzire eby'ezaabu n'amabaare ag'obuguzi bwingi n'eruuru!" 
Revelation18:17 Omu shaaha emwe obutungi obu bwona bwacwekyerezibwa. Bakama b'emeeri boona, n'abarikuzigyenderamu, abavugi baazo na boona abarikukora omu nyanja, baayemerera hangahari;" 
Revelation18:18 baateera enduuru nibareeba omwika gw'okusya kwarwo, nibagira bati: Ebyo harabaireho orurembo orurikwingana n'orurembo oru orukuru!" 
Revelation18:19 Baayeshuka omucuucu omu mitwe, nibarira nibaborooga, nibagira bati: Ai bambe! Ai bambe! orurembo orukuru, orwatungiise boona abaabaire baine emeeri aha nyanja! Omu shaaha emwe rwacwekyerezibwa." 
Revelation18:20 Nurwehimbisizeho, iwe eiguru, naimwe abarikwera n'entumwa na baanabi, ahakuba Ruhanga arucwereire orubanja ahabwanyu." 
Revelation18:21 Bwanyima maraika ow'amaani yaiha ahansi eibaare eririkwingana n'orubengo ruhango, yaarirekyera omu nyanja, naagira ati: Oku nikwo orurembo orukuru Babulooni rurinagwa aha nsi n'amaani maingi, kandi tirurireebwa bundi." 
Revelation18:22 Amaraka g'abateezi b'enanga n'abeeshongozi, n'ag'abateezi b'esheegu n'enzamba, tigarigaruka kuhurirwa bundi omuriiwe; n'emengo tizirigaruka kuhurirwa obundi omuriiwe;" 
Revelation18:23 omuriiwe tiharyakiramu tabaaza obundi; kandi eiraka rya kishwera n'erya kishwerwa tigarigaruka kuhurirwa omuriiwe, ahakuba abashuubuzi baawe bakaba bari bakuru omu nsi, kandi oburogo bwawe bukagobeza amahanga goona." 
Revelation18:24 N'eshagama ya baanabi n'abarikwera n'eya boona abaitsirwe omu nsi ekashangwa omuri orwo rurembo. 
Revelation19:1 Bwanyima y'ebyo naahurira eiraka rihango nk'ery'omutwe muhango g'wabantu omu iguru, nirigira riti: Haleluya! Okujuna n'ekibiinisa n'obushoboorozi n'ebya Ruhanga waitu." 
Revelation19:2 Ahabw'okuba emanja ezi acwa n'ez'amazima kandi n'ez'oburyo; ahakuba akacwera orubanja maraaya omukuru owaasiisire ensi n'obushambani bwe; kandi yaamuhoora enzigu ahabw'eshagama y'abaheereza be. 
Revelation19:3 Baagaruka baagamba n'eiraka rihango bati: Haleluya! Kandi omwika gwe gwaguma nigucumbuuka ebiro n'ebiro. 
Revelation19:4 Kandi abakuru makumi abiri na bana n'ebihangirwe ebiine amagara ebina baagwa ahansi, baaramya Ruhanga oshutami aha kitebe ky'obukama, nibagira bati: Amiina, Haleluya!" 
Revelation19:5 Eiraka ryaruga omuri ekyo kitebe ky'obukama, nirigira riti: Musiime Ruhanga waitu, imwe abaheereza be abarikumutiina, abato n'abakuru." 
Revelation19:6 Bwanyima naahurira eiraka nk'ery'omutwe muhango gw'abantu eriri nk'eiraka ry'amaizi maingi, kandi nk'ery'okuhinda kw'amaani, nirigira riti: Haleluya! Ahakuba Mukama Ruhanga waitu ow'obushoboorozi bwona ari aha ngoma." 
Revelation19:7 Tushemererwe, tunanukye, tumuhe ekitiinisa; ahakuba obugyenyi bw'Omwana gw'entaama buhikire, kandi Omugore we ayeteekateekire;" 
Revelation19:8 yaikirizibwa kujwara emyenda mirungi eya kitaani erikwengyengyeta kandi erikwera; egyo myenda ya kitaani nibyo by'okuhikiirira by'abarikwera. 
Revelation19:9 Maraika yangira ati: Handiika oti: Baine omugisha abarikwetwa aha bugyenyi bw'Omwana gw'entaama. Kandi yangira ati: Buzimazima ebi n'ebigambo by'amazima ebya Ruhanga. 
Revelation19:10 Ahonaaho naagwa ahansi aha bigyere bye kumuramya, yangira ati: Reeba! otakikora. Ndi omuheereza mugyenzi waawe n'owa beene sho abarikuhamya amazima ga Yesu. Ramya Ruhanga. Ahakuba okuhamya amazima ga Yesu nigwo mwoyo gw'obunabi." 
Revelation19:11 Ku naimukize amaisho, naareeba iguru rikinguukire n'embaraasi kisa. Ogishutamiho naayetwa Mwesigwa, kandi Mazima. Niwe acwa emanja kandi niwe arwana engamba omu kuhikiirira." 
Revelation19:12 Amaisho ge nigashusha nk'endimi z'omuriro; kandi ajwaire ebirunga bingi aha mutwe; aine eiziina erihandiikirwe, eirtarikumanywa muntu weena kureka We wenka." 
Revelation19:13 Ajwaire ekijwaro ekimiisiirwe eshagama, kandi eiziina rye ni Kigambo kya Ruhanga." 
Revelation19:14 Amahe ag'omu iguru gaamukurata gatembire embaraasi zirikwera, bajwaire emyenda ya kitaani erikwera kandi emirungi munonga." 
Revelation19:15 Omu kanwa ke haarugamu rurara y'obwogi ey'okutemesa amahanga; kandi aryabategyekyesa enkoni y'ekyoma, abaribatiirire omu inyuukiro ry'obushaarizi bw'ekiniga kya Ruhanga ow'obushoboorozi bwona;" 
Revelation19:16 kandi aha kijwaro kye n'aha kibero kye hahandiikirweho eiziina eri, Omugabe w'abagabe, kandi Omukama w'abakama." 
Revelation19:17 Bwanyima naareeba maraika ondiijo ayemereire omu izooba, yaayeta n'eiraka rihango, naagambira amahungu goona agarikuzereera ahaiguru omu mwanya, ati: Mwije, muteeranire aha bugyenyi bukuru obwa Ruhanga," 
Revelation19:18 murye enyama z'abagabe n'ez'abakuru b'amahe n'ez'amamanzi, ez'embaraasi n'ez'abazigyenderaho n'ez'abantu boona, ab'obusingye n'abahuuku, abato n'abakuru." 
Revelation19:19 Kandi naareeba egyo nyamaishwa n'abagabe b'ensi n'amahe gaabo biteeraniire hamwe kurwanisa Ogwo oshutami aha mbaraasi n'eihe rye. 
Revelation19:20 Enyamaishwa egyo yaakwatwa hamwe na nabi w'ebishuba, owaabaire akora obumanyiso omu maisho gaayo, naabibeihabeihesa abo abaine akamanyiso k'enyamaishwa n'abarikuramya ekishushani kyayo. Abo bombi baanagwa omu nyanja erikwakamu omuriro n'obuganga bw'ekibiriiti bahuriire." 
Revelation19:21 Abaatsigaireho baitwa rurara y'Ogwo oshutami aha mbaraasi, eyaarugire omu kanwa ke; n'amahungu goona gaigutira kimwe enyama z'emitumbi yaabo." 
Revelation20:1 Bwanyima naareeba maraika ondiijo naashuuma, naaruga omu iguru aine omu ngaro ekishumuruzo ky'ekiina ekitaine bugarukiro n'orujegyere ruhango." 
Revelation20:2 Yaakwata ekyo kijoka ekya ira niwe Muregi kandi Sitaane, yaamuboha okumara emyaka rukumi," 
Revelation20:3 yaamunaga omu kiina ekitaine bugarukiro, yaakinga, yaataho akamanyiso, ngu arekye kurugamu kubeihabeiha amahanga obundi, okuhitsya ahi emyaka rukumi erihwera. Bwanyima y'egyo myaka ashemereire kubohororwa okumara omwanya mukye." 
Revelation20:4 Kandi naareeba ebitebe by'obukama; abaabaire babishutamiho baaheebwa obushoboorozi bw'okucwa emanja. Kandi naareeba emyoyo y'abo abaatemirweho emitwe nibaturwa okuba abajurizi ba yesu n'ekigambo kya Ruhanga, kandi abatararamize nyamaishwa n'ekishushani kyayo, n'obu kwakuba okwikiriza kuteebwa akamanyiso kaayo aha buso bwabo nari aha mikono yaabo. Baagaruka baaba abahuriire, baayema na kristo okumara emyaka rukumi." 
Revelation20:5 Kwonka abafu abandi abaatsigaireho bo tibaragarukire kuba abahuriire, okuhitsya ahi emyaka rukumi yaahwereire. Oku nikwo kuzooka kw'okubanza." 
Revelation20:6 Omuntu owaatungire omugabo omu kuzooka okwo okw'okubanza aine omugisha kandi n'orikwera. Abari nk'ogwo okufa kwa kabiri tikubaineho bushoboorozi; kureka baryaba abanyamurwa ba Ruhanga na Kristo, bategyekye nawe okumara emyaka rukumi." 
Revelation20:7 Egyo myaka rukumi ku erihwa, Sitaane aryakomororwa arugye omu kihome," 
Revelation20:8 aryashohora aze kubeihabeiha amahanga agari aha mbaju ina ez'ensi, Googi na Magoogi, okubateerana hamwe kurwana. Obwingi bwabo buryaba nk'omusheenyi ogw'aha rubaju rw'enyanja." 
Revelation20:9 Baahurura nibareetwa embaju zoona ez'ensi, baayehinguririza orusiisira rw'abarikwera n'orurembo orurikukundwa; kwonka omuriro gwaruga omu iguru, gwabamaraho;" 
Revelation20:10 na Sitaane, owaababeihabeihire, yaanagwa omu nyanja y'omuriro n'obuganga bw'ekibiriiti, ahu enyamaishwa na nabi ow'ebishuba baabaire bari. Baryabonabonesibwa nyomushana na nyekiro ebiro n'ebiro." 
Revelation20:11 Bwanyima naareeba ekitebe ky'obukama kihango ekirikwera n'Ogwo owaabaire akishutamiho; ensi n'eiguru byahunga nibiruga omu maisho ge; byabura obuhamizo. 
Revelation20:12 Naareeba abafu, abakuru n'abato, beemereire omu maisho g'ekitebe ky'obukama, ebitabo byashuuruurwa. N'ekitabo ekindi kyashuuruurwa, nikyo eky'amagara. Abafu baacwerwa emanja z'ebyahandiikirwe omu bitabo nk'ebi baakozire oku biri." 
Revelation20:13 Enyanja yaagarura abafu abaabaire bagirimu, na Rufu n'Okuzimu byagarura abafu abaabaire bariyo; boona baacwerwa emanja ez'ebi baakozire." 
Revelation20:14 Rufu n'Okuzimu byanagwa omu nyanja y'omuriro. Egyo nyanja y'omuriro nikwo kufa okwa kabiri. 
Revelation20:15 Kandi omuntu weena, ou eiziina rye ryabaire ritahandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'amagara, yaanagwa omu nyanja y'omuriro." 
Revelation21:1 Bwanyima naareeba eiguru erisya n'ensi ensya; ahakuba eiguru ery'okubanza n'ensi ey'okubanza bikaba bihweireho, n'enyanja etakiriho." 
Revelation21:2 Kandi naareeba orurembo orurikwera Yerusaleemu orusya, nirushuuma okuruga omu iguru ahari Ruhanga, ruteekateekirwe nk'omugore ocumiirwe iba;" 
Revelation21:3 naahurira eiraka rihango niriruga omu kitebe ky'obukama nirigira riti: Reeba, eihema rya Ruhanga riri omu bantu. Ruhanga aryatuura nabo; baryaba abantu be, kandi We wenka aryaguma nabo, ari Ruhanga waabo;" 
Revelation21:4 aryaragaza amarira goona ahamaisho gaabo; tiharibaho kufa bundi, n'obu kwakuba okucura nari okurira nari obusaasi, ahakuba ebya ira biryaba bihweireho." 
Revelation21:5 Ogwo owaabaire ashutami aha kitebe ky'obukama yaagira ati: Reeba nimpindura byona bisya. Kandi yangira ati: Handiika, ahakuba ebigambo ebi n'eby'okwesigwa kandi eby'amazima." 
Revelation21:6 Yangira ati: Kyahwa. Niinye Alufa na Omega, obutandikiro n'obugarukiro. Oine eiriho ndyamuhera busha amaizi agarikuruga aha nshuro y'amaizi g'amagara." 
Revelation21:7 Orikusingura aryahungura ebi, ndyaba Ruhanga we, nawe abe omwana wangye." 
Revelation21:8 Kwonka abatiini, abatarikwikiriza, abakora ebihagaro, abaitsi, abashambani, abarogi, abaramya ebishushani, n'ababeihi, boona omugabo gwabo guryaba omu nyanja erikwaka omuriro n'obuganga bw'ekibiriiti, nikwo kufa kwa kabiri." 
Revelation21:9 Bwanyima haija omwe ahari baamaraika mushanju abaabaire baine enyabya mushanju eziijwire ebibonaboneso mushanju eby'aha mperu, yangira ati: Ija nkworekye omugore muka Omwana gw'entaama." 
Revelation21:10 Yantwara aha rushozi ruhango kandi ruraingwa ndi omu Mwoyo, yaanyoreka orurembo orurikwera Yerusaalemu, nirushuuma okuruga omu iguru ahari Ruhanga," 
Revelation21:11 rwine ekitiinisa kya Ruhanga; okumurinkana kwarwo nikushusha nk'okw'eibaare ry'obuguzi bwingi, eririkwetwa yasipi, eririkwengyengyeta nka kristalo." 
Revelation21:12 Rukaba rwine orugo ruhango kandi ruraingwa n'amarembo ikumi n'abari; aha marembo ago hariho baamaraika ikumi na babiri, kandi hahandiikirweho amaziina g'enganda ikumi na ibiri z'abaana ba Israeli." 
Revelation21:13 Aha rubaju rw'oburugwa-izooba amarembo ashatu, aha bukiizi-bwa-bumohso ashatu, aha bukiizi-bwa-buryo ashatu, n'aha rubaju rw'oburengyerwa-izooba amarembo ashatu." 
Revelation21:14 Kandi orugo rw'orwo rurembo rukaba rwine emisingi ikumi n'ebiri, ehandiikirweho amaziina g'entumwa ikumi na ibiri ez'Omwana gw'entaama." 
Revelation21:15 Ogwo owaagambire naanye akaba aine orubango rw'okugyeresa rw'ezaabu kugyeresa orurembo n'amarembo gaarwo n'orugo rwarwo. 
Revelation21:16 Kandi orurembo rukaingaingana embaju zoona; oburaingwa bwarwo bwingana n'obukiika bwarwo; yaagaruka yaagyera orurembo n'orubango rwe, yaashanga ziri mahiro rukumi na magana ataano; oburaingwa bwarwo n'obukiika bwarwo n'obwemi bwarwo byona nibiingana." 
Revelation21:17 Kandi yaagyera orugo rwarwo, yaashanga rurimu mikono igana na makumi ana n'ena omu migyerere y'abantu, nikyo kimwe n'eya maraika." 
Revelation21:18 Orugo rw'orurembo rukaba rwombekirwe n'amabaare ga yasipi, haza orurembo rwo ruri orw'ezaabu nungi nirwengyengyeta nk'endeeberwamu." 
Revelation21:19 Emisingi y'orugo rw'orurembo ekaba etonire n'amabaare g'emiringo yoona ag'obuguzi bwingi. Omusingi gw'okubanza gukaba gutonire yasipi, ogwa kabiri safiro, ogwa kashatu kalukedoni, ogwa kana simaragido," 
Revelation21:20 ogwa kataano sarudoniksi, ogwa mukaga sarudio, ogwa mushanju krosoliito, ogwa munaana berulo, ogwa mwenda topazi, ogwa ikumi krusopuraso, ogwa ikumi na gumwe huwakinto, ogwa ikumi n'ebiri amesuusito," 
Revelation21:21 Amarembo ikumi n'abiri n'eruuru ikumi na ibiri, buri irembo rikozirwe n'eruuru emwe, kandi enguuto y'orwo rurembo ekozirwe n'ezaabu nungi erikwengyengyeta nk'endeeberwamu." 
Revelation21:22 Kandi omu rurembo orwo tindareebiremu hekalu, ahakuba Mukama Ruhanga ow'obushoboorozi bwona n'Omwana gw'entaama nibo hekalu yaarwo." 
Revelation21:23 Orurembo orwo tirwetenga izooba nari okwezi kurwakira, ahakuba ekitiinisa kya Ruhanga nigwo mushana gwarwo, kandi Omwana gw'entaama niwe tabaaza yarwo." 
Revelation21:24 Amahanga garyagyendera omu mushana gwarwo, n'abagabe b'ensi baryarureetamu ekitiinisa kyabo;" 
Revelation21:25 amarembo gaarwo tigarikingwa nyomushana, kandi tiharibayo kiro." 
Revelation21:26 Baryarureetamu ekitiinisa ky'amahanga n'okuhimbisibwa kwago. 
Revelation21:27 Kwonka tiharitaahamu kintu kyona ekitashemeire, n'obu yaakuba weena okora ebihagaro nari omubeihi, kureka abo bonka abahandiikirwe omu kitabo ky'amagara eky'Omwana gw'entaama." 
Revelation22:1 Bwanyima yaanyoreka omugyera gw'amaizi g'amagara, agarikwengyengyeta nka kristalo, niguruga omu kitebe kya Ruhanga eky'obukama n'eky'Omwana gw'entaama," 
Revelation22:2 niguraba ahagati y'enguuto y'orwo rurembo; seeri na seenu y'ogwo mugyera hariyo omuti gw'amagara ogwana ebyana by'emiringo ikumi n'ebiri, nigwana buri kwezi, kandi amababi gaagwo gari ag'okutambira amahanga." 
Revelation22:3 Tiharibayo mukyeeno obundi, ekitebe kya Ruhanga eky'obukama n'eky'Omwana gw'entaama nibyo biriba omuri orwo rurembo, n'abaheereza be baryamuramya;" 
Revelation22:4 baryareeba amaisho ge, n'eiziina rye riryahandiikwa aha buso bwabo." 
Revelation22:5 Tiburigaruka kwira, kandi tibaryetenga kwakirwa tabaaza n'obu ryakuba eizooba, ahakuba Mukama Ruhanga aryaba omushana gwabo, kandi baryategyeka ebiro n'ebiro." 
Revelation22:6 Kandi yangira ati: Ebigambo ebi n'eby'okwesiga kandi eby'amazima. Mukama Ruhanga w'emyoyo ya baanabi akatuma maraika we kworeka abaheereza be ebishemereire kubaho juba. 
Revelation22:7 Reeba, niinyija juba. Aine omugisha orikuta omutima aha bigambo by'obunabi eby'omu kitabo eki." 
Revelation22:8 Nyowe Yohaana niinye naahuriire ebi, kandi nkabireeba. Ku naabihuriire, naabireeba, naagwa ahansi aha bigyere bya maraika owaabinyorekire kumuramya;" 
Revelation22:9 kwonka yangira ati: Reka! otakikora; ndi omuheereza mugyenzi waawe n'owa beene sho baanabi, hamwe n'abo abata omutima aha bigambo by'omu kitabo eki. Ramya Ruhanga." 
Revelation22:10 Kandi yangira ati: Otakoma ebigambo by'obunabi eby'omu kitabo eki n'akamanyiso, ahakuba obunaku buri haihi." 
Revelation22:11 K'enkozi y'ebibi egume ebikore; osiisikaire agume ari osiisikaire; ohikiriire agume akore eby'okuhikiirira; orikwera agume ari orikwera. 
Revelation22:12 Reeba, niinyija juba n'ebihembo byangye kuzimuurira omuntu weeena nk'ebi yaakozire oku biri." 
Revelation22:13 Niinye Alufa na Omega, ow'okubanza kandi ow'aha muheru, obutandikiro kandi obugarukiro." 
Revelation22:14 Baine omugisha abarikwozya ebijwaro byabo, ngu babone kwikirizibwa kurya aha muti gw'amagara, kandi bataahe omu rurembo nibaraba omu marembo." 
Revelation22:15 Aheeru hariyo embwa, abarogi, abashambani, n'abarikuramya ebishushani, kandi n'omuntu weena okunda ebishuba akabikora." 
Revelation22:16 Nyowe Yesu mbatumireho maraika wangye kumanyisa amakanisa ebigambo ebi. Niinye kitsitsa kya Daudi, kandi omwijukuru, Enyonyoozi y'omu kasheeshe erikumurinkana." 
Revelation22:17 Omwoyo n'Omugore nibagira bati: Ija! Orikuhurira agire ati: Ija! Oine eiriho aije; kandi weena orikwenda atwarire busha amaizi g'amagara. 
Revelation22:18 Niinyehanangiriza omuntu weena orikuhurira ebigambo by'omu kitabo eki, nti: Omuntu weena ku aribyongyeraho, Ruhanga aryamwongyeraho ebibonaboneso ebihandiikirwe omu kitabo eki;" 
Revelation22:19 kandi omuntu weena ku aricwa aha bigambo eby'omu kitabo ky'obunabi obu, Ruhanga aryamwaka omugabo gwe ogw'aha muti gw'amagara n'ogw'omu rurembo orurikwera, ebihandiikirwe omu kitabo eki." 
Revelation22:20 Orikuhamya ebi naagira ati: Buzimazima niinyija juba. Amiina. Ija, Mukama waitu Yesu."
